从 arXiv 自动抓取每日论文，基于标题与摘要生成中文导读；每篇论文给出 TL;DR、研究动机、解决问题、现象分析、主要方法、实验信息、贡献与局限。左侧可按日期、大类/小类、优先级与关键词快速筛选。

视觉-语言模型 (VLM/MLLM) 46 篇

Consensus Entropy: Harnessing Multi-VLM Agreement for Self-Verifying and Self-Improving OCR

High 2504.11101
Yulong Zhang, Tianyi Liang, Xinyue Huang, Erfei Cui, Guoqing Wang, Xu Guo, Chenhui Li, Gongshen Liu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出共识熵（CE）指标，利用多 VLM 间一致性实现无训练、无监督的 OCR 质量验证与自改进。
🎯研究动机

OCR 是 VLM 和 LLM 数据生成的基础，但现有 VLM 在样本级错误检测上表现不佳，缺乏有效的无监督质量控制方法。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖训练或监督的情况下，可靠地检测 OCR 输出中的错误并提升整体质量。

🔎现象分析

正确预测在输出空间中趋于一致，而错误预测则发散，因此多模型间的分歧程度可作为可靠性的指标。

🛠️主要方法

提出共识熵（CE），通过测量多个 VLM 输出之间的熵来估计可靠性；基于 CE 构建 CE-OCR 框架，利用集成一致性验证输出、选择最佳输出，并通过自适应路由提升效率。

📊实验结果

在 OCR 任务上，CE 在质量验证中 F1 分数比 VLM-as-Judge 提升 42.1%；CE-OCR 在相同成本下优于自一致性和单模型基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出共识熵（CE），一种无需训练、与模型无关的 OCR 质量度量指标。
  • 开发 CE-OCR 框架，实现无监督的 OCR 输出验证、选择与效率优化。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖多个 VLM 的集成，可能增加推理成本。
  • 自适应路由策略的泛化性未在更多任务上验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Optical Character Recognition (OCR) is fundamental to Vision-Language Models (VLMs) and high-quality data generation for LLM training. Yet, despite progress in average OCR accuracy, state-of-the-art VLMs still struggle with detecting sample-level errors and lack effective unsupervised quality control. We introduce Consensus Entropy (CE), a training-free, model-agnostic metric that estimates output reliability by measuring inter-model agreement entropy. The core insight is that correct predictions converge in output space, while errors diverge. Based on CE, we develop CE-OCR, a lightweight multi-model framework that verifies outputs by ensemble agreement, selects the best outputs, and further improves efficiency through adaptive routing. Experiments demonstrate that CE is robust for quality verification, improving F1 scores by 42.1% over VLM-as-Judge. CE-OCR achieves consistent OCR gains, outperforming self-consistency and single-model baselines at the same cost. Notably, CE requires no training or supervision, enabling plug-and-play integration. Code: this https URL .

Do Joint Audio-Video Generation Models Understand Physics?

High 2605.07061
Zijun Cui, Xiulong Liu, Hao Fang, Mingwei Xu, Jiageng Liu, Zexin Xu, Weiguo Pian, Shijian Deng et al.
arXiv PDF cs.SD
TL;DR：联合音视频生成模型缺乏物理常识，在事件和环境转换场景下表现脆弱。
🎯研究动机

联合音视频生成模型虽已接近专业质量，但可能仅生成看似合理却违反物理一致性的内容，缺乏对音视频物理规律的真实理解。

❓解决问题

评估联合音视频生成模型是否具备物理常识，并揭示其在物理一致性上的不足。

🔎现象分析

所有模型在物理理解上远非鲁棒，事件驱动和环境驱动转换场景下性能急剧下降，专有模型在反物理提示上完全失败。

🛠️主要方法

提出 AV-Phys Bench 基准，包含稳态、事件转换、环境转换三类场景及反物理提示，从视觉语义、音频语义、视觉物理常识、音频物理常识、跨模态物理常识五个维度评估；并设计 AV-Phys Agent 评估器，结合多模态语言模型与声学测量工具。

📊实验结果

在三个专有模型和四个开源模型上评估，Seedance 2.0 表现最佳，但所有模型均远未达到鲁棒的物理理解。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AV-Phys Bench 基准，系统评估联合音视频生成模型的物理常识。
  • 揭示现有模型在跨模态物理一致性和转换场景动态方面的严重不足。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准场景有限，可能未覆盖所有物理常识类型。
  • 评估依赖 AV-Phys Agent，其与人类评分的一致性可能受限于特定设置。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Joint audio-video generation models are rapidly approaching professional production quality, raising a central question: do they understand audio-visual physics, or merely generate plausible sounds and frames that violate real-world consistency? We introduce AV-Phys Bench, a benchmark for evaluating physical commonsense in joint audio-video generation. AV-Phys Bench tests models across three scene categories: Steady State, Event Transition, and Environment Transition. It covers physics-grounded subcategories drawn from real-world scenes, plus Anti-AV-Physics prompts that deliberately request physically inconsistent audio-video behavior. Each generation is evaluated along five dimensions: visual semantic adherence, audio semantic adherence, visual physical commonsense, audio physical commonsense, and cross-modal physical commonsense. Across three proprietary and four open-source models, we find that Seedance 2.0 performs best overall, but all models remain far from robust physical understanding. Performance drops sharply on event-driven and environment-driven transitions, and even strong proprietary systems collapse on Anti-AV-Physics prompts. We further introduce AV-Phys Agent, a ReAct-style evaluator that combines a multimodal language model with deterministic acoustic measurement tools, producing rankings that closely align with human ratings. Our results identify cross-modal physical consistency and transition-driven scene dynamics as key open challenges for joint audio-video generation.

Learning to Track Instance from Single Nature Language Description

High 2605.07064
Yaozong Zheng, Bineng Zhong, Qihua Liang, Shuimu Zeng, Haiying Xia, Shuxiang Song
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出无需边界框标注的自监督视觉 - 语言跟踪器，通过动态令牌聚合模块实现语言引导的实例跟踪。
🎯研究动机

现有视觉 - 语言跟踪方法依赖边界框标注，成本高且难以扩展；自监督方法在语言引导跟踪中效果有限，缺乏有效的语义对齐机制。

❓解决问题

如何在没有边界框真值的情况下，仅利用自然语言描述实现视频序列中的实例跟踪。

🔎现象分析

传统方法平等融合所有语言和视觉令牌，导致冗余视觉噪声干扰语义对齐，影响跟踪性能。

🛠️主要方法

提出自监督 VL 跟踪器，包含动态令牌聚合模块：基于锚令牌选择模板帧中的关键目标令牌，按注意力分数合并并聚合到语言令牌中，再用融合后的语言令牌引导搜索帧中的目标令牌提取并传播至后续帧。

📊实验结果

在视觉 - 语言跟踪基准上进行实验，结果表明所提方法优于现有自监督方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次实现无需边界框标注的自监督视觉 - 语言跟踪。
  • 提出动态令牌聚合模块，通过非平等处理视觉令牌增强语义对齐并消除噪声。
  • 在 VL 跟踪基准上超越现有自监督方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对复杂语言描述或长视频序列的鲁棒性有限。
  • 自监督学习依赖视频内在一致性，可能受场景变化影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

How to achieve vision-language (VL) tracking using natural language descriptions from a video sequence \textbf{without relying on any bounding-box ground truth}? In this work, we achieve this goal by tackling \textit{self-supervised VL tracking}, which aims to evaluate tracking capabilities guided by natural language descriptions. We introduce \textbf{\tracker}, a novel self-supervised VL tracker that is capable of tracking any referred object by a language description. Unlike traditional methods that equally fuse all language and visual tokens, we propose an efficient Dynamic Token Aggregation Module, which treats each visual token \textbf{unequally}. The module consists of three main steps: i) Based on an anchor token, it selects multiple important target tokens from the template frame. ii) The selected target tokens are merged according to their attention scores and aggregated into the language tokens, thereby eliminating redundant visual token noise and enhancing semantic alignment. iii) Finally, the fused language tokens serve as guiding signals to extract potential target tokens from the search frame and propagate them to subsequent frames, enhancing temporal prompts and encouraging the tracker to autonomously learn instance tracking from unlabeled videos. This new modeling approach enables the effective self-supervised learning of language-guided tracking representations without the need for large-scale bounding box annotations. Extensive experiments on VL tracking benchmarks show that {\tracker} surpasses SOTA self-supervised methods.

Qwen3-VL-Seg: Unlocking Open-World Referring Segmentation with Vision-Language Grounding

High 2605.07141
Yuan Yao, Qiushi Yang, Humen Zhong, Jiangning Wei, Yifang Men, Shuai Bai, Miaomiao Cui, Zhibo Yang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：Qwen3-VL-Seg 通过轻量级框引导掩码解码器，将 MLLM 预测的边界框转化为像素级分割，实现开放世界指代分割。
🎯研究动机

现有 MLLM 在开放世界视觉定位中输出稀疏边界框，无法进行密集像素预测；而基于 MLLM 的分割方法要么直接预测稀疏轮廓坐标导致边界不连续，要么依赖外部分割模型（如 SAM）带来架构和部署开销。

❓解决问题

如何在不引入大量参数和外部模型的前提下，将 MLLM 的开放世界视觉定位能力扩展到像素级指代分割。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Qwen3-VL-Seg，一个参数高效框架：将 MLLM 预测的边界框作为语义结构先验，通过轻量级框引导掩码解码器（包含多尺度空间特征注入、空间 - 语义查询构建、框引导高分辨率像素融合、迭代掩码感知查询精化）解码为像素级分割掩码，仅增加 17M 参数。同时构建大规模训练数据集 SA1B-ORS 和评估基准 ORS-Bench。

📊实验结果

在指代分割、视觉定位和 ORS-Bench 上进行实验，结果显示在封闭集和开放世界设置下表现强劲，在语言密集型指令和分布外泛化上具有明显优势，且通用多模态基准评测表明模型保留了通用能力。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Qwen3-VL-Seg，一种参数高效的开放世界指代分割框架，仅增加 17M 参数即可实现像素级分割。
  • 构建 SA1B-ORS 大规模训练数据集和 ORS-Bench 评估基准，支持开放世界指代分割训练与评测。
  • 在指代分割、视觉定位和 ORS-Bench 上表现优异，尤其在语言密集型指令和分布外泛化上具有优势，且保持通用多模态能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 MLLM 预测的边界框质量，若框不准确则影响分割效果。
  • 仅增加 17M 参数，但框架在极端复杂场景下的泛化能力有待进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Open-world referring segmentation requires grounding unconstrained language expressions to precise pixel-level regions. Existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs) exhibit strong open-world visual grounding, but their outputs remain limited to sparse bounding-box coordinates and are insufficient for dense visual prediction. Recent MLLM-based segmentation methods either directly predict sparse contour coordinates, struggling to reconstruct continuous object boundaries, or rely on external segmentation foundation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM), introducing substantial architectural and deployment overhead. We present Qwen3-VL-Seg, a parameter-efficient framework that treats the MLLM-predicted box as a semantically grounded structural prior and decodes it into pixel-level referring segmentation. At its core, a lightweight box-guided mask decoder combines multi-scale spatial feature injection, spatial-semantic query construction, box-guided high-resolution pixel fusion, and iterative mask-aware query refinement, introducing only 17M parameters (about 0.4\% of the base model). For scalable open-world training, we construct SA1B-ORS, an SA-1B-derived dataset with two subsets: SA1B-CoRS (category-oriented samples) and SA1B-DeRS (descriptive, instance-specific samples). For evaluation, we curate ORS-Bench, a manually screened benchmark with in-distribution and out-of-distribution subsets covering diverse referring expression types. Extensive experiments on referring expression segmentation, visual grounding, and ORS-Bench show that Qwen3-VL-Seg performs strongly across closed-set and open-world settings, with clear advantages on language-intensive instructions and strong out-of-distribution generalization. Evaluations on general multimodal benchmarks further show that the model broadly preserves general-purpose multimodal competence after segmentation-oriented adaptation.

Uncovering and Shaping the Latent Representation of 3D Scene Topology in Vision-Language Models

High 2605.07148
Haoming Wang, Wei Gao
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：揭示 VLM 中 3D 场景拓扑的隐式表征，并通过 Dirichlet 能量正则化提升空间推理能力。
🎯研究动机

人类通过拓扑保持的认知地图导航，但 VLM 是否构建了类似的 3D 内部表征尚不明确，且现有模型的空间推理受非几何语义干扰。

❓解决问题

VLM 中 3D 场景拓扑的隐式表征被非几何视觉语义掩盖，如何提取并利用该表征提升空间推理能力。

🔎现象分析

VLM 存在潜在拓扑地图，但被颜色、形状等非几何语义主导；通过跨场景线性特征提取可分离出干净的空间子空间。

🛠️主要方法

跨场景线性特征提取分离空间子空间，并引入基于 Dirichlet 能量的潜在正则化方法，在简单合成数据上微调 VLM。

📊实验结果

在真实世界空间基准上，该方法相比标准 SFT 和竞争基线在空间拓扑任务中提升高达 12.1%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 证明 VLM 拥有 3D 场景的潜在拓扑地图，并可通过线性方法提取空间子空间。
  • 提出基于 Dirichlet 能量的潜在正则化方法，在真实空间基准上提升拓扑理解任务性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于简单合成数据微调，可能限制复杂场景泛化。
  • 正则化方法依赖场景图构建，计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Decades of cognitive science establish that humans navigate environments by forming cognitive maps, defined as allocentric and topology-preserving representations of 3D space. While modern Vision-Language Models (VLMs) demonstrate emergent spatial reasoning from 2D egocentric inputs, it remains unclear whether they construct an analogous 3D internal representation. In this paper, we demonstrate that current VLMs do possess a latent topological map of 3D scenes, but it is heavily overshadowed by non-geometric visual semantics, such as color and shape. By isolating this spatial subspace through cross-scene linear feature extraction, we extract a clean spatial subspace that causally controls the model's spatial outputs. We mathematically shape this latent representation and prove its correspondence to the Laplacian eigenmaps of the scene's 3D Gaussian-kernel graph, converging to the physical 3D space in the continuous limit. Motivated by this geometric identification, we further introduce a mathematically principled latent regularization method for VLMs, based on Dirichlet energy. Applying this single-term regularizer to a minimal 500-step supervised VLM fine-tuning (SFT) on simple synthetic data yields significant improvements on real-world spatial benchmarks, outperforming standard SFT and competitive baselines by up to 12.1\% in spatial tasks involving scene topology understanding. Source code is available at this https URL

PRIMED: Adaptive Modality Suppression for Referring Audio-Visual Segmentation via Biased Competition

High 2605.07154
Yuchen He, Jing Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出受认知科学中竞争理论启发的自适应模态抑制方法，实现指代音视频分割的 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

现有方法将多模态线索视为同质输入，易受无关或误导模态干扰，缺乏对模态相关性的自适应处理。

❓解决问题

如何根据指代表达和场景自适应地抑制无关模态，提升指代音视频分割的准确性。

🔎现象分析

不同指代表达和场景中模态相关性动态变化，现有融合方法无法有效处理。

🛠️主要方法

基于竞争理论，通过模态先验解码器估计模态依赖类型，Token 蒸馏器提取全局视觉 token，并引入空间感知语义对齐损失。

📊实验结果

在 Ref-AVS 基准上达到整体 SOTA 性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 PRIMED 框架，首次将竞争理论引入指代音视频分割，实现自适应模态抑制。
  • 设计模态先验解码器和 Token 蒸馏器，以及空间感知语义对齐损失，提升分割性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量指代表达和场景多样性。
  • 计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Referring Audio-Visual Segmentation (Ref-AVS) seeks to localize and segment target objects in video frames based on visual, auditory, and textual referring cues. The task is challenging because the relevance of different modalities varies across referring expressions and scenes, while existing methods typically treat multimodal cues as homogeneous inputs for fusion, prompting, or reasoning, making them vulnerable to irrelevant or misleading modalities. To address this problem, we propose PRIMED, inspired by the biased competition theory in cognitive neuroscience, which explicitly models both visual perception and language-driven prior modulation, and enables more accurate Ref-AVS by adaptive modality suppression. Specifically, a Modality Prior Decoder first estimates whether the referring expression relies primarily on audio, vision, or their joint interaction, generating a modality prior to adaptively guide high-level attention. A Token Distiller further extracts compact global visual tokens from high-level features and shares them across Competition-aware Cross-modal Fusion modules to provide hierarchical global context. Additionally, we introduce a Spatial-Aware Semantic Alignment loss to further enhance foreground-background discrimination through contrastive learning. Extensive experiments on the Ref-AVS benchmark demonstrate that PRIMED achieves state-of-the-art overall performance.

HyperEyes: Dual-Grained Efficiency-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Parallel Multimodal Search Agents

High 2605.07177
Guankai Li, Jiabin Chen, Yi Xu, Xichen Zhang, Yuan Lu
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出并行多模态搜索智能体 HyperEyes，通过双粒度效率感知强化学习实现多实体并发搜索，在 6 个基准上以 5.3 倍更少工具调用轮次实现 9.9% 准确率提升。
🎯研究动机

现有多模态搜索智能体逐个处理目标实体，每实体一次工具调用，导致查询分解为独立子检索时冗余交互轮次累积，效率低下。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个能并发执行多实体搜索、同时将推理效率作为训练目标的并行多模态搜索智能体。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

两阶段训练：1) 冷启动阶段，通过并行友好数据合成管道和渐进式拒绝采样生成效率导向轨迹；2) 双粒度效率感知强化学习：宏观层 TRACE 奖励动态收紧参考值抑制冗余工具调用，微观层在线策略蒸馏注入密集令牌级纠正信号。

📊实验结果

在 6 个基准上评估，HyperEyes-30B 在准确率上超过最强开源智能体 9.9%，平均工具调用轮次减少 5.3 倍。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 HyperEyes，首个将视觉定位与检索融合为单一原子动作的并行多模态搜索智能体。
  • 提出双粒度效率感知强化学习框架，包含宏观 TRACE 奖励和微观在线策略蒸馏。
  • 构建 IMEB 基准，联合评估搜索能力与效率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖外部教师模型进行在线策略蒸馏，增加训练复杂度。
  • 并行搜索在多实体强依赖场景下可能引入冲突。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Existing multimodal search agents process target entities sequentially, issuing one tool call per entity and accumulating redundant interaction rounds whenever a query decomposes into independent sub-retrievals. We argue that effective multimodal agents should search wider rather than longer: dispatching multiple grounded queries concurrently within a round. To this end, we present HyperEyes, a parallel multimodal search agent that fuses visual grounding and retrieval into a single atomic action, enabling concurrent search across multiple entities while treating inference efficiency as a first-class training objective. HyperEyes is trained in two stages. For cold-start supervision, we develop a Parallel-Amenable Data Synthesis Pipeline covering visual multi-entity and textual multi-constraint queries, curating efficiency-oriented trajectories via Progressive Rejection Sampling. Building on this, our central contribution, a Dual-Grained Efficiency-Aware Reinforcement Learning framework, operates at two levels. At the macro level, we propose TRACE (Tool-use Reference-Adaptive Cost Efficiency), a trajectory-level reward whose reference is monotonically tightened during training to suppress superfluous tool calls without restricting genuine multi-hop search. At the micro level, we adapt On-Policy Distillation to inject dense token-level corrective signals from an external teacher on failed rollouts, mitigating the credit-assignment deficiency of sparse outcome rewards. Since existing benchmarks evaluate accuracy as the sole metric, omitting inference cost, we introduce IMEB, a human-curated benchmark of 300 instances that jointly evaluates search capability and efficiency. Across six benchmarks, HyperEyes-30B surpasses the strongest comparable open-source agent by 9.9% in accuracy with 5.3x fewer tool-call rounds on average.

Towards multi-modal forgery representation learning for AI-generated video detection and localization

High 2605.07232
Dat Le, Khoa Nguyen, Xin Wang, Shu Hu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出多模态伪造表征学习框架，联合视觉、音频和语义分支，实现 AI 生成视频的检测与细粒度时间定位。
🎯研究动机

现有 AI 生成视频检测方法多依赖单模态或部分模态，且缺乏细粒度时间伪造定位能力，难以应对跨视觉和音频通道的部分篡改视频带来的语义扭曲和滥用风险。

❓解决问题

如何实现多模态 AI 生成视频的联合检测与细粒度时间伪造定位。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出一个核心架构，联合集成 LMM 语义分支、时空视觉分支和多尺度部分伪造音频分支，实现多模态伪造表征学习。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次提出联合 LMM 语义、时空视觉和多尺度音频的多模态架构用于 AI 生成视频检测与定位。
  • 实现同时检测和细粒度时间定位部分篡改的 AI 生成视频伪造。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量多模态数据，实际场景中数据获取困难。
  • 计算复杂度较高，实时性可能受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent advances in generative AI have democratized video creation at scale. AI-generated videos, including partially manipulated clips across visual and audio channels, pose escalating risks of semantic distortion and misuse, which motivates the need for reliable detection tools. Most existing AI-generated video detectors remain limited by single- or partial-modality of data modeling and the lack of fine-grained temporal forgery localization. To address these challenges, our primary novelty introduces a core architecture that jointly integrates an LMM semantic branch with a spatio-temporal (ST) visual branch and a multi-scale partial-spoof (PS) audio branch. This multi-modal approach enables simultaneous detection and fine-grained temporal localization of partially manipulated AI-generated video forgeries. Extensive experiments show that this approach outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods.

PersonaGest: Personalized Co-Speech Gesture Generation with Semantic-Guided Hierarchical Motion Representation

High 2605.07252
Junchuan Zhao, Qifan Liang, Ye Wang
arXiv PDF cs.GR
TL;DR：提出语义引导的分层运动表示，实现个性化且语义一致的共语手势生成。
🎯研究动机

现有 VQ-VAE 方法生成共语手势时，未能将语义结构编码到运动表示中，也未显式分离内容与风格，导致语义连贯性和个性化保真度受限。

❓解决问题

如何生成与语音语义一致且符合用户指定手势风格的个性化共语手势。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

两阶段框架：第一阶段使用语义引导的 RVQ-VAE，通过语义感知运动码本（SMoC）和对比学习解耦运动内容与手势风格；第二阶段使用掩码生成 Transformer 生成内容令牌，并通过级联风格残差 Transformer 以参考运动提示控制风格。

📊实验结果

在客观指标和感知用户研究上达到最先进性能，风格与参考提示高度一致。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出语义引导的 RVQ-VAE，在残差量化结构中解耦运动内容与手势风格。
  • 设计语义感知运动码本（SMoC）和对比学习增强内容 - 风格分离。
  • 提出掩码生成 Transformer 与风格残差 Transformer 级联的生成策略，实现风格可控的语义一致手势生成。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖参考运动提示的质量。
  • 未提及对长序列或复杂语义的泛化能力。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Co-speech gesture generation aims to synthesize realistic body movements that are semantically coherent with speech and faithful to a user-specified gestural style. Existing VQ-VAE based co-speech gesture generation methods improve generation quality but fail to encode semantic structure into the motion representation or explicitly disentangle content from style, limiting both semantic coherence and personalization fidelity. We present PersonaGest, a two-stage framework addressing both limitations. In the first stage, a semantic-guided RVQ-VAE disentangles motion content and gestural style within the residual quantization structure, where a Semantic-Aware Motion Codebook (SMoC) organizes the content codebook by gesture semantics and contrastive learning further enforces content-style separation. In the second stage, a Masked Generative Transformer generates content tokens via a semantic-aware re-masking strategy, followed by a cascade of Style Residual Transformers conditioned on a reference motion prompt for style control. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on objective metrics and perceptual user studies, with strong style consistency to the reference prompt. Our project page with demo videos is available at this https URL

Disambiguating 2D-3D Correspondences in Gaussian Splatting-based Feature Fields for Visual Localization

High 2605.07351
Miso Lee, Sangeek Hyun, Yerim Jeon, Jae-Pil Heo
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：SplitGS-Loc 通过高斯分裂和权重选择解决 GSFFs 中 2D-3D 对应模糊问题，实现高精度视觉定位。
🎯研究动机

基于高斯泼溅的特征场（GSFFs）在视觉定位中具有潜力，但光度优化导致的多对一映射和多余高斯体破坏了 PnP 姿态估计的稳定性，限制了其定位精度。

❓解决问题

GSFFs 中 2D-3D 对应关系模糊（多对一映射）以及缺乏多视图一致性的问题，导致 PnP 姿态估计不稳定。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出光度优化的 GSFFs 天生不适合 2D-3D 匹配：每个高斯的体积范围导致像素到点的多对一映射，破坏 PnP 稳定性；光度优化产生缺乏多视图一致性的多余高斯体。

🛠️主要方法

提出 SplitGS-Loc 框架，核心是混合高斯分裂（Mixture-of-Gaussians-based splitting），将每个高斯分解为更小的高斯，将模糊的多对一对应替换为精确的一对一对应；同时利用 GS 光栅化中的组合权重选择在多视图中显著且一致贡献的高斯，并通过强像素 - 高斯关联聚合判别性特征，增强多视图一致性。

📊实验结果

在多个定位基准上进行了实验，验证了 SplitGS-Loc 的有效性，达到最先进性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了光度优化的 GSFFs 在 2D-3D 匹配中的固有缺陷（多对一映射和多余高斯体）。
  • 提出了 SplitGS-Loc 框架，通过高斯分裂和权重选择实现精确的一对一对应和多视图一致性。
  • 在定位基准上达到最先进性能，无需每场景训练或迭代姿态优化。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高斯分裂的粒度选择，过细或过粗可能影响性能。
  • 未讨论在动态场景或光照变化下的鲁棒性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

While Gaussian Splatting-based Feature Fields (GSFFs) have shown promise for visual localization, this paper highlights that photometrically optimized GSFFs are inherently ill-suited for 2D-3D matching. The volumetric extent of each Gaussian induces many-to-one pixel-to-point mappings that destabilize PnP-based pose estimation, while photometric optimization gives rise to superfluous Gaussians devoid of multi-view consistency. To address these issues, we propose SplitGS-Loc, a localization-specialized GSFFs construction framework that disambiguates 2D-3D correspondences by exploiting Gaussian attributes. Our key design, Mixture-of-Gaussians-based splitting, decomposes each Gaussian into smaller Gaussians, replacing ambiguous many-to-one with precise one-to-one correspondences. In parallel, we exploit composition weights from GS rasterization to select Gaussians that significantly and consistently contribute across multiple views and aggregate discriminative features through strong pixel-Gaussian associations, enforcing multi-view consistency. The resulting compact yet discriminative feature fields enable stable PnP convergence, achieving state-of-the-art performance on localization benchmarks. Extensive experiments validate that SplitGS-Loc extends the utility of photometric GSFFs to accurate and efficient localization by exploiting Gaussian attributes, without per-scene training or iterative pose refinement.

Task-Oriented Communication for Human Action Understanding via Edge-Cloud Co-Inference

High 2605.07354
Jingyi Liu, Cheng Yuan, Lijun He, Jun Zhang, Jiawei Shao
arXiv PDF eess.SP
TL;DR：提出一种任务导向的通信框架，通过边缘 - 云协同推理，仅传输离散运动令牌实现高效、低延迟的人体动作理解。
🎯研究动机

传统方法需要从边缘设备传输大量视频数据到云端，导致带宽消耗高、延迟大且存在隐私风险，亟需一种高效、低延迟且保护隐私的解决方案。

❓解决问题

如何在资源受限的边缘设备上实现准确的人体动作理解，同时大幅减少数据传输量和系统延迟。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

利用单目姿态估计器提取连续关节坐标，通过 VQ-VAE 转换为离散运动令牌，仅传输码本索引（每帧 9 比特）；云端使用轻量投影器将运动令牌对齐到大视觉语言模型的嵌入空间，并通过指令微调实现复杂动作理解。

📊实验结果

在三个基准上评估，TOAU 将传输负载降至约 1%，系统延迟降至约 20%，同时保持与视频编解码方案相当的动作理解精度。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出任务导向的边缘 - 云协同推理框架 TOAU，显著降低传输负载和延迟。
  • 利用 VQ-VAE 将人体动作编码为离散运动令牌，实现高效通信并保护隐私。
  • 通过指令微调将运动令牌与 VLM 对齐，在三个基准上验证了与视频编解码方案相当的精度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖单目姿态估计的准确性，在遮挡或复杂场景下可能受限。
  • 运动令牌的离散化可能丢失细粒度动作信息。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The expanding application of smart sensing has created a growing demand for the accurate understanding of human action at the network edge. Traditional approaches require massive video data to be transmitted from resource-constrained edge devices to powerful cloud servers, incurring prohibitive uplink bandwidth consumption and unacceptable latency while raising privacy concerns. To overcome these bottlenecks, we propose a task-oriented communication framework for human action understanding (TOAU) through edge-cloud collaboration. Our framework utilizes a monocular pose estimator to extract continuous joint coordinates from raw videos, followed by a vector quantized variational autoencoder (VQ-VAE) to convert these coordinates into discrete motion tokens. Consequently, only a compact sequence of codebook indices is transmitted over the network, consuming as few as 9 bits per frame and avoiding privacy leakages. At the cloud server, a lightweight projector aligns these motion tokens with the embedding space of a large vision-language model (VLM) to facilitate complex action understanding, which is trained with an efficient instruction tuning paradigm. Comprehensive evaluations on three benchmarks demonstrate that our TOAU system reduces the transmission payload to approximately 1\% and the system latency to around 20\% compared to video codec-based solutions, while delivering comparable action understanding accuracy.

TTF: Temporal Token Fusion for Efficient Video-Language Model

High 2605.07355
Simin Huo, Ning LI
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出无需训练的时序令牌融合（TTF）方法，通过局部窗口相似度搜索压缩视频视觉令牌，在 Qwen3-VL-8B 上减少 67% 令牌并保持 99.5% 准确率。
🎯研究动机

视频语言模型（VLM）随着视频长度增加，视觉令牌数量急剧增长，导致推理成本高昂，现有压缩方法依赖全局相似性或注意力引导，带来额外开销。

❓解决问题

如何在不训练、不增加显著计算开销的前提下，高效压缩视频 VLM 中的冗余视觉令牌，以加速推理。

🔎现象分析

视频帧间存在结构化时序冗余，相邻帧的局部区域高度相似，可通过局部窗口相似度搜索有效识别并融合冗余令牌。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Temporal Token Fusion (TTF)：自动选择锚定帧，对后续帧进行局部窗口（如 3×3）相似度搜索，融合超过阈值的令牌，并通过坐标重对齐保持位置一致性，实现即插即用。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种无需训练、即插即用的视频令牌压缩框架 TTF，利用时序冗余高效减少视觉令牌。
  • 在 Qwen3-VL-8B 上验证，TTF 去除约 67% 令牌，保留 99.5% 基线准确率，仅引入约 0.16 GFLOPs 匹配开销。
⚠️方法局限
  • 阈值 t 需要手动设定，可能影响不同视频的压缩效果。
  • 局部窗口大小固定，可能无法适应所有运动模式。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Video-language models (VLMs) face rapid inference costs as visual token counts scale with video length. For example, 32 frames at $448{\times}448$ resolution already yield >8,000 visual tokens in Qwen3-VL, making LLM prefill the dominant throughput bottleneck. Existing methods often rely on global similarity or attention-guided compression, incurring offsets to their gains. We propose \textbf{Temporal Token Fusion (TTF)}, a training-free, plug-and-play pre-LLM token compression framework that exploits structured temporal redundancy in video. TTF automatically selects an anchor frame, then for each subsequent frame, performs a local window similarity search (e.g.,$3\times 3$), fusing tokens that exceed a threshold. The compressed sequence maintains positional consistency across both prefill and decoding through coordinate realignment, enabling seamless integration with existing VLM pipelines. On Qwen3-VL-8B with threshold t=0.70, TTF removes about 67\% of visual tokens while retaining 99.5\% of the baseline accuracy and introducing only ${\approx}0.16$\,GFLOPs of matching overhead. Overall, TTF offers a practical, efficient solution for video understanding. The code is available at \href{ this https URL }{ this https URL }

Weather-Robust Scene Semantics with Vision-Aligned 4D Radar

High 2605.07367
Kali Hamilton, Christoffer Heckman
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：用 4D 雷达替代相机实现恶劣天气下的场景语义理解，通过视觉对齐和冻结 VLM 解码，仅 7M 参数即可在雨雪雾天超越相机基线。
🎯研究动机

相机和 LiDAR 在雨、雾、雪等恶劣天气下性能严重退化，而毫米波雷达几乎不受影响，因此需要利用雷达实现全天候场景语义理解。

❓解决问题

如何将 4D 雷达数据与预训练视觉语言模型（VLM）对齐，以在恶劣天气下生成结构化场景描述，同时避免模态差异导致的性能下降。

🔎现象分析

发现 token-norm 不匹配是雷达桥接到冻结 VLM 的主要失败模式，通过投影器输出层 LayerNorm 可解决该问题。

🛠️主要方法

将雷达编码器对齐到冻结的 SigLIP 视觉嵌入，并通过冻结的 VLM 解码生成结构化场景描述，仅训练约 7M 参数。

📊实验结果

在 K-RADAR 数据集上，针对保留的雾、小雪、大雪序列进行测试，所有雷达配置均优于相机基线（相机基线幻觉率超过 90%）。摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种轻量级方法（7M 参数）将 4D 雷达与冻结 VLM 对齐，实现恶劣天气下的鲁棒场景语义理解。
  • 识别并解决了 token-norm 不匹配这一关键失败模式，通过投影器输出层 LayerNorm 有效缓解。
  • 系统分析了编码器复杂度、描述格式和池化策略的权衡，为未来雷达 -VLM 流水线设计提供指导。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在单一数据集 K-RADAR 上验证，泛化性未知。
  • 未与其他雷达 -VLM 方法对比，仅与相机基线比较。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Cameras and LiDAR degrade in rain, fog, and snow, while millimeter-wave radar remains largely unaffected. We align a radar encoder to frozen SigLIP vision embeddings and decode structured scene captions through a frozen vision-language model (VLM) with approximately 7M trainable parameters. On K-RADAR with held-out fog, light snow, and heavy snow sequences, all radar configurations outperform a camera baseline that collapses to over 90% hallucination. We identify a token-norm mismatch as the dominant failure mode when bridging radar to a frozen VLM and show that projector-output LayerNorm resolves it. Analysis of encoder complexity, caption format, and pooling strategy reveals tradeoffs that inform future radar-VLM pipeline design.

BalCapRL: A Balanced Framework for RL-Based MLLM Image Captioning

High 2605.07394
Shaokai Ye, Vasileios Saveris, Yihao Qian, Jiaming Hu, Elmira Amirloo, Peter Grasch
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 BalCapRL 框架，通过多目标强化学习平衡 MLLM 图像描述的准确性、覆盖率和语言质量。
🎯研究动机

现有基于强化学习的图像描述方法常偏重单一指标（如下游问答或流畅性），导致描述出现幻觉、冗长或过于泛化等问题，缺乏对核心维度的平衡优化。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个强化学习框架，同时优化图像描述的实用性、参考覆盖率和语言质量，避免单一目标带来的权衡问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出：面向实用性的目标会导致噪声、幻觉或过长描述，损害流畅性；而竞技场式目标则偏好流畅但泛化的描述，实用性有限。

🛠️主要方法

提出 BalCapRL 框架，联合优化实用性正确性、参考覆盖率和语言质量三个奖励项；采用 GDPO 风格的奖励解耦归一化处理连续值奖励，并引入长度条件奖励掩码以施加更合适的长度惩罚。

📊实验结果

在 LLaVA-1.5-7B、Qwen2.5-VL 3B 和 7B 基模型上验证，DCScore 提升 +13.6，CaptionQA 提升 +9.0，CapArena 提升 +29.0。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一个平衡的多目标强化学习框架，联合优化图像描述的实用性、覆盖率和语言质量。
  • 将 GDPO 风格的奖励解耦归一化应用于连续值描述奖励，并引入长度条件奖励掩码，提升训练效果。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定奖励函数设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 未讨论多目标权重调整的敏感性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Image captioning is one of the most fundamental tasks in computer vision. Owing to its open-ended nature, it has received significant attention in the era of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). In pursuit of ever more detailed and accurate captions, recent work has increasingly turned to reinforcement learning (RL). However, existing captioning-RL methods and evaluation metrics often emphasize a narrow notion of caption quality, inducing trade-offs across core dimensions of captioning. For example, utility-oriented objectives can encourage noisy, hallucinated, or overlong captions that improve downstream question answering while harming fluency, whereas arena-style objectives can favor fluent but generic descriptions with limited usefulness. To address this, we propose a more balanced RL framework that jointly optimizes utility-aware correctness, reference coverage, and linguistic quality. In order to effectively optimize the resulting continuous multi-objective reward formulation, we apply GDPO-style reward-decoupled normalization to continuous-valued captioning rewards and show that it improves performance over vanilla GRPO. Additionally, we introduce length-conditional reward masking, yielding a more suitable length penalty for captioning. Across LLaVA-1.5-7B and Qwen2.5-VL 3B and 7B base models, our method consistently improves caption quality, with peak gains of +13.6 DCScore, +9.0 CaptionQA, and +29.0 CapArena across different models.

InsHuman: Towards Natural and Identity-Preserving Human Insertion

High 2605.07402
Jie Li, Shulian Zhang, Yangyang Gao, Wenbo Li, Yulun Zhang, Yong Guo, Jian Chen
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 InsHuman 框架，通过自适应融合和身份保持模块实现自然且保真的人像插入。
🎯研究动机

现有图像编辑模型在将特定人物插入新背景时，常出现姿态不当、人数不一致、面部身份改变等问题，且公开数据集缺乏全身肖像和真实的人 - 背景物理交互。

❓解决问题

如何实现自然且身份保持的人像插入，即在不改变人物身份的前提下，使人物姿态、数量和外观与目标背景协调一致。

🔎现象分析

现有模型在人像插入任务中失败模式包括：人物姿态与背景不协调、人数不一致、面部身份被修改。

🛠️主要方法

提出 InsHuman 框架，包含三个组件：Human-Background Adaptive Fusion (HBAF) 通过前景检测和区域感知加权对齐人物区域；Face-to-Face ID-Preserving (FFIP) 通过人脸识别特征匹配强制身份一致性；Bidirectional Data Pairing (BDP) 构建高质量数据集 BDP-InsHuman。

📊实验结果

实验表明 InsHuman 在生成合理图像的同时保持人物身份不变，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 InsHuman 框架，实现自然且身份保持的人像插入。
  • 提出 HBAF 和 FFIP 模块分别解决姿态 / 数量一致性和身份保持问题。
  • 提出 BDP 策略构建高质量人像插入数据集 BDP-InsHuman。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖人脸检测和匹配的准确性。
  • 数据集构建策略可能不适用于所有场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Human insertion aims to naturally place specific individuals into a target background. Although existing image editing models may have such ability, they often produce failure cases, including inappropriate human pose in new background, inconsistent number of people, and modified facial identity. Moreover, publicly available human datasets often lack full-body portraits and realistic physical interaction between humans and their background. To address these challenges, we propose InsHuman for natural and identity-preserving human insertion. Specifically, we propose Human-Background Adaptive Fusion (HBAF), which detects foreground humans to obtain a binary mask and applies region-aware weighting to align the human regions between predicted and ground-truth latents, ensuring the person's pose, count, and overall appearance are coherently adapted to the target this http URL further propose Face-to-Face ID-Preserving (FFIP), which detects and matches faces between the generated image and the source image in terms of face recognition features to enforce identity consistency for each this http URL addition, we propose Bidirectional Data Pairing (BDP) strategy to construct BDP-InsHuman, a high-quality dataset with realistic human-background interactions. Experiments demonstrate that InsHuman achieves significant improvements in generating plausible images while keeping human identity unchanged.

ChartREG++: Towards Benchmarking and Improving Chart Referring Expression Grounding under Diverse referring clues and Multi-Target Referring

High 2605.07415
Tianhao Niu, Ziyu Han, Qingfu Zhu, Wanxiang Che
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 ChartREG++ 基准和代码驱动合成方法，提升图表指代表达定位性能。
🎯研究动机

现有图表指代表达定位基准存在定位精度低、目标数量有限、语言线索单一、图表类型覆盖窄等问题，限制了多模态大模型在图表上的空间定位与推理能力评估。

❓解决问题

构建一个支持多种定位形式、多目标、多样化线索和多种图表类型的图表指代表达定位基准，并提升模型在该任务上的性能。

🔎现象分析

多模态大模型在图表指代表达定位上存在显著性能差距，现有基准的局限性导致模型能力评估不全面。

🛠️主要方法

提出代码驱动合成管道，利用绘图程序与渲染图元的内在对齐生成像素级精确实例掩码，训练实例分割模型并集成到通用多模态定位框架中。

📊实验结果

在提出的基准和 ChartQA 导出的真实图表定位基准上，所提系统持续优于基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了系统支持多种定位形式、多目标、多样化线索和多种图表类型的图表指代表达定位基准。
  • 提出代码驱动合成管道，生成像素级精确掩码，训练实例分割模型并集成到通用定位框架，显著提升性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 合成数据与真实图表之间可能存在域差异。
  • 方法依赖绘图程序代码，可能不适用于所有图表类型。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Referring expression grounding is a core problem in visual grounding and is widely used as a diagnostic of spatial grounding and reasoning in vision and language models, yet most prior work focuses on natural images. In contrast, existing chart referring expression grounding-related benchmarks remain limited: (1) they largely adopt bounding boxes, constraining localization precision for fine chart elements (2) they mostly assume a single and two referred target instances, failing to handle multi-instance target references; (3) the language expressions over-rely on textual cues or data-rank clues (4) they cover only a narrow range of chart types. To address these issues, we introduce a chart referring expression grounding benchmark that systematically supports multiple localization forms, multiple referred targets, diverse grounding cues and diverse chart types. Results across representative multimodal large models reveal a significant performance gap. We further introduce a code-driven synthesis pipeline that exploits the inherent alignment between plotting programs and rendered chart primitives to derive pixel accurate instance masks across chart element types and granularities. We train an instance segmentation model with the synthesized masks and integrate it into a general-purpose multimodal grounding framework. The resulting system consistently outperforms baselines on our benchmark and generalizes well to a ChartQA-derived real-chart grounding benchmark.

EditRefiner: A Human-Aligned Agentic Framework for Image Editing Refinement

High 2605.07457
Zitong Xu, Huiyu Duan, Yifei Nie, Mingda Du, Sijing Wu, Xiongkuo Min, Tianyi Zheng, Jian Zhang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一个基于人类反馈数据集和分层智能体框架的图像编辑后处理修正方法，显著提升局部修正的准确性和感知对齐。
🎯研究动机

现有文本引导图像编辑模型虽进步显著，但编辑结果常存在物体不自然、光照不匹配、意外变化等细粒度问题，而现有修正方法要么依赖昂贵的迭代重生成，要么使用空间定位能力弱的视觉语言模型，导致语义漂移和不可靠的局部修正。

❓解决问题

如何高效、准确地检测和修正编辑图像中的细粒度瑕疵，同时保持与人类感知对齐。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 15K 图像、60K 标注瑕疵区域和 80K 编辑失败区域的细粒度人类反馈数据集 EditFHF-15K，并提出分层智能体框架 EditRefiner，包含感知、推理、行动和评估四个智能体，模拟人类感知 - 推理 - 行动 - 评估循环进行局部修正。

📊实验结果

在多个基准上，EditRefiner 在失真定位、诊断准确性和人类感知对齐方面持续优于现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了 EditFHF-15K 数据集，包含大量细粒度人类反馈标注和评分。
  • 提出 EditRefiner 框架，实现可解释、分层、与人类对齐的自动图像编辑修正。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖数据集的质量和覆盖范围。
  • 框架复杂度较高，推理成本可能增加。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent text-guided image editing (TIE) models have made remarkable progress, yet edited images still frequently suffer from fine-grained issues such as unnatural objects, lighting mismatch, and unexpected changes. Existing refinement approaches either rely on costly iterative regeneration or employ vision-language models (VLMs) with weak spatial grounding, often resulting in semantic drift and unreliable local corrections. To address these limitations, we first construct EditFHF-15K, a dataset of fine-grained human feedback for edited images, comprising (1) 15K images from 12 TIE models spanning 43 editing tasks, (2) 60K annotated artifact regions and 80K editing failure regions, each accompanied by textual reasoning, and (3) 45K mean opinion scores (MOSs) assessing perceptual quality, instruction following, and visual consistency. Based on EditFHF-15K, we propose EditRefiner, a hierarchical, interpretable, and human-aligned agentic framework that reformulates post-editing correction as a human-like perception-reasoning-action-evaluation loop. Specifically, we introduce: (1) a perception agent that detects contextual saliency maps of artifacts and editing failures, (2) a reasoning agent that interprets these perceptual cues to perform human-aligned diagnostic inference, (3) an action agent that uses the reasoning output to plan and execute localized re-editing, and (4) an evaluation agent that assesses the re-edited image and guides the action agent on whether further refinements are required. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EditRefiner consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in distortion localization, diagnose accuracy and human perception alignment, establishing a new paradigm for self-corrective and perceptually reliable image editing. The code is available at this https URL .

ReasonEdit: Towards Interpretable Image Editing Evaluation via Reinforcement Learning

High 2605.07477
Honghua Chen, Zitong Xu, Huiyu Duan, Xinyun Zhang, Xiongkuo Min, Guangtao Zhai
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出首个结合编辑图像与思维链解释的数据集及基于强化学习的可解释图像编辑评估模型。
🎯研究动机

现有文本引导图像编辑评估方法多依赖标量分数，缺乏可解释性，且缺少高质量的解释数据集和有效的奖励模型来训练可解释评估器。

❓解决问题

如何构建可解释的图像编辑评估模型，使其能够生成符合人类偏好的推理过程并评估编辑质量。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建 ReasonEdit-22K 数据集（22K 编辑图像 +113K 思维链样本 +1.3M 人类判断），提出 RE-Reward 多模态大模型奖励模型，并利用 GRPO 算法训练 ReasonEdit 可解释评估模型。

📊实验结果

实验表明 ReasonEdit 与人类偏好高度对齐，在公开基准上表现强泛化能力，并能生成高质量可解释评估文本。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个结合编辑图像与思维链解释的数据集 ReasonEdit-22K，包含大量人类判断标注。
  • 提出 RE-Reward 奖励模型和 ReasonEdit 评估模型，通过强化学习实现可解释的图像编辑评估。
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集规模可能限制模型泛化到更多编辑类型。
  • 依赖思维链标注，成本较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent text-guided image editing (TIE) models have achieved remarkable progress, however, many edited results still suffer from artifacts, unintended modifications, and suboptimal aesthetics. Although several benchmarks and evaluation methods have been proposed, most existing approaches rely on scalar scores and lack interpretability. This limitation largely stems from the absence of high-quality interpretation datasets for TIE and effective reward models to train interpretable evaluators. To address these challenges, we introduce ReasonEdit-22K, the first dataset that combines 22K edited images with 113K Chain-of-Thought (CoT) samples, along with 1.3M human judgments assessing these interpretations in terms of logicality, accuracy, and usefulness. Building upon this dataset, we propose RE-Reward, a multimodal large language model (MLLM)-based reward model designed to provide human-aligned feedback for evaluating interpretable reasoning in image editing. Furthermore, we develop ReasonEdit, which is trained using reward signals derived from RE-Reward and the Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) algorithm to learn an interpretable evaluation model. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ReasonEdit achieves superior alignment with human preferences and exhibits strong generalization across public benchmarks. In addition, it is capable of generating high-quality interpretable evaluation text, enabling more transparent and trustworthy assessment for image editing. The code is available at this https URL .

DIMoE-Adapters: Dynamic Expert Evolution for Continual Learning in Vision-Language Models

High 2605.07494
Mengxin Qin, Xiang Zhang, Xi Wang, Kun Wei, Xu Yang, Cheng Deng
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出动态专家演化框架 DIMoE-Adapters，通过自校准专家演化和原型引导专家选择缓解视觉 - 语言模型持续学习中的稳定性 - 可塑性困境。
🎯研究动机

视觉 - 语言模型在多领域任务增量学习中面临大领域偏移导致的稳定性 - 可塑性困境，现有方法依赖固定架构和静态参数分配，限制了新领域适应并加剧灾难性遗忘。

❓解决问题

如何设计动态专家演化机制，在持续学习中平衡稳定性与可塑性，同时避免冗余容量和灾难性遗忘。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 DIMoE-Adapters 框架，包含两个协作组件：自校准专家演化（SCEE）通过专家优化动力学构建和演化稀疏专家池，提升可塑性并减少冗余容量；原型引导专家选择（PGES）基于 SCEE 形成的专家池控制专家利用，提升对已见和未见任务的稳定性。

📊实验结果

在多种设置下的广泛实验表明，DIMoE-Adapters 优于先前最先进方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出动态增量专家适配器框架 DIMoE-Adapters，引入动态专家演化范式平衡稳定性与可塑性。
  • 设计自校准专家演化（SCEE）和原型引导专家选择（PGES）两个协作组件，分别提升可塑性和稳定性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定专家初始化策略，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 动态演化机制可能增加训练复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Continual learning enables vision-language models to accumulate knowledge and adapt to evolving tasks without retraining from scratch. However, in multi-domain task-incremental learning, large domain shifts intensify the stability-plasticity dilemma. Most existing methods rely on fixed architectures with statically allocated parameters, which limits adaptation to new domains and aggravates catastrophic forgetting. To address these challenges, we propose DIMoE-Adapters, a Dynamic Incremental Mixture-of-Experts Adapters framework that introduces a dynamic expert evolution paradigm to balance stability and plasticity. This paradigm is implemented through two collaborative components: Self-Calibrated Expert Evolution (SCEE) and Prototype-Guided Expert Selection (PGES). SCEE constructs and evolves a sparse expert pool through expert optimization dynamics, improving plasticity while reducing redundant capacity. PGES controls expert utilization based on the pool shaped by SCEE, improving stability across both previously encountered and unseen tasks. Extensive experiments show that DIMoE-Adapters outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods across various settings.

LiteGUI: Distilling Compact GUI Agents with Reinforcement Learning

High 2605.07505
Yubin Wu, Zicheng Cai, Liping Ning, Hua Wang, Zhi Chen, Yaohua Tang, Hao Chen
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出无 SFT 的蒸馏 + 强化学习范式，显著提升轻量级 GUI Agent 性能，2B/3B 模型达到 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

轻量级端侧 GUI Agent 受限于模型容量，传统 SFT 导致过拟合、灾难性遗忘和策略僵化，亟需新训练范式。

❓解决问题

如何在不使用 SFT 的情况下，提升小规模 GUI Agent 的性能，使其在长程任务中有效探索并减少幻觉。

🔎现象分析

传统 SFT 在小模型上导致过拟合、灾难性遗忘和策略僵化；多解 GUI 任务存在认知偏差；长程任务中探索困难。

🛠️主要方法

提出无 SFT 训练范式：1) Guided On-policy Distillation，结合 oracle 轨迹和动态检索减少幻觉；2) Multi-solution Dual-level GRPO，联合对齐宏观子任务规划和微观执行匹配；3) 自动数据生成流水线。

📊实验结果

在多个基准上进行了广泛实验，包括与轻量级和较大规模模型的对比，以及消融研究。摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将广义知识蒸馏系统整合到 GUI Agent 领域，提出 Guided On-policy Distillation。
  • 提出 Multi-solution Dual-level GRPO 框架，提升长程任务探索能力。
  • 构建自动数据生成流水线，合成多解 GUI 轨迹。
  • 实验表明方法在轻量级模型中达到 SOTA，与大规模模型竞争。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量 oracle 轨迹，获取成本高。
  • 方法在更大规模模型上的泛化性未验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Developing lightweight, on-device vision-language GUI agents is essential for efficient cross-platform automated interaction. However, current on-device agents are constrained by limited model capacity, and further performance improvements remain urgently needed. Traditional Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) for small-scale models often leads to overfitting, catastrophic forgetting and policy rigidity, and thus fails to fully address these challenges. In this work, we propose a novel SFT-free training paradigm that significantly enhances the performance of small-scale models. We first present the initial systematic integration of generalized knowledge distillation into the GUI agent domain via Guided On-policy Distillation. By incorporating oracle reference trajectories together with a dynamic retrieval mechanism, our method reduces hallucinations and mitigates the cognitive misalignment inherent in multi-solution GUI tasks. Building on this foundation, we further introduce a Multi-solution Dual-level GRPO framework that jointly aligns macro-level subtask planning with micro-level execution matching, thereby improving exploration in long-horizon GUI agent scenarios. In addition, we construct an automated data generation pipeline to synthesize GUI task trajectories with rich multi-solution annotations. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance among lightweight models while remaining competitive with substantially larger-scale models across all benchmarks. Ablation studies further demonstrate that structured on-policy distillation and multi-solution dual-level exploration can fully unlock the capabilities of 2B/3B scale agents, surpassing the performance limits of conventional imitation learning.

Tracing the Arrow of Time: Diagnosing Temporal Information Flow in Video-LLMs

High 2605.07568
Peitao Han, Fei Cheng, Lis K. Pereira, Qianying Liu, Shigeru Kitazawa
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：视频 -LLM 在时间箭头任务上表现不佳，瓶颈在于投影器设计而非视觉编码器。
🎯研究动机

人类几乎能完美判断视频是否正放或倒放，但前沿视频 -LLM 仅略高于随机水平，揭示出时间推理能力的显著差距，亟需诊断信息流瓶颈。

❓解决问题

确定视频 -LLM 中时间信息流瓶颈的位置：是视觉编码器未能编码时间信息，还是信息在编码器、投影器或 LLM 其他部分丢失。

🔎现象分析

摘要发现：视频中心编码器（含显式时间建模）能编码强时间信号，但通过标准视频 -LLM 架构后性能下降；帧中心编码器则无法编码时间信号。投影器设计是关键：Q-Former 破坏时间信息，而时间保持的 MLP 投影器改善 LLM 对时间信息的访问。

🛠️主要方法

隔离视觉编码器，追踪时间信息在编码器、投影器和 LLM 中的流动；基于诊断发现构建视频 -LLM，包含时间感知视频中心编码器、时间保持投影器和 AoT 监督。

📊实验结果

在 AoT_PPB、VITATECS-Direction 和 TVBench 上评估，AoT_PPB 准确率 98.1% 超越人类，VITATECS-Direction 提升 6.0 点，TVBench 提升 1.3 点。

⭐主要贡献
  • 诊断出视频 -LLM 中时间信息流瓶颈在于投影器设计，而非视觉编码器。
  • 提出时间保持的 MLP 投影器替代 Q-Former，显著提升时间信息传递。
  • 构建的视频 -LLM 在 AoT 任务上超越人类（98.1% 准确率），并提升其他时间推理任务性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对时间箭头任务诊断，可能不适用于其他时间推理任务。
  • 投影器设计改进可能依赖特定编码器架构，泛化性需验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The Arrow-of-Time (AoT) task, determining whether a video plays forward or backward by recognizing temporal irreversibility, is one humans solve with near-perfect accuracy, yet frontier Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) perform only modestly above chance. This gap raises a key question: do visual backbones fail to encode temporal information, or does information bottleneck lie elsewhere in the Video-LLM architecture? We address this question by isolating the vision encoder from the Video-LLM and tracing temporal information across the encoder, projector, and LLM. We find that video-centric encoders with explicit temporal modeling encode strong temporal signals, whereas frame-centric encoders do not. However, when video-centric representations are passed through a standard Video-LLM architecture, performance often collapses, revealing a bottleneck of temporal information flow. We identify projector design as a key factor: Q-Former disrupts temporal information, while a time-preserved MLP projection substantially improves the LLM's access to such information. Our layer-wise analysis further shows temporal representation dynamics across encoder layers. Guided by these findings, we build a Video-LLM with temporal-aware video-centric encoder, time-preserved projector, and AoT supervision, surpassing human performance on AoT$_{PPB}$ with 98.1\% accuracy, and improving broader temporal reasoning tasks by up to 6.0 points on VITATECS-Direction and 1.3 points on TVBench. Our results show that temporal reasoning in Video-LLMs requires both effective temporal encoding and reliable transfer of this information to the LLM.

PolarVLM: Bridging the Semantic-Physical Gap in Vision-Language Models

High 2605.07574
Yuliang Li, Chu Zhou, Heng Guo, Boxin Shi, Imari Sato, Zhanyu Ma
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：将偏振物理参数融入 VLM，通过双流架构和两阶段训练弥合语义 - 物理鸿沟，在反射 / 透明场景中显著提升性能。
🎯研究动机

标准 RGB 输入存在严重光学歧义（如反射、透明物体），而偏振成像虽能解决但未与开放推理结合，现有方法受限于固定格式输出。

❓解决问题

如何将偏振物理参数有效集成到 VLM 中，实现物理感知的开放语义理解，同时避免物理参数被错误解释。

🔎现象分析

标准 VLM 在反射和透明场景中表现差，偏振参数可解决歧义但直接集成会导致物理误解。

🛠️主要方法

提出双流架构（偏振物理参数流 +RGB 视觉流）和渐进式两阶段训练策略，并构建首个偏振感知 VQA 基准 PolarVQA（75K 指令对）。

📊实验结果

在五个评估任务上，PolarVLM 整体超越 RGB 基线 25.4%，反射识别提升 26.6%，玻璃计数提升 34.0%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个将偏振物理参数集成到 VLM 的多模态框架 PolarVLM
  • 构建偏振感知 VQA 基准 PolarVQA，含 75K 物理引导的指令微调对
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对反射和透明场景，泛化性未知
  • 依赖偏振相机硬件，部署成本较高
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Mainstream vision-language models (VLMs) fundamentally struggle with severe optical ambiguities, such as reflections and transparent objects, due to the inherent limitations of standard RGB inputs. While polarization imaging captures polarimetric physical parameters that resolve these ambiguities, existing methods are constrained by fixed-format outputs and remain isolated from open-ended reasoning. To bridge this semantic-physical gap, we introduce PolarVLM, the first multimodal framework integrating polarimetric physical parameters into VLMs. By employing a dual-stream architecture and a progressive two-stage training strategy, PolarVLM effectively prevents physical misinterpretations while preserving general visual abilities. Complementing our architecture, we construct PolarVQA, the first benchmark for polarization-aware VQA, featuring 75K physics-grounded instruction-tuning pairs targeting reflective and transparent scenes. Experiments show that PolarVLM surpasses the RGB baseline by 25.4% overall across five evaluation tasks, with remarkable gains of 26.6% in reflection recognition and 34.0% in glass counting, successfully unlocking physics-aware semantic understanding.

Response-G1: Explicit Scene Graph Modeling for Proactive Streaming Video Understanding

High 2605.07575
Ke Ma, Jiaqi Tang, Bin Guo, Xueting Han, Ruonan Xu, Qingfeng He, Ziheng Wang, Xu Wang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出显式场景图建模框架 Response-G1，实现流式视频理解中的主动响应决策。
🎯研究动机

现有流式视频理解方法依赖隐式、查询无关的视觉证据建模，难以在视频播放过程中准确判断何时响应。

❓解决问题

流式视频理解中，Video-LLM 需要决定何时响应，但现有方法缺乏显式、结构化的证据与查询条件对齐机制。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

三阶段免微调框架：在线查询引导的场景图生成、基于记忆的历史场景图检索、检索增强的触发提示，实现逐帧静默 / 响应决策。

📊实验结果

在已有基准上，方法在主动和被动任务中均表现优越。摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出显式场景图建模方法，实现证据与查询条件的结构化对齐。
  • 设计免微调的三阶段框架，提升流式视频理解中响应决策的可解释性和准确性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖场景图生成质量，可能受限于复杂场景。
  • 记忆检索机制可能引入额外计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Proactive streaming video understanding requires Video-LLMs to decide when to respond as a video unfolds, a task where existing methods often fall short due to their implicit, query-agnostic modeling of visual evidence. We introduce Response-G1, a novel framework that establishes explicit, structured alignment between the accumulated video evidence and the query's expected response conditions via scene graphs. The framework operates in three fine-tuning-free stages: (1) online query-guided scene graph generation from streaming clips; (2) memory-based retrieval of the most semantically relevant historical scene graphs; and (3) retrieval-augmented trigger prompting for per-frame "silence/response" this http URL grounding both evidence and conditions in a shared graph representation, Response-G1 achieves more interpretable and accurate response timing decisions. Experimental results on established benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our method in both proactive and reactive tasks, validating the advantage of explicit scene graph modeling and retrieval in streaming video understanding.

EggHand: A Multimodal Foundation Model for Egocentric Hand Pose Forecasting

High 2605.07642
Jaeyoung Choi, Hyeondong Kim, Yujin Kim, Daehee Park
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：EggHand 是一个基于 VLA 模型的多模态基础模型，用于从第一人称视频预测未来手部姿态序列。
🎯研究动机

从第一人称视频预测手部姿态对于理解人类意图和 AR/VR 等具身应用至关重要，但现有方法难以处理复杂意图、高自由度关节运动和剧烈视角变化。

❓解决问题

如何从第一人称视频中准确预测未来 3D 手部姿态序列，同时应对 ego-motion 带来的视角变化和复杂人类意图。

🔎现象分析

通用视觉编码器在 ego-motion 下表现脆弱，难以处理视角变化；手部运动受复杂意图驱动且高度灵活。

🛠️主要方法

将 VLA 模型的动作解码器与第一人称视频 - 文本编码器结合，实现运动、上下文和高级意图的联合推理。

📊实验结果

在 EgoExo4D 数据集上评估，EggHand 在预测准确性上达到新 SOTA，在严重 ego-motion 下保持鲁棒，并支持语言控制预测。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 EggHand，一个统一多模态语义推理和动态运动建模的基础模型框架。
  • 在 EgoExo4D 数据集上达到新 SOTA，对严重 ego-motion 保持鲁棒，并支持基于语言的任务提示控制预测。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖大规模第一人称视频数据，数据获取成本高。
  • 未提及对未见过的任务或场景的泛化能力。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Forecasting future 3D hand pose sequences from egocentric video is essential for understanding human intention and enabling embodied applications such as AR/VR assistance and human-robot interaction. However, this task remains a highly challenging problem because egocentric hand motion is driven by complex human intent, exhibits highly dexterous articulations, and is observed under drastic viewpoint shifts induced by ego-motion. In this work, we introduce EggHand, a foundation-model-based framework for egocentric hand pose forecasting that unifies multimodal semantic reasoning with dynamic motion modeling. Our approach couples an action decoder from a Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model, which captures the structured temporal dynamics of hand motion, with an egocentric video-text encoder that provides viewpoint-aware contextual information learned from large-scale first-person video. Together, these components overcome the brittleness of generic visual encoders under ego-motion and enable joint reasoning over motion, context, and high-level intent-without relying on body pose or external tracking. Experiments on the EgoExo4D dataset show that EggHand sets a new state of the art in forecasting accuracy, remains robust under severe ego-motion, and further enables controllable prediction via language-based task prompts. Project page: this https URL

Operating Within the Operational Design Domain: Zero-Shot Perception with Vision-Language Models

High 2605.07649
Berkehan Ünal, Dierend Hauke, Fazlija Dren, Plachetka Christopher
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：探索视觉 - 语言模型在自动驾驶系统运行设计域中作为零样本感知传感器的可行性。
🎯研究动机

自动驾驶系统的大规模实际部署需要遵守安全法规，而运行设计域（ODD）定义了自主代理可运行的具体条件，对 ODD 元素的可靠感知是安全实现和审计的关键。传统方法依赖任务特定训练数据，缺乏适应性。

❓解决问题

如何利用视觉 - 语言模型（VLM）在零样本设置下实现 ODD 元素的分类与检测，以适应不断变化的 ODD 定义。

🔎现象分析

定义锚定的链式思维提示结合角色分解表现最佳，而其他方法可能导致召回率下降。

🛠️主要方法

提出一套可复用的提示模板，结合定义锚定的链式思维提示和角色分解策略，在自定义数据集和 Mapillary Vistas 上评估四种 VLM 的零样本 ODD 分类与检测性能，并进行失败分析和零样本优化策略的消融实验。

📊实验结果

在自定义数据集和 Mapillary Vistas 上评估四种 VLM，进行了零样本 ODD 分类和检测实验，以及优化策略的消融实验。摘要未提供具体数值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 对四种 VLM 在零样本 ODD 分类和检测上的实证研究，包括失败分析
  • 零样本优化策略的消融实验及成本 - 性能概览
  • 一套可复用的提示模板及适应指南
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅评估了四种 VLM，可能不覆盖所有模型
  • 零样本性能可能受提示设计影响，泛化性需进一步验证
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Over the last few years, research on autonomous systems has matured to such a degree that the field is increasingly well-positioned to translate research into practical, stakeholder-driven use cases across well-defined domains. However, for a wide-scale practical adoption of autonomous systems, adherence to safety regulations is crucial. Many regulations are influenced by the Operational Design Domain (ODD), which defines the specific conditions in which an autonomous agent can function. This is especially relevant for Automated Driving Systems (ADS), as a dependable perception of ODD elements is essential for safe implementation and auditing. Vision-language models (VLMs) integrate visual recognition and language reasoning, functioning without task-specific training data, which makes them suitable for adaptable ODD perception. To assess whether VLMs can function as zero-shot "ODD sensors" that adapt to evolving definitions, we contribute (i) an empirical study of zero-shot ODD classification and detection using four VLMs on a custom dataset and Mapillary Vistas, along with failure analyses; (ii) an ablation of zero-shot optimization strategies with a cost-performance overview; and (iii) a suite of reusable prompting templates with guidance for adaptation. Our findings indicate that definition-anchored chain-of-thought prompting with persona decomposition performs best, while other methods may result in reduced recall. Overall, our results pave the way for transparent and effective ODD-based perception in safety-critical applications.

GazeVLM: Active Vision via Internal Attention Control for Multimodal Reasoning

High 2605.07817
Brown Ebouky, Gabriele Carrino, Niccolo Avogaro, Christoph Studer, Andrea Bartezzaghi, Mattia Rigotti
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：GazeVLM 通过内部注意力控制实现主动视觉，提升多模态推理性能。
🎯研究动机

现有 VLM 被动处理视觉信息，依赖静态大量 token，稀释空间推理并导致语言幻觉，缺乏类似人类主动视觉的元认知注意力控制。

❓解决问题

如何让 VLM 在推理过程中自主控制注意力资源，实现动态的全局 - 局部视觉聚焦，而不依赖外部裁剪工具或增加 token 数量。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 GazeVLM 架构，通过生成注视 token（<LOOK>）建立自上而下的因果注意力掩码控制，动态抑制无关视觉特征，模拟空间选择性注意和中央凹注视，并在局部推理结束后恢复全局视图。训练采用定制的 GRPO 过程奖励有效定位。

📊实验结果

在 HRBench-4k 和 HRBench-8k 基准上评估，GazeVLM（4B 参数）超越同参数级 SOTA VLM 近 4%，超越基于图像思考的智能体多模态流程超 5%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 GazeVLM，将元认知注意力控制内化到 VLM 推理循环中，实现主动视觉。
  • 通过注视 token 和注意力掩码机制，无需外部工具或额外视觉 token 即可实现动态全局 - 局部视觉转换。
  • 在 HRBench-4k 和 HRBench-8k 上，4B 参数模型超越同参数级 SOTA VLM 近 4%，超越基于图像思考的智能体多模态流程超 5%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于高分辨率多模态推理场景，泛化性待验证。
  • GRPO 训练过程可能对奖励设计敏感，需要精细调参。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Human visual reasoning is governed by active vision, a process where metacognitive control drives top-down goal-directed attention, dynamically routing foveal focus toward task-relevant details while maintaining peripheral awareness of the global scene. In contrast, modern Vision-Language Models (VLMs) process visual information passively, relying on the static accumulation of massive token contexts that dilute spatial reasoning and induce linguistic hallucinations. Here we propose the following paradigm shift: GazeVLM, a multimodal architecture that internalizes this metacognitive oversight over its deployment of attention resources directly into the reasoning loop. By empowering the VLM to autonomously generate gaze tokens ($\texttt{<LOOK>}$), GazeVLM establishes a top-down control mechanism over its own causal attention mask. The model dynamically dictates its focal intent, triggering a continuous suppression bias that dampens irrelevant visual features, implementing spatial selective attention and simulating foveal fixation. Once local reasoning concludes, the bias lifts, seamlessly restoring the global view. This architecture enables the model to fluidly transition between global spatial awareness and localized focal reasoning without relying on external agentic contraptions like cropping tools, or inflating the context window with additional visual tokens derived from localized visual patches. Trained with a bespoke Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) procedure that rewards valid grounding, our 4B-parameter GazeVLM delivers strong high-resolution multimodal reasoning performance, surpassing state-of-the-art VLMs in its parameter class by nearly 4% and agentic multimodal pipelines built around thinking with images by more than 5% on HRBench-4k and HRBench-8k.

BRIDGE: Background Routing and Isolated Discrete Gating for Coarse-Mask Local Editing

High 2605.07846
Peilin Xiong, Honghui Yuan, Junwen Chen, Keiji Yanai
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：BRIDGE 通过离散几何门控路由和双路径生成，解决了粗掩码局部编辑中的掩码形状偏差问题。
🎯研究动机

粗掩码局部图像编辑中，用户提供的粗糙掩码常被模型当作形状先验，导致生成对象被掩码边界束缚，而非灵活遵循编辑指令。现有方法如 DiT 内部掩码注入或复制控制分支存在局限，需要更有效的解耦机制。

❓解决问题

解决粗掩码局部编辑中的掩码形状偏差问题，使编辑区域能自由生成内容而不继承掩码轮廓，同时保持背景稳定。

🔎现象分析

摘要通过 Qwen-Image 诊断实验观察到，位置嵌入和注意力连接调节视觉标记重用的上下文，这启发了离散几何门控的设计。

🛠️主要方法

BRIDGE 将掩码保持在 DiT 主干外部用于支持构建和混合，避免内部掩码注入；采用双路径生成（主路径保持背景，主题路径从独立噪声生成可编辑内容）；引入可学习的离散几何门控，在标记级别路由位置嵌入，使主题标记在融合区域借用背景锚定坐标或保持主题中心坐标以获得几何自由度。

📊实验结果

在 BRIDGE-Bench 上，BRIDGE 将 Local SigLIP2-T 从 FLUX.1-Fill 的 0.262 和 ACE++ 的 0.390 提升至 0.503，并在 Local DINO 和 DreamSim 上取得并行提升。在 MagicBrush 和 ICE-Bench 上的零样本结果展示了竞争性的对齐和源保留。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 BRIDGE 框架，通过外部掩码支持和双路径生成解决掩码形状偏差。
  • 引入离散几何门控，实现标记级位置嵌入路由，在紧凑参数（13.31M）下提升编辑灵活性。
  • 在 BRIDGE-Bench、MagicBrush 和 ICE-Bench 上取得 SOTA 或竞争性结果，Local SigLIP2-T 从 0.262/0.390 提升至 0.503。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定 DiT 架构，泛化到其他生成模型需验证。
  • 离散几何门控的泛化能力可能受限于训练数据分布。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Coarse-mask local image editing asks a model to modify a user-indicated region while preserving the surrounding scene. In practice, however, rough masks often become unintended shape priors: instead of serving as flexible edit support, the mask can pull the generated object toward its accidental boundary. We study this failure as mask-shape bias and frame the task through a Two-Zone Constraint, where the background should remain stable while the editable region should follow the instruction without being forced to inherit the mask contour. BRIDGE addresses this setting by keeping masks outside the DiT backbone for support construction and blending, avoiding DiT-internal mask injection and copied control branches. It uses BridgePath generation, where a Main Path preserves background context and a Subject Path generates editable content from independent noise. Motivated by a diagnostic Qwen-Image experiment showing that positional embeddings and attention connectivity regulate which image context visual tokens reuse, BRIDGE introduces a learnable Discrete Geometric Gate for token-level positional-embedding routing. This gate lets subject tokens borrow background-anchored coordinates near fusion regions or keep subject-centric coordinates for geometric freedom. We evaluate BRIDGE on BRIDGE-Bench, MagicBrush, and ICE-Bench. On BRIDGE-Bench, BRIDGE improves Local SigLIP2-T from 0.262 with FLUX.1-Fill and 0.390 with ACE++ to 0.503, with parallel gains in local DINO and DreamSim. Zero-shot results on MagicBrush and ICE-Bench further indicate competitive alignment and source preservation beyond the curated benchmark, while the added routing module remains compact at 13.31M parameters compared with ControlNet-style copied branches.

EyeCue: Driver Cognitive Distraction Detection via Gaze-Empowered Egocentric Video Understanding

High 2605.07859
Lang Zhang, JinYi Yoon, Matthew Corbett, Abhijit Sarkar, Bo Ji
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：EyeCue 通过融合眼动与第一人称视频的跨模态交互建模，在认知分心检测任务上超越 11 个基线模型，并开源了多场景数据集 CogDrive。
🎯研究动机

驾驶员认知分心是导致交通事故的主要原因，但难以检测，因为分心时驾驶员外表看似专注且无显性物理动作，现有方法缺乏对眼动与视觉上下文交互的建模。

❓解决问题

如何利用眼动与第一人称视频的交互来准确检测驾驶员的认知分心状态。

🔎现象分析

认知分心体现在眼动与视觉上下文的交互中，即使驾驶员视觉上看似专注，其注意力模式也会因分心而改变。

🛠️主要方法

提出 EyeCue 框架，融合眼动数据与第一人称视频，通过跨模态交互建模捕获驾驶员注意力随时间变化的上下文信息。

📊实验结果

在 CogDrive 数据集上评估，EyeCue 准确率 74.38%，超越 11 个基线模型（来自 6 个模型家族）超过 7%，并在不同道路类型、时段和天气条件下准确率超过 70%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 EyeCue，一种基于眼动增强的第一人称视频理解框架，用于检测驾驶员认知分心。
  • 构建 CogDrive，一个多场景认知分心标注数据集，扩充了四个现有驾驶数据集。
  • 实验表明 EyeCue 在 CogDrive 上达到 74.38% 准确率，超越 11 个基线模型超过 7%，并在多种驾驶场景下保持 70% 以上准确率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 准确率仍有提升空间（74.38%），可能受限于数据集规模和多样性。
  • 方法依赖眼动追踪设备，实际部署可能受硬件限制。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Driver cognitive distraction is a major cause of road collisions and remains difficult to detect. Unlike manual or visual distraction, cognitive distraction is diverted by thoughts unrelated to driving, even when the driver appears visually attentive and exhibits no explicit physical movements. In this work, we propose EyeCue, a gaze-empowered egocentric video understanding framework, to detect driver cognitive distraction. A key insight is that cognitive distraction manifests in the interaction between eye gaze and visual context. To capture this interaction, EyeCue integrates eye gaze with egocentric video to enable context-aware modeling of the driver's attention over time. Furthermore, to tackle the limited scale and diversity of existing datasets, we introduce CogDrive, a comprehensive multi-scenario dataset that augments four existing driving datasets with cognitive distraction annotations. Through extensive evaluations on CogDrive, we show that EyeCue achieves the highest accuracy of 74.38%, outperforming 11 baselines from 6 model families by over 7%. Notably, EyeCue can achieve an accuracy of over 70% across various driving scenarios (different road types, times of day, and weather conditions) with strong generalizability. These results highlight the importance of modeling gaze-context interactions and the effectiveness of cross-modal interaction modeling for multimodal cognitive distraction detection. Our codes and CogDrive dataset resources are available at this https URL .

From Synthetic to Real: Toward Identity-Consistent Makeup Transfer with Synthetic and Real Data

High 2605.07861
Yue Yu, Jiayu Wang, Jiajia Shi, Jingjing Chen, Yu-Gang Jiang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出合成到真实的两阶段框架，通过数据筛选和强化学习实现身份一致的妆容迁移。
🎯研究动机

现有妆容迁移方法在合成数据上训练时难以保持身份一致性，且合成与真实数据间的域差距限制了泛化能力，导致复杂真实场景性能下降。

❓解决问题

解决合成数据监督下身份保持失败和合成 - 真实域差距导致的泛化问题。

🔎现象分析

合成监督常无法忠实保持身份，合成与真实数据间的域差距导致模型在复杂真实场景中性能退化。

🛠️主要方法

提出 ConsistentBeauty 数据筛选流程确保合成数据中妆容保真和身份一致，以及 RealBeauty 合成到真实后训练框架，通过强化学习和可验证奖励函数适应真实场景。

📊实验结果

在多个基准上达到最先进性能，在身份保持和复杂真实场景中表现优越。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ConsistentBeauty 数据筛选流程，保证合成数据中妆容和身份一致性。
  • 提出 RealBeauty 后训练框架，利用强化学习和可验证奖励函数弥合合成 - 真实域差距。
  • 建立多样化妆容迁移基准，覆盖多种肤色、年龄、性别、姿态和妆容风格。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖合成数据质量，数据筛选可能增加预处理成本。
  • 强化学习训练可能对奖励函数设计敏感。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Makeup transfer aims to apply the makeup style of a reference portrait to a source portrait while preserving identity and background. Early methods formulate this task as unsupervised image-to-image translation, relying on surrogate objectives and often yielding limited performance. Recent diffusion- and flow-based approaches instead exploit synthetic data for supervised training, leading to significant improvements. However, these methods still face two critical challenges: synthetic supervision frequently fails to faithfully preserve identity, and the domain gap between synthetic and real data limits generalization, resulting in degraded performance in complex real-world scenarios. To address these issues, this paper first proposes ConsistentBeauty, a novel data curation pipeline that ensures makeup fidelity and strict identity consistency within the synthesized data. Second, we propose RealBeauty, a synthetic-to-real post-training framework. Beyond supervised learning on curated synthetic data, we further adapt the model to real-world scenarios through reinforcement learning and design novel verifiable rewards tailored to the makeup transfer task. It allows the model to further benefit from real makeup patterns beyond synthetic supervision. In addition, we establish a new diverse benchmark for makeup transfer, covering a wide range of skin tones, ages, genders, poses, and makeup styles, thereby enabling a more comprehensive evaluation of model performance under diverse real-world conditions. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks and demonstrates clear advantages in identity preservation and performance on complex real-world cases.

SCOPE: Structured Decomposition and Conditional Skill Orchestration for Complex Image Generation

High 2605.08043
Tianfei Ren, Zhipeng Yan, Yiming Zhao, Zhen Fang, Yu Zeng, Guohui Zhang, Hang Xu, Xiaoxiao Ma et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 SCOPE 框架，通过结构化分解和条件技能编排解决复杂图像生成中的语义承诺跟踪问题。
🎯研究动机

现有文本到图像模型在视觉保真度上取得进展，但实现复杂视觉意图仍困难，因为许多需求在生成过程中难以持续跟踪和验证。

❓解决问题

复杂图像生成中语义承诺的生命周期不连续性，即概念鸿沟，导致承诺在生成过程中无法作为可识别的操作单元被跟踪。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出语义承诺在生成过程中可能被局部解决或检查，但无法作为同一操作单元在整个生命周期中保持可识别性。

🛠️主要方法

SCOPE 是一个规范引导的技能编排框架，维护演化的结构化规范，并条件性地调用检索、推理和修复技能来处理未解决或违反的承诺。

📊实验结果

在 Gen-Arena 上 SCOPE 达到 0.60 EGIP，在 WISE-V 上 0.907，在 MindBench 上 0.61，显著优于所有基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SCOPE 框架，通过结构化分解和条件技能编排实现复杂图像生成中的语义承诺跟踪。
  • 引入 Gen-Arena 基准和 Entity-Gated Intent Pass Rate (EGIP)评估指标。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的结构化规范初始定义。
  • 技能编排的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

While text-to-image models have made strong progress in visual fidelity, faithfully realizing complex visual intents remains challenging because many requirements must be tracked across grounding, generation, and verification. We refer to these requirements as semantic commitments and formalize their lifecycle discontinuity as the Conceptual Rift, where commitments may be locally resolved or checked but fail to remain identifiable as the same operational units throughout the generation lifecycle. To address this, we propose SCOPE, a specification-guided skill orchestration framework that maintains semantic commitments in an evolving structured specification and conditionally invokes retrieval, reasoning, and repair skills around unresolved or violated commitments. To evaluate commitment-level intent realization, we introduce Gen-Arena, a human-annotated benchmark with entity- and constraint-level specifications, together with Entity-Gated Intent Pass Rate (EGIP), a strict entity-first pass criterion. SCOPE substantially outperforms all evaluated baselines on Gen-Arena, achieving 0.60 EGIP, and further achieves strong results on WISE-V (0.907) and MindBench (0.61), demonstrating the effectiveness of persistent commitment tracking for complex image generation.

MoCoTalk: Multi-Conditional Diffusion with Adaptive Router for Controllable Talking Head Generation

High 2605.08050
Xinyan Ye, Jiankang Deng, Abbas Edalat
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：MoCoTalk 提出多条件视频扩散框架，通过自适应路由器和嘴部增强网格实现可控说话头生成。
🎯研究动机

现有说话头生成方法通常只处理部分控制因素（如身份、姿态、表情、口型），且多条件融合时依赖固定权重或启发式策略，导致条件间干扰，限制了生成质量和可控性。

❓解决问题

如何统一融合多个异构条件（参考图像、面部关键点、3DMM 网格、语音音频）并避免条件间的破坏性干扰，同时实现属性级别的可控说话头生成。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出多条件融合时存在破坏性干扰，固定权重或启发式融合策略无法适应不同特征子空间和噪声水平。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MoCoTalk 框架，包含三个关键组件：1) 自适应多条件路由器，计算通道级、时间步感知的门控权重动态融合四个条件流；2) 嘴部增强着色网格，基于 3DMM 解耦头部运动、嘴部运动、表情和光照，提供时间一致的几何先验并支持属性重组；3) 唇一致性损失，增强音视频对齐。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称在结构、运动和感知指标上达到最先进性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出自适应多条件路由器，实现通道级、时间步感知的动态条件融合，缓解异构条件间的干扰。
  • 设计嘴部增强着色网格，解耦头部运动、嘴部运动、表情和光照，支持属性级可控生成。
  • 引入唇一致性损失，提升音频 - 视觉对齐精度。
  • 在多个指标上达到最先进性能，并实现单条件方法无法提供的属性级可控性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 3DMM 参数质量，对极端表情或遮挡鲁棒性有限。
  • 自适应路由器的计算开销可能影响推理速度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Talking-head generation requires joint modeling of identity, head pose, facial expression, and mouth dynamics. Existing methods typically address only a subset of these factors, and rely on fixed-weight or heuristic fusion when multiple conditions are involved. We present MoCoTalk, a multi-conditional video diffusion framework that unifies four complementary control signals: a reference image, facial keypoints, 3DMM-rendered shading meshes, and the corresponding speech audio. To resolve destructive interference among heterogeneous conditions, we introduce an Adaptive Multi-Condition Router that computes channel-wise, timestep-aware gating over the four condition streams, allowing the fusion strategy to vary with both feature subspace and noise level. To better capture speech-related facial dynamics, we design a Mouth-Augmented Shading Mesh, a 3DMM-based representation that decouples head motion, mouth motion, expression, and lighting. This design provides a temporally consistent geometric prior and allows flexible recombination of these attributes at inference. We further introduce a lip consistency loss to tighten audio-visual alignment. Extensive experiments show that MoCoTalk achieves state-of-the-art performance on the majority of structural, motion, and perceptual metrics, while offering attribute-level controllability that single-condition methods do not provide.

Proxy3D: Efficient 3D Representations for Vision-Language Models via Semantic Clustering and Alignment

High 2605.08064
Jerry Jiang, Haowen Sun, Denis Gudovskiy, Yohei Nakata, Tomoyuki Okuno, Kurt Keutzer, Wenzhao Zheng
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 Proxy3D 方法，通过语义聚类和对齐为 VLM 生成紧凑 3D 代理表示，提升空间智能效率。
🎯研究动机

现有 VLM 在 3D 空间推理中面临挑战：基于对应的方法隐式理解 3D 场景，空间一致性差；基于表示的方法依赖 3D 几何先验，视觉序列序列化效率低。

❓解决问题

如何为 VLM 设计紧凑且全面的 3D 代理表示，以高效实现空间一致性和视觉序列压缩。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

仅输入视频帧，使用语义和几何编码器提取场景特征，通过语义感知聚类获得 3D 空间中的代理集；构建 SpaceSpan 数据集，采用多阶段训练将 3D 代理表示与 VLM 对齐。

📊实验结果

在 3D 视觉问答、视觉定位和通用空间智能基准上评估，使用更短序列取得竞争性或 SOTA 性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Proxy3D 方法，利用语义聚类生成紧凑 3D 代理表示，替代传统像素对齐表示。
  • 构建 SpaceSpan 数据集并设计多阶段训练策略，实现 3D 代理表示与 VLM 的有效对齐。
  • 在 3D VQA、视觉定位和通用空间智能基准上，使用更短序列取得竞争性或 SOTA 性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖视频帧输入的质量和数量。
  • 语义聚类可能引入信息损失。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Spatial intelligence in vision-language models (VLMs) attracts research interest with the practical demand to reason in the 3D this http URL promising results, most existing methods follow the conventional 2D pipeline in VLMs and use pixel-aligned representations for the vision modality. However, correspondence-based models with implicit 3D scene understanding often fail to achieve spatial consistency, and representation-based models with 3D geometric priors lack efficiency in vision sequence serialization. To address this, we propose a Proxy3D method with compact yet comprehensive 3D proxy representations for the vision modality. Given only video frames as input, we employ semantic and geometric encoders to extract scene features and then perform their semantic-aware clustering to obtain a set of proxies in the 3D space. For representation alignment, we further curate the SpaceSpan dataset and apply multi-stage training to adopt the proposed 3D proxy representations with the VLM. When using shorter sequences for vision information, our method achieves competitive or state-of-the-art performance in 3D visual question answering, visual grounding and general spatial intelligence benchmarks.

R$^3$L: Reasoning 3D Layouts from Relative Spatial Relations

High 2605.06758
Zhifeng Gu, Yuqi Wang, Bing Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 R³L 框架，通过不变空间分解和一致空间想象提升 3D 布局生成中相对空间推理的可靠性与一致性。
🎯研究动机

相对空间关系是 3D 布局生成的基础，但现有 MLLM 推理结果不可靠，且多跳推理中参考系变换累积误差导致语义和度量漂移。

❓解决问题

多跳相对空间推理中参考系变换导致的误差累积和推理不一致问题。

🔎现象分析

多跳推理需要重复的参考系变换，累积误差导致语义和度量漂移；帧引起的不一致性是可靠多跳推理的关键瓶颈。

🛠️主要方法

提出 R³L 框架，包含不变空间分解（解耦耦合关系链）、一致空间想象（想象 - 修正循环促进自一致性）和支持空间优化（全局到局部坐标重参数化简化位姿优化）。

📊实验结果

在多种场景类型和指令上进行实验，结果表明 R³L 生成更物理可行和语义一致的布局。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 R³L 框架，通过不变空间分解和一致空间想象提升相对空间推理的可靠性。
  • 引入支持空间优化，通过全局到局部坐标重参数化简化位姿优化。
  • 实验证明解决帧引起的不一致性对多跳相对空间推理至关重要。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 MLLM 的初始推理质量。
  • 框架复杂度可能较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Relative spatial relations provide a compact representation of spatial structure and are fundamental to relative spatial reasoning in 3D layout generation. Recent works leverage Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to infer such relations, but the inferred relations are often unreliable and are typically handled with post-hoc heuristics. In this paper, we propose R$^3$L, a general framework that improves the reliability and consistency of relative spatial reasoning for 3D layout generation. Our key motivation is that multi-hop reasoning requires repeated reference-frame transformations, which accumulate errors in inferred relations and lead to semantic and metric drift. To mitigate this, we propose invariant spatial decomposition to break coupled relation chains, and consistent spatial imagination to promote self-consistency through an imagine-and-revise loop. We further introduce supportive spatial optimization to ease pose optimization via global-to-local coordinate re-parameterization. Extensive experiments across diverse scene types and instructions demonstrate that R$^3$L produces more physically feasible and semantically consistent layouts. Notably, our analysis shows that resolving frame-induced inconsistencies is crucial for reliable multi-hop relative spatial reasoning. The code is available at this https URL .

Bringing Multimodal Large Language Models to Infrared-Visible Image Fusion Quality Assessment

High 2605.06969
Yuchen Guo, Junli Gong, Yao Lu, Xintong Xu, Yiuming Cheung, Weifeng Su
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：FuScore 利用 MLLM 生成连续质量分数，实现红外 - 可见光融合图像的细粒度质量评估。
🎯研究动机

现有红外 - 可见光图像融合质量评估方法过度优化手工特征或全参考指标，且基于人类评分的奖励建模仅使用标量回归，未能利用多模态大语言模型的推理能力或编码每张图像的感知模糊性。

❓解决问题

如何利用多模态大语言模型对红外 - 可见光融合图像进行细粒度、连续的质量评估，避免离散标签导致的相似质量图像被错误分级。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，直接使用离散 one-hot 监督的 MLLM 会将相似质量的融合图像划分到不同等级，而连续分数能实现更精细的区分。

🛠️主要方法

提出 FuScore，使用 MLLM 生成连续质量分数，利用四个 IVIF 特定子维度的一致性构建软标签，并引入三部分目标：每张图像的分布监督、源对内的瑟斯通保真度（方法级排序）和跨源对的瑟斯通保真度（场景级排序）。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将 MLLM 用于 IVIF 质量评估，生成连续分数而非离散等级。
  • 提出基于子维度一致性的软标签构建方法，反映判断共识。
  • 设计三部分训练目标，同时优化图像级、方法级和场景级排序。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 MLLM 的预训练质量，对低质量 MLLM 泛化性未知。
  • 软标签构建依赖于四个子维度的定义，可能不适用于其他融合任务。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Infrared-Visible image fusion (IVIF) aims to integrate thermal information and detailed spatial structures into a single fused image to enhance perception. However, existing evaluation approaches tend to over-optimize both hand-crafted no-reference statistics and full-reference metrics that treat the source images as pseudo ground truths. Recent IVIF reward-modelling efforts learn from human ratings but use scalar regression on aggregated scores, neither leveraging the reasoning of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) nor encoding per-image perceptual ambiguity in their supervision, but naively introducing MLLMs with discrete one-hot supervision likewise collapses fused images of similar quality into different rating levels. To address this, we introduce FuScore, which utilizes an MLLM to mimic human visual perception by producing continuous quality score, rather than discrete level predictions, enabling fine-grained discrimination among fused images of similar quality. We exploit the agreement among four IVIF-specific sub-dimensions to construct a per-image soft label whose sharpness reflects how consensual the overall judgment is. We further introduce a tripartite objective combining per-image distributional supervision, within-source-pair Thurstone fidelity for method-level ordering, and cross-source-pair Thurstone fidelity for scene-level ordering across scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FuScore achieves state-of-the-art correlation with human visual preferences.

LensVLM: Selective Context Expansion for Compressed Visual Representation of Text

High 2605.07019
Roy Xie, Dan Friedman, Donghan Yu, Bowen Pan, Christopher Fifty, Jang-Hyun Kim, Xianzhi Du, Zhe Gan et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：LensVLM 通过选择性扩展压缩图像中的相关区域，在 4.3 倍压缩下保持全文本精度，并推广到多模态文档和代码理解任务。
🎯研究动机

VLM 将文本渲染为图像处理时，压缩会导致字符模糊、精度下降，现有方法缺乏对压缩图像中关键区域的智能选择与扩展机制。

❓解决问题

如何在保持高压缩比的同时，避免因视觉分辨率不足导致的文本识别精度损失。

🔎现象分析

压缩使字符低于视觉编码器有效分辨率而难以区分；模型在训练后对压缩的鲁棒性增强，且高压缩下更依赖扩展内容而非不可靠的视觉读取。

🛠️主要方法

提出 LensVLM 推理框架和后训练方法，使 VLM 先扫描压缩图像，再通过学习的工具选择性地将相关图像扩展为未压缩形式。

📊实验结果

在 7 个文本 QA 基准上评估，LensVLM 在 4.3 倍压缩下精度与全文本上界相当，在 10.1 倍压缩下优于基线；并在多模态文档和代码理解任务上验证泛化性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出选择性上下文扩展方法，在 4.3 倍有效压缩下保持与全文本上界相当的精度，并在 7 个文本 QA 基准上优于检索、文本和视觉压缩基线。
  • 验证了方法对多模态文档和代码理解任务的泛化能力，并分析了压缩鲁棒性和工具选择策略。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定 VLM 架构（Qwen3.5-9B-Base），迁移性需验证。
  • 选择性扩展机制可能引入额外推理开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vision Language Models (VLMs) offer the exciting possibility of processing text as rendered images, bypassing the need for tokenizing the text into long token sequences. Since VLM image encoders map fixed-size images to a fixed number of visual tokens, varying rendering resolution provides a fine-grained compression knob. However, accuracy deteriorates quickly as compression increases: characters shrink below the vision encoder's effective resolution, making them indistinguishable. To address this, we propose LensVLM, an inference framework and post-training recipe that enables VLMs to scan compressed images, then selectively expand only the relevant images to their uncompressed form via learned tools. Building on Qwen3.5-9B-Base, LensVLM maintains accuracy comparable to the full-text upper bound at 4.3x effective compression and outperforms retrieval-based, text- and visual-compression baselines up to 10.1x effective compression across seven text QA benchmarks. LensVLM also generalizes to multimodal document and code understanding tasks, with the accuracy gain over baselines growing as compression increases. Our analysis validates this approach: training makes visual compression robust to rendering choices, and as compression grows the model increasingly relies on expanded content rather than unreliable visual reading. The analysis also yields practical tool-choice guidance: text expansion is preferable for rendered text, while high-resolution image expansion suits native documents whose layout cues carry task-relevant information.

InfoGeo: Information-Theoretic Object-Centric Learning for Cross-View Generalizable UAV Geo-Localization

Medium 2605.07099
Hongyang Zhang, Maonnan Wang, Ziyao Wang, Hongrui Yin, Man OnPun
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出信息论框架 InfoGeo，通过物体中心学习提升无人机跨视角地理定位的鲁棒性与泛化能力。
🎯研究动机

现有跨视角地理定位方法依赖全局特征对齐，在无人机场景中因区域纹理和天气变化导致域偏移，且广视角引入密集细粒度物体造成视觉杂乱，亟需更鲁棒的定位方法。

❓解决问题

解决无人机跨视角地理定位中因域偏移和视觉杂乱导致的性能下降问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出全局特征对齐方法在区域纹理和天气变化下表现不佳，无人机广视角引入的密集细粒度物体造成显著视觉杂乱。

🛠️主要方法

提出 InfoGeo 框架，将优化重构为信息瓶颈过程，包含两个核心目标：最大化视角不变信息（对齐物体中心结构关系）和最小化视角特定噪声信号（通过跨视角知识约束）。

📊实验结果

在多个基准和挑战性场景下进行广泛评估，InfoGeo 显著优于现有最先进方法。摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 InfoGeo，首个将物体中心学习与信息瓶颈结合用于跨视角地理定位的框架。
  • 通过最大化视角不变信息和最小化视角特定噪声，显著提升模型在复杂场景下的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖物体检测或分割的准确性，在极端遮挡或小物体场景下性能受限。
  • 信息瓶颈优化可能增加计算复杂度，实时性有待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Cross-view geo-localization (CVGL) is fundamental for precise localization and navigation in GPS-denied environments, aiming to match ground or UAV imagery with satellite views.
