As a first step, we develop a simple yet effective framework that jointly models identity discrimination and appearance-sensitive similarity through hierarchical supervision and identity-aware distillation. Experiments show that conventional face recognition models fail to capture appearance-dependent similarity, while our approach demonstrates the feasibility of structured whole-head similarity modeling.

SIMI: Self-information Mining Network for Low-light Image Enhancement

Medium 2605.07767
Xuanshuo Fu, Lei Kang, Javier Vazquez-Corral
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出基于位平面分解的自信息挖掘无监督低光图像增强网络，无需外部数据即可提升性能。
🎯研究动机

低光照条件严重影响图像质量，现有方法多关注复杂模型而忽略低光图像自身的内在信息。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖外部数据的情况下，利用低光图像自身信息实现高效、高性能的低光图像增强。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出自信息挖掘网络，基于位平面分解将低光图像分解为多个分量，挖掘内在信息，实现无监督学习。

📊实验结果

在标准基准数据集上达到最先进性能，但摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出无监督的低光图像增强框架，无需外部配对数据。
  • 利用位平面分解挖掘图像内在信息，加速收敛、提升性能并降低计算开销。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对极端低光场景泛化能力有限。
  • 位平面分解的适用性可能受图像位深限制。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Poor lighting conditions significantly impact image quality, posing substantial challenges for image editing and visualization. Many existing enhancement methods aim at proposing complex models while neglecting the intrinsic information contained within low-light images. In this work, we propose the Self-Information Mining (SIMI) network, an innovative unsupervised framework that decomposes low-light images into multiple components based on bit-plane decomposition. Our approach allows mining intrinsic information without relying on external data. This not only accelerates model convergence but also improves performance and reduces computational overhead. The unsupervised nature of our method facilitates real-world applicability. Experiments conducted on standard benchmarks demonstrate that SIMI achieves state-of-the-art performance.

APEX: Assumption-free Projection-based Embedding eXamination Metric for Image Quality Assessment

Medium 2605.07786
Caterina Gallegati, Monica Bianchini, Franco Scarselli, Vittorio Murino, Barbara Toniella Corradini
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一种无假设的投影嵌入检验指标 APEX，用于图像质量评估，克服了传统指标的特征瓶颈和参数化偏差。
🎯研究动机

现有图像质量评估指标如 FID 受限于过时特征的封闭词汇瓶颈和刚性参数化假设，而基于现代骨干网络的新方法仍存在参数化限制，亟需一种无假设、可扩展的评估框架。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种无假设、嵌入无关的图像质量评估指标，以克服传统指标的特征瓶颈和参数化偏差，并保证高维空间的可扩展性和评估稳定性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 APEX 框架，利用切片 Wasserstein 距离作为无假设的相似性度量，并采用 CLIP 和 DINOv2 两种开放词汇基础模型作为特征提取器。

📊实验结果

在多个基准上对比 APEX 与现有指标，显示其对视觉退化的优越鲁棒性，并证明其具有数据集内和跨数据集稳定性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 APEX，一种基于切片 Wasserstein 距离的无假设图像质量评估框架。
  • 理论证明 APEX 在高维空间的有效可扩展性，并通过实验验证。
  • APEX 嵌入无关，使用开放词汇基础模型，对视觉退化具有鲁棒性，且具有跨数据集稳定性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖所选基础模型（CLIP 和 DINOv2）的质量。
  • 切片 Wasserstein 距离的计算效率在高维大规模数据上可能仍需优化。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As generative models achieve unprecedented visual quality, the gold standard for image evaluation remains traditional feature-distribution metrics (e.g., FID). However, these metrics are provably hindered by the closed-vocabulary bottleneck of outdated features and the assumptive bias of rigid parametric formulations. Recent alternatives exploit modern backbones to solve the feature bottleneck, yet continue to suffer from parametric limitations. To close this gap, we introduce APEX (Assumption-free Projection-based Embedding eXamination), a novel evaluation framework leveraging the Sliced Wasserstein Distance as a mathematically grounded, assumption-free similarity measure. APEX inherits effective scalability to high-dimensional spaces, as we prove with theoretical and empirical evidences. Moreover, APEX is embedding-agnostic and uses two open-vocabulary foundation models, CLIP and DINOv2, as feature extractors. Benchmarking APEX against established baselines reveals superior robustness to visual degradations. Additionally, we show that APEX metrics exhibit intra- and cross-dataset stability, ensuring highly stable evaluations on out-of-domain datasets.

Pre-training Enables Extraordinary All-optical Image Denoising

Medium 2605.07810
Xudong Lv, Yuxiang Sun, Shuo Wang, Nanxing Chen, Jun Guan, Jingtian Hu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：预训练驱动的全光学图像去噪网络，通过两步训练实现高质量去噪，并在多种视觉任务中验证有效性。
🎯研究动机

光学神经网络在速度和能效上具有优势，但其训练方法研究不足，导致性能欠佳。

❓解决问题

如何通过预训练策略提升全光学图像去噪网络的性能。

🔎现象分析

直接训练的光学网络在严重噪声（PSNR 低于 8 dB）下性能不足，而预训练 - 微调方法能显著提升去噪质量。

🛠️主要方法

两步训练法：先在大规模简单图像数据集（345 万张）上预训练，再在任务特定数据集上微调。

📊实验结果

在多种噪声条件下测试，PSNR 从低于 8 dB 提升至 18 dB 以上，并在多个数据集和视觉任务中验证。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出预训练驱动的全光学图像去噪方法，显著提升严重噪声下的去噪性能。
  • 验证了预训练光学网络可泛化至多种图像风格（如 MNIST、ChestMNIST、CIFAR-10、CelebA）。
  • 展示了光学去噪器在视觉任务（人脸检测、车牌识别、无人机定位）中的应用价值。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对全光学去噪任务，未涉及其他光学计算任务。
  • 预训练数据集为简单图像，复杂场景下的泛化性待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Optical neural networks are emerging as powerful machine learning and information processing tools because of their potential advantages in speed and energy efficiency. The training methods of these physical models, however, remain underexplored compared to their digital counterparts and are leading to suboptimal performance. This paper reports a pre-training-driven approach that leads to snapshot image denoising with substantially improved quality. We demonstrated effective free-space optical denoising by a diffractive network optimized by a two-step process including (1) pre-training using a massive dataset of 3.45 million diverse but simple images and (2) fine-tuning with the corresponding task-specific datasets. Compared to conventional Fourier-domain filtering and directly trained diffractive networks, such a transfer learning process exhibited prominent advantages for denoising images degraded by severe noise, peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) below 8 dB, while preserving fine image features and improving the PSNR to above 18 dB. Importantly, the same pre-trained optical network could be consistently fine-tuned to process degraded images from highly diverse styles ranging from handwritten digits (MNIST) and chest X-rays (ChestMNIST) to CIFAR-10 images and human faces (CelebA). We further demonstrated the critical role of our optical denoisers in vision-based applications, including face detection, plate recognition, and localization of UAVs in noisy conditions.

Divide and Conquer: Object Co-occurrence Helps Mitigate Simplicity Bias in OOD Detection

Medium 2605.07821
Boyang Dai, Chaoqi Chen, Yizhou Yu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：利用物体共现模式，通过分治策略提升 OOD 检测对近分布外样本的区分能力。
🎯研究动机

现有 OOD 检测方法多关注正则化纠缠表示，忽略了图像中丰富的上下文信息，导致对近分布外样本检测困难；人类视觉系统利用物体共现辅助场景理解，启发本文探索类似机制。

❓解决问题

解决模型因简单性偏差而难以从解耦表示中学习判别性特征，导致近分布外检测性能差的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出模型存在简单性偏差，倾向于关注简单、易学习的区域，而忽略物体共现等上下文关系，这限制了近分布外检测能力。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Object-Centric OOD 检测框架（OCO），学习图像中的物体共现模式：先预测测试样本的解耦表示，然后根据训练数据中的共现模式将样本自适应划分为三种场景，最后以分治策略进行 OOD 检测。

📊实验结果

在挑战性和全频谱 OOD 设置下进行实验，展示了竞争性结果，并确认了方法处理语义偏移和协变量偏移的能力。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于物体共现的 OOD 检测新范式，利用上下文语义关系区分近分布外样本。
  • 设计分治策略，根据共现模式自适应划分场景并分别检测，缓解简单性偏差。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖训练数据中物体共现模式的完备性，对未见共现模式泛化能力未知。
  • 解耦表示预测的准确性可能影响后续场景划分和检测性能。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is crucial for ensuring the reliability of deep learning models. Existing methods mostly focus on regular entangled representations to discriminate in-distribution (ID) and OOD data, neglecting the rich contextual information within images. This issue is particularly challenging for detecting near-OOD, as models with simplicity bias struggle to learn discriminative features in disentangled representations. The human visual system can use the co-occurrence of objects in the natural environment to facilitate scene understanding. Inspired by this, we propose an Object-Centric OOD detection framework that learns to capture Object CO-occurrence (OCO) patterns within images. The proposed method introduces a new OOD detection paradigm that understands object co-occurrence within an image by predicting disentangled representations for the test sample, then adaptively divides patterns into three scenarios based on object co-occurrence patterns observed in ID training data, and finally performs OOD detection in a divide-and-conquer manner. By doing so, OCO can distinguish near-OOD by considering the semantic contextual relationships present in their images, avoiding the tendency to focus solely on simple, easily learnable regions. We evaluate OCO through experiments across challenging and full-spectrum OOD settings, demonstrating competitive results and confirming its ability to address both semantic and covariate shifts. Code is released at this https URL .

Explainable Part-Based Vehicle Classifier with Spatial Awareness

Medium 2605.07831
Andreas Caduff (1), Klaus Zahn (1), Jonas Hofstetter (1), Martin Rechsteiner (1), Patrick Flaig (2) ((1) Competence Center for Intelligent Sensors and Networks, Lucerne University of Applied Science and Art (2) SICK AG)
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一种具有空间感知能力的可解释部件级车辆分类器，在保持可解释性的同时达到与端到端 CNN 相当的精度。
🎯研究动机

智能交通系统中需要高精度且可解释的车辆分类方法，但传统端到端 CNN 是黑箱模型，难以解释且不易扩展至新类别。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种既保持高精度又具有可解释性的车辆分类方法，并提升对错误部件检测的鲁棒性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将标准 CNN 分解为部件检测器、特征构建和分类器三部分，特征构建中使用空间概率图代替二元决策，分类采用 softmax 回归。

📊实验结果

与端到端 CNN 的对比分析表明部件方法达到相当精度，但摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出空间感知的部件级车辆分类方法，利用空间概率图提升鲁棒性
  • 实验表明该方法在精度上与端到端 CNN 相当，挑战了精度与可解释性之间的权衡
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的部件检测器
  • 空间概率图的构建可能增加计算复杂度
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In the area of Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS), fine-grained vehicle classification systems play an essential role. Recently, the authors have presented a novel vision-based classification approach in which standard end-to-end Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have been decomposed into 1) a CNN-based detector for semantically strong vehicle parts, followed by 2) feature construction and 3) final classification by a decision tree. In contrast to conventional CNNs, this allows both easy extensibility to new vehicle categories - without the need to fully retrain the part detector - and an important step towards the interpretability of the model, removing partially the black-box nature inherent to CNNs. Here we present an important extension of this approach that now incorporates spatial awareness of the vehicle parts: while the feature construction 2) of the previous approach used a binary decision for each feature (present vs. absent), now a full spatial probability map is constructed to condition the presence of each individual part with respect to a given vehicle category. The classification is performed using a softmax regression approach for the overall vehicle probabilities. This method shows a considerably improved robustness against false (part-)detections, a point that is crucial for practical application. Comparative analyses with a state-of-the-art end-to-end CNN indicate that our part-based methods achieve comparable accuracy, effectively challenging the presumed trade-off between accuracy and explainability. This research represents a significant advance in vehicle classification for ITS and forms the basis for systems that combine high accuracy with intuitive interpretability.

Rebalancing gradient to improve self-supervised co-training of depth, odometry and optical flow predictions

Medium 2605.07945
Marwane Hariat, Antoine Manzanera, David Filliat
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：通过动态梯度重分配平衡自监督联合训练中深度、里程计和光流网络的学习进度，提升多任务预测性能。
🎯研究动机

自监督联合训练深度、里程计和光流网络时，不同任务的学习进度不一致，导致整体性能受限。现有方法缺乏有效的梯度分配机制来平衡各网络的学习。

❓解决问题

如何动态调整梯度分配，使联合训练中的多个网络（深度、里程计、光流）实现均衡学习，并处理运动物体对深度和里程计训练的干扰。

🔎现象分析

运动物体像素在深度 + 里程计重建与光流重建之间存在较大分歧，可据此识别并排除运动物体对深度和里程计训练的负面影响。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CoopNet，引入基于光度重建误差分布模型的混合损失，动态调整梯度分配，使深度 + 里程计网络与光流网络的学习进度均衡。

📊实验结果

在 KITTI 和 CityScapes 数据集上进行评估，与现有方法比较，CoopNet 在深度、里程计和光流预测上表现更优或相当。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出动态梯度重分配方法 CoopNet，平衡联合训练中多个网络的学习进度。
  • 设计基于光度重建误差分布模型的混合损失，有效处理运动物体干扰。
  • 在 KITTI 和 CityScapes 数据集上达到或超越深度、里程计和光流预测的当前最优性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖光度重建误差分布假设，可能不适用于所有场景。
  • 未讨论动态梯度分配的计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present CoopNet, an approach that improves the cooperation of co-trained networks by dynamically adapting the apportionment of gradient, to ensure equitable learning progress. It is applied to motion-aware self-supervised prediction of depth maps, by introducing a new hybrid loss, based on a distribution model of photo-metric reconstruction errors made by, on the one hand the depth + odometry paired networks, and on the other hand the optical flow network. This model essentially assumes that the pixels from moving objects (that must be discarded for training depth and odometry), correspond to those where the two reconstructions strongly disagree. We justify this model by theoretical considerations and experimental evidences. A comparative evaluation on KITTI and CityScapes datasets shows that CoopNet improves or is comparable to the state-of-the-art in depth, odometry and optical flow predictions.

Rethinking Dense Optical Flow without Test-Time Scaling

Medium 2605.08000
Praroop Chanda, Suryansh Kumar
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：利用基础模型先验，单次前向传播即可实现高精度密集光流估计，无需测试时缩放。
🎯研究动机

现有密集光流方法依赖复杂架构和多步细化进行测试时缩放，导致推理计算量大，亟需更高效的替代方案。

❓解决问题

如何在不使用测试时迭代细化和额外计算的情况下，实现高精度的密集光流估计。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出一个单次前向传播框架，利用冻结的 DINO-v2 骨干提取视觉语义特征，结合单目深度基础模型的几何线索，融合为统一表示，并通过全局匹配公式估计密集对应，避免循环更新或测试时优化。

📊实验结果

在 Sintel Final 上达到 2.81 EPE，显著优于 SEA-RAFT、RAFT、GMFlow（无细化）和 FlowSeek 等。

⭐主要贡献
  • 证明了基础模型中的视觉语义和几何先验可以替代测试时缩放，实现高效密集光流估计。
  • 提出了一种无需迭代细化的单次前向传播光流方法，在多个基准上取得强跨数据集泛化性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定基础模型（DINO-v2 和深度模型），泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 未讨论在极端运动或遮挡场景下的表现。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent progress in dense optical flow has been driven by increasingly complex architectures and multi-step refinement for test-time scaling. While these approaches achieve strong benchmark performance, they also require substantial computation during inference. This raises a fundamental question: Is scaling test-time computation the only way to improve dense optical flow accuracy? We argue that it is not. Instead, powerful visual semantic and geometric priors encoded in modern foundation models can reduce, if not overcome, the need for computationally expensive iterative refinement at test-time. In this paper, we present a framework that estimates dense optical flow in a single forward pass, leveraging pretrained foundation representations, while avoiding iterative refinement and additional inference-time computation, thus offering an alternative to test-time scaling. Our method extracts visual semantic features from a frozen DINO-v2 backbone and combines them with geometric cues from a monocular depth foundation model. We fuse these complementary priors into a unified representation and apply a global matching formulation to estimate dense correspondences without recurrent updates or test-time optimization. Despite avoiding iterative refinement, our approach achieves strong cross-dataset generalization across challenging benchmarks. On Sintel Final, we obtain 2.81 EPE without refinement, significantly improving over state-of-the-art (SOTA) SEA-RAFT under comparable training conditions and outperforming RAFT, GMFlow (without refinement), and recent FlowSeek in the same setting. These results suggest that strong foundation priors can substitute for test-time scaling, offering a computationally efficient alternative to refinement-heavy pipelines.

6D Pose Estimation via Keypoint Heatmap Regression with RGB-D Residual Neural Networks

Medium 2605.08059
Ismail Aljosevic, Amir Masoud Almasi, Ana Parovic, Ashkan Shafiei
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出基于关键点热图回归的 RGB-D 融合框架，在 LINEMOD 上实现 92.41% 的 6D 姿态估计精度。
🎯研究动机

6D 姿态估计在机器人抓取、增强现实等领域至关重要，但现有方法在遮挡、纹理缺失等场景下精度不足，且 RGB 与深度数据的融合方式有待优化。

❓解决问题

如何通过关键点热图回归结合 RGB-D 多模态特征，提升 6D 物体姿态估计的精度和鲁棒性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

模块化框架：YOLOv10m 检测物体，ResNet18 预测 2D 关键点热图，经 PnP RANSAC 求解 6D 姿态；并引入跨融合架构在多个阶段交互 RGB 与深度特征。

📊实验结果

在 LINEMOD 数据集上评估，RGB-only 模型平均 ADD 精度 84.50%，RGB-D 融合模型达 92.41%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于关键点热图回归的 RGB-D 融合框架，在 LINEMOD 数据集上达到 92.41% 的 ADD 精度。
  • 系统比较了不同关键点选择策略对姿态估计精度的影响。
  • 探索了激活函数和学习率调度等训练改进策略。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在单一数据集 LINEMOD 上验证，泛化性未知。
  • 未讨论对遮挡或对称物体的处理效果。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In this paper, we propose a modular framework for 6D pose estimation based on keypoint heatmap regression. Our approach combines YOLOv10m for object detection with a ResNet18-based network that predicts 2D heatmaps from RGB images. Keypoints extracted from these heatmaps are used to estimate the 6D object pose via the PnP RANSAC algorithm. We compare different keypoint selection strategies to assess their impact on pose accuracy. Additionally, we extend the baseline by incorporating depth data using a cross-fusion architecture, which enables interaction between RGB and depth features at multiple stages. We further explore general training improvements, such as experimenting with activation functions and learning rate scheduling strategies to improve model performance. Our best RGB-only model achieved a mean ADD-based accuracy of 84.50%, while the RGB-D fusion model reached 92.41% on the LINEMOD dataset. The code is available at this https URL .

XiYOLO: Energy-Aware Object Detection via Iterative Architecture Search and Scaling

Medium 2605.06927
Tony Tran, Richie R. Suganda, Bin Hu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出能量感知的迭代架构搜索与缩放方法 XiYOLO，在异构边缘设备上实现更优的能效 - 精度权衡。
🎯研究动机

异构边缘设备上的目标检测需满足严格的能量、延迟和内存约束，但现有能量感知 NAS 方法部署场景有限，且真实能量高度依赖设备、测量成本高，难以直接优化。

❓解决问题

如何在稀疏硬件测量下，高效搜索并缩放出适应不同部署预算的能量高效目标检测架构。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出能量自适应框架，包含能量感知的 XiResOFA 搜索空间、两阶段能量估计器和迭代搜索，先识别单一高效基架构，再通过复合缩放生成 XiYOLO 系列。

📊实验结果

在 PascalVOC、COCO 和真实设备上部署实验，XiYOLO 中等模型在 PascalVOC 上达到 86.15 mAP50，相比 YOLOv12m 在 GPU 上能耗降低 20.6%，NPU 上降低 35.9%；COCO 上小规模相比 YOLOv12 在 GPU 上能耗降低 53.7%，NPU 上降低 51.6%。两阶段估计器在 2-20 个目标设备样本下优于联合预测器。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出能量自适应框架，结合迭代架构搜索与复合缩放，实现可解释的精度 - 能量权衡。
  • 设计两阶段能量估计器，在少量目标设备样本下提升样本效率。
  • 在 PascalVOC 和 COCO 上，XiYOLO 相比 YOLO 基线在 GPU 和 NPU 上均显著降低能耗。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅针对特定边缘设备（GPU/NPU）验证，泛化性需更多设备测试。
  • 复合缩放策略的通用性可能受限于搜索空间设计。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Object detection on heterogeneous edge devices must satisfy strict energy, latency, and memory constraints while still providing reliable perception for downstream autonomy. Existing energy-aware NAS methods often target limited deployment settings, while real energy remains difficult to optimize because it is highly device-dependent and costly to measure. We address these challenges with an energy-adaptive framework that combines an energy-aware XiResOFA search space, a two-stage energy estimator, and iterative search to identify a single energy-efficient base architecture. We then apply compound scaling to transform this base design into the XiYOLO family across deployment budgets, enabling interpretable accuracy-energy tradeoffs under sparse hardware measurements. Experiments on PascalVOC, COCO, and real-device deployment show that XiYOLO achieves a stronger energy-accuracy tradeoff than YOLO baselines. On PascalVOC, the medium XiYOLO model reaches 86.15 mAP50 while reducing energy relative to YOLOv12m by 20.6% on GPU and 35.9% on NPU. On COCO, XiYOLO reduces energy relative to YOLOv12 by up to 53.7% on GPU and 51.6% on NPU at the small scale. The proposed two-stage estimator also improves sample efficiency over a joint predictor under few-shot adaptation with only 2-20 target-device samples.

医学图像 16 篇

Pan-FM: A Pan-Organ Foundation Model with Saliency-Guided Masking for Missing Robustness

High 2605.07055
Qiangqiang Wu, Grace McIlvain, Zhou Yu, Junhao Wen
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 Pan-FM，一种通过显著性引导掩码预训练的全器官基础模型，解决多器官数据缺失下的鲁棒性问题。
🎯研究动机

现有基础模型多基于单模态单器官数据训练，但人类衰老和疾病涉及多器官协调过程，需要全身体表型学习；然而真实多器官数据常非随机缺失，导致模型性能下降、泛化受限且引入偏差。

❓解决问题

多器官医学影像数据缺失场景下，如何预训练一个鲁棒的全器官基础模型，避免主导器官捷径学习偏差，实现均衡的跨器官表征学习。

🔎现象分析

发现朴素多模态预训练会导致主导器官捷径学习偏差，模型过度依赖脂肪和心脏等主导器官。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Pan-FM，使用统一骨干网络处理训练和推理中的器官缺失，基于掩码自蒸馏预训练；引入显著性引导掩码（SGM），利用模型注意力分布自适应地掩码主导器官，促进均衡的跨器官学习。

📊实验结果

在 UK Biobank 数据集上评估，涵盖 13 种疾病类别和 14 种单一疾病预测，与单器官和多器官基线对比，显示更强预测性能和缺失鲁棒性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Pan-FM，首个在七器官真实缺失场景下预训练的全器官基础模型。
  • 发现并解决多器官预训练中的主导器官捷径学习偏差，提出显著性引导掩码（SGM）方法。
  • 在 UK Biobank 上 13 种疾病类别和 14 种单一疾病预测中取得更优性能，且对器官缺失具有鲁棒性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于七个器官，可能未覆盖所有相关器官。
  • SGM 依赖模型注意力分布，可能受注意力质量影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Foundation models (FMs) have shown great promise in medical imaging, but most FMs are trained on unimodal data within isolated domains, such as brain MRI alone. Human aging and disease arise through coordinated biological processes across organs, therefore motivating multimodal FMs that learn whole-body representations. A key challenge, however, is that real-world multimodal biomedical data are often missing not at random, which can reduce power, limit generalizability, and introduce bias. We propose Pan-FM, a pan-organ foundation model pre-trained on imaging from seven organs (Brain, Heart, Adipose, Liver, Kidney, Spleen, and Pancreas) under realistic missing-organ scenarios. Pan-FM uses a unified backbone that handles organ missingness during both training and inference, and is pre-trained with masking-based self-distillation. We find that naive multimodal pre-training leads to dominant-organ shortcut learning bias, with the model over-relying on dominant organs such as adipose and heart. To address this, we introduce Saliency-Guided Masking (SGM), which uses the model attention distribution to adaptively mask dominant organs during pre-training, thus encouraging more balanced cross-organ, whole-body learning. Notably, SGM introduces negligible computational overhead and can be seamlessly integrated into existing self-supervised learning frameworks to improve multi-organ representation learning. On the UK Biobank, Pan-FM achieves stronger prediction across 13 disease categories and 14 single disease entities than single-organ and multi-organ baselines, with improved robustness under missing-organ settings. Pan-FM serves as a scalable solution to realistic modality-missingness in multimodal learning in system neuroscience and as a step toward more generalizable whole-body FMs.

Hierarchical Perfusion Graphs for Tumor Heterogeneity Modeling in Glioma Molecular Subtyping

High 2605.07156
Han Jang, Junhyeok Lee, Heeseong Eum, Joon Jang, Yoseob Han, Seung Hong Choi, Kyu Sung Choi
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 HiPerfGNN 框架，通过层次化灌注图建模肿瘤异质性，实现胶质瘤分子亚型的非侵入性预测。
🎯研究动机

胶质瘤分子亚型（如 IDH 突变、1p/19q 共缺失）对手术和治疗决策至关重要，但当前依赖有创组织取样。基于结构 MRI 的深度学习方法无法捕捉区分分子亚型的血流动力学特征，而基于 DSC MRI 的放射基因组学受限于站点间变异和体素级分析的局限性。

❓解决问题

如何利用 DSC MRI 灌注数据，克服站点间变异和体素级分析的局限，实现胶质瘤分子亚型的非侵入性、准确预测。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

HiPerfGNN 框架：首先使用 VQ-VAE 从原始时间 - 强度曲线学习离散血流动力学表示；这些量化灌注码定义粗粒度图节点（功能肿瘤栖息地），每个节点根据结构 MRI 层次细分为细粒度子区域；层次图神经网络跨尺度传播信息进行分子预测。

📊实验结果

在内部队列（n=475）上，模型在 IDH、1p/19q 和 WHO 分级预测上分别达到 AUC 0.96、0.89 和 0.84；在外部独立队列（n=397）上，IDH 预测 AUC 为 0.89，无需重新校准。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出层次化灌注图框架 HiPerfGNN，整合 DSC MRI 灌注动力学与结构 MRI 进行胶质瘤分子亚型预测。
  • 在内部队列（n=475）和外部独立队列（n=397）上验证了模型的有效性和泛化性，IDH 预测 AUC 分别达 0.96 和 0.89。
  • 梯度显著性分析证实模型关注区域与已知胶质瘤病理生理学一致。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于 DSC MRI，可能未充分利用其他模态信息。
  • 外部验证仅针对 IDH 亚型，1p/19q 和 WHO 分级的外部性能未报告。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Precise molecular subtyping of gliomas, including isocitrate dehydrogenase (IDH) mutation and 1p/19q codeletion, directly guides surgical and therapeutic decisions, yet currently relies on invasive tissue sampling. Deep learning on structural MRI has emerged as a non-invasive alternative, but anatomy-only approaches cannot capture the hemodynamic signatures that distinguish molecular subtypes. Radiogenomics based on dynamic susceptibility contrast (DSC) MRI holds immense potential for non-invasively characterizing glioma molecular subtypes, yet clinical deployment has been hindered by inter-site variability and the limitations of voxel-wise analysis. We introduce HiPerfGNN, a framework that first learns discrete hemodynamic representations from raw time-intensity curves using a vector-quantized variational autoencoder (VQ-VAE). These quantized perfusion codes define coarse-level graph nodes representing functional tumor habitats, each of which is hierarchically subdivided into fine-level subregions guided by structural MRI. A hierarchical graph neural network then propagates information across scales for molecular prediction. On an internal cohort (n=475), the model achieved AUCs of 0.96 (IDH), 0.89 (1p/19q), and 0.84 (WHO grade), and maintained robust IDH performance (AUC 0.89) on an independent external cohort (n=397) without recalibration. Gradient-based saliency analysis confirms biologically grounded attention patterns aligned with known glioma pathophysiology. Our results demonstrate the added value of integrating perfusion dynamics into radiogenomic pipelines for glioma molecular subtyping. Code is available at this https URL .

DINO-MVR: Multi-View Readout of Frozen DINOv3 for Annotation-Efficient Medical Segmentation

High 2605.07221
Wei Jiang, Feng Liu, Nan Ye, Hongfu Sun
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：冻结 DINOv3 特征配合多视图读出即可高效实现医学分割，无需微调骨干网络。
🎯研究动机

医学分割中标注数据稀缺，现有方法依赖骨干微调或高容量解码器，难以在少标注场景下可靠适配。

❓解决问题

如何在标注稀缺条件下，利用冻结的预训练视觉特征实现准确的医学分割。

🔎现象分析

冻结的 DINOv3 特征已包含结构性和边界线索，主要瓶颈在于特征的读出方式。

🛠️主要方法

提出 DINO-MVR，仅训练轻量 MLP 探针读取冻结 DINOv3 最后三个 Transformer 块的特征，推理时通过互补分辨率、测试时增强、熵加权融合和空间正则化组合概率图，对体积输入使用高斯 z 轴平滑。

📊实验结果

在内镜、皮肤镜和 MRI 基准上评估，Kvasir-SEG Dice 0.895，ISIC 2018 Dice 0.897，BraTS FLAIR 全肿瘤分割 Dice 0.908；仅用 5 个 BraTS 患者标注恢复 40 患者参考运行的 98.4% 性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 证明冻结 DINOv3 特征可用于医学分割，且读出方式是关键瓶颈。
  • 提出多视图读出框架，仅需轻量 MLP 探针，无需微调骨干。
  • 在多个医学分割基准上取得强性能，尤其在极低标注下接近全标注性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅验证了 DINOv3，其他自监督骨干可能不适用。
  • 多视图融合增加推理计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Adapting foundation models to medical segmentation typically requires either backbone fine-tuning or high-capacity task-specific decoders, both of which are difficult to fit reliably when annotations are scarce. We show that frozen DINOv3 features already contain useful structural and boundary cues for medical segmentation, and that the main bottleneck lies in how these features are read out. We propose DINO-MVR, a Multi-View Readout framework for annotation-efficient medical segmentation. DINO-MVR trains only lightweight MLP probes on features from the final three transformer blocks of a frozen DINOv3 backbone, without updating the backbone itself. At inference, each input is interpreted through complementary resolutions and test-time augmentations, whose probability maps are combined by entropy-weighted fusion and refined with simple spatial regularization. For volumetric inputs, Gaussian z-axis smoothing further improves inter-slice consistency. Under fixed evaluation protocols on endoscopy, dermoscopy, and MRI benchmarks, DINO-MVR achieves strong readout-only performance, including 0.895 Dice on Kvasir-SEG, 0.897 Dice on ISIC 2018, and 0.908 Dice on BraTS FLAIR whole-tumor segmentation. With only five annotated BraTS patients, it recovers 98.4% of the performance obtained by the 40-patient BraTS reference run. These results suggest that frozen self-supervised vision backbones can support accurate medical segmentation when paired with an effective multi-view readout.

Multimodal Stepwise Clinically-Guided Attention Learning for Pathological Complete Response Prediction in Breast Cancer

High 2605.07561
Alice Natalina Caragliano, Valerio Guarrasi, Michela Gravina, Carlo Sansone, Paolo Soda
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出多模态逐步临床引导注意力学习框架，提升乳腺癌病理完全缓解预测的准确性和泛化性。
🎯研究动机

病理完全缓解（pCR）是乳腺癌新辅助治疗的关键预后因素，但术前准确预测面临严重类别不平衡和跨机构泛化性差的问题。

❓解决问题

如何利用多模态 MRI 和临床变量，在类别不平衡下准确预测 pCR 并提升跨机构泛化能力。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出逐步训练策略：先学习全局判别影像模式，再引入注意力机制约束网络关注肿瘤区域，最后整合临床变量优化决策。

📊实验结果

在异质性 MRI 队列上进行外部验证，与无引导单阶段基线相比，提高了敏感性并保持了竞争性特异性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出多模态逐步临床引导注意力学习框架，通过医学空间引导和多模态集成提升 pCR 预测性能。
  • 通过外部验证证明该方法在异质性 MRI 队列中提高了敏感性，同时保持特异性，并产生解剖一致的注意力图。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量肿瘤区域标注。
  • 外部验证队列的异质性可能影响结论的普适性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Pathological complete response (pCR) is a key prognostic factor in breast cancer patients undergoing neoadjuvant therapy, strongly associated with long-term survival and treatment personalization. However, accurate pre-treatment pCR prediction remains challenging due to severe class imbalance and limited generalizability across diverse clinical settings. In this work, we propose a multimodal stepwise clinically-guided attention learning framework for pCR prediction from breast magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), designed to address these limitations through medically grounded spatial guidance and multimodal integration. The approach follows a stepwise training strategy inspired by physician reasoning: the model first learns global discriminative imaging patterns, then attention mechanisms are introduced to constrain the network toward tumor regions, and finally clinical variables are integrated to refine decision-making. This guidance strategy encourages prioritization of task-relevant features, improving identification of responders despite their limited representation in the dataset. Moreover, grounding attention in anatomically consistent tumor regions reduces reliance on dataset-specific patterns, thereby enhancing cross-institutional generalization. The framework is evaluated through external validation across heterogeneous MRI cohorts. Compared to non-guided single-stage baselines, the proposed approach improves sensitivity while maintaining competitive specificity, and produces anatomically coherent attention maps that support interpretation of the model's predictions. These findings highlight the potential of clinically-guided multimodal attention learning for robust and generalizable pCR prediction in breast cancer.

Radiologist-Guided Causal Concept Bottleneck Models for Chest X-Ray Interpretation

High 2605.07785
Amy Rafferty, Rishi Ramaesh, Ajitha Rajan
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一种放射科医生引导的因果概念瓶颈模型，通过噪声 OR 框架建模病理 - 影像发现关系，提升胸部 X 光片解释的准确性和可解释性。
🎯研究动机

现有概念瓶颈模型将概念视为病理标签的判别预测器，未建模疾病产生影像发现的临床生成过程，导致可解释性不足且与临床推理不一致。

❓解决问题

如何将临床生成过程（疾病→影像发现）显式建模到概念瓶颈模型中，以提升病理分类性能、校准性和解释质量。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 XpertCausal，使用概率噪声 OR 框架建模病理 - 概念关系，通过贝叶斯推断从预测概念估计病理概率，并用放射科医生定义的病理 - 概念关联约束模型结构。

📊实验结果

在 MIMIC-CXR 数据集上评估病理分类性能、校准、解释质量以及与放射科医生定义推理路径的对齐程度。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出放射科医生引导的因果概念瓶颈模型，显式建模病理到影像发现的生成过程。
  • 在 MIMIC-CXR 上验证模型在分类性能、校准、解释质量和临床对齐方面的提升。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖放射科医生定义的概念 - 病理关联，可能引入主观偏差。
  • 噪声 OR 框架假设条件独立性，可能简化真实临床关系。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) in medical imaging aim to improve model interpretability by predicting intermediate clinical concepts before final diagnoses. However, most existing CBMs treat concepts as discriminative predictors of pathology labels, without explicitly modelling the underlying clinical generative process where diseases produce observable radiographic findings. We propose XpertCausal, a radiologist-guided causal CBM for chest X-ray interpretation which models pathology-to-concept relationships using a probabilistic noisy-OR framework. This generative model is then inverted via Bayesian inference to estimate pathology probabilities from predicted concepts. Radiologist-curated concept-pathology associations are used to constrain model structure to radiologist-defined clinically plausible reasoning pathways. We evaluate XpertCausal on MIMIC-CXR across pathology classification performance, calibration, explanation quality, and alignment with radiologist-defined reasoning pathways. Compared with both a non-causal CBM baseline and a causal ablation with unconstrained learned associations, XpertCausal achieves improved AUROC, calibration, and clinically relevant explanation quality, while learning concept-pathology relationships that more closely align with expert knowledge. These results demonstrate that incorporating clinically motivated causal structure and expert domain knowledge into CBMs can lead to more accurate, interpretable, and clinically aligned models for CXR interpretation.

TimeLesSeg: Unified Contrast-Agnostic Cross-Sectional and Longitudinal MS Lesion Segmentation via a Stochastic Generative Model

High 2605.07955
Vicent Caselles-Ballester, Eloy Martínez-Heras, Giuseppe Pontillo, Zoe Mendelsohn, Elena M. Marrón, Juan Luis García Fernández, Laia Subirats, Jon Stutters et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：TimeLesSeg 提出统一对比无关的横断面与纵向 MS 病灶分割框架，通过随机生成模型模拟病灶演变，在多个数据集上超越现有方法。
🎯研究动机

多发性硬化（MS）病灶分割面临临床和影像异质性挑战，现有深度学习方法对输入分布（如扫描仪变化）和结构（横断面 vs 纵向）敏感，缺乏统一框架。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个统一的对比无关的框架，既能处理横断面输入（单时间点）又能处理纵向输入（多时间点），且对扫描仪等分布变化鲁棒。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

使用单一卷积神经网络，通过病灶掩模建模病理先验；横断面处理使用空掩模；纵向处理通过随机形态学操作变形单个病灶模拟演变；对比无关性通过高斯混合模型域随机化实现。

📊实验结果

在三个公开数据集和两个内部数据集上评估，TimeLesSeg 在单模态输入上超越对比无关的 SOTA，在纵向处理上优于 SAMSEG 和 LST-AI。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出统一对比无关的横断面与纵向 MS 病灶分割框架 TimeLesSeg。
  • 设计基于随机形态学操作的生成式管道，模拟病灶演变以克服纵向数据稀缺和不一致性。
  • 采用高斯混合模型域随机化实现对比无关性，在多个数据集上取得优于现有方法的结果。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖病灶掩模的可用性，在无先验场景下性能未知。
  • 生成式模拟可能无法完全覆盖真实病灶演变模式。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multiple sclerosis (MS) expresses substantial clinical and radiological heterogeneity, which poses significant challenges for automatic lesion segmentation. The current deep learning-based SOTA is highly susceptible to changes in both distribution, e.g., changes in scanner; as well as the structure of inputs, evident in the current divide between cross-sectional and longitudinal approaches. We introduce TimeLesSeg, a unified contrast-agnostic framework designed to segment MS lesions regardless of the presence of a temporal dimension in its inputs, with a single convolutional neural network. Our approach models pathological priors through lesion masks, which are processed together with the current scan. Cross-sectional processing is enabled by exposing the model to training cases where no prior information is available, which are modeled with an empty mask, allowing it to operate seamlessly in both scenarios. To overcome the scarcity and inconsistency of longitudinal datasets, we propose a novel generative pipeline in which patterns of lesion evolution are simulated by stochastically deforming each individual lesion with morphological operations, producing realistic prior timepoints. In parallel, we achieve contrast agnosticism through Gaussian mixture model-based domain randomization, enabling the network to experience a wide spectrum of intensity profiles. Results on three publicly available and two in-house datasets show that TimeLesSeg outperforms the contrast-agnostic state of the art on single-modality inputs across overlap- and distance-based metrics. In longitudinal processing, our method outperforms SAMSEG, and captures lesion load dynamics more accurately than both the former and LST-AI. All source code related to the development of TimeLesSeg is available at this https URL .

MPD$^2$-Router: Mask-aware Multi-expert Prior-regularized Dual-head Deferral Router in Glaucoma Screening and Diagnosis

High 2605.08024
Wenxin Zhan
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种掩码感知的多专家延迟路由框架，用于青光眼筛查中的人机协作决策。
🎯研究动机

青光眼筛查中，学习 - 延迟（L2D）方法可以提升安全性，但现有方法忽略了专家可用性、读者行为异质性、工作负载不平衡、不对称诊断危害以及病例难度和部署偏移等问题。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个考虑专家可用性、行为异质性和不对称成本的延迟路由策略，在青光眼筛查中实现安全、高效的人机协作。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MPD$^2$-Router 框架，包含双头延迟 / 分配策略、掩码感知 Gumbel-sigmoid 门控（强制样本级专家可用性）、融合不确定性、形态、图像质量和 OOD 信号；训练使用不对称成本敏感目标、增广拉格朗日延迟预算、组特定分布先验和秩主化 JS 正则化器。

📊实验结果

在三个跨国青光眼数据集（REFUGE、CHAKSU、ORIGA）上，使用冻结的 REFUGE 训练骨干，MPD$^2$-Router 显著降低临床成本并提高 MCC，在 F1-MCC- 成本上达到帕累托最优，对跨域偏移鲁棒，且专家利用率均衡。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出掩码感知的多专家延迟路由框架，解决专家可用性和行为异质性。
  • 设计不对称成本敏感目标和正则化方法，平衡临床成本和专家利用率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖预训练骨干的质量。
  • 框架复杂度较高，实际部署可能需要额外计算资源。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Learning-to-defer (L2D) can make glaucoma screening safer by routing difficult/uncertain cases to humans, yet standard formulations overlook expert availability, heterogeneous readers behavior, workload imbalance, asymmetric diagnostic harm, case difficulty from morphology and deployment shift. We introduce MPD$^2$-Router, a mask-aware multi-expert deferral framework that recasts ophthalmic triage as constrained human--AI routing: whether to defer and to which available expert. It couples a dual-head deferral/allocation policy with mask-aware Gumbel--sigmoid gating that strictly enforces per-sample availability, and fuses uncertainty, morphology, image-quality, and OOD signals. Training uses an asymmetric cost-sensitive objective with an augmented-Lagrangian deferral budget, a group-specific distribution prior, and a rank-majorization JS regularizer that jointly prevent expert collapse without forcing uniform allocation. Across three cross-national glaucoma cohorts (REFUGE, CHAKSU, ORIGA) with a frozen REFUGE-trained backbone, MPD$^2$-Router substantially lowers clinical cost and improves MCC over AI-only at a moderate deferral rate. It is Pareto-optimal in F1--MCC--cost, robust under cross-domain shift, and yields balanced expert utilization.

PET-Adapter: Test-Time Domain Adaptation for Full and Limited-Angle PET Image Reconstruction

High 2605.08030
Rüveyda Yilmaz, Yuli Wu, Johannes Stegmaier, Volkmar Schulz
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 PET-Adapter，一种测试时域适应框架，使仅用体模数据预训练的生成模型适应临床 PET 重建，仅需 2 步扩散即可达到高质量。
🎯研究动机

PET 图像重建受泊松噪声和物理退化影响，尤其在有限角度采集下更严重；深度学习方法在未见临床数据上泛化差，需要大量重训练。

❓解决问题

如何使仅用体模数据预训练的生成式 PET 重建模型适应不同解剖结构、示踪剂和扫描配置的临床数据集，且无需配对真值。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 PET-Adapter，包含层式低秩解剖条件注入和基于有序子集期望最大化的热启动，将扩散步数从 50 减少到 2。

📊实验结果

在多个临床数据集上进行了全角度和有限角度 3D 重建实验，展示了优越性能和计算效率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出测试时域适应框架，使体模预训练模型适应临床 PET 数据，无需配对真值。
  • 引入层式低秩解剖条件和 OSEM 热启动，显著减少扩散步数（50→2）而不损失质量。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定预训练生成模型架构。
  • 低秩条件注入的泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Positron Emission Tomography (PET) image reconstruction is inherently challenged by Poisson noise and physical degradation factors, which are further exacerbated in limited-angle acquisitions. While deep learning methods demonstrate promising performance, their generalization to unseen clinical data distributions remains limited without extensive retraining. We propose PET-Adapter, a test-time domain adaptation framework for generative PET reconstruction models pretrained solely on phantom data. Our method enables adaptation to clinical datasets with varying anatomies, tracers, and scanner configurations without requiring paired ground truth. PET-Adapter introduces layer-wise low-rank anatomical conditioning during adaptation and Ordered Subset Expectation Maximization-based warm-starting that initializes the generation from physics-informed reconstructions, reducing diffusion steps from 50 to 2 without compromising quality. Experiments across multiple clinical datasets demonstrate superior 3D reconstruction performance in both full-angle and limited-angle settings, highlighting the clinical feasibility and computational efficiency of the proposed approach.

Knowledge Transfer Scaling Laws for 3D Medical Imaging

High 2605.06859
Ho Hin Lee, Dongna Du, Chu Wang, Yuankai Huo, Shi Gu, James C. Gee, Yifan Wu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出知识迁移缩放定律，优化 3D 医学影像预训练数据分配，发现跨模态迁移不对称性，并设计枢纽 - 孤岛结构分配策略。
🎯研究动机

3D 医学影像基础模型需要混合不同模态（CT、MRI、PET）进行预训练，但当前数据混合策略主要依赖启发式方法，缺乏理论指导，导致效率低下。

❓解决问题

如何根据跨模态知识迁移的缩放定律，优化多模态 3D 医学影像预训练中的数据分配，以提升下游任务性能。

🔎现象分析

不同医学影像模态在预训练中缩放速率不同，且跨域知识迁移存在强不对称性（训练一个域可大幅提升另一域，反之则弱）；MAE 重建损失和跨域迁移均遵循可预测的幂律趋势。

🛠️主要方法

将数据分配建模为基于缩放定律的优化问题，推导出枢纽 - 孤岛结构：高迁移性域作为枢纽需战略分配，孤立域需直接投入。

📊实验结果

在 CT、MRI、PET 多模态预训练中验证，迁移感知分配优于数据比例采样（提升 58%），泛化到未见预算（r=0.989）；下游疾病分类和器官 / 病变分割任务进一步确认。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现 3D 医学影像预训练中跨模态知识迁移的不对称性和幂律缩放规律
  • 提出基于缩放定律的数据分配优化方法，揭示枢纽 - 孤岛结构
  • 实验证明迁移感知分配比数据比例采样提升高达 58%，且泛化到未见预算
⚠️方法局限
  • 缩放定律可能依赖特定预训练目标和模型架构
  • 枢纽 - 孤岛结构可能随新模态加入而改变
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vision foundation models are increasingly moving beyond 2D to volumetric domains such as 3D medical imaging, where unified pretraining across different imaging modalities (i.e. CT, MRI, and PET) could provide foundational models for diverse clinical tasks. However, training such models requires mixing heterogeneous imaging domains, and current mixture strategies remain largely heuristic. In this work, we observe that different medical imaging domains scale at variable rates during pretraining, and knowledge transfer between domains is strongly asymmetric: training on one domain can substantially improve another, but the reverse may be much weaker. Interestingly, both MAE reconstruction loss and cross-domain transfer follow predictable power-law trends with domain-specific behaviors. Motivated by these findings, we formulate data allocation as a scaling-law optimization problem. The derived allocations reveal an interpretable hub-and-island structure: highly transferable domains emerge as hubs that benefit many others and deserve strategic allocation, while isolated domains act as islands requiring direct investment. Empirically, transfer-aware allocation outperforms data-proportional sampling by up to 58% and generalizes well to unseen budgets with r=0.989. Downstream validation on disease classification and organ/lesion segmentation further confirms that the derived transfer-aware mixtures provide stronger pretrained representations for clinical 3D medical imaging tasks.

Multimodal synthesis of MRI and tabular data with diffusion in a joint latent space via cross-attention

High 2605.06699
Daniel Mensing, Jan Kapar, Jochen G. Hirsch, Matthias Günther, Horst Hahn, Marvin N. Wright
arXiv PDF eess.IV
TL;DR：提出首个联合扩散模型，在共享潜空间通过交叉注意力同步合成 MRI 和表格临床数据。
🎯研究动机

现有生成模型通常只处理单一模态，而医疗数据常包含多模态（如 MRI 和表格数据），缺乏能联合生成且保持模态间一致性的方法。

❓解决问题

如何在一个统一的扩散框架中联合生成高保真、模态一致的 MRI 体积和混合型表格临床数据。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

使用变分自编码器融合 MRI 和表格数据到共享潜空间，再通过交叉注意力机制进行扩散合成，最后用独立解码器分别重建各模态。

📊实验结果

在德国国家队列（NAKO）超过 10,000 名参与者的数据上评估，使用 Fréchet 距离和精确率 - 召回率指标评估图像质量，表格模态与 CTGAN 和 TVAE 对比。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个在单一潜扩散框架中联合建模 MRI 和混合型表格数据的工作
  • 在 NAKO 数据集上验证了生成数据的解剖合理性和表格属性一致性，表格生成优于 CTGAN，与 TVAE 相当
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能未在多种 MRI 序列或病理数据上验证
  • 表格数据种类有限，未涉及更复杂的临床变量
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We propose a multimodal latent diffusion model that jointly synthesizes volumetric magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) and tabular clinical data within a shared latent space via cross-attention. This approach enables coherent joint representation learning of MRI and tabular modalities for generative modeling. Our model utilizes a variational autoencoder to fuse the two modalities before diffusion-based synthesis, allowing modality-appropriate reconstruction with separate decoders for MRI and tabular data. We evaluated the framework on data from the German National Cohort (NAKO Gesundheitsstudie), comprising over 10,000 participants with MRI scans and clinical tabular features such as age, sex, body measurements, and ethnicity. The generated MRI volumes exhibited anatomical plausibility and body composition consistent with the synthesized tabular attributes. Quantitative evaluation using Fréchet distance and precision-recall metrics confirmed high-fidelity image generation. In the tabular modality, our model outperformed CTGAN across standard evaluation metrics and achieved results comparable to TVAE, demonstrating competitive performance relative to established unimodal baselines. This work is, to our knowledge, the first to demonstrate the feasibility of jointly modeling MRI and mixed-type tabular data in a single latent diffusion framework, offering a proof-of-concept for generating coherent synthetic multimodal patient data and aligning with the broader goal of developing digital twins in healthcare.

ImplantMamba: Long-range Sequential Modeling Mamba For Dental Implant Position Prediction

Medium 2605.07082
Xinquan Yang, Congmin Wang, Xuguang Li, Yulei Li, Linlin Shen, Yongqiang Deng He Meng
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 ImplantMamba，结合 CNN 与 Mamba 进行长程序列建模，实现牙种植体位置与角度的联合预测。
🎯研究动机

牙种植体区域缺乏纹理特征，AI 模型需依赖周围牙齿纹理推断位置和角度，现有方法难以有效整合长程上下文信息。

❓解决问题

如何利用周围牙齿的纹理信息精确预测牙种植体的位置和角度（斜率）。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 ImplantMamba 网络，包含 CNN-Mamba 混合编码器（CNN 提取局部特征，Mamba 建模全局依赖）和斜率耦合预测分支（SCP，联合回归位置与角度）。

📊实验结果

在大规模牙种植体数据集上实验，ImplantMamba 优于现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ImplantMamba，结合 CNN 与 Mamba 实现长程序列建模，有效整合相邻牙齿纹理信息。
  • 引入斜率耦合预测分支，强制位置与角度预测的一致性，提升解剖合理性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量全景扫描数据，泛化性待验证。
  • 仅针对牙种植体任务，未讨论其他医学图像应用。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In the design of surgical guides for implant placement, determining the precise implant position is a critical step. However, the implant region itself is often characterized by a lack of distinctive texture in medical images. Consequently, artificial intelligence (AI) models must infer the correct implant position and angulation (slope) primarily by analyzing the texture of the surrounding teeth, which poses a significant challenge. To address this, we propose ImplantMamba, a network architecture designed for long-range sequential modeling to integrate texture information from adjacent teeth. Our approach explicitly couples the regression of the implant position with its slope. The core of ImplantMamba is a hybrid encoder that combines Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) with Mamba layers. This design enables the network to hierarchically extract local anatomical features through CNNs while simultaneously modeling global contextual dependencies across the entire scan volume via Mamba's selective scan operations, leading to a more comprehensive understanding of the implant site. Furthermore, we introduce a Slope-Coupled Prediction Branch (SCP). This branch is designed to connect the prediction of implant position with the slope, ensuring internal consistency and anatomical plausibility by thereby enforcing a coherent relationship between the predicted implant location and its angulation. Extensive experiments on a large-scale dental implant dataset demonstrate that the proposed ImplantMamba achieves superior performance compared to existing methods.

AGA3DNet: Anatomy-Guided Gaussian Priors with Multi-view xLSTM for 3D Brain MRI Subtype Classification

Medium 2605.07142
Peiyu Duan, Xueqi Guo, Sepehr Farhand, Mehmet Berk Sahin, Xinyuan Zheng, James S. Duncan, Gerardo Hermosillo Valadez, Yoshihisa Shinagawa
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：利用放射学报告中的解剖短语作为先验，结合 3D CNN 和多视图 xLSTM，提升脑 MRI 亚型分类性能。
🎯研究动机

3D 脑 MRI 亚型分类需要局部解剖线索和长程上下文推理，现有方法依赖密集体素标注，成本高且缺乏可解释性。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖密集体素标注的情况下，将解剖先验融入 3D 脑 MRI 分类模型，提升准确性和可解释性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

从放射学报告中提取解剖短语，映射到图谱区域，通过符号距离变换和高斯加权生成平滑空间先验，与轻量级 3D CNN 及多视图 xLSTM 融合。

📊实验结果

在回顾性机构脑 MRI 队列上进行异常亚型区分实验，与可复现的 3D 分类基线比较，AGA3DNet 在性能指标上取得更均衡的提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种报告引导的框架，利用解剖短语作为软先验通道，无需密集标注。
  • 设计多视图 xLSTM 聚合机制，增强长程上下文建模。
  • 在回顾性数据集上验证了分类性能提升和临床可解释定位能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在单中心回顾性数据集上评估，泛化性未知。
  • 缺乏大规模公开脑 MRI 数据集及配套放射学报告。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Accurate 3D brain MRI subtype classification benefits from both localized anatomical cues and long-range contextual reasoning. We present AGA3DNet, a report-grounded framework that incorporates brief anatomical phrases extracted from radiology reports as a soft anatomical prior channel and fuses it with a lightweight 3D CNN and multi-view xLSTM aggregation. Specifically, extracted anatomical phrases are mapped to atlas-defined regions and converted into smooth spatial priors using a signed-distance transform followed by Gaussian weighting, providing interpretable, anatomy-grounded guidance without requiring dense voxel annotations. We evaluate AGA3DNet on a retrospective institutional brain MRI cohort for abnormal subtype discrimination and compare against reproducible 3D classification baselines. AGA3DNet achieves improved overall balance across performance metrics and supports clinically interpretable localization through the prior channel. We discuss limitations related to single-cohort evaluation and the lack of large-scale public brain MRI datasets paired with radiology reports under broadly usable terms.

A Unified Framework for the Detection and Classification of Fatty Pancreas in Ultrasound Images

Medium 2605.07466
Ioan-Tudor-Alexandru Anghel, Ciprian-Mihai Ceausescu, Elena Dana Nedelcu, Elena Raluca Stirban, Camelia Croitoru, Despina Ungureanu, Ana Maria Palan, Gabriela Pop
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出首个端到端超声图像脂肪胰检测框架，通过分割引导的纹理分析实现高精度分类。
🎯研究动机

非酒精性脂肪胰病（NAFPD）与代谢综合征、胰岛素抵抗及胰腺癌风险相关，但临床诊断依赖主观视觉评估，缺乏自动化工具。

❓解决问题

从腹部超声图像中自动分类正常与脂肪胰。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

采用 TransUNet（ResNet 编码器 +Transformer 瓶颈）分割胰腺和脾静脉，基于解剖引导的补丁提取和成对纹理比较进行患者级分类，特征工程模拟临床推理（比较静脉周围脂肪与胰腺实质的回声性），并通过领域特定迁移学习初始化分割模型。

📊实验结果

在 214 张腹部超声图像（107 张专家标注）上使用 5 折交叉验证，SVM（RBF 核）平均准确率 89.7%±1.8%，F1 为 0.898±0.019；无监督 K-Means 基线准确率 87.8%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个端到端超声图像脂肪胰自动分类框架，结合分割引导的纹理分析。
  • 提出解剖引导的补丁提取和成对纹理比较方法，模拟临床推理，提供可解释信号。
  • 在临床数据集上验证，SVM 达到 89.7% 准确率，无监督 K-Means 基线达 87.8% 准确率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集规模较小（214 张图像），可能限制泛化性。
  • 仅针对超声图像，未验证其他模态。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Non-alcoholic fatty pancreas disease (NAFPD) is an underdiagnosed condition associated with metabolic syndrome, insulin resistance, and increased risk of pancreatic cancer. Diagnosis typically relies on subjective visual assessment of ultrasound images by clinicians. We propose an end-to-end framework for automatically classifying normal versus fatty pancreas from abdominal ultrasound images. Our method employs a TransUNet-based segmentation architecture with a ResNet encoder and transformer bottleneck to delineate the pancreas and the splenic vein, followed by anatomically-guided patch extraction and patient-level classification through pairwise texture comparison. The feature engineering mimics clinical reasoning by comparing the echogenicity of peri-venous fat to the pancreatic parenchyma, providing an interpretable signal for classification. The segmentation models are initialized via domain-specific transfer learning from a liver segmentation task. We validate the full pipeline on a clinical dataset of 214 abdominal ultrasound images with 107 expert-labeled cases using 5-fold cross-validation. SVM with RBF kernel achieves a mean cross-validated accuracy of 89.7\%\,$\pm$\,1.8\% and F1 of 0.898\,$\pm$\,0.019, while the unsupervised K-Means baseline reaches 87.8\% accuracy, demonstrating that the proposed features capture the relevant clinical signal even without labeled training data. To our knowledge, this is the first end-to-end automated framework for fatty pancreas classification from ultrasound using segmentation-guided texture analysis.

Benchmarking Foundation Models for Renal Lesion Stratification in CT

Medium 2605.07749
Hartmut Häntze, Sarah de Boer, Myrthe Buser, Alessa Hering, Bram van Ginneken, Mathias Prokop, Jawed Nawabi, Sebastian Ziegelmayer et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：医学基础模型在 CT 肾病变分类中表现不如传统影像组学方法。
🎯研究动机

开源医学基础模型（FMs）的预训练表示在数据稀缺的临床分类任务中的迁移能力尚不清楚，尤其是 CT 肾病变分类受限于训练数据不足，亟需评估其泛化性。

❓解决问题

评估医学基础模型在 CT 肾病变六分类任务中的表现，并与传统影像组学及从头训练的 3D ResNet-50 进行比较。

🔎现象分析

基础模型（AUC 0.70-0.77）与从头训练的 ResNet（AUC 0.72）性能相当，但均显著低于传统影像组学基线（AUC 0.88），表明当前通用基础模型嵌入未能捕捉组织学亚型区分所需的细粒度纹理和形状异质性。

🛠️主要方法

采用冻结特征探测协议，比较三种医学基础模型、手工影像组学分类器和从头训练的 3D ResNet-50 在 2854 个病变的复合数据集上的表现，并在 234 个病变的外部测试集上评估。

📊实验结果

在 2854 个病变的复合数据集上训练，并在 234 个病变的外部测试集（来自 The Cancer Imaging Archive）上评估，报告了 AUC 指标。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统评估了医学基础模型在 CT 肾病变分类任务中的迁移性能
  • 发现传统影像组学方法仍优于当前基础模型，揭示了基础模型在细粒度医学分类中的局限性
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅评估了冻结特征协议，未探索微调策略
  • 基础模型种类有限，可能不涵盖所有最新模型
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The rapid proliferation of open-source medical foundation models (FMs) raises a practical question: how well do their pre-trained representations transfer to clinically relevant but data-scarce classification tasks? Particularly in CT-based renal lesion classification, a push toward greater generalizability would be meaningful, as the field is constrained by inherently limited training data. We addressed this through a benchmark of three medical FMs on this specific task. This six-class problem spans common entities like cysts and clear cell renal cell carcinoma, alongside rare subtypes. Using a frozen feature-probing protocol, we compared FM embeddings against a handcrafted radiomics classifier and a 3D ResNet-50 trained from scratch. Models were trained on a composite dataset of 2,854 lesions and evaluated on an external test set of 234 lesions from The Cancer Imaging Archive. Our results reveal two key findings. First, FM performance (AUC 0.70-0.77) matched the from-scratch ResNet (AUC 0.72) while drastically reducing hardware demand, requiring only seconds on a CPU after feature extraction. However, the conventional radiomics baseline significantly outperformed all deep learning approaches, achieving an AUC of 0.88 (all p $\leq$ 0.002). This suggests that current generalist FM embeddings do not yet capture the fine-grained texture and shape heterogeneity driving histological subtype discrimination. Despite their potential in data-scarce settings, medical FMs did not surpass established models for renal lesion stratification, leaving radiomics as the current state-of-the-art.

Uncertainty Quantification for Cardiac Shape Reconstruction with Deep Signed Distance Functions via MCMC methods

Medium 2605.07987
Jan Verhülsdonk, Thomas Grandits, Francisco Sahli Costabal, Thomas Beiert, Simone Pezzuto, Alexander Effland
arXiv PDF eess.IV
TL;DR：结合 DeepSDF 与 MCMC 实现心脏形状重建的不确定性量化。
🎯研究动机

基于图谱的心脏形状重建方法主要依赖先验，不确定性影响大，限制了临床可靠性。

❓解决问题

如何对心脏形状重建进行不确定性量化，提高临床可靠性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将 DeepSDF 与 MCMC 结合，通过将重建损失解释为对数似然，在潜在空间进行贝叶斯推断，获得 MAP 和后验采样重建。

📊实验结果

在公开心脏数据集上实验，表明方法能产生准确重建和良好校准的不确定性估计。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一个概率框架用于不确定性感知的心脏形状重建。
  • 结合 DeepSDF 与 MCMC 实现多表面重建及不确定性估计。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖于特定数据集，泛化性需验证。
  • MCMC 采样计算成本可能较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Atlas-based approaches allow high-quality, patient-specific shape reconstructions of cardiac anatomy from sparse and/or noisy data such as point clouds. However, these methods are mainly prior-driven, so the impact of uncertainty can be large, limiting their clinical reliability. We propose a probabilistic framework for uncertainty-aware cardiac shape reconstruction that combines Deep Signed Distance Functions (DeepSDFs) with Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) sampling. Cardiac geometries are modeled implicitly as zero-level sets of a neural network conditioned on learned latent codes, enabling multi-surface reconstruction of the left and right ventricles. By interpreting the reconstruction loss as a log-likelihood, we perform Bayesian inference in the latent space to obtain both maximum a posteriori (MAP) and posterior-sampled reconstructions. Experiments on a public cardiac dataset show that our approach produces accurate reconstructions and well-calibrated uncertainty estimates.

Overcoming data scarcity through multi-center federated learning for organs-at-risk segmentation in pediatric upper abdominal radiotherapy

Medium 2605.06820
Mianyong Ding, Maximilian Knoll, Semi Harrabi, Martine van Grotel, Annemieke S. Littooij, Max van Noesel, Jens-Peter Schenk, Marry M. van den Heuvel-Eibrink et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：联邦学习能有效解决儿科上腹部放疗中器官分割模型的数据稀缺问题，跨中心性能优于本地模型。
🎯研究动机

基于深度学习的器官自动分割模型在儿科患者中性能不佳，因为儿科数据稀缺且分散在不同中心，而成人数据训练的模型迁移效果差。

❓解决问题

如何在保护隐私的前提下，利用多中心儿科数据训练鲁棒的器官分割模型。

🔎现象分析

本地模型在各自中心表现良好，但跨中心性能显著下降（9 个器官中 4-7 个 DSC 降低）；联邦学习模型匹配本地性能并取得最佳跨中心结果，DSC 提升 0.003-0.007，且减少假阳性分割。

🛠️主要方法

基于 nnU-Net 框架，在两个欧洲医学中心之间实施联邦学习，通过云存储安全交换权重，无需共享数据。

📊实验结果

使用来自两个中心的 310 张术后 CT（272 名患者），评估 Dice 相似系数、95% Hausdorff 距离和平均表面距离。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次在儿科上腹部放疗中评估联邦学习用于多中心器官分割的可行性。
  • 证明联邦学习能提升跨中心鲁棒性，减少假阳性分割，且性能稳定。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅涉及两个中心，泛化性需更多中心验证。
  • 未提及联邦学习通信开销和收敛速度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Deep learning-based organs/structures-at-risk(OARs) auto-contouring models can improve radiotherapy workflows, but models trained on adult data often underperform in pediatric patients. Developing robust pediatric-specific models is hindered by data scarcity and fragmentation across centers. Federated learning (FL) enables privacy-preserving collaborative training without the need for data sharing. We evaluated the feasibility and performance of FL for developing pediatric-specific OAR segmentation models across two European medical centers. Computed tomography (CT) images from pediatric patients from Utrecht and Heidelberg with a renal tumor or abdominal neuroblastoma were retrospectively collected and locally processed. An nnU-Net-based framework segmented 19 OARs using local and FL schemes. FL was implemented with secure weight exchange on a cloud storage across institutional firewalls. Performance was assessed using the Dice similarity coefficient (DSC), 95th percentile Hausdorff distance, and mean surface distance. Robustness to patient orientation, false-positive segmentation of surgically removed kidneys, and failure cases were identified. A total of 310 postoperative CTs from 272 patients (105 renal tumors, 167 neuroblastomas) were included. Local models performed well on their respective center data but showed significantly reduced cross-center performance for four to seven of the nine evaluated OARs (DSC). In contrast, the FL model matched local performance for at least seven of nine OARs and achieved the best cross-center results across three metrics, with DSC gains of 0.003-0.007 over local models. FL also maintained stable performance across patient orientations and reduced false-positive kidney segmentations. Real-world FL improves cross-center robustness of CT-based OAR segmentation models in pediatric upper abdominal tumors.

3D 视觉与场景 14 篇

SatSurfGS: Generalizable 2D Gaussian Splatting for Sparse-View Satellite Surface Reconstruction

High 2605.07181
Min Chen, Wei Guo, Bin Wang, Wen Li, Tong Fang, Jinbo Zhang, Junqi Zhao, Hong Kuang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出基于 2D 高斯泼溅的卫星表面重建方法，通过粗到细的属性预测和局部几何可靠性建模，实现稀疏视图下的高效重建。
🎯研究动机

稀疏视图卫星图像表面重建极具挑战性，因为卫星成像条件下多视图匹配的可靠性存在强烈的空间异质性，受大光度差异、弱纹理和重复纹理影响，多视图几何约束稀疏、分布不均且局部不可靠。现有 2DGS 缺乏可泛化的前馈框架。

❓解决问题

解决稀疏视图卫星图像表面重建中多视图匹配可靠性空间异质导致的重建困难，以及缺乏可泛化 2DGS 前馈框架的问题。

🔎现象分析

多视图匹配可靠性在卫星图像中高度空间异质，导致几何约束稀疏、不均匀且局部不可靠。

🛠️主要方法

构建粗到细的高斯属性预测框架，并在特征学习、高斯参数估计和训练优化三个层面显式建模局部几何可靠性。具体包括：置信感知单目多视图特征融合模块、跨阶段自一致性残差引导模块和置信双向路由损失。

📊实验结果

在卫星数据集上进行了实验，与代表性可泛化基线和竞争性逐场景优化方法比较，展示了改进的渲染质量、表面重建精度、跨数据集泛化能力和推理效率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SatSurfGS，首个基于 2DGS 的可泛化稀疏视图卫星表面重建方法。
  • 设计粗到细的高斯属性预测框架，并在三个层面显式建模局部几何可靠性。
  • 在卫星数据集上实现了优于代表性可泛化基线和竞争性逐场景优化方法的渲染质量、表面重建精度、跨数据集泛化能力和推理效率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对极端稀疏视图或严重遮挡场景效果有限。
  • 依赖卫星图像的多视图几何一致性假设，在非理想条件下可能退化。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Sparse-view satellite image surface reconstruction remains highly challenging, fundamentally because the reliability of multi-view matching under satellite imaging conditions is strongly spatially heterogeneous. Affected by large photometric differences, weak textures, and repetitive textures, multi-view geometric constraints are often sparse, unevenly distributed, and locally unreliable. Although 2D Gaussian Splatting (2DGS) is more suitable than 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) for the explicit representation of continuous surfaces, research on generalizable feed-forward 2DGS frameworks for sparse-view satellite surface reconstruction is still lacking. To address this issue, we propose SatSurfGS, a generalizable sparse-view surface reconstruction method for satellite imagery based on 2DGS. The proposed method builds a coarse-to-fine Gaussian attribute prediction framework and explicitly models local geometric reliability at three levels: feature learning, Gaussian parameter estimation, and training optimization. Specifically, we propose a confidence-aware monocular multi-view feature fusion module to adaptively integrate monocular priors and multi-view matching features according to local confidence; a cross-stage self-consistency residual guidance module to stabilize stage-wise Gaussian parameter refinement using the residual between the rendered height map from the previous stage and the current-stage MVS height map, together with confidence information; and a confidence bidirectional routing loss to achieve differentiated allocation of geometric and appearance supervision. Experiments on satellite datasets show that the proposed method achieves improved rendering quality, surface reconstruction accuracy, cross-dataset generalization, and inference efficiency compared with representative generalizable baselines and competitive per-scene optimization methods.

AsyncEvGS: Asynchronous Event-Assisted Gaussian Splatting for Handheld Motion-Blurred Scenes

High 2605.07192
Jun Dai, Renbiao Jin, Bo Xu, Yutian Chen, Linning Xu, Mulin Yu, Tianfan Xue, Shi Guo
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出异步事件辅助的高斯泼溅方法，解决手持运动模糊场景的 3D 重建问题。
🎯研究动机

现有 3DGS 和 NeRF 在输入图像存在严重运动模糊时重建失败；事件相机虽能提供高时间分辨率运动线索，但现有方法依赖低分辨率传感器和严格同步，限制了在智能手机等常见设备上的实用性。

❓解决问题

如何利用异步、高分辨率 RGB- 事件双相机系统实现手持运动模糊场景的鲁棒 3D 重建。

🔎现象分析

传统事件损失和去模糊损失在优化中存在病态行为，导致重建不稳定。

🛠️主要方法

提出异步高分辨率 RGB- 事件双相机系统及重建框架：先从事件数据重建清晰图像，再基于 VGGT 的跨域位姿估计模块获得鲁棒初始化，优化中采用结构驱动的事件损失和视图一致性正则化。

📊实验结果

在自建数据集和现有基准上达到最先进性能，显著提升严重运动模糊下的重建鲁棒性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出灵活的高分辨率异步 RGB- 事件双相机系统及相应重建框架
  • 贡献 AsyncEv-Deblur 数据集，包含异步系统捕获的高分辨率 RGB- 事件数据
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖事件相机硬件，可能增加设备成本
  • 异步系统校准精度可能影响重建质量
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

3D reconstruction methods such as 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) and Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) achieve impressive photorealism but fail when input images suffer from severe motion blur. While event cameras provide high-temporal-resolution motion cues, existing event-assisted approaches rely on low-resolution sensors and strict synchronization, limiting their practicality for handheld 3D capture on common devices, such as smartphones. We introduce a flexible, high-resolution asynchronous RGB-Event dual-camera system and a corresponding reconstruction framework. Our approach first reconstructs sharp images from the event data and then employs a cross-domain pose estimation module based on the Visual Geometry Transformer (VGGT) to obtain robust initialization for 3DGS. During optimization, we employ a structure-driven event loss and view-specific consistency regularizers to mitigate the ill-posed behavior of traditional event losses and deblurring losses, ensuring both stable and high-fidelity reconstruction. We further contribute AsyncEv-Deblur, a new high-resolution RGB-Event dataset captured with our asynchronous system. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on both our challenging dataset and existing benchmarks, substantially improving reconstruction robustness under severe motion blur. Project page: this https URL

GEM: Generating LiDAR World Model via Deformable Mamba

High 2605.07326
Yang Wu, Zhaojiang Liu, Qiang Meng, Youquan Liu, Renliang Weng, Jianjun Qian, Jian Yang, Jin Xie
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出基于可变形 Mamba 的 LiDAR 世界模型 GEM，通过动态 - 静态分离和三路径扫描提升点云序列生成质量。
🎯研究动机

LiDAR 世界模型在自动驾驶中具有重要价值，但现有方法因点云无序性和动态物体与静态结构难以区分而进展缓慢。

❓解决问题

如何生成高保真、具有想象力的 LiDAR 点云序列，并有效建模环境动态演化。

🔎现象分析

LiDAR 点云的无序性以及动态与静态物体区分困难是主要瓶颈。

🛠️主要方法

提出 GEM 模型：先通过 LiDAR 场景分词器将扫描序列压缩为紧凑表示，再经动态 - 静态分离器无监督解耦特征，最后用三路径可变形 Mamba 进行选择性扫描和自适应门控融合，可选集成规划器和 BEV 布局控制器。

📊实验结果

在多个基准和评估设置上达到最先进性能，具体结果摘要未详细说明。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个基于可变形 Mamba 的 LiDAR 世界模型，解决点云无序性和动态 - 静态区分难题。
  • 设计 LiDAR 场景分词器和动态 - 静态分离器，实现高效特征解耦。
  • 引入三路径可变形 Mamba 架构，增强时空理解。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定 LiDAR 扫描模式，泛化性需验证。
  • 可变形 Mamba 的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

World models, which simulate environmental dynamics and generate sensor observations, are gaining increasing attention in autonomous driving. However, progress in LiDAR-based world models has lagged behind those built on camera videos or occupancy data, primarily due to two core challenges: the inherent disorder of LiDAR point clouds and the difficulty of distinguishing dynamic objects from static structures. To address these issues, we propose GEM: a Generative LiDAR world model that leverages deformable mamba architecture, significantly improving fidelity and imaginative capability. Specifically, leveraging the structural similarity between sequential laser scanning and Mamba's processing mechanism, we first tokenize LiDAR sweeps into compact representations via a custom LiDAR scene tokenizer. After unsupervised disentanglement of tokenized features via a dynamic-static separator, a tri-path deformable Mamba is introduced to perform selective scanning and adaptive gating fusion over the disentangled features, leading to enhanced spatial-temporal understanding of the world evolution. Optionally, a planner and a BEV layout controller can be integrated to explore the model's capability for autonomous rollout and its potential to generate ``what-if" scenarios. Extensive experiments show that GEM achieves state-of-the-art performances across diverse benchmarks and evaluation settings, demonstrating its superiority and effectiveness. Project page: this https URL .

Velocity-Space 3D Asset Editing

High 2605.07385
Hao Liu, Yuxuan Lin, Jingfeng Guo, Ruihang Chu, Junjie Wang, Ruotong Li, Yujiu Yang
arXiv PDF cs.GR
TL;DR：提出 VS3D，在 ODE 采样器内部通过三个模块实现无掩码、无训练、无逆推的 3D 资产局部编辑。
🎯研究动机

现有 3D 局部编辑方法依赖外部机制（如 3D 掩码、体素合并、2D 多视角提升），无法从根本上解决 ODE 采样器内部的速度场冲突，导致身份泄露、编辑信号弱、全局条件拖拽等问题。

❓解决问题

如何在整流流生成器内部实现忠实于局部编辑的 3D 资产修改，同时避免对保留区域产生干扰。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出单一速度场无法同时满足编辑区域强信号和保留区域零信号，导致三个具体问题：身份泄露、缺乏专用编辑放大通道、几何和材质阶段的全局条件拖拽。

🛠️主要方法

VS3D 框架包含三个模块：RASI（通过源重建校准锚点吸收身份泄露）、PMG（通过对比高低质量子样本估计放大编辑信号）、TAR（在几何和材质阶段逐 token 决定保留内容）。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次在 ODE 采样器内部干预实现 3D 局部编辑，无需掩码、训练或逆推。
  • 提出三个互补模块分别解决身份泄露、编辑放大和全局拖拽问题。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定生成器架构（整流流），泛化性待验证。
  • 三个模块的协同调参可能增加使用复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Editing a 3D asset locally, modifying a target region while preserving the rest, is a fundamental requirement of native 3D editing. Existing methods enforce locality through mechanisms external to the generator, such as manual 3D masks, post-hoc voxel merging, or 2D multi-view lifting. None of them intervene where the corruption actually originates: inside the ODE sampler. For a rectified-flow generator to achieve faithful local editing, its velocity field should be strong over the target editing region while vanishing on preserved content. Yet a single velocity field can hardly satisfy both requirements simultaneously, leading to three problems: (i) identity leakage that keeps the edit signal non-zero on preserved regions; (ii) no dedicated edit-amplification channel, so strengthening the edit inevitably perturbs identity; and (iii) an identity drag at the geometry and material stages, where a global condition pulls every token toward the target. We propose VS3D (Velocity-Space 3D Asset editing}), an inversion-free, training-free, and mask-free framework that addresses each problem with a targeted intervention inside the sampler. VS3D integrates three complementary modules, each corresponding to a specific stage of the editing pipeline. Reconstruction-Anchored Source Injection (RASI) absorbs identity leakage by turning the unconditional embedding into a per-step, asset-specific anchor calibrated through source reconstruction. Partial-Mean Guidance (PMG) amplifies the edit signal by contrasting high- and low-quality subsample estimates of the velocity difference, active only where a consistent edit exists. Twin-Agreement Residual injection (TAR) lets the sampler decide token by token what to preserve at the geometry and material stages.

Mind the Gap: Geometrically Accurate Generative Reconstruction from Disjoint Views

High 2605.07550
Grzegorz Wilczynski, Mikołaj Zielinski, Bartosz Świrta, Dominik Belter, Przemysław Spurek
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出无重叠视角下的生成式三维重建新范式，通过生成中间视角连接不连续输入，实现几何精确重建。
🎯研究动机

现有 3D 视觉方法依赖视觉重叠进行几何对齐或多视图一致性，但在分布式机器人或众包数据采集等真实场景中，获取重叠视角往往不可行，限制了应用范围。

❓解决问题

解决从无重叠（零重叠）的多个视角图像进行几何精确的三维重建问题。

🔎现象分析

现有最先进方法在无重叠视角任务上完全失败，产生不连续的几何结构或语义不一致的重建。

🛠️主要方法

提出 GLADOS 框架，包含三个阶段：1) 生成式桥接：利用基础模型合成中间视角连接不连续输入；2) 鲁棒粗 3D 重建：通过全局对齐建立粗几何骨架，吸收生成过程中的局部矛盾；3) 迭代上下文扩展与一致性优化：填充缺失区域并统一重建。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及基准测试显示现有方法失败，GLADOS 有效。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出无重叠视角生成式重建的新范式，并建立综合数据集和专用评估指标。
  • 提出 GLADOS 框架，模块化且与架构无关，可集成未来生成、重建和修复的进展。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖基础模型的生成质量，可能引入伪影。
  • 迭代优化阶段计算成本可能较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

3D vision systems are fundamentally constrained by their reliance on visual overlap: reconstruction methods require it for geometric alignment, while generative models use it to enforce multi-view consistency. This limitation is particularly acute in real-world scenarios such as distributed swarm robotics or crowd-sourced data collection, where capturing overlapping perspectives, both in terms of spatial and appearance overlap, is often impossible. We introduce Generative Reconstruction from Disjoint Views as a new paradigm, establish a comprehensive dataset, and propose specialized evaluation metrics for zero-overlap scenarios. Our benchmarking demonstrates that existing state-of-the-art methods fail catastrophically on this task, producing disconnected geometries or semantically incoherent reconstructions. To address these limitations, we propose GLADOS, a general, modular framework that operates through three stages: (1) Generative Bridging, where foundation models synthesize intermediate perspectives to connect disjoint inputs; (2) Robust Coarse 3D Reconstruction, that establish coarse geometric scaffold via global alignment which absorbs local contradictions from generative process; and (3) Iterative Context Expansion and Consistency Optimization to fill missing regions and unify the reconstruction. As an architectureagnostic framework, GLADOS enables seamless integration of future advances in generation, reconstruction, and inpainting. The source code is available at: this https URL .

SAM 3D Animal: Promptable Animal 3D Reconstruction from Images in the Wild

High 2605.07604
Xuyi Hu, Jin Lyu, Jiuming Liu, Yebin Liu, Silvia Zuffi, Liang An, Stefan Goetz
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：首个支持提示的多动物 3D 重建框架，结合 SMAL+ 模型和新数据集 Herd3D，在多个基准上达到 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

野外动物 3D 重建因物种多样、遮挡频繁和多动物场景普遍而极具挑战，现有方法主要针对单动物场景，缺乏灵活的多实例重建方案。

❓解决问题

从单张野外图像中实现多动物 3D 重建，并支持关键点和掩码等灵活提示以处理遮挡和拥挤场景。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于 SMAL+ 参数化动物模型，构建提示式框架，联合重建多个实例；同时引入包含 5000+ 图像的多动物 3D 数据集 Herd3D 以增加物种、交互和遮挡模式的多样性。

📊实验结果

在 Animal3D、APTv2 和 Animal Kingdom 数据集上，该方法在基于模型和无模型方法中均达到 SOTA。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个提示式多动物 3D 重建框架 SAM 3D Animal，支持关键点和掩码提示。
  • 构建多动物 3D 数据集 Herd3D，包含 5000+ 图像，提升物种和遮挡多样性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 SMAL+ 参数模型，可能无法覆盖所有动物形态。
  • 数据集规模有限，泛化到极端物种或场景可能受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

3D animal reconstruction in the wild remains challenging due to large species variation, frequent occlusions, and the prevalence of multi-animal scenes, while existing methods predominantly focus on single-animal settings. We present SAM 3D Animal, the first promptable framework for multi-animal 3D reconstruction from a single image. Built on the SMAL+ parametric animal model, our method jointly reconstructs multiple instances and supports flexible prompts in the form of keypoints and masks which enable more reliable disambiguation in crowded and occluded scenes. To train such a model, we further introduce Herd3D, a multi-animal 3D dataset containing over 5K images, designed to increase diversity in species, interactions, and occlusion patterns. Experiments on the Animal3D, APTv2, and Animal Kingdom datasets show that our framework achieves state-of-the-art results over both existing model-based and model-free methods, demonstrating a scalable and effective solution for prompt-driven animal 3D reconstruction in the wild.

One World, Dual Timeline: Decoupled Spatio-Temporal Gaussian Scene Graph for 4D Cooperative Driving Reconstruction

High 2605.07910
Yulong Chen, Xiaoyun Dong, Haoyu Zhang, Zongxian Yang, Lewei Xie, Xinke Li, Yifan Zhang, Kai Wang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出解耦时空高斯场景图，解决车路协同自动驾驶中相机异步导致的动态物体重影问题。
🎯研究动机

车路协同自动驾驶数据中，车辆和路侧相机独立时钟导致同一动态物体被不同时间捕获，现有高斯场景图假设同步观测，在协同场景下产生梯度冲突和重影。

❓解决问题

解决 VICAD 数据中因时间异步导致的动态场景重建重影问题。

🔎现象分析

证明单时间线公式会产生与物体速度和跨源时间偏移二次方相关的不可约光度损失，且梯度冲突导致动态物体严重重影。

🛠️主要方法

提出 DUST 高斯场景图，每个动态物体共享规范高斯集保证外观一致性，但为每个源维护解耦的位姿轨迹对齐真实时间戳，使位姿梯度核块对角化消除跨源干扰；并引入静态锚点位姿校正和位姿正则化联合优化。

📊实验结果

在 V2X-Seq 的 26 个序列上评估，动态区域 PSNR 比最强基线高 3.2 dB，Fréchet Video Distance 降低 37.7%，且在更大时间异步下保持鲁棒性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 理论证明单时间线公式在协同设置下存在不可约光度损失，并提出解耦双时间线方案消除跨源干扰。
  • 提出 DUST 高斯场景图，实现 4D 协同驾驶重建，在 V2X-Seq 上动态区域 PSNR 提升 3.2 dB，FVD 降低 37.7%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖静态锚点进行位姿校正，可能对完全动态场景适应性有限。
  • 仅验证了 V2X-Seq 数据集，泛化性需更多场景测试。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reconstructing dynamic scenes from Vehicle-to-Infrastructure Cooperative Autonomous Driving (VICAD) data is fundamentally complicated by temporal asynchrony: vehicle and infrastructure cameras operate on independent clocks, capturing the same dynamic agent such as cars and pedestrians at different physical times. Existing Gaussian Scene Graph methods implicitly assume synchronized observations and assign a single pose per agent per frame, which is an assumption that breaks in cooperative settings, where the resulting gradient conflicts cause severe ghosting on dynamic agents. We identify this as a representation-level failure, not an optimization artifact: we prove that any single-timeline formulation incurs an irreducible photometric loss scaling quadratically with agent velocity and cross-source time offset. To resolve this, we propose Dust (DecoUpled Spatio-Temporal) Gaussian Scene Graph for 4D Cooperative Driving Reconstruction. DUST Gaussian Scene Graph shares a canonical Gaussian set per agent for appearance consistency, while maintaining decouple pose trajectories aligned to each source's true capture timestamps. We prove that this decoupling enables the pose-gradient kernel block-diagonal, eliminating cross-source interference entirely. To make Dust practical, we further introduce a static anchor-based pose correction pipeline that corrects spatio misalignment between vehicle and infrastructure annotations, and a pose-regularized joint optimization scheme that prevents trajectory jitter and drift during early training. On 26 sequences from V2X-Seq, DUST achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving dynamic-area PSNR by 3.2 dB over the strongest baseline and reducing Fréchet Video Distance by 37.7%, with keeping robustness under larger temporal asynchrony. Code is available at this https URL .

Seeing Across Skies and Streets: Feedforward 3D Reconstruction from Satellite, Drone, and Ground Images

High 2605.07978
Qiwei Wang, Zhongyao Tuo, Xianghui Ze, Yujiao Shi
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 Cross3R，利用无人机图像作为中间视角，实现从卫星、无人机和地面图像的前馈 3D 重建与 6 自由度位姿估计。
🎯研究动机

跨视角定位通常只能估计 3 自由度位姿，因为卫星图像缺乏滚转、俯仰和高度信息，而真实地形中的斜坡、坡道和倾斜相机支架会破坏平面运动假设。

❓解决问题

如何从卫星、无人机和地面图像中恢复 6 自由度相机位姿和 3D 点云，克服卫星图像缺乏 3D 结构线索的局限。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Cross3R，一种前馈模型，输入卫星图像与无人机图像、地面图像或两者，单次前向传播恢复跨视角 3D 点云、所有输入相机的 6 自由度位姿以及每个透视相机的平面位置和偏航角。

📊实验结果

在 CrossGeo 上，Cross3R 在点云重建、6 自由度相机位姿估计和跨视角定位方面一致优于前馈 3D 基线；在 KITTI 上，尽管未使用 KITTI 训练，仍在大多数指标上优于专门针对 KITTI 训练的跨视角方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Cross3R，首个利用无人机图像作为中间视角实现前馈跨视角 3D 重建和 6 自由度位姿估计的方法。
  • 构建 CrossGeo，一个包含 278K 图像的三视角数据集，覆盖除南极洲外的所有大洲 85 个场景。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖无人机图像作为中间视角，可能限制在无无人机数据场景下的应用。
  • 摘要未提及对极端天气或光照条件的鲁棒性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Cross-view localization classically asks: where does this ground image lie on the satellite tile? Existing methods are typically limited to 3-DoF estimates -- an $(x,y)$ position and a yaw angle -- because nadir satellite imagery provides no direct cues for roll, pitch, or altitude, forcing a reliance on planar-motion and zero-tilt assumptions. These assumptions break on real terrain with slopes, ramps, and tilted camera mounts. To overcome this, we introduce a single UAV image as an intermediate viewpoint: it reveals the 3D structure invisible from nadir, supplies the cues for roll, pitch, and altitude that the satellite alone cannot provide, and needs only spatial overlap with the ground camera -- no known relative pose is required. Building on this insight, we propose **Cross3R**, a flexible feed-forward model that ingests a satellite tile together with a UAV image, a ground image, or both, and, in a single forward pass, recovers a cross-view 3D point cloud, the 6-DoF poses of every input camera, and the on-tile $(x,y)$ position and yaw of each perspective camera. For training and evaluation, we also construct **CrossGeo**, a 278K-image tri-view dataset spanning 85 scenes across every continent except Antarctica. On CrossGeo, Cross3R consistently outperforms feed-forward 3D baselines in point-cloud reconstruction, 6-DoF camera-pose estimation, and cross-view localization. On KITTI, it outperforms dedicated cross-view methods trained on KITTI on most metrics, despite having no KITTI training itself.

AdpSplit: Error-Driven Adaptive Splitting for Faster Geometry Discovery in 3D Gaussian Splatting

High 2605.06876
Yongjae Lee, Jingxing Li, Abhay Kumar Yadav, Rama Chellappa, Deliang Fan
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：AdpSplit 通过误差驱动的自适应分裂算子加速 3DGS 训练，减少迭代次数并保持渲染质量。
🎯研究动机

3DGS 中固定数量的随机分裂算子需要多次稠密化才能发现精细结构，成为高效训练瓶颈。

❓解决问题

如何设计自适应分裂算子以减少稠密化迭代次数，加速 3DGS 训练而不牺牲渲染质量。

🔎现象分析

标准 3DGS 的二元分裂算子需要多次稠密化才能暴露细节，导致训练效率低下。

🛠️主要方法

提出 AdpSplit，基于 L1 像素误差区域统计自适应决定分裂子节点数量并初始化参数。

📊实验结果

在 MipNeRF360、Deep-Blending 和 Tanks&Temples 数据集上，AdpSplit 将多种加速 3DGS 流水线的训练时间减少 9.2%-22.3%；与 FastGS 结合，在 MipNeRF360 上达到全调度 PSNR，训练时间减少 16.4%，相对原始 3DGS 加速 12.6 倍。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出误差驱动的自适应分裂算子 AdpSplit，减少稠密化迭代次数。
  • 在多个数据集上验证 AdpSplit 作为即插即用替换，可加速多种 3DGS 流水线 9.2%-22.3%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 L1 误差统计的准确性，在噪声数据中效果未知。
  • 仅针对 3DGS 的分裂操作，未涉及其他密度控制步骤。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Adaptive density control in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) repeatedly grows the Gaussian population through fixed-cardinality random splitting to discover useful scene structure. However, in vanilla 3DGS, its binary split operator requires many densification rounds to expose fine details, making it a bottleneck for efficient training schedules with fewer iterations. We introduce AdpSplit, an error-driven adaptive split operator that determines the number of split children and initializes the child parameters from L1-pixel-error region statistics, enabling fewer densification iterations, thus reduced training time, while preserving the rendering quality of full-schedule training. Across the MipNeRF360, Deep-Blending, and Tanks&Temples datasets, AdpSplit reduces the training time of multiple accelerated 3DGS pipelines by 9.2%-22.3% as a simple drop-in replacement for the standard split operator. With FastGS, AdpSplit matches the full-schedule PSNR on MipNeRF360 while reducing training time by 16.4%, corresponding to a 12.6x acceleration over vanilla 3DGS.

TriP: A Triangle Puzzle Approach to Robust Translation Averaging

Medium 2605.07143
Zhekai Fan, Wanze Li, Jinxin Wang, Yunpeng Shi
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出基于三角形的鲁棒平移平均框架 TriP，通过局部尺度推断与对数域同步实现精确相机定位。
🎯研究动机

平移平均是全局 SfM 的核心，但方向测量缺乏距离信息导致问题病态且对异常值敏感，现有方法难以同时处理结构化噪声和避免退化解。

❓解决问题

从成对相对平移方向中鲁棒且高效地恢复相机位置，尤其对抗对抗性、循环一致等结构化污染。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

TriP 框架：先利用三角形几何推断局部相对边尺度，再在对数域同步重叠三角形尺度以恢复全局一致边长和相机位置，通过高阶一致性增强鲁棒性，且对数同步天然避免零尺度退化。

📊实验结果

在合成和真实数据集上进行了实验，结果大幅优于所有先前平移平均方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于三角形的鲁棒平移平均方法，利用高阶一致性抵抗结构化污染。
  • 证明方法在理论上能精确恢复位置，且无需额外抗退化约束。
  • 方法完全可并行、计算高效，可扩展到百万级相机图，并在合成和真实数据集上大幅超越先前方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖三角形质量，在极端退化几何下性能未知。
  • 未讨论与全局 SfM 其他组件的联合优化。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Translation averaging aims to recover camera locations from pairwise relative translation directions and is a fundamental component of global Structure-from-Motion pipelines. The problem is challenging because direction measurements contain no distance information, making the estimation problem highly ill-conditioned and highly sensitive to corrupted observations. In this paper, we propose TriP, a triangle-based framework for robust translation averaging. TriP first infers local relative edge scales from triangle geometry, and then synchronizes the scales of overlapping triangles in the logarithmic domain to recover globally consistent edge lengths and camera locations. By leveraging higher-order consistency across triangles, the proposed method is robust to adversarial, cycle-consistent, and other structured corruptions. In addition, TriP avoids the collapse issue without requiring any extra anti-collapse constraints, since log-scale synchronization excludes the degenerate zero-scale solution by construction. These structural advantages enable a particularly strong theory for exact location recovery. On the practical side, TriP is fully parallelizable, computationally efficient, and naturally scalable to graphs with millions of cameras. Moreover, it outperforms all previous translation averaging methods by a large margin on both synthetic and real datasets.

From Pixels to Primitives: Scene Change Detection in 3D Gaussian Splatting

Medium 2605.07203
Chamuditha Jayanga Galappaththige, Jason Lai, Timothy Patten, Donald Dansereau, Niko Suenderhauf, Dimity Miller
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出直接在 3D 高斯原语空间进行场景变化检测的方法，无需渲染到 2D，实现多视图一致性和变化类型区分。
🎯研究动机

现有基于高斯泼溅的场景变化检测方法遵循渲染 - 比较范式，将问题视为像素级任务，但渲染过程引入信息损失且难以保持多视图一致性。

❓解决问题

如何直接在 3D 高斯原语空间中进行场景变化检测，克服原语表示因独立优化导致的非唯一性问题。

🔎现象分析

高斯泼溅表示的原语（位置、各向异性协方差、颜色）本身包含足够的变化信号，但独立优化导致原语数量、位置、形状和颜色在未变化区域也存在差异。

🛠️主要方法

提出 GS-DIFF 方法，通过各向异性几何和光度漂移模型以及每个原语的可观测性项，直接比较原语属性进行变化检测。

📊实验结果

在真实世界基准上，GS-DIFF 的平均交并比（mIoU）比先前最先进方法提高约 17%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次证明仅凭高斯原语属性即可进行场景变化检测，无需渲染到 2D。
  • 提出 GS-DIFF 方法，实现多视图一致的变化图，并区分几何变化（如物体添加）和外观变化（如颜色改变）。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的高斯泼溅重建。
  • 未讨论大规模场景或动态场景的适用性。
