查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Scene change detection methods built on Gaussian splatting universally follow a render-then-compare paradigm: the pre-change scene is rendered into 2D and compared against post-change images via pixel or feature residuals. This change detection problem with Gaussian Splatting has been treated as a question about pixels; we treat it as a question about primitives. We provide direct evidence that native primitive attributes alone -- position, anisotropic covariance, and color -- carry sufficient signal for scene change detection. What makes primitive-space comparison hard is the under-constrained nature of Gaussian splatting representation: independent optimizations yield primitive solutions whose count, positions, shapes, and colors differ even where nothing has changed. We address this challenge with anisotropic models of geometric and photometric drift, complemented by a per-primitive observability term that reflects the extent to which each Gaussian is constrained by the camera geometry. Operating directly on primitives gives our method, GD-DIFF, two properties that distinguish it from render-then-compare methods. First, change maps are multi-view consistent by construction, where prior work had to learn this through an additional optimization objective. Second, geometric and appearance changes are scored separately, identifying not just where but what kind of change occurred, distinguishing structural changes (e.g., an added object) from surface-level ones (e.g., a color change) without supervision or external model dependencies. On real-world benchmarks, GS-DIFF surpasses the prior state-of-the-art approach by approximatelt 17% in mean Intersection over Union.

High-Fidelity Surface Splatting-Based 3D Reconstruction from Multi-View Images

Medium 2605.07254
Nandhana Sunil, Abhirami R Iyer, Avirup Mandal
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一种基于多项式核的隐式移动最小二乘法，用于从多视图图像进行高保真表面重建和渲染。
🎯研究动机

多视图网格重建是计算机图形学和视觉的核心挑战，现有方法如 3DGS 和 NeRF 依赖后处理提取网格，限制了几何与外观的联合优化；而 IMLS 方法使用指数核难以恢复高频细节。

❓解决问题

如何从稀疏多视图观测中联合优化几何与外观，并恢复高频几何细节。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出现有 IMLS 方法使用指数核，难以处理高频细节。

🛠️主要方法

引入紧凑的局部支持多项式核替代指数核，并结合拉普拉斯滤波的随机正则化，以更好地控制频率内容并提高几何保真度。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种紧凑多项式核的 IMLS 公式，具有局部支持和更高灵活性，改善高频细节恢复。
  • 引入随机正则化与拉普拉斯滤波，增强高频结构保持并维持稳定优化。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对噪声或异常值敏感，需要进一步验证鲁棒性。
  • 计算复杂度可能高于传统方法。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multi-view mesh reconstruction remains a core challenge in computer graphics and vision, especially for recovering high-frequency geometry from sparse observations. Recent methods such as 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) and Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) rely on post-processing for mesh extraction, thereby limiting joint optimization of geometry and appearance. Implicit Moving Least Squares (IMLS) instead enables direct conversion of point clouds into signed distance and texture fields, supporting end-to-end reconstruction and rendering. However, existing IMLS formulations use exponential kernels that struggle with high-frequency detail. We introduce a compact polynomial kernel with local support and greater flexibility, allowing better control over frequency content and improved geometric fidelity. To further enhance fine details, we incorporate stochastic regularization with Laplacian filtering. Together, these improve the preservation of high-frequency structure while maintaining stable optimization. Experiments show state-of-the-art performance in both surface reconstruction and rendering, yielding more accurate geometry and sharper visuals from multi-view data.

Beyond Defenses: Manifold-Aligned Regularization for Intrinsic 3D Point Cloud Robustness

Medium 2605.07590
Pedro Alonso, Chongshou Li, Tianrui Li
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：通过流形对齐正则化提升 3D 点云网络的内在鲁棒性，无需对抗训练。
🎯研究动机

现有 3D 点云鲁棒性方法主要依赖数据增强或防御机制，忽略了对抗脆弱性的几何根源，即模型学习的潜在几何与底层表面的内在几何之间的流形错位。

❓解决问题

解决 3D 点云网络对几何保持扰动的对抗脆弱性问题，即输入流形上的微小扰动在特征空间引起不成比例的扭曲。

🔎现象分析

观察到 3D 网络的对抗脆弱性源于潜在几何与内在几何的流形错位：沿输入流形的几何保持扰动导致特征空间中的大扭曲。

🛠️主要方法

提出流形对齐点识别（MAPR）框架，通过内在扰动正则化潜在几何：为每个点云提取内在特征（局部曲率和扩散结构），并应用一致性损失保持对几何保持扰动的不变性。

📊实验结果

在 ModelNet40 和 ScanObjectNN 数据集上，针对多种对抗攻击，MAPR 分别实现了平均 +20.02% 和 +8.58% 的鲁棒性提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化了 3D 鲁棒性的几何解释，将经典对抗理论与点云内在结构联系起来。
  • 提出 MAPR 框架，无需对抗训练或额外数据即可持续提升鲁棒性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对非几何保持的对抗攻击效果有限。
  • 内在特征提取的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Despite extensive progress in point cloud robustness, existing methods primarily improve performance through augmentation or defense mechanisms, while overlooking the geometric root cause of adversarial fragility. We hypothesize that adversarial vulnerability in 3D networks arises from a manifold misalignment between the latent geometry learned by the model and the intrinsic geometry of the underlying surface. Small, geometry-preserving perturbations along the input manifold often induce disproportionate distortions in feature space, revealing a misalignment between latent and intrinsic geometries. We formalize this phenomenon by developing a geometric interpretation of 3D robustness that links classical adversarial theory to the intrinsic structure of point clouds. Motivated by this analysis, we introduce Manifold-Aligned Point Recognition (MAPR), a framework that regularizes the latent geometry by aligning predictions across intrinsic perturbations. MAPR augments each point cloud with intrinsic features capturing local curvature and diffusion structure, and applies a consistency loss that preserves invariance to intrinsic, geometry-preserving perturbations. Without relying on adversarial training or additional data, MAPR consistently improves robustness across multiple adversarial attacks on both the ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN datasets, achieving average robustness gains of +20.02% and +8.58% on ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN, respectively.

TriDE: Triangle-Consistent Translation Directions for Global Camera Pose Estimation

Medium 2605.06889
Francisco Chen, Yiran Wang, Yunpeng Shi
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出三角一致性约束优化全局相机位姿估计中的平移方向。
🎯研究动机

全局运动恢复结构中，成对平移方向是相机位置估计的关键输入，但现有方法独立处理每对图像，导致局部合理但全局不一致。

❓解决问题

如何高效地联合估计全局一致的成对平移方向，避免昂贵的全局非线性优化。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 TriDE，利用相机三角形一致性作为高阶验证信号，通过消息传递在方向及其关联加权三角形之间传播信息，优化不可靠的成对方向。

📊实验结果

在真实图像图上，TriDE 大幅提升方向精度，并得到更好的下游相机位置。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于三角形一致性的高效高阶验证方法 TriDE，用于全局相机位姿估计中的平移方向联合优化。
  • 建立了在随机损坏模型下精确恢复的强相变界。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖三角形结构的质量，在退化场景中效果受限。
  • 未讨论与更复杂全局优化方法的结合。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Pairwise translation directions are a key input to camera location estimation in global structure-from-motion. Existing estimators usually process each image pair independently, producing directions that may be locally plausible but inconsistent with the other relative directions in the viewing graph. To jointly estimate the direction, we propose TriDE, which exploits camera-triangle consistency as an efficient higher-order verification signal. Instead of solving a costly global nonlinear optimization problem that is sensitive to initialization, TriDE refines unreliable pairwise directions through message passing between directions and their incident weighted triangles. This information propagation strategy enables us to establish a strong phase-transition bound for exact recovery under a realistic random corruption model. Experiments on real image graphs show that TriDE improves direction accuracy by a large margin and yields better downstream camera locations, providing a practical link between local pairwise estimation and global camera pose geometry.

自然语言处理 13 篇

MedExAgent: Training LLM Agents to Ask, Examine, and Diagnose in Noisy Clinical Environments

High 2605.07058
Yicheng Gao, Xiaolin Zhou, Yahan Li, Yue Zhao, Ruishan Liu
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出 MedExAgent，将临床诊断建模为 POMDP，通过两阶段训练（SFT+DAPO）在噪声环境中实现高效诊断。
🎯研究动机

现有医疗 LLM 基准和自动诊断方法将临床诊断简化为单轮问答或无噪声对话，忽略了真实诊断中交互性、不确定性和噪声信息的特点，缺乏模拟真实临床环境的框架。

❓解决问题

如何在部分可观测、含噪声的临床环境中训练 LLM Agent，使其能够通过询问患者、安排检查并最终做出诊断，同时兼顾诊断准确性和检查成本。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将临床诊断形式化为 POMDP，包含三种动作（询问、检查、诊断）；引入包含 7 种患者噪声和 3 种检查噪声的系统噪声模型；通过两阶段训练：先基于 Calgary-Cambridge 模型合成的对话进行监督微调，再使用 DAPO 优化复合奖励（诊断准确性、工具调用质量、检查成本）。

📊实验结果

通过大量实验和消融研究，MedExAgent 实现了与更大模型相当的诊断性能，同时保持成本高效的检查策略。摘要未提供具体数据集或指标。

⭐主要贡献
  • 将临床诊断建模为 POMDP，并引入系统噪声模型，更贴近真实临床环境。
  • 提出 MedExAgent，通过两阶段训练（SFT+DAPO）在噪声环境中实现高效诊断。
  • 实验表明 MedExAgent 在诊断性能上可与更大模型媲美，同时保持成本高效的检查策略。
⚠️方法局限
  • 合成对话可能无法完全覆盖真实临床场景的多样性。
  • 噪声模型可能未包含所有现实中的噪声类型。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Real-world clinical diagnosis is a complex process in which the doctor is required to obtain information from both interaction with the patient and conducting medical exams. Additionally, the doctor needs to adapt to different patient personas, as well as noisy and incomplete information that can happen at any time during the process. However, existing benchmarks for medical LLMs and methods for automatic diagnosis largely simplify this process by reducing it to single-turn question answering, noise-free conversations, or sequential exam making, etc., ignoring the interactive and uncertain nature of clinical diagnosis. In this paper, we aim to address this gap by formalizing clinical diagnosis as a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) with three action types: questioning the patient, ordering medical exams as tool calls, and issuing a diagnosis. We also introduce a systematic noise model comprising seven patient noise types and three exam noise types. Using our proposed environment, we train an effective diagnosis agent, \textbf{MedExAgent}, through a two-stage pipeline that first performs supervised finetuning on synthetic conversations structured after the Calgary-Cambridge model for clinical interviews, and then applies DAPO to optimize a composite reward capturing diagnostic accuracy, tool call quality, and exam cost including financial cost and patient discomfort. Through extensive experiments and ablation studies, we demonstrate that MedExAgent achieves diagnostic performance comparable to larger models while maintaining cost-efficient examination strategies.

MedAction: Towards Active Multi-turn Clinical Diagnostic LLMs

High 2605.07305
Hsin-Ling Hsu, Zizheng Wang, Donghua Zhang, Nai-Chia Chen, Jerry Wang, Jun-En Ding, Chia-Hsuan Hsu, Guoan Wang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出树状蒸馏管道生成多轮诊断轨迹数据集，微调 8B 模型在主动诊断任务上达到开源 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 诊断评估基于静态单轮设定，不符合真实临床中逐步检查、更新诊断的主动诊断过程，导致模型在动态、部分信息场景下表现不佳。

❓解决问题

解决 LLM 在主动多轮临床诊断中的三个失败模式：无根据的检查排序、不可靠的诊断更新、多轮连贯性退化。

🔎现象分析

摘要通过系统分析识别出三个反复出现的失败模式：无根据的检查排序、不可靠的诊断更新、多轮连贯性退化，并指出核心缺陷是现有医疗训练数据教会模型从完整信息推理，而非在演化、部分证据下行动。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MedAction，一种树状蒸馏管道，通过 LLM- 环境交互合成高质量多轮诊断轨迹，并设计两个知识图谱指标（DTC 和 RAC）过滤轨迹质量，构建数据集 MedAction-32K。

📊实验结果

在 MedR-Bench 和 MedAction-300-Hard 基准上评估，微调后的 8B 模型达到开源模型最佳性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统识别并分析了 LLM 在主动诊断中的三个失败模式。
  • 提出树状蒸馏管道和两个知识图谱指标（DTC 和 RAC）用于生成和过滤高质量多轮诊断轨迹。
  • 构建 MedAction-32K 数据集，包含 32,681 条轨迹，微调 8B 模型在 MedR-Bench 和 MedAction-300-Hard 上达到开源 SOTA。
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集仅来自 PMC 病例，可能覆盖不全。
  • 8B 模型规模较小，更大模型效果未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Most existing LLM diagnoses are evaluated on static, single-turn settings where complete patient information is provided upfront, an oversimplification of real clinical practice. We study active diagnosis: the real-life clinical process of starting from initial observation, ordering tests, interpreting results, and updating a differential diagnosis across multiple turns. Through systematic analysis, we identify three recurring failure modes in current LLMs: ungrounded test ordering, unreliable diagnostic update, and degraded multi-turn coherence. Together, these failures reveal a core deficit: existing medical training data teaches models to reason from complete information but not to act under evolving, partial evidence. To address this gap, we introduce MedAction, a tree-structured distillation pipeline that synthesizes diverse and high-quality multi-turn diagnostic trajectories via LLM-environment interaction. We propose two knowledge-graph-grounded metrics to filter trajectory quality: Disease Trajectory Consistency (DTC), which tracks whether the model's hypothesis converges toward the correct diagnosis, and Reasoning-Action Consistency (RAC), which verifies that belief updates are driven by gathered evidence. Using this pipeline, we construct MedAction-32K, a dataset of 32,681 trajectories from 2,896 PMC cases. Fine-tuning an 8B model on MedAction-32K achieves state-of-the-art performance among open-source models on both MedR-Bench and our curated MedAction-300-Hard benchmark, pushing the edge for open-source medical LLMs.

OmicsLM: A Multimodal Large Language Model for Multi-Sample Omics Reasoning

High 2605.06728
Maciej Sypetkowski, Joanna Krawczyk, Łukasz Smoliński, Remigiusz Kinas, Przemysław Pietrzak, Tomasz Jetka, Rafał Powalski
arXiv PDF q-bio.GN
TL;DR：OmicsLM 是一个多模态大语言模型，能够直接处理转录组数据并执行多样本生物学推理。
🎯研究动机

当前模型要么只处理表达谱而不生成自然语言解释，要么仅依赖语言推理而无法直接访问定量组学数据，缺乏连接定量组学与语言推理的统一模型。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个能够同时处理定量转录组数据和自然语言指令，并支持多样本推理的多模态大语言模型。

🔎现象分析

现有基准要么评估谱级预测，要么评估纯文本生物问答，缺乏语言引导的多样本真实表达谱推理评测。

🛠️主要方法

将每个转录组谱表示为 LLM 上下文中的紧凑连续表示，保留定量信号；在超过 550 万指令样本上训练，涵盖 70 多种任务类型，包括连续转录组输入、实验数据语言模板和自由文本生物知识。

📊实验结果

在谱级任务上与专用组学模型性能相当，在语言引导的生物推理上优于专用组学模型和通用 LLM。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 OmicsLM，一个连接定量组学与自然语言的多模态 LLM，支持多样本推理。
  • 构建 GEO-OmicsQA 基准，用于评估多样本生物问答。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于转录组数据，未扩展到其他组学类型。
  • 训练数据依赖公开数据库，可能覆盖不全。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Interpreting transcriptomic data is one of the most common analytical tasks in modern biology. Yet most current models either consume expression profiles without producing natural-language biological explanations, or reason in language without direct access to quantitative omics measurements. We introduce OmicsLM, a multimodal LLM that connects quantitative omics profiles with natural-language biological tasks. OmicsLM represents each transcriptomic profile as a compact continuous representation within the LLM context. This interface preserves quantitative expression signal while allowing natural-language instructions, explicit gene mentions, and multiple interleaved biological samples to be processed together in one model context. We train OmicsLM on more than 5.5 million instruction-following examples spanning over 70 task types, combining continuous transcriptomic inputs, experimental data rendered through diverse language templates, and free-text biological knowledge and question-answering data. This mixture covers cell type annotation, perturbation prediction, clinical prediction, pathway reasoning, and open-ended biological question answering. Existing benchmarks evaluate either profile-level prediction or text-only biological QA, leaving language-guided, multi-sample reasoning over real expression profiles unmeasured. To close this gap, we introduce GEO-OmicsQA, a benchmark for multi-sample biological question answering built from real Gene Expression Omnibus (GEO) studies. We demonstrate that OmicsLM can use expression profiles directly and perform comparably to specialized omics models on profile-level tasks, while outperforming both omics-specialized models and general LLMs on language-guided biological reasoning over expression data.

Visual Text Compression as Measure Transport

High 2605.06708
Lv Tang, Tianyi Zheng, Yang Liu, Bo Li, Xingyu Li
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：将视觉文本压缩建模为测度传输，提出无标签路由准则和注视机制，在 24 个 NLP 数据集上匹配 70.8% 的 oracle 选择并提升平均任务分数 3.3%。
🎯研究动机

视觉文本压缩虽能大幅减少解码 token 数，但压缩比无法预测下游任务性能，需要一种原则性的任务相关信息损失度量来指导视觉路径的选择。

❓解决问题

如何量化视觉文本压缩中的任务相关信息损失，并据此设计无标签的路由准则和分辨率优化机制。

🔎现象分析

视觉路径在某些任务上匹配或超越文本路径，在其他任务上性能崩溃，且压缩比本身无法预测这种差异。

🛠️主要方法

将文本和视觉 token 视为经验概率测度，ViT 补丁编码器诱导一个推前映射，其传输代价分解为补丁内聚合的精度代价和跨补丁碎片化的覆盖代价，两者均可通过无下游标签的探针估计。基于此提出无标签路由准则和传输信息引导的注视机制。

📊实验结果

在 Qwen3-4B 模型上对 24 个 NLP 数据集进行实验，无标签路由准则在 17/24（70.8%）数据集上匹配 per-dataset oracle，平均任务分数提升 +3.3%，平均 token 减少 -10.3%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将视觉文本压缩形式化为测度传输问题，并推导出可分解的传输代价。
  • 提出无下游标签的路由准则和注视机制，在 Qwen3-4B 上 24 个 NLP 数据集中 70.8% 匹配 oracle 选择，平均任务分数提升 3.3%，token 减少 10.3%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在一个模型（Qwen3-4B）上验证，泛化性未知。
  • 注视机制的具体实现细节和计算开销未在摘要中说明。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Visual text compression (VTC) promises efficient long-context processing by rendering text into an image and re-encoding it with a vision-language model, often producing $3$--$20\times$ fewer decoder tokens than subword tokenization. Yet token savings do not translate predictably into downstream utility: on some tasks the visual path matches or exceeds the text path, on others it collapses, and the compression ratio itself does not predict which regime will occur. The missing quantity is therefore not another summary of efficiency, but a principled measure of task-relevant information loss induced by visual encoding. We address this problem by formulating VTC in the language of measure transport. Treating text and visual tokens as empirical probability measures, we show that the ViT patch encoder induces a push-forward map whose transport cost decomposes into a precision cost from within-patch aggregation and a coverage cost from cross-patch fragmentation. Both terms are estimable from downstream-label-free probes. This formulation yields two operational consequences: a downstream-label-free routing criterion that selects whether to use the visual path for a given input or benchmark instance, and a transport-informed foveation mechanism that re-encodes high-cost regions at higher resolution. Across $24$ NLP datasets at Qwen3-4B, our label-free rule matches the per-dataset oracle on $17/24$ datasets ($70.8\%$), and improves the average task score by $+3.3\%$ with $-10.3\%$ average tokens relative to a pure-LLM.

PSK@EEUCA 2026: Fine-Tuning Large Language Models with Synthetic Data Augmentation for Multi-Class Toxicity Detection in Gaming Chat

Medium 2605.07201
Srikar Kashyap Pulipaka
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：使用 Llama 3.1 8B 结合 5% 合成数据增强，在多类毒性检测任务中取得第 4 名。
🎯研究动机

游戏社区中的毒性言论检测对于维护健康环境至关重要，但多类别毒性分类面临数据不平衡和标注噪声等挑战。

❓解决问题

对游戏聊天消息进行六类毒性分类（无毒、侮辱 / 谩骂、其他攻击、仇恨 / 骚扰、威胁、极端主义）。

🔎现象分析

发现“验证陷阱”现象：高验证性能与较差的测试迁移相关。

🛠️主要方法

采用 Llama 3.1 8B 指令微调模型，结合 LoRA 微调和 5% 合成数据增强，并探索层次分类、一对多策略和集成方法。

📊实验结果

在 World of Tanks 聊天消息数据集上评估，F1-macro 为 0.6234，排名 4/35。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出结合合成数据增强的 LLM 微调方法，在 EEUCA 2026 共享任务中取得第 4 名。
  • 揭示“验证陷阱”现象，分析数据集标注模式对泛化的影响。
⚠️方法局限
  • 合成数据比例仅 5%，可能未充分探索最优增强策略。
  • 方法在极端主义等少数类别上可能仍存在性能瓶颈。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This paper describes our system for the EEUCA 2026 Shared Task on Understanding Toxic Behavior in Gaming Communities. The task involves classifying World of Tanks chat messages into six toxicity categories: Non-toxic, Insults/Flaming, Other Offensive, Hate/Harassment, Threats, and Extremism. We explore multiple approaches including encoder-based models, instruction-tuned LLMs with LoRA fine-tuning, hierarchical classification, one-vs-rest strategies, and various ensemble methods. Our best system combines Llama 3.1 8B with carefully calibrated 5\% synthetic data augmentation, achieving an F1-macro score of 0.6234 on the test set, placing 4th out of 35 participating teams. We provide extensive analysis of the dataset's annotation patterns and their impact on model generalization, revealing a critical ''validation trap'' phenomenon where high validation performance correlates with poor test transfer.

Towards Autonomous Business Intelligence via Data-to-Insight Discovery Agent

Medium 2605.07202
Dongming Wu, Junwen Li, Ming Lu, Gang Wang, Ting Chen
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出首个端到端自主商业智能框架 AIDA，通过领域特定语言和强化学习实现数据到洞察的自动化探索。
🎯研究动机

企业数据碎片化，LLM 受限于复杂数据库模式、动态 SQL 生成和多维深度分析需求，难以转化为可操作洞察。

❓解决问题

如何实现复杂商业环境中从数据到洞察的自主探索与多维度分析。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 200+ 指标和 100+ 维度的灵活即时零售环境，集成领域特定语言（DSL）桥接语义推理与精确 SQL 执行，并采用基于帕累托原则的强化学习系统进行累积推理。

📊实验结果

实验表明 AIDA 显著优于基于工作流的代理，并在环境感知和多角度深度分析方面表现更优。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个端到端自主洞察发现代理 AIDA，用于复杂商业环境中的自主探索。
  • 建立高度灵活的即时零售环境，包含 200+ 指标和 100+ 维度。
  • 集成领域特定语言（DSL）和基于帕累托原则的强化学习推理系统。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定零售环境，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 强化学习训练成本可能较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Transforming fragmented enterprise data into actionable insights remains a significant challenge for LLMs, constrained by complex database schemas, limitations in dynamic SQL generation, and the need for deep multi-dimensional this http URL this paper, we propose AIDA(Autonomous Insight Discovery Agent), the first end-to-end framework designed for autonomous exploration in complex business environments. We establish a highly flexible instant retail environment encompassing 200+ metrics and 100+ dimensions, and integrates a proprietary Domain-Specific Language (DSL) that bridges semantic reasoning with precise SQL execution. Our reinforcement learning system subsequently formulates business analysis as a Pareto Principle-guided cumulative reasoning process. Experimental results demonstrate that AIDA significantly outperforms workflow-based agents, and extensive evaluations further reveal that AIDA achieves superior environmental perception and more in-depth analysis from diverse perspectives. Our work ultimately establishes the transformative potential of autonomous intelligence for industrial-scale business intelligence systems.

DCGL: Dual-Channel Graph Learning with Large Language Models for Knowledge-Aware Recommendation

Medium 2605.07314
Xinchi Zou, Tongzhenzhi Su, Jianjun Li, Yuan Fu, Chang Liu, Zhiying Deng, Zhiwei Shen
arXiv PDF cs.IR
TL;DR：提出双通道图学习框架 DCGL，通过解耦语义与行为信息、多级对比学习和动态融合机制，提升知识感知推荐性能。
🎯研究动机

现有基于知识图谱和大语言模型的推荐方法在隐式语义建模、ID 与 LLM 嵌入融合以及用户交互频率差异处理上存在不足，导致推荐效果受限。

❓解决问题

如何有效融合知识图谱的结构信息和 LLM 的语义信息，同时处理交互频率变化，提升推荐系统的准确性和鲁棒性。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出当前方法存在三个主要局限：1) 对显式 KG 链接之外的隐式语义关系建模不足；2) 单通道融合 ID 和 LLM 嵌入导致信号干扰和表征模糊；3) 未充分考虑用户 - 物品交互频率变化对推荐策略的影响。

🛠️主要方法

提出双通道图学习框架 DCGL，包含：1) 双通道架构解耦语义信息与行为模式；2) 多级对比学习机制增强对 KG 噪声的鲁棒性并弥合通道间语义差距；3) 基于交互频率的动态融合机制自适应平衡语义泛化与行为特异性。

📊实验结果

在四个真实世界数据集上进行实验，DCGL 一致优于现有方法，在稀疏场景下显著提升，同时保持活跃用户的精度。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出双通道图学习框架，结构化解耦语义与行为信息，避免早期干扰。
  • 设计多级对比学习机制，增强鲁棒性并弥合通道间语义差距。
  • 提出动态融合机制，根据交互频率自适应平衡语义与行为信息。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量知识图谱和 LLM 的语义提取能力。
  • 动态融合机制的参数调节可能增加模型复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Knowledge Graphs (KGs) have proven highly effective for recommendation systems by capturing latent item relationships, while recent integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) has further enhanced semantic understanding and addressed knowledge sparsity issues. Nevertheless, current KG-and-LLM-based methods still face three main limitations: 1) inadequate modeling of implicit semantic relationships beyond explicit KG links; 2) suboptimal single-channel fusion of ID and LLM embeddings, which often leads to signal interference and blurred representations; and 3) insufficient consideration of user-item interaction frequency variations in recommendation strategies. To address these challenges, we propose the Dual-Channel Graph Learning (DCGL) framework, featuring three key innovations: 1) a dual-channel architecture that structurally decouples rich semantic information from user behavioral patterns, preventing early interference; 2) a multi-level contrastive learning mechanism that enhances robustness against KG noise through intra-view contrasts and bridges semantic gaps between channels via inter-view alignment; and 3) a dynamic fusion mechanism that adaptively balances semantic generalization and behavioral specificity based on interaction frequency, resolving the cascading limitation. Extensive experiments on four real-world datasets show that DCGL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, yielding substantial improvements in sparse scenarios while maintaining precision for active users. Our code is available at this https URL .

Prompt Engineering Strategies for LLM-based Qualitative Coding of Psychological Safety in Software Engineering Communities: A Controlled Empirical Study

Medium 2605.07422
Moaath Alshaikh, Tasneem Alshaher, Ricardo Vieira, Beatriz Santana, Clelio Xavier, Jose Amancio, Glauco Carneiro, Julio Leite et al.
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：LLM 辅助软件工程定性编码中，多样本提示策略对部分模型有效，但存在系统性偏差。
🎯研究动机

定性分析在理解软件工程中的人类和社会因素方面至关重要，但过程耗时且受研究者主观解释和提示设计等方法论选择影响。LLM 提供了支持此类分析的潜力，但其在不同提示条件下复现人类定性推理的可靠性尚未充分测试。

❓解决问题

评估不同 LLM 和提示工程策略在软件工程社区心理安全定性编码中的一致性和可靠性。

🔎现象分析

多样本提示显著提高了 Claude Haiku 的一致性，但对 DeepSeek-Chat 和 Gemini 2.5 Flash 无显著改善；模型内稳定性差异大，Gemini 2.5 Flash 最不稳定；所有模型均存在系统性过度预测“分享负面反馈”和不足预测“表达担忧”的偏差。

🛠️主要方法

控制实验，使用三种 LLM（Claude Haiku、DeepSeek-Chat、Gemini 2.5 Flash）和两种提示策略（零样本和多样本封闭编码），以 Cohen's kappa 为一致性指标，每个配置运行 10 次独立实验。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及使用 Cohen's kappa 和 Wilcoxon 检验，以及偏差比率等指标。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提供了 LLM 辅助定性编码中提示工程策略的实证评估
  • 揭示了不同 LLM 在一致性和偏差方面的差异，为提示工程指南提供依据
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅评估了三种 LLM 和两种提示策略，泛化性有限
  • 未探讨其他提示工程方法或更复杂的编码任务
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Qualitative analysis plays a pivotal role in understanding the human and social aspects of software engineering. However, it remains a demanding process shaped by the subjective interpretation of individual researchers and sensitive to methodological choices such as prompt design. Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) offer promising opportunities to support this type of analysis, although their reliability in reproducing human qualitative reasoning under varying prompting conditions remains largely untested. This study presents a controlled empirical evaluation of three LLMs -- Claude Haiku, DeepSeek-Chat, and Gemini 2.5 Flash -- across two prompt engineering strategies (zero-shot and multi-shot closed coding), using Cohen's kappa as the primary agreement metric over ten independent runs per configuration. Results suggest that multi-shot prompting significantly improves agreement for Claude Haiku (Delta kappa = +0.034, Wilcoxon p = 0.004) but not for DeepSeek-Chat or Gemini 2.5 Flash. Intra-model stability varies substantially -- DeepSeek-Chat and Claude Haiku exhibit the lowest variance (SD approx. 0.017), while Gemini 2.5 Flash is the least stable (SD = 0.038). A systematic over-prediction of "Sharing Negative Feedback" is identified across all models (bias ratios up to 5.25x), alongside consistent under-prediction of "Expressing Concerns." Collectively, these findings provide empirical evidence for prompt engineering guidelines in LLM-assisted qualitative coding for software engineering research.

LARAG: Link-Aware Retrieval Strategy for RAG Systems in Hyperlinked Technical Documentation

Medium 2605.07517
Giorgia Bolognesi, Claudio Estatico, Ulderico Fugacci, Isabella Mastroianni, Claudio Muselli, Luca Oneto
arXiv PDF cs.IR
TL;DR：LARAG 利用超链接拓扑结构改进 RAG 检索，在技术文档问答中提升质量并降低开销。
🎯研究动机

标准 RAG 系统将结构化文档（如技术手册）视为扁平段落集合，忽略了用户导航时依赖的超链接拓扑，导致检索质量受限。

❓解决问题

如何利用文档中已有的超链接结构来改进 RAG 系统的检索效果，而不需要显式构建图结构或进行图推理。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 LARAG，一种轻量级的链接感知检索策略，将超链接关系编码为块表示的元数据，并利用这些元数据执行隐式的图式检索，以获取局部相关的内容。

📊实验结果

在 Rulex Platform 技术文档的 20 个专家设计查询和四种提示策略上进行评估，与基线 RAG 架构比较，LARAG 在 BERTScore F1 上表现最佳，且检索块数和生成 token 数更少。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 LARAG，一种利用超链接拓扑的轻量级检索策略，无需显式图构建或推理。
  • 在 Rulex Platform 技术文档的 20 个专家设计查询和四种提示策略上，LARAG 在 BERTScore F1 上达到最高，同时检索更少的块并生成更少的 token。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在单一技术文档集上评估，泛化性有待验证。
  • 未讨论超链接结构稀疏或缺失时的表现。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enhances the factual grounding of Large Language Models by conditioning their outputs on external documents. However, standard embedding-based retrievers treat naturally structured corpora, such as technical manuals, as flat collections of passages, thereby overlooking the hyperlink topology that users rely on when navigating such content. We introduce LARAG (Link-Aware RAG): a lightweight, link-aware retrieval strategy that leverages the author-defined hyperlink structure already present in HTML documentation, encoding hyperlink relations as metadata in the chunk representations and exploiting them to perform a form of graph-like retrieval of locally relevant content. In a benchmark of twenty expert-designed queries over Rulex Platform technical documentation and four prompting strategies, LARAG consistently improves answer quality, achieving the highest BERTScore F1, while retrieving fewer chunks and generating fewer tokens than a baseline RAG architecture used for comparison. These results show that directly leveraging the existing hyperlink topology of technical documentation, even without explicit graph construction or inference, enables an implicit form of graph-like retrieval that yields a more faithful and efficient RAG pipeline, providing better grounding at lower cost.

ProteinJEPA: Latent prediction complements protein language models

Medium 2605.07554
Dan Ofer, Dafna Shahaf, Michal Linial
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：在匹配时间预算下，仅在掩码位置进行潜在预测并保留 MLM 交叉熵的 JEPA 变体可提升蛋白质语言模型性能。
🎯研究动机

蛋白质语言模型主要依赖掩码语言建模（MLM）训练，但潜在空间预测能否在相同计算预算下补充这种词元级目标尚不清楚。

❓解决问题

研究潜在预测（JEPA）与 MLM 结合是否能提升蛋白质语言模型在下游任务上的表现，并找到最优结合方式。

🔎现象分析

全位置潜在预测效果不佳，仅在掩码位置进行潜在预测并保留 MLM 交叉熵的变体（masked-position MLM+JEPA）表现最好；纯 JEPA（无 MLM）几乎在所有实验中失败。

🛠️主要方法

提出 masked-position MLM+JEPA 方法，即在掩码位置同时进行 MLM 词元预测和 JEPA 潜在预测，保留 MLM 交叉熵损失。

📊实验结果

在 35M-150M 参数的预训练和随机初始化蛋白质序列编码器上，使用 16 任务下游套件（15 个冻结线性探针加 SCOPe-40 零样本折叠检索）进行实验，匹配壁钟时间预算。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现仅在掩码位置进行潜在预测并保留 MLM 交叉熵的 JEPA 变体优于全位置预测和纯 MLM。
  • 在 16 个下游任务上验证了该方法在匹配时间预算下优于纯 MLM 持续训练，并在多个任务上取得增益。
⚠️方法局限
  • 在 Fluorescence 和 Peptide-HLA Binding 任务上表现不如纯 MLM。
  • 从零开始预训练时结果不一致（6 胜 8 负 2 平）。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Protein language models are trained primarily with masked language modeling (MLM), which predicts amino-acid identities at masked positions. We ask whether latent-space prediction can complement these token-level objectives under matched wall-clock budget. Across pretrained and random-init protein sequence encoders at 35--150M parameters, we find that the best protein-JEPA design is not all-position latent prediction but a variant: predicting latent targets only at masked positions, and retaining the MLM cross-entropy. We call this recipe masked-position MLM+JEPA. On a 16-task downstream suite (15 frozen linear probes plus SCOPe-40 zero-shot fold retrieval), under matched wall-clock budgets, this recipe wins more tasks than it loses against MLM-only continuation: 10 wins / 3 losses / 3 ties (hereafter W/L/T) on pretrained ESM2-35M, 11/2/3 on ESM2-150M while results in pretraining from scratch are mixed (6/8/2). Gains are seen for multiple models on 11 of 16 tasks, including stability, \b{eta}\beta \b{eta}-lactamase fitness, variant effect, intrinsic disorder, remote homology, enzyme classification, and SCOPe-40 fold retrieval. Tasks with more losses than wins are Fluorescence (TAPE) and Peptide-HLA Binding. All-position MLM+JEPA matches MLM-only overall but does not reproduce the masked-position gains. JEPA-only (no MLM) collapses in nearly every experiment. We conclude that JEPA, when combined with MLM, is competitive and can outperform pure MLM in pretraining and continued training, even under matched wall-clock budgets.

Nürnberg NLP at PsyDefDetect: Multi-Axis Voter Ensembles for Psychological Defence Mechanism Classification

Medium 2605.07606
Philipp Steigerwald, Eric Rudolph, Jens Albrecht
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：通过多轴投票集成提升心理防御机制分类性能，在 BioNLP 2026 共享任务中取得第一。
🎯研究动机

心理防御机制检测任务存在固有歧义，不同类别共享表面语言，仅靠单一模型难以区分重叠的决策边界。

❓解决问题

在支持性对话中准确分类八种积极心理防御机制，克服类别间表面语言重叠和标注者一致性低的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出单一表示会在重叠的防御边界上摇摆，因此关键杠杆不是更强的单一模型，而是错误独立性。

🛠️主要方法

构建 9 个投票器的集成，沿三个正交轴变化：类别粒度（门控器用全部 9 类，专家仅用 8 个防御类）、训练方法（生成式和判别式）、基础模型。

📊实验结果

在隐藏测试集上 F1=0.420，在 21 支注册队伍中排名第一。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出多轴投票集成方法，利用错误独立性提升分类性能。
  • 在 PsyDefDetect 共享任务中取得第一名，F1=0.420。
⚠️方法局限
  • 集成方法计算开销较大。
  • 可能依赖特定任务的数据分布。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Detecting levels of psychological defence mechanisms in supportive conversations is inherently ambiguous. In the PsyDefDetect shared task at BioNLP 2026 the eight positive defence categories share surface language and differ only in pragmatic function and trained raters reach only moderate inter-annotator agreement. On such a task the decisive lever is not a stronger single model but error independence, since any single representation will waver on the overlapping defence boundaries. We translate this insight into a 9-voter ensemble spanning three orthogonal axes: class granularity (all nine classes for the gatekeeper, only the eight defence classes for the specialists), training method (generative and discriminative) and base model. The system reaches $F1_{test}{=}.420$ on the hidden test set, placing first among 21 registered teams.

From Surface Learning to Deep Understanding: A Grounded AI Tutoring System for Moodle

Medium 2605.06963
Anna Ostrowska, Michał Kukla, Gabriela Majstrak, Jan Opala, Sebastian Pergała, Jan Skwarek, Anna Wróblewska
arXiv PDF cs.HC
TL;DR：基于 RAG 的 Moodle 插件，通过苏格拉底式辅导和教师监督实现高保真教育问答。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 在教育中存在幻觉和误导风险，且缺乏与学习管理系统的深度集成。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个基于教师提供材料、可防止幻觉、支持深度学习的 AI 辅导系统。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

采用检索增强生成（RAG）架构，结合苏格拉底式对话辅导和教师监督（human-in-the-loop）的双中心设计。

📊实验结果

使用 Ragas 框架（LLM-as-a-Judge）评估，忠实度得分达 0.97，用户推荐率 4.00/5.00。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一个模块化 Moodle 插件，实现基于 RAG 的 AI 教学助手
  • 通过双中心设计（学生辅导 + 教师监督）提升教育内容准确性和深度理解
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖教师提供的材料质量
  • 初步用户研究规模可能有限
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This demo paper describes the development of the AI Teaching \& Learning Assistant, a modular Moodle plugin that leverages Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to deliver high-quality, hallucination-free education. The system employs a dual-centric design, providing students with interactive, Socratic-based tutoring and educators with a "human-in-the-loop" workspace for supervised content generation. By grounding Large Language Model (LLM) responses in teacher-provided materials, the assistant addresses the risks of misinformation while encouraging deep conceptual mastery. Evaluation via the Ragas (LLM-as-a-Judge) framework and a preliminary user study confirms its effectiveness, achieving faithfulness scores up to 0.97 and a 4.00/5.00 recommendation rate.

The Single-File Test: A Longitudinal Public-Interface Evaluation of First-Output LLM Web Generation with Social Reach Tracking

Medium 2605.06707
Diego Cabezas Palacios
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：在固定公共接口协议下，Claude 在单文件 HTML 生成任务中表现最强且最稳定，但推理时间与质量无关，且 Gemini 作为评判者存在宽松和自偏袒问题。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 生成网页的评估多基于封闭或定制化设置，缺乏在真实公共接口下、无额外调优的纵向对比研究，且对社交媒体传播效果的预测能力尚不明确。

❓解决问题

在固定公共接口协议下，比较不同推理模型家族（GPT、Gemini、Grok、Claude）在单文件 HTML 生成任务中的表现，并探索代码冗长度和社交媒体曝光量的预测因素。

🔎现象分析

Claude 在人类加权评分中表现最强且最一致，赢得 9/17 个提示；更长的推理时间并未带来更高质量；Gemini 作为评判者比人类更宽松，且存在未解决的自偏袒偏差；代码冗长度主要由模型家族驱动而非提示措辞；社交媒体曝光量难以通过技术 / 音频变量预测。

🛠️主要方法

在 8 周内收集 68 个单文件 HTML 生成样本，使用固定公共接口协议（无自定义指令、无个性调整、无修复提示），通过人类评分和 Gemini 评判者评估提示遵循度、功能正确性和 UI 质量，并标准化社交媒体发布流程，同时构建两个预测模型（X 曝光量和 HTML 冗长度）。

📊实验结果

68 个单文件 HTML 生成样本，17 个公开实验，4 个模型家族（GPT、Gemini、Grok、Claude），人类评分和 Gemini 评判者评估，两个预测模型（X 曝光量：MAE=46,874, R²=-0.377；HTML 冗长度：MAE=135.2, R²=0.576）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次在固定公共接口协议下对多个 LLM 家族进行纵向、无额外调优的 HTML 生成对比评估
  • 揭示了推理时间与生成质量无关、评判者偏差（宽松和自偏袒）以及模型家族对代码冗长度的主导作用
⚠️方法局限
  • 观察性研究，受公共接口漂移、访问路径差异和单一人类评分者限制
  • 社交媒体曝光量预测模型表现弱，技术 / 音频变量不足以预测 24 小时 X 覆盖
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This paper presents an eight-week observational comparison of 68 single-file HTML generations collected across 17 public experiments in the "HTML AI Battle" project between December 10, 2025 and February 4, 2026. Four reasoning model families, GPT, Gemini, Grok, and Claude, were compared under a fixed public-interface protocol with no custom instructions, no personality tuning, and no repair prompts. Each output was evaluated from a rendered browser video using human scores and a Gemini LLM-as-a-judge layer for prompt adherence, functional correctness, and UI quality, then packaged into a standardized social-media protocol spanning X (Twitter), TikTok, and YouTube. The tracker was also used for two supervised predictive analyses: an experiment-level model for 24-hour X impressions and a generation-level model for HTML verbosity. Under this protocol, Claude was the strongest and most consistent family, leading mean performance and winning 9/17 prompts under the primary human weighted score. Longer measured reasoning time was not associated with higher quality overall. Gemini as a judge was significantly more lenient than the human evaluator on functional correctness and overall performance, while stable self-favoring bias remained unresolved. The exploratory X-impressions model remained weak under post-screen cross-validation (MAE = 46,874, R^2 = -0.377), whereas the HTML-lines model performed better, with a model-family-only baseline outperforming prompt-aware alternatives (MAE = 135.2, R^2 = 0.576). Overall, selected pre-publication technical/audio variables were not sufficient to predict 24-hour X reach, while code verbosity was driven much more by model family than by prompt wording. The comparisons remain observational and are limited by public-interface drift, access-path differences, and one primary human scorer.

其他应用 10 篇

Learning Multi-Relational Graph Representations for DNA Methylation-Based Biological Age Estimation

Medium 2605.07175
Qing Qing, Xikun Zhang, Zhongyuan Zhang, Jiarui Liu, Xingtong Yu, Xiaotao Shen, Ziqi Xu, Qixin Zhang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出多关系图神经网络 RelAge-GNN，利用 CpG 位点间的共甲基化、基因组共定位和基因级关联提升 DNA 甲基化年龄预测性能。
🎯研究动机

现有 DNA 甲基化年龄预测方法将 CpG 位点视为独立特征，忽略了它们之间复杂的生物学关系，限制了预测准确性和生物学可解释性。

❓解决问题

如何建模 CpG 位点间的多关系结构以提升生物年龄估计的准确性和疾病敏感性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建三种互补图（共甲基化、基因组共定位、基因级关联），分别用独立 GNN 分支建模，并通过可学习门控机制自适应融合表示。

📊实验结果

在大规模数据集上实验，与最先进方法比较，RelAge-GNN 达到竞争性精度，与实足年龄相关性更强，并在多种疾病队列中检测年龄加速的灵敏度更高。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 RelAge-GNN，首个利用多关系图神经网络进行 DNA 甲基化年龄预测的方法。
  • 在大型数据集上达到竞争性精度，并在多种疾病队列中展现更好的年龄加速检测灵敏度。
  • 通过事后可解释性分析量化不同关系结构和 CpG 位点的贡献，提供生物学见解。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量 DNA 甲基化数据，数据获取成本较高。
  • 图构建方式可能未覆盖所有重要生物学关系。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Aging clocks aim to estimate biological age, a measure of physiological state distinct from chronological age, from observable biomarkers, and are widely used for health assessment and disease analysis. DNA methylation is a particularly informative biomarker due to its stability and strong association with aging, and recent learning-based approaches have improved predictive performance. However, most existing methods treat CpG sites as independent features, overlooking the complex and heterogeneous biological relationships among them. We propose RelAge-GNN, a multi-relational graph neural network framework for DNA methylation-based age prediction. Our method constructs three complementary graphs capturing co-methylation patterns, genomic co-localization, and gene-level associations among CpG sites. Each graph is modeled by an independent GNN branch, and a learnable gating mechanism adaptively fuses the resulting representations. Experiments on large-scale datasets show that RelAge-GNN achieves competitive accuracy and stronger correlation with chronological age compared to state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, the model exhibits improved sensitivity in detecting age acceleration across diverse disease cohorts, highlighting its potential utility for disease characterization. Finally, through post hoc interpretability analyses, we quantify the contributions of different relational structures and CpG sites, providing biologically meaningful insights and suggesting potential directions for aging-related research. Our code is available at: this https URL .

Implicit Multi-Camera System Calibration Using Gaussian Processes

Medium 2605.07491
Ivan De Boi, Bart Ribbens, Veronika Golanova, Ursula Kapov, Simon Verspeek
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出基于高斯过程的隐式多相机系统标定方法，利用主动学习提升数据效率并输出不确定性。
🎯研究动机

传统显式标定方法受限于刚性数学模型，难以处理复杂非线性畸变；现有基于神经网络的隐式方法数据需求大且缺乏不确定性量化。

❓解决问题

如何高效、鲁棒地标定多相机系统，同时提供具有统计置信度的 3D 预测。

🔎现象分析

摘要观察到靠近相机的区域 3D 预测不确定性更高，因为 uv 坐标空间的数据点更稀疏，尽管 3D 空间并不稀疏。

🛠️主要方法

使用高斯过程回归直接学习从所有相机的 2D 图像坐标到 3D 世界坐标的非线性映射，结合主动学习利用预测不确定性指导数据采集。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于 GP 的隐式多相机标定框架，无需显式估计内外参。
  • 利用 GP 固有的不确定性量化将 3D 点预测转化为可验证的测量。
  • 集成主动学习提升数据效率，适用于标定数据采集受限的场景。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对大规模相机系统计算开销较大。
  • 主动学习策略的鲁棒性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This paper proposes a novel framework for implicit multi-camera system calibration utilizing Gaussian Process (GP) regression. Conventional explicit calibration methods are constrained by rigid mathematical models and struggle with complex, non-linear distortions from unconventional optics, while existing neural network-based implicit approaches are typically data-hungry and lack inherent uncertainty quantification (UQ). Our GP-based model directly learns the complex, non-linear mapping from 2D image coordinates across all cameras to a 3D world coordinate, completely bypassing time-consuming estimation of explicit intrinsic and extrinsic parameters. Moreover, the inherent UQ is critical for transforming a simple 3D point prediction into a verifiable 3D measurement, complete with statistically-sound confidence bounds. To further enhance data efficiency and practical deployment, we integrate Active Learning (AL), which intelligently leverages the GP's predictive uncertainty to strategically guide the acquisition of new calibration data. This approach results in a robust, data-efficient, and reliable calibration solution, proving particularly effective in practical scenarios where collecting extensive calibration data is a dominant constraint. Our experiments show that the uncertainty for the 3D predictions is higher closer to the cameras. The data points in $uv$-coordinate space are more sparse in that region, even though they are not in 3D space. This work is relevant for anyone who is tasked with the calibration of complex multi-camera systems.

Towards Billion-scale Multi-modal Biometric Search

Medium 2605.07655
Arka Koner, Chetan S. Naik, Lokesh Kurre, Vivek Raghavan, Barada P. Sabut, Tanusree Deb Barma, Anoop M. Namboodiri, Anil K. Jain
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：首个面向十亿级多模态生物特征搜索的开源系统 Bharat ABIS，在 2.2 亿身份库上实现 0.3% FNIR@0.5% FPIR。
🎯研究动机

国家级身份系统需要处理十亿级记录的多模态生物特征搜索，现有系统在规模、速度和准确性上存在瓶颈，且缺乏开源方案。

❓解决问题

构建一个端到端的大规模多模态生物特征搜索系统，支持指纹、人脸和虹膜，实现高效 1:N 去重搜索。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于开源架构，对指纹、人脸和虹膜分别进行预处理（分割）、质量评估、呈现攻击检测和特征嵌入学习，生成 13.5KB/ 人的拼接模板，并集成多模态进行 1:N 搜索。

📊实验结果

在印度 Aadhaar 数据库的 2.2 亿身份库（从 15.5 亿记录中随机采样）上评估，成人探针 FNIR 0.3% @ FPIR 0.5%；与三个商用系统在 2000 万库上对比；单服务器（8×H100 GPU, 2TB RAM）上 4000 万库达到 100 次搜索 / 秒。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次公开十亿级多模态生物特征搜索系统的设计与实现细节。
  • 在 2.2 亿身份库上验证系统性能，FNIR 0.3% @ FPIR 0.5%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 未提及儿童或特殊人群的性能。
  • 系统依赖特定硬件配置，可能难以复现。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Searching a multi-biometric database of a billion records for a country-level identity system requires pushing the limits of all aspects of a biometric system, including acquisition, preprocessing, feature extraction, accuracy, matching speed, presentation attack detection, and handling of special cases (e.g., missing finger digits). This is the first paper that gives insights into such a large-scale multimodal biometric search system, called Bharat ABIS, based on open-source architectures. The end-to-end pipeline of Bharat ABIS processes fingerprint, face and iris modalities through modality-specific stages of preprocessing (segmentation), quality assessment, presentation attack detection, and learning an embedding (feature extraction), producing a concatenated template of 13.5KB per person. We present a detailed analysis of the modalities and how they are integrated to create an efficient and effective solution for 1:N search (de-duplication). Evaluations on a demographically stratified gallery of 220 million identities, randomly sampled from 1.55 billion records in India's Aadhaar database, yield an FNIR of 0.3% at an FPIR of 0.5%, for adult probes (over 18 years). We also compare the performance of Bharat ABIS against three state-of-the-art COTS systems on a 20M gallery. Our system achieves a throughput of 100 searches per second on a gallery of 40M on a single server (8xNvidia H100 GPUs, 2TB RAM).

Intelligent Truck Matching in Full Truckload Shipments using Ping2Hex approach

Medium 2605.07733
Srinivas Kumar R, Jose Mathew, Ankit Singh Chauhan, Dinesh Rajkumar, Aravind Manoj, Mohit Goel
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 ITM 2.0 系统，利用 Uber H3 六边形空间索引和 LightGBM 将卡车匹配建模为概率排序问题，显著提升匹配精度和覆盖率。
🎯研究动机

在整车运输中，GPS 数据是实现实时跟踪和准确 ETA 预测的基础，但缺失或损坏的车辆标识符导致传统匹配方法失效，造成运输可见性缺失。

❓解决问题

解决因车辆标识符缺失或损坏导致的卡车与货物匹配问题，实现无标识符情况下的准确匹配。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将匹配问题建模为概率排序，使用 Uber H3 六边形空间索引离散化 GPS 轨迹生成路线相似性特征，结合时间信息，采用 LightGBM 梯度提升模型和基于阈值的后处理。

📊实验结果

包括离线模型选择（SVM、XGBoost、LightGBM）、全面消融研究和生产影子测试，在北美和欧洲数据集上评估。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ITM 2.0 系统，将卡车匹配转化为概率排序问题，利用 H3 索引和 LightGBM 实现高精度匹配。
  • 在北美和欧洲分别实现 26 和 14 个百分点的精度提升，覆盖率翻倍，并在生产环境中验证鲁棒性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 GPS 数据质量和采样频率。
  • 阈值后处理可能对极端稀疏数据敏感。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Accurate truck-to-shipment matching using GPS data is foundational for full truckload supply chain visibility, enabling real-time tracking and accurate estimated time of arrival (ETA) predictions. However, missing or corrupted vehicle identifiers prevent traditional matching approaches, leaving shipments without visibility. This paper presents Intelligent Truck Matching (ITM) 2.0, a machine learning system that addresses this critical gap by formulating matching as a probabilistic ranking problem. Our approach leverages Uber H3 hexagonal spatial indexing to discretize GPS pings into route similarity features, combined with temporal information, then applies LightGBM gradient boosting with threshold-based post-processing. Through rigorous evaluation including offline model selection (SVM, XGBoost, LightGBM), comprehensive ablation studies, and production shadow testing, we demonstrate substantial gains over rule-based baselines. ITM 2.0 achieves 26 percentage point precision improvement in North America and 14 points in Europe, while doubling coverage. Deployed in production at Project44 handling full truckload shipments, the system demonstrates robustness to geocoding errors up to 1 km, multiple candidate trucks, and sparse pings.

On the Tradeoffs of On-Device Generative Models in Federated Predictive Maintenance Systems

Medium 2605.07860
Usevalad Milasheuski, Piero Baraldi, Enrico Zio, Stefano Savazzi
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：联邦预测性维护中，生成模型（VAE、GAN、扩散模型）在效用、稳定性和通信开销间存在不同权衡，部分联邦（如仅共享解码器）在带宽受限非 IID 场景下可超越完全联邦。
🎯研究动机

联邦学习在工业物联网中保护数据隐私，但现有研究多聚焦判别模型，生成模型在联邦预测性维护中的性能与通信权衡尚不明确。

❓解决问题

系统分析 VAE、GAN 和扩散模型在联邦预测性维护中的性能、通信开销及部分联邦设置下的表现。

🔎现象分析

完全联邦提升 GAN 训练稳定性但不如 VAE 和扩散模型鲁棒；扩散模型在部分联邦（解码器共享）下可优于完全联邦。

🛠️主要方法

提出联邦生成模型分类法，形式化部分组件共享作为个性化机制，并在真实时间序列数据集上对比 VAE、GAN 和扩散模型在完全与部分联邦下的表现。

📊实验结果

在真实世界时间序列数据集上评估，对比完全联邦与部分联邦设置下的模型效用、稳定性和可扩展性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次全面分析 VAE、GAN 和扩散模型在联邦预测性维护中的性能与通信权衡
  • 提出联邦生成模型分类法，将部分组件共享形式化为个性化机制
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅评估了 GAN、VAE 和扩散模型，未涵盖其他生成模型
  • 实验基于单一数据集，泛化性需进一步验证
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for preserving client data ownership and control over distributed Internet of Things (IoT) environments. While discriminative models dominate most FL use cases, recent advances in generative models -- such as Variational Autoencoders (VAE), Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN), and Diffusion Models (DM) -- offer new opportunities for unsupervised anomaly detection in time series analysis, with relevant applications in predictive maintenance (PdM) in critical industrial infrastructures. In this work, we present a comprehensive analysis of VAEs, GANs, and DMs in the context of federated PdM. We analyze their performance and communication overhead under both full and partial federation setups, where only subsets of model components are shared. Building on this analysis, the paper proposes a novel taxonomy for federated generative models that formalizes partial component sharing as a principled mechanism for model personalization. Our experiments over a real-world time series dataset reveal distinct trade-offs in model utility, stability, and scalability, especially in heterogeneous and bandwidth-constrained FL settings. For the evaluated GAN-based configurations, full federation improves training stability relative to independent local training, although the model remains less robust than the VAE- and DDPM-based alternatives. For DMs, however, partial federation -- especially decoder sharing -- can outperform full federation in bandwidth-constrained, non-IID settings.

Graph-Structured Hyperdimensional Computing for Data-Efficient and Explainable Process-Structure-Property Prediction

Medium 2605.07999
Jingzhan Ge, Ajeeth Vellore, Ajinkya Palwe, Ahsan Khan, David Gorsich, Matthew P. Castanier, SeungYeon Kang, Farhad Imani
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出图结构超维计算框架 PSP-HDC，利用有向 PSP 图作为先验实现数据高效且可解释的过程 - 结构 - 性能预测。
🎯研究动机

多光子光还原制造中，过程 - 结构 - 性能数据稀疏、异构且交互主导，传统特征向量模型统计欠定，易产生虚假相关和解释不稳定，而机理模型依赖早期开发中难以获得的校准子模型。

❓解决问题

在数据稀疏、异构且交互主导的 3D 微结构制造场景中，实现可靠且可解释的过程 - 结构 - 性能预测。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将有向 PSP 图编码为内部先验，通过可训练标量到超向量编码器学习参数特定嵌入，利用图对齐的绑定与捆绑组合样本表示，通过关联记忆检索进行预测，并基于原型记忆提供内在解释。

📊实验结果

在 3D 平台的薄层电阻状态预测任务上，PSP-HDC 在 1000 次随机划分中达到 0.910±0.077 准确率，在过程折叠泛化下达到 0.896，优于强基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出图结构超维计算框架 PSP-HDC，利用 PSP 图先验实现数据高效预测。
  • 提供参数级、组级和组内级的内在解释，无需后处理。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 PSP 图结构的先验知识，在无明确图结构时需额外构建。
  • 超维计算在高维空间中的可扩展性可能受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multiphoton photoreduction enables high-fidelity fabrication of complex 3D microstructures, yet reliable process-structure-property (PSP) prediction remains difficult because the available data are sparse, heterogeneous, and interaction-dominated. In this regime, conventional feature-vector models are statistically underdetermined, making them prone to spurious correlations, poor regime transfer, and unstable post hoc explanations, whereas mechanistic pipelines depend on calibrated submodels that are rarely available during early process development. We present PSP-HDC, a graph-structured hyperdimensional computing framework that encodes a directed PSP graph as an internal prior for representation, inference, and explanation. A trainable scalar-to-hypervector encoder learns parameter-specific embeddings on a fixed hyperdimensional basis to accommodate heterogeneous scales and noise. Sample representations are then composed through graph-aligned binding and bundling along directed PSP dependencies, and prediction is performed by associative-memory retrieval against class prototypes. Because the same prototype memories support both decision making and attribution, PSP-HDC provides intrinsic explanations at the parameter, group, and within-group levels, while memory alignment and separation quantify prototype formation during training. On sheet-resistance regime prediction for the 3D platform, PSP-HDC achieves an accuracy of 0.910 +/- 0.077 over 1000 random splits and 0.896 under process-fold generalization, outperforming strong baselines.

TRAS: An Interactive Software for Tracing Tree Ring Cross Sections

Medium 2605.08025
Henry Marichal, Diego Passarella, Gregory Randall
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：TRAS 是一款开源交互式软件，集成经典图像处理与深度学习方法，实现树木年轮自动分割与手动校正。
🎯研究动机

树木年轮标记是树木测量学与树木年代学的关键步骤，但传统手动标记耗时、主观且难以规模化处理大量图像数据集。

❓解决问题

开发一个集成自动检测与手动校正功能的开源软件，以高效、准确地从木材横截面图像中提取年轮并计算年轮学指标。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

TRAS 集成三种互补检测算法：经典图像处理方法 CS-TRD 和两种深度学习方法 DeepCS-TRD 与 INBD；提供图形界面支持自动检测结果的手动校正、假阳性去除和缺失年轮添加；计算早材 / 晚材面积、年轮周长、等效年轮宽度及自定义路径宽度等指标。

📊实验结果

在 18 张专家标注的火炬松横截面图像上评估，DeepCS-TRD 取得最佳自动检测性能（F-score 81.0%，精确度 86.4%），自动检测将手动校正工作量降至约 20% 的年轮边界；一维年轮宽度测量与 CooRecorder 高度一致（r > 0.99）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 开发了开源交互式软件 TRAS，集成多种年轮检测算法并支持手动校正。
  • 在 18 张专家标注的火炬松横截面图像上评估，DeepCS-TRD 达到 81.0% F-score 和 86.4% 精确度，自动检测减少约 80% 的手动校正工作量。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对火炬松一种树种进行评估，泛化性未知。
  • 深度学习方法依赖训练数据，可能对罕见年轮模式检测不佳。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Tree ring marking remains a key step in dendrometry and dendrochronology, but it is often performed manually, making the process time-consuming, subjective, and difficult to scale to large image datasets. We present the Tree Ring Analyzer Suite (TRAS), an open-source graphical software for automatic delineation, manual correction, and measurement of tree rings in wood cross-sectional images. TRAS integrates three complementary detection algorithms: the classical image-processing method CS-TRD and two deep-learning approaches, DeepCS-TRD and INBD. The interface allows users to refine automatic detections, remove false positives, and manually add missing rings. It also computes dendrochronological metrics such as earlywood and latewood areas, ring perimeter, equivalent ring width, and custom path-based ring-width measurements. TRAS was evaluated on 18 expertly annotated Pinus taeda L. cross-section images. DeepCS-TRD achieved the best automatic detection performance, with an F-score of 81.0% and precision of 86.4%. Automatic detection reduced the required manual correction effort to approximately 20% of ring boundaries. For one-dimensional ring-width measurements, TRAS showed excellent agreement with CooRecorder ($r > 0.99$). Common detection errors, such as jump propagation or false positives near knots, were easily corrected through the postprocessing interface. TRAS provides a flexible and reproducible solution for tree-ring analysis on Windows, macOS, and Linux. Code is available at the this https URL .

Edge Deep Learning in Computer Vision and Medical Diagnostics: A Comprehensive Survey

Medium 2605.06714
Yiwen Xu, Tariq M. Khan, Yang Song, Erik Meijering
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：综述边缘深度学习在计算机视觉和医学诊断中的应用，涵盖硬件平台分类、模型压缩方法和未来挑战。
🎯研究动机

边缘深度学习结合边缘计算与深度学习，能实现实时决策，但缺乏系统性综述来指导硬件选择、模型部署和应用实践。

❓解决问题

缺乏对边缘深度学习在计算机视觉和医学诊断中全面、结构化的综述，包括硬件平台分类、模型轻量化方法和实际应用案例。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

通过文献综述，提出基于性能和场景的边缘硬件平台分类，并总结轻量级设计和模型压缩等部署方法。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次提出边缘硬件平台的性能 - 场景分类法，辅助平台选择。
  • 系统梳理了边缘设备上部署深度神经网络的轻量化和压缩技术。
  • 全面回顾了边缘深度学习在通用计算机视觉和医学诊断中的实际应用。
⚠️方法局限
  • 作为综述，未提供新的实验验证。
  • 可能未涵盖所有最新边缘硬件和算法。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Edge deep learning, a paradigm change reconciling edge computing and deep learning, facilitates real-time decision making attuned to environmental factors through the close integration of computational resources and data sources. Here we provide a comprehensive review of the current state of the art in edge deep learning, focusing on computer vision applications, in particular medical diagnostics. An overview of the foundational principles and technical advantages of edge deep learning is presented, emphasising the capacity of this technology to revolutionise a wide range of domains. Furthermore, we present a novel categorisation of edge hardware platforms based on performance and usage scenarios, facilitating platform selection and operational effectiveness. Following this, we dive into approaches to effectively implement deep neural networks on edge devices, encompassing methods such as lightweight design and model compression. Reviewing practical applications in the fields of computer vision in general and medical diagnostics in particular, we demonstrate the profound impact edge-deployed deep learning models can have in real-life situations. Finally, we provide an analysis of potential future directions and obstacles to the adoption of edge deep learning, with the intention to stimulate further investigations and advancements of intelligent edge deep learning solutions. This survey provides researchers and practitioners with a comprehensive reference shedding light on the critical role deep learning plays in the advancement of edge computing applications.

Enhancing Eye Movement Biometrics for User Authentication via Continuous Gaze Offset Score Fusion

Medium 2605.06810
Hashim Aziz, Mehedi Hasan Raju, Oleg V. Komogortsev
arXiv PDF cs.HC
TL;DR：融合连续注视偏移分数可提升眼动生物特征认证性能。
🎯研究动机

现有深度学习眼动生物特征系统忽略连续注视偏移，而该信号可能包含用户判别信息，值得研究其能否提升认证性能。

❓解决问题

验证连续注视偏移作为辅助信息与现有生物特征融合是否能改善用户认证效果。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

采用线性与非线性融合方法，将连续注视偏移分数与现有眼动生物特征结合，并在多个任务和观测时长下评估。

📊实验结果

在两个公开数据集（实验室眼动仪和 VR 头显）上，针对多个任务和观测时长进行实验，比较线性与非线性融合方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次系统研究连续注视偏移在眼动生物特征认证中的辅助作用。
  • 在实验室眼动仪和 VR 头显两个公开数据集上验证了非线性融合的有效性。
  • 发现跨任务融合可进一步提升认证性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅使用两个数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 未讨论融合方法的计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Eye movement biometrics (EMB) use subject-specific gaze dynamics for user authentication and identification. Recent deep learning-based EMB systems achieve strong performance by modeling temporal eye movement behavior. However, these systems typically overlook continuous gaze offset, despite prior evidence that it contains user-discriminative information. This work examines whether continuous gaze offset can improve biometric performance when combined with existing biometric features. We evaluate linear and nonlinear fusion methods on two publicly available datasets, collected via the lab-grade eye tracker and virtual reality headset across multiple tasks and observation durations. Results indicate that fusion offers performance benefits on both datasets, particularly when using nonlinear fusion. Additionally, fusing biometric information across multiple tasks further improves authentication performance. These findings support the hypothesis that continuous gaze offset may serve as useful auxiliary information under conditions of degraded or noisy eye tracking.

PAMPOS: Causal Transformer-based Trajectory Prediction for Attack-Agnostic Misbehavior Detection in V2X Networks

Medium 2605.06833
Konstantinos Kalogiannis, Ahmed Mohamed Hussain, Panos Papadimitratos
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：提出因果 Transformer 解码器 PAMPOS，仅用正常轨迹训练，通过预测偏差检测 V2X 网络中的未知攻击。
🎯研究动机

V2X 网络中现有基于学习的异常检测方案需要攻击标签进行监督训练，无法应对未见过的伪造攻击，存在安全漏洞。

❓解决问题

在无攻击标签条件下，检测 V2X 网络中未知的伪造攻击行为。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体的现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

使用因果 Transformer 解码器在良性轨迹上训练以学习正常运动模式，推理时通过 top-K 归一化异常评分机制，根据模型下一步运动学预测的偏差识别异常并定位到特定特征。

📊实验结果

在 VeReMi++ 数据集上，覆盖所有 19 种攻击类型，在高峰时段和下午场景下评估，AUC 最高 0.98，F1 最高 0.95。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种无需攻击标签的 V2X 异常检测方法 PAMPOS，基于因果 Transformer 解码器学习正常轨迹模式。
  • 设计 top-K 归一化异常评分机制，可定位伪造攻击到具体运动学特征。
  • 在 VeReMi++ 数据集上对所有 19 种攻击类型进行验证，AUC 最高达 0.98，F1 最高达 0.95。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对高度复杂的攻击模式检测能力有限。
  • 依赖轨迹预测的准确性，在极端动态场景下可能性能下降。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Misbehavior detection in Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) networks is a second line of defense against insider falsification attacks that cryptographic mechanisms alone cannot address. Existing learning-based Misbehavior Detection Schemes (MDSs) are supervised, requiring labeled attack samples at training time, thus failing to counter unseen falsification attacks. We present PAMPOS, a causal transformer-decoder trained on benign VeReMi++ trajectories to learn normal mobility patterns. At inference time, misbehavior is identified as a deviation from the model's next-step kinematic predictions using a top-K normalized anomaly scoring mechanism that localizes falsification to specific kinematic features, without requiring attack-labeled training data. We evaluate PAMPOS across all 19 attack types in VeReMi++ under rush-hour and afternoon scenarios, achieving Area Under the Curve (AUC) values of up to 0.98 and F1-scores of up to 0.95 for most attack categories.

语音与音频 4 篇

VITA-QinYu: Expressive Spoken Language Model for Role-Playing and Singing

High 2605.06765
Jiacheng Xu, Heting Gao, Liufei Xie, Zhenchuan Yang, Lijiang Li, Yiting Chen, Bin Zhang, Meng Chen et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：VITA-QinYu 是首个支持角色扮演和歌唱的端到端表达性口语语言模型，采用混合语音 - 文本范式，在多项基准上达到最优。
🎯研究动机

现有口语语言模型主要关注自然对话，缺乏对角色扮演和歌唱等表达性语音的支持，而这些场景需要丰富的副语言表示。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个端到端口语语言模型，使其既能处理自然对话，又能生成具有表现力的角色扮演和歌唱语音。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

采用混合语音 - 文本范式，扩展交错文本 - 音频建模与多码本音频令牌，设计数据生成流水线合成 15.8K 小时训练数据。

📊实验结果

在角色扮演基准上客观指标领先 7 个百分点，歌唱 MOS 评分领先 0.13 分，对话准确率和流畅性在 C3 和 URO 基准上分别领先 1.38 和 4.98 个百分点。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个支持角色扮演和歌唱的端到端表达性口语语言模型
  • 提出混合语音 - 文本范式与多码本音频令牌设计，实现丰富副语言表示与模态分离
  • 构建大规模数据生成流水线，开源代码和模型
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对低资源语言或方言支持有限
  • 歌唱生成质量可能受限于训练数据多样性
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Human speech conveys expressiveness beyond linguistic content, including personality, mood, or performance elements, such as a comforting tone or humming a song, which we formalize as role-playing and singing. We present VITA-QinYu, the first expressive end-to-end (E2E) spoken language model (SLM) that goes beyond natural conversation to support both role-playing and singing generation. VITA-QinYu adopts a hybrid speech-text paradigm that extends interleaved text-audio modeling with multi-codebook audio tokens, a design enabling richer paralinguistic representation while preserving a clear separation between modalities to avoid interference. We further develop a comprehensive data generation pipeline to synthesize a total of 15.8K hours of natural conversation, role-playing, and singing data for training. VITA-QinYu demonstrates superior expressiveness, outperforming peer SLMs by 7 percentage points on objective role-playing benchmarks, and surpassing peer models by 0.13 points on a 5-point MOS scale for singing. Simultaneously, it achieves state-of-the-art conversational accuracy and fluency, exceeding prior SLMs by 1.38 and 4.98 percentage points on the C3 and URO benchmarks, respectively. We open-source our code and models and provide an easy-to-use demo with full-stack support for streaming and full-duplex interaction.

Dependence on Early and Late Reverberation of Single-Channel Speaker Distance Estimation

Medium 2605.07694
Michael Neri, Archontis Politis, Tuomas Virtanen
arXiv PDF eess.AS
TL;DR：单通道扬声器距离估计中，早期反射是最关键的回声成分，时间校准可大幅提升精度。
🎯研究动机

单通道扬声器距离估计在模拟环境中已达厘米级精度，但模型依赖 RIR 的哪些成分以及性能如何受记录条件影响尚不明确，理解这些有助于提升实际应用中的鲁棒性。

❓解决问题

探究单通道扬声器距离估计模型对 RIR 不同成分（早期反射、晚期混响等）的依赖关系，以及时间校准和声源水平校准对性能的影响。

🔎现象分析

无时间校准时，模型依赖混响线索，早期反射是最具信息量的成分；有时间校准时，模型仅利用传播延迟即可达到高精度。估计精度随早期能量增强而提高，在高混响环境中下降。

🛠️主要方法

将模拟 RIR 分解为四种变体（完整、仅直达、无晚期、无早期），基于回声密度函数估计的混合时间划分早期反射与晚期混响；定义四种校准场景（从完全校准到完全未校准），在匹配数据集上评估所有组合。

📊实验结果

在模拟数据集上评估了 RIR 变体与校准场景的所有组合，报告了 MAE 指标。摘要未提供具体实验设置细节。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次系统分析单通道距离估计模型对 RIR 不同成分的依赖关系
  • 揭示了时间校准对模型策略的根本性影响：从利用混响线索转为仅依赖传播延迟
  • 通过 DRR、C50、T60 等指标验证了早期能量和混响环境对精度的影响
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在模拟环境中验证，真实场景的泛化性未知
  • 未考虑噪声、运动等实际因素
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Single-channel speaker distance estimation has recently achieved centimeter-level accuracy in simulated environments, yet it remains unclear which components of the room impulse response (RIR) the model exploits and how performance depends on the recording conditions. In this work, we decompose simulated RIRs into four variants (full, direct-only, no-late, and no-early) using the mixing time estimated from the echo density function as the boundary between early reflections and late reverberation. We define four calibration scenarios, from fully calibrated (synchronised capture, known source level) to fully uncalibrated (arbitrary onset, unknown level), and evaluate all combinations on a matched dataset. Results show that without time calibration, mean absolute error (MAE) increases to $1.29$ m and the model extracts reverberation-based cues, with early reflections emerging as the most informative component. Further analysis against DRR, $C_{50}$, and $T_{60}$ confirms that estimation accuracy improves with stronger early energy and degrades in highly reverberant environments. When time calibration is available, the model achieves a MAE of $0.14$ m by extracting the propagation delay alone, regardless of the RIR content.

BeeVe: Unsupervised Acoustic State Discovery in Honey Bee Buzzing

Medium 2605.07903
Hamze Hammami, Nidhal Abdulaziz
arXiv PDF cs.SD
TL;DR：BeeVe 无监督地从蜜蜂嗡嗡声中学习离散声学状态，无需标注即可区分蜂王存在与否及其子状态。
🎯研究动机

现有生物声学方法依赖发声模型或预定义语义单元，无法处理非发声物种（如蜜蜂）的集体嗡嗡声，且缺乏无监督结构发现手段。

❓解决问题

如何从无标注的蜜蜂集体嗡嗡声中无监督地发现可重复的声学状态结构。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

使用自监督 Patchout Spectrogram Transformer (PaSST) 作为冻结特征提取器，再训练一个无标签的 VQ-VAE 将嵌入量化为离散声学 token，全程无标签、无预文本任务、无对比目标。

📊实验结果

在蜂箱音频上评估，使用 Jensen-Shannon Divergence (0.609-0.688) 区分蜂王状态，token 转移分析显示非随机序列结构 (p<<0.001)，泛化到未见录音时 token 重叠 Jaccard=0.947。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个针对非发声物种的无监督声学状态发现框架 BeeVe
  • 实验证明学习到的离散 token 能区分蜂王存在 / 缺失状态，且缺失状态可分解为三个内部一致子状态
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对蜜蜂嗡嗡声，可能不直接适用于其他非发声物种
  • 依赖 PaSST 作为特征提取器，其泛化性未充分讨论
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Discovering structure in biological signals without supervision is a fundamental problem in computational intelligence, yet existing bioacoustic methods assume vocal production models or predefined semantic units, leaving non-vocal species poorly served. This work introduces BeeVe, an unsupervised framework for acoustic state discovery in collective honey bee buzzing. BeeVe uses the self-supervised Patchout Spectrogram Transformer (PaSST) as a frozen feature extractor, then trains a Vector-Quantized Variational Autoencoder (VQ-VAE) without labels on those embeddings, learning a finite discrete codebook of acoustic tokens directly from unlabelled hive audio. No labels, pretext tasks, or contrastive objectives are used at any stage. Post-hoc evaluation against known queen status reveals that the learned tokens separate queenright and queenless conditions with Jensen-Shannon Divergence values between 0.609 and 0.688, and that the queenless condition further decomposes into three internally coherent sub-states stable across experiments with different codebook sizes and random seeds. Token transition analysis confirms non-random sequential structure (p << 0.001) across all experiments. Generalisation to unseen recordings preserves both token overlap (Jaccard = 0.947) and global manifold topology. These results demonstrate that unsupervised discrete codebook learning can recover repeatable acoustic structure from a non-vocal biological signal without annotation, opening a path toward non-invasive acoustic hive health monitoring.

STDA-Net: Spectrogram-Based Domain Adaptation for cross-dataset Sleep Stage Classification

Medium 2605.06736
Unaza Tallal, Shruti Kshirsagar, Ankita Shukla
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 STDA-Net，利用频谱图、BiLSTM 和域对抗网络实现跨数据集睡眠分期，性能优于 1D 方法。
🎯研究动机

跨数据集睡眠分期因 EEG 通道配置、采样率、记录环境和受试者差异而具有挑战性，现有方法多依赖一维 EEG 信号，二维频谱图在无监督域适应框架中的应用尚未充分探索。

❓解决问题

解决跨数据集睡眠分期中因数据分布差异导致的分类性能下降问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 STDA-Net，结合 CNN 提取频谱图特征、BiLSTM 建模睡眠时序动态、DANN 进行源域到目标域的无监督特征对齐。

📊实验结果

在 Sleep-EDF、SHHS-1、SHHS-2 三个公开数据集上进行了六个跨数据集迁移实验，报告了平均准确率和宏 F1。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将二维频谱图表示与无监督域适应结合用于跨数据集睡眠分期。
  • 在六个跨数据集设置下，平均准确率 89.03%、宏 F1 87.64%，优于 1D 基线方法，且方差更低。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于睡眠分期任务，泛化性未知。
  • 未讨论计算开销或实时性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Accurate sleep stage classification across datasets remains challenging due to variability in EEG channel montages, sampling rates, recording environments, and subject populations. Although deep learning has shown considerable promise for automated sleep staging, most existing cross-dataset methods rely on one-dimensional EEG signal representations, whereas the use of two-dimensional spectrogram-based inputs within an unsupervised domain adaptation framework has remained largely unexplored. Here, we propose STDA-Net (Spectrogram-based Temporal Domain Adaptation Network), a framework that combines a convolutional neural network (CNN) for spectrogram-based feature extraction, a bidirectional long short-term memory (BiLSTM) module for temporal modeling of sleep dynamics, and a domain-adversarial neural network (DANN) for source-to-target feature alignment without requiring any labeled target-domain data during training. Experiments are conducted on three publicly available datasets Sleep-EDF, SHHS-1, and SHHS-2 under six cross-dataset transfer settings. Results show that the proposed framework achieves an average accuracy of 89.03% and an average macro F1-score of 87.64%, consistently outperforming existing 1D baseline methods in terms of balanced classification performance, with substantially lower variance across five independent runs, indicating improved stability and reproducibility. Overall, these findings demonstrate that 2D spectrogram-based representations, combined with temporal modeling and adversarial domain adaptation, provide a robust and competitive alternative to conventional 1D EEG inputs for cross-dataset sleep staging.

遥感与科学图像 3 篇

Masks Can Talk: Extracting Structured Text Information from Single-Modal Images for Remote Sensing Change Detection

High 2605.07178
Kai Zheng, Hang-Cheng Dong, Jiatong Pan, Zhenkai Wu, Fupeng Wei, Wei Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：利用变化检测数据集自带掩码标签自动生成结构化文本描述，实现零额外标注的多模态遥感变化检测。
🎯研究动机

现有遥感变化检测方法中，单模态方法易混淆语义变化与视觉相似变化，多模态方法依赖粗粒度或含噪文本描述，且忽略了掩码标签本身已隐含细粒度变化语义。

❓解决问题

如何在不增加标注成本的前提下，从掩码标签中提取结构化文本特征以提升变化检测性能。

🔎现象分析

掩码标签隐式编码了变化位置、前后地物类型、变化方式和涉及对象数量等细粒度语义信息，但现有方法未充分利用。

🛠️主要方法

提出 S2M 框架，将每个变化区域自动转录为语义四元组（where, what, how, how many）并转换为固定模板文本描述，采用两阶段训练策略：先在遥感图像上微调获得领域表示，再通过多模态解码器与双向对比损失实现视觉特征与结构化文本嵌入的深度对齐。

📊实验结果

在自建 Gaza-Change-v2 多类变化检测数据集上，S2M 的 Sek 为 17.80%，F_scd 为 66.14%，超越使用大语言模型的多模态方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次利用变化检测数据集中的掩码标签自动生成结构化文本描述，实现零额外标注的多模态监督。
  • 提出 S2M 框架，通过语义四元组和两阶段训练策略有效对齐视觉与文本特征。
  • 构建了 Gaza-Change-v2 多类变化检测数据集，并在该数据集上取得优于使用大语言模型的多模态方法的性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 固定模板文本描述可能无法覆盖所有变化语义细节。
  • 方法依赖掩码标签的准确性，标签噪声可能影响结构化文本质量。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Remote sensing change detection is pivotal for urban monitoring, disaster assessment, and environmental resource management. Yet, unimodal deep learning methods frequently confuse genuine semantic changes with visually similar but irrelevant variations. Recent multimodal approaches incorporate text as auxiliary supervision, but their descriptions are either semantically coarse and unstructured or model-generated and thus noisy. Critically, all of them overlook a simple fact: fine-grained change semantics are already implicitly encoded in the ground-truth mask labels that come standard with every change detection dataset. These masks know where the change happened, what the land-cover types were before and after, how the transition occurred, and how many objects were involved. In this paper, we propose S2M, a framework that obtains structured textual features directly from change labels at zero additional annotation cost. Specifically, each change region is automatically transcribed into a semantic quadruple (where, what, how, how many) and converted into several fixed-template text descriptions, providing precise, dense, and noise-free multimodal supervision. We adopts a two-stage training strategy to fine-tune on remote sensing imagery firstly for robust domain-specific representation, after which a multimodal decoder with a bi-directional contrastive loss is introduced to achieve deep alignment between visual features and structured textual embeddings. To validate our method, we construct Gaza-Change-v2, a new multi-class change detection (MCD) dataset about the Gaza Strip. On this MCD dataset, S2M achieves a Sek of 17.80\% and an F$_{\text{scd}}$ of 66.14\%, notably surpassing even multimodal methods that leverage large language models. Our work demonstrates that masks can indeed talk. They tell us exactly what, where, how, and how many changes have occurred.

Sat3R: Satellite DSM Reconstruction via RPC-Aware Depth Fine-tuning

High 2605.07264
Qiaoyi Yang, Chaoyi Zhou, Xi Liu, Run Wang, Minghui Xu, Mert D. Pesé, Feng Luo, Yuhao Xu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：通过 RPC 感知深度微调，将单目深度基础模型适配到卫星域，实现快速高精度 DSM 重建。
🎯研究动机

卫星图像 DSM 重建在灾害响应、城市规划等应用中至关重要，但现有方法在精度和速度之间存在权衡：优化方法精度高但计算慢，通用几何基础模型推理快但无法泛化到卫星图像。

❓解决问题

解决通用几何基础模型因 RPC 模型和深度尺度分布差异导致的卫星图像域泛化失败问题。

🔎现象分析

通用几何基础模型（如 Depth Anything V2）在卫星图像上表现不佳，主要由于 RPC 模型引入的域差异和深度尺度分布不匹配。

🛠️主要方法

基于 RPC 感知的度量深度微调：使用 Scale-Invariant Logarithmic (SiLog)损失对 Depth Anything V2 进行微调，并从 RPC 几何构造物理一致的伪深度监督。

📊实验结果

在 DFC2019 基准上评估，与零样本前馈基线和优化方法对比，报告了 MAE 和速度指标。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Sat3R，一种前馈框架，通过 RPC 感知深度微调将单目深度基础模型适配到卫星域，无需逐场景优化。
  • 在 DFC2019 基准上，MAE 降低 38%，速度提升 300 倍以上，精度与优化方法相当。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 RPC 几何的准确性，若 RPC 参数不精确可能影响性能。
  • 仅针对卫星图像，未验证对其他遥感数据（如航空图像）的泛化能力。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Accurate Digital Surface Model (DSM) reconstruction from satellite imagery is critical for applications such as disaster response, urban planning, and large-scale geographic mapping. Existing approaches face a fundamental trade-off: optimization-based methods achieve strong accuracy but require hours of per-scene computation, while generalizable geometry foundation models offer near-instant inference but fail to generalize to satellite imagery due to the domain gap introduced by the Rational Polynomial Camera (RPC) model and mismatched depth scale distributions. We present Sat3R, a feed-forward framework that bridges this gap via RPC-aware metric depth fine-tuning of Depth Anything V2 using the Scale-Invariant Logarithmic (SiLog) loss. By constructing physically consistent pseudo depth supervision from RPC geometry, Sat3R adapts a monocular depth foundation model to the satellite domain without per-scene optimization. Experiments on the DFC2019 benchmark demonstrate that Sat3R reduces MAE by 38% over zero-shot feed-forward baselines and achieves competitive accuracy against optimization-based methods, while delivering over 300x speedup. Sat3R demonstrates that feed-forward models, when properly adapted to the satellite domain, can match optimization-based accuracy at a fraction of the computational cost, paving the way for practical large-scale satellite DSM reconstruction.

Beyond GSD-as-Token: Continuous Scale Conditioning for Remote Sensing VLMs

High 2605.07562
Song Zhang, Yanlong Chen, Yilin Li, Yining Chen, Zili Yi, Xiaowei Zhang, Yawei Li
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出连续尺度条件框架 ScaleEarth，将地面采样距离作为连续条件变量注入遥感 VLM，实现尺度自适应计算。
🎯研究动机

遥感图像中同一地物在不同地面采样距离（GSD）下视觉差异巨大，现有 RS-VLM 要么丢弃 GSD 信息，要么将其作为离散文本标记注入，导致模型无法有效处理多尺度场景。

❓解决问题

如何将 GSD 作为连续条件变量融入遥感 VLM，使其能够根据物理尺度动态调整计算路径，并消除部署时对传感器元数据的依赖。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 ScaleEarth 框架，包含 CS-HLoRA（连续尺度条件超 LoRA）通过 GSD 驱动的门控调制 LoRA 低秩子空间，以及 SSE-U（异方差子头）从视觉特征预测 GSD 及其不确定性；同时构建 GeoScale-VQA 数据集形成闭环。

📊实验结果

在 XLRS-Bench 和 OmniEarth-Bench 等遥感基准上达到 SOTA。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CS-HLoRA，将 GSD 作为连续条件变量动态路由计算路径。
  • 提出 SSE-U，从视觉特征预测 GSD 及其不确定性，消除部署时对元数据的依赖。
  • 构建 GeoScale-VQA，1.5M 样本的尺度分层遥感 VQA 语料库。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定骨干网络 Qwen3-VL，泛化性需验证。
  • SSE-U 的预测精度可能受视觉特征质量影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Remote sensing vision-language models (RS-VLMs) face a fundamental mismatch with natural-image counterparts: the same geographic object exhibits radically different visual evidence across ground sampling distances (GSDs) spanning multiple orders of magnitude. Yet existing RS-VLMs often discard GSD or inject it as a discrete text token, forcing a single static parameter set to absorb the entire scale spectrum. We introduce ScaleEarth, a parameter-efficient fine-tuning framework built on Qwen3-VL that treats GSD as a continuous conditioning variable governing the model's computation path. At its core, CS-HLoRA (Continuous Scale-Conditioned Hyper-LoRA) modulates the LoRA low-rank subspace through a GSD-driven gate, enabling the model to dynamically route computation by physical scale. To remove reliance on sensor metadata at deployment, we pair CS-HLoRA with SSE-U, a lightweight heteroscedastic sub-head that predicts GSD and its uncertainty from visual features. To provide matching supervision, we construct GeoScale-VQA, a 1.5M-sample scale-layered RS-VQA corpus whose question-answer generation is conditioned on the same physical scalar that drives CS-HLoRA, forming a closed method-data loop. Trained with QLoRA on an 8B backbone, ScaleEarth achieves state-of-the-art results on remote-sensing benchmarks covering diverse Earth-system tasks, including XLRS-Bench and OmniEarth-Bench.

视频理解 2 篇

Semantic-Aware Adaptive Visual Memory for Streaming Video Understanding

High 2605.07897
Hang Wu, Sherin Mary Mathews, Yujun Cai, Ming-Hsuan Yang, Yiwei Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：SAVEMem 通过语义感知的双阶段记忆框架，无需训练即可显著提升流式视频理解性能并降低显存占用。
🎯研究动机

在线流式视频理解中，模型需处理连续输入并实时响应用户查询，但无界流和不可预测的查询时机使内存管理成为核心挑战。现有方法依赖视觉相似性启发式压缩或 KV 缓存检索，但压缩决策缺乏语义信号，且检索常在压缩后添加，两阶段难以协调。

❓解决问题

如何在不训练的情况下，为流式视频理解设计一种语义感知的自适应视觉记忆框架，以协调压缩与检索，在恒定内存预算下实现高效且准确的查询响应。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

SAVEMem 是一个无需训练的双阶段框架。第一阶段构建三层流式内存，利用固定伪问题库提供轻量级语义先验，使长期保留由语义显著性而非视觉相似性决定；第二阶段执行查询感知检索，通过锚定条件的时间门自适应调整检索范围，并在该范围内通过查询与记忆令牌的后期交互选择候选帧。

📊实验结果

在 OVO-Bench 上，SAVEMem 将整体分数从 52.27 提升至 62.69；在 StreamingBench 和 ODV-Bench 上取得一致增益；在 128 帧时，相比骨干网络峰值 GPU 内存降低 48%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出语义感知的双阶段流式内存框架 SAVEMem，无需训练即可提升流式视频理解性能。
  • 设计固定伪问题库提供语义先验，使内存压缩基于语义显著性。
  • 引入锚定条件的时间门，实现查询感知的自适应检索范围调整。
⚠️方法局限
  • 伪问题库的固定性可能限制对未知查询类型的适应性。
  • 方法在更长视频流或更复杂场景下的扩展性未在摘要中讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Online streaming video understanding requires models to process continuous visual inputs and respond to user queries in real time, where the unbounded stream and unpredictable query timing turn memory management into a central challenge. Existing methods typically compress visual tokens via visual similarity heuristics, or augment compression with KV-cache-level retrieval. However, compression decisions rarely incorporate semantic signals, and retrieval is often added after compression is finalized, making the two stages hard to coordinate. We present SAVEMem, a training-free dual-stage framework that brings semantic awareness into memory generation and lets the retrieval scope adapt per query. In Stage~1, SAVEMem builds a three-tier streaming memory online under a constant memory budget. A fixed pseudo-question bank provides a lightweight semantic prior, so that long-term retention is shaped by semantic salience rather than visual similarity alone. In Stage~2, SAVEMem performs query-aware retrieval over this memory. An anchor-conditioned recency gate adapts the retrieval scope from short-term to mid- and long-term memory based on whether the query targets the present or the distant past. Within this scope, late interaction between query and memory tokens selects candidate frames for answering. Applied to Qwen2.5-VL without training, SAVEMem improves the OVO-Bench overall score from 52.27 to 62.69 and yields consistent gains on StreamingBench and ODV-Bench, while reducing peak GPU memory by 48\% at 128 frames over the backbone.

LookWhen? Fast Video Recognition by Learning When, Where, and What to Compute

High 2605.06809
Ali Salamatian, Anthony Fuller, Pritam Sarkar, James R. Green, Leonid Sigal, Evan Shelhamer
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：LookWhen 通过学习何时、何地、计算什么，实现高效视频识别，在多个基准上达到更优的精度 - 计算权衡。
🎯研究动机

视频识别中 Transformer 处理所有 token 的计算成本高昂，而视频存在大量冗余，因此需要更高效的方法。

❓解决问题

如何通过选择性计算减少视频识别中的冗余处理，同时保持高精度。

🔎现象分析

视频中存在时空冗余，并非所有 token 对识别同等重要。

🛠️主要方法

提出选择器 - 提取器框架：浅层选择器快速评分所有 token，深层提取器仅处理 top-K token；通过基于最近邻距离的独特性评分进行选择预训练，并通过蒸馏视频和图像教师进行提取预训练。

📊实验结果

在 Kinetics-400、SSv2、Epic-Kitchens、Diving48、Jester 和 Charades 上评估，LookWhen 在 9/12 个案例中 Pareto 占优精度 -FLOPs，在精度 - 吞吐量上比 InternVideo2-B 快 6.7 倍。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 LookWhen 框架，将视频识别分解为学习何时、何地、计算什么。
  • 设计有效的选择预训练和提取预训练策略，包括基于最近邻距离的独特性评分和双教师蒸馏。
⚠️方法局限
  • 选择器可能无法完美捕捉所有重要 token，导致信息丢失。
  • 预训练策略依赖教师模型，可能引入偏差。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Transformers dominate video recognition. They split videos into tokens, and processing them has expensive superlinear computational cost. Yet videos are filled with redundancy, so we can question the need for this expense. We introduce LookWhen, a selector-extractor framework that factorizes video recognition into learning when, where, and what to compute. Our shallow selector gets a scaled-down video and quickly scores all tokens across space-time, while our deep extractor gets the top-K selected tokens to approximate full-video representations without actually processing all the tokens. A key challenge is defining effective supervision for selection and extraction. For selection pre-training, we introduce a score on representations that ranks tokens by uniqueness using a simple nearest-neighbor distance. For extraction pre-training, we distill both a video teacher and an image teacher, for which we normalize its frame-wise representations to learn what changes within videos. Through these strategies, our selector-extractor learns general and efficient representations for feature extraction or fine-tuning to a task. Through experiments on Kinetics-400, SSv2, Epic-Kitchens, Diving48, Jester, and Charades, we show that LookWhen achieves a better accuracy-computation trade-off than efficient models and upgraded baselines of similar size. LookWhen Pareto-dominates in accuracy-FLOPs on 9 of 12 cases (6 tasks x 2 settings) and roughly matches on 3. In accuracy-throughput, measuring time in practice, LookWhen is more efficient still at 6.7x faster than InternVideo2-B at equal accuracy.

基础/前沿模型 (含LLM) 62 篇 · 8 个细分

推理与思维链 21 篇

WiCER: Wiki-memory Compile, Evaluate, Refine Iterative Knowledge Compilation for LLM Wiki Systems

High 2605.07068
Juan M. Huerta
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：WiCER 通过迭代编译 - 评估 - 精炼流程，解决 LLM Wiki 系统中知识编译时关键事实丢失的问题。
🎯研究动机

LLM Wiki 模式通过 KV 缓存推理实现亚秒级上下文访问和零检索失败，但原始文档编译为 Wiki 时存在关键事实丢失的编译鸿沟，限制了其在大规模知识库中的应用。

❓解决问题

解决 LLM Wiki 系统中从原始文档编译 Wiki 时灾难性丢弃关键事实的编译鸿沟问题。

🔎现象分析

全上下文 KV 缓存推理在精选知识上优于 RAG（4.38 vs 4.08，TTFT 快 7.3 倍），但随规模扩大因注意力稀释性能下降；盲目编译完全失败（2.14-2.32 vs 3.46，53-60% 灾难性失败率）。

🛠️主要方法

提出 WiCER，一种受反例引导抽象精化（CEGAR）启发的迭代算法，通过诊断探针评估编译 Wiki，识别丢失事实并强制在后续编译中保留。

📊实验结果

在 17 个 RepLiQA 领域（6800 个问题）上评估，WiCER 经 1-2 次迭代后平均得分 3.24 vs 全上下文基线 3.47，灾难性失败减少 55%。消融实验覆盖所有 17 个主题。

⭐主要贡献
