  • 系统刻画了 LLM Wiki 编译鸿沟，在 17 个 RepLiQA 领域（6800 个问题）上量化了全上下文、RAG 和盲目编译的性能差异。
  • 提出 WiCER 迭代算法，1-2 次迭代恢复 80% 丢失质量，灾难性失败相对减少 55%。
  • 消融实验证明定向诊断（+0.95）而非通用固定（+0.16）是性能提升的关键。
⚠️方法局限
  • 迭代过程可能增加计算开销。
  • 依赖诊断探针的质量和覆盖范围。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The LLM Wiki pattern, to compile and provide domain knowledge into a persistent artifact and serve it to LLMs via KV cache inference, promises context access at sub-second latency with zero retrieval failure. Realizing this requires solving the compilation gap: LLM compilation distilling raw documents into a wiki without catastrophically discarding critical facts. We characterize this gap across 17 RepLiQA domains (6,800 questions): we observe that full context KV cache inference outperforms RAG on curated knowledge (4.38 vs. 4.08 out of 5, 7.3 faster TTFT) but degrades below RAG at scale due to attention dilution, and blind compilation fails entirely (2.14 to 2.32 vs. 3.46, 53 to 60% catastrophic failure rate). To address the compilation gap, we propose WiCER (Wiki-memory Compile, Evaluate, Refine), an iterative algorithm inspired by counterexample-guided abstraction refinement (CEGAR) that closes this gap. WiCER evaluates compiled wikis against diagnostic probes, identifies dropped facts, and forces their preservation in subsequent compilations. One to two iterations recover 80% of lost quality (mean 3.24 vs. 3.47 for raw full-context across the 15 topics with baselines), reducing catastrophic failures by 55% relative. An ablation across all 17 topics confirms that targeted diagnosis (+0.95), not generic pinning (+0.16), drives the gains. All code and benchmarks are released for reproducible research.

Adaptive Negative Reinforcement for LLM Reasoning:Dynamically Balancing Correction and Diversity in RLVR

High 2605.07137
Yash Ingle, Jaival Chauhan, Ankit Yadav, Sudhakar Mishra
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出自适应负样本强化方法，通过时间调度和置信度加权动态调整惩罚，提升 LLM 推理能力。
🎯研究动机

现有负样本强化方法使用固定惩罚，无法适应训练阶段变化和错误重要性差异，限制了推理性能提升。

❓解决问题

如何动态调整负样本惩罚权重以平衡纠错与多样性，提升 LLM 推理能力。

🔎现象分析

固定惩罚策略在训练初期和后期效果不同，且不同错误（高置信度错误 vs 探索性错误）需要差异化处理。

🛠️主要方法

提出 A-NSR（时间调度函数动态调整惩罚强度）和 CW-NSR（基于模型置信度加权惩罚），结合概率重分布机制。

📊实验结果

在 MATH、AIME 2025、AMC23 等推理数据集上使用 Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B 架构评估，摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出自适应负样本强化框架，包含时间调度和置信度加权两种动态惩罚策略。
  • 形式化分析表明该方法能实现先验引导的概率重分布并防止过拟合。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定模型架构（Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B），泛化性需验证。
  • 时间调度函数和置信度权重的超参数调优可能复杂。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a highly effective method for improving the reasoning abilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). Recent research shows that Negative Sample Reinforcement (NSR) -- which focuses on penalizing incorrect steps rather than simply rewarding correct ones -- can match or even exceed the performance of more complex frameworks like PPO and GRPO across the entire Pass@k spectrum. However, current NSR techniques usually apply a fixed penalty throughout the training process and treat every incorrect response with the same weight. To address these limitations, we propose two extensions to the NSR framework: Adaptive Negative Sample Reinforcement. Rather than using a fixed update rule, A-NSR uses time-dependent scheduling functions. In the initial training phases, the system focuses heavily on correcting errors to stabilize the model. As training continues, it shifts toward more subtle and controlled updates. We also introduce Confidence-Weighted Negative Reinforcement, which operates on the principle that different mistakes carry different levels of importance. CW-NSR assigns specific penalty weights based on the model's normalized sequence likelihood. If the model is highly confident in a wrong path, it receives a larger penalty and for uncertain errors -- where the model is effectively exploring -- are penalized less strictly. Our formal analysis shows how these mechanisms govern token-level updates, allowing the model to leverage prior-guided probability redistribution while providing a natural defense against overfitting. We evaluated these methods on difficult reasoning datasets, including MATH, AIME 2025, and AMC23, using the Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B architecture.

Structural Rationale Distillation via Reasoning Space Compression

High 2605.07139
Jialin Yang, Jiankun Wang, Jiajun Wu, Henry Leung, Jiayu Zhou, Steve Drew
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：通过压缩推理空间使教师生成结构一致的理由，提升小模型蒸馏效果。
🎯研究动机

大模型蒸馏到小模型时，教师对相似问题的推理理由在结构和策略上差异很大，这种不一致性给学生模型带来噪声监督，难以内化。

❓解决问题

如何让教师模型生成结构一致且覆盖多样的推理理由，以降低学生模型的学习负担并提升蒸馏效果。

🔎现象分析

教师对相似问题的推理理由在结构和策略上变化很大，类似厨师做同一道菜每次做法不同，这种不一致性导致学生模型难以学习。

🛠️主要方法

提出推理路径压缩蒸馏（D-RPC），维护一个紧凑的动态可重用高级推理路径库，对每个训练问题检索最相关路径并约束教师遵循该路径生成理由，从而在相似问题间保持一致性，同时覆盖不同问题类型。

📊实验结果

在五个数学和常识推理基准上，使用两个学生模型，D-RPC 一致优于思维链蒸馏、自由形式理由生成、直接蒸馏和结构化监督基线，且使用的 token 少于模板密集型方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 D-RPC 方法，通过压缩推理空间使教师生成结构一致的理由，提升蒸馏效果。
  • 提供 PAC-Bayes 分析，形式化路径库大小与覆盖率的权衡，并确认最优中间大小。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量初始推理路径库的构建。
  • 动态维护路径库可能增加训练复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

When distilling reasoning from large language models (LLMs) into smaller ones, teacher rationales for similar problems often vary wildly in structure and strategy. Like a chef who makes the same dish differently each time, this inconsistency burdens the student with noisy supervision that is hard to internalize. We propose Distillation through Reasoning Path Compression (D-RPC), which constrains the teacher to follow a compact, dynamically maintained bank of reusable high-level reasoning paths. For each training question, D-RPC retrieves the most relevant path and conditions the teacher to follow it, producing rationales that are consistent across similar problems yet diverse enough to cover different problem types. A PAC-Bayes analysis formalizes the resulting trade-off between bank size and coverage: smaller banks reduce supervision entropy but risk coverage gaps, and the generalization bound identifies an optimal intermediate size confirmed by our ablations. Across five math and commonsense reasoning benchmarks with two student models, D-RPC consistently outperforms chain-of-thought distillation, freeform rationale generation, direct distillation, and structured-supervision baselines, while using fewer tokens than template-heavy alternatives.

Structured Role-Aware Policy Optimization for Multimodal Reasoning

High 2605.07274
Bingqing Jiang, Difan Zou
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出结构化角色感知策略优化（SRPO），通过角色感知的 token 级信用分配提升多模态推理中视觉证据的利用。
🎯研究动机

现有 RLVR 方法在多模态推理中仅分配序列级奖励，无法区分不同 token 的功能角色，导致难以判断正确答案是否基于任务相关的视觉证据。

❓解决问题

如何在不改变奖励函数的前提下，实现角色感知的 token 级信用分配，以提升多模态推理中视觉证据的利用。

🔎现象分析

序列级奖励无法区分感知 token 和推理 token 的不同贡献，导致模型可能依赖捷径而非真实视觉证据。

🛠️主要方法

提出 SRPO，通过自蒸馏在线对比生成角色感知的 token 级优势：感知 token 根据原始与损坏视觉输入下的视觉依赖性被强调，推理 token 根据与生成感知的一致性被强调，并通过共享轨迹级基线统一，生成正 token 权重调整更新幅度。

📊实验结果

在多个多模态推理基准上进行实验，结果显示 SRPO 提升了基于证据的推理能力。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次从角色感知的 token 级信用分配视角重新审视多模态 RLVR。
  • 提出 SRPO 方法，无需外部奖励模型或教师，即可实现角色感知优化。
  • 在多个多模态推理基准上验证了 SRPO 提升证据基础推理的有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖于结构化响应格式的假设。
  • 自蒸馏对比可能引入额外计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR), especially with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), has shown strong potential for improving the reasoning capabilities of large vision-language models (LVLMs). However, in multimodal reasoning, final-answer rewards are typically assigned at the sequence level and do not distinguish the functional roles of different tokens, making it difficult to determine whether a correct answer is supported by task-relevant visual evidence. In this paper, we revisit multimodal RLVR from the perspective of role-aware token-level credit assignment, where structured responses are decomposed into perception tokens for extracting visual evidence and reasoning tokens for deriving answers from that evidence. Based on this perspective, we propose Structured Role-aware Policy Optimization (SRPO), which refines the sequence-level GRPO advantage into role-aware token-level advantages without changing the reward function. Specifically, SRPO assigns role-specific credit by using self-distilled on-policy contrasts: perception tokens are emphasized according to their visual dependency under original versus corrupted visual inputs, while reasoning tokens are emphasized according to their consistency with the generated perception. These role-specific signals are further unified through a shared trajectory-level baseline, yielding positive token weights that adjust relative update magnitudes while preserving the original GRPO reward and optimization direction, without requiring external reward models or separate teachers. Experiments across diverse multimodal reasoning benchmarks show that SRPO improves evidence-grounded reasoning, highlighting the importance of moving beyond uniform sequence-level credit toward role-aware optimization for reliable multimodal reasoning.

Signal Reshaping for GRPO in Weak-Feedback Agentic Code Repair

High 2605.07276
Jia Li, Yuxin Su, Ting Peng, Hailiang Huang, Yuetang Deng, Michael R. Lyu
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：针对弱反馈场景，通过信号重塑（分层奖励、过程评分、轨迹治理）改进 GRPO，在代码修复任务中准确率从 0.385 提升至 0.535。
🎯研究动机

代码智能体强化学习常面临弱反馈问题：执行信号可靠但仅反映必要或表面条件，缺乏语义谓词信息，导致标准 GRPO 在组内比较时失效。

❓解决问题

如何重塑弱反馈信号（结果奖励、过程信号、同组轨迹可比性），使 GRPO 的组内优势计算有效，从而提升代码修复性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出：GRPO 的组内比较仅在三种信号重塑后有意义；二进制奖励会移除编译中间层并降低轨迹控制；过程评分加权可减少评估步数；特权提示的 token 级蒸馏在长工具使用轨迹中会被非关键 token 稀释。

🛠️主要方法

提出信号重塑框架：1) 编译与语义分层奖励恢复语义排序；2) 组奖励归一化外的步骤级过程评分调整轨迹内更新强度；3) 基于失败原因的轨迹治理确保同组可比较性。

📊实验结果

在 agentic compile-fix 设置下进行实验：完整信号重塑 GRPO 将严格编译与语义准确率从基线零样本 0.385 提升至 0.535；分层奖励基础上，过程评分加权将准确率从 0.48 提升至 0.53，平均评估步数从 23.50 降至 17.02。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出针对弱反馈的 GRPO 信号重塑方法，包含分层奖励、过程评分和轨迹治理三个条件。
  • 在代码修复任务上实现端到端准确率提升（0.385→0.535），并消融实验验证各组件贡献。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对代码修复场景，泛化性未验证。
  • 信号重塑的额外计算开销未讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Code-agent RL often receives weak feedback: rollout-time signals are reliable and executable, but capture only necessary or surface conditions for task success rather than the target semantic predicate. Using agentic compile-fix as the setting, we study signal reshaping for standard GRPO under such feedback. Our central claim is that GRPO's within-group comparison is meaningful only after three kinds of signals are reshaped: outcome rewards recover semantic ranking, process signals localize intra-trajectory credit, and rollouts from the same prompt remain execution-comparable. We operationalize these conditions with a minimal signal-reshaping construction that leaves GRPO's group-normalized advantage construction unchanged: compile-and-semantic layered rewards reshape trajectory ranking, step-level process scores outside group reward normalization reshape within-trajectory update strength, and failure-cause-aware rollout governance reshapes within-group comparability. Experiments show a clear end-to-end gain: full signal-reshaped GRPO improves strict compile-and-semantic accuracy from the base model's zero-shot $0.385$ to $0.535$. Controlled comparisons further explain the source of this gain: binary rewards remove the compile-only middle tier and degrade trajectory control; on top of layered rewards, process-score weighting further improves accuracy from $0.48$ to $0.53$ and reduces average evaluation steps from $23.50$ to $17.02$. As a boundary comparison, privileged-prompt token-level distillation mainly optimizes local distributional alignment; in long tool-use trajectories, this signal is diluted by non-critical tokens and cannot replace outcome semantics, process credit, or within-group comparability.

Implicit Compression Regularization: Concise Reasoning via Internal Shorter Distributions in RL Post-Training

High 2605.07316
Chen Wang, Hexuan Deng, Yining Zhang, Yuchen Zhang, Jionghao Bai, Zhaochun Li, Ge Lan, Yue Wang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出隐式压缩正则化（ICR），利用强化学习后训练中正确短回答的分布来引导模型生成简洁推理，避免过度思考。
🎯研究动机

强化学习后训练中模型容易过度思考，生成冗长推理链，现有长度惩罚或早退策略会损害准确性或假设可安全截断，需要一种不牺牲准确性的压缩信号。

❓解决问题

如何在保持或提升准确性的前提下，压缩 LLM 推理长度，避免过度思考与思考不足。

🔎现象分析

观察到长度 - 准确性相关性在压缩过程中从负向正转变：初始时短回答更可能正确（负相关），但随压缩进行相关性变正，表明模型从过度思考滑向思考不足。

🛠️主要方法

隐式压缩正则化（ICR）：在策略 rollout 中，利用每组中最短正确回答构建虚拟的较短分布，作为压缩信号进行在线正则化，引导策略生成简洁且正确的轨迹。

📊实验结果

在三个推理基座和多个数学与知识密集型基准上进行实验，结果显示 ICR 一致缩短回答长度并保持或提升准确性，达到更优的准确 - 长度帕累托前沿。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化过度思考与思考不足：通过长度 - 准确性相关性符号区分两种状态。
  • 提出 ICR 方法，无需显式长度惩罚或早退，利用 rollout 组内最短正确回答作为压缩目标。
  • 在多个推理基座和数学 / 知识基准上验证 ICR 能缩短回答长度同时保持或提升准确性，实现更强的准确 - 长度帕累托前沿。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 verifiable reward 信号，可能不适用于无明确正确性的开放任务。
  • 虚拟较短分布的有效性可能受 rollout 组大小影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards improves LLM reasoning but often induces overthinking, where models generate unnecessarily long reasoning traces. Existing methods mainly rely on length penalties or early-exit strategies; however, the former may degrade accuracy and induce underthinking, whereas the latter assumes that substantial portions of reasoning traces can be safely truncated. To obtain a compression signal without these limitations, we revisit the training dynamics of existing compression methods. We observe that the length--accuracy correlation is initially negative but continually increases during compression, indicating that shorter responses are initially more likely to be correct but gradually lose this property as the policy moves toward underthinking. Based on this observation, we formalize overthinking: a negative correlation indicates an overthinking regime, while a positive one indicates underthinking. When overthinking, the shortest correct responses are shorter than the group-average response length in expectation, making them natural compression targets already present in on-policy rollouts. We therefore propose \emph{Implicit Compression Regularization} (ICR), an on-policy regularization method whose compression signal comes from a virtual shorter distribution induced by the shortest correct responses in rollout groups, guiding the policy toward concise yet correct trajectories. Training dynamics show that ICR maintains a better length--accuracy correlation during compression, indicating that short responses remain better aligned with correctness instead of drifting toward underthinking. Experiments on three reasoning backbones and multiple mathematical and knowledge-intensive benchmarks show that ICR consistently shortens responses while preserving or improving accuracy, achieving a stronger accuracy--length Pareto frontier.

Rethinking Importance Sampling in LLM Policy Optimization: A Cumulative Token Perspective

High 2605.07331
Yuheng Zhang, Chenlu Ye, Shuowei Jin, Changlong Yu, Wei Xiong, Saurabh Sahu, Nan Jiang
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出累积 token 重要性采样比 CTPO，在 LLM 策略优化中实现无偏且低方差的策略梯度估计。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 策略优化方法在重要性采样比设计上面临偏差 - 方差困境：token 级 IS 比存在偏差，全序列比方差高，GSPO 通过长度归一化偏离精确校正。

❓解决问题

如何设计重要性采样比以同时实现无偏策略梯度估计和低方差。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出 token 级 IS 比因忽略前缀状态分布不匹配而引入偏差；全序列比因逐 token 比值的乘积累积导致高方差；GSPO 的长度归一化虽提升数值稳定性但偏离精确校正。

🛠️主要方法

提出累积 token 重要性采样比（位置 t 处之前所有 token 比值的乘积），证明其在 token 级策略梯度公式下提供无偏前缀校正且方差严格低于全序列比；结合位置自适应裁剪（对数空间裁剪边界随√t 增长）提出 CTPO 算法。

📊实验结果

在多个具有挑战性的数学推理基准上，与 GRPO 和 GSPO 基线比较，CTPO 在两个模型规模上均取得最佳平均性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别累积 token IS 比为理论上无偏且低方差的解决方案，并给出严格证明。
  • 提出 CTPO 算法，结合累积 token IS 比与位置自适应裁剪，在工具集成推理任务上取得最佳平均性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅覆盖数学推理场景，未验证其他 LLM 后训练任务。
  • 位置自适应裁剪的√t 增长假设可能不适用于所有模型或任务。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reinforcement learning, including reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), has emerged as a powerful approach for LLM post-training. Central to these approaches is the design of the importance sampling (IS) ratio used in off-policy policy-gradient estimation. Existing methods face a fundamental bias-variance dilemma: token-level IS ratios, as adopted by PPO (Schulman et al., 2017) and GRPO (Shao et al., 2024), introduce bias by ignoring prefix state distribution mismatch; full sequence ratios provide exact trajectory-level correction but suffer from high variance due to the multiplicative accumulation of per-token ratios, while GSPO (Zheng et al., 2025) improves numerical stability via length normalization at the cost of deviating from the exact full-sequence IS correction. In this work, we identify the cumulative token IS ratio, the product of per-token ratios up to position $t$, as a theoretically principled solution to this dilemma. We prove that, under the token-level policy-gradient formulation, this ratio provides an unbiased prefix correction for each token-level gradient term and has strictly lower variance than the full sequence ratio. Building on this insight, we propose CTPO (Cumulative Token Policy Optimization), which combines the cumulative token IS ratio with position-adaptive clipping that scales log-space clip bounds according to the natural $\sqrt{t}$ growth of the cumulative log-ratio. This yields more consistent regularization across token positions. We implement and evaluate CTPO in the tool-integrated reasoning setting on several challenging mathematical reasoning benchmarks, achieving the best average performance across both model scales compared with strong GRPO and GSPO baselines. Code will be available at this https URL .

Your Language Model is Its Own Critic: Reinforcement Learning with Value Estimation from Actor's Internal States

High 2605.07579
Yunho Choi, Jongwon Lim, Woojin Ahn, Minjae Oh, Jeonghoon Shim, Yohan Jo
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 POISE 方法，利用策略模型内部状态进行价值估计，实现更稳定高效的强化学习策略优化。
🎯研究动机

现有 RLVR 方法（如 PPO、GRPO）在基线估计上计算成本高：PPO 需要与策略模型同规模的评论家，GRPO 需要多次采样以稳定组均值。

❓解决问题

如何在不增加显著计算开销的前提下，获得低方差的价值基线以稳定策略优化。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

利用策略模型前向传播中已计算的内部状态（隐藏状态和 token 熵统计），通过轻量级探针预测可验证奖励，并采用跨 rollout 构造保持梯度无偏性。

📊实验结果

在 Qwen3-4B 和 DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B 上，针对数学推理基准进行实验，POISE 匹配 DAPO 性能且计算更少。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 POISE，利用策略模型内部状态进行价值估计，无需额外大规模评论家或多 rollout。
  • 引入跨 rollout 构造，确保使用轨迹条件特征时梯度无偏。
  • 实验表明 POISE 在数学推理基准上匹配 DAPO 性能，且计算开销更低。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖模型内部表征的质量，对于内部表征较差的模型效果可能受限。
  • 跨 rollout 构造可能增加实现复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) for Large Reasoning Models hinges on baseline estimation for variance reduction, but existing approaches pay a heavy price: PPO requires a policy-model scale critic, while GRPO needs multiple rollouts per prompt to keep its empirical group mean stable. We introduce Policy Optimization with Internal State Value Estimation), which obtains a baseline at negligible cost by using the policy model's internal signals already computed during the policy forward pass. A lightweight probe predicts the expected verifiable reward from the hidden states of the prompt and generated trajectory, as well as token-entropy statistics, and is trained online alongside the policy. To preserve gradient unbiasedness despite using trajectory-conditioned features, we introduce a cross-rollout construction that predicts each rollout's value from an independent rollout's internal states. Because POISE estimates prompt value using only a single rollout, it enables higher prompt diversity for a fixed compute budget during training. This reduces gradient variance for more stable learning and also eliminates the compute overhead of sampling costs for detecting zero-advantage prompts. On Qwen3-4B and DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B across math reasoning benchmarks, POISE matches DAPO while requiring less compute. Moreover, its value estimator shows similar performance to a separate LLM-scale value model and generalizes to various verifiable tasks. By leveraging the model's own internal representations, POISE enables more stable and efficient policy optimization.

Mathematical Reasoning via Intervention-Based Time-Series Causal Discovery Using LLMs as Concept Mastery Simulators

High 2605.07600
Tsuyoshi Okita
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 CIKA 框架，利用 LLM 作为干预模拟器进行因果发现，通过干预概念掌握状态分离混杂因素，显著提升数学推理能力。
🎯研究动机

现有方法无法区分概念对正确答案的因果贡献，因为观测关联可能受问题难度等混杂因素影响，导致虚假关联。

❓解决问题

如何从时间序列数据中识别哪些概念因果性地贡献于 LLM 的数学推理正确性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出观测关联可能受混杂因素影响。

🛠️主要方法

CIKA 框架：将 LLM 作为干预模拟器，通过提示设置概念状态为“已掌握”，观察正确性变化来估计因果效应，形式化为干预能力探针（ICP），分离混杂因素。

📊实验结果

在 67 个筛选问题、601 个 Omni-MATH 问题、Omni-MATH-Rule、GSM8K、AIME 2024-2026、MathArena 等基准上评估，CIKA 在 7B 参数冻结模型上达到 69.7% (Omni-MATH-Rule)、64.0% 总体、97.2% (GSM8K)、46-50% (AIME)、46.2% (MathArena)。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CIKA 框架，利用 LLM 自身作为干预模拟器进行因果发现。
  • 定义干预能力探针（ICP）诊断 LLM 是否能够使用给定概念。
  • 在多个数学推理基准上取得显著提升，且证明 LLM 已拥有但未激活所需知识。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 LLM 作为干预模拟器的准确性。
  • 可能仅适用于数学推理领域。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent methods for improving LLM mathematical reasoning, whether through MCTS-based test-time search or causal graph-guided knowledge injection, cannot identify which concepts causally contribute to a correct answer, as the observed association may be spurious, driven by confounders such as problem difficulty. We propose CIKA (Causal Intervention for Knowledge Activation), a framework that uses the LLM itself as an interventional simulator: a prompt sets the concept state to ``mastered'' and the correctness change estimates the causal effect. We formalize this quantity as an Interventional Capability Probe (ICP), which diagnoses whether the LLM can use a given concept -- distinct from merely possessing knowledge. Because the intervention exogenously sets the concept state independently of problem difficulty, ICP separates confounding that observational methods cannot. On 67 screened problems, the ICP of the top-ranked concept (+0.219) is significantly larger than that of the negative control (+0.039; paired $t$-test, $p < 10^{-6}$, Cohen's $d = 0.86$), confirming that the probe discriminates causally relevant concepts from irrelevant ones. Analysis of 601 Omni-MATH problems further shows that solved problems have 6.1$\times$ higher ATE than unsolved ones (0.338 vs. 0.055), confirming that ICP is predictive of problem-solving success. With a 7B-parameter LLM whose weights are entirely frozen, CIKA achieves 69.7\% on the contamination-free Omni-MATH-Rule benchmark and 64.0\% overall, compared to 60.5\% for o1-mini, and 97.2\% on GSM8K, 46--50\% on AIME 2024--2026, and 46.2\% on MathArena. The Causal Knowledge Activation component contributes 33.8\% of correct answers on problems where the base model alone fails, demonstrating that the LLM already possessed but had not activated the requisite knowledge.

MAVEN: Multi-Agent Verification-Elaboration Network with In-Step Epistemic Auditing

High 2605.07646
Yinsheng Yao, Jiehao Tang, Zhaozhen Yang, Dawei Cheng
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出多智能体验证 - 细化网络 MAVEN，通过对抗性 Skeptic-Researcher-Judge 循环实现显式、模块化、可验证的推理轨迹，提升推理质量与可审计性。
🎯研究动机

现有显式推理轨迹缺乏中间验证，早期错误会级联放大，且缺乏模块化导致细粒度审计困难，在高风险应用中难以建立认知信任。

❓解决问题

如何将 LLM 转变为具有中间验证和模块化审计能力的审慎推理者，避免早期错误级联并提升推理轨迹的可信度。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，现有范式依赖单一链条，缺乏中间验证，早期错误会无检查地级联；缺乏模块化阻碍了细粒度审计，损害了高风险应用所需的认知信任。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MAVEN 框架，采用黑板架构，通过对抗性 Skeptic-Researcher-Judge 循环实现角色解耦，将逻辑辩护与事实基础功能分离，生成显式结构化、模块化、可验证的推理轨迹。

📊实验结果

在 OpenBookQA、TruthfulQA、HALUEVAL 和 StrategyQA 基准上，使用四个细粒度指标评估，MAVEN 优于 GEMINI-3.1-Pro 和 ReConcile 等基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MAVEN 框架，通过多智能体对抗性循环实现显式、模块化、可验证的推理轨迹。
  • 在多个基准上验证了 MAVEN 优于潜在推理模型和基于共识的基线，且模型无关，可作为强迁移推理增强器。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能增加推理计算开销，因为需要多轮智能体交互。
  • 依赖基座 LLM 的质量，若基座模型能力不足，可能影响整体性能。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

While explicit reasoning trajectories enhance model interpretability, existing paradigms often rely on monolithic chains that lack intermediate verification, allowing early errors to cascade unchecked. This lack of modularity impedes granular auditing and compromises the epistemic trust required for high-stakes applications. We propose MAVEN (Multi-Agent Verification-Elaboration Network with In-Step Epistemic Auditing), a blackboard-inspired framework designed to transform LLMs into deliberate reasoners through explicit role-decoupling. At its core, MAVEN operationalizes an adversarial Skeptic-Researcher-Judge loop, simulating expert deliberation by functionally separating logical defense from factual grounding. Experiments on OpenBookQA, TruthfulQA, HALUEVAL and StrategyQA benchmarks demonstrate that MAVEN delivers superior reasoning quality across four fine-grained metrics. Notably, MAVEN consistently outperforms latent reasoning models such as GEMINI-3.1-Pro and consensus-based baselines (e.g., ReConcile) by generating explicitly structured, modular, and verifiable deliberation trajectories, rather than relying on implicit internal states or post-hoc consensus. Moreover, comprehensive evaluations confirm that MAVEN is fully model-agnostic, serving as a strong and transferable reasoning booster that yields substantial performance improvements across diverse backbone models.

Tracing Uncertainty in Language Model "Reasoning"

High 2605.07776
Nils Grünefeld, Bertram Højer, Philipp Mondorf, Barbara Plank, Anna Rogers, Christian Hardmeier, Stefan Heinrich, Jes Frellsen
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：通过不确定性轨迹剖面预测语言模型推理的正确性，AUROC 达 0.807。
🎯研究动机

语言模型的推理过程（如思维链）虽能提升基准性能，但其内部动态机制尚不明确，缺乏有效的分析工具。

❓解决问题

如何量化和预测语言模型推理轨迹的正确性，并理解正确与错误推理的差异。

🔎现象分析

正确推理轨迹的不确定性下降更陡峭、更非线性，且错误可在生成早期被检测。

🛠️主要方法

将推理轨迹视为演化状态，提取不确定性轨迹剖面（如斜率、线性度等特征），用于预测最终答案的正确性。

📊实验结果

在 GSM8K 和 ProntoQA 上评估五个语言模型，AUROC 最高 0.807，仅用前几百个 token 可达 0.801。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出不确定性轨迹剖面方法，用于分析语言模型推理过程
  • 在多个模型和数据集上验证该方法可有效预测推理正确性（AUROC 达 0.807）
  • 发现正确与错误推理轨迹具有定性不同的不确定性轮廓
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅评估了数学和逻辑推理任务，泛化性待验证
  • 特征选择可能依赖特定模型或数据集
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Language model (LM) "reasoning", commonly described as Chain-of-Thought or test-time scaling, often improves benchmark performance, but the dynamics underlying this process remain poorly understood. We study these dynamics through the lens of uncertainty quantification by treating the "reasoning" traces, the intermediate token sequences generated by LMs, as evolving model states. We summarize each trace by an uncertainty trace profile: a small set of features describing the shape of the uncertainty signal over its trace, such as its slope and linearity. We find that across five LMs evaluated on GSM8K and ProntoQA, these profiles predict whether a trace yields a correct final answer with AUROC up to 0.807, improving markedly on recent related work. We reach AUROC 0.801 using only the first few hundred tokens of full traces, suggesting that errors can be detected early in the generation. A detailed comparison of correct and incorrect traces further reveals qualitatively distinct uncertainty profiles, with correct traces showing a steeper and less linear decline in uncertainty. Together, the results suggest that our method, grounded in decision-making under uncertainty, provides a principled lens for studying the generative process underlying LM "reasoning".

Prune-OPD: Efficient and Reliable On-Policy Distillation for Long-Horizon Reasoning

High 2605.07804
Zhicheng Yang, Zhijiang Guo, Yifan Song, Minrui Xu, Yongxin Wang, Yiwei Wang, Xiaodan Liang, Jing Tang
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：Prune-OPD 通过动态截断不可靠的教师奖励轨迹，在长程推理任务中实现高效且可靠的在线策略蒸馏。
🎯研究动机

在线策略蒸馏（OPD）利用密集教师奖励提升推理模型，但扩展到长程任务时，学生生成前缀与教师思维过程偏离，导致教师奖励失去局部可剥削性，且继续生成和评估这些漂移轨迹会浪费大量计算资源。

❓解决问题

解决 OPD 在长程推理任务中因前缀漂移导致的奖励质量下降和计算浪费问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要观察到，当学生生成前缀与教师思维过程偏离时，教师密集奖励的局部可剥削性降低，继续生成和评估这些漂移轨迹不仅降低奖励质量，还造成大量计算浪费。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Prune-OPD 框架，通过实时监控学生与教师预测的局部兼容性（如 top-k 重叠）检测前缀漂移事件，一旦检测到严重漂移，则单调降低后续不可靠奖励的权重并触发动态截断，将计算重新分配给可靠的教师监督。

📊实验结果

在多种教师 - 学生组合上评估，使用 AMC、AIME、HMMT 等挑战性基准，实验显示 Prune-OPD 在发生前缀漂移时减少训练时间 37.6%-68.0% 并保持或提升性能，在兼容性高时自动保留长上下文监督。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Prune-OPD，一种动态对齐训练预算与监督质量的框架，通过实时检测前缀漂移并动态截断不可靠轨迹，提升 OPD 效率。
  • 在多个基准（AMC、AIME、HMMT）上，Prune-OPD 在保持或提升性能的同时，减少 37.6%-68.0% 的训练时间。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖于教师 - 学生兼容性的度量方式（如 top-k 重叠），不同度量可能影响检测效果。
  • 动态截断策略可能在某些任务中过早截断有用信息，需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

On-policy distillation (OPD) leverages dense teacher rewards to enhance reasoning models. However, scaling OPD to long-horizon tasks exposes a critical flaw: as the student's generated prefix inevitably diverges from the teacher's thought process, the teacher's dense reward loses local exploitability. Continuing to generate and evaluate tokens on these ``drifted'' trajectories not only degrades reward quality but also incurs massive computational waste. To address this, we introduce \textbf{Prune-OPD}, a framework that dynamically aligns training budgets with supervision quality. By continuously monitoring the local compatibility between student and teacher predictions (e.g., via top-$k$ overlap), Prune-OPD detects prefix-drift events in real time. Upon detecting severe drift, it monotonically down-weights subsequent unreliable rewards and triggers dynamic rollout truncation. This allows the training process to halt futile generation and reallocate compute strictly to reliable teacher supervision. Across diverse teacher-student combinations, Prune-OPD consistently aligns computation with supervision reliability. When prefix drift makes dense teacher rewards unreliable, it reduces training time by 37.6\%--68.0\% while preserving, and often improving, performance on challenging benchmarks (AMC, AIME, HMMT). When student-teacher compatibility remains high, it automatically preserves long-context supervision by expanding the training window. These results suggest that Prune-OPD improves OPD not by blindly shortening rollouts, but by reallocating computation toward locally exploitable teacher rewards.

CA-SQL: Complexity-Aware Inference Time Reasoning for Text-to-SQL via Exploration and Compute Budget Allocation

High 2605.08057
James Petullo, Nianwen Xue
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：CA-SQL 通过复杂度感知的推理时计算预算分配和进化搜索，在 BIRD 基准的困难任务上取得 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

现有 Text-to-SQL 推理方法在 BIRD 基准的困难任务上表现不佳，主要因为解空间探索不足，难以发现可进一步优化的候选查询。

❓解决问题

如何根据任务难度动态调整推理时的探索广度，以提升 LLM 在复杂 Text-to-SQL 任务上的性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出当前方法在 BIRD 困难任务上性能瓶颈源于解空间探索不充分，且不同难度任务需要不同的探索广度。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CA-SQL 流水线：1) 估计任务难度，动态缩放候选查询生成的探索广度；2) 基于进化搜索原理的自定义提示播种方法增强探索；3) 新颖的投票方法选择最佳候选。

📊实验结果

在 BIRD 开发集上评估，困难任务准确率 51.72%，整体执行准确率 61.06%，Soft F1 68.77%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出复杂度感知的推理时计算预算分配策略，根据任务难度动态调整探索广度
  • 引入进化搜索启发的提示播种方法和投票机制，提升候选查询质量和选择准确性
  • 在 BIRD 基准困难任务上以 GPT-4o-mini 达到 51.72% 的 SOTA 准确率，超越使用更大模型的方法
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖任务难度估计的准确性，估计偏差可能影响性能
  • 仅使用 GPT-4o-mini，未验证在其他基座模型上的泛化性
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

While recent advancements in inference-time learning have improved LLM reasoning on Text-to-SQL tasks, current solutions still struggle to perform well on the most challenging tasks in the Bird-Bench (BIRD) benchmark. This is due to inadequate solution space exploration, which is necessary to uncover promising candidate queries that can be further refined to produce the correct output. To address this challenge, we introduce CA-SQL, a novel Text-to-SQL pipeline that utilizes the estimated difficulty of a task to dynamically scale the breadth of the exploration for generating solution candidates. In addition, we use a custom prompt seeding method, based on principles of evolutionary search, to further elicit exploratory behavior from the base LLM and a novel voting method to select the best candidate solution at the end of the search. Experiments demonstrate that our solution achieves a state-of-the-art score of 51.72% on the "challenging" tier of BIRD development set problems, using only GPT-4o-mini, out-performing other in-context learning approaches, even those that leverage larger models. Overall, our method attains a competitive 61.06% execution accuracy and 68.77% Soft F1 score on the BIRD development dataset.

Rubric-Grounded RL: Structured Judge Rewards for Generalizable Reasoning

High 2605.08061
Manish Bhattarai, Ismael Boureima, Nishath Rajiv Ranasinghe, Scott Pakin, Dan O'Malley
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：将奖励分解为可验证标准并使用 LLM 法官评分，通过 GRPO 优化策略，提升推理泛化能力。
🎯研究动机

现有强化学习奖励信号多为二元结果或单一整体分数，缺乏细粒度反馈，难以引导模型学习可迁移的推理行为。

❓解决问题

如何设计结构化、多标准的奖励信号，使策略优化能泛化到未见过的推理任务。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Rubric-Grounded RL 框架，将奖励分解为加权可验证标准，由冻结的 LLM 法官根据辅助文档评分，并使用 GRPO 优化策略。

📊实验结果

在 OSTI 语料上训练，GRPO 调优模型在保留评分标准上达到 71.7% 归一化奖励，并在 GSM8K、MATH、GPQA Main 和 GPQA Diamond 上优于基础模型。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化了基于评分标准的强化学习框架，利用结构化多标准奖励进行策略优化。
  • 在科学文档语料上训练 Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct，并在多个推理基准上验证了泛化能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 LLM 法官的评分质量，可能引入偏差。
  • 实验仅在 8B 模型上进行，更大规模模型效果未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We argue that decomposing reward into weighted, verifiable criteria and using an LLM judge to score them provides a partial-credit optimization signal: instead of a binary outcome or a single holistic score, each response is graded along multiple task-specific criteria. We formalize \emph{rubric-grounded reinforcement learning (RL)}: a framework in which the policy is optimized against a structured, multi-criterion reward produced by a frozen LLM judge that conditions on auxiliary grounding the policy never sees. We instantiate the framework by deriving rubrics from an Office of Scientific and Technical Information (OSTI)-derived corpus of roughly 100,000 scientific and technical documents and training Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). With GRPO-based training, the model achieves $71.7\%$ normalized reward on held-out rubric evaluation. The GRPO-tuned policy also improves over the base model on four reasoning benchmarks not derived from the training corpus -- GSM8K, MATH, GPQA Main, and GPQA Diamond. These results provide evidence that structured, document-grounded rewards can improve held-out rubric performance and induce transferable reasoning behaviors beyond the corpus used to construct the training environment.

When Does Critique Improve AI-Assisted Theoretical Physics? SCALAR: Structured Critic--Actor Loop for Agentic Reasoning

High 2605.06772
Vasilis Niarchos, Constantinos Papageorgakis, Alexander G. Stapleton, Sokratis Trifinopoulos
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：SCALAR 框架研究 AI 辅助理论物理中批评反馈如何影响推理性能，发现 Actor-Critic 配对和反馈策略是关键因素。
🎯研究动机

随着 LLM 在物理推理任务中表现提升，研究者与 AI Agent 的交互方式对结果的影响尚不明确，需要系统研究。

❓解决问题

如何评估和优化 AI Agent 在理论物理问题中的交互结构（特别是批评反馈机制）以提升推理性能。

🔎现象分析

多轮对话优于单次尝试；模型规模提升仅改善简单问题，无法消除最难瓶颈；批评反馈策略在非对称 Actor-Critic 设置中效果显著，在同族设置中效果较弱。

🛠️主要方法

SCALAR 框架：Actor-Critic-Judge 流水线，Actor 提出解答，Critic 提供迭代反馈，Judge 独立评估。

📊实验结果

在量子场论和弦论问题上进行实验，变化 Actor 角色、Critic 反馈策略和模型家族 / 规模。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SCALAR 框架作为评估 AI 驱动科学发现中交互结构的受控测试平台
  • 系统分析 Actor 角色、Critic 反馈策略和模型规模对理论物理推理性能的影响
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对理论物理领域，泛化性未知
  • 未涉及更复杂的多 Agent 协作或人类介入场景
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As large language models (LLMs) show increasing promise on research-level physics reasoning tasks and agentic AI becomes more common, a practical question emerges: How does the interaction between researchers and agents affect the results? We study this using SCALAR (Structured Critic--Actor Loop for AI Reasoning), an Actor--Critic--Judge pipeline applied to quantum field theory and string theory problems. The Actor proposes solutions, the Critic provides iterative feedback, and an independent Judge evaluates the transcript against reference solutions. We vary the Actor persona, the Critic feedback strategy, and the Actor model family and scale. Multi-turn dialogue improves over single-shot attempts throughout, but both the mechanism of improvement and the value of different prompting choices depend strongly on the Actor--Critic pairing. Increasing the scale within one model family (e.g. from the 8B-parameter DeepSeek-R1 variant to DeepSeek-R1 70B) improves some easier-problem behavior, but does not remove the hardest bottleneck we observe. Critic feedback strategy matters most clearly in the asymmetric Actor--Critic setting (e.g., a lightweight Haiku Actor guided by a stronger Sonnet Critic), where constructive feedback improves mean-score outcomes. In same-family Actor--Critic settings, strategy effects are weaker: lenient feedback is sometimes favored, while strict and adversarial feedback are not beneficial. Taken together, SCALAR provides a controlled testbed for evaluating which interaction structures help or hinder AI-driven scientific discovery.

Extracting Search Trees from LLM Reasoning Traces Reveals Myopic Planning

High 2605.06840
Sixing Chen, Ji-An Li, Saner Cakir, Sinan Akcali, Kayla Lee, Marcelo G. Mattar
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：通过从 LLM 推理轨迹中提取搜索树，发现 LLM 的规划是短视的，其决策主要由浅层搜索驱动，而非深层搜索。
🎯研究动机

尽管 LLM 在推理中表现出对未来结果的显式思考，但这种思考是否构成真正的规划、其结构如何以及哪些方面驱动性能仍不清楚，理解这些差异对于对齐 LLM 与人类规划至关重要。

❓解决问题

如何表征和量化 LLM 在推理过程中的规划结构，并揭示其与人类规划的差异。

🔎现象分析

LLM 的搜索比人类更浅，性能由搜索广度而非深度预测；虽然 LLM 在推理轨迹中扩展了深层节点，但移动选择主要由忽略深层节点的短视模型解释；因果干预实验进一步表明移动选择主要由浅层节点驱动。

🛠️主要方法

从 LLM 在四子棋游戏中的推理轨迹中提取搜索树，并通过拟合计算模型来表征规划结构及其对决策的影响，同时进行因果干预实验（选择性剪枝 CoT 段落）。

📊实验结果

在四子棋游戏中，通过提取搜索树、拟合计算模型和因果干预实验，比较了 LLM 与人类规划的行为差异。摘要未提供具体数值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种从 LLM 推理轨迹中提取和量化搜索树的新方法，用于表征规划结构。
  • 发现 LLM 规划是短视的，其决策主要由浅层搜索驱动，与人类深层驱动的规划形成对比。
⚠️方法局限
  • 研究仅限于四子棋游戏，可能无法推广到其他更复杂的规划任务。
  • 搜索树提取方法可能依赖于推理轨迹的显式结构，对于隐式规划可能不适用。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models (LLMs), especially reasoning models, generate extended chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning that often contains explicit deliberation over future outcomes. Yet whether this deliberation constitutes genuine planning, how it is structured, and what aspects of it drive performance remain poorly understood. In this work, we introduce a new method to characterize LLM planning by extracting and quantifying search trees from reasoning traces in the four-in-a-row board game. By fitting computational models on the extracted search trees, we characterize how plans are structured and how they influence move decisions. We find that LLMs' search is shallower than humans', and that performance is predicted by search breadth rather than depth. Most strikingly, although LLMs expand deep nodes in their traces, their move choices are best explained by a myopic model that ignores those nodes entirely. A causal intervention study where we selectively prune CoT paragraphs further suggests that move selection is driven predominantly by shallow rather than deep nodes. These patterns contrast with human planning, where performance is driven primarily by deep search. Together, our findings reveal a key difference between LLM and human planning: while human expertise is driven by deeper search, LLMs do not act on deep lookahead. This dissociation offers targeted guidance for aligning LLM and human planning. More broadly, our framework provides a generalizable approach for interpreting the structure of LLM planning across strategic domains.

GraphDC: A Divide-and-Conquer Multi-Agent System for Scalable Graph Algorithm Reasoning

High 2605.06671
Wenjin Li, Jiaming Cui
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出分治多智能体框架 GraphDC，将大图分解为子图并行推理，提升 LLM 在图算法任务上的可扩展性和鲁棒性。
🎯研究动机

LLM 在数学问题上表现良好，但在图算法任务上仍不理想，因为图拓扑复杂且需要系统多步推理，尤其在大图上。

❓解决问题

现有 LLM 在图算法推理中难以处理大规模图，存在推理负担重、计算瓶颈和鲁棒性差的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 GraphDC，采用分治策略：将输入图分解为子图，每个子图由专门智能体进行局部推理，主智能体整合局部输出和子图间信息得到最终解。

📊实验结果

在多种图算法任务和不同规模上，GraphDC 一致优于现有方法，尤其在大实例上。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于分治的多智能体框架 GraphDC，用于可扩展的图算法推理。
  • 通过子图分解和并行推理，降低单个智能体负担，提升大图上的鲁棒性和性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 子图分解策略可能影响全局结构信息的完整性。
  • 多智能体通信开销可能成为新瓶颈。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong potential for many mathematical problems. However, their performance on graph algorithmic tasks is still unsatisfying, since graphs are naturally more complex in topology and often require systematic multi-step reasoning, especially on larger graphs. Motivated by this gap, we propose GraphDC, a Divide-and-Conquer multi-agent framework for scalable graph algorithm reasoning. Specifically, inspired by Divide-and-Conquer design, GraphDC decomposes an input graph into smaller subgraphs, assigns each subgraph to a specialized agent for local reasoning, and uses a master agent to integrate the local outputs with inter-subgraph information to produce the final solution. This hierarchical design reduces the reasoning burden on individual agents, alleviates computational bottlenecks, and improves robustness on large graph instances. Extensive experiments show that GraphDC consistently outperforms existing methods on graph algorithm reasoning across diverse tasks and scales, especially on larger instances where direct end-to-end reasoning is less reliable.

GraphReAct: Reasoning and Acting for Multi-step Graph Inference

Medium 2605.07357
Xingtong Yu, Zhongwei Kuai, Chang Zhou, Xuanting Xie, Renhe Jiang, Xikun Zhang, Hong Cheng, Xinming Zhang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 GraphReAct 框架，将推理 - 行动范式扩展到图数据，通过拓扑和语义检索与上下文精炼实现多步图推理。
🎯研究动机

现有推理 - 行动框架主要针对文本数据，未充分探索图结构数据；图数据信息分布复杂，需要动态获取和逐步精炼上下文。

❓解决问题

如何将推理 - 行动范式扩展到图学习，实现多步图推理中的有效信息检索和上下文精炼。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

设计基于图的行动空间，包括拓扑检索（捕获局部结构依赖）和语义检索（访问非局部相关证据），以及上下文精炼行动（压缩累积信息），通过交替推理与行动实现从上下文扩展到压缩的渐进过程。

📊实验结果

在六个基准数据集上，GraphReAct 持续优于最先进方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 GraphReAct，首个将推理 - 行动框架应用于图学习的模型。
  • 设计互补的拓扑和语义检索行动，以及上下文精炼行动，支持多步推理。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量图表示和检索策略。
  • 多步推理的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reasoning-acting frameworks enhance large language models (LLMs) by interleaving reasoning with actions for dynamic information acquisition. However, extending this paradigm to graph learning remains underexplored. Graph data is inherently structured, with information distributed across nodes and edges and encoded through both topology and latent representations. As a result, effective reasoning over graphs requires not only retrieving informative evidence from the graph, but also progressively refining the accumulated context during multi-step inference. In this work, we propose GraphReAct, a graph reasoning-acting framework that enables step-by-step inference over graph-structured data. Specifically, we design a graph-based action space with two complementary retrieval actions: topological retrieval, which captures local structural dependencies, and semantic retrieval, which accesses non-local but relevant evidence in the representation space. These actions dynamically expand the reasoning context. To further support multi-step reasoning, we introduce another type of action, context refinement, which distills and reorganizes accumulated information into a compact representation. By interleaving reasoning with both retrieval and refinement actions, our framework enables a progressive transition from context expansion to compression. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets demonstrate that GraphReAct consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, validating the effectiveness of reasoning-acting for graph learning.

Hierarchical Task Network Planning with LLM-Generated Heuristics

Medium 2605.07707
Felipe Meneguzzi, Alexandre Buchweitz, Augusto B. Corrêa, Victor Scherer Putrich, André Grahl Pereira
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：LLM 生成的启发式函数在 HTN 规划中几乎达到最佳规划器的覆盖率，同时大幅减少搜索代价。
🎯研究动机

HTN 规划依赖方法库加速搜索，但现有启发式函数不如经典规划中的信息丰富，限制了规划效率。

❓解决问题

如何利用 LLM 为 HTN 规划生成有效的搜索启发式函数，以提升规划性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

使用 LLM 在领域特定提示下生成启发式函数，集成到 Pytrich 规划器中，并在六个标准总序 HTN 基准域上评估。

📊实验结果

在六个标准总序 HTN 基准域上，使用九个 LLM 生成启发式，与 TDG、LMCount 基线和 PANDA 规划器对比，LLM 启发式在 83% 的共享问题上减少了搜索代价。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将 LLM 生成启发式的方法从经典规划扩展到 HTN 规划。
  • 实验表明 LLM 生成的启发式在覆盖率和搜索效率上接近甚至超越现有最优 HTN 规划器。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅测试了总序 HTN 规划，未涉及偏序或更复杂变体。
  • 依赖领域特定提示，可能限制泛化性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

HTN planning is a variation of classical planning where, instead of searching for a linear sequence of actions, an algorithm decomposes higher-level tasks using a method library until only executable actions remain. On one hand, this allows one to introduce domain knowledge that can speed up the search for a solution through the method library. On the other hand, it creates challenges that go beyond those of classical state-space search. While recent research produced a number of heuristics and novel algorithms that speed up HTN planning, these heuristics are not yet as informative as those available in classical planning algorithms. We investigate whether large language models (LLMs) can generate effective search heuristics for HTN planning, extending the methodology of Corrêa, Pereira, and Seipp (2025) from classical to hierarchical planning. Using the Pytrich planner on six standard total-order HTN benchmark domains, we evaluate heuristics generated by nine LLMs under domain-specific prompting and compare them against the TDG and LMCount domain-independent baselines and the PANDA planner. Our results show that LLM-generated heuristics nearly match the coverage of the best available HTN planner, while substantially reducing search effort on 83% of shared problems.

VecCISC: Improving Confidence-Informed Self-Consistency with Reasoning Trace Clustering and Candidate Answer Selection

Medium 2605.08070
James Petullo, Sonny George, Dylan Cashman, Nianwen Xue
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：VecCISC 通过语义相似性聚类过滤冗余推理轨迹，在保持或提升准确率的同时将 CISC 的 token 消耗降低 47%。
🎯研究动机

加权多数投票（如 CISC）虽能提升 LLM 推理准确率，但需额外调用批评模型为每条推理轨迹打分，导致高昂的计算开销和成本。

❓解决问题

如何在不显著牺牲准确率的前提下，减少加权多数投票中批评模型需要评估的候选答案数量，从而降低推理开销。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

VecCISC：利用语义相似性度量对推理轨迹进行聚类，过滤掉语义等价、退化或幻觉的轨迹，从而减少需要批评模型评估的候选答案数量。

📊实验结果

在五个数据集（数学、化学、生物、常识推理、人文学科）上评估，结果显示总 token 使用量减少 47%，准确率维持或超过 CISC。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 VecCISC 框架，通过语义聚类减少 CISC 中批评模型的调用次数，降低 token 消耗 47%。
  • 在数学、化学、生物、常识推理和人文学科五个挑战性数据集上验证，保持或超越 CISC 的准确率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 语义相似性度量可能对特定领域或长尾推理轨迹不鲁棒。
  • 过滤策略可能误删有价值但表达新颖的推理轨迹。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

A standard technique for scaling inference-time reasoning is Self-Consistency, whereby multiple candidate answers are sampled from an LLM and the most common answer is selected. More recently, it has been shown that weighted majority voting (e.g. Confidence-Informed Self Consistency (CISC)), which assigns a confidence value to each candidate answer and chooses the answer with the largest accumulated score, tends to be more accurate on a wide range of popular benchmarks. In practice, weighted majority voting necessitates calling a critic LLM on each candidate's reasoning trace to produce the answer's confidence score. This secondary series of LLM calls greatly increases the overhead and cost of weighted majority voting, despite its potential performance benefits. To reduce this expense, we propose VecCISC, a lightweight, adaptive framework that uses a measure of semantic similarity to filter reasoning traces that are semantically equivalent to others, degenerate, or hallucinated, thus decreasing the number of candidate answers that must be evaluated by the critic. To ensure adequate experimental thoroughness, we evaluate VecCISC on five challenging, widely-adopted datasets spanning the domains of mathematics, chemistry, biology, commonsense reasoning, and the humanities. Our results demonstrate that VecCISC reduces the total token usage by 47%, while maintaining or exceeding the accuracy of CISC.

How Well Do LLMs Perform on the Simplest Long-Chain Reasoning Tasks: An Empirical Study on the Equivalence Class Problem

Medium 2605.06882
Chun Zheng, Lianlong Wu, Bingqian Li, Lvting Liu, Yi Zhou
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：LLM 在简单长链推理任务（等价类问题）上表现不佳，推理模型优于非推理模型但仍未完全解决。
🎯研究动机

尽管 LLM 在推理任务上取得进展，但其在长链推理上的能力仍不明确，需要系统评估。

❓解决问题

评估 LLM 在等价类问题（ECP）这一简单但长链的推理任务上的表现。

🔎现象分析

非推理模型在 ECP 上失败；推理模型显著更好但仍困难。非推理模型的最难实例对应相变点 ln n/(n-1)，推理模型的最难实例对应最大直径。

🛠️主要方法

设计等价类问题（ECP）作为基准，系统变化变量数量、连接概率、提示等因子，评估多种推理和非推理 LLM。

📊实验结果

在多种变量数量、连接概率、提示等条件下测试了多个推理和非推理 LLM。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次系统评估 LLM 在等价类问题上的长链推理能力
  • 发现非推理模型和推理模型在困难实例上的不同模式
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对等价类问题，可能不泛化到其他长链推理任务
  • 未提供具体模型名称和性能数值
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved great improvements in recent years. Nevertheless, it still remains unclear how good LLMs are for reasoning tasks, especially for long-chain ones. In this paper, we evaluate LLMs' performance on the simplest yet long-chain reasoning task, namely the Equivalence Class Problem (ECP), i.e., determining whether two variables are equal given a set of randomly generated equivalence relations. We consider both reasoning and non-reasoning representative LLMs over a large variety of problem instances, ranging over different numbers of variables, connectivity probabilities, prompts, and other factors. The experimental results show that non-reasoning LLMs fail ECP, while reasoning models are significantly better but still struggle to completely solve this problem. Interestingly, considering various connectivity probabilities with a fixed number of variables, we observe that, for non-reasoning models, the hardest problem instances coincide with the phase transition point of ln n/(n-1), suggesting the chaos of the problem; in contrast, for reasoning models, the hardest ones coincide with the biggest diameter, suggesting the reasoning difficulty of the problem.

Agent 与工具使用 18 篇

TeamBench: Evaluating Agent Coordination under Enforced Role Separation

High 2605.07073
Yubin Kim, Chanwoo Park, Taehan Kim, Eugene Park, Samuel Schmidgall, Salman Rahman, Chunjong Park, Cynthia Breazeal et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：TeamBench 通过操作系统级角色分离强制约束，揭示智能体团队协作中角色越权与协调失效问题。
🎯研究动机

现有智能体系统通常通过提示词指定角色，但缺乏强制访问控制，导致团队通过率无法反映真实协作情况，可能掩盖角色越权行为。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个基准测试，在强制角色分离下评估智能体团队的协调能力，并暴露提示词约束下隐藏的协作失败模式。

🔎现象分析

仅靠提示词约束的团队与沙箱强制约束的团队通过率无显著差异，但提示词约束下验证者尝试编辑执行者代码的情况多出 3.6 倍；验证者批准了 49% 未通过确定性评分器的提交；消融实验移除验证者后平均部分分数提升；团队价值有条件性：单智能体困难时团队有益，单智能体表现好时团队反而有害。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 851 个任务模板和 931 个种子实例的基准 TeamBench，通过操作系统级访问控制分离规划者、执行者和验证者的权限：规划者只能读取规范，执行者只能编辑工作空间，验证者只能认证最终答案，三者权限互斥。

📊实验结果

在 TeamBench 上比较提示词约束团队与沙箱强制约束团队的通过率、角色越权行为、验证者批准率及消融实验；并进行了 40 人人类研究。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 TeamBench 基准，通过强制角色分离评估智能体团队协调能力，包含 851 个任务模板和 931 个种子实例。
  • 通过实验揭示提示词约束下角色越权、验证者失效及团队价值条件性等关键现象。
  • 提供 40 人人类研究对比，暴露通过率无法捕捉的交互模式。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准任务模板可能未覆盖所有真实协作场景。
  • 角色分离策略可能过于严格，与实际应用中的灵活协作存在差距。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Agent systems often decompose a task across multiple roles, but these roles are typically specified by prompts rather than enforced by access controls. Without enforcement, a team pass rate can mask whether agents actually coordinated or whether one role effectively did another role's work. We present TeamBench, a benchmark with 851 task templates and 931 seeded instances for evaluating agent coordination under operating system-enforced role separation. TeamBench separates specification access, workspace editing, and final certification across Planner, Executor, and Verifier roles, so that no role can read the full requirements, modify the workspace, and certify the final answer. Prompt-only and sandbox-enforced teams reach statistically indistinguishable pass rates, but prompt-only runs produce 3.6 times more cases where the verifier attempts to edit the executor's code. Verifiers approve 49% of submissions that fail the deterministic grader, and removing the verifier improves mean partial score in the ablation. Team value is also conditional. Teams benefit when single agents struggle, but hurt when single agents already perform well. A 40-session human study under the same role separation shows that our benchmark exposes interaction patterns that pass rate misses. Solo participants work through the task directly, human participants paired with agents often collapse into quick approval, and human teams spend more effort coordinating missing information across roles.

Switchcraft: AI Model Router for Agentic Tool Calling

High 2605.07112
Sharad Agarwal, Pooria Namyar, Alec Wolman, Rahul Ambavat, Ankur Gupta, Qizheng Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：Switchcraft 是首个面向智能体工具调用的模型路由器，通过轻量级分类器在保证正确率的同时大幅降低推理成本。
🎯研究动机

现有智能体系统默认使用大模型调用工具，导致推理成本过高，而现有模型路由器仅针对对话生成设计，不适用于工具调用场景。

❓解决问题

如何在智能体工具调用任务中，根据输入动态选择最低成本且保证正确性的模型。

🔎现象分析

摘要发现：大模型在工具调用任务上并不一致优于小模型，且名义上更便宜的模型可能因推理 token 密集而总成本更高。

🛠️主要方法

基于 DistilBERT 的轻量级分类器，在线选择最低成本模型，并受延迟预算约束。

📊实验结果

在五个函数调用基准上评估，Switchcraft 达到 82.9% 准确率，匹配或超越最佳单一模型，推理成本降低 84%，每百万查询节省超 3600 美元。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个针对智能体工具调用的模型路由器 Switchcraft
  • 在五个函数调用基准上构建评估框架，实现 82.9% 准确率并降低 84% 推理成本
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于 DistilBERT，可能无法处理更复杂的工具调用场景
  • 评估限于五个基准，泛化性需进一步验证
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Agentic AI systems that invoke external tools are powerful but costly, leading developers to default to large models and overspend inference budgets. Model routing can mitigate this, but existing routers are designed for chat completion rather than tool use. We present Switchcraft, the first (to the best of our knowledge) model router optimized for agentic tool calling. Switchcraft operates inline, selecting the lowest-cost model subject to correctness. We construct an evaluation framework on five function-calling benchmarks and train a DistilBERT-based classifier, deployed under a latency budget. Switchcraft achieves 82.9% accuracy -- matching or exceeding the best individual model -- while reducing inference cost by 84%, saving over $3,600 per million queries. We find that larger models do not consistently outperform smaller ones on tool-use tasks, and that nominally cheaper models can incur higher total cost due to token-intensive reasoning. Our work enables cost-aware agentic AI deployment without sacrificing correctness.

RRCM: Ranking-Driven Retrieval over Collaborative and Meta Memories for LLM Recommendation

High 2605.07129
Shijun Li, Wooseong Yang, Yu Wang, Tianxin Wei, Joydeep Ghosh
arXiv PDF cs.IR
TL;DR：提出 RRCM 框架，通过排序驱动的检索策略动态融合协同记忆与元数据记忆，提升 LLM 推荐系统的上下文构建效率与准确性。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 推荐系统依赖固定上下文构建策略，难以判断哪些信息对每个实例真正有益；异构证据（协同行为与元数据）容易导致上下文窗口过载，而激进压缩或启发式过滤可能丢失关键细粒度证据。

❓解决问题

如何为 LLM 推荐系统动态、自适应地检索和融合协同行为证据与物品元数据，以构建决策相关的上下文，同时避免上下文窗口过载。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 RRCM 框架，包含轻量级用户历史上下文，通过推理决定是否直接推荐、检索协同记忆、检索物品元数据或两者交替；两种记忆均以自然语言表示并通过统一检索接口访问；使用基于排序奖励的组相对策略优化（GRPO）优化记忆读取策略。

📊实验结果

在多个数据集上实验，RRCM 显著优于传统基线和多种 LLM 推荐方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出排序驱动的检索 - 推理框架 RRCM，动态融合协同记忆与元数据记忆。
  • 设计基于排序奖励的优化方法，直接以最终 top-k 推荐质量驱动检索决策。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的记忆表示和检索接口。
  • 优化策略可能对奖励函数设计敏感。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for next-generation recommender systems, offering strong semantic understanding and natural-language reasoning abilities. Despite recent progress, current LLM-based recommenders still face key challenges in constructing decision-relevant contexts from heterogeneous evidence. First, existing methods often rely on fixed context construction strategies: collaborative behavioral evidence and item-side metadata are typically incorporated through predefined prompts, static retrieval pipelines, or handcrafted injection mechanisms, making it difficult to determine what information is truly beneficial for each instance. Second, heterogeneous evidence introduces a severe context-efficiency bottleneck. Rich metadata and collaborative interaction records can quickly overwhelm the context window, while aggressive compression or heuristic filtering may discard fine-grained evidence critical for accurate recommendation. To address these challenges, we propose RRCM, a ranking-driven retrieval-and-reasoning framework over collaborative and metadata memories for LLM-based agentic recommendation. RRCM starts from a lightweight user-history context and learns whether to recommend directly, retrieve collaborative evidence, retrieve item metadata, or interleave both through reasoning. Both memories are represented in natural language and accessed through a unified retrieval interface, enabling flexible evidence acquisition without handcrafted CF injection or fixed retrieval rules. We optimize this memory-reading policy with an outcome-only ranking reward, instantiated using group relative policy optimization, so that retrieval decisions are directly driven by final top-k recommendation quality. Extensive experiments show that RRCM significantly outperforms traditional baselines and diverse LLM-based recommendation approaches.

MEMOREPAIR: Barrier-First Cascade Repair in Agentic Memory

High 2605.07242
Yang Zhao, Chengxiao Dai, Mengying Kou, Yue Xiu
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种屏障优先的级联修复协议，解决智能体记忆中派生状态因源失效而残留的问题。
🎯研究动机

智能体记忆在任务中不断产生派生制品（摘要、缓存、嵌入等），当源制品被删除或失效时，派生状态仍可见并误导后续行为，现有系统缺乏对此级联失效的修复机制。

❓解决问题

解决智能体记忆中的级联更新问题，即源制品失效后如何高效修复所有可见的派生状态。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，当源制品被删除、修正或工具迁移导致失效时，其派生制品仍保持可见并基于过时信息引导未来动作，形成级联失效模式。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MemoRepair，一种屏障优先的级联修复协议：修复事件触发从失效派生状态到验证后状态的受控转换，包括撤回受影响派生、从保留支持构建后继、限制发布为验证前驱闭包，并将发布问题转化为最大权重前驱闭包，通过单次 s-t 最小割精确求解。

📊实验结果

在 ToolBench 和 MemoryArena 上实验，与无级联修复系统相比，失效记忆暴露从 69.8-94.3% 降至 0%；与穷举修复相比，恢复 91.1-94.3% 的验证后继，归一化修复成本从 1.00 降至 0.57-0.76。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化定义了智能体记忆中的级联更新问题。
  • 提出屏障优先的级联修复协议 MemoRepair，并证明其发布问题可归约为最大权重前驱闭包，通过 s-t 最小割精确求解。
  • 在 ToolBench 和 MemoryArena 上实验表明，MemoRepair 将失效记忆暴露从 69.8-94.3% 降至 0%，相比穷举修复，恢复 91.1-94.3% 的验证后继，同时归一化修复成本从 1.00 降至 0.57-0.76。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖完整的影响溯源信息，实际系统中可能难以获取。
  • 修复成本权衡的标量化可能无法覆盖所有实际场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Agentic memory evolves across tasks into durable derived artifacts: summaries, cached outputs, embeddings, learned skills, and executable tool procedures. When a source artifact is deleted, corrected, or invalidated by tool or API migration, descendants derived from that source can remain visible and steer future actions with stale support. We formalize this failure mode as the cascade update problem, where repair targets the visible derived state of the memory store. We present MemoRepair, a barrier-first cascade-repair contract for agentic memory. A repair event induces a controlled transition from invalidated descendant state to validated successor state: affected descendants are withdrawn before repair, successors are constructed from retained support and staged repaired predecessors under the current interface, and republication is restricted to validated predecessor-closed successors. This contract induces a scalarized repair-selection problem for a fixed repair-cost tradeoff. We show that the induced publication problem reduces to maximum-weight predecessor closure and can be solved exactly by a single s-t min-cut. Experiments on ToolBench and MemoryArena show that, with complete influence provenance, MemoRepair reduces invalidated-memory exposure from 69.8-94.3% under systems without cascade repair to 0%. Compared with exhaustive Repair all, it recovers 91.1-94.3% of validated successors while reducing normalized repair-operator cost from 1.00 to 0.57-0.76.

SOM: Structured Opponent Modeling for LLM-based Agents via Structural Causal Model

High 2605.07301
Shiyue Cao, Pei Xu, Likun Yang, Lei Cui, Xiaotang Chen, Kaiqi Huang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出结构化对手建模框架 SOM，通过结构因果模型分离对手模型构建与预测，提升 LLM 智能体在多智能体环境中的对手行为预测准确性与适应性。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 智能体在多智能体环境中进行对手建模时，常将模型构建与预测纠缠在一起，依赖隐式上下文推理，限制了在动态交互中的适应性。

❓解决问题

如何为 LLM 智能体构建显式、结构化的对手模型，并实现准确且稳定的对手行为预测。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出两阶段框架 SOM：构建阶段使用结构因果模型(SCM)捕获对手观测与动作间的有向依赖，形成显式结构化表示；预测阶段 LLM 沿 SCM 导出的清晰路径进行结构化推理。

📊实验结果

在多个多智能体基准上进行实验，SOM 一致优于最先进的 LLM 推理基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SOM 框架，将对手模型构建与预测分离，利用 SCM 实现显式结构化对手建模。
  • 在多个多智能体基准上验证 SOM 优于现有 LLM 推理基线，提升预测准确性和适应性。
⚠️方法局限
  • SCM 的构建可能依赖领域知识或数据量。
  • 框架在极端动态环境下的泛化性未充分讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Accurately predicting opponents' behavior from interactions is a fundamental capability for large language model (LLM)-based agents in multi-agent and game-theoretic environments. Existing approaches often entangle opponent modeling with prediction, relying on implicit contextual reasoning and limiting adaptability in dynamic interactions. To this end, we propose Structured Opponent Modeling (SOM), a two-stage opponent modeling framework that distinctly separates opponent model construction and opponent prediction. At the construction stage, SOM employs a Structural Causal Model (SCM), a graph-based formalism for representing dependencies among variables, to capture directed links between opponents' observations and actions, yielding an explicit and structured opponent representation. At the prediction stage, the LLM performs structured reasoning along clear pathways derived from the SCM, improving both prediction accuracy and stability. Extensive experiments on diverse multi-agent benchmarks demonstrate that SOM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art LLM-based reasoning baselines, enabling more accurate and adaptable strategic decision-making in complex and dynamic multi-agent interactions.

Tools as Continuous Flow for Evolving Agentic Reasoning

High 2605.07339
Tairan Huang, Siyu Shang, Qiang Chen, Xiu Su, Yi Chen
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：FlowAgent 将工具链建模为语义空间中的连续轨迹生成，提升长程推理的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 工具编排方法采用逐步范式，缺乏全局视角，导致长程任务中错误累积且难以泛化到未见工具。

❓解决问题

如何克服逐步工具链的局部性，实现全局连贯且鲁棒的长程工具推理。

🔎现象分析

逐步范式在长程推理中错误累积，且对未见工具泛化受限。

🛠️主要方法

提出 FlowAgent，利用条件流匹配在语义空间中生成连续潜在轨迹，将工具链重构为连续流。

📊实验结果

在长程推理任务上，FlowAgent 展现出优越的鲁棒性和适应性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 FlowAgent，将工具链建模为连续轨迹生成，提供全局规划视角。
  • 引入首个计划级闭环基准，用于动态真实环境中的计划级智能体推理评估。
  • 理论上证明了连续公式的效用收敛界、鲁棒泛化和误差衰减保证。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量语义空间表示。
  • 连续轨迹生成的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in orchestrating tools for reasoning tasks. However, existing methods rely on a step-wise paradigm that lacks a global perspective, which causes error accumulation over long horizons and restricts generalization to unseen tools. To overcome these limitations, we propose Tools as Continuous Flow for Evolving Agentic Reasoning (FlowAgent), which reconceptualizes tool chaining as continuous trajectory generation within a semantic space. To systematically evaluate this paradigm, we introduce the first plan-level closed-loop benchmark dedicated to plan-level agentic reasoning in dynamic real-world environments. Specifically, the proposed FlowAgent leverages conditional flow matching to generate continuous latent trajectories, providing a global planning perspective to ensure coherent and robust tool execution. Theoretically, we establish formal bounds on utility convergence and prove that our continuous formulation fundamentally guarantees robust generalization and error attenuation. Empirical evaluations show that FlowAgent achieves superior robustness and adaptability in long-horizon reasoning tasks.

GASim: A Graph-Accelerated Hybrid Framework for Social Simulation

High 2605.07692
Xuan Zhou, Yanhui Sun, Hantao Yao, Allen He, Yongdong Zhang, Wu Liu
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出图加速混合多智能体框架 GASim，通过图优化记忆和图消息传递实现大规模社会模拟的 9.94 倍加速。
🎯研究动机

大规模社会模拟器对研究复杂社会模式至关重要，但现有混合方法（LLM 智能体 + 数值 ABM）因昂贵的记忆检索和顺序 ABM 执行导致高延迟，亟需加速。

❓解决问题

如何降低混合社会模拟框架的高延迟和成本，同时保持与现实世界趋势的一致性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 GASim 框架，包含三个组件：图优化记忆（GOM）用轻量级传播替代 LLM 检索；图消息传递（GMP）用并行更新替代顺序 ABM 执行；熵驱动分组（EDG）动态识别核心智能体以协调混合分区。

📊实验结果

在大型社会模拟任务上，GASim 相比传统混合框架实现 9.94 倍加速，token 消耗低于基线 20%，且与现实舆论趋势保持强对齐。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出图加速混合框架 GASim，实现 9.94 倍端到端加速和 80% 的 token 节省。
  • 引入图优化记忆和图消息传递，替代传统 LLM 检索和顺序 ABM 执行。
  • 提出熵驱动分组方法，动态识别核心智能体以优化混合分区。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖图结构质量，稀疏图设计可能限制某些场景下的信息传播。
  • 熵驱动分组可能在高动态环境中引入额外计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large-scale social simulators are essential for studying complex social patterns. Prior work explores hybrid methods to scale up simulations, combining large language models (LLM)-based agents with numerical agent-based models (ABM). However, this incurs high latency due to expensive memory retrieval and sequential ABM execution. To address this challenge, we propose GASim, a graph-accelerated hybrid multi-agent framework for large-scale social simulations. For core agents driven by LLM, GASim introduces Graph-Optimized Memory (GOM) to replace intensive LLM-based retrieval pipelines with lightweight propagation over a sparse memory graph. For the majority of ordinary agents, GASim employs Graph Message Passing (GMP), substituting sequential ABM execution with parallel updates by fine-grained feature aggregation and Graph Attention Network. We further introduce Entropy-Driven Grouping (EDG) that coordinates this hybrid partitioning, leveraging information entropy to dynamically identify emergent core agents situated in information-diverse neighborhoods. Extensive experiments show that GASim not only delivers a substantial 9.94-fold end-to-end speedup over the traditional hybrid framework but also consumes less than 20% of baseline tokens, significantly reducing costs while preserving strong alignment with real-world public opinion trends. Our code is available at this https URL .

TraceFix: Repairing Agent Coordination Protocols with TLA+ Counterexamples

High 2605.07935
Shuren Xia, Qiwei Li, Taqiya Ehsan, Jorge Ortiz
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：TraceFix 使用 TLA+ 模型检查器自动修复 LLM 多智能体协调协议，实现零死锁 / 活锁的高效任务执行。
🎯研究动机

LLM 多智能体协调中，协议容易产生死锁、活锁等错误，手动调试困难且耗时，需要自动化验证与修复方法。

❓解决问题

如何自动生成并验证 LLM 多智能体协调协议，确保其无死锁 / 活锁等错误，并高效执行任务。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析，但实验表明未验证的协议在运行时易出现死锁 / 活锁（31.1%），而 TLC 验证可将其降至 14.1%。

🛠️主要方法

TraceFix 采用验证优先的流水线：从任务描述合成协议拓扑作为结构化中间表示（IR），生成 PlusCal 协调逻辑，利用 TLA+ 模型检查器（TLC）的反例迭代修复协议直至验证通过，然后将验证后的进程体编译为智能体系统提示，并在运行时监控下执行。

📊实验结果

在 48 个任务（16 个场景族）上评估，所有任务达到完全 TLC 验证；62.5% 首次通过，最多 4 次修复。状态空间跨越六个数量级，验证均在 60 秒内完成。3,456 次运行时比较显示拓扑监控执行平均任务完成率 89.4%（完全完成 81.5%），验证协议在模型能力降低时性能下降速度约为纯提示和纯聊天基线的一半。消融实验显示 TLC 验证协议将死锁 / 活锁从 31.1% 降至 14.1%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 TraceFix，首个将 TLA+ 模型检查用于 LLM 多智能体协调协议自动修复的验证优先流水线。
  • 在 48 个任务上实现完全 TLC 验证，62.5% 一次通过，所有任务在 60 秒内完成验证。
  • 运行时实验表明，拓扑监控执行达到最高任务完成率（89.4%），且验证协议在模型能力降低时性能下降速度仅为基线的一半。
  • 消融实验显示 TLC 验证协议将死锁 / 活锁从 31.1% 降至 14.1%，在故障注入下差异最大。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 TLA+ 模型检查，可能对复杂协议有状态空间爆炸风险。
  • 仅针对协调协议，未涉及智能体内部推理错误。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present TraceFix, a verification-first pipeline for Large Language Model (LLM) multi-agent coordination. An agent synthesizes a protocol topology as a structured intermediate representation (IR) from a task description, generates PlusCal coordination logic, and iteratively repairs the protocol using counterexamples from the TLA+ model checker (TLC) until verification succeeds. Verified process bodies are compiled into per-agent system prompts and executed under a runtime monitor that rejects out-of-topology coordination operations. On 48 tasks spanning 16 scenario families, all tasks reach full TLC verification; 62.5% pass on the first attempt and none requires more than four repair iterations. State spaces span six orders of magnitude yet verification completes in under 60 s for every task. A 3,456-run runtime comparison shows that topology-monitored execution achieves the highest task completion (89.4% average, 81.5% full) and that runtimes using the verified protocol degrade at roughly half the rate of prompt-only and chat-only baselines when model capability is reduced. A paired ablation under a fixed runtime shows that TLC-verified protocols cut deadlock/livelock (DL/LL) from 31.1% to 14.1%, with the largest separation under fault injection.

Learning CLI Agents with Structured Action Credit under Selective Observation

High 2605.08013
Haoyang Su, Ying Wen
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出σ-Reveal 和 A³方法，分别解决 CLI 智能体在部分观察下的选择性观察和稀疏奖励下的结构化动作信用分配问题。
🎯研究动机

CLI 智能体在与文件系统和命令行程序交互时，面临部分观察和稀疏奖励两大瓶颈，现有 RL 方法未充分利用 CLI 动作的结构化属性。

❓解决问题

解决 CLI 智能体在部分观察下识别任务相关证据，以及将稀疏终端奖励分配给长轨迹中多个动作的信用分配问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出 CLI 学习耦合了两个瓶颈：一是智能体需从部分观察中识别任务相关证据；二是稀疏的终端奖励难以分配给长轨迹中的动作。

🛠️主要方法

提出σ-Reveal（推理时选择 token 预算上下文）和 A³（基于 AST 动作子链残差和轨迹边界的回合级优势分配方法）。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出σ-Reveal 机制，在推理时选择 token 预算上下文以缓解部分观察问题。
  • 提出 A³方法，利用 AST 动作子链残差和轨迹边界进行结构化信用分配。
  • 构建 ShellOps 数据集，用于 CLI 任务在仓库环境中的可验证评估。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 AST 解析的准确性，对非结构化 CLI 命令效果有限。
  • σ-Reveal 的 token 预算选择可能引入额外推理开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Command line interface (CLI) agents are emerging as a practical paradigm for agent-computer interaction over evolving filesystems, executable command line programs, and online execution feedback. Recent work has used reinforcement learning (RL) to learn these interaction abilities from verifiable task feedback, yet few methods exploit the native structured attributes of CLI actions as learning signals. Beyond this underused action structure, CLI learning also couples two bottlenecks for coding agents. First, the agent must identify task-relevant evidence in a large codebase from partial observations. Second, sparse terminal rewards must be assigned to the actions that shape a long multi-turn trajectory. We study these bottlenecks through shell-driven information extraction and file editing tasks. For selective observation, we introduce $\sigma$-Reveal, an inference-time mechanism that selects token-budgeted context for the same CLI. For credit assignment, we propose Action Advantage Assignment ($\mathrm{A}^3$), a native agentic RL method that preserves the algorithmic complexity of standard agentic RL. $\mathrm{A}^3$ constructs turn-level advantages from episode-level relative feedback, abstract syntax tree (AST) based action sub-chain residuals, and tree-level trajectory margins. To further evaluate this problem setting, we construct ShellOps, a verifiable dataset suite covering CLI tasks in repository environments.

The Memory Curse: How Expanded Recall Erodes Cooperative Intent in LLM Agents

High 2605.08060
Jiayuan Liu, Tianqin Li, Shiyi Du, Xin Luo, Haoxuan Zeng, Emanuel Tewolde, Tai Sing Lee, Tonghan Wang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：扩展上下文窗口会系统性地降低 LLM 智能体在多智能体社会困境中的合作意图，称为“记忆诅咒”。
🎯研究动机

上下文窗口扩展通常被视为 LLM 能力的直接提升，但其在多智能体交互中的负面影响未被充分研究。

❓解决问题

研究扩展历史记忆如何影响 LLM 智能体在重复社会困境中的合作行为。

🔎现象分析

在 7 个 LLM 和 4 个游戏中，扩展历史记忆在 28 个模型 - 游戏设置中的 18 个中降低了合作，称为“记忆诅咒”。通过分析 378,000 条推理轨迹，发现合作崩溃与前瞻性意图的侵蚀相关，而非偏执增加。

🛠️主要方法

通过词汇分析、记忆清理（用合成合作记录替换可见历史）、消融思维链推理等方法隔离机制。

📊实验结果

在 7 个 LLM 和 4 个游戏上进行了超过 500 轮实验，分析了 378,000 条推理轨迹，并进行了记忆清理和思维链消融实验。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现并命名了“记忆诅咒”现象，即扩展上下文窗口在多智能体社会困境中系统性地降低合作。
  • 通过词汇分析和微调实验证明合作崩溃源于前瞻性意图的侵蚀。
  • 证明记忆内容而非长度是触发合作崩溃的关键，且思维链推理会放大该效应。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅研究了社会困境游戏，可能不适用于其他多智能体场景。
  • 未探索不同记忆长度阈值的影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Context window expansion is often treated as a straightforward capability upgrade for LLMs, but we find it systematically fails in multi-agent social dilemmas. Across 7 LLMs and 4 games over 500 rounds, expanding accessible history degrades cooperation in 18 of 28 model--game settings, a pattern we term the memory curse. We isolate the underlying mechanism through three analyses. First, lexical analysis of 378,000 reasoning traces associates this breakdown with eroding forward-looking intent rather than rising paranoia. We validate this using targeted fine-tuning as a cognitive probe: a LoRA adapter trained exclusively on forward-looking traces mitigates the decay and transfers zero-shot to distinct games. Second, memory sanitization holds prompt length fixed while replacing visible history with synthetic cooperative records, which restores cooperation substantially, proving the trigger is memory content, not length alone. Finally, ablating explicit Chain-of-Thought reasoning often reduces the collapse, showing that deliberation paradoxically amplifies the memory curse. Together, these results recast memory as an active determinant of multi-agent behavior: longer recall can either destabilize or support cooperation depending on the reasoning patterns it elicits.

From Storage to Experience: A Survey on the Evolution of LLM Agent Memory Mechanisms

High 2605.06716
Jinghao Luo, Yuchen Tian, Chuxue Cao, Ziyang Luo, Hongzhan Lin, Kaixin Li, Chuyi Kong, Ruichao Yang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：综述 LLM 智能体记忆机制从存储到经验的演化三阶段框架。
🎯研究动机

当前 LLM 智能体记忆研究在操作系统工程与认知科学之间碎片化，缺乏统一视角和演化脉络，阻碍技术整合与下一代系统设计。

❓解决问题

如何系统化梳理并形式化 LLM 智能体记忆机制的发展路径，弥合不同研究视角之间的理论鸿沟。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出三阶段演化框架：存储（轨迹保存）、反思（轨迹精炼）、经验（轨迹抽象），并分析长程一致性、动态环境挑战、持续学习目标三大驱动力，重点探讨经验阶段的前瞻探索与跨轨迹抽象机制。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次提出 LLM 智能体记忆机制的三阶段演化框架（存储→反思→经验），提供统一视角。
  • 识别并分析了驱动记忆演化的三个核心因素：长程一致性、动态环境挑战、持续学习目标。
  • 深入探讨了经验阶段的前瞻探索与跨轨迹抽象两种变革性机制，为下一代智能体设计提供原则与路线图。
⚠️方法局限
  • 作为综述，未提供实证验证或定量比较。
  • 框架的通用性和可操作性需在具体系统中进一步检验。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents have fundamentally reshaped artificial intelligence by integrating external tools and planning capabilities. While memory mechanisms have emerged as the architectural cornerstone of these systems, current research remains fragmented, oscillating between operating system engineering and cognitive science. This theoretical divide prevents a unified view of technological synthesis and a coherent evolutionary perspective. To bridge this gap, this survey proposes a novel evolutionary framework for LLM agent memory mechanisms, formalizing the development process into three stages: Storage (trajectory preservation), Reflection (trajectory refinement), and Experience (trajectory abstraction). We first formally define these three stages before analyzing the three core drivers of this evolution: the necessity for long-range consistency, the challenges in dynamic environments, and the ultimate goal of continual learning. Furthermore, we specifically explore two transformative mechanisms in the frontier Experience stage: proactive exploration and cross-trajectory abstraction. By synthesizing these disparate views, this work offers robust design principles and a clear roadmap for the development of next-generation LLM agents.

Agentic Coding Needs Proactivity, Not Just Autonomy

High 2605.06717
Nghi D. Q. Bui, Georgios Evangelopoulos
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：提出编码智能体需要从自主性转向主动性，并定义了主动性层次与评估指标。
🎯研究动机

当前编码智能体已具备自主执行任务的能力，但缺乏主动感知上下文、跨工具连接信号、决定何时中断以及跨会话保持偏好的能力，导致其行为可能只是活跃而非有用。

❓解决问题

如何定义和评估编码智能体的主动性，以及如何设计能够主动提供有用洞察而非被动响应的智能体。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，现有编码智能体主要关注自主性（autonomy），即独立执行指令的能力，但缺乏主动性（proactivity），即主动发现相关变化、连接信号、决定何时中断并适应反馈的能力。

🛠️主要方法

提出一个三层主动性分类法（反应式、计划式、情境感知），并基于混合主动交互原则，定义洞察策略（insight policy）作为核心，同时设计主动用户模拟协议，包含三个评估目标：洞察决策质量（IDQ）、上下文接地分数（CGS）和学习提升（Learning Lift）。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 明确区分了编码智能体的自主性与主动性，并定义了主动性的三层分类法。
  • 提出了评估主动编码智能体的三个具体指标：IDQ、CGS 和 Learning Lift。
⚠️方法局限
  • 提出的分类法和评估指标尚未在真实场景中验证。
  • 主动用户模拟协议可能无法完全模拟真实开发者的复杂行为。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Coding agents are rapidly changing the landscape of software development, moving from inline completion to autonomous systems that edit repositories, open pull requests, respond to issues, and run scheduled or webhook triggered routines across the development life cycle. The next generation is increasingly described as proactive and long-horizon: agents should notice relevant changes before the developer asks, connect signals across tools, decide when to interrupt, and carry preferences across sessions. Yet the field still lacks a clear account of what proactivity means for software development, how it differs from autonomy, what acceptance criteria proactive long-horizon tasks should satisfy, and which metrics determine whether unsolicited agent behavior is useful rather than merely active. Proactive coding agents should be evaluated by the quality and improvement of their insight policy: the policy that decides what matters next, what evidence supports it, whether to show it, and how to adapt after feedback. This view is grounded in the principles of mixed initiative interaction. We propose a three level taxonomy of proactivity (Reactive, Scheduled, and Situation Aware), compare contemporary coding agents against five practical criteria, and sketch an active user simulation protocol with three evaluation targets: Insight Decision Quality (IDQ), Context Grounding Score (CGS), and Learning Lift

Self-Programmed Execution for Language-Model Agents

High 2605.06898
Luke J. O'Connor
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出自编程执行（SPE）架构，让语言模型自身作为编排程序，无需固定策略即可完成复杂智能体任务。
🎯研究动机

现有语言模型智能体依赖固定的编排程序来管理状态转换，限制了灵活性和自主性。

❓解决问题

如何让语言模型在没有固定编排策略的情况下自主执行智能体任务。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出自编程执行（SPE）架构，并设计基于 Lisp 的语言 Spell，使程序能自编辑和自求值，且模型调用等副作用在重求值时不会重放。

📊实验结果

使用现有前沿模型（未针对 SPE 或 Spell 训练）进行实验，证明能完成挑战性智能体任务。摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 SPE 架构，让模型完成本身作为编排程序。
  • 设计 Spell 语言支持自修改程序且避免副作用重放。
  • 实验证明前沿模型无需训练即可在 SPE 模式下完成复杂智能体任务。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅测试了现有模型，未训练专门模型。
  • Spell 语言可能增加上下文长度和计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

At the heart of existing language model agents is a fixed orchestrator program responsible for the state transition between consecutive turns. This paper introduces self-programmed execution (SPE), an agent architecture in which the model completion is itself the orchestrator program, and the harness evaluates this program but does not impose its own orchestration policy. I formalize this idea using agentic machines: an SPE state is one from which a model completion can load any state of an embedded copy of the machine, meaning that it is subject to no fixed turn-to-turn orchestration policy. Realizing SPE in practice is nontrivial because the same data is both model context and executable program. I therefore introduce Spell, a Lisp-based language in which programs can edit and re-evaluate themselves, and effectful expressions like model invocations are structured such that re-evaluating an edited program does not replay its side effects. Experiments with existing models, not trained for SPE or Spell, show that frontier models can operate in this regime and accomplish challenging agentic tasks. These results demonstrate how an LM can act as an agent without any fixed orchestration policy, and they raise the question of what self-orchestration strategies might be learned by a model trained for self-programmed execution. Code is available at this https URL .

Same Signal, Opposite Meaning: Direction-Informed Adaptive Learning for LLM Agents

High 2605.06908
Ziming Li, Jiatan Huang, Xiaoguang Guo, Guilin Wang, Chuxu Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出方向感知自适应学习（DIAL），通过反事实探索学习信号方向，解决 LLM Agent 测试时计算门控中信号方向不稳定的问题。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM Agent 自适应计算门控方法假设门控信号与计算价值方向固定，但实际中同一信号在不同环境和骨干模型下可能指示相反效用，导致门控失效甚至恶化性能。

❓解决问题

如何解决 LLM Agent 测试时计算门控中信号方向不稳定（同一信号在不同设置下预测收益或损害）的问题，实现跨环境和骨干模型的可靠门控。

🔎现象分析

摘要观察到同一信号（如不确定性）在不同环境和骨干模型下可能预测 rollout 收益或损害，方向反转，且固定方向门控会精确选择有害状态，恶化性能。这源于计算需求与计算适用性的区分：高不确定性可能表示决策困难（需 rollout）或干预不适用（rollout 无益）。

🛠️主要方法

提出 DIAL（Direction-Informed Adaptive Learning），一种稀疏门控，通过信号无关的反事实探索训练，学习每个（环境，骨干）下状态特征的效用方向。

📊实验结果

在六个环境和三个骨干模型上，DIAL 相比固定方向基线取得了更强的整体成功 - 成本权衡。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示 LLM Agent 自适应计算门控中信号方向不稳定的现象及其根源（计算需求与计算适用性的区分）。
  • 提出 DIAL 方法，通过反事实探索学习信号方向，实现跨环境和骨干模型的可靠门控。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖反事实探索的充分性，在探索不足时方向学习可能不准确。
  • 方法在更多样化的环境和骨干模型上的泛化性有待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Adaptive test-time compute for LLM agents aims to invoke extra computation only when it improves performance. Existing methods typically use confidence-, uncertainty-, or difficulty-based gates, assuming a fixed direction from the gating signal through compute need to the value of computation. This makes gating a utility-calibration problem: gating signals should align with whether extra computation improves the final outcome over the base policy. We show that this alignment is unstable: the same signal predicts rollout benefit in one setting and rollout harm in another, with reversals across environments and backbones even when the task is fixed. Wrong-direction gates can therefore worsen performance by precisely selecting harmful states. This reversal reflects a deeper distinction between compute need and compute suitability: a high uncertainty signal may indicate decision-difficult states where rollouts help compare alternatives, or intervention-unsuitable states where the current context does not support useful rollout-based improvement. Under this two-source model, fixed-direction gates are unreliable across heterogeneous settings. To address this, we propose DIAL (Direction-Informed Adaptive Learning), a sparse gate trained from signal-agnostic counterfactual exploration to learn the utility direction of state features per (environment, backbone). Across six environments and three backbones, DIAL yields a stronger overall success-cost trade-off than fixed-direction baselines.

Learning and Reusing Policy Decompositions for Hierarchical Generalized Planning with LLM Agents

High 2605.06957
Shirin Sohrabi, Haritha Ananthakrishnan, Harsha Kokel, Kavitha Srinivas, Michael Katz
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：结合广义规划与层次任务分解，通过动态学习可复用组件库提升 LLM Agent 在复杂任务中的准确率和泛化能力。
🎯研究动机

LLM Agent 在复杂任务中常因缺乏结构化规划能力而表现不佳，现有方法难以有效复用成功经验，导致泛化性差和效率低下。

❓解决问题

如何让 LLM Agent 自动学习并复用任务分解中的策略组件，以提升在未见任务上的泛化能力和执行效率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 HCL-GP 方法，通过自动层次分解学习参数化策略，提取可复用组件并构建组件库，利用语义搜索高效检索以组合生成新策略。

📊实验结果

在 AppWorld 基准上评估，正常任务准确率 98.2%，挑战任务（未见应用）准确率 97.8%，相比静态合成提升 15.8 个百分点；开源模型动态复用成功率达 62.5%，而无复用接近零。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出动态策略学习方法，结合广义规划与层次分解，实现 LLM Agent 的组件化策略学习与复用。
  • 在 AppWorld 基准上达到 98.2% 正常任务准确率和 97.8% 挑战任务准确率，开源模型成功率从近零提升至 62.5%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖任务分解的自动化和组件库的初始构建，可能对全新领域适应性有限。
  • 语义搜索的检索效率可能随组件库规模增大而下降。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present a dynamic policy-learning approach that combines generalized planning and hierarchical task decomposition for LLM-based agents. Our method, Hierarchical Component Learning for Generalized Policies (HCL-GP ), learns parameterized policies that generalize across task instances and automatically extracts reusable components from successful executions, organizing them into a component library for compositional policy generation. We address three challenges: (1) learning components through automated decomposition, (2) generalizing components to maximize reuse, and (3) efficient retrieval via semantic search.
