Evaluated on the AppWorld benchmark, our approach achieves 98.2% accuracy on normal tasks and 97.8% on challenge tasks with unseen applications, improving 15.8 points over static synthesis on challenging scenarios. For open-source models, dynamic reuse enables 62.5% success versus near-zero without reuse. This demonstrates that classical planning concepts can be effectively integrated with LLM agents for improved accuracy and efficiency.

The Context Gathering Decision Process: A POMDP Framework for Agentic Search

High 2605.07042
Chinmaya Kausik, Adith Swaminathan, Nathan Kallus
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：将 LLM 智能体搜索形式化为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（CGDP），通过谓词信念状态和程序化终止门控提升多跳推理和效率。
🎯研究动机

LLM 智能体在复杂环境（如大型代码库、企业数据库）中面临上下文窗口限制，导致工作记忆退化为有损表示，引发冗余循环和过早停止。

❓解决问题

如何形式化并解决 LLM 智能体在受限上下文下的迭代搜索问题，避免冗余工作和过早终止。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，缺乏显式基础设施时，智能体的工作记忆会退化为有损的搜索状态表示，导致重复循环和过早停止。

🛠️主要方法

提出上下文收集决策过程（CGDP）框架，将 LLM 行为建模为近似 Thompson 采样；引入基于谓词的信念状态和程序化终止门控。

📊实验结果

在四种方法和三个问答领域上验证，谓词信念状态提升多跳推理最多 11.4%，程序化终止门控节省最多 39% token 且不降低性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化 LLM 智能体搜索为 CGDP，提供理论框架
  • 提出谓词信念状态和程序化终止门控两种即插即用干预方法
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定谓词设计
  • 未讨论跨领域泛化性
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Language Model (LLM) agents are deployed in complex environments -- such as massive codebases, enterprise databases, and conversational histories -- where the relevant state far exceeds their context windows. To navigate these spaces, an agent must iteratively explore the environment to find relevant information. However, without explicit infrastructure, an agent's working memory can degrade into lossy representations of the search state, resulting in redundant work (e.g. repetitive looping) and premature stopping. In this work, we formalize this challenge as the Context Gathering Decision Process (CGDP), a specialized Partially Observable Markov Decision Process, where an agent's objective is to adaptively refine its belief state to isolate the necessary information for a task. We model an LLM's behavior as approximate Thompson Sampling within this CGDP, and introduce a predicate-based method that decomposes an LLM's implicit search into explicit and modular operations. We then derive two plug-and-play interventions for iterative LLM agents: a persistent, predicate-based belief state that bounds context while preserving multi-hop reasoning, and a programmatic exhaustion gate that halts unproductive search without premature stopping. Across four methods and three question-answering domains, we empirically validate that replacing an LLM's implicit state with our CGDP-motivated belief state improves multi-hop reasoning by up to $11.4\%$; while the modular programmatic exhaustion detection saves up to $39\%$ of tokens without any degradation in agent performance. Ultimately, we argue that framing the LLM agent loop as a CGDP can guide the design of modular, non-interfering improvements to agentic search harnesses.

CASCADE: Case-Based Continual Adaptation for Large Language Models During Deployment

High 2605.06702
Siyuan Guo, Yali Du, Hechang Chen, Yi Chang, Jun Wang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 CASCADE 框架，通过案例式持续适应让 LLM 在部署阶段无需修改参数即可从经验中学习，在 16 个任务上平均提升 20.9% 成功率。
🎯研究动机

当前 LLM 生命周期中训练与部署严格分离，部署后学习停止，这与自然智能的持续适应能力形成对比，限制了 LLM 在动态环境中的表现。

❓解决问题

如何在部署阶段让 LLM 无需修改参数即可从交互经验中持续改进，实现部署时学习（DTL）。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

CASCADE 框架：为 LLM 代理配备显式、演化的情景记忆，将经验重用形式化为上下文赌博机问题，实现探索 - 利用权衡并保证无遗憾，从而积累、选择和精炼任务相关案例。

📊实验结果

在 16 个任务（医疗诊断、法律分析、代码生成、网络搜索、工具使用、具身交互）上评估，CASCADE 相比零样本提示提升 20.9% 宏平均成功率，并持续优于基于梯度和基于记忆的基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化部署时学习（DTL）作为 LLM 生命周期的第三阶段。
  • 提出 CASCADE 框架，结合情景记忆与上下文赌博机，提供理论保证。
  • 在 16 个多样化任务上验证有效性，平均成功率提升 20.9%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量初始案例库。
  • 上下文赌博机假设可能不适用于所有复杂任务。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models (LLMs) have become a central foundation of modern artificial intelligence, yet their lifecycle remains constrained by a rigid separation between training and deployment, after which learning effectively ceases. This limitation contrasts with natural intelligence, which continually adapts through interaction with its environment. In this paper, we formalise deployment-time learning (DTL) as the third stage in the LLM lifecycle that enables LLM agents to improve from experience during deployment without modifying model parameters. We present CASCADE (CASe-based Continual Adaptation during DEployment), a general and principled framework that equips LLM agents with an explicit, evolving episodic memory. CASCADE formulates experience reuse as a contextual bandit problem, enabling principled exploration-exploitation trade-offs and establishing no-regret guarantees over long-term interactions. This design allows agents to accumulate, select, and refine task-relevant cases, transforming past experience into actionable knowledge. Across 16 diverse tasks spanning medical diagnosis, legal analysis, code generation, web search, tool use, and embodied interaction, CASCADE improves macro-averaged success rate by 20.9% over zero-shot prompting while consistently outperforming gradient-based and memory-based baselines. By reframing deployment as an adaptive learning process, this work establishes a foundation for continually improving AI systems.

Cognitive Agent Compilation for Explicit Problem Solver Modeling

Medium 2605.07040
Hyeongdon Moon, Carolyn Rosé, John Stamper
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出认知智能体编译框架，将 LLM 问题求解知识编译为显式可检查的智能体，用于教育场景。
🎯研究动机

教育系统需要可检查和可编辑的知识状态，但 LLM 难以约束且不透明，无法满足教育场景对显式技能、误解和策略的需求。

❓解决问题

如何将 LLM 的问题求解知识转化为显式、可检查、可编辑的智能体模型，以支持教育应用中的可控学习。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出认知智能体编译（CAC）框架，使用强教师 LLM 将问题求解知识编译为显式目标智能体，分离知识表示、问题求解策略、验证与更新规则。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CAC 框架，实现从 LLM 到显式可检查智能体的知识编译。
  • 通过小语言模型实现概念验证，揭示显式控制与可扩展泛化之间的设计权衡。
⚠️方法局限
  • 当前仅为早期概念验证，可能在大规模任务上泛化能力有限。
  • 显式控制与可扩展性之间的权衡可能限制实际应用。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models (LLMs) are widely used for tutoring, feedback generation, and content creation, but their broad pretraining makes them hard to constrain and poor substitutes for controllable learners. Educational systems often require inspectable and editable knowledge states: educators want to know what a system assumes the learner knows, and learners benefit when the system can justify actions in terms of explicit skills, misconceptions, and strategies. Inspired by cognitive architectures, we propose Cognitive Agent Compilation (CAC), a framework that uses a strong teacher LLM to compile problem-solving knowledge into an explicit target agent. CAC separates (i) knowledge representation, (ii) problem-solving policy, and (iii) verification and update rules, with the goal of making bounded problem solving more inspectable and editable in educational settings. We present an early proof of concept implemented with Small Language Models that surfaces key design trade-offs, particularly between explicit control and scalable generalization, and positions CAC as an initial step toward bounded-knowledge AI for educational applications.

模型架构 9 篇

Memory-Efficient Looped Transformer: Decoupling Compute from Memory in Looped Language Models

High 2605.07721
Victor Conchello Vendrell, Arnau Padres Masdemont, Niccolò Grillo, Jordi Ros-Giralt, Arash Behboodi, Fabio Valerio Massoli
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出 MELT 架构，通过共享 KV 缓存和门控更新机制，将循环语言模型的推理深度与内存消耗解耦，实现恒定内存的迭代推理。
🎯研究动机

循环 LLM 架构（如 Ouro）通过迭代更新内部表示提升推理能力，但标准 KV 缓存随推理深度线性增长内存，限制了实际可扩展性。

❓解决问题

循环语言模型中推理深度增加导致内存消耗线性增长，需要解耦计算与内存。

🔎现象分析

标准 KV 缓存每层每循环独立，导致内存随推理深度线性增长。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MELT 架构，每层维护一个跨循环共享的 KV 缓存，通过可学习门控机制随时间更新；采用分块训练两阶段流程：插值过渡和注意力对齐蒸馏，从 LoopLM 初始模型微调得到 MELT。

📊实验结果

从预训练 Ouro 参数微调的 MELT 模型在性能上优于同等规模标准 LLM，同时内存占用远小于 Ouro。摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MELT 架构，实现恒定内存的迭代推理，内存消耗与推理深度解耦。
  • 设计分块训练两阶段流程（插值过渡和注意力对齐蒸馏），实现从 LoopLM 到 MELT 的稳定高效微调。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定循环架构（如 Ouro），泛化性待验证。
  • 分块训练流程可能增加训练复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recurrent LLM architectures have emerged as a promising approach for improving reasoning, as they enable multi-step computation in the embedding space without generating intermediate tokens. Models such as Ouro perform reasoning by iteratively updating internal representations while retaining a standard Key-Value (KV) cache across iterations, causing memory consumption to grow linearly with reasoning depth. Consequently, increasing the number of reasoning iterations can lead to prohibitive memory usage, limiting the practical scalability of such architectures. In this work, we propose Memory-Efficient Looped Transformer (MELT), a novel architecture that decouples reasoning depth from memory consumption. Instead of using a standard KV cache per layer and loop, MELT maintains a single KV cache per layer that is shared across reasoning loops. This cache is updated over time via a learnable gating mechanism. To enable stable and efficient training under this architecture, we propose to train MELT using chunk-wise training in a two phase procedure: interpolated transition, followed by attention-aligned distillation, both from the LoopLM starting model to MELT. Empirically, we show that MELT models fine-tuned from pretrained Ouro parameters outperform standard LLMs of comparable size, while maintaining a memory footprint comparable to those models and dramatically smaller than Ouro's. Overall, MELT achieves constant-memory iterative reasoning without sacrificing LoopLM performance, using only a lightweight post-training procedure.

Don't Retrain, Align: Adapting Autoregressive LMs to Diffusion LMs via Representation Alignment

High 2605.06885
Fred Zhangzhi Peng, Alexis Fox, Anru R. Zhang, Alexander Tong
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：通过表示对齐将自回归语言模型转换为扩散语言模型，实现训练加速。
🎯研究动机

扩散语言模型在非顺序生成和双向编辑方面具有优势，但现有转换方法主要依赖目标函数和注意力层面的修改，忽略了自回归模型内部表示几何结构的保留。

❓解决问题

如何有效保留自回归预训练模型的语义表示结构，以加速自回归到扩散语言模型的转换训练。

🔎现象分析

摘要假设自回归预训练学习的语义结构可以跨生成顺序迁移，扩散语言模型训练应视为重新学习解码路径而非重新学习语言表示。

🛠️主要方法

提出 REPR-ALIGN，在每一层通过余弦相似度对齐扩散语言模型的隐藏状态与冻结的自回归模型，同时优化标准掩码去噪目标。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出表示对齐目标 REPR-ALIGN，无需适配器或架构修改即可将自回归模型转换为扩散模型
  • 实验表明该方法在低数据场景下实现高达 4 倍训练加速
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅适用于相同架构的自回归和扩散模型
  • 对齐依赖余弦相似度，可能不适用于更复杂的表示结构
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Diffusion language models (DLMs) have recently demonstrated capabilities that complement standard autoregressive (AR) models, particularly in non-sequential generation and bidirectional editing. Although recent work has shown that pretrained autoregressive checkpoints can be converted into diffusion language models, existing recipes primarily transfer parameters through continued denoising training with objective- and attention-level modifications. We instead ask whether the internal representation geometry learned by next-token prediction can be explicitly preserved during AR-to-DLM conversion. We hypothesize that much of the semantic structure learned by AR pretraining can transfer across generation orders, and thus DLM training should be viewed as relearning the decoding path rather than relearning language representations. To investigate this, we introduce REPR-ALIGN, a representation alignment objective that adapts a bidirectional masked diffusion model to reuse representations from a pretrained AR model of identical architecture. Concretely, we align the hidden states of the DLM to the frozen AR model at every layer using cosine similarity, while optimizing the standard masked denoising objective. This simple alignment, with no adapters and no architectural changes beyond the attention mask, yields up to 4x training acceleration in our setting and is particularly effective in low-data regimes. Our results suggest that linguistic representations can transfer across generation order, and that representation alignment provides a simple and effective technique for training diffusion language models. Code is available at this https URL .

Adaptive Memory Decay for Log-Linear Attention

High 2605.06946
Yaxita Amin, Helen Zichen Li, Mengfan Zhang, Samet Ayhan
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：通过输入依赖的自适应衰减参数提升对数线性注意力的长程记忆能力。
🎯研究动机

序列模型在记忆容量与计算效率之间存在根本性权衡：Transformer 二次成本实现表达性上下文建模，而线性注意力和状态空间模型通过压缩上下文到固定大小隐藏状态实现线性时间，但本质上限制了召回能力。对数线性注意力通过 Fenwick 树层次结构组织记忆，以对数线性计算成本实现隐藏状态对数增长，但其记忆衰减参数固定且与输入无关，导致不必要的刚性。

❓解决问题

对数线性注意力中固定且与输入无关的记忆衰减参数限制了模型对内容的自适应能力，尤其在长程记忆场景下性能退化。

🔎现象分析

固定衰减参数在长程记忆设置中性能退化甚至完全崩溃，而输入依赖的衰减能持续提升性能。

🛠️主要方法

通过轻量级两层 MLP 从输入学习每个 token 每个层次的衰减参数，使用 softplus 激活实现独立缩放，避免 softmax 引入的层次间竞争。

📊实验结果

在关联召回、选择性复制和语言建模任务上评估，输入依赖衰减一致优于基线，尤其在长程记忆设置中增益最大。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出输入依赖的自适应记忆衰减机制，通过轻量 MLP 学习 per-token per-level 衰减参数。
  • 在保持精确对数线性复杂度和极小参数开销的前提下，显著提升长程记忆任务性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅对特定序列长度或任务类型有效，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • MLP 引入的额外计算虽小，但在极端资源受限场景下可能仍有影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Sequence models face a fundamental tradeoff between memory capacity and computational efficiency. Transformers achieve expressive context modeling at quadratic cost, while linear attention and state-space models run in linear time by compressing context into a fixed-size hidden state, inherently limiting recall. Log-linear attention navigates this tradeoff by organizing memory across a Fenwick tree hierarchy, growing its hidden state logarithmically with sequence length at log-linear compute cost. However, its memory decay parameter {\lambda} is fixed and independent of the input, assigning uniform weights across all hierarchy levels regardless of the content, which introduces unnecessary rigidity. We propose learning {\lambda} directly from the input via a lightweight two-layer MLP, producing per-token, per-level decay that adapts to content rather than position. A softplus activation lets each Fenwick tree level scale independently, avoiding the inter-level competition that softmax introduces. This modification preserves log-linear complexity exactly and adds negligible parameter overhead. We evaluate on associative recall, selective copying, and language modeling, finding that input-dependent decay consistently outperforms the baseline, with the largest gains in long-range memory settings where baseline {\lambda} degrades or collapses entirely.

Attention Transfer Is Not Universally Effective for Vision Transformers

Medium 2605.07191
Huaiyuan Qin, Muli Yang, Gabriel James Goenawan, Peng Hu, Chen Gong, Xi Peng, Hongyuan Zhu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：注意力迁移并非对所有视觉 Transformer 都有效，失败源于师生架构不匹配。
🎯研究动机

先前研究表明注意力迁移足以恢复预训练教师 ViT 的全部性能，但该结论是否普遍适用尚不清楚，需要系统验证其边界条件。

❓解决问题

探究注意力迁移在多种 ViT 家族中的有效性，并揭示其失败的根本原因。

🔎现象分析

在 20 个教师模型（来自 11 个 ViT 家族）的基准测试中，7 个家族迁移成功，4 个家族持续失败，性能比从头训练基线低 5.1%。失败具有家族一致性，且不受模型大小、训练时长、迁移数据集和分布外评估的影响。

🛠️主要方法

通过控制实验定位问题在注意力路由通道，并发现架构不匹配是主要机制；通过在学生中添加教师原生架构组件（随机初始化）可完全逆转失败。

📊实验结果

在 20 个教师模型、11 个 ViT 家族上进行综合实验，包括不同模型大小、训练时长、迁移数据集和分布外评估。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统揭示了注意力迁移并非普遍有效，识别出 4 个失败家族。
  • 定位失败原因为师生架构不匹配，并通过添加教师组件完全修复。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对标准 ViT 架构，未涉及其他视觉骨干网络。
  • 未深入分析架构不匹配的具体机制细节。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

A recent work shows that Attention Transfer, which transfers only the attention patterns from a pre-trained teacher Vision Transformer (ViT) to a randomly initialized standard student ViT, is sufficient to recover the full benefit of the teacher's pre-trained weights. We revisit this finding on a comprehensive benchmark of 20 teachers from 11 well-known ViT families and reveal that Attention Transfer is not universally effective. While 7 families transfer successfully, 4 consistently fail, falling up to 5.1\% below the from-scratch no-transfer baseline. Further results demonstrate that this failure is family-consistent across model sizes, and persists under extended training durations, different transfer datasets, and out-of-distribution evaluations. Controlled analyses then consistently localize the problem to the attention-routing channel, indicating that the key issue is not whether the student can match the teacher's attention patterns, but whether the matched patterns remain functional for the student. Crucially, we identify architectural mismatch between the pre-trained teacher and the standard student as the primary mechanism. By adding only the teacher's native architectural components to the student in a randomly initialized state, we completely reverse the failure for all 4 families. Notably, these components alone do not improve from-scratch training, confirming that they specifically unlock the usability of the teacher's attention. We further systematically show that this failure is not explained by the inadequate choice of transfer loss or by differences in pre-training recipes. Our findings refine the prevailing understanding of attention in ViT representations: attention is sufficient \textit{only} when the student architecture matches the teacher.

Revisiting Transformer Layer Parameterization Through Causal Energy Minimization

Medium 2605.07588
Jin Xu, Camille Couturier, Victor Rühle, Saravan Rajmohan, James Hensman
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：通过因果能量最小化框架重新解释 Transformer 层参数化，揭示权重共享与低秩交互的设计空间。
🎯研究动机

Transformer 层中多头注意力和门控 MLP 的参数化选择大多基于经验，缺乏理论指导，亟需统一框架理解其设计原理。

❓解决问题

如何从能量最小化视角推导 Transformer 层的参数化结构，并探索受约束但有效的层设计。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出因果能量最小化（CEM）框架，将 Transformer 层重述为条件能量函数上的优化步骤，推导出权重共享 MHA、共享投影的 gated MLP 等设计。

📊实验结果

在数亿参数规模的语言建模实验中，CEM 派生层训练稳定且性能匹配标准 Transformer 基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CEM 框架，统一解释 Transformer 层参数化与能量模型的关系。
  • 识别出包含层内权重共享、对角加低秩交互、轻量预条件子和递归更新的设计空间。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验规模限于中等参数（数亿），未验证更大规模或不同任务。
  • CEM 框架可能无法覆盖所有 Transformer 变体。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Transformer blocks typically combine multi-head attention (MHA) for token mixing with gated MLPs for token-wise feature transformation, yet many choices in their parameterization remain largely empirical. We introduce Causal Energy Minimization (CEM), a framework that recasts Transformer layers as optimization steps on conditional energy functions while explicitly accounting for layer parameterization. Extending prior energy-based interpretations of attention, CEM shows that weight-tied MHA can be derived as a gradient update on an interaction energy, and that a gated MLP with shared up/down projections can be viewed through an element-wise energy. This perspective identifies a design space for Transformer layers that includes within-layer weight sharing, diagonal-plus-low-rank interactions, lightweight preconditioners, and recursive updates. We evaluate CEM-derived layers in language-modeling experiments at the moderate hundred-million-parameter scale. Despite their constrained parameterizations, these layers train stably and can match corresponding Transformer baselines. Overall, our results suggest that CEM provides a useful lens for understanding Transformer layer parameterization, connecting Transformer architectures to energy-based models and motivating further exploration of energy-guided layer designs.

Toward Privileged Foundation Models:LUPI for Accelerated and Improved Learning

Medium 2605.07799
Xueying Ding, Leman Akoglu
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 PIQL 框架，利用特权信息加速表格基础模型训练并提升泛化能力。
🎯研究动机

训练基础模型计算密集且速度慢，现有方法未充分利用训练时可用的额外信息（特权信息）来同时加速学习和提升泛化。

❓解决问题

如何系统性地将特权信息集成到表格基础模型中，以加速收敛、降低最终损失并改善泛化，同时减少数据和计算需求。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 PIQL 框架，构建两种特权信息：数据集级聚合统计量和数据生成程序编码，并设计一种架构在训练时利用 PI，在推理时从观测上下文重建 PI。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次系统地将特权信息集成到表格基础模型中，实现加速学习和改善泛化。
  • 设计了两种互补的特权信息形式及相应的架构，并提供了理论分析。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于表格数据，对其他模态的泛化性未知。
  • 特权信息的构建需要额外知识或计算，可能限制实用性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Training foundation models is computationally intensive and often slow to this http URL introduce PIQL,Privileged Information for Quick and Quality Learning, the first framework to systematically integrate privileged information (PI) to simultaneously accelerate learning and improve generalization in tabular foundation models (TFMs). We construct two complementary forms of PI: (i) aggregate dataset-level statistics that reduce the burden on in-context learning, and (ii) encodings of the underlying data-generating program, providing knowledge beyond observable data. We further design an architecture that effectively transfers the train-time-only PI by learning to reconstruct it from observed context at inference. We provide a theoretical analysis characterizing conditions under which PI reduces the population-level approximation gap and accelerates convergence in finite-data regimes. Empirical evidence shows that PIQL enables TFMs to achieve faster convergence, lower final loss, and better generalization, in effect, reducing data and compute requirements. Our work establishes PI-guided pretraining as a principled and practical paradigm for improving the efficiency and performance of foundation models.

The E$Δ$-MHC-Geo Transformer: Adaptive Geodesic Operations with Guaranteed Orthogonality

Medium 2605.06729
Arash Shahmansoori
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出一种保证正交性的自适应残差连接架构，通过 Cayley 旋转与 Householder 反射混合实现全输入正交性。
🎯研究动机

现有深度 Delta 学习（DDL）的 Householder 算子仅在特定β值下正交，且 Cayley 变换无法处理特征值 -1 的反射操作，限制了残差连接的稳定性和表达能力。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种输入自适应、无条件正交的残差连接，同时覆盖旋转和反射两种正交变换。

🔎现象分析

Cayley 变换无法实现特征值 -1 的反射操作，而 JPmHC 的有限 Cayley 残差混合器排除了精确的λ=-1 算子且无反射分支。

🛠️主要方法

提出 EΔ-MHC-Geo Transformer，结合流形约束超连接（mHC）、深度 Delta 学习（DDL）和 Cayley 变换，通过数据依赖的 Cayley 旋转 Q(x)保证全输入正交性，并引入混合门控机制γ(x)融合 Cayley 旋转与 Householder 反射，配合中点坍缩正则化鼓励边界门决策。

📊实验结果

在约 1.79M 参数模型上，与包括 JPmHC 在内的四个基线对比，EΔ-MHC-Geo 在长程稳定性上比 JPmHC 提升 1.9 倍、比 GPT 提升 3.8 倍；近π旋转损失比 JPmHC 提升 4.5 倍；范数保持平均偏差 0.001；反射诊断探针余弦对齐 0.96，且层数减少 33%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出数据依赖的 Cayley 旋转算子，实现对所有β和输入的无条件正交性。
  • 设计混合门控机制，通过 Cayley 旋转与 Householder 反射的切换覆盖正交群 O(n)的两个连通分量。
  • 引入中点坍缩正则化，促进门控输出边界决策，确保所选组件正交。
⚠️方法局限
  • 混合门控机制增加了计算开销。
  • 正则化超参数可能需要针对不同任务调整。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present the E$\Delta$-MHC-Geo Transformer, a novel architecture that unifies Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC), Deep Delta Learning (DDL), and the Cayley transform to obtain input-adaptive, unconditionally orthogonal residual connections. Unlike DDL, whose Householder operator is orthogonal only at $\beta \in \{0,2\}$, our Data-Dependent Cayley rotation $Q(x)=(I+(\beta/2)A(x))^{-1}(I-(\beta/2)A(x))$ preserves orthogonality for all $\beta$ and all inputs. To handle negation, an eigenvalue $-1$ case that Cayley provably excludes, we introduce the E$\Delta$-MHC-Geo Hybrid, which combines Cayley rotation with Householder reflection via a learned operator-selection gate $X'=\gamma(X)Q(X)X+(1-\gamma(X))H_2(X)X$. A midpoint-collapse regularizer, $4\gamma(1-\gamma)$, encourages boundary gate decisions, where each selected component is orthogonal. In matched-parameter comparisons, with approximately 1.79M parameters per model and mean +/- standard deviation over 3 seeds, against four baselines including the concurrent JPmHC, E$\Delta$-MHC-Geo achieves the best long-horizon stability, 1.9x over JPmHC and 3.8x over GPT; the best near-$\pi$ rotation loss, 4.5x over JPmHC on single-plane; strong norm preservation, with 0.001 mean deviation; and 0.96 negation cosine alignment in a diagnostic reflection probe, all with 33% fewer layers. While JPmHC's wider representation excels on pure rotation, its finite Cayley residual mixer excludes an exact $\lambda=-1$ operator and has no reflection branch, motivating our hybrid approach for accessing both connected components of $O(n)$.

Gated QKAN-FWP: Scalable Quantum-inspired Sequence Learning

Medium 2605.06734
Kuo-Chung Peng, Samuel Yen-Chi Chen, Jiun-Cheng Jiang, Chen-Yu Liu, En-Jui Kuo, Yun-Yuan Wang, Prayag Tiwari, Andrea Ceschini et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出门控 QKAN-FWP，用单量子比特数据重上传电路替代多量子比特架构，实现可扩展的量子启发序列学习。
🎯研究动机

现有量子快速权重编程器依赖多量子比特架构，在 NISQ 设备上难以扩展且经典模拟昂贵，亟需更轻量、可扩展的量子启发序列学习方法。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种可扩展、参数高效且 NISQ 兼容的量子启发快速权重编程框架，用于序列学习任务。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 gated QKAN-FWP，将快速权重编程与量子启发 KAN 结合，使用单量子比特数据重上传电路作为可学习非线性激活（DARUAN），并引入标量门控快速权重更新规则以稳定参数演化。

📊实验结果

在时间序列基准、MiniGrid 强化学习以及太阳周期预测（528 个月输入窗口，132 个月预测范围）上评估，12.5k 参数模型在缩放 MSE、峰值幅度误差和峰值时序误差上优于参数多 13 倍的 LSTM 等基线；在 IonQ 和 IBM 量子处理器上部署，1024 次测量下相对 MSE 在 0.1% 以内。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 gated QKAN-FWP 框架，利用单量子比特电路实现可扩展的量子启发序列学习。
  • 引入标量门控快速权重更新规则，并提供理论分析（自适应记忆核、几何有界性、可并行梯度路径）。
  • 在时间序列、MiniGrid 强化学习和太阳周期预测任务上验证有效性，并在真实量子处理器上部署。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于中等规模序列任务，超长序列或高维输入可能受限。
  • 单量子比特电路表达能力有限，复杂任务可能需要更多量子资源。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Fast Weight Programmers (FWPs) encode temporal dependencies through dynamically updated parameters rather than recurrent hidden states. Quantum FWPs (QFWPs) extend this idea with variational quantum circuits (VQCs), but existing implementations rely on multi-qubit architectures that are difficult to scale on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices and expensive to simulate classically. We propose gated QKAN-FWP, a fast-weight framework that integrates FWP with Quantum-inspired Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (QKAN) using single-qubit data re-uploading circuits as learnable nonlinear activation, known as DatA Re-Uploading ActivatioN (DARUAN). We further introduce a scalar-gated fast-weight update rule that stabilizes parameter evolution, supported by a theoretical analysis of its adaptive memory kernel, geometric boundedness, and parallelizable gradient paths. We evaluate the framework across time-series benchmarks, MiniGrid reinforcement learning, and highlight real-world solar cycle forecasting as our main practical result. In the long-horizon setting with 528-month input window and 132-month forecast horizon, our 12.5k-parameter model achieves lower scaled Mean Square Error (MSE), peak amplitude error, and peak timing error than a suite of classical recurrent baselines with up to 13x more parameters, including Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks (25.9k-89.1k parameters), WaveNet-LSTM (167k), Vanilla recurrent neural network (11.5k), and a Modified Echo State Network (132k). To validate NISQ compatibility, we further deploy the trained fast programmer on IonQ and IBM Quantum processors, recovering forecasting accuracy within 0.1% relative MSE of the noiseless simulator at 1024 shots. These results position gated QKAN-FWP as a scalable, parameter-efficient, and NISQ-compatible approach to quantum-inspired sequence modeling.

Toeplitz MLP Mixers are Low Complexity, Information-Rich Sequence Models

Medium 2605.06683
Benjamin L. Badger, Ethan Roland
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 Toeplitz MLP Mixer (TMM)，用三角掩蔽 Toeplitz 矩阵乘法替代注意力，实现 O(dn log n)训练复杂度和 O(dn)推理复杂度，在信息保留和上下文学习上优于同类架构。
🎯研究动机

Transformer 的注意力机制具有二次时间和空间复杂度，限制了长序列建模的效率。现有次二次架构通常需要复杂的输入调制或状态维护，而 TMM 以更简单的设计实现高效训练和更好的信息保留。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种低复杂度、高信息保留的序列模型，替代 Transformer 中的注意力机制。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出 TMM 缺乏架构偏置，因此能保留更多输入信息，从而提升复制能力；此外，训练后的因果非可逆模型的 Toeplitz 层更可能接近可逆。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Toeplitz MLP Mixer (TMM)，在序列维度使用三角掩蔽的 Toeplitz 矩阵乘法替代注意力，结合 MLP 层，实现 O(dn log n)训练时间和 O(dn)空间复杂度。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 TMM 架构，以三角掩蔽 Toeplitz 矩阵乘法替代注意力，显著降低计算和空间复杂度。
  • 实验证明 TMM 在信息保留、复制能力、信息检索和上下文学习基准上优于可比架构。
  • 从算子指标理论角度分析，发现训练后的 Toeplitz 层更可能接近可逆。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅在特定任务或数据规模下验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
  • Toeplitz 矩阵乘法的实现可能对硬件优化有特殊要求。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Transformer-based large language models are in some respects limited by the quadratic time and space computational complexity of attention. We introduce the Toeplitz MLP Mixer (TMM), a transformer-like architecture that swaps attention for triangular-masked Toeplitz matrix multiplication over the sequence dimension resulting in $\mathcal{O} (dn \log n)$ time and $\mathcal O(dn)$ space complexity during training and $\mathcal O(dn)$ time and space at inference prefill. Despite the lack of sophisticated input modulation or state maintenance present in other sub-quadratic architectures, TMMs yield greater training efficiency in terms of loss achieved per compute and device memory. We demonstrate that TMMs are capable of retaining more input information resulting in improved copying ability, which we argue results from a lack of architectural biases. Consistent with higher input information retention, TMMs exhibit superior information retrieval and in-context learning benchmark accuracy compared to comparable architectures. We conclude with an analysis from the perspective of operator index theory and show that, counterintuitively, trained Toeplitz layers of causal non-invertible models are more likely to be invertible or nearly so than models that are actually invertible over their inputs.

指令微调与对齐 6 篇

Dr. Post-Training: A Data Regularization Perspective on LLM Post-Training

High 2605.07063
Pingbang Hu, Xueshen Liu, Z. Morley Mao, Jiaqi W. Ma
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出数据正则化视角的 LLM 后训练框架，将通用训练数据视为正则化项，优于数据选择方法。
🎯研究动机

LLM 后训练中，高质量目标数据稀缺，而通用训练数据丰富但存在对齐偏差，现有数据选择方法未能充分利用通用数据的正则化潜力。

❓解决问题

如何有效利用通用训练数据来防止对稀缺目标数据的过拟合，同时避免数据选择带来的信息损失。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Dr. Post-Training 框架，在每个训练步用通用数据构建模型更新方向的可行集，将目标数据指定的更新方向投影到该可行集上，实现数据正则化。

📊实验结果

在 SFT、RLHF、RLVR 任务上进行了广泛实验，方法一致优于最先进的数据选择基线，系统基准测试确认了效率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 重新概念化通用训练数据为数据诱导的正则化项，而非数据选择池。
  • 提出一系列方法，提供更丰富的设计空间和灵活的偏差 - 方差权衡。
  • 实现 LLM 规模的高效系统优化，并在 SFT、RLHF、RLVR 上超越 SOTA 数据选择方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 框架依赖于可行集的构造方式，可能对数据质量敏感。
  • 系统优化可能仍存在扩展性挑战，未在超大规模模型上验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Data selection methods address a critical challenge in LLM post-training: effectively leveraging scarce, high-fidelity target data alongside abundant but imperfectly aligned general training data. In this work, we move beyond the data-selection framing and introduce Dr. Post-Training (Data-Regularized Post-Training), a novel framework that reconceptualizes general training data as a data-induced regularizer that prevents overfitting to the scarce target objective, rather than serving as a pool for selection. Specifically, our framework proposes that at each training step, construct a feasible set of model update directions using the general training data, and project the model update direction specified by the scarce target data onto that feasible set. Standard training and existing data selection methods arise as special cases with different choices of the data-induced regularizer, and these methods correspond to different points on a bias--variance spectrum with different regularization strength. Building on this view, we propose a family of methods offering a richer design space and more flexible bias--variance tradeoffs. For practical LLM-scale use, we introduce careful system optimizations that realize these methods with minimal overhead. Extensive experiments across SFT, RLHF, and RLVR show that our methods consistently outperform state-of-the-art data selection baselines, and system benchmarks confirm their efficiency.

Beyond LoRA vs. Full Fine-Tuning: Gradient-Guided Optimizer Routing for LLM Adaptation

High 2605.07111
Haozhan Tang, Xiuqi Zhu, Xinyin Zhang, Boxun Li, Virginia Smith, Kevin Kuo
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出梯度引导的优化器路由框架 MoLF，在 FFT 和 LoRA 之间动态切换，兼顾两者优势。
🎯研究动机

FFT 和 LoRA 各有优劣，但静态选择其中一种会限制模型适应能力，需要一种能动态结合两者优势的方法。

❓解决问题

如何在大语言模型微调中动态融合全参数微调（FFT）和低秩适配（LoRA）以提升性能。

🔎现象分析

实验验证了 FFT 在高熵知识注入时表现好，LoRA 在低秩任务中因正则化效果更优，但单一架构存在结构性局限。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MoLF 框架，在优化器级别动态路由梯度更新到 FFT 和 LoRA 专家，确保两者都能获得精确梯度信号；并针对内存受限场景提出 MoLF-Efficient，冻结基座权重，仅在多个 LoRA 专家间路由。

📊实验结果

在 SQL、Medical QA、Counterfactual Knowledge 任务上，使用 Gemma-3-1B、Qwen2.5-1.5B、Qwen2.5-3B 模型进行评估，MoLF 在所有设置下性能优于或接近 FFT 和 LoRA 中的最优者（差距≤1.5%），MoLF-Efficient 在 Fact 任务上提升 20%，在 Med 和 SQL 上提升 9%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MoLF 框架，实现 FFT 和 LoRA 的动态融合，优于或接近两者中的最优者。
  • 提出 MoLF-Efficient 变体，在冻结基座权重下仅路由 LoRA 专家，显著优于现有自适应 LoRA 方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能增加训练时的计算开销，因为需要同时维护 FFT 和 LoRA 的梯度。
  • MoLF-Efficient 仅适用于 LoRA 专家路由，可能无法充分利用 FFT 的表示能力。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent literature on fine-tuning Large Language Models highlights a fundamental debate. While Full Fine-Tuning (FFT) provides the representational plasticity required for high-entropy knowledge injection, Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) can match or surpass FFT performance because many tasks only require updates in a low-rank space and benefit from LoRA's additional regularization. Through empirical evaluation across diverse tasks (SQL, Medical QA, and Counterfactual Knowledge) and varying language models (Gemma-3-1B, Qwen2.5-1.5B, and Qwen2.5-3B), we verify both trends and demonstrate that relying solely on either static architecture is structurally limited. To address this challenge, we propose a Mixture of LoRA and Full (MoLF) Fine-Tuning, a unified framework that enables continuous navigation between both training regimes. MoLF dynamically routes updates between FFT and LoRA at the optimizer level to ensure that exact gradient signals are available to both experts throughout training, yielding stable training dynamics. For memory-constrained environments, we also introduce MoLF-Efficient, which freezes base weights and only routes updates among a pair of LoRA experts of potentially varying rank. Our evaluations show that MoLF either improves on or stays within $1.5\%$ of the better of FFT and LoRA across all settings, while MoLF-Efficient outperforms prior adaptive LoRA approaches by up to $20\%$ on Fact and $9\%$ on Med and SQL.

Efficient Data Selection for Multimodal Models via Incremental Optimization Utility

High 2605.07488
Jinhao Jing, Qiannian Zhao, Chao Huang, Zhan Su
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 OST 框架，通过增量优化效用进行数据选择，在降低训练成本的同时提升多模态模型性能。
🎯研究动机

大规模多模态模型受限于合成数据的质量 - 数量权衡，现有方法如 LLM-as-a-Judge 计算成本高且缺乏可解释性。

❓解决问题

如何高效且可解释地选择高质量训练数据，以提升多模态模型性能并降低训练成本。

🔎现象分析

全量微调因噪声数据导致性能下降，而基于优化效用的方法能有效识别有害样本，逆转负迁移。

🛠️主要方法

将数据选择建模为增量优化效用排序问题，通过轻量代理模型上的模拟单步更新估计每个样本的边际效用。

📊实验结果

在 Qwen 系列多模态数学推理基准上评估，与 LLM-as-a-Judge、DEITA 等基线对比，报告了训练成本降低和性能提升的具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 OST 框架，将数据选择转化为增量优化效用排序问题，避免语义启发式。
  • 在 Qwen 系列多模态数学推理基准上实现帕累托最优效率，显著降低训练成本并提升性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖代理模型的质量，代理模型与目标模型差异大时效果未知。
  • 仅在多模态数学推理任务上验证，泛化性需进一步探索。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The scaling of Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) is constrained by the quality-quantity trade-off inherent in synthetic data. Previous approaches, such as LLM-as-a-Judge, have proven their effectiveness in addressing this but suffer from prohibitive computational costs and lack of interpretability. To bridge this gap, we propose One-Step-Train (OST), a framework that reformulates data selection as an incremental optimization utility ranking problem. Instead of relying on semantic heuristics, OST estimates the marginal utility of each sample via a simulated single-step update on a lightweight proxy. Experiments on the Qwen series across multimodal mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that OST achieves Pareto-optimal efficiency. By selecting the top-50 subset, OST reduces training costs by 43% (and total time consumption by 17) while surpassing the strong LLM-as-a-Judge baseline by 1.8 points. Furthermore, under a fixed compute budget, our method using only the top-20 subset achieves a 5.6 point gain over LLM-as-a-Judge, improves upon heuristic scoring baselines like DEITA, and outperforms the Full-SFT baseline by 8.8 points. Notably, while Full-SFT suffers from performance degradation due to noise, our optimization-grounded approach effectively identifies toxic samples, successfully reversing the negative transfer frequently observed in complex reasoning tasks.

SOD: Step-wise On-policy Distillation for Small Language Model Agents

High 2605.07725
Qiyong Zhong, Mao Zheng, Mingyang Song, Xin Lin, Jie Sun, Houcheng Jiang, Xiang Wang, Junfeng Fang
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出逐步在线蒸馏框架 SOD，通过自适应重加权蒸馏强度解决小模型在工具集成推理中教师信号不可靠的问题。
🎯研究动机

工具集成推理难以扩展到小语言模型，因为长程工具交互不稳定且模型容量有限；现有强化学习方法仅提供稀疏结果奖励，而在线蒸馏虽提供密集监督，但在工具调用错误级联时教师信号变得不可靠。

❓解决问题

在线蒸馏应用于工具集成推理时，错误工具调用会在后续步骤级联放大师生差异，导致教师提供的逐 token 监督不可靠。

🔎现象分析

实验观察到，在线蒸馏在工具集成推理中会出现关键失败模式：错误工具调用在后续推理步骤中级联，逐步放大师生差异，使教师监督信号越来越不可靠。

🛠️主要方法

提出 SOD 框架，基于步骤级差异自适应重加权每一步的蒸馏强度，在高差异区域减弱可能误导的教师信号，在良好对齐状态保留密集指导。

📊实验结果

在数学、科学和代码基准上评估，SOD 相比第二好的基线提升高达 20.86%，0.6B 学生模型在 AIME 2025 上达到 26.13%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别了在线蒸馏在工具集成推理中的级联失败模式
  • 提出逐步在线蒸馏框架 SOD，通过自适应重加权解决教师信号不可靠问题
  • 在数学、科学和代码基准上实现最高 20.86% 的提升，0.6B 模型在 AIME 2025 上达到 26.13%
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖教师模型质量，弱教师可能限制蒸馏效果
  • 步骤级差异计算可能增加额外开销
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Tool-integrated reasoning (TIR) is difficult to scale to small language models due to instability in long-horizon tool interactions and limited model capacity. While reinforcement learning methods like group relative policy optimization provide only sparse outcome-level rewards. Recently, on-policy distillation (OPD) has gained popularity by supplying dense token-level supervision from a teacher on student-generated trajectories. However, our experiments indicate that applying OPD to TIR leads to a critical failure mode: erroneous tool calls tend to cascade across subsequent reasoning steps, progressively amplifying student-teacher divergence and rendering the teacher's token-level supervision increasingly unreliable. To address this, we propose SOD, a step-wise on-policy distillation framework for small language model agents, which adaptively reweights distillation strength at each step based on step-level divergence. Therefore, SOD can attenuate potentially misleading teacher signals in high-divergence regions while preserving dense guidance in well-aligned states. Experiments on challenging math, science, and code benchmarks show that SOD achieves up to 20.86% improvement over the second-best baseline. Notably, our 0.6B student achieves 26.13% on AIME 2025, demonstrating effective transfer of agentic reasoning to lightweight models. Our code is available at this https URL .

KL for a KL: On-Policy Distillation with Control Variate Baseline

High 2605.07865
Minjae Oh, Sangjun Song, Gyubin Choi, Yunho Choi, Yohan Jo
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：vOPD 通过引入控制变量基线（价值函数）稳定在线策略蒸馏，实现高效且无偏的方差缩减。
🎯研究动机

在线策略蒸馏（OPD）在 LLM 后训练中表现突出，但其单样本蒙特卡洛估计器的高梯度方差导致训练不稳定，且现有稳定方法要么计算开销大，要么引入偏差。

❓解决问题

如何在不增加显著计算开销的前提下，降低 OPD 的梯度方差并保持无偏性。

🔎现象分析

OPD 的梯度方差高源于单样本估计；现有全词汇基线计算昂贵，top-k 基线引入偏差。

🛠️主要方法

将 OPD 重新表述为策略梯度强化学习，引入价值函数作为控制变量基线，该价值函数具有闭式解（学生与教师之间的逐 token 负反向 KL 散度），可直接从已计算的前向传播中获取，无需额外批评网络或推理。

📊实验结果

在数学和科学推理基准上，vOPD 持续优于原始 OPD，并匹配最昂贵的全词汇基线性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 vOPD，将 OPD 与策略梯度 RL 中的控制变量基线结合，实现无偏方差缩减。
  • 证明 OPD 价值函数具有闭式解，无需额外计算。
  • 提出 top-k 近似基线进一步降低成本而不牺牲性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖于教师模型的质量，若教师较弱则价值函数可能不准确。
  • top-k 近似基线的 k 值选择可能影响性能，需要调参。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

On-Policy Distillation (OPD) has emerged as a dominant post-training paradigm for large language models, especially for reasoning domains. However, OPD remains unstable in practice due to the high gradient variance of its single-sample Monte Carlo estimator, and recipes for stable training are still immature. We propose vOPD (On-Policy Distillation with a control variate baseline), which casts OPD as policy-gradient RL and stabilizes it by introducing a control variate baseline-canonically a value function -- from the RL literature. We show that the OPD value function admits a closed form as the per-token negative reverse KL divergence between the student and the teacher, available directly from the already-computed forward pass with no additional critic or inference. Existing stabilization methods either compute the full token-level reverse KL over the entire vocabulary, adding significant overhead, or restrict it to a top-k support, biasing the objective. vOPD instead preserves the lightweight single-sample estimator, subtracting the value function as a detached baseline to keep the gradient unbiased while reducing variance. Furthermore, we show that a top-k approximation of the baseline further lowers cost without compromising performance. Across mathematical and scientific reasoning benchmarks, vOPD consistently outperforms vanilla OPD and matches the most expensive full-vocabulary baseline, offering an efficient stabilization of On-Policy Distillation through principled RL variance reduction.

Experience Sharing in Mutual Reinforcement Learning for Heterogeneous Language Models

Medium 2605.07244
Xiaoze Liu, Dhananjay Ram, Yuting Zhang, Zhaoyang Zhang, Wei Xia, Stefano Soatto
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出异构 LLM 间通过经验共享进行互强化学习的框架，并分析不同共享策略在稳定性 - 支持权衡中的位置。
🎯研究动机

现有 RL 后训练方法通常假设同构模型，无法直接应用于异构 LLM（不同参数、目标、分词器）间的经验共享，限制了多模型协作的潜力。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个框架，使得异构 LLM 能够在保持各自独立性的同时，有效共享训练经验以提升强化学习后训练效果。

🔎现象分析

摘要通过上下文赌博机分析揭示了不同经验共享策略在稳定性 - 支持权衡中的结构性位置：PRP 引入密度比方差和 THL 残差成本，XGRPO 在保持在线策略支持的同时改变标量基线，SGT 提供向已验证成功方向的救援集分数。

🛠️主要方法

提出互强化学习框架，包含共享经验交换（SEE）、多工作者资源分配（MWRA）和分词器异构层（THL），并在 GRPO 基础上实例化三种探针：Peer Rollout Pooling (PRP)、Cross-Policy GRPO Advantage Sharing (XGRPO)和 Success-Gated Transfer (SGT)。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一个支持异构 LLM 并发 RL 后训练的互强化学习框架，允许模型交换类型化经验而保持独立参数、目标和分词器。
  • 通过三种探针实例化不同经验共享策略，并利用上下文赌博机分析揭示其在稳定性 - 支持权衡中的位置。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅在特定模型族或规模上验证，泛化性未知。
  • THL 层可能引入额外计算开销和残差误差。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce Mutual Reinforcement Learning, a framework for concurrent RL post-training in which heterogeneous LLM policies exchange typed experience while keeping separate parameters, objectives, and tokenizers. The framework combines a Shared Experience Exchange (SEE), Multi-Worker Resource Allocation (MWRA), and a Tokenizer Heterogeneity Layer (THL) that retokenizes text and aligns token-level traces across incompatible vocabularies. This substrate makes the experience-sharing design question operational across model families. We instantiate three controlled probes on top of GRPO: data-level rollout sharing via Peer Rollout Pooling (PRP), value-level advantage sharing via Cross-Policy GRPO Advantage Sharing (XGRPO), and outcome-level success transfer via Success-Gated Transfer (SGT). A contextual-bandit analysis characterizes their structural positions on a stability-support trade-off: PRP pays density-ratio variance and THL residual costs, XGRPO preserves on-policy actor support while changing scalar baselines, and SGT supplies a rescue-set score direction toward verified peer successes. In the evaluated regime, outcome-level sharing occupies the favorable point of this trade-off.

效率与压缩 3 篇

Reformulating KV Cache Eviction Problem for Long-Context LLM Inference

High 2605.07234
Tho Mai, Joo-Young Kim
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：将 KV 缓存淘汰问题重新表述为输出感知的层间矩阵乘法近似问题，提出 LaProx 策略，在仅保留 5% 缓存时仍保持性能。
🎯研究动机

长上下文 LLM 推理中 KV 缓存占用大量内存和计算开销，现有淘汰方法仅依赖局部注意力权重，忽略了值表示、输出投影和跨头交互的影响。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种全局、输出感知的 KV 缓存淘汰策略，以在极端压缩下保持模型性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将 KV 缓存淘汰重新表述为输出感知的层间矩阵乘法近似问题，提出 LaProx 策略，显式建模注意力图与投影值状态的乘法交互，并考虑跨头依赖，实现全局可比较的 token 重要性评分。

📊实验结果

在 LongBench 和 Needle-In-A-Haystack 的 19 个数据集上，仅用 5% 的 KV 缓存保持模型性能，在所有配置下优于先前工作，极端压缩下精度损失减少 2 倍。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将 KV 缓存淘汰问题重新表述为输出感知的层间矩阵乘法近似问题。
  • 提出 LaProx 策略，通过建模注意力与值投影的交互实现全局统一的 token 选择。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对极长序列的泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 未讨论与其他优化技术（如量化）的兼容性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models (LLMs) support long-context inference but suffer from substantial memory and runtime overhead due to Key-Value (KV) Cache growth. Existing KV Cache eviction methods primarily rely on local attention weights, neglecting the influence of value representations, output projection, and inter-head interactions. In this work, we reformulate KV Cache eviction from a conventional head-wise, weight-averaging approach into an output-aware, layer-wise matrix multiplication approximation problem. We introduce LaProx, a novel eviction strategy that explicitly models the multiplicative interaction between attention maps and projected value states to accurately quantify token contributions while accounting for inter-head dependencies. Building on this metric, we propose the first unified eviction strategy that assigns globally comparable importance scores to tokens, enabling model-wide selection instead of local, head-wise decisions. Experimental results across 19 datasets on long-context benchmarks LongBench and Needle-In-A-Haystack demonstrate that our approach maintains model performance with only 5\% of the KV cache and consistently outperforms prior works across all configurations. Notably, our method achieves up to 2$\times$ accuracy loss reduction under extreme compression scenarios compared to existing state-of-the-art baselines with minimal overhead.

MatryoshkaLoRA: Learning Accurate Hierarchical Low-Rank Representations for LLM Fine-Tuning

High 2605.07850
Ionut-Vlad Modoranu, Mher Safaryan, Dan Alistarh
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：MatryoshkaLoRA 通过插入对角矩阵实现层次化低秩表示，支持动态秩选择且精度损失小。
🎯研究动机

大模型微调中 LoRA 的固定秩需要穷举搜索来平衡效率与性能，现有秩自适应方法在高秩时梯度信号不一致导致数据效率低。

❓解决问题

如何学习准确的层次化低秩表示，使得不同秩的子适配器都能高效利用梯度信息，支持动态秩选择且精度损失小。

🔎现象分析

现有秩自适应方法（如 DyLoRA）在高秩时由于缺乏一致的梯度信号导致次优结果。

🛠️主要方法

在 LoRA 适配器之间插入一个固定的精心设计的对角矩阵 P，通过改变 P 可恢复 LoRA 和 DyLoRA，确保所有子秩嵌入有效的梯度信息。

📊实验结果

在多个数据集上评估，MatryoshkaLoRA 比先前秩自适应方法学习到更准确的层次化低秩表示，在不同秩上实现更优的精度 - 性能权衡。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MatryoshkaLoRA 框架，通过插入对角矩阵实现层次化低秩表示学习，支持动态秩选择。
  • 提出 AURAC 指标用于一致评估层次化低秩适配器的性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能需要对对角矩阵 P 进行额外设计以适应不同任务。
  • 动态秩选择的具体策略未详细说明。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

With the rise in scale for deep learning models to billions of parameters, the computational cost of fine-tuning remains a significant barrier to deployment. While Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become the standard for parameter-efficient fine-tuning, the need to set a predefined, static rank $r$ requires exhaustive grid searches to balance efficiency and performance. Existing rank-adaptive solutions such as DyLoRA mitigate this by sampling ranks during the training from a predefined distribution. However, they often yield sub-optimal results at higher ranks due to lack of consistent gradient signals across the full hierarchy of ranks, thus making these methods data-inefficient. In this paper, we propose MatryoshkaLoRA, a general, Matryoshka-inspired training framework for LoRA that learns accurate hierarchical low-rank representations by inserting a fixed, carefully crafted diagonal matrix $P$ between the existing LoRA adapters to scale their sub-ranks accordingly. By introducing this simple modification, our general framework recovers LoRA and DyLoRA only by changing $P$ and ensures all sub-ranks embed the available gradient information efficiently. Our MatryoshkaLoRA supports dynamic rank selection with minimal degradation in accuracy. We further propose Area Under the Rank Accuracy Curve (AURAC), a metric that consistently evaluates the performance of hierarchical low-rank adapters. Our results demonstrate that MatryoshkaLoRA learns more accurate hierarchical low-rank representations than prior rank-adaptive approaches and achieves superior accuracy-performance trade-offs across ranks on the evaluated datasets. Our code is available at this https URL .

Fast Byte Latent Transformer

High 2605.08044
Julie Kallini, Artidoro Pagnoni, Tomasz Limisiewicz, Gargi Ghosh, Luke Zettlemoyer, Christopher Potts, Xiaochuang Han, Srinivasan Iyer
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：通过扩散和推测解码加速字节级语言模型生成，实现并行解码与带宽降低。
🎯研究动机

字节级语言模型无需子词词汇表即可匹配词级模型性能，但逐字节自回归生成速度极慢，限制了实际应用。

❓解决问题

解决字节级语言模型（如 BLT）生成速度慢的问题，减少生成序列所需的前向传播次数。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出三种加速方法：BLT-D（辅助块级扩散目标实现并行生成）、BLT-S（推测解码扩展局部解码器）、BLT-DV（扩散生成后加自回归验证）。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 BLT-D，通过扩散目标实现多字节并行生成，大幅减少解码步数。
  • 提出 BLT-S 和 BLT-DV，在速度与质量间取得权衡，并实现超过 50% 的估计内存带宽成本降低。
⚠️方法局限
  • 扩散生成可能引入质量损失，需验证步骤补偿。
  • 方法依赖特定模型架构（BLT），泛化性待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent byte-level language models (LMs) match the performance of token-level models without relying on subword vocabularies, yet their utility is limited by slow, byte-by-byte autoregressive generation. We address this bottleneck in the Byte Latent Transformer (BLT) through new training and generation techniques. First, we introduce BLT Diffusion (BLT-D), a new model and our fastest BLT variant, trained with an auxiliary block-wise diffusion objective alongside the standard next-byte prediction loss. This enables an inference procedure that generates multiple bytes in parallel per decoding step, substantially reducing the number of forward passes required to generate a sequence. Second, we propose two extensions inspired by speculative decoding that trade some of this speed for higher generation quality: BLT Self-speculation (BLT-S), in which BLT's local decoder continues generating past its normal patch boundaries to draft bytes, which are then verified with a single full-model forward pass; and BLT Diffusion+Verification (BLT-DV), which augments BLT-D with an autoregressive verification step after diffusion-based generation. All methods may achieve an estimated memory-bandwidth cost over 50% lower than BLT on generation tasks. Each approach offers its own unique advantages, together removing key barriers to the practical use of byte-level LMs.

LLM 预训练 2 篇

POETS: Uncertainty-Aware LLM Optimization via Compute-Efficient Policy Ensembles

High 2605.07775
Nicolas Menet, Andreas Krause, Abbas Rahimi
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出一种计算高效的策略集成框架 POETS，通过隐式奖励函数匹配实现不确定性感知的 LLM 优化，在蛋白质搜索和量子电路设计等科学发现任务中达到 SOTA 样本效率。
🎯研究动机

在序列决策和黑箱优化中，平衡探索与利用是核心挑战，现有方法通常需要复杂的嵌套过程来训练不确定性感知的奖励模型并单独拟合策略，计算成本高且难以扩展到 LLM。

❓解决问题

如何高效地在 LLM 优化中引入不确定性量化，避免复杂的奖励模型训练和策略拟合分离过程，同时克服集成模型的计算和内存瓶颈。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

POETS 框架：利用 KL 正则化策略隐式编码奖励函数的洞察，直接训练策略集成以匹配在线自举数据的隐式奖励函数，捕获认知不确定性；采用共享预训练骨干 + 独立 LoRA 分支的高效架构降低计算和内存开销。

📊实验结果

在蛋白质搜索和量子电路设计等科学发现领域进行实验，并在强化学习离线策略设置和小数据集场景中验证鲁棒性，摘要未提供具体数值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 POETS 框架，将不确定性量化与策略优化统一，绕过复杂的奖励模型训练过程。
  • 理论证明 POETS 隐式执行 KL 正则化 Thompson 采样，具有次线性累积遗憾界。
  • 在蛋白质搜索和量子电路设计等科学发现任务中实现 SOTA 样本效率，并在强化学习离线策略设置中表现鲁棒。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对 LoRA 分支的多样性维护策略敏感。
  • 理论遗憾界依赖于特定假设，实际性能可能受限于预训练骨干的质量。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Balancing exploration and exploitation is a core challenge in sequential decision-making and black-box optimization. We introduce POETS ($\textbf{Po}$licy $\textbf{E}$nsembles for $\textbf{T}$hompson $\textbf{S}$ampling), a novel framework that bridges uncertainty quantification and policy optimization. Our approach is grounded in the insight that policies trained with Kullback-Leibler (KL) regularization implicitly encode an underlying reward function. Building on this, POETS bypasses the complex, nested process of training an uncertainty-aware reward model and separately fitting a policy to this model. Instead, we directly train a policy ensemble to capture epistemic uncertainty by matching implicitly encoded reward functions to online, bootstrapped data. To overcome the prohibitive compute and memory constraints of ensembling Large Language Models (LLMs), POETS utilizes an efficient architecture: the ensemble shares a pre-trained backbone while maintaining diversity through independent Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) branches. Theoretically, we prove that POETS implicitly conducts KL-regularized Thompson sampling and thus inherits strong cumulative regret bounds of ${\mathcal O}(\sqrt{T \gamma_T})$. Empirically, we demonstrate that POETS achieves state-of-the-art sample efficiency across diverse scientific discovery domains, including protein search and quantum circuit design. Furthermore, it improves the optimization trajectories of reinforcement learning, proving particularly robust in off-policy settings with experience replay or in small dataset regimes.

Benchmarking EngGPT2-16B-A3B against Comparable Italian and International Open-source LLMs

Medium 2605.07731
Andrea Sassella, Andrea Chizzola, Tommaso Bianchi, Luca Alessandrelli, Mark James Carman
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：EngGPT2-16B-A3B 在意大利语和国际开源 LLM 基准测试中表现良好，尤其在数学和推理任务上优于同类意大利模型。
🎯研究动机

意大利语 LLM 领域缺乏高性能的开源模型，需要评估新发布的 EngGPT2-16B-A3B 在意大利语和国际基准上的表现，以推动该语言模型的发展。

❓解决问题

评估 EngGPT2-16B-A3B 这一 16B 参数 MoE 模型在多种基准上的性能，并与同类意大利和国际开源 LLM 进行比较。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

在 ARC-Challenge、GSM8K、AIME24/25、MMLU、HumanEval、RULER、ITALIC、BFCL 等基准上对模型进行评测，并与多个意大利和国际模型进行对比。

📊实验结果

在多个基准上进行了评测，包括 ARC-Challenge、GSM8K、AIME24、AIME25、MMLU、HumanEval、RULER、ITALIC、BFCL，并与 FastwebMIIA-7B、Minerva-7B、Velvet-14B、LLaMAntino-3-ANITA-8B、DeepSeek-MoE-16B-Chat、Moonlight-16B-A3B、GPT-OSS-20B、Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct、Gemma-3-12b-it、Ministral-3-8BInstruct-2512-BF16、GPT-5 nano、Qwen3-8B 等模型进行了比较。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次对 EngGPT2-16B-A3B 进行全面的基准测试。
  • 展示了该模型在意大利语 LLM 中的竞争力，尤其在数学和推理任务上。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在特定基准上评测，可能无法全面反映模型在实际应用中的表现。
  • 与最先进的国际模型相比仍有差距。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This report benchmarks the performance of ENGINEERING Ingegneria Informatica S.p.A.'s EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B LLM, a 16B parameter Mixture of Experts (MoE) model with 3B active parameters. Performance is investigated across a wide variety of representative benchmarks, and is compared against comparably-sized open-source MoE and dense models. In comparison with popular Italian models, namely FastwebMIIA-7B, Minerva-7B, Velvet-14B, and LLaMAntino-3-ANITA-8B, EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B performs as well or better on international benchmarks: ARC-Challenge, GSM8K, AIME24, AIME25, MMLU, and HumanEval (HE). It achieves the best performance for the longest context setting (32k) of the RULER benchmark. On the Italian benchmark dataset ITALIC, the model performs as well or better than the other models except for Velvet-14B, which outperforms it. Compared with popular MoE models of comparable size, the new model reports higher values than DeepSeek-MoE-16B-Chat on all considered benchmarks. It has higher values than Moonlight-16B-A3B on HE, MMLU, AIME24, AIME25, GSM8K, and the 32k RULER setting, but lower on BFCL and some ARC and ITALIC settings. Finally it has lower values than GPT-OSS-20B on most benchmarks, including HE, MMLU, AIME24, AIME25, GSM8K, ARC, BFCL, and the RULER 32k. When compared with popular dense models, EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B reports higher values on AIME24 and AIME25 than Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, Gemma-3-12b-it, and Ministral-3-8BInstruct-2512-BF16, but lower values on ITALIC, BFCL, and RULER with a 32k context. When performance is aggregated across all benchmark metrics, EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B shows higher performance than the Italian models under evaluation while achieving lower results than some of the most performant international models, in particular GPT-5 nano and Qwen3-8B. Taken together, our findings find the new model to be a step forward for native Italian Large Language Models.

其他 2 篇

Is the Future Compatible? Diagnosing Dynamic Consistency in World Action Models

Medium 2605.07514
Bo-Kai Ruan, Teng-Fang Hsiao, Ling Lo, Hong-Han Shuai
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：世界动作模型（WAM）中动作 - 状态一致性是评估生成未来动态可靠性的关键，并可用于无价值函数的规划选择。
🎯研究动机

世界动作模型（WAM）通过预测未来观测和动作来支持决策，但其生成未来的可靠性未被充分检验：一个视觉上合理的未来是否与声称的动作序列动态兼容？

❓解决问题

WAM 生成的未来轨迹可能视觉上合理但动态不一致，缺乏评估其与动作序列兼容性的可靠性指标。

🔎现象分析

动作 - 状态一致性（预测动作与诱导状态转移的对齐）系统性地区分了成功与失败的轨迹，且与学习到的价值估计具有相似的成功 - 失败趋势；背景崩溃（低动态失败轨迹因静态未来易预测而变得欺骗性一致）是重要的边界条件。

🛠️主要方法

提出一种无价值函数的共识策略，通过预测未来之间的协议对候选轨迹进行排序，用于测试时选择。

📊实验结果

在 RoboCasa 和 RoboTwin 2.0 上评估，共识策略提升了成功率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别动作 - 状态一致性作为 WAM 可靠性的缺失评估轴
  • 提出无价值函数的共识策略，在 RoboCasa 和 RoboTwin 2.0 上提升成功率，无需额外训练或奖励建模
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定模型架构（联合预测和逆动力学模型）
  • 背景崩溃条件可能限制一致性在动态场景中的适用性
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

World Action Models (WAMs) enable decision-making through imagined rollouts by predicting future observations and actions. However, the reliability of these imagined futures remains under-examined: is a generated future merely visually plausible, or is it dynamically compatible with the action sequence it claims to model? In this work, we identify action-state consistency, the alignment between predicted actions and induced state transitions, as a missing reliability axis for WAMs. Through a systematic study across representative joint-prediction and inverse-dynamics models, we find that action-state consistency systematically separates successful and failed rollouts across many tasks and follows similar success-failure trends as learned value estimates. These results suggest that consistency captures decision-relevant structure beyond visual realism. We further identify background collapse as an important boundary condition, where low-dynamics failed trajectories can become deceptively consistent because static futures are easier to predict. Building on these findings, we introduce a value-free consensus strategy for test-time selection, which ranks candidate rollouts by agreement among predicted futures. This strategy improves success rates on RoboCasa and RoboTwin 2.0 without additional training or reward modeling. Taken together, our findings establish action-state consistency as both a diagnostic tool for evaluating WAM reliability and a practical signal for value-free planning.

Domain-level metacognitive monitoring in frontier LLMs: A 33-model atlas

Medium 2605.06673
Jon-Paul Cacioli
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：对 33 个前沿 LLM 的元认知监控进行领域级分析，发现聚合指标掩盖了显著的领域间差异。
🎯研究动机

现有元认知质量评估通常使用聚合指标，但可能掩盖模型在不同知识领域上的监控能力差异，影响模型在特定应用场景中的可靠部署。

❓解决问题

揭示前沿 LLM 在 MMLU 基准测试各领域上的元认知监控差异，并评估领域分组的有效性。

🔎现象分析

所有模型在聚合监控能力高于随机水平时，均表现出非平凡的领域级变异；应用 / 专业知识领域监控最容易，形式推理和自然科学领域最难；中间三个领域统计上不可区分；领域分组是实用的基准分类而非验证的潜在结构。

🛠️主要方法

对 33 个前沿 LLM（来自 8 个模型家族）进行 1500 个 MMLU 题目（每领域 250 题，共 6 个领域）测试，使用口头化置信度（0-100）计算每个模型 - 领域单元的 Type-2 AUROC，并进行领域内一致性分析和家族内轮廓形状聚类。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了统计指标如 AUROC、Kendall's W、Bootstrap 置信区间、分半稳定性等。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了 33 个前沿 LLM 在 6 个 MMLU 领域上的元认知监控图谱，揭示了聚合指标掩盖的领域级变异。
  • 发现应用 / 专业知识领域监控最容易，形式推理和自然科学领域最难，并验证了领域分组的实用性。
  • 展示了家族内轮廓形状聚类在部分模型家族中显著，并指出探测格式特异性（口头化置信度 vs. 二元 KEEP/WITHDRAW 探测）的影响。
⚠️方法局限
  • 领域分组基于先验六领域分组，可能不是最优的潜在结构。
  • 仅使用 MMLU 基准，可能无法推广到其他知识领域或任务类型。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Aggregate metacognitive quality scores mask within-model variation across MMLU benchmark domains. We administered 1,500 MMLU items (250 per domain, under an a priori six-domain grouping) to 33 frontier LLMs from eight model families and computed Type-2 AUROC per model-domain cell using verbalized confidence (0-100). Total observations: 47,151. Every model with above-chance aggregate monitoring showed non-trivial domain-level variation. Applied/Professional knowledge was reliably the easiest benchmark domain to monitor (mean AUROC = .742, ranked top-2 in 21 of 33 models); Formal Reasoning and Natural Science were reliably the hardest (one of the two ranked bottom-2 in 27 of 33 models). The three middle domains were statistically indistinguishable (Kendall's W = .164). A subject-level coherence analysis (within-domain similarity ratio = 0.95) confirms the six-domain grouping is a pragmatic benchmark taxonomy, not a validated latent construct. Within-family profile-shape clustering is significant for Anthropic, Google-Gemini, and Qwen (permutation p < .0001) but not DeepSeek, Google-Gemma, or OpenAI. Gemma 4 31B showed a +.202 AUROC improvement over Gemma 3 27B. Three models classified Invalid on binary KEEP/WITHDRAW probes produced normal profiles under verbalized confidence, confirming probe-format specificity. Bootstrap 95% CIs on 198 cells have median width .199. Split-half aggregate stability r = .893; profile-level split-half is weaker (grand median r = .184). These results show stable benchmark-domain variation obscured by aggregate metrics, and support benchmark-stage domain screening as a step before deployment in specific application areas.

多模态基础模型 1 篇

STARFlow2: Bridging Language Models and Normalizing Flows for Unified Multimodal Generation

High 2605.08029
Ying Shen, Tianrong Chen, Yuan Gao, Yizhe Zhang, Yuyang Wang, Miguel Ángel Bautista, Shuangfei Zhai, Joshua M. Susskind et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 STARFlow2，利用自回归归一化流统一多模态生成，消除因果文本生成与迭代视觉去噪的结构不匹配。
🎯研究动机

现有统一多模态系统结合自回归语言模型与扩散图像生成器，存在因果文本生成与迭代视觉去噪的结构不匹配，导致效率与一致性受限。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种真正统一的多模态生成框架，使文本与视觉生成共享相同的因果结构和缓存机制，避免结构不匹配。

🔎现象分析

观察到自回归归一化流与 LLM 共享因果掩码、KV-cache 和从左到右结构，是统一多模态生成的自然范式。

🛠️主要方法

基于 Pretzel 架构，通过残差跳跃连接垂直交错预训练 VLM 流与 TarFlow 流，采用深浅流设计和统一 FAE 潜空间，实现缓存友好的交错生成。

📊实验结果

在图像生成和多模态理解基准上展示了强性能，验证了自回归流作为统一多模态建模基础的可行性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 STARFlow2，利用自回归归一化流统一多模态生成，消除结构不匹配。
  • 设计 Pretzel 架构，通过残差连接交错 VLM 与 TarFlow 流，实现高效交错生成。
  • 引入深浅流设计和统一 FAE 潜空间，使文本与视觉输出直接进入 KV-cache。
⚠️方法局限
  • 摘要未提及与其他统一模型（如扩散 +LLM）的详细计算效率对比。
  • 可能对长序列交错生成的扩展性有待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Deep generative models have advanced rapidly across text and vision, motivating unified multimodal systems that can understand, reason over, and generate interleaved text-image sequences. Most existing approaches combine autoregressive language modeling with diffusion-based image generators, inheriting a structural mismatch between causal text generation and iterative visual denoising. We observe that autoregressive normalizing flows are autoregressive Transformers--sharing the same causal mask, KV-cache mechanism, and left-to-right structure as LLMs--making them the most natural paradigm for true unified multimodal generation. We present STARFlow2, built on the Pretzel architecture that vertically interleaves a pretrained VLM stream with a TarFlow stream via residual skip connections, both operating under the same causal mask. Combined with a deep-shallow flow design and a unified FAE latent space, STARFlow2 enables cache-friendly interleaved generation where both text and visual outputs directly enter the KV-cache without re-encoding. Experiments demonstrate strong performance across image generation and multimodal understanding benchmarks, validating autoregressive flows as a viable foundation for unified multimodal modeling.

对齐/安全/公平性/隐私 52 篇 · 8 个细分

安全对齐 22 篇

Hard to Read, Easy to Jailbreak: How Visual Degradation Bypasses MLLM Safety Alignment

High 2605.07250
Zhixue Song, Boyan Han, Yiwei Wang, Chi Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：视觉退化（如低分辨率）会绕过 MLLM 的安全对齐，导致越狱攻击，提出结构化认知卸载策略缓解风险。
🎯研究动机

视觉上下文压缩技术使 MLLM 能处理超长上下文，但引入了新的安全漏洞，现有研究未充分关注视觉退化对安全对齐的影响。

❓解决问题

视觉退化（低分辨率、噪声、几何畸变）如何绕过 MLLM 的安全对齐机制，以及如何防御此类攻击。

🔎现象分析

实验发现，随着图像分辨率降低，SOTA 模型的安全防御急剧下降，即使文本仍可读；该现象在多种视觉扰动（噪声、几何畸变）下一致，归因于“认知过载”——解码退化输入消耗注意力资源，削弱安全审计。

🛠️主要方法

提出“结构化认知卸载”策略，通过强制序列化流水线将视觉转录与安全评估解耦，从而缓解风险。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次揭示视觉退化（如低分辨率）可绕过 MLLM 安全对齐，导致越狱攻击。
  • 提出“认知过载”假说解释该现象，并设计结构化认知卸载策略进行防御。
⚠️方法局限
  • 策略可能增加计算开销或延迟。
  • 未验证对更复杂视觉扰动（如对抗性攻击）的鲁棒性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent advancements in visual context compression enable MLLMs to process ultra-long contexts efficiently by rendering text into images. However, we identify a critical vulnerability inherent to this paradigm: lowering image resolution inadvertently catalyzes jailbreaking. Our experiments reveal that the safety defenses of SOTA models deteriorate sharply as resolution degrades, surprisingly persisting even when text remains legible. We attribute this to ``Cognitive Overload'', hypothesizing that the effort required to decipher degraded inputs diverts attentional resources from safety auditing. This phenomenon is consistent across various visual perturbations, including noise and geometric distortion. To address this, we propose a simple ``Structured Cognitive Offloading'' strategy that mitigates these risks by enforcing a serialized pipeline to decouple visual transcription from safety assessment. Our work exposes a significant risk in vision-based compression and provides critical insights for the secure design of future MLLMs.

Activation Differences Reveal Backdoors: A Comparison of SAE Architectures

High 2605.07324
Sachin Kumar
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：Diff-SAE 比 Crosscoders 更有效检测语言模型后门，后门表现为方向性激活偏移。
🎯研究动机

后门攻击对语言模型构成严重安全威胁，但通过机制可解释性检测后门仍是一个开放挑战。

❓解决问题

如何利用稀疏自编码器架构有效隔离和检测微调模型中的后门相关特征。

🔎现象分析

后门表现为方向性激活偏移而非稀疏特征激活，因此基于差异的表示更有效。

🛠️主要方法

比较 Crosscoders 和 Differential SAE (Diff-SAE) 两种稀疏自编码器架构，在受控的 SQL 注入后门场景下，评估它们隔离后门特征的能力。

📊实验结果

在 SmolLM2-360M 模型上，使用基于年份的 SQL 注入后门，在 LoRA 和全秩微调两种设置下，评估多个 Transformer 层（14, 18, 22, 26）的性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现 Diff-SAE 在后门隔离任务上显著优于 Crosscoders，达到 0.40 的后门隔离分数和完美精度。
  • 揭示后门表现为方向性激活偏移，为基于差异的检测方法提供了理论依据。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅测试了单一后门类型（SQL 注入），可能不适用于其他后门模式。
  • 实验仅在小型模型（360M）上进行，未验证在更大模型上的效果。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Backdoor attacks on language models pose a significant threat to AI safety, where models behave normally on most inputs but exhibit harmful behavior when triggered by specific patterns. Detecting such backdoors through mechanistic interpretability remains an open challenge. We investigate two sparse autoencoder architectures -- Crosscoders and Differential SAEs (Diff-SAE) -- for isolating backdoor-related features in fine-tuned models. Using a controlled SQL injection backdoor triggered by year-based context ("2024" triggers vulnerable code, "2023" triggers safe code), we evaluate both approaches across LoRA and full-rank fine-tuning regimes on SmolLM2-360M. We find that Diff-SAE consistently and substantially outperforms Crosscoders for backdoor isolation. Diff-SAE achieves a Backdoor Isolation Score (BIS) of 0.40 with perfect precision (1.0) and zero false positive rate across most experimental conditions, while Crosscoders fail almost entirely with BIS below 0.02 in most cases. This performance gap holds across multiple transformer layers (14, 18, 22, 26) and both fine-tuning regimes, with full-rank fine-tuning producing particularly clean backdoor signals. Our results suggest that backdoors manifest as directional activation shifts rather than sparse feature activations, making difference-based representations fundamentally more effective for detection. These findings have important implications for AI safety monitoring and the development of interpretability tools for detecting model manipulation.

Confidence-Aware Alignment Makes Reasoning LLMs More Reliable

High 2605.07353
Kejia Chen, Jiawen Zhang, Yihong Wu, Kewei Gao, Jian Lou, Zunlei Feng, Mingli Song, Ruoxi Jia
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：CASPO 通过置信度感知的逐步偏好优化对齐 token 级置信度与逻辑正确性，无需外部验证器即可提升推理可靠性与效率。
🎯研究动机

大型推理模型常通过有缺陷的中间步骤得到正确答案，导致最终准确性与推理可靠性之间存在差距。现有对齐方法依赖外部验证器或大量采样，可扩展性受限。

❓解决问题

如何在不训练独立奖励模型的情况下，对齐 token 级置信度与逐步逻辑正确性，并利用校准后的置信度动态剪枝不确定推理分支。

🔎现象分析

模型常通过有缺陷的中间步骤得到正确答案，即最终准确性与推理可靠性不一致。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CASPO 框架，通过迭代直接偏好优化对齐 token 级置信度与逐步逻辑正确性；推理时提出置信度感知思维（CaT），利用校准后的置信度动态剪枝不确定推理分支，仅增加 O(V)延迟。

📊实验结果

在十个基准和多个模型族上进行实验，CASPO 在 AIME'24 和 AIME'25 上超越树搜索基线，且无需奖励模型数据。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CASPO 框架，无需外部验证器或独立奖励模型即可对齐置信度与逻辑正确性。
  • 提出 CaT 推理策略，利用校准置信度动态剪枝不确定分支，提升推理效率。
  • 在十个基准和多个模型族上验证了 CASPO 在推理可靠性和效率上的提升，并扩展至 Qwen3-8B-Base，在 AIME'24 和 AIME'25 上超越树搜索基线。
  • 发布带有置信度标注的逐步数据集，支持细粒度推理可靠性分析。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于具有逐步推理能力的模型。
  • 置信度校准的泛化性可能受限于训练数据分布。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large reasoning models often reach correct answers through flawed intermediate steps, creating a gap between final accuracy and reasoning reliability. Existing alignment strategies address this with external verifiers or massive sampling, limiting scalability. In this work, we introduce CASPO (Confidence-Aware Step-wise Preference Optimization), a framework that aligns token-level confidence with step-wise logical correctness through iterative Direct Preference Optimization, without training a separate reward model. During inference, we propose Confidence-aware Thought (CaT), which leverages this calibrated confidence to dynamically prune uncertain reasoning branches with negligible O(V) latency. Experiments across ten benchmarks and multiple model families show that CASPO consistently improves reasoning reliability and inference efficiency. CASPO scales to Qwen3-8B-Base and surpasses tree-search baselines on AIME'24 and AIME'25 without using reward-model data. We also release a step-wise dataset with confidence annotations to support fine-grained analysis of reasoning reliability. Code is available at this https URL .

Rubric-based On-policy Distillation

High 2605.07396
Junfeng Fang, Zhepei Hong, Mao Zheng, Mingyang Song, Gengsheng Li, Houcheng Jiang, Dan Zhang, Haiyun Guo et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出基于评分标准的在线蒸馏（ROPD），用结构化语义评分替代教师 logits，实现黑盒兼容的模型对齐。
🎯研究动机

在线蒸馏（OPD）依赖教师 logits，仅适用于白盒场景，限制了其在黑盒模型（如闭源 LLM）中的应用。

❓解决问题

如何在不使用教师 logits 的情况下，实现有效的在线蒸馏？

🔎现象分析

结构化语义评分可作为教师 logits 的可扩展替代方案，仅需教师生成的响应即可实现 OPD。

🛠️主要方法

从教师 - 学生对比中诱导出提示特定的评分标准，并用这些评分标准对学生生成进行评分，用于在线优化。

📊实验结果

在多个场景下与基于 logits 的 OPD 方法对比，ROPD 在多数场景中表现更优，样本效率提升达 10 倍。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ROPD 框架，首次将结构化语义评分用于在线蒸馏，实现黑盒兼容。
  • 实验表明 ROPD 在多数场景下优于基于 logits 的先进 OPD 方法，样本效率提升达 10 倍。
⚠️方法局限
  • 评分标准的自动生成可能引入噪声，影响蒸馏质量。
  • 当前仅在部分场景验证，通用性需进一步探索。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

On-policy distillation (OPD) is a powerful paradigm for model alignment, yet its reliance on teacher logits restricts its application to white-box scenarios. We contend that structured semantic rubrics can serve as a scalable alternative to teacher logits, enabling OPD using only teacher-generated responses. To prove it, we introduce ROPD, a simple yet foundational framework for rubric-based OPD. Specifically, ROPD induces prompt-specific rubrics from teacher-student contrasts, and then utilizes these rubrics to score the student rollouts for on-policy optimization. Empirically, ROPD outperforms the advanced logit-based OPD methods across most scenarios, and achieving up to a 10x gain in sample efficiency. These results position rubric-based OPD as a flexible, black-box-compatible alternative to the prevailing logit-based OPD, offering a simple yet strong baseline for scalable distillation across proprietary and open-source LLMs. Code is available at this https URL .

Safe, or Simply Incapable? Rethinking Safety Evaluation for Phone-Use Agents

High 2605.07630
Zhengyang Tang, Yi Zhang, Chenxin Li, Xin Lai, Pengyuan Lyu, Yiduo Guo, Weinong Wang, Junyi Li et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：PhoneSafety 基准揭示手机 Agent 的无害结果可能源于能力不足而非安全对齐，需区分不安全判断与无法行动。
🎯研究动机

现有安全评估无法区分手机 Agent 避免伤害是出于安全对齐还是能力不足，导致错误归因和修复方向偏差。

❓解决问题

如何设计评估框架，区分手机 Agent 在风险时刻的三种行为：安全行动、不安全行动、无法行动。

🔎现象分析

更强的通用手机操作能力并不保证更安全的选择；无法行动模式更像能力信号而非安全信号，集中在视觉和操作要求高的场景。

🛠️主要方法

构建 PhoneSafety 基准，包含 700 个来自 130+ 真实应用的风险时刻，每个实例要求模型在下一决策点选择安全行动、不安全行动或无法行动。

📊实验结果

评估了 8 个代表性手机 Agent，摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 PhoneSafety 基准，用于区分手机 Agent 的安全对齐与能力不足。
  • 揭示无害结果不能作为安全证据，需分离不安全判断与无法行动。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅覆盖手机交互场景，可能不适用于其他 Agent 类型。
  • 无法行动的分类可能受任务定义影响，需进一步验证鲁棒性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

When a phone-use agent avoids harm, does that show safety, or simply inability to act? Existing evaluations often cannot tell. A harmful outcome may be avoided because the agent recognized the risk and chose the safe action, or because it failed to understand the screen or execute any relevant action at all. These cases have different causes and call for different fixes, yet current benchmarks often merge them under task success, refusal, or final harmful outcome. We address this problem with PhoneSafety, a benchmark of 700 safety-critical moments drawn from real phone interactions across more than 130 apps. Each instance isolates the next decision at a risky moment and asks a simple question: does the model take the safe action, take the unsafe action, or fail to do anything useful? We evaluate eight representative phone-use agents under this framework. Our results reveal two main patterns. First, stronger general phone-use ability does not reliably imply safer choices at risky moments. Models that perform better on ordinary app tasks are not always the ones that behave more safely when the next action matters. Second, failures to do anything useful behave like a capability signal rather than a safety signal: they are concentrated in more visually and operationally demanding settings and remain stable when the evaluation protocol changes. Across models, failures split into two recurring patterns: unsafe choices in settings where the model can act but chooses wrongly, and inability to act in more visually and operationally demanding screens. Overall, a harmless outcome is not enough to count as evidence of safety. Evaluating phone-use agents requires separating unsafe judgment from inability to act.

The Endogeneity of Miscalibration: Impossibility and Escape in Scored Reporting

High 2605.07671
Lauri Lovén, Sasu Tarkoma
arXiv PDF cs.GT
TL;DR：严格真评分规则下，非仿射审批必然破坏校准，而阶跃阈值可恢复最优筛选。
🎯研究动机

在可扩展 AI 监督中，如何从自主智能体获取真实报告是关键问题，但智能体同时受非准确性渠道（如审批、分配）激励，导致传统评分规则失效。

❓解决问题

证明在评分报告机制中，任何非仿射审批函数都会使真实报告不再是最优策略，从而破坏校准。

🔎现象分析

非仿射审批函数会引入扰动，使得智能体在联合目标下偏离真实报告，且该扰动无法避免。

🛠️主要方法

理论证明：对所有严格真评分规则，非仿射审批导致次优报告；构造性方案：阶跃函数审批阈值可实现一阶最优筛选。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 证明非仿射审批必然破坏校准，给出封闭形式扰动公式。
  • 提出阶跃函数审批阈值可恢复一阶最优，并证明 Brier 评分下福利等价唯一性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论结果依赖于智能体偏差可检测的假设。
  • 阶跃阈值在实际应用中可能过于刚性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Eliciting truthful reports from autonomous agents is a core problem in scalable AI oversight: a principal scores the agent's report using a strictly proper scoring rule, but the agent also benefits from the report through a non-accuracy channel (approval for autonomous action, allocation share, downstream control). The same structure appears in classical mechanism-design settings such as marketplace operation. Our main result is an endogeneity: the principal's optimal oversight necessarily uses a non-affine approval function to screen types, yet any non-affine approval makes truthful reporting suboptimal under the combined objective whenever deviation is undetectable. The principal cannot avoid the perturbation that undermines calibration. This impossibility holds for all strictly proper scoring rules, with a closed-form perturbation formula. A constructive escape exists: a step-function approval threshold achieves first-best screening for every strictly proper scoring rule, because the agent's binary inflate-or-not choice creates a type-space threshold regardless of the generator's curvature. Under the Brier score specifically, the type-independent inflation cost yields a welfare equivalence between second-best and first-best; we prove this equivalence is unique to Brier (the welfare gap under smooth $C^1$ oversight is bounded below by $\Omega(\text{Var}(1/G'') (\gamma/\beta)^2)$ for every non-Brier rule). Two instances develop the framework: AI agent oversight (the lead motivating setting) and marketplace operation (a parallel mechanism-design domain). The message for AI alignment is direct: smooth scoring-based oversight cannot elicit truthful reports from a strategic agent; sharp thresholds are the calibration-preserving design.

Beyond Confidence: Rethinking Self-Assessments for Performance Prediction in LLMs

High 2605.07806
Sree Bhattacharyya, Samarth Khanna, Leona Chen, Lucas Craig, Tharun Dilliraj, James Z. Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出基于认知评价理论的多维自我评估方法，发现努力和能力维度比置信度更能预测 LLM 错误。
🎯研究动机

LLM 在关键场景中需要可靠自我评估，但现有置信度方法不一致且过度乐观，亟需更有效的预测手段。

❓解决问题

如何设计更可靠的 LLM 自我评估机制以准确预测模型性能（尤其是失败情况）。

🔎现象分析

置信度作为预测器不一致且过度乐观；努力和能力维度表现更优且更稳定；任务类型影响最有效维度。

🛠️主要方法

基于认知评价理论，设计六个评价维度（努力、能力等）与置信度对比，在 12 个 LLM 和 38 个任务上评估其预测效用。

📊实验结果

在 12 个 LLM 和 38 个任务（覆盖 8 个领域）上评估，比较六个评价维度与置信度的预测性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出多维自我评估框架，超越单一置信度指标。
  • 系统实验表明努力和能力维度在多数设置下优于置信度。
  • 揭示任务特征与最有效评估维度的关联。
⚠️方法局限
  • 未探讨维度间交互或组合策略。
  • 可能依赖特定提示工程，泛化性需验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used in settings where reliable self-assessment is critical. Assessing model reliability has evolved from using probabilistic correctness estimates to, more recently, eliciting verbalized confidence. Confidence, however, has been shown to be an inconsistent and overoptimistic predictor of model correctness. Drawing on cognitive appraisal theory, a framework from human psychology that decomposes self-evaluation into multiple components, we propose a multidimensional perspective on model self-assessment. We elicit six appraisal-based dimensions of self-assessment, alongside confidence, and evaluate their utility for predicting model failure across 12 LLMs and 38 tasks spanning eight domains. We find that competence-related appraisal dimensions, particularly effort and ability, consistently match or outperform confidence across most settings. Effort additionally yields less overoptimistic estimates that remain stable across model sizes. In contrast, affective dimensions provide marginally predictive signals. Furthermore, the most informative dimension varies systematically with task characteristics: effort is most predictive for reasoning-intensive tasks, while ability and confidence dominate on retrieval-oriented tasks. Broadly, our findings indicate that structured multidimensional self-assessment is a promising approach to improving the reliability and safety of language model deployment across diverse real-world settings.

MedVIGIL: Evaluating Trustworthy Medical VLMs Under Broken Visual Evidence

High 2605.07919
Hanqi Jiang, Junhao Chen, Yi Pan, Lifeng Chen, Weihang You, Haozhen Gong, Ruiyu Yan, Jinglei Lv et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 MedVIGIL 基准，评估医学 VLM 在视觉证据受损时的可信度，发现最强模型与人类专家仍有显著差距。
🎯研究动机

现有医学 VLM 评估通常基于完整图像 - 问题对，但临床可信使用要求模型能识别证据基础失效的情况，而当前缺乏对此类静默失败的评估。

❓解决问题

医学 VLM 在视觉证据受损（如错误前提、措辞扰动、仅知识改写或 ROI 损坏图像）时，可能返回流畅的非拒绝回答，需要系统评估其可信度。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 300 个案例的评估套件 MedVIGIL，每个案例由四位认证放射科医生监督，包含多项临床标注（如金标准答案、拒绝选项、错误前提陷阱等），并设计 7 个正确性条件审计指标汇总为 MedVIGIL 复合分数（MCS）。

📊实验结果

审计 16 个视觉模型和 2 个纯文本基线，独立放射科医生 MCS 为 83.3（静默失败率 5.8%），最强模型 Claude Opus 4.7 得 69.2，存在 14.1 分差距。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MedVIGIL 基准，系统评估医学 VLM 在视觉证据受损下的可信度。
  • 发布包含 2556 个 MCQ 探针、240 个反事实三元组等丰富标注的数据集。
  • 审计 16 个视觉模型和 2 个纯文本基线，揭示最强模型与人类专家的显著差距。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于四个公开医学 VQA 来源，可能不覆盖所有临床场景。
  • 评估指标主要针对静默失败，未全面覆盖其他可信度维度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Medical vision--language models (VLMs) are usually evaluated on intact image--question pairs, but trustworthy clinical use requires a stronger property: a model must recognise when the evidential basis for an answer has failed. We study this through silent failures under perturbed evidence, where a vision-required medical question is paired with a false premise, wording perturbation, knowledge-only rewrite, or ROI-corrupted image, yet the model returns a fluent non-refusal answer. We introduce medvigil, a 300-case evaluation suite drawn from four public medical VQA sources, supervised end to end by four board-certified radiologists: every gold answer, refusal option, candidate-answer set, paraphrase, false-premise trap, ROI box, and clinical risk tier is clinician-authored. Two attending radiologists annotate every case in parallel, a senior radiologist consolidates the released manifest, and a separate fourth radiologist independent of construction answers every probe to provide the human reference baseline. The release contains 2{,}556 MCQ probes, 240 counterfactual triplets, physician-adjudicated risk-tier and answerability flags, ROI boxes, and a paired open-ended variant. We report seven correctness-conditioned audit metrics that summarise into the medvigil Composite Score (MCS), and audit 16 vision-capable models plus two text-only baselines. The independent radiologist scores MCS 83.3 at silent-failure rate 5.8%, leaving a 14.1-point composite headroom above the strongest audited model (Claude Opus 4.7 at 69.2). The benchmark and evaluation harness are publicly released.

Beyond Pairs: Your Language Model is Secretly Optimizing a Preference Graph

High 2605.08037
Ning Liu, Chuanneng Sun, Kristina Klinkner, Shervin Malmasi
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：GraphDPO 将成对偏好优化扩展为有向无环偏好图，利用排序结构实现更稳定、可扩展的对齐。
🎯研究动机

现有 DPO 仅利用成对偏好比较，但在多轮生成数据中会丢弃传递性、引入冗余或冲突监督，导致优化不稳定。

❓解决问题

如何利用多轮生成数据中的完整偏好图结构（而非独立成对比较）来更有效地对齐语言模型。

🔎现象分析

将多轮数据折叠为独立成对比较会丢失传递性，产生冗余或冲突监督，导致优化不稳定。

🛠️主要方法

提出 GraphDPO，基于有向无环偏好图，使用图结构 Plackett-Luce 目标聚合邻域监督，强制传递性，并通过等价类构造处理离散信号，保持线性复杂度。

📊实验结果

在推理和程序合成任务上进行了实验，展示了优越性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 GraphDPO，将 DPO 泛化到偏好图，利用排序结构进行对齐。
  • 引入等价类构造和可选真实答案锚定，稳定训练并提升性能。
  • 在推理和程序合成任务上验证了图结构偏好建模的有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖可排序的偏好图，可能不适用于非传递性偏好。
  • 等价类构造可能引入额外超参数。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) aligns language models using pairwise preference comparisons, offering a simple and effective alternative to Reinforcement Learning (RL) from human feedback. However, in many practical settings, training data consists of multiple rollouts per prompt, inducing rich preference structure that pairwise DPO fails to exploit. Collapsing such data into independent pairs discards transitivity, introduces redundant or conflicting supervision, and can lead to unstable optimization. We propose Graph Direct Preference Optimization (GraphDPO), a principled generalization of DPO that operates over directed acyclic preference graphs induced by rollout rankings. GraphDPO encodes dominance relations as edges and optimizes a graph-structured Plackett--Luce-inspired objective that aggregates supervision over graph neighborhoods, enforcing transitivity while recovering standard DPO as a special case. To handle discrete or sparse signals, we introduce an equivalence-class construction where responses with identical preferences form graph layers, and intra-layer edges contribute zero loss, preventing spurious gradients. Despite leveraging full graph structure, GraphDPO maintains linear per-prompt complexity via efficient log-sum-exp aggregation. We further incorporate optional ground-truth anchoring by inserting verified solutions as dominant nodes and applying an annealed schedule that stabilizes early training while gradually relaxing oracle supervision. Experiments on reasoning and program synthesis tasks demonstrate superior performance, suggesting that graph-structured preference modeling is a scalable and robust alternative to pairwise and listwise alignment objectives.

Towards Security-Auditable LLM Agents: A Unified Graph Representation

High 2605.06812
