对边界框坐标逐坐标应用 CP 并用 Bonferroni 校正；利用概率检测器的 aleatoric 不确定性估计缩放区间；扩展为两步流水线：先用 RAPS 构建类别预测集，再对边界框进行条件化 CP。

📊实验结果

在 KITTI、BDD、CODA 三个自动驾驶数据集上评估，包括跨域分布偏移场景，缩放 CP 相比未缩放 CP 实现高达 19% 的 IoU 提升和 39% 的区间分数降低，且不牺牲覆盖率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统比较了未缩放和缩放 CP 在多类目标检测中的表现，并集成了概率检测器的不确定性估计。
  • 提出了两步流水线，结合类别集预测和条件化边界框 CP，提升了区间锐利度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖于概率检测器提供的 aleatoric 不确定性估计，可能受检测器质量影响。
  • Bonferroni 校正可能过于保守，导致区间偏宽。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Conformal Prediction (CP) is a distribution-free method for constructing prediction sets with marginal finite-sample coverage guarantees, making it a suitable framework for reliable uncertainty quantification in safety-critical object detection. However, object detection introduces structured multi-output predictions, complicating the application of classical CP theory developed for single outputs. In addition, standard, unscaled CP produces fixed-width prediction intervals across inputs, leading to unnecessary width for low-uncertainty predictions. While scaled CP addresses this by adapting the interval width to an input-dependent uncertainty estimate, prior work has neither systematically compared unscaled and scaled CP for multi-class object detection, nor integrated CP with a complementary uncertainty quantification method in this setting. We fill this gap by: (i) applying CP coordinate-wise to bounding box corners with a Bonferroni correction for box-level guarantees; (ii) scaling the resulting intervals using per-prediction aleatoric uncertainty estimates derived from a probabilistic object detector trained with loss attenuation, evaluated in uncalibrated and two calibrated variants; (iii) extending to a two-step pipeline that constructs prediction sets for the class using RAPS and conditions the conformalized bounding boxes on the predicted class set. Across three autonomous driving datasets (KITTI, BDD, CODA), including a cross-domain setting under distribution shift, scaled CP consistently improves interval sharpness over unscaled CP, achieving up to 19% higher IoU and 39% lower interval scores, without sacrificing coverage. Class-wise calibration further improves coverage for both variants with a negligible effect on sharpness. Together, these improvements yield more actionable uncertainty estimates for real-time, real-world object detection.

幻觉与事实性 3 篇

Hallucination Detection via Activations of Open-Weight Proxy Analyzers

High 2605.07209
Akshita Singh, Prabesh Paudel, Siddhartha Roy
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出代理分析器框架，利用小型开源模型内部激活检测 LLM 幻觉，在多个规模模型上超越 ReDeEP。
🎯研究动机

大型语言模型（LLM）的幻觉问题严重影响其可靠性，现有检测方法通常需要访问生成模型的内部状态，这在闭源 API 场景下不可行。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖生成模型内部状态的情况下，准确检测 LLM 生成的文本中的幻觉。

🔎现象分析

不同规模（0.5B-9B）的代理分析器在幻觉检测性能上高度聚类（AUC 仅差 2.3 个百分点），且 3B 模型在 RAGTruth 上优于 8B 模型，表明模型大小并非性能决定因素。

🛠️主要方法

使用小型开源模型作为代理分析器，通过其内部激活（残差流范数、注意力、熵、MLP 激活、logit-lens 轨迹及三种新的 token 级接地统计）构建 18 个特征，训练堆叠集成分类器。

📊实验结果

在 5 个幻觉数据集（共 72,135 样本）上训练，使用 7 种代理分析器架构（0.5B-9B 参数），在 RAGTruth 和 LLM-AggreFact 上测试，AUC 和 F1 指标均优于 ReDeEP。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出无需访问生成模型内部状态的代理分析器框架，适用于闭源和开源生成模型。
  • 设计 18 个基于 Transformer 处理文本过程的特征，包括三种新的 token 级接地统计。
  • 在 7 种不同架构和规模的代理分析器上验证，均显著优于 ReDeEP（AUC 提升 7.4-10.3 个百分点）。
⚠️方法局限
  • 代理分析器本身可能引入额外计算开销。
  • 特征设计依赖 Transformer 架构，可能不适用于非 Transformer 模型。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce a proxy-analyzer framework for detecting hallucinations in large language models. Instead of looking inside the generating model, our system reads already-generated text through a small locally hosted open-weight model and spots hallucinations using the reader's own internal activations. This works just as well when the generator is a closed API like GPT-4 as when it is any open-weight model. We built eighteen features grounded in how transformers process text, covering residual stream norms, per-head source-document attention, entropy, MLP activations, logit-lens trajectories, and three new token-level grounding statistics. We trained a stacking ensemble on 72,135 samples from five hallucination datasets. We tested across seven analyzer architectures from 0.5 billion to 9 billion parameters: Qwen2.5 at 0.5B and 7B, Gemma-2 at 2B and 9B, Pythia at 1.4B, and LLaMA-3 at both 3B and 8B. Across all seven, we consistently beat ReDeEP's token-level AUC of 0.73 on RAGTruth by 7.4 to 10.3 percentage points. Qwen2.5-7B reached an F1 of 0.717, just above ReDeEP's 0.713, while Qwen2.5-0.5B hit 0.706. The most striking finding is how tightly all seven models cluster: AUC spans only 2.3 percentage points across an eighteen-fold difference in model size. Even more surprising, our 3B LLaMA outperforms our 8B LLaMA on RAGTruth, showing that bigger is not always better even within the same model family. Both RAGTruth and LLM-AggreFact include outputs from multiple LLM families, so our results are not skewed toward any particular generator.

LLM hallucinations in the wild: Large-scale evidence from non-existent citations

High 2605.07723
Zhenyue Zhao, Yihe Wang, Toby Stuart, Mathijs De Vaan, Paul Ginsparg, Yian Yin
arXiv PDF cs.DL
TL;DR：大规模审计发现 LLM 引用幻觉在学术文献中激增，且加剧了科学认可的不平等。
🎯研究动机

LLM 生成的虚假信息在现实世界中的规模和影响尚不清楚，需要大规模实证证据来揭示问题的严重性。

❓解决问题

量化 LLM 引用幻觉在学术文献中的实际发生率、分布特征及其对科学公平性的影响。

🔎现象分析

LLM 被广泛采用后，不存在的参考文献数量急剧上升；幻觉引用在 AI 快速应用的领域、AI 辅助写作特征的稿件以及小型 / 早期职业作者团队中尤为突出；幻觉引用不成比例地分配给知名和男性学者，可能加剧现有不平等。

🛠️主要方法

对 arXiv、bioRxiv、SSRN 和 PubMed Central 中 250 万篇论文的 1.11 亿条参考文献进行审计，检测不存在的引用。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提供了 LLM 引用幻觉在学术文献中大规模存在的实证证据，估计 2025 年有 146,932 个幻觉引用。
  • 揭示了幻觉引用在作者团队、领域和性别上的分布偏差，表明其可能强化科学认可的不平等。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于科学引用这一特定对象，可能无法完全代表其他类型的幻觉。
  • 保守估计可能低估了实际幻觉数量。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models (LLMs) are known to generate plausible but false information across a wide range of contexts, yet the real-world magnitude and consequences of this hallucination problem remain poorly understood. Here we leverage a uniquely verifiable object - scientific citations - to audit 111 million references across 2.5 million papers in arXiv, bioRxiv, SSRN, and PubMed Central. We find a sharp rise in non-existent references following widespread LLM adoption, with a conservative estimate of 146,932 hallucinated citations in 2025 alone. These errors are diffusely embedded across many papers but especially pronounced in fields with rapid AI uptake, in manuscripts with linguistic signatures of AI-assisted writing, and among small and early-career author teams. At the same time, hallucinated references disproportionately assign credit to already prominent and male scholars, suggesting that LLM-generated errors may reinforce existing inequities in scientific recognition. Preprint moderation and journal publication processes capture only a fraction of these errors, suggesting that the spread of hallucinated content has outpaced existing safeguards. Together, these findings demonstrate that LLM hallucinations are infiltrating knowledge production at scale, threatening both the reliability and equity of future scientific discovery as human and AI systems draw on the existing literature.

MELD: Multi-Task Equilibrated Learning Detector for AI-Generated Text

High 2605.06903
Chenjun Li, Cheng Wan, Johannes C. Paetzold
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：MELD 通过多任务均衡学习提升 AI 生成文本检测的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
🎯研究动机

现有 AI 文本检测器仅优化单一二分类目标，导致表示缺乏对生成器、攻击和领域结构的建模，在攻击、低误报率等场景下性能不足。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个鲁棒、可迁移且低误报率的 AI 生成文本检测器。

🔎现象分析

单一二分类任务饱和后，表示无法学习生成器、攻击类型和领域结构等辅助信息。

🛠️主要方法

MELD 在共享编码器上附加生成器家族、攻击类型和源领域辅助头，使用同方差不确定性权重平衡四个损失；通过 EMA 教师和学生蒸馏增强鲁棒性；使用难负样本对排序损失扩大 AI 文本与最易混淆人类文本的分数间隔。

📊实验结果

在 RAID 排行榜上 MELD 是最强开源检测器，与领先商业模型竞争；在标准留出基准上匹配或超越监督基线；在 MELD-eval 上以 1% FPR 达到 99.9% TPR。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出多任务均衡学习框架 MELD，通过辅助监督提升检测鲁棒性和泛化性。
  • 在 RAID 排行榜上达到开源最优，与商业模型竞争，并在低 FPR 下表现突出。
  • 引入 MELD-eval 评估池，无需微调即在 1% FPR 下达到 99.9% TPR。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对未见过的生成器类型或攻击方式泛化有限。
  • 多任务训练可能增加训练复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large language models are now embedded in everyday writing workflows, making reliable AI-generated text detection important for academic integrity, content moderation, and provenance tracking. In practice, however, a detector must do more than achieve high aggregate AUROC on clean, in-distribution human and AI text: it should remain robust to attacks and adversarial rewrites, transfer to unseen generators and domains, and operate at low false-positive rates (FPR). Most existing detectors optimize a single AI/Human objective, giving the representation little incentive to learn generator, attack, or domain structure once the binary task saturates. We introduce MELD (Multi-Task Equilibrated Learning Detector), a deployable detector for AI-generated text that enriches binary detection with auxiliary supervision. MELD attaches generator-family, attack-type, and source-domain heads to a shared encoder, and balances the four losses with learned homoscedastic uncertainty weights. To improve robustness, an EMA teacher predicts on clean inputs while an attack-augmented student is distilled toward the teacher. MELD further uses a hard-negative pairwise ranking loss to enlarge the score margin between AI-generated texts and the most confusable human texts. At inference, all auxiliary heads are discarded, giving MELD the same interface and cost as a standard detector. On the public RAID leaderboard, MELD is the strongest open-source detector and is competitive with leading commercial models, especially under attack and at low FPR. Across standard held-out benchmarks, MELD matches or outperforms supervised baselines. We further introduce MELD-eval, a held-out evaluation pool built from recent chat models released by four major LLM providers. Without additional finetuning, MELD achieves 99.9% TPR at 1% FPR on MELD-eval, while many baselines degrade sharply.

越狱与攻击 2 篇

GPO-V: Jailbreak Diffusion Vision Language Model by Global Probability Optimization

High 2605.07399
Yu Pan, Andi Zhang, Yi Wang, Sibei Yang, Wenjie Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：针对扩散视觉语言模型，提出全局概率优化（GPO）越狱范式，利用渐进拒绝机制中的潜在攻击面生成可迁移的视觉扰动。
🎯研究动机

扩散视觉语言模型（dVLMs）基于非因果扩散大语言模型，在传统越狱攻击（如固定前缀优化）下看似鲁棒，但这种感知具有欺骗性，实际存在独特的安全漏洞，亟需揭示并防御。

❓解决问题

如何利用 dVLMs 的渐进拒绝模式中的潜在攻击面，设计针对其去噪轨迹的视觉模态越狱方法。

🔎现象分析

观察到 dVLMs 存在独特的拒绝模式：即时拒绝和渐进拒绝；固定前缀优化攻击常因触发渐进拒绝而失败，但渐进精炼过程本身暴露了新的潜在攻击面。

🛠️主要方法

提出全局概率优化（GPO）越狱范式，通过操纵掩码扩散模型的全局生成动态绕过安全护栏；并基于此设计 GPO-V，首个针对 dVLMs 的视觉模态越狱框架。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了扩散视觉语言模型（dVLMs）中独特的拒绝模式（即时拒绝和渐进拒绝）及其潜在攻击面。
  • 提出全局概率优化（GPO）范式，利用去噪轨迹进行越狱，并实现首个视觉模态越狱框架 GPO-V。
  • 实验证明 GPO-V 能生成具有出色跨模型迁移性的隐蔽扰动，暴露非自回归生成架构的关键安全缺口。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅针对特定类型的扩散视觉语言模型有效。
  • 跨模型迁移性可能受限于模型架构相似性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Diffusion Vision-Language Models (dVLMs), built upon the non-causal foundations of Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs), have demonstrated remarkable efficacy in multimodal tasks by departing from the traditional autoregressive generation paradigm. While dVLMs appear inherently robust against conventional jailbreak tactics, which we categorize as Fixed Prefix Optimization (FPO) (e.g., anchoring responses with "Sure, here is"), this perceived resilience is deceptive. Our investigation into the safety landscape of dVLMs reveals a unique refusal pattern: Immediate Refusal and Progressive Refusal. We find that while FPO-based attacks often fail by triggering the latter, the progressive refinement process itself uncovers a novel, latent attack surface. To exploit this vulnerability, we propose Global Probability Optimization (GPO), a general jailbreak paradigm designed specifically for the denoising trajectory of masked diffusion models. Unlike prefix-based methods, GPO manipulates the global generative dynamics to bypass guardrails in diffusion language models. Building on this, we introduce GPO-V, the first visual-modality jailbreak framework tailored for dVLMs. Empirical results demonstrate that GPO-V produces stealthy perturbations with exceptional cross-model transferability, revealing a critical security gap in non-sequential generative architectures. Our findings underscore the critical urgency of addressing safety alignment in dVLMs. These results necessitate an immediate and fundamental re-evaluation of current defense paradigms to mitigate the unique risks of diffusion-based generation. Our code is available at: this https URL .

OrchJail: Jailbreaking Tool-Calling Text-to-Image Agents by Orchestration-Guided Fuzzing

High 2605.07414
Jianming Chen, Yawen Wang, Junjie Wang, Zhe Liu, Qing Wang, Fanjiang Xu
arXiv PDF cs.MA
TL;DR：提出 OrchJail 框架，利用编排引导的模糊测试来越狱调用工具的文生图智能体，揭示工具编排是新的安全攻击面。
🎯研究动机

工具调用的文生图智能体通过多步工具链完成复杂任务，但工具编排可能将单个无害步骤组合成有害输出，而现有仅基于提示的越狱技术不足以应对这种新攻击面。

❓解决问题

如何有效越狱工具调用的文生图智能体，利用工具编排中的高风险模式生成有害输出。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，工具编排中单个无害步骤的组合可能导致不安全结果，且成功越狱的工具调用轨迹与提示措辞存在因果关系。

🛠️主要方法

提出 OrchJail，一种编排引导的模糊测试框架，通过学习成功越狱的工具调用轨迹及其与提示措辞的因果关系，直接引导模糊搜索朝向更可能触发不安全多步工具行为的提示。

📊实验结果

在多个代表性工具调用文生图智能体上进行实验，OrchJail 在越狱有效性、效率、攻击成功率、图像保真度和查询成本方面均优于基线，且对常见越狱防御具有鲁棒性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次揭示工具编排是工具调用文生图智能体的关键安全攻击面。
  • 提出 OrchJail 框架，通过编排引导的模糊测试实现高效越狱。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定类型的工具调用 T2I 智能体。
  • 未讨论对防御机制的适应性更新。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Tool-calling text-to-image (T2I) agents can plan and execute multi-step tool chains to accomplish complex generation and editing queries. However, this capability introduces a new safety attack surface: harmful outputs may arise from tool orchestration, where individually benign steps combine into unsafe results, making prompt-only jailbreak techniques insufficient. We present OrchJail, an orchestration-guided fuzzing framework for jailbreaking tool-calling T2I agents. Its core idea is to exploit high-risk tool-orchestration patterns: by learning from successful jailbreak tool-calling traces and their causal relationships to prompt wording, OrchJail directly guides the fuzzing search toward prompts that are more likely to trigger unsafe multi-step tool behaviors, rather than relying on surface-level textual perturbations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OrchJail improves jailbreak effectiveness and efficiency across representative toolcalling T2I agents, achieving higher attack success rates, better image fidelity, and lower query costs, while remaining robust against common jailbreak defenses. Our work highlights tool orchestration as a critical, previously unexplored attack surface and provides a novel framework for uncovering safety risks in T2I agents.

数据集与基准 31 篇 · 6 个细分

Agent/工具使用评测 17 篇

SREGym: A Live Benchmark for AI SRE Agents with High-Fidelity Failure Scenarios

High 2605.07161
Jackson Clark, Yiming Su, Saad Mohammad Rafid Pial, Yifang Tian, Lily Gniedziejko, Hans-Arno Jacobsen, Yinfang Chen, Tianyin Xu
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：SREGym 是一个高保真、可扩展的 AI SRE 智能体实时基准测试平台，包含 90 个真实故障场景。
🎯研究动机

现有 SRE 基准测试任务过于简化且难以扩展，无法反映生产环境的复杂性，亟需高保真、可扩展的评估平台。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个能模拟生产环境复杂故障（多层故障、环境噪声、元稳定故障等）的 SRE 智能体基准测试。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于真实云原生系统栈构建实时系统环境，通过故障注入器模拟高保真故障场景，并设计模块化、可扩展的框架来编排多层故障和噪声注入。

📊实验结果

使用 SREGym 评估了前沿智能体，显示其在处理不同故障时能力差异显著，端到端结果差异高达 40%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出了 SREGym，一个高保真、可扩展的 SRE 智能体基准测试平台，包含 90 个真实故障场景。
  • 通过评估前沿智能体，揭示了不同智能体在处理不同类型故障时能力差异显著（端到端结果差异高达 40%）。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅覆盖了部分故障类型，未能涵盖所有生产环境中的罕见故障。
  • 基准测试的实时环境可能引入不可控的随机性，影响评估的可重复性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

AI agents are increasingly used to diagnose and mitigate failures in production systems, known as agentic Site Reliability Engineering (SRE). Current SRE benchmarks are limited to oversimplistic SRE tasks and are unfortunately hard to extend due to bespoke designs. We present SREGym, a high-fidelity benchmark for SRE agents. SREGym exposes a live system environment built atop real-world cloud-native system stacks, where high-fidelity failure scenarios are simulated through fault injectors. SREGym models the complexity of production environments by simulating (1) a wide range of faults at different layers, (2) various ambient noises, and (3) diverse failure modes such as metastable failures and correlated failures. SREGym is architected as a modular, extensible framework that orchestrates fault and noise injectors across stacks. SREGym currently includes 90 realistic, challenging SRE problems. We use SREGym to evaluate frontier agents and show that their capabilities varies significantly in addressing different kinds of failures, with up to 40% differences in end-to-end results. SREGym is actively maintained as an open-source project and has been used by researchers and practitioners.

EnvSimBench: A Benchmark for Evaluating and Improving LLM-Based Environment Simulation

High 2605.07247
Yi Liu, TingFeng Hui, Wei Zhang, Li Sun, Ningxin Su, Jian Wang, Sen Su
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出首个 LLM 环境模拟能力基准 EnvSimBench，发现所有模型在状态变化时存在灾难性失败，并设计约束驱动管线降低幻觉与成本。
🎯研究动机

手动构建交互环境成本高、扩展性差、多样性有限，而 LLM 模拟环境虽具潜力，但存在幻觉、逻辑不一致和状态漂移等未经验证的核心问题。

❓解决问题

LLM 能否准确模拟环境反馈这一核心假设未经检验，且现有方法缺乏量化评估框架和系统性诊断工具。

🔎现象分析

所有 SOTA 语言模型在环境状态不变时近乎完美，但在多状态同时更新时灾难性失败，暴露出普遍的状态变化悬崖。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 400 样本、167 个环境的基准 EnvSimBench，提供可验证标签和三维细粒度难度分层；设计约束驱动模拟管线减少幻觉。

📊实验结果

系统评估了所有 SOTA 语言模型，发现状态变化悬崖现象；约束驱动管线在合成产量和成本上取得显著提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次形式化定义并操作化环境模拟能力（EnvSim Ability）作为可量化研究目标
  • 构建严格基准 EnvSimBench，覆盖多样环境并配备可验证标签与难度分层
  • 系统评估揭示所有模型存在普遍的状态变化悬崖失败模式
  • 设计约束驱动模拟管线，将环境合成产量提升 6.8%，成本降低超 90%
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准规模有限（400 样本），可能未覆盖所有环境类型
  • 约束驱动管线的泛化性需在更多场景验证
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Scalable AI agents training relies on interactive environments that faithfully simulate the consequences of agent actions. Manually crafted environments are expensive to build, brittle to extend, and fundamentally limited in diversity. A promising direction is to replace manually crafted environments with LLM-simulated counterparts. However, this paradigm hinges on an unexamined core assumption: LLMs can accurately simulate environmental feedback. In practice, LLM-simulated environments suffer from hallucinations, logical inconsistencies, and silent state drift failures that corrupt agent reward signals and compound the construction costs that the paradigm was designed to eliminate. To address this gap, we propose EnvSimBench with four contributions: 1) We provide the first formal definition and operationalization of Environment Simulation Ability (EnvSim Ability) as a quantifiable research objective. 2) We construct EnvSimBench, a rigorous benchmark covering 400 samples across 167 diverse environments, equipped with verifiable labels and fine-grained difficulty stratification along three axes. 3) Systematic evaluations reveal that all state-of-the-art language models suffer from a universal state change cliff: they achieve near-perfect accuracy on tasks when the environment state remains invariant, yet fail catastrophically when multiple states need simultaneous updates. This finding exposes EnvSim Ability as a critical yet largely unaddressed capability gap. 4) We design a constraint-driven simulation pipeline that substantially reduces hallucination, boosts environment synthesis yield by 6.8%, and cuts costs by over 90%. Overall, EnvSimBench serves as both a diagnostic framework and a practical optimization path for reliable LLM-based environment simulation, establishing a foundation for scalable agent training. Code and data are available at this https URL

Can Agents Price a Reaction? Evaluating LLMs on Chemical Cost Reasoning

High 2605.07251
Yuyang Wu, Yue Huang, Shuaike Shen, Xujian Wang, Shuhao Zhang, Qiyao Xue, Weichen Liu, Runtian Gao et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出化学成本推理基准 ChemCost，评估 LLM 代理在反应成本估算中的表现，发现最强模型准确率仅 50.6%。
🎯研究动机

现有科学工具使用评估依赖人工或 LLM 评判，缺乏精确、无偏的基准，化学领域尤其缺乏对代理在成本推理等实际任务中的严格评估。

❓解决问题

评估 LLM 代理在化学采购成本估算任务中的能力，该任务要求代理理解化学身份、检索供应商报价、选择可购买包装、归一化数量并从反应描述计算成本。

🔎现象分析

工具访问对任务必要但不充分；最强代理在干净输入上准确率仅 50.6%，在噪声输入下显著下降；失败源于脆弱的解析、无效的证据整合、无效的包装选择和非收敛的工具使用。

🛠️主要方法

构建 ChemCost 基准，包含 1,427 个可评估反应，冻结定价快照覆盖 2,261 种化学品和 230,775 条供应商报价，支持标量评分和阶段级诊断；并构造噪声注入视图测试鲁棒性。

📊实验结果

在多个前沿、开源和化学专用 LLM 代理上进行实验，评估干净和噪声输入下的准确率，并分析各阶段错误。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出化学成本推理任务及 ChemCost 基准，提供精确、无偏的评估。
  • 通过阶段级诊断揭示 LLM 代理在工具使用中的具体失败模式。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准基于固定定价快照，可能无法反映实时价格变化。
  • 仅评估成本推理，未覆盖其他化学工具使用任务。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Language Models (LLMs) have become increasingly capable as tool-using agents, with benchmarks spanning diverse general agentic tasks. Yet rigorous evaluation of scientific tool use remains limited. In chemistry, recent agents can plan syntheses and invoke domain-specific tools, but evaluations often rely on curated demonstrations, expert assessment, or LLM-as-judge scoring rather than exact, judge-free ground truth. We address this gap with chemical procurement cost estimation, a practical task in which an agent must ground chemical identities, retrieve supplier quotes, select valid purchasable packs, normalize quantities, and compute cost from a reaction description. We introduce ChemCost, a benchmark of 1,427 evaluable reactions grounded to a frozen pricing snapshot covering 2,261 chemicals and 230,775 supplier quotes, supporting scalar scoring and stage-level diagnosis of grounding, retrieval, procurement, and arithmetic failures. To evaluate robustness, we further construct controlled noise-injected views that perturb chemical aliases, quantity expressions, missing fields, and input formatting. Experiments with frontier, open-weight, and chemistry-specialized LLM agents show that tool access is necessary but insufficient for solving the task. The strongest agents reach only 50.6% accuracy within 25% relative error on clean inputs and degrade substantially with realistic noise. Stage-level analysis further shows that failures arise from brittle parsing, ineffective evidence integration, invalid pack selection, and non-convergent tool use.

EgoPro-Bench: Benchmarking Personalized Proactive Interaction in Egocentric Video Streams

High 2605.07299
Dongchuan Ran, Linyu Ou, Xueheng Li, Wenwen Tong, Chenxu Guo, Hewei Guo, Kaibing Wang, Lewei Lu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出首个基于第一人称视频流的个性化主动交互基准 EgoPro-Bench，包含 2400 个评测视频和 12000 个训练视频，并验证了“短思考、更好交互”原则的有效性。
🎯研究动机

现有 MLLM 主要被动响应，缺乏持续感知和主动辅助能力；已有主动交互基准局限于警报场景，忽略个性化上下文，且无法评估交互时机。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个能评估和训练 MLLM 在流式第一人称视频中实现个性化主动交互（包括意图理解和时机选择）的基准。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建 EgoPro-Bench 基准：利用模拟用户画像生成多样化用户意图，构建 12 种场景的高保真人机交互数据；提出“短思考、更好交互”原则，在意图识别前分配有限 token 预算以提升交互效率。

📊实验结果

实验表明 EgoPro-Bench 显著增强 MLLM 的意图理解能力，并使其能准确识别人机交互的合适时机。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个面向流式第一人称视频的个性化主动交互基准 EgoPro-Bench，包含大规模训练和评测数据。
  • 设计专门的评测协议和指标，并训练了适用于流式视频的低延迟主动交互模型。
  • 引入“短思考、更好交互”原则，通过限制意图识别前的 token 预算提升交互效率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 模拟用户画像可能无法完全覆盖真实用户的多样性。
  • 基准场景数量有限（12 种），可能无法涵盖所有主动交互场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Existing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) remain primarily reactive, failing to continuously perceive environments or proactively assist users. While emerging benchmarks address proactivity, they are largely confined to alert scenarios, neglect personalized context, and fail to evaluate the precise timing of human-machine interactions (HMI).In this paper, we introduce EgoPro-Bench, a novel benchmark for training and evaluating proactive interaction capabilities based on streaming egocentric videos; it comprises 2,400 videos in the evaluation set and over 12,000 videos in the training this http URL previous works, EgoPro-Bench leverages simulated user profiles to generate diverse user intentions and to construct high-fidelity HMI data across 12 distinct this http URL , we propose a specialized evaluation protocol and metrics, train proactive interaction models designed for efficient reasoning and low-latency interaction on streaming video data, and conduct comprehensive this http URL , we introduce an interaction principle termed "short thinking, better interaction", which allocates a limited token budget prior to intent recognition, thereby enhancing interaction this http URL experiments demonstrate that EgoPro-Bench substantially enhances the intention understanding capabilities of MLLMs and enables accurate identification of appropriate timings for HMI, thereby laying a solid foundation for next-generation user-centric proactive interactive agents.

When Stored Evidence Stops Being Usable: Scale-Conditioned Evaluation of Agent Memory

High 2605.07313
Jiaqi Shao, Yiyi Lu, Yunzhen Zhang, Bing Luo
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种规模条件化评估协议，揭示记忆智能体在无关会话累积时可靠性下降的规律。
🎯研究动机

现有记忆智能体评估仅报告固定快照的准确率或检索质量，无法反映证据在无关会话累积时是否仍可用，缺乏对可扩展性的系统理解。

❓解决问题

如何评估和诊断记忆智能体在证据保持不变但无关会话增长时的可靠性变化。

🔎现象分析

可靠性下降并非单一现象：不同智能体、接口和预算下失败模式不同，例如 HippoRAG 在预算内但可靠性下降 16-20 个百分点，LiCoMemory 的失败强烈依赖于智能体规模。

🛠️主要方法

提出规模条件化评估协议，固定任务证据，逐步添加无关会话，记录智能体 - 记忆轨迹，报告四个诊断指标：预算合规可靠性、尾部记忆调用负担、失败模式分解、可用规模边界。

📊实验结果

在 LongMemEval 和 LoCoMo 数据集上，使用平面、分层和层级记忆接口，测试 HippoRAG 和 LiCoMemory（配合 Qwen3-8B/32B/235B）。摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出规模条件化评估协议，用于系统评估记忆智能体在证据保持增长下的可靠性。
  • 通过 LongMemEval 和 LoCoMo 上的实验，揭示不同智能体、接口和预算下的失败模式差异。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅测试了有限的数据集和记忆接口，泛化性未知。
  • 未涉及真实场景中证据可能动态变化的情况。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Memory-agent evaluations report fixed-snapshot accuracy or retrieval quality, but these scores do not show whether evidence remains usable as irrelevant sessions (sessions not annotated as task-relevant evidence for the query) accumulate. We present a scale-conditioned evaluation protocol for agent memory under evidence-preserving growth: for each query, task evidence is held fixed while irrelevant sessions are added. The protocol logs agent--memory trajectories and reports four diagnostics: budget-compliant reliability, tail memory-call burden, failure-regime decomposition, and the usable-scale boundary where reliability falls below the target. Applied to LongMemEval and LoCoMo across flat, planar, and hierarchical memory interfaces, the protocol shows reliability loss is not a single phenomenon. On LongMemEval, HippoRAG stays within the two-call budget but loses 16--20 percentage points in budget-compliant reliability as irrelevant sessions are added; LiCoMemory's observed failures depend strongly on the agent, with Qwen3-8B exceeding the budget while Qwen3-32B and Qwen3-235B remain reliable in the tested range. The result supports a framework for making scalable-memory claims conditional on agent, interface, scale range, and interaction budget.

InterLV-Search: Benchmarking Interleaved Multimodal Agentic Search

High 2605.07510
Bohan Hou, Jiuning Gu, Jiayan Guo, Ronghao Dang, Sicong Leng, Xin Li, Xuemeng Song, Jianfei Yang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 InterLV-Search 基准，评估多模态智能体在交错语言 - 视觉搜索中的表现，发现现有模型准确率低于 50%。
🎯研究动机

现有多模态智能体搜索基准将视觉证据局限于输入或作为答案终点，未考虑交错搜索轨迹中文本和视觉证据的反复利用，缺乏对复杂搜索能力的系统评估。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个包含多层级、多分支交错搜索场景的基准，以评估多模态智能体在主动视觉证据寻求、离线 / 在线交错搜索中的能力。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建 InterLV-Search 基准，包含三个层级（主动视觉证据寻求、受控离线交错搜索、开放网页交错搜索）和 2,061 个样本，并设计自动化流水线生成数据，提供标准化工具 InterLV-Agent 用于评估。

📊实验结果

在闭源和开源多模态智能体上进行实验，最佳模型整体准确率低于 50%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 InterLV-Search 基准，覆盖多层级交错多模态搜索任务，包含多分支比较样本。
  • 提供自动化数据构建流水线和标准化评估工具 InterLV-Agent。
  • 实验揭示现有多模态智能体在交错搜索任务上表现不足，最佳模型准确率低于 50%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准规模有限（2,061 样本），可能无法覆盖所有真实场景。
  • 自动构建的流水线可能引入噪声或偏差。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Existing benchmarks for multimodal agentic search evaluate multimodal search and visual browsing, but visual evidence is either confined to the input or treated as an answer endpoint rather than part of an interleaved search trajectory. We introduce \textbf{InterLV-Search}, a benchmark for Interleaved Language-Vision Agentic Search, in which textual and visual evidence is repeatedly used to condition later search. It contains 2,061 examples across three levels: active visual evidence seeking, controlled offline interleaved multimodal search, and open-web interleaved multimodal search. Beyond existing benchmarks, it also includes multimodal multi-branch samples that involve comparison between multiple entities during the evidence search. We construct Level 1 and Level 2 with automated pipelines and Level 3 with a machine-led, human-supervised open-web pipeline. We further provide InterLV-Agent for standardized tool use, trajectory logging, and evaluation. Experiments on proprietary and open-source multimodal agents show that current systems remain far from solving interleaved multimodal search, with the best model below 50% overall accuracy, highlighting challenges in visual evidence seeking, search control, and multimodal evidence integration. We release the benchmark data and evaluation code at this https URL

FactoryBench: Evaluating Industrial Machine Understanding

High 2605.07675
Yanis Merzouki, Coral Izquierdo, Matei Ignuta-Ciuncanu, Marcos Gomez-Bracamonte, Riccardo Maggioni, Alessandro Lombardi, Camilla Mazzoleni, Federico Martelli et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：FactoryBench 评估了时间序列模型和 LLM 在工业机器人遥测数据上的机器理解能力，发现当前模型在结构化问答和决策任务上表现不佳。
🎯研究动机

工业机器人遥测数据蕴含丰富的机器状态信息，但缺乏系统评估模型理解能力的基准，现有方法难以衡量模型在因果推理和决策层面的表现。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个覆盖多因果层次和多答案格式的基准，以评估时间序列模型和 LLM 对工业机器人遥测数据的理解能力。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 FactoryBench 基准，包含基于 Pearl 因果阶梯的四级因果问答（状态、干预、反事实、决策）和五种答案格式（四种结构化格式确定性评分，自由形式由 LLM 投票评分），并构建了可扩展的问答生成框架和包含 UR3 与 KUKA KR10 数据的 FactoryWave 数据集。

📊实验结果

零样本评估了六个前沿 LLM，结果显示没有模型在结构化层次上超过 50%，在决策任务上超过 18%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 FactoryBench，一个大规模工业机器理解基准，包含超过 70k 个问答项，覆盖四个因果层次和五种答案格式。
  • 发布 FactoryWave，一个密集多任务多变量传感器数据集，并整合了 AURSAD 和 voraus-AD 数据。
  • 零样本评估六个前沿 LLM，揭示其在结构化层次上不超过 50%、决策任务上不超过 18% 的性能差距。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅基于工业机器人遥测数据，可能不直接适用于其他工业场景。
  • 自由形式答案的评分依赖 LLM-as-judge，可能引入评估偏差。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce FactoryBench, a benchmark for evaluating time-series models and LLMs on machine understanding over industrial robotic telemetry. Q&A pairs are organized along four causal levels (state, intervention, counterfactual, decision) instantiating Pearl's ladder of causation, and span five answer formats: four structured formats are scored deterministically and free-form answers are scored by an LLM-as-judge voting protocol. We propose a scalable Q&A generation framework built around structured question templates, present FactoryWave (a dense, multitask, multivariate sensor dataset collected from a UR3 cobot and a KUKA KR10 industrial arm), and construct FactoryBench as a large-scale benchmark of over 70k Q&A items grounded in roughly 15k normalized episodes from FactoryWave, AURSAD, and voraus-AD. Zero-shot evaluation of six frontier LLMs shows that no model exceeds 50% on structured levels or 18% on decision-making, revealing a wide gap between current models and operational machine understanding.

TRACE: Tourism Recommendation with Accountable Citation Evidence

High 2605.07677
Zixu Zhao, Sijin Wang, Yu Hou, Yuanyuan Xu, Yufan Sheng, Xike Xie, Wenjie Zhang, Won-Yong Shin et al.
arXiv PDF cs.IR
TL;DR：TRACE 是一个带可验证引用证据的多轮旅游推荐对话数据集，揭示了现有系统在准确性、证据引用和拒绝恢复之间的能力差距。
🎯研究动机

旅游推荐是高风险的对话场景，现有基准缺乏多轮推荐、逐字引用证据和拒绝恢复的联合评估，导致推荐系统难以同时做到可信、可验证和自适应。

❓解决问题

构建一个同时评估推荐准确性、证据可验证性和对话中拒绝恢复能力的旅游推荐基准。

🔎现象分析

摘要揭示了“三能力差距”：LLM 零样本在封闭集 Recall@1 和拒绝恢复上领先但引用密度低；非 LLM 检索器实现表面逐字引用但准确性低；多评论合成在恢复上失败。

🛠️主要方法

构建 TRACE 数据集，包含 10,000 个多轮对话，每个对话带有评论跨度引用和明确拒绝轮次，并基于 14 个基线和 25 个指标进行系统评估。

📊实验结果

基于 14 个检索、规划和 LLM 基线，在 25 个指标下评估，发现三能力差距；Grounding Score 与人类引用精度高度相关（Spearman rho=+0.80, p<10^-20），配对 t 检验复现基线排名（p<0.01）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 TRACE 数据集，将旅游推荐重构为联合目标（正确 POI、可验证证据、自适应修复）。
  • 揭示现有系统在准确性、引用和恢复之间的三能力差距，并提供 25 个指标的系统评估。
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集仅基于 Yelp 评论，可能不覆盖所有旅游场景。
  • 评估指标可能未完全捕捉真实用户满意度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Tourism is a high-stakes setting for conversational recommender systems (CRS): a plausible-sounding suggestion can waste real money and trip time once a traveler acts on it. Existing CRS benchmarks primarily evaluate systems with a single Recall@k score over entity mentions, and tourism-specific resources add spatial or knowledge-graph context, yet none of them couple multi-turn recommendation with verbatim review-span evidence and rejection recovery. This leaves an evaluation gap for tourism recommendation that is simultaneously trustworthy, verifiable, and adaptive: recommend the right point of interest (POI) for multi-aspect preferences (such as cuisine, price, atmosphere, walking distance), justify each suggestion with verifiable evidence from prior visitors so the traveler can act without trial and error, and recover when the first recommendation is rejected mid-dialogue. We introduce TRACE, where each item is a multi-turn tourism recommendation dialogue with review-span citations and explicit rejection turns: 10,000 dialogues over 2,400 Yelp POIs and 34,208 reviews across eight U.S. cities, paired with 14 retrieval, planning, and LLM baselines, along with 25 metrics organized under Accuracy, Grounding, and Recovery. Across these baselines, TRACE reveals the Three-Competency Gap: LLM Zero-Shot leads in closed-set Recall@1 and rejection recovery but cites less densely than retrievers; non-LLM retrievers achieve surface-verbatim grounding but with low accuracy; Multi-Review Synthesis fails at recovery. The Grounding Score agrees with human citation precision (Spearman rho=+0.80, p<10^-20), and paired t-tests reproduce the per-baseline ranking (p<0.01 on the dominant contrasts). TRACE reframes accountable tourism recommendation as a joint target (right POI, verifiable evidence, adaptive repair) rather than a single-axis leaderboard.

DRIP-R: A Benchmark for Decision-Making and Reasoning Under Real-World Policy Ambiguity in the Retail Domain

High 2605.07699
Hsuvas Borkakoty, Sebastian Pohl, Cheng Wang, Bei Chen, Yufang Hou
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出零售领域政策歧义决策基准 DRIP-R，揭示前沿 LLM 在歧义场景下存在根本性分歧。
🎯研究动机

现实世界中 LLM 代理常受歧义领域政策约束，但现有基准假设政策明确无歧义，缺乏对歧义场景的评估。

❓解决问题

评估 LLM 代理在真实零售政策歧义下的决策与推理能力。

🔎现象分析

前沿模型在相同政策歧义场景下产生根本性分歧，表明歧义对 LLM 决策构成系统性挑战。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含政策歧义退货场景、客户画像、全双工对话模拟、工具调用和多裁判评估框架的基准。

📊实验结果

实验表明前沿模型在相同歧义场景下存在根本性分歧。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个系统利用真实零售政策歧义构建的决策基准 DRIP-R
  • 多维度评估框架覆盖政策遵循、对话质量、行为对齐和解决质量
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅聚焦零售领域，可能不直接推广至其他领域
  • 基准规模有限，可能未覆盖所有歧义类型
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

LLM-based agents are increasingly deployed for routine but consequential tasks in real-world domains, where their behavior is governed by inherently ambiguous domain policies that admit multiple valid interpretations. Despite the prevalence of such ambiguities in practice, existing agent benchmarks largely assume unambiguous, well-specified policies, leaving a critical evaluation gap. We introduce DRIP-R, a benchmark that systematically exploits real-world retail policy ambiguities to construct scenarios in which no single correct resolution exists. DRIP-R comprises a curated set of policy-ambiguous return scenarios paired with a realistic customer personas, a full-duplex conversational simulation with tool-calling capabilities and a multi-judge evaluation framework covering policy adherence, dialogue quality, behavioral alignment, and resolution quality. Our experiments show that frontier models fundamentally disagree on identical policy-ambiguous scenarios, confirming that ambiguity poses a genuine and systematic challenge to LLM decision-making.

AgentEscapeBench: Evaluating Out-of-Domain Tool-Grounded Reasoning in LLM Agents

High 2605.07926
Zhengkang Guo, Yiyang Li, Lin Qiu, Xiaohua Wang, Jingwen Xv, Dongyu Ru, Xiaoyu Li, Xiaoqing Zheng et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 AgentEscapeBench 基准，评估 LLM Agent 在长程依赖工具推理中的能力，发现深度依赖下性能显著下降。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM Agent 在熟悉工作流和短程交互中表现良好，但在需要长程依赖推理的新工具使用场景中能力未知，缺乏系统评估基准。

❓解决问题

评估 LLM Agent 在超出熟悉工作流和短程交互的、具有显式长程依赖约束的工具推理能力。

🔎现象分析

随着依赖深度增加，Agent 性能急剧下降：人类从 98.3% 降至 80.0%，最佳模型从 90.0% 降至 60.0%；失败主要源于长程状态跟踪、线索遵循和中间结果传播的崩溃。

🛠️主要方法

构建基于逃逸室风格的基准 AgentEscapeBench，包含 270 个实例、5 个难度等级，每个任务定义有向无环依赖图，要求 Agent 调用真实外部函数、跟踪隐藏状态、传播中间结果并提交可验证答案。

📊实验结果

使用 16 个 LLM Agent 和人类参与者进行实验，报告了不同难度下的成功率，并进行了轨迹分析。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AgentEscapeBench 基准，系统评估 LLM Agent 在长程依赖工具推理中的能力。
  • 通过实验揭示当前 Agent 在深度依赖下的性能瓶颈，并归因于状态跟踪、线索遵循和结果传播的失败。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅覆盖逃逸室风格任务，可能无法完全代表现实世界工具使用场景。
  • 未提供模型在失败后的恢复或自适应策略分析。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

As LLM-based agents increasingly rely on external tools, it is important to evaluate their ability to sustain tool-grounded reasoning beyond familiar workflows and short-range interactions. We introduce AgentEscapeBench, an escape-room-style benchmark that tests whether agents can infer, execute, and revise novel tool-use procedures under explicit long-range dependency constraints. Each task defines a directed acyclic dependency graph over tools and items, requiring agents to invoke real external functions, track hidden state revealed incrementally, propagate intermediate results, and submit a deterministically verifiable final answer. AgentEscapeBench includes 270 instances across five difficulty tiers and supports fully automated evaluation. Experiments with sixteen LLM agents and human participants show that performance drops sharply as dependency depth increases: humans decline from 98.3% success at difficulty-5 to 80.0% at difficulty-25, while the best model drops from 90.0% to 60.0%. Trajectory analysis attributes model failures mainly to breakdowns in long-range state tracking, clue adherence, and intermediate-result propagation. These findings suggest that current agents can often handle local tool use but still struggle with deep contextual dependencies. We hope AgentEscapeBench can serve as a diagnostic testbed for measuring current agent capabilities and informing future training efforts toward more robust general-purpose reasoning, action, and adaptation.

IntentGrasp: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Intent Understanding

High 2605.06832
Yuwei Yin, Chuyuan Li, Giuseppe Carenini
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出意图理解基准 IntentGrasp 和微调方法 IFT，发现现有 LLM 意图理解能力远低于人类。
🎯研究动机

准确理解意图对开发有用的 LLM 助手至关重要，但现有模型在此能力上存在不足，缺乏系统评估和提升方法。

❓解决问题

LLM 在意图理解任务上表现不佳，需要构建全面的基准和有效的提升方法。

🔎现象分析

20 个 LLM 在 All Set 上得分低于 60%，在 Gem Set 上低于 25%，其中 17 个模型在 Gem Set 上低于随机猜测基线（15.2%），而人类表现约为 81.1%，表明模型意图理解能力严重不足。

🛠️主要方法

构建 IntentGrasp 基准（包含 262,759 训练实例和两个测试集），并提出 Intentional Fine-Tuning (IFT)方法在训练集上微调模型。

📊实验结果

在 20 个 LLM（7 个系列）上评估，包括 GPT-5.4、Gemini-3.1-Pro、Claude-Opus-4.7 等前沿模型，并进行了留一域（Lodo）实验验证跨域泛化性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了大规模、多领域的意图理解基准 IntentGrasp，包含训练集和两个评估集。
  • 提出 IFT 微调方法，在 All Set 和 Gem Set 上分别提升 30+ 和 20+ F1 点，并展现出强跨域泛化能力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准可能未覆盖所有意图理解场景。
  • IFT 方法在更复杂或未见领域上的泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Accurately understanding the intent behind speech, conversation, and writing is crucial to the development of helpful Large Language Model (LLM) assistants. This paper introduces IntentGrasp, a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating the intent understanding capability of LLMs. Derived from 49 high-quality, open-licensed corpora spanning 12 diverse domains, IntentGrasp is constructed through source datasets curation, intent label contextualization, and task format unification. IntentGrasp contains a large-scale training set of 262,759 instances and two evaluation sets: an All Set of 12,909 test cases and a more balanced and challenging Gem Set of 470 cases. Extensive evaluations on 20 LLMs across 7 families (including frontier models such as GPT-5.4, Gemini-3.1-Pro, and Claude-Opus-4.7) demonstrate unsatisfactory performance, with scores below 60% on All Set and below 25% on Gem set. Notably, 17 out of 20 tested models perform worse than a random-guess baseline (15.2%) on Gem Set, while the estimated human performance is ~81.1%, showing substantial room for improvement. To enhance such ability, this paper proposes Intentional Fine-Tuning (IFT), which fine-tunes the models on the training set in IntentGrasp, yielding significant gains of 30+ F1 points on All Set and 20+ points on Gem Set. Tellingly, the leave-one-domain-out (Lodo) experiments further demonstrate the strong cross-domain generalizability of IFT, verifying that it is a promising approach to substantially enhancing the intent understanding of LLMs. Overall, by benchmarking and boosting intent understanding ability, this study sheds light on a promising path towards more intentional, capable, and safe AI assistants for human benefits and social good.

Agentick: A Unified Benchmark for General Sequential Decision-Making Agents

High 2605.06869
Roger Creus Castanyer, Pablo Samuel Castro, Glen Berseth
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：Agentick 是一个统一的基准，用于公平比较 RL、LLM、VLM 等不同范式的顺序决策智能体。
🎯研究动机

AI 智能体研究涵盖从 RL 到基础模型等多种方法，但缺乏统一基准来公平比较这些不同范式，阻碍了通用自主智能体的发展。

❓解决问题

现有基准无法在共同基础上评估 RL、LLM、VLM、混合和人类智能体，且缺乏对顺序决策基本挑战的系统性研究。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

Agentick 基准包含 37 个程序化生成的任务，覆盖 6 个能力类别、4 个难度级别和 5 种观察模态，通过统一的 Gymnasium 兼容接口暴露，并提供 Coding API、参考策略、SFT 数据集、可组合智能体框架和实时排行榜。

📊实验结果

在 27 种配置和超过 90,000 个 episode 上的评估显示，没有单一方法占主导：GPT-5 mini 以 0.309 的归一化分数领先，PPO 在规划和多智能体任务中占优，推理框架将 LLM 性能提升 3-10 倍，ASCII 观察始终优于自然语言。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出了 Agentick，一个统一的顺序决策智能体基准，支持 RL、LLM、VLM、混合和人类智能体的公平比较。
  • 提供了 37 个程序化生成的任务、多种观察模态、参考策略和预构建 SFT 数据集，以及实时排行榜。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准任务可能无法完全覆盖真实世界的复杂性。
  • 评估主要基于程序化生成的任务，泛化性有待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

AI agent research spans a wide spectrum: from RL agents that learn from scratch to foundation model agents that leverage pre-trained knowledge, yet no unified benchmark enables fair comparison across these approaches. We present Agentick, a benchmark for sequential decision-making agents designed to evaluate RL, LLM, VLM, hybrid, and human agents on common ground and to power research on the fundamental challenges of sequential decision-making. Agentick provides 37 procedurally generated tasks across six capability categories, four difficulty levels, and five observation modalities, all exposed through a single Gymnasium-compatible interface. The benchmark ships with a Coding API, oracle reference policies for all tasks, pre-built SFT datasets, a composable agent harness, and a live leaderboard. An evaluation spanning 27 configurations and over 90,000 episodes reveals that no single approach dominates: GPT-5 mini leads overall at 0.309 oracle-normalized score while PPO dominates planning and multi-agent tasks; the reasoning harness multiplies LLM performance by 3-10x; and ASCII observations consistently outperform natural language. These findings highlight the substantial room for improvement that remains across all agent paradigms. Agentick's capability-decomposed, multi-modal design provides the empirical infrastructure needed to drive progress toward general autonomous agents, both as an evaluation framework and as a training ground for RL post-training of foundation models in truly sequential environments.

MIST: Multimodal Interactive Speech-based Tool-calling Conversational Assistants for Smart Homes

High 2605.06897
Maximillian Chen, Xuanming Zhang, Michael Peng, Zhou Yu, Alexandros Papangelis, Yohan Jo
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出 MIST 数据集，用于评估多模态 LLM 在智能家居语音助手场景中的工具调用能力，发现开源与闭源模型间存在显著差距。
🎯研究动机

物联网设备普及需要能处理复杂交互的语音接口，但现有研究缺乏结合时空约束、语音输入、动态状态跟踪和混合主动交互模式的真实世界 IoT 设备建模。

❓解决问题

缺乏一个能评估多模态 LLM 在智能家居场景下进行多轮语音驱动代码生成（工具调用）的基准数据集。

🔎现象分析

开源与闭源多模态 LLM 在 MIST 上表现差距显著，即使前沿闭源模型也有较大提升空间。

🛠️主要方法

构建 MIST 数据集，一个合成的多轮语音驱动代码生成任务，并发布可扩展的数据生成框架。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MIST 数据集，用于评估多模态 LLM 在智能家居语音助手场景中的工具调用能力。
  • 发现开源与闭源模型在 MIST 上存在显著性能差距，且闭源模型仍有改进空间。
  • 发布可扩展的数据生成框架，便于构建相关数据集。
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集为合成数据，可能无法完全反映真实场景的复杂性。
  • 仅评估了工具调用能力，未涉及其他语音助手关键方面如对话管理。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The rise of Internet of Things (IoT) devices in the physical world necessitates voice-based interfaces capable of handling complex user experiences. While modern Large Language Models (LLMs) already demonstrate strong tool-usage capabilities, modeling real-world IoT devices presents a difficult, understudied challenge which combines modeling spatiotemporal constraints with speech inputs, dynamic state tracking, and mixed-initiative interaction patterns. We introduce MIST (the Multimodal Interactive Speech-based Tool-calling Dataset), a synthetic multi-turn, voice-driven code generation task that operates over IoT devices. We find that there is a significant gap between open- and closed-weight multimodal LLMs on MIST, and that even frontier closed-weight LLMs have substantial headroom. We release MIST and an extensible data generation framework to build related datasets in order to facilitate research on mixed-initiative voice assistants which reason about physical world constraints.

Bridging the Last Mile of Circuit Design: PostEDA-Bench, a Hierarchical Benchmark for PPA Convergence and DRC Fixing

High 2605.06936
Pengju Liu, Nuo Xu, Jinwei Tang, Yu Cao, Caiwen Ding
arXiv PDF cs.AR
TL;DR：提出 PostEDA-Bench 层次化基准，评估 LLM Agent 在 EDA 后端修复 DRC 违例和 PPA 收敛的能力，发现复杂任务成功率低且权衡推理是主要瓶颈。
🎯研究动机

现有 EDA-LLM 基准忽略 DRC 修复且层次扁平、依赖单一工具链，无法全面评估 LLM 在电路设计最后环节的实际能力。

❓解决问题

缺乏一个层次化、多工具链、包含 DRC 修复和 PPA 收敛任务的基准来评估 LLM Agent 在 EDA 后端的表现。

🔎现象分析

Agent 在合成 DRC-Essential 和单目标 PPA-Mono 上表现尚可，但在实际 DRC-Reasoning（最佳成功率 36.66%）和多目标 PPA-Multi（最佳成功率 20.00%）上性能急剧下降；视觉增强一致提升 DRC 任务；权衡推理而非旋钮知识是 PPA-Multi 的主要瓶颈。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 145 个任务的层次化基准 PostEDA-Bench，涵盖 DRC-Essential、DRC-Reasoning、PPA-Mono 和 PPA-Multi 四个子集，支持多种 EDA 工具链和机器可检查评估。

📊实验结果

在 8 种商业和开源 LLM、多种 Agent 框架下评估，报告了 DRC-Reasoning 和 PPA-Multi 的最佳成功率分别为 36.66% 和 20.00%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次提出包含 DRC 修复和 PPA 收敛的层次化 EDA-LLM 基准 PostEDA-Bench
  • 系统评估 8 种 LLM 在多种 Agent 框架下的表现，揭示复杂任务瓶颈
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准任务规模有限（145 个），可能无法覆盖所有实际场景
  • 仅评估了有限数量的 LLM 和 Agent 框架
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

LLM-based agents are increasingly applied to the "last mile" of Electronic Design Automation (EDA): repairing residual sign-off Design Rule Check (DRC) violations and converging Power-Performance-Area (PPA) targets after tool runs. Existing EDA-LLM benchmarks, however, omit DRC fixing entirely and rely on flat hierarchies tied to a single toolchain. We introduce PostEDA-Bench, a hierarchical benchmark with 145 tasks across DRC-Essential, DRC-Reasoning, PPA-Mono, and PPA-Multi, supported by EDA toolchains with machine-checkable evaluation. Across eight commercial and open-source LLMs under multiple agent scaffolds, we find that agents handle synthetic DRC-Essential and single-objective PPA-Mono reasonably well but degrade sharply on the more practical DRC-Reasoning, where the best success rate is 36.66%, and PPA-Multi, where the best success rate is 20.00%; vision augmentation consistently enhances DRC-Bench; and trade-off reasoning, rather than knob knowledge, is the dominant PPA-Multi bottleneck.

MathlibPR: Pull Request Merge-Readiness Benchmark for Formal Mathematical Libraries

Medium 2605.07147
Zixuan Xie, Xinyu Liu, Shangtong Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.LO
TL;DR：提出 MathlibPR 基准，评估 LLM 判断形式化数学库 PR 合并就绪状态的能力，发现现有模型和智能体均难以区分合并就绪与未合并的 PR。
🎯研究动机

Mathlib 的审核流程成为其发展瓶颈，需要大量人工判断 PR 是否符合规范，因此探索 LLM 辅助审核的可能性。

❓解决问题

LLM 能否准确判断 Mathlib PR 是否达到合并就绪状态？

🔎现象分析

LLM 模型和智能体在区分合并就绪 PR 与构建通过但未合并的 PR 时表现困难。

🛠️主要方法

从 Mathlib4 PR 历史构建基准，设计分阶段评估协议，测试多种 LLM 模型和智能体。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了 MathlibPR 基准，用于评估 LLM 对形式化数学库 PR 合并就绪状态的判断能力。
  • 提出分阶段评估协议，并系统评估了多种 LLM 模型和智能体，揭示了当前方法的局限性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅基于 Mathlib4 历史，可能不适用于其他形式化数学库。
  • 评估协议可能无法完全覆盖实际审核中的复杂因素。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The ecosystem of Lean and Mathlib has become the de facto standard for large language model (LLM) assisted formal reasoning with remarkable successes in recent years. Those successes, however, only consume Mathlib as an essential dependency but do not directly contribute to it. In the meantime, the growth of Mathlib has recently been bottlenecked by the review process, which requires human reviewers to judge whether proposed pull requests (PRs) follow the Mathlib's conventions and are worth integrating as part of a shared mathematical infrastructure. This leads to our central question: can LLMs help review Mathlib PRs? To this end, we introduce MathlibPR, a benchmark built from real Mathlib4 PR histories. We further propose a staged evaluation protocol and use it to evaluate both LLM models (e.g., DeepSeek, Qwen, Goedel, and Kimina) and LLM agents (e.g., Codex and Claude Code). Surprisingly, both LLM models and LLM agents struggle to distinguish merge-ready PRs from build-passing PRs that were revised or never merged. By turning Mathlib PR histories into a supervised signal, MathlibPR provides a step toward reviewer assistants and reward models that could help evaluate PRs and steer LLMs toward producing merge-ready Mathlib contributions.

Mage: Multi-Axis Evaluation of LLM-Generated Executable Game Scenes Beyond Compile-Pass Rate

Medium 2605.07342
Hugh Xuechen Liu, Kıvanç Tatar
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出多轴评估协议 Mage，揭示编译通过率在 LLM 生成游戏场景中具有误导性，需结合结构保真度等多维度评估。
🎯研究动机

编译通过率是 LLM 代码生成的主流评估指标，但对多组件领域特定工件（如游戏场景）可能产生误导，需要更全面的评估方法。

❓解决问题

现有编译通过率指标无法准确反映 LLM 生成的可执行游戏场景的功能正确性和领域保真度。

🔎现象分析

直接 NL-to-C# 生成运行时通过率最高（43%），但结构空洞（机制 F1≈0.12）；结构 IR 条件使运行时通过率减半但恢复领域忠实结构（F1 最高 1.00）；行为级和全场景粒度在统计上无显著差异，表明输入粒度饱和。

🛠️主要方法

提出四轴评估协议 Mage：编译成功、运行时成功、结构保真度、机制遵循，应用于 858 次生成尝试，涵盖 4 个 LLM、26 个 Unity 目标模式概念和 2 种 IR 粒度。

📊实验结果

在 858 次生成尝试上评估 4 个开源 LLM（7B-30B），使用 26 个手工制作的 Unity 目标模式概念和两种自动提取的 IR 粒度。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示编译通过率与功能正确性在游戏场景生成中呈反相关
  • 提出多轴评估协议 Mage，包含编译、运行时、结构保真度和机制遵循四个维度
  • 发布包含基准、回放日志和逐记录指标的评估数据集
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对 Unity 游戏场景，可能不适用于其他领域
  • 评估协议依赖手工制作的目标模式，扩展性有限
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Compile-pass rate is the dominant evaluation signal for LLM code generation, yet for multi-component domain-specific artifacts it can be actively misleading. We demonstrate this on executable game scene synthesis with a four-axis evaluation protocol (named `Mage') -- compile success, runtime success, structural fidelity, and mechanism adherence -- applied to 858 generation attempts across four open-weight LLMs (7B--30B), 26~hand-crafted Unity goal pattern playable concepts, and two automatically extracted IR granularity levels. Direct NL-to-C\# generation achieves the highest runtime-pass rate (43\% mean) yet produces structurally vacuous scenes (mechanism $F_1 \approx 0.12$). Structural IR conditioning halves the runtime rate but recovers domain-faithful structure ($F_1$ up to 1.00). Within IR conditioning, behavior-only and full-scene granularity are statistically indistinguishable (McNemar $p = 1.0$), indicating input-level granularity saturation. These results show that compile rate is anti-correlated with functional correctness in this domain and that multi-axis evaluation is necessary to detect the divergence. We release the benchmark, replay logs, and per-record metrics for independent verification.

Towards Apples to Apples for AI Evaluations: From Real-World Use Cases to Evaluation Scenarios

Medium 2605.07986
Yee-Yin Choong, Kristen Greene, Alice Qian, Meryem Marasli, Ziqi Yang, Sophia Chen, Laura Dabbish, Anand Rao et al.
arXiv PDF cs.HC
TL;DR：提出一种将 AI 用例转化为可评估场景的流程，强调方法透明性和人本设计，并在金融领域验证。
🎯研究动机

当前 AI 评估方法多样，导致不同评估之间难以进行公平比较（苹果与橙子问题），缺乏将真实用例转化为可操作评估场景的系统性方法。

❓解决问题

如何将高层 AI 用例系统性地转化为详细、可操作且反映真实世界需求的评估场景，以实现公平、一致的 AI 比较。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出一个三阶段扩展流程：通过结构化 AI 用例工作表从领域专家处获取用例，结合 LLM 提示和人工审核生成 107 个场景，并设计验证标准评估场景质量。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一个可重复的流程，将高层用例转化为详细评估场景，强调方法透明性和人本设计。
  • 设计 AI 用例工作表，包含六个关键要素，并在美国金融服务领域展示其效用。
  • 通过 LLM 与人工审核结合，生成 107 个场景，并建立验证标准确保场景质量。
⚠️方法局限
  • 用例仅来自美国金融服务领域，可能不具普遍性。
  • 流程依赖专家输入和人工审核，可能成本较高且难以规模化。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

AI measurement science has a wide variety of methodologies and measurements for comparing AI systems, resulting in what often appear to be "apples-to-oranges" comparisons across AI evaluations. To move toward "apples-to-apples" comparisons in real-world AI evaluations, this work advocates for methodological transparency in evaluation scenarios, operational grounding, and human-centered design (HCD) principles. We propose a repeatable process for transforming high-level use cases to detailed scenarios by eliciting use cases from subject matter experts (SMEs) via a structured AI Use Case Worksheet with six key elements: use case, sector, user (direct and indirect), intended outcomes, expected impacts (positive and negative), and KPIs and metrics. We demonstrate utility of the worksheet and process in the U.S. financial services sector. This paper reports on example high-level AI use cases identified by financial services sector SMEs: cyber defense enablement, developer productivity, financial crime aggregation, suspicious activity report (SAR) filing, credit memo generation, and internal call center support. These AI use cases provided are illustrative of the process and not exhaustive. Central to our work is a three-stage expansion pipeline combining LLM prompting with human reviews to generate 107 scenarios from those use cases elicited from SMEs. This process integrates iterative human reviews at every juncture to ensure operational grounding: for scenario titles and descriptions; for core scenario elements like users, benefits and risks, and metrics; and for scenario narratives and evaluation objectives. Human checkpoints ensure scenarios remain reflective of real-world usage and human needs. We describe a validation rubric to assess scenario quality. By defining key scenario components, this work supports a more consistent and meaningful paradigm for human-centered AI evaluations.

数据集 (不含评测协议) 8 篇

GAD in the Wild: Benchmarking Graph Anomaly Detection under Realistic Deployment Challenges

High 2605.07133
Jingjing Zhou, Shiyu Huang, Qing Qing, Zuquan Yuan, Huafei Huang, Ziqi Xu, Mingliang Hou, Xikun Zhang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出多维度图异常检测基准，揭示现有方法在百万级图、极端异常稀疏和缺失属性场景下的三大局限。
🎯研究动机

现有图异常检测基准局限于小规模、平衡异常比的图，与真实部署环境差距大，缺乏对大规模、异常稀疏和属性缺失等挑战的系统评估。

❓解决问题

现有 GAD 评估无法反映真实部署中的关键挑战，需要构建覆盖百万级图、极端异常稀疏和缺失节点属性的基准。

🔎现象分析

摘要观察到：1) 多数 GNN 方法因内存需求无法扩展到百万节点图；2) 在 0.1% 异常比下检测性能急剧下降，常导致零召回；3) 基于重构的模型对属性填充策略高度敏感。

🛠️主要方法

从 5 个图（含 2 个原生工业级数据集，超 370 万节点）衍生出一系列受控基准变体，系统评估 9 种代表性 GAD 模型在三种部署挑战下的表现。

📊实验结果

在 5 个图（含 2 个工业级数据集，超 370 万节点）上评估 9 种 GAD 模型，对比不同异常比和属性缺失场景下的性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了首个覆盖百万级图、极端异常稀缺和缺失属性三个真实部署挑战的多维度 GAD 基准
  • 通过 9 种模型的大规模实验揭示了现有 GAD 方法的三大局限性，并提供了诊断测试平台
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅覆盖三种部署挑战，可能未涵盖其他现实问题（如动态图、概念漂移）
  • 实验模型数量有限，可能未代表所有最新方法
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Graph Anomaly Detection (GAD) is a critical task in graph machine learning with vital applications in financial fraud detection and social platform governance. However, existing GAD benchmarks are often restricted to small-scale, curated graphs with relatively balanced anomaly ratios, leaving a substantial gap between academic evaluation and real-world deployment. To bridge this gap, we present a multi-dimensional benchmark that systematically evaluates GAD models under three deployment-relevant challenges: million-scale graphs, extreme anomaly scarcity, and missing node attributes. We derive a family of controlled benchmark variants from five diverse graphs, including two native industrial-scale datasets with over 3.7 million nodes. Our extensive evaluation of nine representative GAD models reveals three major limitations: (1) most GNN-based methods fail to scale to million-node graphs due to prohibitive memory requirements; (2) detection performance drops sharply under realistic anomaly ratios (e.g., 0.1\%), often resulting in zero recall; and (3) reconstruction-based models are highly sensitive to attribute imputation strategies. Our findings suggest that strong performance in laboratory settings does not guarantee robustness in production environments. We release this benchmark and empirical evaluation as a diagnostic testbed to promote the development of robust and scalable GAD systems for large-scale, imperfect graphs encountered in practice. Code is available at this https URL .

HumanNet: Scaling Human-centric Video Learning to One Million Hours

High 2605.06747
Yufan Deng, Daquan Zhou
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：HumanNet 是一个百万小时级人类中心视频数据集，通过系统化数据策展范式支持具身智能学习，初步实验表明第一人称人类视频可替代机器人数据。
🎯研究动机

具身智能依赖大规模数据基础设施，但物理交互学习受限于缺乏大规模、多样化且丰富标注的人类活动数据。

❓解决问题

如何构建大规模、高质量、富含交互标注的人类中心视频数据集，以支持具身表征学习、活动理解、运动生成和人到机器人迁移。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 HumanNet 数据集，包含百万小时第一 / 第三人称视频，提供交互中心标注（字幕、运动描述、手 / 身体信号），并引入系统化数据策展范式（人类中心过滤、时间结构化、视角多样性、标注丰富化）。

📊实验结果

在固定验证集上，使用 HumanNet 中 1000 小时第一人称视频继续训练 Qwen VLM，与使用 100 小时 Magic Cobot 真实机器人数据继续训练进行对比，前者表现更优。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了百万小时级人类中心视频语料库 HumanNet，覆盖细粒度活动、人 - 物交互、工具使用和长时行为。
  • 提出系统化数据策展范式，将人类中心过滤、时间结构化、视角多样性和标注丰富化作为一等设计原则。
  • 通过 VLA 消融实验初步验证：使用 HumanNet 中 1000 小时第一人称视频继续训练 Qwen VLM，效果优于使用 100 小时真实机器人数据。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅进行了初步的 VLA 消融验证，缺乏更全面的下游任务评估。
  • 数据集规模巨大，可能带来存储、处理和隐私方面的挑战。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Progress in embodied intelligence increasingly depends on scalable data infrastructure. While vision and language have scaled with internet corpora, learning physical interaction remains constrained by the lack of large, diverse, and richly annotated human activity data. We present HumanNet, a one-million-hour human-centric video corpus that captures how humans interact with the physical world at scale. HumanNet spans both first-person and third-person perspectives and covers fine-grained activities, human-object interactions, tool use, and long-horizon behaviors across diverse real-world environments. Beyond raw video, the dataset provides interaction-centric annotations, including captions, motion descriptions, and hand and body-related signals, enabling motion-aware and interaction-aware learning. Beyond scale, HumanNet introduces a systematic data curation paradigm for embodied learning, where human-centric filtering, temporal structuring, viewpoint diversity, and annotation enrichment are treated as first-class design principles. This design transforms unstructured internet video into a scalable substrate for representation learning, activity understanding, motion generation, and human-to-robot transfer. We conduct a first-step validation on the value of this design through controlled vision-language-action ablation: under a fixed set of validation data, continued training from the Qwen VLM model with 1000 hours of egocentric video drawn from HumanNet surpasses the continued training with 100 hours of real-robot data from Magic Cobot, indicating that egocentric human video could be a scalable and cost-effective substitute for robot data. By building this project, we aim to explore the opportunity to scale embodied foundation models using human-centric videos, rather than relying solely on robot-specific data.

ShellfishNet: A Domain-Specific Benchmark for Visual Recognition of Marine Molluscs

Medium 2605.07338
Ziheng Zhou, Yang Wang, Nan Wang, Chengliang Wu, Jun Yan
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：ShellfishNet 是一个面向海洋软体动物视觉识别的领域专用基准数据集，评估了 80 种模型并引入图像损坏测试以模拟水下退化场景。
🎯研究动机

全球贝类生物多样性下降威胁沿海生态系统，AI 有潜力用于自动化生态监测，但现有海洋底栖数据集缺乏对真实水下环境复杂性的适应（如可变光照和多样姿态），导致视觉模型在生态监测中泛化困难。

❓解决问题

缺乏一个专门针对真实水下环境约束的海洋软体动物视觉识别基准数据集，以评估和提升视觉模型的鲁棒泛化能力。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建 ShellfishNet 数据集，包含 8,691 张图像、32 个分类单元，并带有描述性标注子集；系统评估 80 种神经网络模型（CNN、ViT、SSM、SSL），以及细粒度分类模型和多模态大模型的图像描述能力；引入图像损坏基准测试模拟水下退化场景（浑浊、恶劣天气）以评估鲁棒性。

📊实验结果

在 ShellfishNet 上评估了 80 种神经网络模型（包括 CNN、ViT、SSM、SSL）、细粒度分类模型以及多模态大模型的图像描述能力，并进行了图像损坏鲁棒性测试。摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了 ShellfishNet，一个专为真实水下生态监测约束设计的海洋软体动物视觉识别基准数据集。
  • 系统评估了 80 种代表性视觉模型，并引入图像损坏测试以模拟水下退化场景，为生态保护中的可信决策提供支持。
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集仅涵盖 32 个分类单元，可能不足以代表全部海洋软体动物多样性。
  • 图像损坏测试仅模拟了浑浊和恶劣天气，未涵盖其他水下退化因素（如生物附着、运动模糊）。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The decline of global shellfish biodiversity poses a severe threat to coastal ecosystems. Although artificial intelligence (AI) technologies show potential for automated ecological monitoring, existing marine benthic datasets often lack adaptation to the complexities of real underwater environments (e.g., variable lighting conditions and diverse species postures), posing challenges for the robust generalization of vision models in practical ecological monitoring. To address this problem, we construct ShellfishNet, a comprehensive image benchmark dataset designed specifically for real-world ecological monitoring constraints. Comprising 8,691 images across 32 taxa, this dataset includes a curated subset annotated with descriptive captions. It is constructed through field photography and web scraping, encompassing samples from complex real-world environments. Based on this benchmark, we systematically evaluate 80 representative neural network models, including Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Vision Transformers (ViTs), State Space Models (SSMs), and Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) methods. Furthermore, we evaluate the performance of fine-grained visual categorization (FGVC) models and investigate the image captioning capabilities of several mainstream multimodal large language models (MLLMs). Meanwhile, we introduce image corruption benchmark tests to simulate common underwater degradation scenarios (turbidity, severe weather) and assess the robustness of vision models, enabling trustworthy decisions on ecological protection in the wild. ShellfishNet is dedicated to providing a data foundation and a model-evaluation benchmark for the intelligent monitoring of benthic organisms.

LAMES: A Large-Scale and Artisanal Mining Environmental Segmentation Dataset

Medium 2605.07740
Matthias Kahl, Zhaiyu Chen, Sudipan Saha, Mrinalini Kochupillai, Lukas Kondmann, Xiao Xiang Zhu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一个包含 150 个大型矿场和 870km²手工小规模矿场标注区域的环境分割数据集 LAMES。
🎯研究动机

采矿活动导致土地利用变化、高能耗和环境污染，非法采矿广泛存在，需要远程监测矿区活动以检测非法采矿及其环境影响。

❓解决问题

缺乏大规模、精细标注的矿区环境分割数据集，难以支持遥感监测和环境影响分析。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 150 个大型矿场（LSM）和 870km²手工小规模矿场（ASM）标注区域的数据集，并附带 9 个 LSM 部分和 27 个矿场属性元数据。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提供了首个大规模、多属性的矿区环境分割数据集，涵盖 LSM 和 ASM 两种类型。
  • 讨论了数据集在环境监测、社会影响和伦理方面的潜在贡献与责任。
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集可能仅覆盖特定区域，泛化性需验证。
  • 标注精度和一致性未详细说明。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Mining operations are of utmost importance to the economy of some nations. However, such operations result in land-use change, very high energy consumption, and negative impacts on the environment, including soil erosion and deforestation. The mining process can impact an area much larger than the mining site itself. Adding to the negative externalities linked to mining is the fact that, in addition to government-sanctioned legal mining operations, illegal mining is widespread, including in various countries of Africa. The ability to monitor remote mining site activities can be useful, e.g., for the detection of illegal artisanal mining activities and their environmental impacts. An important outcome of such monitoring could include a better understanding of the interrelationship between mine facility attributes (e.g., mining types, processing methods, commodities, etc.) and their impact on the natural environment. In this work, we present a data set that contains 150 Large Scale Mining (LSM) sites and 870km^2 annotated area of Artisanal Small-scale Mining (ASM) sites. The metadata includes nine eminent LSM sections and 27 mining site attributes for each LSM site. We also discuss the data set's possible contribution to the research community, social and environmental consequences, and researchers' responsibilities from an ethics perspective.

Text-to-CAD Evaluation with CADTests

Medium 2605.07807
Dimitrios Mallis, Marco Wang, Ahmet Serdar Karadeniz, Elisa Ricci, Anis Kacem, Djamila Aouada
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出首个基于自动化测试的 Text-to-CAD 评估基准 CADTestBench，通过可执行软件测试验证生成 CAD 模型的几何与拓扑正确性。
🎯研究动机

Text-to-CAD 任务能显著加速设计流程，但缺乏有效的评估方法，现有评估难以衡量生成模型的几何与拓扑准确性。

❓解决问题

如何系统、自动地评估 Text-to-CAD 生成的 CAD 模型是否满足输入提示的几何和拓扑要求。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CADTestBench，基于 CADTests（可执行软件测试）构建基准，通过自动化测试验证生成模型的几何与拓扑属性；并利用 CADTests 指导生成过程，形成简单基线。

📊实验结果

对近期 Text-to-CAD 方法进行了全面基准测试，并展示了 CADTests 引导生成的有效性。摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个基于自动化测试的 Text-to-CAD 评估基准 CADTestBench。
  • 通过 CADTests 指导生成，得到超越现有方法的简单基线。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准可能仅覆盖有限的几何和拓扑要求。
  • 引导生成的方法可能依赖测试设计，泛化性未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Text-to-CAD has recently emerged as an important task with the potential to substantially accelerate design workflows. Despite its significance, there has been surprisingly little work on Text-to-CAD evaluation, and assessing CAD model generation performance remains a considerable challenge. In this work, we introduce a new evaluation perspective for Text-to-CAD based on automated testing. We propose CADTestBench, the first test-based benchmark for Text-to-CAD, based on CADTests, executable software tests that verify whether a generated CAD model satisfies the geometric and topological requirements of the input prompt. Using CADTestBench, we conduct comprehensive benchmarking of recent Text-to-CAD methods and further demonstrate that CADTests can also guide CAD model generation, yielding simple baselines that surpass performance of current methods. CADTestBench code and data are available at GitHub and Hugging Face dataset.

ICDAR 2026 Competition on Writer Identification and Pen Classification from Hand-Drawn Circles

Medium 2605.07816
Thomas Gorges, Janne van der Loop, Lukas Hüttner, Linda-Sophie Schneider, Fei Wu, Mathias Seuret, Vincent Christlein
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：通过手绘圆圈图像的大规模竞赛，探索笔迹生物特征与笔具物理特征的纠缠，并建立最小痕迹分析基准。
🎯研究动机

手写分析中，生物特征（作者身份）与物理特征（笔类型）在静态痕迹中自然纠缠，现有方法难以分离；缺乏大规模、受控的基准数据集来研究这种纠缠。

❓解决问题

从扫描的手绘圆圈图像中同时进行开放集作者识别和跨作者笔分类，并分析分布外作者对模型泛化和特征解耦的影响。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 46,155 张高分辨率圆圈图像的数据集，标注作者身份和笔类型；组织 Kaggle 竞赛，提供 ResNet 基线，分为开放集作者识别和笔分类两个任务。

📊实验结果

在 Kaggle 平台上进行竞赛，389 个团队参与笔分类任务（3,185 次提交），113 个团队参与作者识别任务（1,737 次提交），最佳私有排行榜结果如上。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出了 CircleID 竞赛，包含大规模、受控的手绘圆圈数据集，用于作者识别和笔分类。
  • 通过竞赛结果建立了最小痕迹分析的新基线，最佳 Top-1 准确率分别为 64.801%（作者识别）和 92.726%（笔分类）。
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集仅包含手绘圆圈，可能无法泛化到其他手写痕迹。
  • 开放集作者识别准确率较低（64.801%），表明模型对未知作者泛化能力有限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This paper presents CircleID, a large-scale ICDAR 2026 competition on writer identification and pen classification from scanned hand-drawn circles. The primary objective is to investigate how biometric writer characteristics and physical pen features naturally entangle within minimal, static traces. CircleID comprises two distinct tasks: (1) open-set writer identification, requiring models to recognize known writers while explicitly rejecting unknown ones, and (2) cross-writer pen classification, evaluated across both seen and unseen writers. Participants were provided with a new, controlled dataset of 46,155 tightly cropped circle images, digitized at 400 DPI and annotated for writer identity and pen type. The dataset comprises samples from 50 known and 16 unknown writers using eight different pens. Hosted on Kaggle as two separate tracks with public and private leaderboards, the competition provided participants with a ResNet baseline. In total, 389 teams (436 participants) made 3,185 submissions for the pen classification task, and 113 teams (141 participants) made 1,737 submissions for the writer identification track. The best-performing private leaderboard submissions achieved a Top-1 accuracy of 64.801% for writer identification and 92.726% for pen classification. This paper details the dataset, evaluates the winning methodologies, and analyzes the impact of out-of-distribution writers on model generalization and feature disentanglement. In this large-scale competition, CircleID establishes a new baseline for minimal-trace analysis.

123D: Unifying Multi-Modal Autonomous Driving Data at Scale

Medium 2605.08084
Daniel Dauner, Valentin Charraut, Bastian Berle, Tianyu Li, Long Nguyen, Jiabao Wang, Changhui Jing, Maximilian Igl et al.
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：123D 是一个开源框架，通过统一 API 整合多模态自动驾驶数据，支持跨数据集同步与访问。
🎯研究动机

自动驾驶数据集规模大但格式碎片化、标注不一致，难以跨数据集训练或评估泛化能力。

❓解决问题

如何统一多模态自动驾驶数据的格式、同步和访问，以支持跨数据集训练和评估。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 123D 框架，将每种模态存储为独立的时间戳事件流，通过单一 API 实现同步或异步访问，并整合 8 个真实数据集和 1 个合成数据集。

📊实验结果

进行了跨数据集 3D 目标检测迁移和强化学习规划的应用展示，并比较了标注统计和位姿校准精度。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 123D 开源框架，统一多模态自动驾驶数据格式和访问接口
  • 整合 8 个真实数据集（3300 小时 /9 万公里）和 1 个合成数据集，提供分析工具
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能未覆盖所有自动驾驶数据集
  • 跨数据集迁移性能可能受标注差异限制
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The pursuit of autonomous driving has produced one of the richest sensor data collections in all of robotics. However, its scale and diversity remain largely untapped. Each dataset adopts different 2D and 3D modalities, such as cameras, lidar, ego states, annotations, traffic lights, and HD maps, with different rates and synchronization schemes. They come in fragmented formats requiring complex dependencies that cannot natively coexist in the same development environment. Further, major inconsistencies in annotation conventions prevent training or measuring generalization across multiple datasets. We present 123D, an open-source framework that unifies such multi-modal driving data through a single API. To handle synchronization, we store each modality as an independent timestamped event stream with no prescribed rate, enabling synchronous or asynchronous access across arbitrary datasets. Using 123D, we consolidate eight real-world driving datasets spanning 3,300 hours and 90,000 kilometers, together with a synthetic dataset with configurable collection scripts, and provide tools for data analysis and visualization. We conduct a systematic study comparing annotation statistics and assessing each dataset's pose and calibration accuracy. Further, we showcase two applications 123D enables: cross-dataset 3D object detection transfer and reinforcement learning for planning, and offer recommendations for future directions. Code and documentation are available at this https URL .

Advancing Reliable Synthetic Video Detection: Insights from the SAFE Challenge

Medium 2605.06912
Kirill Trapeznikov, Gabriel Mancino-Ball, Jonathan Li, Paul Cummer, Jai Aslam, Danial Samadi Vahdati, Tai Nguyen, Matthew C. Stamm et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：SAFE 挑战赛系统评估了合成视频检测方法，发现跨生成器泛化有进展但后处理鲁棒性不足。
🎯研究动机

生成视频技术泛滥，亟需可靠的合成视频检测方法，但现有方法在跨模型泛化和后处理鲁棒性方面存在不足。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个全面的基准测试来评估合成视频检测方法在盲测条件下的泛化能力和鲁棒性。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出跨生成器泛化有可测量的进步，但对后处理操作（如缩放、重压缩、运动模糊）存在持续脆弱性。

🛠️主要方法

组织 SAFE 挑战赛，构建包含 13 种现代高质量合成视频模型和 21 种真实视频来源的数据集，设计两个任务：原始检测和后处理检测，采用完全盲测评估。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了挑战赛设计和观察到的现象。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发布了包含 20 小时、6000 个视频样本的合成视频检测基准数据集
  • 系统评估了 12 个团队超过 600 个提交方法，揭示了跨生成器泛化的进展和后处理鲁棒性的弱点
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集可能未覆盖所有最新的生成模型
  • 后处理操作种类有限，可能无法完全反映真实场景
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The proliferation of generative video technologies has intensified the need for reliable methods to detect and characterize synthetic media. To address this challenge, we organized the \href{ this https URL }{SAFE: Synthetic Video Detection Challenge}, co-located with the \textit{Authenticity and Provenance in the Age of Generative AI (APAI) Workshop }at ICCV 2025. The competition invited participants to develop and evaluate algorithms capable of distinguishing real from synthetic videos under fully blind evaluation conditions with over 600 submissions from 12 teams over a 90 day span. Hosted on the Hugging Face platform, the challenge comprised two primary tasks: (1) detection of synthetic video content generated by diverse state-of-the-art models, and (2) detection of synthetic content following common post-processing operations such as resizing, re-compression, motion blur and others. The challenge data consisted of 13 modern high quality synthetic video models with generated content matched to real videos from 21 diverse and challenge sources, all adding up to 20 hours of 6,000 video samples. This paper describes the challenge design, dataset construction, evaluation methodology, and outcomes, offering insights into the generalization and robustness of contemporary synthetic video detection methods. Our findings highlight measurable progress in cross-generator generalization but also persistent vulnerabilities to post-processing artifacts. this https URL

安全/对齐评测 2 篇

RuleSafe-VL: Evaluating Rule-Conditioned Decision Reasoning in Vision-Language Content Moderation

High 2605.07760
Zhifeng Lu, Dianyuan Wang, Yuhu Shang, Zhenbo Xu
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 RuleSafe-VL 基准，系统评估视觉语言模型在内容审核中的规则条件决策推理能力，发现规则关系恢复是主要瓶颈。
🎯研究动机

现有多模态安全基准仅匹配预定义标签，无法测试模型是否真正理解并应用平台政策规则，导致高分可能来自表面线索而非正确推理。

❓解决问题

缺乏评估视觉语言模型在内容审核中基于规则条件进行决策推理的基准。

🔎现象分析

规则关系恢复是主要瓶颈，最佳模型仅 64.8 Macro-F1，部分安全导向模型低于 7 Macro-F1；决策状态预测也不可靠，最高 64.5 Macro-F1。

🛠️主要方法

从公开平台审核政策中形式化 93 条原子规则和 92 种规则关系，构建 2,166 个上下文敏感图文案例，设计四个诊断任务分解决策链。

📊实验结果

在 10 个前沿、开源和安全导向的 VLM 上实验，报告了 Macro-F1 指标。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 RuleSafe-VL 基准，系统评估 VLM 在内容审核中的规则条件决策推理。
  • 揭示规则关系恢复是当前 VLM 的主要瓶颈，并指出安全导向模型表现不佳。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅覆盖三个高风险政策族，可能不全面。
  • 未提供模型在真实平台上的部署验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Platform content moderation applies explicit policy rules and context-dependent conditions to decide whether user content is allowed, restricted, or removed. A correct moderation outcome must therefore depend on which rules a case activates, how those rules interact, and whether the available evidence is sufficient. Current multimodal safety benchmarks largely reduce moderation to matching predefined final labels, leaving this underlying rule structure untested. As a result, a high benchmark score reveals little about whether a model applies the policy correctly or arrives at the correct label through superficial cues. To evaluate this rule-governed process, we introduce RuleSafe-VL, a benchmark for rule-conditioned decision reasoning in vision-language content moderation. Derived from publicly available platform moderation policies, RuleSafe-VL formalizes 93 atomic rules and 92 typed rule relations, yielding 2,166 context-sensitive image-text cases across three high-risk policy families. Its four diagnostic tasks decompose moderation into a rule-conditioned decision chain. They identify activated rules, recover rule interactions, judge decision sufficiency, and resolve outcomes once missing context is supplied. Experiments on 10 frontier, open-source, and safety-oriented VLMs reveal rule-relation recovery as the dominant bottleneck, where the best model reaches only 64.8 Macro-F1 and some safety-oriented models fall below 7 Macro-F1. Decision-state prediction also remains unreliable, peaking at 64.5 Macro-F1. RuleSafe-VL shifts moderation evaluation from final-label scoring toward diagnostic assessment of rule-conditioned decision reasoning.

CoCoReviewBench: A Completeness- and Correctness-Oriented Benchmark for AI Reviewers

Medium 2605.07905
Hexuan Deng, Xiaopeng Ke, Yichen Li, Ruina Hu, Dehao Huang, Derek F. Wong, Yue Wang, Xuebo Liu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出面向 AI 审稿人的完整性与正确性基准 CoCoReviewBench，发现现有 AI 审稿人正确性有限且易产生幻觉。
🎯研究动机

现有 AI 审稿系统评估依赖与人工审稿的重叠度，但人工审稿常不完整且含错误，导致评估不可靠。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个能可靠评估 AI 审稿人完整性和正确性的基准。

🔎现象分析

AI 审稿人正确性有限，易产生幻觉；推理模型作为审稿人更有效。

🛠️主要方法

构建类别特定基准子集，缺失人工审稿时跳过评估以增强完整性；利用审稿人 - 作者 - 元审稿讨论作为专家标注并过滤不可靠审稿以增强正确性。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CoCoReviewBench 基准，包含 3900 篇 ICLR 和 NeurIPS 论文，支持细粒度评估。
  • 揭示 AI 审稿人正确性不足和幻觉问题，并指出推理模型更有效。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅覆盖 ICLR 和 NeurIPS 论文，可能不泛化到其他会议或领域。
  • 依赖讨论作为专家标注，可能仍存在标注偏差。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Despite the rapid development of AI reviewers, evaluating such systems remains challenging: metrics favor overlap with human reviews over correctness. However, since human reviews often cover only a subset of salient issues and sometimes contain mistakes, they are unreliable as gold references. To address this, we build category-specific benchmark subsets and skip evaluation when the corresponding human reviews are missing to strengthen Completeness. We also leverage reviewer--author--meta-review discussions as expert annotations and filter unreliable reviews accordingly to strengthen Correctness. Finally, we introduce CoCoReviewBench, which curates 3,900 papers from ICLR and NeurIPS to enable reliable and fine-grained evaluation of AI reviewers. Analysis shows that AI reviewers remain limited in correctness and are prone to hallucinations, and highlights reasoning models as more effective reviewers, motivating further directions for improving AI reviewers. Benchmarks and models are available at this https URL .

视觉理解基准 2 篇

How Far Is Document Parsing from Solved? PureDocBench: A Source-TraceableBenchmark across Clean, Degraded, and Real-World Settings

High 2605.07492
Zhiheng Li, Zongyang Ma, Jiaxian Chen, Jianing Zhang, Zhaolong Su, Yutong Zhang, Zhiyin Yu, Ruiqi Liu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：现有文档解析基准存在标注质量与污染风险，PureDocBench 通过程序化生成和源可追溯设计，揭示了当前模型在干净、退化及真实场景下远未解决的性能瓶颈。
🎯研究动机

文档解析领域虽涌现大量开源模型，但现有基准 OmniDocBench 存在标注错误率高（12.08%）和长期公开导致的污染风险，其饱和的分数无法反映真实能力，亟需更可靠、可追溯的评测基准。

❓解决问题

构建一个干净、退化及真实场景下、源可追溯的文档解析基准，以准确评估模型性能并揭示现有方法的不足。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出：最佳模型仅得约 74 分，最强与最弱模型差距达 44.6 分；小参数专用解析器可匹敌大参数通用 VLM，但公式识别是共同瓶颈（最高 67%）；通用 VLM 在退化场景下性能下降更小，导致排名反转，仅用干净数据评测会误导部署决策。

🛠️主要方法

PureDocBench：从 HTML/CSS 程序化生成文档图像，并自动产生可验证的标注，覆盖 10 个领域、66 个子类、1475 页，每页包含干净、数字退化、真实退化三个版本（共 4425 张图像）。

📊实验结果

在 PureDocBench 上评估 40 个模型，包括流水线专用、端到端专用和通用 VLM，报告了总体分数、公式识别分数及退化场景下的性能变化。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 PureDocBench，一个程序化生成、源可追溯的文档解析基准，包含干净、数字退化和真实退化三种设置，共 4425 张图像。
  • 系统评估 40 个模型，揭示文档解析远未解决，最佳模型仅约 74 分，公式识别是共同瓶颈。
  • 发现通用 VLM 在退化场景下鲁棒性优于专用解析器，导致排名反转，强调多场景评测的必要性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅覆盖 10 个领域，可能未涵盖所有文档类型。
  • 程序化生成可能无法完全模拟真实文档的复杂布局和噪声。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The past year has seen over 20 open-source document parsing models, yet thefield still benchmarks almost exclusively on OmniDocBench, a 1,355-pagemanually annotated dataset whose top scores have saturated above 90%. Athree-stage audit pipeline we run on OmniDocBench screens its 21,353evaluator-scored blocks and confirms 2,580 errors (12.08%); combined with overa year of public availability, both annotation quality and contamination riskcall its rankings into question. To address these issues, we presentPureDocBench, a programmatically generated, source-traceable benchmark thatrenders document images from HTML/CSS and produces verifiable annotations fromthe same source, covering 10 domains, 66 subcategories, and 1,475 pages, eachin three versions: clean, digitally degraded, and real-degraded (4,425 imagestotal). Evaluating 40 models spanning pipeline specialists, end-to-endspecialists, and general-purpose VLMs, we find: (i) document parsing is farfrom solved: the best model scores only ~74 out of 100, with a 44.6-point gapbetween the strongest and weakest models; (ii) specialist parsers with <=4Bparameters rival or surpass general VLMs that are 5-100x larger, yet formularecognition remains a shared bottleneck where no model exceeds 67% whenaveraging the formula metric across all three tracks; (iii) general VLMs loseonly 0.99/8.52 Overall points under digital/real degradation versus 4.90/14.21for pipeline specialists, producing ranking reversals that make clean-onlyevaluation misleading for deployment. All data, code, and artifacts arepublicly released.

LithoBench: Benchmarking Large Multimodal Models for Remote-Sensing Lithology Interpretation

High 2605.07640
Jun Wang, Fengpeng Li, Hang Dong, Tianjin Huang, Wei Han
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出遥感岩性解释多级基准 LithoBench，评估大视觉语言模型的地质语义理解能力。
🎯研究动机

遥感岩性解释是地质调查和矿产勘探的基础，但现有基准缺乏岩性标注、多级地质语义和专家评估，限制了地质知识引导的大多模态模型评估。

❓解决问题

缺乏一个包含岩性标注、多级地质语义和专家评估的基准来评估大视觉语言模型在遥感岩性解释中的地质语义理解能力。

🔎现象分析

实验表明，多个大视觉语言模型在地质语义理解上存在显著局限，尤其是在高阶解释、应用和推理任务上。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 10,000 个专家标注实例的多级基准，涵盖 12 个岩性类别，包括 4,000 个多项选择和 6,000 个开放任务，分为五个认知层次；并开发专家在环、知识引导的半自动构建流程。

📊实验结果

使用多个大视觉语言模型进行实验，揭示了地质语义理解的显著局限，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 LithoBench，首个多级遥感岩性解释基准，包含专家标注和五个认知层次的任务。
  • 开发专家在环、知识引导的半自动构建流程，增强地质有效性和评估可靠性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅涵盖 12 个岩性类别，可能无法代表所有岩性类型。
  • 半自动构建流程可能仍存在标注偏差或遗漏。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Remote sensing lithology interpretation is fundamental to geological surveys, mineral exploration, and regional geological mapping. Unlike general land-cover recognition, lithology interpretation is a knowledge-intensive task that requires experts to infer rock types from various features, e.g., subtle visual, spectral, textural, geomorphological, and contextual cues, making reliable automated interpretation highly challenging. Geological knowledge-guided large multimodal models offer new opportunities, yet their evaluation remains constrained by the lack of benchmarks that capture lithological annotations, multi-level geological semantics, and expert-informed assessment. Here, we propose LithoBench, a multi-level benchmark for evaluating geological semantic understanding in remote sensing lithology interpretation. LithoBench contains 10,000 expert-annotated interpretation instances across 12 representative lithological categories, including 4,000 multiple-choice and 6,000 open-ended tasks organized into five cognitive levels: Identification and Description, Comparative Analysis, Mechanism Explanation, Practical Application, and Comprehensive Reasoning. We further develop an expert-in-the-loop, knowledge-grounded semi-automated construction pipeline, coupling multi sub-processes, e.g., structured geological image descriptions, to enhance geological validity and evaluation reliability. Experiments with multiple large vision-language models eveal substantial limitations in geological semantic understanding, particularly on higher-order explanation, application, and reasoning tasks.

推理与数学评测 1 篇

GSM-SEM: Benchmark and Framework for Generating Semantically Variant Augmentations

High 2605.07053
Jyotika Singh, Fang Tu, Aziza Mirzadova, Amit Agarwal, Hitesh Laxmichand Patel, Sandip Ghoshal, Miguel Ballesteros, Yassine Benajiba et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
