TL;DR：提出 GSM-SEM 框架，通过语义级扰动生成数学推理基准变体，降低记忆偏差，揭示 LLM 推理脆弱性。
🎯研究动机

现有数学推理基准（如 GSM8K）存在固定测试集记忆化问题，导致排行榜成绩高估真实能力；现有变体方法仅做表面扰动（如改写、换数），语义变化有限，且静态发布后仍可能被记忆。

❓解决问题

如何生成语义多样性高、可复用且无需重新标注的基准变体，以更可靠地评估 LLM 的数学推理能力并减少记忆偏差。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

GSM-SEM 框架：通过修改问题中的实体、属性和 / 或关系，改变底层事实，迫使模型在新条件下重新计算，同时保持原始计算步骤、答案和问题难度；每次运行生成全新变体，无需重新标注。

📊实验结果

在 14 个 SOTA LLM 上评估，使用 GSM8K-SEM、GSM-Symbolic-SEM、GSM-Plus-SEM 三个变体，报告平均下降率 28%（最大严格配置）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 GSM-SEM，一个可复用、随机的语义变体生成框架，语义方差显著高于先前方法。
  • 基于 GSM8K、GSM-Symbolic 和 GSM-Plus 生成三个全人工验证的数据集（GSM8K-SEM、GSM-Symbolic-SEM、GSM-Plus-SEM）。
  • 在 14 个 SOTA LLM 上评估，观察到一致性能下降，语义扰动与符号 /plus 变体结合时下降更大（最大严格配置下平均下降率 28%）。
  • 展示框架可迁移至其他基准（BigBenchHard、LogicBench、NLR-BIRD）。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对数学推理类问题，对其他类型推理的适用性需进一步验证。
  • 语义扰动可能无意中改变问题难度，尽管框架试图保持难度近似。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Benchmarks like GSM8K are popular measures of mathematical reasoning, but leaderboard gains can overstate true capability due to memorization of fixed test sets. Most robustness variants apply surface-level perturbations (paraphrases, renamings, number swaps, distractors) that largely preserve the underlying facts, and static releases can themselves become memorization targets over time. We introduce GSM-SEM, a reusable and stochastic framework for generating semantically diverse benchmark variants with substantially higher semantic variance than prior approaches. GSM-SEM perturbs problem statements by modifying entities, attributes, and/or relationships, frequently altering underlying facts and requiring models to recompute solutions under new conditions, while constraining generation to preserve the original calculations/answer and approximate problem difficulty. GSM-SEM generates fresh variants on each run without requiring re-annotation, reducing reliance on static public benchmarks for evaluation and thereby lowering the bias of memorization. We apply GSM-SEM on GSM8K and two existing variation suites (GSM-Symbolic and GSM-Plus), producing GSM8K-SEM, GSM-Symbolic-SEM, and GSM-Plus-SEM. Evaluating 14 SOTA LLMs, we observe consistent performance drops with larger decline when semantic perturbations are coupled with symbolic/plus variations (average drop rate 28% in maximum strictness configuration of GSM-SEM). We publicly release the three SEM variants as fully human-validated datasets. Finally, to demonstrate applicability beyond GSM-style math problems, we apply GSM-SEM to additional benchmarks including BigBenchHard, LogicBench, and NLR-BIRD.

视频/长任务基准 1 篇

TraceAV-Bench: Benchmarking Multi-Hop Trajectory Reasoning over Long Audio-Visual Videos

High 2605.07593
Hengyi Feng, Hao Liang, Mingrui Chen, Bohan Zeng, Meiyi Qiang, Zhengyang Zhao, Zimo Meng, Zeang Sheng et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：首个评估长音频 - 视觉视频多跳轨迹推理与多模态幻觉鲁棒性的基准。
🎯研究动机

现有基准局限于短视频、单模态或单跳感知，无法评估真实世界中需要跨模态、长时域证据链的推理能力。

❓解决问题

缺乏同时评估长音频 - 视觉视频多跳推理和幻觉鲁棒性的基准。

🔎现象分析

最强闭源模型在通用任务上仅达 68.29%，开源模型仅 51.70%，且多模态幻觉鲁棒性与通用推理性能基本解耦。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 2200 道选择题、578 个长视频（总时长 339.5 小时）的基准，通过三步半自动流水线和严格质量保证生成，每个问题平均 3.68 跳推理链、跨 15.1 分钟时间跨度。

📊实验结果

在多个代表性 OmniLLM 上评估，最强闭源模型 Gemini 3.1 Pro 通用任务准确率 68.29%，最佳开源模型 Ming-Flash-Omni-2.0 准确率 51.70%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个联合评估长音频 - 视觉视频多跳推理与多模态幻觉鲁棒性的基准
  • 揭示现有 OmniLLM 在该任务上的显著不足及幻觉鲁棒性与推理性能的解耦现象
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准仅包含英文视频和选择题格式，可能限制泛化性
  • 未提供模型在幻觉鲁棒性上的具体指标
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Real-world audio-visual understanding requires chaining evidence that is sparse, temporally dispersed, and split across the visual and auditory streams, whereas existing benchmarks largely fail to evaluate this capability. They restrict videos to short clips, isolate modalities, or reduce questions to one-hop perception. We introduce TraceAV-Bench, the first benchmark to jointly evaluate multi-hop reasoning over long audio-visual trajectories and multimodal hallucination robustness. TraceAV-Bench comprises 2,200 rigorously validated multiple-choice questions over 578 long videos, totaling 339.5 hours, spanning 4 evaluation dimensions and 15 sub-tasks. Each question is grounded in an explicit reasoning chain that averages 3.68 hops across a 15.1-minute temporal span. The dataset is built by a three-step semi-automated pipeline followed by a strict quality assurance process. Evaluation of multiple representative OmniLLMs on TraceAV-Bench reveals that the benchmark poses a persistent challenge across all models, with the strongest closed-source model (Gemini 3.1 Pro) reaching only 68.29% on general tasks, and the best open-source model (Ming-Flash-Omni-2.0) reaching 51.70%, leaving substantial headroom. Moreover, we find that robustness to multimodal hallucination is largely decoupled from general multimodal reasoning performance. We anticipate that TraceAV-Bench will stimulate further research toward OmniLLMs that can reason coherently and faithfully over long-form audio-visual content.

其他 ML 主题 29 篇 · 4 个细分

其他 17 篇

An Embarrassingly Simple Graph Heuristic Reveals Shortcut-Solvable Benchmarks for Sequential Recommendation

High 2605.07125
Haoyu Han, Li Ma, Hanbing Wang, Bingheng Li, Daochen Zha, Chun How Tan, Huiji Gao, Xin Liu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.IR
TL;DR：简单图启发式方法揭示序列推荐基准存在捷径可解问题，削弱了现代生成式推荐器的评估可信度。
🎯研究动机

序列推荐模型日益复杂，但常用基准可能无法真正测试其高级建模能力，存在评估偏差风险。

❓解决问题

验证标准序列推荐基准是否真正需要现代生成式推荐器的复杂建模能力，还是存在捷径可解结构。

🔎现象分析

发现三种捷径结构：低分支局部转移、特征平滑转移、对长用户历史依赖有限，这些结构使简单局部检索方法表现优异。

🛠️主要方法

提出一种无训练、无序列编码器的简单图启发式方法，仅利用最后交互物品从物品转移图中检索候选，并按特征相似度排序。

📊实验结果

在 14 个数据集上评估，简单启发式在 10 个数据集上具有竞争力，在 Amazon Review Sports 和 CDs 上相对 NDCG@10 提升 38.10% 和 44.18%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示序列推荐基准中存在捷径可解问题，削弱了现代生成式推荐器的评估有效性。
  • 识别三种导致捷径可解的结构特征，并验证其普遍性。
  • 提出数据集级诊断分析建议，呼吁更谨慎的基准选择。
⚠️方法局限
  • 启发式方法本身简单，可能无法推广到所有场景。
  • 未提供具体消除捷径后的模型排名变化细节。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Sequential recommendation has increasingly shifted toward generative recommenders that combine sequential patterns with semantic item information. Yet these methods are often evaluated on a small set of widely used benchmarks, raising a key question: do these benchmarks actually require the advanced modeling capabilities that modern generative recommenders claim to provide? We conduct a benchmark audit with an intentionally simple graph heuristic. Starting from only the last one or two interacted items, it retrieves candidates from a few-hop item-transition graph and ranks them by item-feature similarity. Despite using no sequence encoder, generative objective, or training, this heuristic matches or outperforms many modern baselines, with relative NDCG@10 improvements of 38.10% and 44.18% over the best competing baseline on Amazon Review Sports and CDs. We show that this behavior reflects shortcut solvability rather than an artifact of one heuristic. We identify three shortcut structures that can make next-item prediction easier than expected: low-branching local transitions, feature-smooth transitions, and limited dependence on long user histories. These shortcuts need not appear together; even one or two strong signals can make simple local retrieval highly competitive, while weakening them makes the benefits of more sophisticated models clearer. Across 14 datasets, model rankings vary substantially with dataset properties, yet the heuristic remains competitive on 10 of them. Our findings suggest that strong performance on standard benchmarks does not always demonstrate advanced sequential, semantic, or generative modeling ability. We call for more careful dataset selection and dataset-level diagnostic analysis when using benchmarks to support claims about new recommendation models.

From Assistance to Agency: Rethinking Autonomy and Control in CI/CD Pipelines

Medium 2605.07062
Marcus Emmanuel Barnes, Taher A. Ghaleb, Safwat Hassan
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：提出 CI/CD 流水线中从辅助到代理的转变，核心挑战是设计权限转移而非任务性能。
🎯研究动机

AI 代理在 CI/CD 工作流中承担越来越主动的角色，但缺乏描述代理性、决策授权程度和控制归属的共享词汇。

❓解决问题

如何定义和设计 CI/CD 流水线中的权限转移，即从人类控制到代理系统的操作决策授权。

🔎现象分析

当前系统主要在数据平面下运行，具有有限自主性，安全性通过外部治理基础设施实现而非内在代理保证；存在三种模式：约束自主性主导、外部治理为主要安全机制、部署势头与评估方法之间的差距扩大。

🛠️主要方法

提出数据平面权限与控制平面权限的区分，并基于研究原型和工业平台分析当前系统模式，提出研究议程。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 引入数据平面权限与控制平面权限的区分，为 CI/CD 代理性提供结构化分析框架。
  • 识别当前 CI/CD 代理系统的三种重复模式，并指出控制平面安全与治理机制是最紧迫的开放问题。
⚠️方法局限
  • 论文为愿景性工作，缺乏实证验证。
  • 未提供具体实现或评估框架的细节。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

AI agents are assuming active roles in Continuous Integration and Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) workflows, yet the research community lacks a shared vocabulary for describing what it means for CI/CD to be agentic, how much decision authority is delegated, and where control should reside. This paper presents a vision of agentic CI/CD in which the central challenge is not improving task performance but designing authority transfer, defined as the delegation of operational decisions from human-controlled pipelines to agent systems under specified constraints and recourse mechanisms. To structure this argument, we introduce a distinction between data-plane authority (localized interventions such as patch generation and test reruns) and control-plane authority (modifications to pipeline configuration, deployment policies, and approval gates). Drawing on research prototypes and industrial platforms, we show that current systems operate mainly at the data plane under bounded autonomy, with safety achieved through surrounding governance infrastructure rather than intrinsic agent guarantees. We identify three recurring patterns: constrained autonomy as the dominant design, external governance as the primary safety mechanism, and a widening gap between deployment momentum and evaluation methodology. We propose a research agenda in which control-plane safety and governance mechanisms represent the most urgent open problem, followed by formalization of autonomy boundaries, evaluation frameworks, and human--agent coordination.

Online Allocation with Unknown Shared Supply

Medium 2605.07080
Tzeh Yuan Neoh, Davin Choo, Mengchu Yue, Milind Tambe
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出在线共享分配问题，设计阈值比例策略 GPA，达到 4/3 近似比，并扩展为学习增强版本以利用预测。
🎯研究动机

人道主义物流和疫苗分配等场景需在需求未知时预置有限供应，缺货导致不可逆损失，现有库存模型不允许延期交货且补货仅能对冲未来需求，缺乏在线分配的理论保证。

❓解决问题

在线共享供应分配问题：中心仓库将有限未知供应分配给多个站点，面对顺序到达的需求，需在固定运输成本和缺货惩罚下最小化总成本。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出确定性阈值比例策略 GPA，证明其达到 4/3 近似比（加性项与总供应无关），并给出匹配下界；进一步开发学习增强扩展，结合不完美预测。

📊实验结果

合成和真实实验表明，在全局供应稀缺时 GPA 优于自然基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化在线共享供应分配问题（OSSA），建立状态在线模型。
  • 提出 GPA 策略并证明 4/3 近似比及紧性下界。
  • 开发学习增强扩展，融合预测信息同时保证鲁棒性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 近似比分析假设确定性策略，随机算法可能获得更好常数。
  • 学习增强扩展依赖预测质量，极端坏预测下性能退化。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Many real-world resource allocation systems, such as humanitarian logistics and vaccine distribution, must preposition limited supply across multiple locations before demand is realized while stockouts incur irreversible service losses. To study this, we introduce the Online Shared Supply Allocation (OSSA) problem, a stateful online model in which a central hub allocates a finite, unknown supply to multiple sites facing sequential demand under fixed-charge transportation costs and lost-sales penalties. Unlike classical make-to-stock or make-to-order inventory models, OSSA precludes backlogging and replenishment only hedges against future demand. To tackle OSSA, we propose a deterministic threshold-proportional policy GPA and prove that it achieves a $4/3$-approximation to the offline optimum up to an additive term independent of the total supply. We complement this with matching lower bounds showing that the $4/3$ ratio is tight and that the additive-error dependence is unavoidable, even for randomized algorithms that know the total supply upfront. Finally, we develop a learning-augmented extension to GPA that principally incorporates imperfect forecasts (e.g., from human experts or ML models) commonly available in practice, enabling us to exploit high-quality advice while being robust against arbitrary bad ones. Synthetic and real-world experiments show that GPA outperforms natural baselines with global supply is scarce.

Query-efficient model evaluation using cached responses

Medium 2605.07096
Hayden Helm, Ben Johnson, Carey Priebe
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：利用缓存模型响应，通过数据核视角空间（DKPS）方法高效预测新模型在基准上的性能，大幅减少查询次数。
🎯研究动机

现代模型评估框架中，对所有查询生成和评估响应成本高昂，而实践中常缓存已评估模型的响应，但未充分利用这些信息来减少新模型评估的查询量。

❓解决问题

如何利用缓存模型响应，以最少的查询次数准确预测新模型在现有基准上的性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出基于数据核视角空间（DKPS）的方法，通过量化黑盒模型间关系，利用缓存响应预测新模型性能，并设计离线查询选择策略最大化参考模型拟合优度。

📊实验结果

实验表明 DKPS 方法在显著降低查询预算的同时达到与基线相同的平均绝对误差。摘要未提供具体数据集或基准细节。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 DKPS 方法，利用缓存模型响应高效预测新模型基准性能。
  • 理论上证明 DKPS 方法在特定条件下具有查询高效性。
  • 实验表明 DKPS 方法在显著降低查询预算的同时达到与基线相同的平均绝对误差。
  • 提出离线查询选择方法，提高预测精度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论条件可能在实际中不易满足。
  • 方法依赖缓存模型的质量和多样性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Evaluating a new model on an existing benchmark is often necessary to understand its behavior before deployment. For modern evaluation frameworks, generating and evaluating a response for all queries can be prohibitively expensive. In practice, responses from previously-evaluated models are often cached -- creating a potential opportunity to use this additional information to decrease the number of queries required to accurately evaluate a new model. In this paper, we introduce an approach for predicting benchmark performance that leverages cached model responses based on the Data Kernel Perspective Space (DKPS), a method for quantifying the relationship between models in the black-box setting. Theoretically, we show that DKPS-based methods are query-efficient under certain conditions. Empirically, we demonstrate that DKPS-based methods achieve the same mean absolute error as baselines with a substantially decreased query budget. We conclude by proposing an offline method for selecting a set of queries that maximizes the goodness-of-fit on reference models, improving prediction accuracy over random query selection.

HMACE: Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Collaborative Evolution for Combinatorial Optimization

Medium 2605.07214
Yuping Yan, Jirui Han, Fei Ming, Yuanshuai Li, Yaochu Jin
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：HMACE 提出异构多智能体协作进化框架，将启发式搜索重构为组织设计问题，在组合优化上实现高质量与低 token 消耗。
🎯研究动机

现有基于 LLM 的自动化启发式设计方法通常依赖单一工作流和刚性模板，导致记忆引导探索受限且易陷入局部最优，亟需更自主、协作的架构。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个自主协作的多智能体框架，以克服现有 LLM 方法在组合优化中探索不足和早熟收敛的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出现有 LLM 方法受限于刚性模板，导致记忆引导探索受限和过早收敛到局部最优。

🛠️主要方法

提出 HMACE 框架，将每个进化代分解为四个角色专用智能体的循环：Proposer（策略探索）、Generator（可执行启发式合成）、Evaluator（经验评估）、Reflector（存档支持的内存更新），结合行为感知检索、轻量候选过滤和适应度存档更新。

📊实验结果

在 TSP、Online BPP、MKP 和 PFSP 等代表性组合优化问题上进行广泛评估，与最先进的单智能体和多智能体基线比较，HMACE 在 TSP 和 Online BPP 上取得最低平均差距（0.464% 和 0.223%），token 消耗分别为 0.13M 和 0.42M。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出异构多智能体协作进化框架 HMACE，将启发式搜索重构为组织设计问题。
  • 在 TSP、Online BPP、MKP 和 PFSP 等组合优化问题上，HMACE 在质量和效率上优于现有单智能体和多智能体基线，尤其在 TSP 和 Online BPP 上达到最低平均差距（0.464% 和 0.223%），且 token 消耗显著更少。
⚠️方法局限
  • 框架复杂度较高，需要协调多个智能体。
  • 可能对 LLM 的推理能力有较强依赖。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Language Models have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for automated heuristic design for NP-hard combinatorial optimization problems. Despite this progress, existing LLM-based methods typically rely on monolithic workflows constrained by rigid templates, thereby restricting memory-guided exploration and triggering premature convergence to local optima. To design an autonomous and collaborative architecture, we introduce HMACE, a Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Collaborative Evolution framework that reconceptualizes heuristic search as an organizational design problem. HMACE decomposes each evolutionary generation into an autonomous, role-specialized loop with four coordinated agents: a Proposer for strategy exploration, a Generator for executable heuristic synthesis, an Evaluator for empirical assessment, and a Reflector for archive-backed memory update. By coupling behavior-aware retrieval, lightweight candidate filtering, and fitness-grounded archive updates, HMACE guides the search toward diverse and promising heuristic behaviors while avoiding redundant evaluations. Extensive evaluations on representative COPs, including TSP, Online BPP, MKP, and PFSP, show that HMACE achieves a favorable quality-efficiency trade-off compared to state-of-the-art single-agent and multi-agent baselines. In the matched LLM-driven reference comparison, HMACE achieves the lowest average gaps on TSP and Online BPP (0.464\% and 0.223\%, respectively), while requiring only 0.13M and 0.42M tokens for the two tasks, substantially fewer than the compared baselines.

Does Your Neural Network Extrapolate? Feature Engineering as Identifiability Bias for OOD Generalization

Medium 2605.07483
Leonel Aguilar, Jan Nagler, Christoph Hoelscher, Nino Antulov-Fantulin
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：特征工程作为可辨识性偏差，决定了神经网络能否在分布外泛化中成功外推。
🎯研究动机

深度神经网络在分布外（OOD）场景下常失败，根本原因在于从单一训练窗口无法唯一确定数据生成过程（DGP），导致 OOD 外推不可辨识。

❓解决问题

从分布内（ID）训练数据中学习 OOD 相关表征的失败机制，以及如何通过特征工程注入结构承诺实现 OOD 泛化。

🔎现象分析

从单一训练窗口，存在无穷多个 DGP 在训练数据上ε- 观测等价但 OOD 行为任意发散；ID 准则无法可靠区分。结构承诺（特征映射、标签映射、模型类）决定 OOD 泛化，而 ID 性能几乎不变。改变表征可使相同架构、相同 ID 损失下 OOD 性能差异达~520 倍。

🛠️主要方法

将特征工程视为可辨识性偏差：通过注入结构承诺（如傅里叶坐标将周期外推转化为圆上的插值）使 OOD 泛化可辨识。

📊实验结果

在三个自然科学场景（质量作用化学、开普勒第三定律系外行星预测 n=2362、跨物种编码 DNA 检测）和 264 次位置编码实验（Transformer、Mamba、S4D）中验证理论预测。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了 OOD 外推不可辨识的根本原因，并建立特征工程与可辨识性偏差的理论联系。
  • 通过多个自然科学和位置编码实验验证了结构承诺对 OOD 泛化的决定性作用。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论框架主要针对特征工程，未覆盖其他 OOD 泛化策略（如数据增强、正则化）。
  • 实验限于特定领域，通用性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Successful deep neural networks discover salient features of data. We show when and why they fail to learn out-of-distribution (OOD)-relevant representations from an in-distribution (ID) training window. This requires decoupling feature learning from data-generating-process (DGP) identifiability. From a single training window, OOD extrapolation is non-identifiable: infinitely many DGPs are $\varepsilon$-observationally equivalent on the training data but diverge arbitrarily outside it, and no in-distribution criterion alone reliably breaks the tie. A structural commitment, the feature map, label map, and model class $(\varphi, \psi, \mathcal{M})$, dictates the assumed DGP and governs OOD generalization while leaving ID performance essentially unchanged. When architecture, pretraining, augmentation, input formats, or domain knowledge implicitly inject the missing commitment, the model succeeds. When it cannot infer OOD-relevant structure from ID evidence, it fails. Changing only the representation can make the same architecture, at the same in-distribution loss, differ by ${\sim}520\times$ out of distribution. When the commitment is correct and identifiable, OOD error vanishes. For example, Fourier coordinates turn periodic extrapolation into interpolation on $\mathbb{S}^1$. The same mechanism predicts outcomes in three natural-science settings (mass-action chemistry; Kepler's-third-law exoplanet prediction, $n=2{,}362$; and cross-species coding-DNA detection) and in a 264-run positional-encoding study across Transformer, Mamba, and S4D. Finally, a controlled study shows: correct features are necessary but not sufficient. The model class must express the target, and the transformed training data must cover the relevant representation space.

Dynamic Mode Decomposition along Depth in Vision Transformers

Medium 2605.07556
Nishant Suresh Aswani, Saif Eddin Jabari
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：ViT 深度中存在局部自治线性动力学，但下游任务中恒等映射基线即可匹敌。
🎯研究动机

先前工作发现 ViT 块可被线性映射替代并呈现循环计算阶段，但两者是否一致尚不清楚，探索深度方向是否实现自治线性动力学有助于理解 ViT 内部机制。

❓解决问题

验证 ViT 深度方向是否实现近似自治线性动力学，即是否存在单一算子 K 可递归应用于连续跨度。

🔎现象分析

短跨度（p≤4）下 K^p 能高精度跟踪无约束端点映射（余弦相似度 0.02 内），且恢复中间激活；早期切分处算子压缩至低秩，cls 令牌最易线性化，但这些性质随深度单调衰减；局部保真度不传递至下游任务，最终隐藏状态处恒等映射基线具有竞争力。

🛠️主要方法

使用动态模式分解（DMD）从选定的连续隐藏状态对拟合算子 K，并通过 K^p 预测 p 步。

📊实验结果

在四个预训练 DINO ViT 上研究正则化、秩和校准预算对稳定拟合的影响。摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现 ViT 深度在短跨度内存在局部自治线性动力学，且算子可低秩压缩
  • 揭示局部线性保真度不传递至下游任务，恒等映射基线在下游具有竞争力
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对 DINO ViT 系列，可能不泛化至其他 ViT 变体
  • 未深入分析下游任务中恒等映射基线为何具有竞争力
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent work has shown that contiguous vision transformer (ViT) blocks (a) can be replaced by a linear map and (b) organize into recurrent phases of computation. We ask whether these observations coincide: does ViT depth implement approximately \textit{autonomous linear} dynamics, admitting a single operator $K$ applied recurrently across a contiguous span? We test this using Dynamic Mode Decomposition (DMD), which fits $K$ from selected, consecutive hidden-state pairs and predicts $p$ steps ahead via $K^p$. On four pretrained DINO ViTs, we study the regularization, rank, and calibration budget required for stable fitting. For short spans ($p \leq 4$), $K^p$ tracks an unconstrained endpoint map to within $0.02$ cosine similarity on DINOv3-H/16+, while also recovering intermediate activations at each skipped block. At early cut starts, the fitted operators compress to rank $\ll d$ with minimal calibration data, and across tokens, \texttt{cls} is most amenable to linearization; both properties decay monotonically with depth. Yet this local fidelity does not transfer downstream. At the final hidden state, after propagating through the remaining blocks, an identity baseline becomes competitive.

Parallel Lifted Planning via Semi-Naive Datalog Evaluation

Medium 2605.07584
Dominik Drexler, Oliver Joergensen, Jendrik Seipp
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种基于半朴素 Datalog 评估的并行提升规划方法，通过规则级和实例化级并行加速规划求解。
🎯研究动机

提升规划器避免昂贵的实例化步骤，但搜索中需重复实例化结构导致速度较慢，现有方法缺乏并行化支持。

❓解决问题

如何通过并行化 Datalog 评估来加速提升经典规划中的核心组件（如后继生成、公理评估、任务实例化和删除松弛启发式）。

🔎现象分析

在难实例化任务中，平均 97.6% 的运行时间花费在 Datalog 执行上，表明 Datalog 评估是主要瓶颈。

🛠️主要方法

开发具有规则级并行和实例化级并行的执行模型，并基于团枚举的实例化器扩展支持半朴素 Datalog 评估。

📊实验结果

使用贪婪最佳优先搜索和 FF 启发式，在单核上比基线解决更多任务，多核下加速比达 6 倍，并行分数 92.4%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种两层并行（规则级和实例化级）的执行模型，专门针对规划工作负载优化。
  • 基于团枚举的实例化器扩展支持半朴素 Datalog 评估，实现高效并行。
  • 实验表明单核上已优于基线，多核下加速比可达 6 倍（8 核），并行效率高。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅在 8 核环境下进行，更大规模并行效果未知。
  • 方法依赖于 Datalog 评估，可能不适用于所有规划领域。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Lifted classical planners operate directly on first-order planning tasks to avoid the computationally demanding grounding step. However, lifted planning is typically slower, as planners must repeatedly instantiate ground structures during search. Many core components of lifted classical planning, such as successor generation, axiom evaluation, task grounding, and delete-relaxed heuristics, have previously been studied through the lens of Datalog evaluation. We build upon this line of work and extend it by developing and analyzing an execution model with two levels of parallelism: rule-level parallelism and grounding parallelism. We further specialize this solver for planning-specific workloads with a grounder based on clique enumeration, which we extend to support semi-naive Datalog evaluation. Our experimental evaluation using greedy best-first search with the FF heuristic shows that our implementation already solves more tasks than the baselines on a single core, and the gap widens as additional cores are used. Moreover, on hard-to-ground tasks where on average 97.6% of the total runtime is spent in Datalog execution, the proposed execution model exhibits an average parallel fraction of 92.4%, while achieving up to a 6-fold speedup on 8 cores in practice.

The AI-Native Large-Scale Agile Software Development Manifesto

Medium 2605.07717
Ricardo Britto, Fredrik Palmgren, Nishrith Saini, Marcus Ohlin
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：提出 AI 原生大规模敏捷开发宣言，将 AI 作为一等参与者重新定义大规模软件开发原则。
🎯研究动机

现有大规模敏捷框架仍以人为中心、依赖手动协调，难以实现真正的实时适应，而 AI（尤其是 LLM）的进步尚未被充分用于组织级敏捷性。

❓解决问题

如何将 AI 作为一等参与者融入大规模敏捷开发，以取代传统会议驱动、文档繁重、顺序化的流程。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 AI 原生大规模敏捷开发宣言，包含六项原则：并行流程、意图驱动团队、活知识、验证优先保障、编排化智能体工作流、可复用蓝图。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AI 作为一等参与者的大规模敏捷开发宣言
  • 定义六项原则以转变开发流程为智能、自适应、持续学习系统
⚠️方法局限
  • 宣言性质，缺乏实证验证
  • 原则的具体实现和效果未在摘要中说明
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Despite the widespread adoption of agile methods, achieving true agility at scale remains elusive. Large-scale agile frameworks remain largely human-centric and manual, relying on coordination meetings, artifact synchronization, and role-based handoffs that inhibit real-time adaptation. Meanwhile, rapid advances in AI, particularly large language models, have begun transforming software engineering, yet their potential for organizational-level agility remains underexplored. We present the AI-Native Large-Scale Agile Software Development Manifesto: a set of values and principles that redefine how large-scale software development is organized when AI becomes a first-class participant rather than a peripheral tool. The manifesto is grounded in six principles, parallel processes, intent-driven teams, living knowledge, verification-first assurance, orchestrated agent workforces, and reusable blueprints, that together shift development from a meeting-driven, document-heavy, sequential process to an intelligent, adaptive, continuously learning system.

Online Goal Recognition using Path Signature and Dynamic Time Warping

Medium 2605.07736
Douglas Tesch, Nathan Gavenski, Leonardo Amado, Odinaldo Rodrigues, Felipe Meneguzzi
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：利用路径签名和动态时间规整实现高效的在线目标识别。
🎯研究动机

在线目标识别在连续域中面临轨迹编码和比较效率的挑战，现有方法依赖定制表示，忽略了其他领域成熟的编码技术。

❓解决问题

如何高效编码长轨迹并进行有效比较，以提升在线目标识别的预测准确性和规划效率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

结合路径签名（Path Signature）和动态时间规整（Dynamic Time Warping）进行轨迹编码与比较。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种基于路径签名的在线目标识别方法，实现紧凑且富有表现力的轨迹表示。
  • 在预测准确性和在线规划效率上持续超越现有方法，离线性能也具有竞争力。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对噪声或异常轨迹敏感。
  • 路径签名的计算复杂度在极长轨迹上可能成为瓶颈。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Online goal recognition in continuous domains poses two central challenges: efficiently encoding large trajectories and effectively comparing them. Recent work addresses these challenges by using custom state-space representations and metrics to compare observations against hypotheses. However, these approaches often overlook well-established encoding techniques used in other domains that offer substantial advantages. This paper introduces a novel method for online goal recognition that leverages path signatures, a compact, expressive representation of rough path theory that efficiently captures key semantic features of trajectories, enabling more meaningful comparisons between them. Experiments show that our method consistently outperforms the state of the art in predictive accuracy and online planning efficiency, while remaining competitive offline.

\mathsf{VISTA}: Decentralized Machine Learning in Adversary Dominated Environments

Medium 2605.07841
Hanzaleh Akbari Nodehi, Parsa Moradi, Soheil Mohajer, Mohammad Ali Maddah-Ali
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 VISTA 算法，通过自适应一致性阈值在对手主导的去中心化学习中实现鲁棒收敛。
🎯研究动机

去中心化机器学习常依赖不可信节点，现有鲁棒聚合方法在对手占多数时失效，需要新的激励机制应对。

❓解决问题

在对手主导（adversary-dominated）的去中心化学习环境中，如何设计激励机制和自适应阈值算法，使系统在对手占多数时仍能收敛。

🔎现象分析

宽松的接受规则加速早期进展但引入更多腐败，严格的规则提高精度但导致频繁拒绝，存在长期权衡。

🛠️主要方法

提出 VISTA 算法，利用优化历史自适应调整一致性接受阈值，将对手从纯粹破坏者转变为理性权衡者。

📊实验结果

数值结果表明 VISTA 相比静态阈值改进了收敛性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 VISTA 自适应算法，在对手主导环境中动态调整接受阈值，改善收敛性能。
  • 提供严格的收敛性分析，证明在合适的激励感知自适应下，无需诚实多数即可保留标准 SGD 的渐近收敛行为。
⚠️方法局限
  • 摘要未提供大规模实验或真实场景验证。
  • 可能依赖对手理性假设，非理性对手下效果未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Decentralized machine learning often relies on outsourcing computations, such as gradient evaluations, to untrusted worker nodes. Existing robust aggregation methods can mitigate malicious behavior under honest-majority assumptions, but may fail when adversaries control a majority of the workers. We study this adversary-dominated setting through an incentive-oriented framework in which reports are accepted and rewarded only when they are mutually consistent up to a threshold. This turns the adversary from a pure saboteur into a rational agent that trades off increasing estimation error against the risk of rejection and loss of reward. We consider iterative optimization under this model. Unlike one-shot computation, iterative learning requires long-horizon decisions: permissive acceptance rules enable faster early progress but admit more adversarial corruption, while strict rules improve estimation accuracy but cause frequent rejections. We propose \mathsf{VISTA}, an adaptive algorithm that tunes the acceptance threshold using the optimization history. Numerical results show that \mathsf{VISTA} improves convergence over static thresholds. We also provide a rigorous convergence analysis showing that, with suitable incentive-aware adaptation, adversary-dominated decentralized learning can retain the asymptotic convergence behavior of standard SGD without relying on an honest majority.

The Limits of AI-Driven Allocation: Optimal Screening under Aleatoric Uncertainty

Medium 2605.07979
Santiago Cortes-Gomez, Mateo Dulce Rubio, Carlos Patino, Bryan Wilder
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：研究在资源分配中如何最优组合筛查与算法预测，以应对不可约的偶然不确定性。
🎯研究动机

基于风险评分的算法分配成本低、速度快，但偶然不确定性导致资源错配不可避免；传统筛查虽准确但成本高。如何平衡两者以提高分配效率是政策制定中的关键问题。

❓解决问题

在固定覆盖预算下，如何最优地结合筛查（直接观察真实状态）和算法预测（基于风险评分），以最小化资源错配。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出一个两阶段分配框架：第一阶段对部分单位进行筛查以获取真实结果，第二阶段根据筛查结果和算法预测分配资源。理论推导出最优策略：筛查处于算法分配边缘的单位，直接分配最高风险单位。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 理论刻画了筛查与算法预测的最优组合策略，即筛查边缘单位、直接分配高风险单位。
  • 实证表明筛查与算法预测的互补 / 替代关系取决于群体偶然不确定性程度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 框架假设筛查成本固定且可忽略，实际中成本可能变化。
  • 理论结果依赖于风险评分准确反映真实条件概率，实际中模型可能偏差。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The rise of machine learning has shifted targeted resource allocation in policy and humanitarian settings toward algorithmic targeting based on predicted risk scores. This approach is typically cheaper and faster than traditional screening procedures that directly observe the latent vulnerability status through physical verification. Yet, even access to the true conditional vulnerability probability cannot eliminate misallocation: aleatoric uncertainty over individual vulnerability status is irreducible, and probabilistic targeting inevitably misallocates some resources. In this work we study how screening and algorithmic targeting should be optimally combined in a two-stage allocation framework where a screening stage observes true outcomes for a subset of units before a final allocation stage assigns the resource under a fixed coverage budget. We show that the optimal strategy screens units at the margin of algorithmic allocation, while directly targeting the highest-risk units. Furthermore, we empirically characterize when screening and algorithmic targeting act as complements or substitutes: efficiency gains from screening grow as the aleatoric uncertainty in the population increases. We illustrate our framework with applications in income-based social protection programs and humanitarian demining in Colombia, where the tension between screening costs and allocation efficiency is operationally consequential.

An Interpretable and Scalable Framework for Evaluating Large Language Models

Medium 2605.07046
Xinhao Qu, Qiang Heng, Hao Zeng, Xiaoqian Liu
arXiv PDF stat.ML
TL;DR：提出基于 MM 原则的可解释、可扩展的 IRT 框架，用于高效评估 LLM。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 评估依赖平均准确率，忽略输出随机性和题目异质性；传统 IRT 方法计算昂贵且数值不稳定，难以大规模应用。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个既可解释又高效的大规模 LLM 评估框架，以准确建模模型能力和题目特征。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于 majorization-minimization 原则，将 IRT 参数估计转化为一系列约束矩阵分解子问题，实现稳定高效的估计，并具有可辨识性和收敛性理论保证。

📊实验结果

在 MATH-500 和六个 Open LLM Leaderboard 基准上进行了实验，展示了可扩展性和可解释性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种可解释且可扩展的 LLM 评估框架，基于 MM 原则实现稳定高效的 IRT 参数估计。
  • 在合成和真实数据集上实现数量级加速，同时保持或提高估计精度，并验证与缩放定律的一致性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于二值化正确 / 错误响应数据，未涉及连续或部分评分场景。
  • 框架的收敛性保证可能依赖于特定假设，实际应用中需验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Evaluation of large language models (LLMs) is increasingly critical, yet standard benchmarking methods rely on average accuracy, overlooking both the inherent stochasticity of LLM outputs and the heterogeneity of benchmark items. Item Response Theory (IRT) offers a principled framework for modeling latent model abilities and item characteristics, but conventional methods are computationally expensive and numerically unstable, limiting large-scale implementations. To address these challenges, we propose an interpretable and scalable framework for LLM evaluation based on the majorization-minimization principle. Our approach reformulates the problem as a sequence of constrained matrix factorization subproblems, enabling stable and efficient parameter estimation with theoretical guarantees for identifiability and convergence. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets, including MATH-500 and six Open LLM Leaderboard benchmarks, demonstrate that our method achieves superior scalability and interpretability. It delivers orders-of-magnitude speedups over competing methods while maintaining comparable or even higher estimation accuracy. Our results align with established scaling laws and offer insights into item difficulty and discrimination, informing more principled benchmark design.

State Representation and Termination for Recursive Reasoning Systems

Medium 2605.06690
Debashis Guha, Amritendu Mukherjee, Sanjay Kukreja, Tarun Kumar
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出用认知状态图表示递归推理状态，并基于序间隙定义终止条件。
🎯研究动机

递归推理系统通常隐式处理状态表示和终止条件，缺乏形式化框架，导致设计不明确且难以分析。

❓解决问题

如何形式化表示递归推理中的演化状态，并确定何时停止迭代。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将推理状态表示为认知状态图，包含提取的声明、证据关系、开放问题和置信权重；定义序间隙（order-gap）作为两种扩展 - 整合顺序下状态之间的距离，并给出序间隙在不动点附近非退化的充要条件。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出用认知状态图表示递归推理状态的形式化方法。
  • 定义序间隙作为终止判据，并给出其非退化的充要条件。
⚠️方法局限
  • 终止条件是局部而非全局收敛保证。
  • 应用部分仅为草图，缺乏实证验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recursive reasoning systems alternate between acquiring new evidence and refining an accumulated understanding. Two design choices are typically left implicit: how to represent the evolving reasoning state, and when to stop iterating. This paper addresses both. We represent the reasoning state as an epistemic state graph encoding extracted claims, evidential relations, open questions, and confidence weights. We define the order-gap as the distance between the states reached by expand-then-consolidate versus consolidate-then-expand; a small order-gap suggests that the two orderings agree and further iteration is unlikely to help. Our main result gives a necessary and sufficient condition for the linearised order-gap to be non-degenerate near the fixed point, showing when the criterion is informative rather than algebraically vacuous. This is a local condition, not a global convergence guarantee. We apply the framework to recursive reasoning systems and sketch its application to agent loops, tree-of-thought reasoning, theorem proving, and continual learning.

Vibe coding before the trend

Low 2605.07751
Leon van Bokhorst, Koen Suilen
arXiv PDF cs.CY
TL;DR：2025 年初在四个学生群体中开展“氛围编程”挑战，发现 AI 工具将学习焦点从语法转向高阶思维，非技术学生受益最大。
🎯研究动机

AI 编程工具快速普及，但教育领域缺乏早期课堂实践的系统观察，尤其是对非技术背景学生的影响。

❓解决问题

探索 AI 辅助编程（vibe coding）在不同学科学生中的实际学习模式变化。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但总结了五个观察模式：焦点从语法转向高阶思维、技能从记忆转向评估、AI 被视为职业必备、人机关系为合作而非替代、非技术学生最看重可及性。

🛠️主要方法

在四个学生群体（ICT、数字营销、新闻、传播学）中开展 vibe coding 挑战，收集学生反思并归纳模式。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅报告了观察到的五个模式。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次记录 2025 年初多学科 vibe coding 课堂实验的实践模式
  • 为非技术背景学生 AI 教育提供早期经验教训
⚠️方法局限
  • 样本量较小且非随机，结论为模式而非证明
  • 未提供量化评估或控制组对比
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Early 2025 we ran a series of vibe coding challenges across four different student cohorts. The cohorts included 54 ICT students, 24 digital marketing students, and 7 journalism students at Fontys University of Applied Sciences (Netherlands), and 22 BA Communication students at North-West University (South Africa). From the student reflections, five major patterns emerged. Students reported that AI tools shifted their focus from syntax to higher-order thinking; they also described a skill shift from memorizing to evaluating; they viewed AI proficiency as career-essential; they framed their relationship with AI as partnership rather than replacement; and finally non-technical students showed the strongest appreciation for the accessibility these tools provide. This practitioner report documents what we observed during the classroom experiments, we reflect on how the landscape has shifted in the year since, and shares practical lessons for educators considering similar experiments. We present the observations as what they are: patterns from practice, not proven conclusions, in the beleif that sharing early stage experiences contributes to the overall field of AI and education.

Statistical inference with belief functions: A survey

Low 2605.07908
Fabio Cuzzolin
arXiv PDF math.ST
TL;DR：综述了基于信任函数的统计推断方法，涵盖经典与最新进展。
🎯研究动机

在数据稀缺或无法学习概率分布的场景中，信任函数提供了一种强大的不确定性建模框架，而统计推断是其中关键的第一步。

❓解决问题

如何从统计数据中学习信任测度，即基于信任函数的统计推断方法。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

综述了基于信任函数的统计推断领域的主要贡献，包括经典方法和最新进展。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统梳理了信任函数在统计推断中的应用框架
  • 总结了该领域的重要研究成果
⚠️方法局限
  • 未涵盖所有变体或最新应用
  • 可能缺乏实证比较
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Belief functions are a powerful and popular framework for the mathematical characterisation of uncertainty, in particular in situations in which lack of data renders learning a probability distribution for the problem impractical. The first step in a reasoning chain based on belief functions is inference: how to learn a belief measure from the available data. In this survey we focus, in particular, on making inference from statistical data, and review the most significant contributions in the area.

Drawing Lines in Psychological Space: What K-means Clustering Reveals in Simulated and Real Psychometric Data

Low 2605.06989
Pedro Henrique Ramos Pinto, Maria Jullyanna Ferreira Marques, Luiz Carlos Serramo Lopez
arXiv PDF stat.AP
TL;DR：K-means 聚类在心理测量数据中即使无真实子群结构也能产生稳定聚类。
🎯研究动机

心理测量研究中广泛使用 K-means 聚类识别子群，但其经典形式不检验潜在类别是否存在，可能导致虚假发现。

❓解决问题

K-means 聚类在心理测量数据中是否能在无真实子群结构时仍产生稳定聚类。

🔎现象分析

K-means 在连续高斯潜在空间中也能产生稳定且视觉上一致的聚类解。

🛠️主要方法

通过模拟数据集和真实 SMARVUS 数据集对比，分析 K-means 聚类在有无真实子群结构下的表现。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示 K-means 在无真实子群结构时仍能产生稳定聚类。
  • 通过模拟与实证数据对比，警示心理测量研究中聚类结果的解释需谨慎。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅使用 K-means 一种聚类方法。
  • 实证数据仅来自 SMARVUS 数据集，可能不具普适性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

K-means clustering is widely used in psychological and psychometric research to identify profiles, subgroups, and potential typologies, yet its classical formulation does not test whether such groups exist as latent psychological categories. Instead, K-means partitions multidimensional space into regions around centroids, favoring compact, approximately spherical clusters defined by geometric distance. In this paper, we examine this limitation through a sequence of controlled simulated datasets. We then extend the analysis to the SMARVUS dataset, a large international psychometric dataset comprising survey responses from university students across 35 countries, to evaluate whether similar geometric partitioning patterns emerge in empirical psychological data. By contrasting simulated and empirical data, this paper argues that K-means can produce stable and visually coherent clustering solutions even in continuous Gaussian latent spaces without true subgroup structure.

新方法/算法 6 篇

TAS-LoRA: Transformer Architecture Search with Mixture-of-LoRA Experts

Medium 2605.07256
Jeimin Jeon, Hyunju Lee, Bumsub Ham
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：TAS-LoRA 通过混合 LoRA 专家和动态路由解决视觉 Transformer 架构搜索中的特征坍缩问题。
🎯研究动机

现有 Transformer 架构搜索方法因超网中共享权重导致子网特征坍缩，限制了子网性能，亟需一种既能学习子网特定特征又保持计算效率的方法。

❓解决问题

解决 TAS 中特征坍缩问题，使子网能学习到子网特定的特征表示。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出特征坍缩源于超网中的权重共享，导致子网无法学习独特特征。

🛠️主要方法

提出 TAS-LoRA，引入参数高效的低秩适应（LoRA）实现子网特定特征学习，并采用混合 LoRA 专家（MoLE）策略，通过轻量路由器根据子网架构动态分配 LoRA 专家，同时引入分组路由器初始化技术促进早期专家多样性。

📊实验结果

在 ImageNet 及 CIFAR-10/100、Flowers、CARS、INAT-19 等多个迁移学习基准上实验，结果表明 TAS-LoRA 有效缓解特征坍缩，显著优于现有 TAS 方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将 LoRA 引入 Transformer 架构搜索以缓解特征坍缩。
  • 提出 MoLE 策略和分组路由器初始化，实现高效且多样化的子网特征学习。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能增加路由器的额外计算开销。
  • LoRA 专家的数量与性能之间的权衡需进一步探索。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Transformer architecture search (TAS) discovers optimal vision transformer (ViT) architectures automatically, reducing human effort to manually design ViTs. However, existing TAS methods suffer from the feature collapse problem, where subnets within a supernet fail to learn subnet-specific features, mainly due to the shared weights in a supernet, limiting the performance of individual subnets. To address this, we propose TAS-LoRA, a novel method that introduces parameter-efficient low-rank adaptation (LoRA) to enable subnet-specific feature learning, while maintaining computational efficiency. TAS-LoRA incorporates a Mixture-of-LoRAExperts (MoLE) strategy, where a lightweight router dynamically assigns LoRA experts based on subnet architectures, and introduces a group-wise router initialization technique to encourage diverse feature learning across experts early in training. Extensive experiments on ImageNet and several transfer learning benchmarks, including CIFAR-10/100, Flowers, CARS, and INAT-19, demonstrate that TAS-LoRA mitigates feature collapse effectively, improving performance over state-of-the-art TAS methods significantly.

Bifurcation Models: Learning Set-Valued Solution Maps with Weight-Tied Dynamics

Medium 2605.07277
Caleb Jore, Jialin Liu
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出分岔模型，通过权重共享动力学学习集合值解映射，无需分支标签即可发现多个有效解。
🎯研究动机

许多科学和组合问题存在多个正确解，标准监督学习通过选择单个解作为目标来消除歧义，但隐藏的选择器可能是任意、不连续的，且比底层解集更难学习。

❓解决问题

如何让模型学习集合值解映射，即同时表示多个有效解，而不依赖人工选择单个解作为监督信号。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出分岔模型，采用权重共享动力学视角，不同初始化收敛到不同稳定平衡点，从而将模型表示为吸引子景观而非单一分支。

📊实验结果

在受挫 Ising 模型上，动力学方法无需分支标签即可发现多个有效平衡点，优于单分支监督；Allen-Cahn 实验表明多样性需要显式鼓励，但存在准确率 - 多样性权衡。

⭐主要贡献
  • 证明具有局部 Lipschitz 分支的广义集合值映射可以通过正则平衡动力学表示，且诱导的选择器几乎处处正则，而人工选择器可能任意不规则。
  • 在受挫 Ising 模型和 Allen-Cahn 方程上验证了该方法无需分支标签即可发现多个有效平衡点，并揭示了准确率 - 多样性权衡。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能存在准确率 - 多样性权衡，需要显式鼓励多样性。
  • 方法可能对初始化或动力学参数敏感。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Many scientific and combinatorial problems admit multiple correct solutions, not a single label. Standard supervised learning resolves this ambiguity by choosing one solution as the target, but this hidden selector can be arbitrary, discontinuous, and harder to learn than the underlying solution set. We study bifurcation models, a weight-tied dynamical view in which different initializations can converge to different stable equilibria, so the model represents an attractor landscape rather than one chosen branch. We prove that broad set-valued maps with locally Lipschitz branches can be represented by regular equilibrium dynamics and that the induced selectors are almost everywhere regular, while manual selectors can be arbitrarily irregular. Experiments on frustrated Ising models show that such dynamics can discover multiple valid equilibria without branch labels and outperform single-branch supervision. Allen--Cahn experiments further show that diversity is not automatic: it can be encouraged explicitly, but with an accuracy--diversity tradeoff.

Spectral Surgery: Class-Targeted Post-Hoc Rebalancing via Hessian Spike Perturbation

Medium 2605.07790
Hugo Vigna, Samuel Bontemps
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：利用 Hessian 谱的尖峰结构，通过沿尖峰特征向量扰动权重来后验重平衡类别准确率。
🎯研究动机

深度网络 Hessian 谱的尖峰结构已被观察到，但尚未被用于实际提升分类性能，现有重平衡方法通常需要重新训练或修改损失函数。

❓解决问题

如何利用 Hessian 谱的尖峰结构，在不重新训练的情况下后验地重平衡各类别准确率。

🔎现象分析

Hessian 谱具有连续 bulk 和少量尖峰，尖峰数量等于类别数减一，且尖峰方向与类别相关。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Spectral Surgery，一种后验优化方法，通过沿尖峰特征向量扰动模型权重来重平衡类别准确率，包括尖峰 - 类别敏感度矩阵、约束优化和自适应幅度控制。

📊实验结果

在 CIFAR-10 和 ISIC-2019 上获得平衡准确率和标准差方面的鼓励性结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次利用 Hessian 谱的尖峰结构进行后验类别重平衡。
  • 提出尖峰 - 类别敏感度矩阵和自适应幅度控制机制。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅验证了图像分类任务，未涉及其他模态。
  • 需要计算 Hessian 谱，可能对大规模模型计算成本高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The Hessian spectrum of trained deep networks exhibits a characteristic structure: a continuous bulk of near-zero eigenvalues and a small number of large outlier eigenvalues (spikes), confirming the relevance of Random Matrix Theory in deep learning. The spike count matches the number of classes minus one. While prior work has described this structure, no method has exploited it operationally to improve classification performance. We propose Spectral Surgery, a post-hoc optimization method that directly perturbs model weights along spike eigenvectors to rebalance per-class accuracy without retraining. We introduce (i) a spike-class sensitivity matrix that quantifies the directional derivative of each class's accuracy along each spike eigenvector, (ii) a constrained optimization of perturbation coefficients that targets weak classes while preserving strong ones, and (iii) an adaptive amplitude control that raises or lowers the perturbation budget based on iteration-level improvement signals. We obtain encouraging results on CIFAR-10 and ISIC-2019 on both balanced accuracy and standard deviation.

Neural Operators as Efficient Function Interpolators

Medium 2605.07792
Vasilis Niarchos, Angelos Sirbu, Sokratis Trifinopoulos
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：将神经算子重新用作高效函数插值器，在参数和训练时间上优于 MLP 和 KAN。
🎯研究动机

神经算子原本设计用于无限维函数空间映射，但其在有限维函数插值任务中的潜力未被充分探索，而传统 MLP 和 KAN 在参数效率和训练速度上存在瓶颈。

❓解决问题

如何将神经算子高效应用于有限维函数插值，并提升精度与效率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

引入辅助基空间，将有限维函数视为通过复合作用在基空间函数上的算子，从而利用神经算子进行插值。

📊实验结果

在解析函数基准（复杂度与维度递增）和核图表真实数据上评估，TFNO 集成达到 198.2 keV RMSE。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出将神经算子重新框架为有限维函数插值器的新视角。
  • 在解析函数基准上证明 NO 在精度、参数效率和训练时间上优于 MLP 和 KAN。
  • 将二维 TFNO 应用于核质量模型修正，达到 198.2 keV 的 RMSE，参数高效且训练快。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定类型的函数插值任务。
  • 辅助基空间的选择可能影响性能。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Neural operators (NOs) are designed to learn maps between infinite-dimensional function spaces. We propose a novel reframing of their use. By introducing an auxiliary base-space, any finite-dimensional function can be viewed as an operator acting by composition on functions of the base-space. Through a range of benchmarks on analytic functions of increasing complexity and dimensionality, we demonstrate that NOs can match or outperform standard multilayer perceptrons and Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks in accuracy while requiring significantly fewer parameters and training time. As a real-world application, we apply a two-dimensional Tensorized Fourier Neural Operator (TFNO) to the nuclear chart, learning a correction to state-of-the-art nuclear mass models as a partially observed residual field. A TFNO ensemble reaches a held-out root-mean-square error of 198.2 keV, placing it among the best recent neural-network approaches while retaining high parameter efficiency and short training times. More broadly, these results introduce NOs as a scalable framework for finite-dimensional function interpolation, from analytic benchmarks to structured scientific data.

Approximation-Free Differentiable Oblique Decision Trees

Medium 2605.07837
Subrat Prasad Panda, Blaise Genest, Arvind Easwaran
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 DTSemNet，一种将硬斜决策树表示为神经网络的语义等价可逆方法，无需近似即可端到端训练，在分类和回归上超越现有可微决策树。
🎯研究动机

决策树在安全关键领域（如医疗诊断）中因其可解释性和表格数据有效性而被广泛使用，但训练准确的斜决策树面临复杂优化和过拟合风险，现有可微方法依赖近似（如软决策树或 STE），限制了性能。

❓解决问题

如何在不使用近似的情况下，实现硬斜决策树的端到端梯度训练，并解决回归中内部节点与叶回归器联合优化的挑战。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出回归任务中 STE 方法存在梯度信号不准确的问题，导致优化困难；分类任务则自然适配该表示。

🛠️主要方法

提出 DTSemNet，将硬斜决策树表示为语义等价且可逆的神经网络，通过标准梯度下降端到端训练；针对回归引入退火 Top-k 方法提供准确梯度。

📊实验结果

在分类和回归基准上进行了广泛实验，结果表明 DTSemNet 训练的斜决策树优于现有可微决策树；并在强化学习环境中验证了其作为程序化策略的有效性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 DTSemNet，一种无需近似的可微斜决策树表示，支持分类和回归的端到端训练。
  • 分析 STE 在回归中的局限，并引入退火 Top-k 方法改善梯度信号。
  • 在分类和回归基准上超越现有可微决策树，并展示其在强化学习中作为程序化策略的适用性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 退火 Top-k 方法可能引入额外超参数，需要调优。
  • 在极高维或大规模数据上的可扩展性未在摘要中明确讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Decision Trees (DTs) are widely used in safety-critical domains such as medical diagnosis, valued for their interpretability and effectiveness on tabular data. However, training accurate oblique DTs is challenging due to complex optimization landscapes and overfitting risks, particularly in regression. Recent advances have introduced differentiable formulations that enable gradient-based training and joint optimization of decision boundaries and leaf regressors. Yet, existing approaches typically rely on approximations, either through probabilistic softening of boundaries (soft DTs) or quantized gradients such as the Straight-Through Estimator (STE). To overcome these limitations, we propose DTSemNet, a novel, semantically equivalent, and invertible representation of hard oblique DTs as neural networks. DTSemNet enables end-to-end training with standard gradient descent, eliminating the need for approximations in both classification and regression. While classification aligns naturally with this formulation, regression remains challenging due to the joint optimization of internal nodes and leaf regressors. To address this, we analyze the limitations of STE and introduce an annealed Top-k method that provides accurate gradient signals without approximation. Extensive experiments on classification and regression benchmarks show that DTSemNet-trained oblique DTs outperform state-of-the-art differentiable DTs. Furthermore, we demonstrate that DTSemNet can serve as programmatic DT policies in reinforcement learning environments, thereby broadening their applicability.

Globally Optimal Training of Spiking Neural Networks via Parameter Reconstruction

Medium 2605.08022
Himanshu Udupi, Xiaocong Yang, ChengXiang Zhai
arXiv PDF cs.NE
TL;DR：提出一种基于参数重构的全局最优 SNN 训练方法，无需代理梯度。
🎯研究动机

SNN 因脉冲函数不可微，依赖代理梯度训练引入累积近似误差，亟需无偏训练方法。

❓解决问题

SNN 训练中代理梯度导致的近似误差累积问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将并行前馈阈值网络凸化扩展到并行循环阈值网络，覆盖 SNN 作为特例，并设计参数重构算法实现全局最优训练。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 将阈值网络凸化理论从并行前馈扩展到并行循环结构，统一 SNN 框架
  • 提出参数重构训练算法，在多种任务上作为独立方法或与代理梯度结合均表现优势
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定结构的 SNN
  • 大规模网络上的计算效率待验证
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have been proposed as biologically plausible and energy-efficient alternatives to conventional Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs). However, the training of SNN usually relies on surrogate gradients due to the non-differentiability of the spike function, introducing approximation errors that accumulate across layers. To address this challenge, we extend the work on convexification of parallel feedforward threshold networks to parallel recurrent threshold networks, which subsume parallel SNNs as a structured special case. Building on this theoretical framework, we propose a parameter reconstruction algorithm for SNN training that demonstrates consistent and significant advantages across various tasks, both as a standalone method and in combination with surrogate-gradient training. The ablations further demonstrate the data scalability and robustness to model configurations of our training algorithm, pointing toward its potential in large-scale SNN training.

联邦学习 4 篇

HARMONY: Bridging the Personalization-Generalization Gap by Mitigating Representation Skew in Heterogeneous Split Federated Learning

Medium 2605.07211
Jiseok Youn, You Rim Choi, Goodsol Lee, Sangtae Ha, Hyung-Sin Kim, Saewoong Bahk
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：HARMONY 通过元学习和对比学习缓解异构混合分裂联邦学习中的表征偏移，同时提升个性化和泛化性能。
🎯研究动机

移动设备面临资源约束和非独立同分布数据分布，需要快速本地推理和远程泛化支持，但现有混合分裂联邦学习在客户端架构异构下存在表征偏移，导致服务器模型性能严重下降。

❓解决问题

解决异构客户端架构下混合分裂联邦学习中的表征偏移问题，以平衡个性化和泛化性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，在客户端架构异构下，现有混合 SFL 中来自定制化特征提取器的特征无法在共享空间中对齐，导致负责 OOD 预测的服务器模型性能急剧下降。

🛠️主要方法

HARMONY 修改元学习以模拟不同参数和架构的特征提取器并学习个性化，同时通过服务器端对比学习对齐提取的特征，既不牺牲客户端个性化也不共享原始标签。

📊实验结果

在多个数据集和模型家族上，与现有技术相比，HARMONY 在无 / 有 OOD 情况下测试准确率分别提升高达 43.0%/28.3%，同时保持可接受的延迟。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个支持异构客户端架构的混合分裂联邦学习框架 HARMONY。
  • 通过元学习和对比学习缓解表征偏移，同时保持个性化和泛化性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对元学习初始化敏感，需要额外调参。
  • 对比学习可能增加计算开销，在资源极度受限设备上可能不适用。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Mobile devices face diverse resource constraints and non-IID data class distributions, requiring fast on-device inference for local in-distribution (ID) classes and on-demand remote support for client-specific out-of-distribution (OOD) classes. Hybrid split federated learning (Hybrid SFL) couples personalized client-side front ends (supporting early exit) with a generalized server-side backend for fallback inference, balancing accuracy and cost. However, under client architectural heterogeneity, the existing hybrid SFL suffers from representation skew, where features from customized extractors fail to align in the shared space, leading to a sharp degradation in the server model responsible for OOD prediction. We propose HARMONY, the first hybrid SFL framework to support heterogeneous client architectures. HARMONY modifies meta-learning to simulate diverse extractors across parameters and architectures, and to learn to personalize. To mitigate representation skew, HARMONY conducts server-side contrastive learning to align extracted features, neither sacrificing clients' personalization nor sharing raw labels. Compared to the state of the art across multiple datasets and model families, HARMONY improves test accuracy by up to 43.0%/28.3% without/with OOD, respectively, while maintaining acceptable latency.

Resource-Element Energy Difference for Noncoherent Over-the-Air Federated Learning

Medium 2605.07263
Hao Chen, Zavareh Bozorgasl
arXiv PDF eess.SP
TL;DR：提出非相干空中联邦学习聚合方法 REED，通过正交资源元素能量差实现无瞬时 CSI 的连续符号聚合。
🎯研究动机

传统空中联邦学习依赖瞬时信道状态信息（CSI）和相干相位对齐，在实际无线系统中难以维持，限制了部署可行性。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖瞬时 CSI 的情况下，实现连续有符号更新的非相干空中聚合，同时保证无偏性和收敛性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将每个实值更新的正负部分映射到两个正交资源元素的传输能量上，并引入独立相位抖动，服务器通过能量差估计符号聚合；仅需慢时间尺度平均信道功率校准。

📊实验结果

在 MNIST 和 Fashion-MNIST 上实验，REED 在 IID 设置下接近干净 FedAvg 和相干 CSIT 聚合，在强数据异构下保持稳定收敛但性能略有下降。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 REED 非相干聚合原语，避免瞬时 CSI 需求，实现连续有符号更新的无偏聚合。
  • 推导了瑞利衰落下的闭式方差，并证明在全参与 FedAvg 中达到标准非凸平稳速率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅限简单图像数据集，未在更复杂任务或真实无线环境中验证。
  • 强数据异构下性能下降，可能需进一步优化。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Over-the-air federated learning (OTA-FL) reduces uplink latency by exploiting waveform superposition, but conventional analog aggregation schemes typically require instantaneous channel state information (CSI), channel inversion, and coherent phase alignment, which can be difficult to maintain in practical wireless systems. This paper proposes resource-element energy difference (REED), a noncoherent aggregation primitive for continuous signed updates that avoids instantaneous CSI. REED maps the positive and negative parts of each real-valued update to transmit energies on two orthogonal resource elements with independent phase dithers, and the server estimates the signed aggregate from their energy difference. With only slow-timescale calibration of average channel powers, REED is unbiased for the desired signed sum and admits an exact closed-form variance under Rayleigh fading. We incorporate REED into full-participation FedAvg and prove a smooth nonconvex stationarity bound. Under an average per-client energy budget, the aggregation gain can be scheduled so that the REED-induced perturbation scales quadratically with the local stepsize, yielding the canonical (1/sqrt(T)) stationarity rate. Experiments on MNIST and Fashion-MNIST demonstrate that REED closely matches clean FedAvg and coherent CSIT aggregation in IID settings, while maintaining stable convergence with a moderate performance degradation under strong data heterogeneity.

Enhancing Federated Quadruplet Learning: Stochastic Client Selection and Embedding Stability Analysis

Medium 2605.07888
Ozgu Goksu, Nicolas Pugeault
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 FedQuad，通过四元组损失和随机客户端选择缓解联邦学习中的数据异质性导致的表征对齐问题。
🎯研究动机

联邦学习中数据异质性（非独立同分布、类别不平衡、数据有限）导致全局模型泛化性能下降，现有方法在缓解表征对齐问题上效果有限。

❓解决问题

联邦学习中客户端数据异质性导致的表征对齐问题，具体表现为类内距离增大和类间距离减小。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出数据异质性会导致模型聚合时表征对齐错误，但未提供具体失败模式或瓶颈分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 FedQuad 方法，在客户端本地训练中引入四元组损失，同时最小化正样本对距离、最大化负样本对距离，并结合随机客户端选择策略。

📊实验结果

在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 数据集上，采用多种非独立同分布设置和不同客户端数量进行实验，结果一致优于现有基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 FedQuad 方法，通过四元组损失显式约束类内紧凑性和类间分离性，缓解联邦学习中的表征对齐问题。
  • 在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 上，多种非独立同分布设置下验证了方法优于现有基线。
  • 提供了度量学习在集中式和联邦环境下缓解表征坍塌的全面分析。
⚠️方法局限
  • 未在更大规模或真实联邦场景中验证。
  • 未讨论四元组损失的计算开销对通信效率的影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Federated Learning (FL) enables decentralised model training across distributed clients without requiring data centralisation. However, the generalisation performance of the global model is usually degraded by data heterogeneity across clients, particularly under limited data availability and class imbalance. To address this challenge, we propose FedQuad, a novel method that explicitly enforces minimising intra-class representations while enabling inter-class splits across clients. By jointly minimising distances between positive pairs and maximising distances between negative pairs, the proposed approach mitigates representation misalignment introduced during model aggregation. We evaluate our method on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet under diverse non-IID settings and varying numbers of clients, demonstrating consistent improvements over existing baselines. Additionally, we provide a comprehensive analysis of metric learning-based approaches in both centralised and federated environments, highlighting their effectiveness in alleviating representation collapse under heterogeneous data distributions.

Beyond Factor Aggregation: Gauge-Aware Low-Rank Server Representations for Federated LoRA

Medium 2605.06733
Jinqian Chen, Chang Liu, Jihua Zhu
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 GLoRA，通过规范参考系聚合低秩更新，解决联邦 LoRA 中因子聚合的表示依赖问题。
🎯研究动机

联邦 LoRA 中直接平均低秩因子存在表示依赖问题：同一更新有无限多种规范等价的分解，导致因子级聚合在任意坐标变换下改变，而底层更新不变，造成语义不匹配。

❓解决问题

现有联邦 LoRA 聚合规则存在语义不匹配，需要一种规范感知的服务器端表示来正确聚合低秩更新。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出直接平均 LoRA 因子是表示依赖的，同一内在更新有无限多种规范等价的分解，因子级聚合在坐标变换下改变而更新不变。

🛠️主要方法

GLoRA：从客户端投影子空间估计共识更新子空间，在共享参考坐标下聚合客户端更新，完全以低秩形式表示语义更新聚合；并提供秩兼容读出，从同一服务器状态实例化不同秩的适配器。

📊实验结果

在 GLUE 和 SuperNI 上评估，包括异构客户端秩、稀疏参与、更大骨干网络和未见任务评估，GLoRA 持续优于联邦 LoRA 基线，并取得有利的效率 - 性能权衡。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了联邦 LoRA 中因子聚合的表示依赖问题，即语义不匹配。
  • 提出 GLoRA，一种规范感知的服务器端低秩表示，实现语义一致的更新聚合。
  • 支持异构客户端秩，无需稠密更新重建即可从同一服务器状态读出不同秩的适配器。
  • 在 GLUE 和 SuperNI 上，GLoRA 在数据、资源和任务异构性下持续优于联邦 LoRA 基线。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖客户端投影子空间的估计质量，在极端稀疏参与下可能不稳定。
  • 未讨论跨客户端通信开销的具体分析。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Federated LoRA enables parameter-efficient adaptation of large language models under decentralized data and limited client this http URL , directly averaging LoRA factors is representation-dependent: the same intrinsic update admits infinitely many gauge-equivalent factorizations, so factor-level aggregation can change under arbitrary coordinate choices while the underlying update remains unchanged. This reveals a semantic mismatch in existing federated LoRA aggregation rules. We propose \textbf{GLoRA}, a gauge-aware server representation for federated this http URL of aggregating raw factors, GLoRA estimates a consensus update subspace from client projectors and aggregates client updates in shared reference coordinates, thereby representing semantic update aggregation entirely in low-rank form. To support heterogeneous client capacities, GLoRA further provides a rank-compatible readout that instantiates adapters of different ranks from the same server state without dense update reconstruction. Experiments on GLUE and SuperNI show that GLoRA consistently outperforms federated LoRA baselines under data, resource, and task heterogeneity, including heterogeneous client ranks, sparse participation, larger backbones, and unseen-task evaluation. GLoRA also achieves a favorable efficiency--performance trade-off, suggesting that effective federated LoRA requires not merely averaging low-rank factors, but defining a semantically meaningful server-side representation for aggregation.

异常检测 2 篇

Kurtosis-Guided Denoising Score Matching for Tabular Anomaly Detection

Medium 2605.06955
Victor Livernoche, Jie Zan, Reihaneh Rabbany
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：K-DSM 通过基于峰度的逐特征噪声缩放，使单尺度去噪分数匹配在表格异常检测中达到 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

去噪分数匹配（DSM）可用于异常检测，但扰动尺度的选择是关键挑战：噪声过小导致稀疏区域分数估计不稳定，噪声过大则削弱异常敏感性；且异常未知时超参数调优困难。

❓解决问题

如何为 DSM 自动选择适当的扰动尺度，以在无需额外模型复杂度或超参数调优的情况下实现鲁棒的表格异常检测。

🔎现象分析

摘要发现，精心训练的单尺度模型已能成为强异常检测器，推翻了多尺度或噪声条件训练必要的先前观点。

🛠️主要方法

提出基于峰度的噪声缩放（K-DSM），根据每个特征的边际分布形状设置噪声水平，改善低密度区域覆盖和高密度区域精度；在无监督设置中结合轻量级 EMA 教师过滤规则，在梯度更新前移除低密度训练点。

📊实验结果

在标准表格异常检测基准上评估，半监督设置达到 SOTA；结合 EMA 教师过滤规则，在完全无监督（污染）设置中也取得强性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 K-DSM，一种基于峰度的逐特征噪声缩放方案，无需额外模型复杂度即可自适应设置噪声水平。
  • 发现单尺度 DSM 模型在精心训练下即可达到强异常检测性能，挑战了多尺度训练的必要性。
  • 在半监督和无监督（污染）设置下，K-DSM 在标准表格异常检测基准上取得 SOTA 性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖峰度统计量，可能对非对称或重尾分布敏感。
  • 仅针对表格数据设计，未验证在图像或序列数据上的有效性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Denoising score matching (DSM) provides a way to learn data distributions by training a neural network to recover the score function, defined as the gradient of the log density, from noise-corrupted samples. Once trained, the score magnitude at a test point reflects how consistent that point is with the learned distribution, making it a natural anomaly signal. The key practical challenge is selecting the perturbation scale: too little noise yields unstable score estimates in sparse regions, while too much erases local structure and weakens anomaly sensitivity. This is compounded by the difficulty of hyperparameter tuning when anomalies are unknown and no validation set is available. We introduce kurtosis-based noise scaling (K-DSM), a per-feature scheme that sets noise levels from the shape of each marginal distribution, improving coverage of low-density regions and precision in high-density regions without extra model complexity. Contrary to prior claims that multi-scale or noise-conditioned training is necessary, we find that a carefully trained single-scale model is already a strong anomaly detector. On standard tabular anomaly detection benchmarks, K-DSM achieves state-of-the-art performance in the semi-supervised setting. When combined with a lightweight EMA-teacher filtering rule that removes low-density training points before each gradient step, it also achieves strong performance in the fully unsupervised (contaminated) setting, suggesting that simple, data-adaptive noise scaling enables robust anomaly detection while reducing reliance on hyperparameter tuning.

A Hierarchical Ensemble Pipeline for Anomaly Detection in ESA Satellite Telemetry

Medium 2605.06681
Lorenzo Riccardo Allegrini, Geremia Pompei
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出层次化集成管道，结合形状基元和统计特征，用于 ESA 卫星遥测异常检测。
🎯研究动机

卫星遥测数据中的异常检测对航天任务安全至关重要，但多变量时间序列的复杂性和信息泄漏风险使得传统方法难以有效检测细微异常。

❓解决问题

解决多变量卫星遥测数据中的异常检测问题，特别是如何防止信息泄漏并提高对细微异常的检测能力。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

层次化集成管道：先提取形状基元和统计特征，进行逐通道建模，再通过通道内堆叠和跨通道聚合，结合时间序列交叉验证和两级掩码策略防止信息泄漏。

📊实验结果

在 ESA-ADB 基准上验证，显示强泛化能力，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种层次化集成管道用于多变量卫星遥测异常检测。
  • 引入两级掩码策略防止时间序列交叉验证中的信息泄漏。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定特征工程，泛化到其他遥测系统需调整。
  • 层次化结构可能增加计算复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

A hierarchical ensemble pipeline is introduced to address anomaly detection in multivariate telemetry data provided by European Space Agency (ESA). The method integrates shapelet-based and statistical feature extraction, per-channel modeling, intra-channel stacking, and a final cross-channel aggregation. The pipeline is trained and validated using time-series cross-validation and two-level masking strategies to prevent information leakage. Results on the European Space Agency Anomaly Detection Benchmark (ESA-ADB) challenge demonstrate strong generalization, highlighting the effectiveness of hierarchical modeling in detecting subtle anomalies in realistic satellite telemetry.

生成模型 28 篇 · 6 个细分

扩散模型 15 篇

LENS: Low-Frequency Eigen Noise Shaping for Efficient Diffusion Sampling

High 2605.07253
Haewon Jeon, Si-Hyeon Lee
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 LENS，在低维子空间调制噪声低频成分，实现高效扩散采样。
🎯研究动机

蒸馏扩散模型虽加速生成但图像质量下降，现有测试时优化方法计算开销大，超网络方法仍需高维噪声调制，效率不足。

❓解决问题

如何在保持图像质量的同时，高效地调制噪声以提升蒸馏扩散模型的采样效率。

🔎现象分析

观察到噪声的低频成分主要决定生成图像的全局结构和视觉保真度。

🛠️主要方法

LENS：基于理论证明将噪声调制限制在低频子空间，使用轻量独立网络选择性调制低频成分。

📊实验结果

在图像生成任务上，LENS 相比先前方法 FLOPs 减少 400-700 倍，参数量减少 25-75 倍，推理时间开销减少 10-20 倍，同时达到有竞争力的图像质量。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现噪声低频成分主导图像全局结构和视觉保真度，并提供理论证明。
  • 提出 LENS 框架，在低维子空间进行高效噪声调制，大幅降低计算开销。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定噪声分布假设。
  • 低频子空间的选择可能需针对不同模型调整。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Distilled diffusion models accelerate image generation by reducing the number of denoising steps, but often suffer from degraded image quality. To mitigate this trade-off, test-time optimization methods improve quality, yet their iterative nature incurs substantial computational overhead and leads to slow inference, limiting practical usability. Recent hypernetwork-based approaches amortize this process during training, but still require costly noise modulation in high-dimensional latent spaces. In this work, we propose LENS (Low-frequency Eigen Noise Shaping), an efficient noise modulation framework that operates in a low-dimensional subspace. Our approach is motivated by the observation that low-frequency components of the noise largely determine the global structure and visual fidelity of generated images. Based on this observation, we provide a theoretical justification for restricting modulation to the low-frequency subspace and derive a principled training objective. Building on this, LENS employs a lightweight, standalone network to selectively modulate these components, enabling efficient and targeted noise modulation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LENS achieves competitive image quality while reducing FLOPs by 400-700$\times$, model parameters by 25-75$\times$, and inference-time overhead by 10-20$\times$ compared to prior methods.

Generative Modeling with Flux Matching

High 2605.07319
Peter Pao-Huang, Xiaojie Qiu, Stefano Ermon
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 Flux Matching 框架，放宽向量场约束，使生成模型能直接设计非保守向量场，实现更快采样与可解释动力学。
🎯研究动机

现有基于分数的生成模型要求向量场为保守场（即数据分数），限制了模型设计的灵活性，难以直接融入归纳偏置或结构先验。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个更通用的生成建模框架，允许学习非保守向量场，从而在保持生成质量的同时获得设计自由度。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Flux Matching 目标，仅要求向量场的稳态分布为数据分布，而非等于数据分数，从而允许学习无穷多非保守向量场。

📊实验结果

在高维图像数据集上进行了实验，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Flux Matching 新范式，将生成模型从分数匹配扩展到更广泛的非保守向量场族。
  • 展示了该框架在高维图像数据集上的强性能，并解锁了更快采样、可解释机制模型和编码变量间有向依赖的动力学等应用。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对非保守向量场的优化稳定性要求更高。
  • 理论分析可能尚未覆盖所有实际场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce Flux Matching, a new paradigm for generative modeling that generalizes existing score-based models to a broader family of vector fields that need not be conservative. Rather than requiring the model to equal the data score, the Flux Matching objective imposes a weaker condition that admits infinitely many vector fields whose stationary distribution is the data. This flexibility enables a class of generative models that cannot be learned under score matching, in which inductive biases, structural priors, and properties of the dynamics can be directly imposed or optimized. We show that Flux Matching performs strongly on high-dimensional image datasets and, more importantly, that our added freedom unlocks a range of applications including faster sampling, interpretable and mechanistic models, and dynamics that encode directed dependencies between variables. More broadly, Flux Matching opens a new dimension in generative modeling by turning the vector field itself into a design choice rather than a fixed target. Code is available at this https URL .

Teacher-Feature Drifting: One-Step Diffusion Distillation with Pretrained Diffusion Representations

High 2605.07327
Yuan Zhang, Chenyi Li, Guoqing Ma, Jiajun Zha, Yuanming Yang, Bo Wang, Wei Tang, Wenbo Li et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：利用预训练扩散模型的中间隐藏状态作为特征空间，简化一步蒸馏流程，无需额外特征提取网络。
🎯研究动机

现有扩散模型蒸馏方法通常依赖多个辅助网络、精心设计的训练阶段或复杂的优化流程，导致实现复杂且成本高。

❓解决问题

如何在不引入额外特征提取网络的前提下，简化一步扩散蒸馏并保持生成质量和多样性。

🔎现象分析

预训练扩散教师模型本身已提供强表征空间，其中间隐藏状态具有语义有意义的特征几何结构，可直接用于漂移损失。

🛠️主要方法

使用预训练教师模型的中间隐藏状态作为特征表示，结合轻量级模式覆盖损失，实现一步蒸馏。

📊实验结果

在 ImageNet-64×64 上 FID 为 1.58，在 SDXL 上 FID 为 18.4，生成质量和多样性具有竞争力。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出利用预训练教师模型中间隐藏状态作为特征空间，无需额外特征提取网络。
  • 引入轻量级模式覆盖损失缓解模式坍塌，提升生成多样性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对教师模型中间层选择敏感。
  • 模式覆盖损失可能增加少量计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Sampling from pretrained diffusion and flow-matching models typically requires many forward passes to generate diverse and high-fidelity images. Existing distillation methods often rely on multiple auxiliary networks, carefully designed training stages, or complex optimization pipelines. In this work, we revisit the recently proposed Drifting Model objective and show that a single drifting loss can be directly used to simplify one step distillation. A key observation is that the pretrained diffusion teacher itself already provides a strong representation space. Unlike the original Drifting Model, which relies on an additional pretrained feature extractor, we use intermediate hidden states of the pretrained teacher model as the feature representation. This removes the need for training or introducing an extra representation network while preserving a semantically meaningful feature geometry for drifting. Furthermore, we introduce a lightweight mode coverage loss to mitigate mode collapse during distillation and encourage the student generator to cover diverse teacher-supported regions. Extensive experiments on ImageNet and SDXL demonstrate that our method achieves efficient one step generation with competitive image quality and diversity, achieving FID scores of 1.58 on ImageNet-64$\times$64 and 18.4 on SDXL, while substantially simplifying the overall distillation framework.

Diffusion-APO: Trajectory-Aware Direct Preference Alignment for Video Diffusion Transformers

High 2605.07503
Jingyuan Zhu, Biaolong Chen, Le Zhang, Aixi Zhang, Hao Jiang, Pipei Huang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出轨迹感知的偏好对齐算法 Diffusion-APO，通过同步训练噪声与推理去噪路径，提升视频扩散模型的视觉质量和指令遵循能力。
🎯研究动机

现有视频扩散模型对齐方法（如 DPO、GRPO）受限于有偏的奖励模型或次优的时间步采样，难以高效对齐人类意图。

❓解决问题

训练噪声分布与推理轨迹之间的固有差异导致对齐效率低下。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出轨迹感知的偏好对齐算法 Diffusion-APO，通过同步训练噪声与推理去噪路径最大化梯度信号效能，并构建统一模块化 RLHF 框架（在线排序、半在线锚定、离线精炼、蒸馏感知漂移校正）。

📊实验结果

通过大量实验证明，Diffusion-APO 在视觉质量和指令遵循上持续优于标准基线，并在模型加速时有效保持生成保真度。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出轨迹感知的对齐算法 Diffusion-APO，解决训练与推理噪声分布不匹配问题。
  • 设计模块化 RLHF 框架，无需标量奖励策略梯度即可实现多阶段偏好对齐。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定视频扩散模型架构（如 DiT），泛化性需验证。
  • 多阶段框架的复杂度可能增加训练开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Efficiently aligning large-scale video diffusion models with human intent requires a scalable and trajectory-aware pathway that bridges the inherent discrepancy between training noise distributions and practical inference trajectories. While existing paradigms such as Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) attempt to address this, they are often hindered by either reliance on bias-prone, complex reward models or suboptimal timestep sampling. In this paper, we propose Diffusion-APO (Aligned Preference Optimization), a trajectory-aware algorithm that resolves this misalignment by synchronizing training noise with inference-time denoising paths to maximize gradient signal efficacy. To translate this algorithmic innovation into a practical solution, we introduce a unified and modular RLHF framework that integrates online ranking, half-online anchoring, offline refinement, and distillation-aware drift correction. This framework enables flexible, multi-stage preference alignment across diverse data and computational constraints without relying on scalar-reward-based policy gradients. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that Diffusion-APO consistently outperforms standard baselines in visual quality and instruction following, while effectively preserving generative fidelity during model acceleration, providing a robust, end-to-end pathway for scalable video diffusion alignment.

Stochastic Transition-Map Distillation for Fast Probabilistic Inference

High 2605.07661
George Rapakoulias, Peter Garud, Lingjiong Zhu, Panagiotis Tsiotras
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出无教师蒸馏框架 STMD，通过蒸馏 SDE 转移映射实现扩散模型快速概率推理。
🎯研究动机

扩散模型生成质量高但推理成本昂贵，现有蒸馏方法需要预训练教师模型、双层优化或轨迹缓存，训练复杂且扩展性差。

❓解决问题

如何在保持概率样本生成能力的同时加速扩散模型推理，并避免对预训练教师模型的依赖。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出随机转移映射蒸馏（STMD），蒸馏采样 SDE 的完整转移映射，并用条件均值流模型参数化，实现一步或几步随机采样器。

📊实验结果

在 MNIST、CIFAR-10、CelebA 数据集上进行图像生成实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出无教师蒸馏框架 STMD，无需预训练教师、双层优化或轨迹缓存，训练高效可扩展。
  • 推导了 Wasserstein 距离下的收敛界，提供理论保证。
  • 在 MNIST、CIFAR-10、CelebA 上验证了图像生成效果。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于连续时间扩散模型，离散化场景需调整。
  • 理论收敛界可能依赖于特定假设，实际性能可能受限于条件均值流模型的表达能力。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Diffusion models achieve strong generation quality, diversity, and distribution coverage, but their performance often comes with expensive inference. In this work, we propose Stochastic Transition-Map Distillation (STMD), a teacher-free framework for accelerating diffusion model inference while preserving probabilistic sample generation. In contrast to score-based diffusion models, whose denoising parametrization models the mean of the posterior distribution, STMD distills the full transition map associated with the sampling stochastic differential equation (SDE). We parameterize these SDE transitions with a conditional Mean Flow model, yielding a one- or few-step stochastic sampler that retains the transition structure of the underlying diffusion process. This perspective is especially useful for downstream tasks that require stochastic inference, such as diffusion posterior sampling, inverse problems, and energy-based fine-tuning. Compared to recent distillation methods, STMD requires no pretrained teacher, bi-level optimization, or trajectory simulation and caching, enabling efficient and scalable training. We derive convergence bounds for our method in the Wasserstein distance, providing a strong theoretical foundation for our approach, and validate STMD on various image generation examples on the MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CelebA datasets.

Consistency Regularised Gradient Flows for Inverse Problems

High 2605.07907
Alessio Spagnoletti, Tim Y. J. Wang, Marcelo Pereyra, O. Deniz Akyildiz
arXiv PDF stat.ML
TL;DR：提出一种统一欧几里得 - Wasserstein-2 梯度流框架，实现低 NFE 逆问题求解，无需反向传播。
🎯研究动机

现有基于潜扩散模型的逆问题求解器需要大量神经函数评估和反向传播，计算成本高且重建质量可能下降。

❓解决问题

如何高效利用视觉 - 语言潜扩散模型进行逆问题求解，同时降低计算成本并保持重建质量。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出统一欧几里得 - Wasserstein-2 梯度流框架，在潜空间中联合执行后验采样和提示优化，通过单一流对齐先验和后验与观测数据，结合少步潜文本到图像模型实现低 NFE 推理。

📊实验结果

在多个经典成像逆问题上进行实验，显示方法达到 SOTA 性能且计算成本显著降低。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出统一梯度流框架，联合后验采样和提示优化，无需反向传播。
  • 在多个经典成像逆问题上实现 SOTA 性能，显著降低计算成本。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定潜扩散模型架构。
  • 未讨论对更复杂逆问题的泛化能力。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vision-Language Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) (Rombach et al., 2022) provide powerful generative priors for inverse problems. However, existing LDM-based inverse solvers typically require a large number of neural function evaluations (NFEs) and backpropagation through large pretrained components, leading to substantial computational costs and, in some cases, degraded reconstruction quality. We propose a unified Euclidean-Wasserstein-2 gradient-flow framework that jointly performs posterior sampling and prompt optimization in the latent space through a single flow that aligns the prior and posterior with the observed data. Combined with few-step latent text-to-image models, this formulation enables low-NFE inference without backpropagation through autoencoders. Experiments across several canonical imaging inverse problems show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance with significantly reduced computational cost.

What Matters for Diffusion-Friendly Latent Manifold? Prior-Aligned Autoencoders for Latent Diffusion

High 2605.07915
Zhengrong Yue, Taihang Hu, Mengting Chen, Haiyu Zhang, Zihao Pan, Tao Liu, Zikang Wang, Jinsong Lan et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 Prior-Aligned AutoEncoder (PAE)，通过显式塑造潜空间的连贯空间结构、局部连续性和全局语义，使潜空间更有利于扩散模型生成，在 ImageNet 256x256 上实现 gFID 1.03 且收敛速度提升 13 倍。
🎯研究动机

现有 tokenizer 主要关注重建保真度或继承预训练表示，但什么样的潜空间对生成建模真正友好尚不明确，缺乏对潜流形组织的系统研究。

❓解决问题

如何设计 tokenizer 以构建对扩散模型友好的潜流形，即具备连贯空间结构、局部连续性和全局语义的潜空间。

🔎现象分析

通过构造受控 tokenizer 变体，发现扩散友好潜流形的三个关键属性（连贯空间结构、局部连续性、全局语义）比重建保真度更与下游生成质量一致。

🛠️主要方法

Prior-Aligned AutoEncoder (PAE)：利用来自 VFMs 的精炼先验和基于扰动的正则化，将空间结构、局部连续性和全局语义作为显式训练目标来塑造潜流形。

📊实验结果

在 ImageNet 256x256 上评估，PAE 在相同训练设置下比现有 tokenizer 提升训练效率和生成质量，达到 gFID 1.03，收敛速度比 RAE 快 13 倍。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别出扩散友好潜流形的三个关键属性：连贯空间结构、局部连续性、全局语义，并证明它们比重建保真度更影响生成质量。
  • 提出 Prior-Aligned AutoEncoder (PAE)，通过显式优化这些属性来构建更有利于扩散模型的潜空间。
  • 在 ImageNet 256x256 上，PAE 达到 gFID 1.03 的新 SOTA，且与 RAE 相比收敛速度提升 13 倍。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅在 ImageNet 256x256 上进行，未验证在其他数据集或更高分辨率上的泛化性。
  • PAE 依赖 VFMs 的先验，可能引入额外计算开销或对先验质量敏感。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Tokenizers are a crucial component of latent diffusion models, as they define the latent space in which diffusion models operate. However, existing tokenizers are primarily designed to improve reconstruction fidelity or inherit pretrained representations, leaving unclear what kind of latent space is truly friendly for generative modeling. In this paper, we study this question from the perspective of latent manifold organization. By constructing controlled tokenizer variants, we identify three key properties of a diffusion-friendly latent manifold: coherent spatial structure, local manifold continuity, and global manifold semantics. We find that these properties are more consistent with downstream generation quality than reconstruction fidelity. Motivated by this finding, we propose the Prior-Aligned AutoEncoder (PAE), which explicitly shapes the latent manifold instead of leaving diffusion-friendly manifold to emerge indirectly from reconstruction or inheritance. Specifically, PAE leverages refined priors derived from VFMs and perturbation-based regularization to turn spatial structure, local continuity, and global semantics into explicit training objectives. On ImageNet 256x256, PAE improves both training efficiency and generation quality over existing tokenizers, reaching performance comparable to RAE with up to 13x faster convergence under the same training setup and achieving a new state-of-the-art gFID of 1.03. These results highlight the importance of organizing the latent manifold for latent diffusion models.

Trajectory as the Teacher: Few-Step Discrete Flow Matching via Energy-Navigated Distillation

High 2605.07924
Amin Karimi Monsefi, Dominic Culver, Nikhil Bhendawade, Manuel R. Ciosici, Yizhe Zhang, Irina Belousova
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：通过能量引导轨迹优化，使少步离散流匹配学生模型超越多步教师模型。
🎯研究动机

离散流匹配需要数百步前向传播才能生成高质量文本，蒸馏虽能减少步数但学生模型性能常受限，传统观点归因于学生容量不足。

❓解决问题

蒸馏过程中教师轨迹由盲随机跳跃构成，早期中间步的次优决策会传播并误导学生模仿，导致学生性能瓶颈。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出教师轨迹是瓶颈而非学生容量不足：每个训练轨迹由一系列盲随机跳跃组成，缺乏对序列质量的评估，早期错误会向后传播。

🛠️主要方法

提出轨迹塑形离散流匹配（TS-DFM），在训练时用轻量能量罗盘评估每个中间步的候选延续，选择最连贯的轨迹，推理时不变。

📊实验结果

在 170M 参数语言模型上，8 步塑形学生相比 1024 步教师困惑度降低 32%，速度提升 128 倍，且优于多种基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示蒸馏中教师轨迹质量是学生性能瓶颈，而非学生容量。
  • 提出 TS-DFM 方法，通过能量引导轨迹塑形提升少步学生性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 能量罗盘的设计和训练开销未详细说明。
  • 方法在更大规模模型或不同任务上的泛化性待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Discrete flow matching generates text by iteratively transforming noise tokens into coherent language, but may require hundreds of forward passes. Distillation uses the multi-step trajectory to train a student to reproduce the process in a few steps. When the student underperforms, the usual explanation is insufficient capacity. We argue the opposite: the trajectory is the bottleneck, not the student. Each training trajectory is built through a chain of blind stochastic jumps with no evaluation of sequence quality; a single bad decision at an early midpoint propagates through subsequent steps, yet the student must imitate the result. Trajectory-Shaped Discrete Flow Matching (TS-DFM) replaces these blind jumps with guided navigation: a lightweight energy compass evaluates candidate continuations at each midpoint, selecting the most coherent. All shaping is training-only; inference cost is unchanged. On 170M-parameter language modeling, the shaped student at 8 steps achieves 32% lower perplexity than the 1,024-step teacher while being 128x faster, with gains consistent across source distributions and three evaluators of increasing scale. TS-DFM achieves the best perplexity of any discrete-generation baseline we compare against, including methods trained on 6x more data or using 5x larger models.

Normalizing Trajectory Models

High 2605.08078
Jiatao Gu, Tianrong Chen, Ying Shen, David Berthelot, Shuangfei Zhai, Josh Susskind
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：NTM 用可逆流建模扩散逆过程，四步生成高质量图像且保留精确似然。
🎯研究动机

扩散模型假设多步高斯去噪，但少步生成时该假设失效；现有少步方法通过蒸馏、一致性训练或对抗目标牺牲了似然框架。

❓解决问题

如何在少步生成中同时实现高质量采样和精确似然训练。

🔎现象分析

扩散模型的多步高斯去噪假设在压缩到少数粗粒度转换时被打破。

🛠️主要方法

将每个逆步骤建模为条件归一化流，结合浅层可逆块和跨轨迹的深层并行预测器，支持端到端训练或从预训练流匹配模型初始化，并利用精确轨迹似然进行自蒸馏。

📊实验结果

在文本到图像基准上，NTM 在四步采样中匹配或超越强基线，同时唯一保留生成轨迹的精确似然。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 NTM，将每个逆步骤建模为条件归一化流，实现精确似然训练。
  • 设计结合浅层可逆块和深层并行预测器的架构，支持从零训练或预训练初始化。
  • 利用精确轨迹似然进行自蒸馏，四步生成高质量样本。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对更大规模或更高分辨率图像生成的计算开销较高。
  • 自蒸馏过程可能依赖于初始模型质量。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Diffusion-based models decompose sampling into many small Gaussian denoising steps -- an assumption that breaks down when generation is compressed to a few coarse transitions. Existing few-step methods address this through distillation, consistency training, or adversarial objectives, but sacrifice the likelihood framework in the process. We introduce Normalizing Trajectory Models (NTM), which models each reverse step as an expressive conditional normalizing flow with exact likelihood training. Architecturally, NTM combines shallow invertible blocks within each step with a deep parallel predictor across the trajectory, forming an end-to-end network trainable from scratch or initializable from pretrained flow-matching models. Its exact trajectory likelihood further enables self-distillation: a lightweight denoiser trained on the model's own score produces high-quality samples in four steps.
