On text-to-image benchmarks, NTM matches or outperforms strong image generation baselines in just four sampling steps while uniquely retaining exact likelihood over the generative trajectory.

Mean Mode Screaming: Mean--Variance Split Residuals for 1000-Layer Diffusion Transformers

High 2605.06169
Pengqi Lu
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：通过机制分析发现扩散 Transformer 深层网络中的均值主导崩溃现象，并提出均值 - 方差分裂残差结构实现 1000 层稳定训练。
🎯研究动机

将扩散 Transformer 扩展到数百层时，网络会陷入一种静默的均值主导崩溃状态，导致 token 表示同质化，限制了模型深度扩展。

❓解决问题

解决扩散 Transformer 在极深网络（如 1000 层）中出现的均值主导崩溃问题，实现稳定训练。

🔎现象分析

发现均值模式尖叫（MMS）是崩溃的触发事件：即使训练看似稳定，均值相干的反向冲击会打开深层残差分支，使网络进入均值主导状态。该行为由梯度分解为均值相干和中心化分量驱动，并通过 Softmax 雅可比零空间对注意力 logit 梯度的结构抑制而加剧。

🛠️主要方法

提出均值 - 方差分裂（MV-Split）残差：将中心化残差更新与泄漏的干道均值替换相结合，分别处理均值和方差分量。

📊实验结果

在 400 层单流 DiT 上验证 MV-Split 防止崩溃，并跟踪接近基线预崩溃轨迹；在 1000 层 DiT 上进行规模验证。摘要未提供具体数值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次识别并机制性解释了扩散 Transformer 深层网络中的均值主导崩溃现象（MMS）。
  • 提出 MV-Split 残差结构，在 400 层单流 DiT 上防止崩溃，并优于 LayerScale 等方法。
  • 成功训练 1000 层 DiT，验证了架构在极端深度下的可训练性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法仅在单流 DiT 上验证，多流或跨模态场景未测试。
  • 1000 层实验仅为规模验证，未报告生成质量或下游任务性能。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Scaling Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) to hundreds of layers introduces a structural vulnerability: networks can enter a silent, mean-dominated collapse state that homogenizes token representations and suppresses centered variation. Through mechanistic auditing, we isolate the trigger event of this collapse as Mean Mode Screaming (MMS). MMS can occur even when training appears stable, with a mean-coherent backward shock on residual writers that opens deep residual branches and drives the network into a mean-dominated state. We show this behavior is driven by an exact decomposition of these gradients into mean-coherent and centered components, compounded by the structural suppression of attention-logit gradients through the null space of the Softmax Jacobian once values homogenize. To address this, we propose Mean-Variance Split (MV-Split) Residuals, which combine a separately gained centered residual update with a leaky trunk-mean replacement. On a 400-layer single-stream DiT, MV-Split prevents the divergent collapse that crashes the un-stabilized baseline; it tracks close to the baseline's pre-crash trajectory while remaining substantially better than token-isotropic gating methods such as LayerScale across the full schedule. Finally, we present a 1000-layer DiT as a scale-validation run at boundary scales, establishing that the architecture remains stably trainable at extreme depth.

A Unified Measure-Theoretic View of Diffusion, Score-Based, and Flow Matching Generative Models

High 2605.06829
Aditya Ranganath, Mukesh Singhal
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：统一测度论框架下扩散模型、基于分数的生成模型与流匹配的连续时间生成方法综述。
🎯研究动机

扩散模型、基于分数的生成模型和流匹配等方法在方法论上趋于收敛，但碎片化的符号和竞争性的推导掩盖了它们的共享结构和实际权衡，亟需统一的理论框架。

❓解决问题

如何统一描述和比较基于连续时间传输的生成模型（扩散、分数、流匹配）的数学结构、目标函数、采样方案和离散化误差。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出一个统一的测度论框架，将扩散模型、基于分数的生成模型和流匹配视为学习时变向量场，该向量场诱导由连续性方程和 Fokker-Planck 方程控制的边际分布族。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 统一了扩散、分数和流匹配生成模型的数学框架，澄清了共享结构和实际权衡。
  • 推导了扩散和分数模型的反向时间采样作为受控随机动力学，并展示了概率流 ODE 与似然归一化流的联系。
  • 将流匹配解释为在选定插值下速度场的直接回归，明确了其与分数训练的一致或差异条件。
⚠️方法局限
  • 框架主要针对连续时间生成模型，可能不直接涵盖离散时间或非扩散类方法。
  • 理论保证和开放问题部分仅作总结，未提供新的收敛性或稳定性分析。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We survey continuous-time generative modeling methods based on transporting a simple reference distribution to a data distribution via stochastic or deterministic dynamics. We present a unified framework in which diffusion models, score-based generative models, and flow matching are instances of learning a time-dependent vector field that induces a family of marginals $(\rho_t)_{t \in [0,1]}$ governed by continuity and Fokker-Planck equations. Such a unified theory is timely because these methods are converging methodologically, yet fragmented notation and competing derivations continue to obscure their shared structure and the practical tradeoffs governing sampling, stability, and computation. Within this framework, we (i) derive reverse-time sampling for diffusion and score-based models as controlled stochastic dynamics, (ii) show that the probability flow ODE yields identical marginals and connects diffusion to likelihood-based normalizing flows, and (iii) interpret flow matching as direct regression of the velocity field under a chosen interpolation, clarifying when it coincides with or differs from score-based training. We compare objectives, sampling schemes, and discretization errors under unified notation, discuss connections to Schrodinger bridges and entropic optimal transport, and summarize theoretical guarantees and open problems on approximation, stability, and scalability.

Why DDIM Hallucinates More than DDPM: A Theoretical Analysis of Reverse Dynamics

High 2605.06831
Muhammad H. Ashiq, Samanyu Arora, Abhinav N. Harish, Ishaan Kharbanda, Hung Yun Tseng, Grigorios G. Chrysos
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：理论证明 DDIM 比 DDPM 更容易产生幻觉，因为其确定性 ODE 在临界时间后会被困在模态间线段上，而 DDPM 的随机性有助于脱离该区域。
🎯研究动机

扩散模型在生成任务中广泛应用，但 DDIM 等确定性采样器常出现幻觉（生成不真实样本），而 DDPM 等随机采样器幻觉较少，其背后的理论原因尚不明确。

❓解决问题

从理论上解释为什么 DDIM 比 DDPM 更容易产生幻觉，并分析随机性在避免幻觉中的作用。

🔎现象分析

对于高斯混合目标，存在一个临界时间τ，之后 DDIM 的逆 ODE 会陷入连接最近两个模态的线段上，导致生成样本落在低密度区域（幻觉）；而 DDPM 的 SDE 由于随机性，能够逃离该线段，从而降低幻觉率。

🛠️主要方法

对高斯混合目标下的 DDPM（SDE）和 DDIM（ODE）进行理论分析，证明临界时间后 DDIM 的动力学行为导致幻觉，并验证随机性的益处。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次从理论上证明 DDIM 比 DDPM 更容易产生幻觉，并揭示了临界时间τ后的动力学差异。
  • 提出通过引入额外随机步骤帮助 DDIM 避免幻觉，为设计改进采样器提供新见解。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论分析限于高斯混合目标，可能不直接推广到更复杂的数据分布。
  • 未提供实际图像生成任务上的定量实验结果。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We theoretically study the hallucination phenomena in two canonical diffusion samplers: the stochastic Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) and the deterministic Denoising Diffusion Implicit Model (DDIM). We analyze the reverse ODE (DDIM) and SDE (DDPM) for a Gaussian mixture target, proving that after a critical time $\tau$, (a) DDIM can become stuck on the segment connecting the two nearest modes and (b) DDPM *stochasticity* helps it become unstuck from this region, thus avoiding hallucination. Our empirical validation verifies that DDPM has a significantly lower hallucination rate than DDIM when this region is entered. Building on our observations, we exhibit how using additional stochastic steps can help DDIM avoid hallucinations and offer new insights on how to design improved samplers.

FlashMol: High-Quality Molecule Generation in as Few as Four Steps

High 2605.07020
Xinyuan Wei, Zian Li, Shaoheng Yan, Cai Zhou, Muhan Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：FlashMol 通过分布匹配蒸馏将分子生成步骤从数百步压缩至 4 步，实现 250 倍加速且质量不降。
🎯研究动机

传统扩散模型生成 3D 分子构象需数百步，大规模虚拟筛选效率低；现有少步方法虽加速但牺牲样本稳定性。

❓解决问题

如何实现极少量步数（如 4 步）的高质量 3D 分子生成，同时保持化学有效性和多样性。

🔎现象分析

分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）在分子域存在局部最小化行为，且其模式寻求特性会降低生成多样性。

🛠️主要方法

提出 FlashMol，采用分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）结合重调度时间步和 Jensen-Shannon 散度正则化，实现 4 步生成高质量分子构象。

📊实验结果

在 QM9 和 GEOM-DRUG 数据集上，FlashMol 匹配甚至超越 1000 步教师模型，采样速度加速 250 倍。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）应用于分子生成，实现 4 步超快生成。
  • 提出重调度时间步策略改善初始化，以及 JS 散度正则化提升多样性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对复杂分子或特定化学空间泛化性需进一步验证。
  • JS 散度正则化的超参数敏感度未在摘要中讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Generating chemically valid 3D molecular conformations is critical for computational drug discovery. Classical diffusion-based models like GeoLDM perform well but require hundreds of steps, making large-scale in silico screening impractical. Recent efforts on few-step molecular generation have accelerated this process to 12-50 steps, but they often largely sacrifice sample stability. In this work, we present FlashMol, an ultra-fast molecule generative model producing high-quality molecular conformations in as few as 4 steps. To achieve this, we adapt distribution matching distillation (DMD) - a reverse KL-divergence minimization objective - to the molecular domain for effective distillation. Considering the local minimization behavior of DMD, we respace the molecule generation timesteps, providing the generator with much better initialization and enables effective distillation. Additionally, to mitigate the mode-seeking behavior of DMD and improve diversity, we further regularize it with a Jensen-Shannon divergence term, which incorporates the mean-seeking behavior of the forward KL divergence. Extensive experiments on QM9 and GEOM-DRUG datasets demonstrate that FlashMol matches and even surpasses the original 1000-step teacher, achieving up to 250$\times$ acceleration in sampling speed while maintaining high molecular quality.

Towards Highly-Constrained Human Motion Generation with Retrieval-Guided Diffusion Noise Optimization

Medium 2605.08054
Hanchao Liu, Fang-Lue Zhang, Shining Zhang, Tai-Jiang Mu, Shi-Min Hu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出检索引导的扩散噪声优化方法，解决高度约束的人体运动生成任务。
🎯研究动机

现有运动生成方法难以处理具有严格时空约束的任务（如严重空间障碍或指定步数），需要一种无需重新训练就能处理高度约束的生成方法。

❓解决问题

如何生成满足高度定制化零样本目标函数的人体运动，特别是具有挑战性时空约束的任务。

🔎现象分析

当前方法在简单约束下有效，但在高度约束任务（如严重空间障碍或指定步数）上失败。

🛠️主要方法

基于无训练扩散噪声优化框架，引入检索引导：通过关系任务解析将目标约束分组并识别困难约束，从大规模运动数据集中检索参考，利用奖励引导掩码将随机噪声与检索噪声结合得到更好的初始化，再优化扩散噪声。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出检索引导的扩散噪声优化方法，无需重新训练即可处理高度约束的运动生成。
  • 引入关系任务解析和 LLM 自动推理，提升智能体在无训练优化方案下的自主性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖大规模运动数据集的质量和覆盖范围。
  • 检索和优化过程可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Generating human motion that satisfies customized zero-shot goal functions, enabling applications such as controllable character animation and behavior synthesis for virtual agents, is a critical capability. While current approaches handle many unseen constraints, they fail on tasks with very challenging spatiotemporal restrictions, such as severe spatial obstacles or specified numbers of walking steps. To equip motion generators for these highly constrained tasks, we present a retrieval-guided method built on the training-free diffusion noise optimization framework. The key idea is to search within large motion datasets for guidance that can potentially satisfy difficult constraints. We introduce relational task parsing to group target constraints and identify the difficult ones to be handled by retrieved reference. A better initialization for diffusion noise is then obtained via a reward-guided mask that combines random noise with retrieved noise. By optimizing diffusion noise from this improved initialization, we successfully solve highly constrained generation tasks. By leveraging LLM for relational task parsing, the whole framework is further enabled to automatically reason for what to retrieve, improving the intelligence of moving agents under a training-free optimization scheme.

On the Role of Strain and Vorticity in Numerical Integration Error for Flow Matching

Medium 2605.06680
Chenxi Tao, Seung-Kyum Choi
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：流匹配中速度场的应变和涡度对数值积分误差有不同影响，应变控制指数级误差放大，涡度仅线性贡献。
🎯研究动机

流匹配生成数据需要积分速度场，积分步数（NFE）直接影响推理成本，理解速度场属性如何影响积分误差有助于降低 NFE。

❓解决问题

分析流匹配中速度场的应变和涡度如何影响数值积分误差，并利用该分析设计正则化方法以减少积分步数。

🔎现象分析

应变通过对数范数控制指数级误差放大，涡度仅线性贡献于局部截断误差；最优传输速度场无旋且物质导数为零，可实现二阶欧拉精度。

🛠️主要方法

将速度雅可比分解为应变率 S 和涡度 Omega，理论分析其对积分误差的不同作用；提出加权雅可比正则化，分别对 S 和 Omega 施加权重 alpha 和 beta。

📊实验结果

在 2D 合成数据上验证理论预测，NFE=5 时积分误差降低 2.7 倍；在 CIFAR-10 上通过轻量微调，NFE=10 时 FID 改善 14%，同时保持高 NFE 质量。

⭐主要贡献
  • 理论证明了应变和涡度在流匹配积分误差中的不同角色：应变导致指数误差放大，涡度仅线性贡献。
  • 揭示了最优传输速度场的无旋性质，并证明其可实现二阶欧拉精度。
  • 提出加权雅可比正则化方法，在 2D 合成数据和 CIFAR-10 上验证了有效性，显著降低积分误差。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅在 2D 合成数据和 CIFAR-10 上进行，未在更大规模数据集或高分辨率图像上验证。
  • 轻量微调过程可能对特定模型架构敏感，泛化性需进一步研究。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Flow matching generates data by integrating a learned velocity field, where the number of integration steps (NFE) directly determines inference cost. We analyze which properties of the velocity field govern integration error by decomposing the velocity Jacobian into its symmetric part S (strain rate) and antisymmetric part Omega (vorticity). We prove that strain and vorticity play different roles: strain controls exponential error amplification through the logarithmic norm, while vorticity contributes only linearly to the local truncation error. We further show that the optimal transport velocity field is irrotational and has zero material derivative, implying second-order Euler accuracy; for exact displacement interpolation, the associated Lagrangian particle dynamics are integrated exactly by Euler. Motivated by this analysis, we study weighted Jacobian regularization with strain weight alpha and vorticity weight beta. Experiments on 2D synthetic data confirm the main theoretical predictions, showing up to 2.7x lower integration error at NFE=5. Preliminary CIFAR-10 experiments show consistent trends, with a lightweight fine-tuning procedure improving FID by 14 percent at NFE=10 while preserving high-NFE quality.

图像编辑 5 篇

CASCADE: Context-Aware Relaxation for Speculative Image Decoding

High 2605.07230
Selin Yildirim, Subhajit Dutta Chowdhury, Mohammad Mahdi Kamani, Vikram Appia, Deming Chen
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：CASCADE 通过利用目标模型隐藏状态的冗余性，在树状推测解码中实现无训练接受松弛，达到最高 3.6 倍加速。
🎯研究动机

自回归图像生成计算成本高、速度慢，现有推测解码方法在图像生成中效率提升有限，主要原因是目标模型的高不确定性导致草稿令牌拒绝率高。

❓解决问题

如何降低推测解码中草稿令牌的拒绝率，实现图像生成的高效加速。

🔎现象分析

发现目标模型在树状推测解码中表现出语义可互换性和收敛性两种冗余模式，这些模式源于隐藏状态表示的冗余。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CASCADE 方法，通过形式化语义可互换性和收敛性两种属性，在树状预测中捕捉冗余，实现无训练的接受松弛；同时将目标模型的冗余信号注入草稿模型训练中，提升草稿模型性能。

📊实验结果

在多个文本到图像模型和草稿架构上评估，CASCADE 实现了最高 3.6 倍加速，同时保持图像质量和文本提示保真度。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别并形式化了树状推测解码中目标模型隐藏状态的两种冗余属性：语义可互换性和收敛性。
  • 提出无需额外训练的接受松弛方法，利用冗余性降低拒绝率。
  • 通过注入冗余信号改进草稿模型训练，进一步提升效率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖于特定树状解码结构，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 未讨论对非自回归生成模型的适用性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Autoregressive generation is a powerful approach for high-fidelity image synthesis, but it remains computationally demanding and slow even on the most advanced accelerators. While speculative decoding has been explored to mitigate this bottleneck, existing approaches fail to achieve efficiency gains comparable to those observed in text generation. A key limitation is the target model's high uncertainty during image generation, which leads to high draft token rejection rates. In this work, we identify previously overlooked patterns in the target model's behavior that emerge naturally in tree-based speculative decoding. Specifically, we formalize two properties, semantic interchangeability and convergence, arising from the redundancies in the target model's hidden state representations. By capturing these redundancies across the depth and breadth of the predicted token tree, our method identifies principled opportunities for acceptance relaxation without requiring additional training. Additionally, we enhance standalone drafter performance by injecting the redundancy signals from the target model into drafter training with minimal modification. We evaluate our approach across multiple text-to-image models and drafter architectures. Results show that CASCADE achieves state-of-the-art speedups for drafter-based speculative decoding, with up to 3.6x acceleration, while maintaining image quality and text-prompt fidelity.

EditTransfer++: Toward Faithful and Efficient Visual-Prompt-Guided Image Editing

High 2605.07455
Lan Chen, Qi Mao, Yiren Song, Yuchao Gu, Siwei Ma
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：EditTransfer++ 通过文本解耦训练和对比优化，实现高效、高保真的视觉提示引导图像编辑。
🎯研究动机

现有基于扩散 Transformer 的方法在视觉提示引导编辑中常因文本偏置和采样不稳定导致编辑不忠实，且高分辨率编辑计算开销大。

❓解决问题

如何提升视觉提示引导编辑的忠实度和推理效率，克服结构不匹配和随机性带来的不忠实生成。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出：现有方法存在预训练文本偏置和采样随机性导致的编辑不忠实问题。

🛠️主要方法

提出 EditTransfer++，包含文本解耦训练（微调时移除文本条件）、最佳 - 最差对比优化（重塑去噪轨迹）以及条件压缩与重用策略（减少 token 冗余，支持 1024 像素长边高效生成）。

📊实验结果

在现有基准和提出的 EditTransfer-Bench 上，EditTransfer++ 在视觉提示忠实度上达到 SOTA，且推理速度显著快于先前方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出文本解耦训练策略，消除文本偏置，使模型仅从视觉证据推断变换。
  • 引入最佳 - 最差对比优化机制，提高生成一致性和忠实度。
  • 设计条件压缩与重用策略，显著降低高分辨率编辑的计算开销。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量示例对，泛化到复杂编辑场景有限。
  • 对比优化可能增加训练复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Visual-prompt-guided edit transfer aims to learn image transformations directly from example pairs, offering more precise and controllable editing than purely text-driven approaches. However, existing diffusion transformer-based methods often fail to faithfully reproduce the demonstrated edits due to structural mismatches between the task and the backbone, including a pretrained bias toward textual conditioning and inherent stochastic instability during sampling. To bridge this gap, we present EditTransfer++, a framework that combines progressively structured training with an efficient conditioning scheme to improve both visual prompt faithfulness and inference efficiency. We first mitigate textual dominance with a text-decoupled training strategy that removes text conditioning during fine-tuning, compelling the model to infer transformations solely from visual evidence while still supporting optional text guidance at inference. On top of this visually grounded model, a best-worst contrastive refinement mechanism reshapes the denoising trajectories to suppress unfaithful generations and improve consistency across random seeds. To alleviate the computational bottleneck of high-resolution in-context editing, we further introduce a condition compression and reuse strategy that reduces token redundancy and enables efficient generation of images with a 1024-pixel long edge. Extensive experiments on existing benchmarks and the proposed EditTransfer-Bench show that EditTransfer++ achieves state-of-the-art visual prompt faithfulness with substantially faster inference than prior methods, suggesting a promising direction for scalable prompt-guided image editing and broader visual in-context learning.

Implicit Preference Alignment for Human Image Animation

High 2605.07545
Yuanzhi Wang, Xuhua Ren, Jiaxiang Cheng, Bing Ma, Kai Yu, Tianxiang Zheng, Qinglin Lu, Zhen Cui
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出隐式偏好对齐框架，无需配对偏好数据即可提升人体图像动画中手部生成质量。
🎯研究动机

人体图像动画中手部运动生成因自由度大、复杂度高而质量不佳，现有偏好对齐方法需要构建严格的偏好对，但手部区域帧级不一致导致数据构建成本极高且不实用。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖配对偏好数据的情况下，通过偏好对齐提升人体图像动画中手部区域的生成质量。

🔎现象分析

手部运动具有高自由度和复杂性，导致生成高保真手部运动困难；构建手部区域的严格偏好对因帧级不一致而成本高昂且不切实际。

🛠️主要方法

提出隐式偏好对齐（IPA）框架，基于隐式奖励最大化理论，通过最大化自生成高质量样本的似然并惩罚偏离预训练先验来实现对齐，并引入手部感知局部优化机制显式引导对齐过程聚焦于手部区域。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出数据高效的隐式偏好对齐框架，无需配对偏好数据即可实现偏好优化。
  • 引入手部感知局部优化机制，显式提升手部区域生成质量。
  • 理论证明方法基于隐式奖励最大化，实验验证有效降低偏好数据构建门槛并提升手部生成质量。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅在手部区域验证，其他身体部位效果未知。
  • 隐式奖励最大化的理论假设可能在某些场景下不成立。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Human image animation has witnessed significant advancements, yet generating high-fidelity hand motions remains a persistent challenge due to their high degrees of freedom and motion complexity. While reinforcement learning from human feedback, particularly direct preference optimization, offers a potential solution, it necessitates the construction of strict preference pairs. However, curating such pairs for dynamic hand regions is prohibitively expensive and often impractical due to frame-wise inconsistencies. In this paper, we propose Implicit Preference Alignment (IPA), a data-efficient post-training framework that eliminates the need for paired preference data. Theoretically grounded in implicit reward maximization, IPA aligns the model by maximizing the likelihood of self-generated high-quality samples while penalizing deviations from the pretrained prior. Furthermore, we introduce a Hand-Aware Local Optimization mechanism to explicitly steer the alignment process toward hand regions. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves effective preference optimization to enhance hand generation quality, while significantly lowering the barrier for constructing preference data. Codes are released at this https URL

HEART: Hyperspherical Embedding Alignment via Kent-Representation Traversal in Diffusion Models

High 2605.07973
Arani Roy, Shristi Das Biswas, Kaushik Roy
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：通过 Kent 分布在超球面上对齐文本嵌入，实现无需训练的扩散模型可控图像编辑。
🎯研究动机

现有文本到图像扩散模型的控制方法将嵌入空间视为欧几里得空间并应用线性变换，导致编辑时出现意外副作用（如背景改变），原因是忽略了语义概念的真实几何结构。

❓解决问题

如何利用文本编码器嵌入的真实几何结构（超球面），实现无需微调、反转或优化的精确可控图像编辑。

🔎现象分析

文本编码器表示位于超球面上，概念不是线性方向，而是各向异性的分布，更适合用 Kent 分布建模。

🛠️主要方法

提出 HEART 框架，在超球面上执行 Kent 感知的测地线变换，无需训练，直接操作嵌入空间。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现文本编码器嵌入位于超球面且概念分布各向异性，适合 Kent 分布建模。
  • 提出 HEART，一种无需训练、基于 Kent 分布测地线变换的可控图像编辑方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖文本编码器的质量。
  • 可能对复杂场景的编辑效果有限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Text-to-image diffusion models can generate visually stunning images, yet, controlling what appears and how it appears, remains surprisingly difficult, especially when operating solely within the constraints of the text-conditioning space. For example, changing a subject or adjusting an attribute often leads to unintended side effects, such as altered backgrounds or distorted details. This is because most existing text-based control methods treat the embedding space as Euclidean and apply simple linear transformations, which do not reflect how semantic concepts are actually organized. In this work, we take a step back and ask: what is the true geometry of these embeddings? We find that text encoder representations lie on a hypersphere, where concepts are not linear directions but structured, anisotropic distributions better captured by Kent distributions. Building on this insight, we propose HEART, a training-free framework that performs Kent-aware geodesic transformations directly on the hypersphere. By respecting the underlying geometry, HEART enables intuitive and precise edits, such as consistent subject replacement and fine-grained attribute control, while preserving the original scene. Importantly, HEART requires no finetuning, inversion, or optimization, and generalizes across diffusion model architectures. Our results show that a simple shift in perspective, from linear to spherical, can unlock fast, and controllable image generation.

Adaptive Subspace Projection for Generative Personalization

Medium 2605.07257
Van-Anh Nguyen, Anh Tuan Bui, Tamas Abraham, Junae Kim, Amardeep Kaur, Rollin Omari, Thuy-Trang Vu, Dinh Phung
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 AdaptSP 方法，通过自适应子空间投影解决生成个性化中的语义崩溃问题。
🎯研究动机

生成个性化中，学习到的概念会压制文本提示的其他部分，导致忽略重要上下文细节，即语义崩溃问题（SCP）。

❓解决问题

解决生成个性化中的语义崩溃问题，即个性化概念主导生成，忽略提示中的其他上下文。

🔎现象分析

语义漂移并非随机，而是集中在特定低维子空间；个性化过程扰动原始基础概念的嵌入，使其成为不稳定的参考点。

🛠️主要方法

提出测试时嵌入调整方法 AdaptSP，利用稳定的预训练嵌入作为锚点，隔离语义漂移并将其投影到识别出的子空间，进行精确调整。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了语义崩溃问题中语义漂移集中在低维子空间的现象
  • 提出无需训练的 AdaptSP 方法，有效缓解语义崩溃并保持主体身份
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖预训练嵌入的稳定性
  • 子空间识别方法可能需进一步验证
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Generative personalization often suffers from the semantic collapsing problem (SCP), where a learned personalized concept overpowers the rest of the text prompt, causing the model to ignore important contextual details. To address this, we first analyze the underlying cause, revealing that the semantic drift responsible for SCP is not random but is concentrated within a specific low-dimensional subspace. We also discover that the personalization process perturbs the embedding of the original base concept, making it an unstable reference point. Based on these insights, we introduce Test-time Embedding Adjustment with Adaptive Subspace Projection (AdaptSP), a training-free method that uses the stable, pre-trained embedding as an anchor. AdaptSP isolates the semantic drift and projects it onto the identified subspace, performing a precise adjustment that mitigates SCP while maintaining the subject identity. Our experiments show that this targeted approach significantly improves prompt fidelity and contextual alignment.

文本到视频 (T2V) 3 篇

SARA: Semantically Adaptive Relational Alignment for Video Diffusion Models

High 2605.07800
Jiesong Lian, Zixiang Zhou, Ruizhe Zhong, Yuan Zhou, Qinglin Lu, Rui Wang, Long Hu, Yixue Hao et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：SARA 通过文本条件显著性引导的 token 关系蒸馏，提升视频扩散模型的文本对齐与运动质量。
🎯研究动机

现有视频扩散模型在生成时仍会出现实体丢失、属性错绑、交互弱化等问题，而表示对齐方法（如 VideoREPA、MoAlign）的监督分配基于视觉或运动线索，忽略了与提示的相关性，导致对齐效果受限。

❓解决问题

如何根据文本提示的语义相关性自适应地分配 token 对监督，以提升视频扩散模型的细粒度文本跟随能力。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

SARA 包含一个轻量级 Stage 1 对齐器，使用逐实体 SAM 3.1 掩码监督和 InfoNCE 正则化训练，生成文本条件显著性；然后通过 pair-routing 算子将显著性融合到 token 关系蒸馏中，为每个 token 对分配权重，优先监督主体 - 主体和主体 - 背景对，减少背景 - 背景对的监督。

📊实验结果

在 Wan2.2 持续训练设置下，使用 13 维 VLM 评估、VBench 基准和盲用户研究进行评测，SARA 在文本对齐和运动质量上均优于 SFT、VideoREPA 和 MoAlign。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出语义自适应关系对齐方法 SARA，利用文本条件显著性引导 token 关系蒸馏的监督分配。
  • 在 Wan2.2 持续训练设置下，SARA 在 13 维 VLM 评估、VBench 基准和盲用户研究中均优于 SFT、VideoREPA 和 MoAlign。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 SAM 3.1 的掩码监督，可能受限于分割质量。
  • 仅验证了 Wan2.2 模型，泛化性需进一步探索。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent video diffusion models (VDMs) synthesize visually convincing clips, yet still drop entities, mis-bind attributes, and weaken the interactions specified in the prompt. Representation-alignment objectives such as VideoREPA and MoAlign improve fine-grained text following by distilling spatio-temporal token relations from a frozen visual foundation model, but their pairwise supervision budget is allocated by visual or motion cues rather than by how relevant each pair is to the prompt. We present SARA, Semantically Adaptive Relational Alignment, which keeps token-relation distillation (TRD) on a frozen VFM target and adds a text-conditioned saliency that decides which token pairs carry supervision. A lightweight Stage 1 aligner is trained with per-entity SAM 3.1 mask supervision and an InfoNCE regulariser, and its continuous saliency is fused into TRD through a pair-routing operator that assigns each token pair a weight whenever either of its two endpoints is salient, thereby routing supervision toward subject-subject and subject-background pairs and away from background-background ones. In the Wan2.2 continual-training setting, SARA improves both text alignment and motion quality over SFT, VideoREPA, and MoAlign on a 13-dimension VLM rubric, on the public VBench benchmarks, and in a blind user study.

Not All Tokens Need 40 Steps: Heterogeneous Step Allocation in Diffusion Transformers for Efficient Video Generation

High 2605.06892
Ernie Chu, Vishal M. Patel
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出异构步分配（HSA）方法，根据令牌速度动态分配去噪步数，实现高效视频生成。
🎯研究动机

扩散 Transformer（DiT）在视频生成中计算成本极高，因为标准推理对所有令牌使用相同步数，而人类视觉能忽略冗余运动，现有方法缺乏对令牌差异性的利用。

❓解决问题

如何在不牺牲生成质量的前提下，通过非均匀分配去噪步数来降低 DiT 视频生成的计算开销。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出标准推理对所有时空令牌统一分配步数导致计算浪费，而人类视觉可忽略冗余运动，暗示令牌间存在计算优先级差异。

🛠️主要方法

HSA：基于速度动态为不同令牌分配不同步数，引入 KV 缓存同步机制解决序列长度不匹配，并推导缓存欧拉更新以单步推进跳过令牌的潜状态。

📊实验结果

在 Wan-2 和 LTX-2 模型上评估 T2V 和 I2V 任务，HSA 在激进加速（50% 和 25% 运行时）下显著优于先前缓存方法和 Flow Matching 基线，实现质量 - 运行时帕累托前沿。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出训练无关的异构步分配算法 HSA，根据令牌速度动态分配去噪步数。
  • 设计 KV 缓存同步机制和缓存欧拉更新，实现高效推理并保持全局上下文。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定模型架构（DiT），泛化性需验证。
  • 速度动态的阈值选择可能影响性能，未讨论自适应调整。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have achieved state-of-the-art video generation quality, but they incur immense computational cost because standard inference applies the same number of denoising steps uniformly to every token in the sequence. It is well known that human vision ignores vast amounts of redundant motion. Why, then, do our densest models treat every spatiotemporal token with equal priority? In this paper, we introduce Heterogeneous Step Allocation (HSA), a training-free inference algorithm that assigns varying step budgets to different spatiotemporal tokens based on their velocity dynamics. To resolve the resulting sequence-length mismatch without sacrificing global context, HSA introduces a KV-cache synchronization mechanism that allows active tokens to attend to the full sequence while entirely bypassing inactive tokens. Furthermore, we derive a cached Euler update that advances the latent states of skipped tokens in a single operation without additional model evaluations. We evaluate HSA on the Wan-2 and LTX-2 models for both text-to-video (T2V) and image-to-video (I2V) generation. Our results demonstrate that HSA significantly outperforms previous state-of-the-art caching methods and the vanilla Flow Matching baseline, especially at aggressive acceleration regimes (e.g., 50% and 25% runtimes). Crucially, HSA achieves a superior quality-runtime Pareto frontier without the need for expensive offline profiling, robustly preserving structural integrity and generation quality even under tight computational budgets. Project page: this https URL

A$^2$RD: Agentic Autoregressive Diffusion for Long Video Consistency

High 2605.06924
Do Xuan Long, Yale Song, Min-Yen Kan, Tomas Pfister, Long T. Le
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一种解耦创意生成与一致性约束的智能体自回归扩散架构，通过检索 - 合成 - 精炼 - 更新循环实现长视频逐段生成与自我改进，在一致性和叙事连贯性上显著超越现有方法。
🎯研究动机

长视频合成面临语义漂移和叙事崩溃的挑战，现有方法难以在长时间跨度内保持连贯性和一致性。

❓解决问题

如何生成语义一致、叙事连贯的长视频，避免逐段生成中的错误累积和内容漂移。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出现有方法在长视频生成中会出现语义漂移和叙事崩溃，即随着时间推移，视频内容逐渐偏离初始设定或失去逻辑连贯性。

🛠️主要方法

提出 A$^2$RD 架构，包含多模态视频记忆、自适应片段生成和层次化测试时自我改进三个核心组件，通过检索 - 合成 - 精炼 - 更新循环实现闭环生成。

📊实验结果

在涵盖 1 到 10 分钟视频的公开和 LVBench-C 基准上评估，A$^2$RD 在一致性和叙事连贯性上优于最先进基线，人类评估也证实了运动和平滑度的改进。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种解耦创意生成与一致性约束的智能体自回归扩散架构，用于长视频合成。
  • 引入 LVBench-C 基准，用于评估长视频一致性。
  • 在公开和 LVBench-C 基准上，A$^2$RD 在一致性和叙事连贯性上分别提升高达 30% 和 20%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的视频记忆和检索机制，对初始片段质量敏感。
  • 测试时自我改进可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Synthesizing consistent and coherent long video remains a fundamental challenge. Existing methods suffer from semantic drift and narrative collapse over long horizons. We present A$^2$RD, an Agentic Auto-Regressive Diffusion architecture that decouples creative synthesis from consistency enforcement. A$^2$RD formulates long video synthesis as a closed-loop process that synthesizes and self-improves video segment-by-segment through a Retrieve--Synthesize--Refine--Update cycle. It comprises three core components: (i) Multimodal Video Memory that tracks video progression across modalities; (ii) Adaptive Segment Generation that switches among generation modes for natural progression and visual consistency; and (iii) Hierarchical Test-Time Self-Improvement that self-improves each segment at frame and video levels to prevent error propagation. We further introduce LVBench-C, a challenging benchmark with non-linear entity and environment transitions to stress-test long-horizon consistency. Across public and LVBench-C benchmarks spanning one- to ten-minute videos, A$^2$RD outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by up to 30% in consistency and 20% in narrative coherence. Human evaluations corroborate these gains while also highlighting notable improvements in motion and transition smoothness.

3D/4D 生成 2 篇

ST-Gen4D: Embedding 4D Spatiotemporal Cognition into World Model for 4D Generation

High 2605.07390
Haonan Wang, Hanyu Zhou, Tao Gu, Luxin Yan
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 ST-Gen4D 框架，通过嵌入 4D 时空认知的世界模型实现结构合理且拓扑一致的 4D 生成。
🎯研究动机

现有 4D 生成模型仅保证全局外观一致性，无法揭示物理世界的局部动态，缺乏对 4D 时空尺度的认知。

❓解决问题

如何生成具有时空规律性、结构合理性和拓扑一致性的 4D 内容。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出现有方法仅关注全局外观一致性，忽略了局部动态拓扑，导致生成结果缺乏物理世界的局部动态。

🛠️主要方法

提出 ST-Gen4D 框架，包含四个关键设计：1) 时空表示：将多种模态编码为多表示特征基；2) 时空认知：构建全局外观图和局部动态图，通过语义桥接融合为 4D 认知图；3) 时空推理：利用世界模型基于 4D 认知推导未来状态；4) 时空生成：以推导的认知为条件引导潜在扩散进行 4D 高斯生成。

📊实验结果

在 3D 和 4D 生成任务上进行了大量实验，证明了 ST-Gen4D 的优越性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ST-Gen4D 框架，首次将 4D 时空认知嵌入世界模型用于 4D 生成。
  • 构建 ST-4D 数据集，整合公开 4D 数据集和自建子集。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖大规模 4D 数据，数据获取成本高。
  • 世界模型的推理效率可能成为瓶颈。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Generative models have achieved success in producing apparently coherent 2D videos, but remain challenging in the physical world due to lack of 4D spatiotemporal scale. Typically, existing 4D generative models directly embed macro scale constraints to enhance overall spatiotemporal consistency. However, these methods only ensure global appearance coherence and fail to reveal the local dynamics of the physical world. Our insight is that global appearance structure and local dynamic topology empower 4D spatiotemporal cognition, thereby enabling 4D generation with spatiotemporal regularities. In this work, we propose ST-Gen4D, a 4D generation framework with 4D spatiotemporal cognition-based world model. Our model is guided by four key designs: 1) Spatiotemporal representation. We encode various modalities into multiple representations as a feature basis. 2) Spatiotemporal cognition. We sculpture these representations into global appearance graph and local dynamic graph, and fuse them via semantic-bridged spatiotemporal fusion to obtain a 4D cognition graph. 3) Spatiotemporal reasoning. We utilize a world model to derive future state based on the 4D cognition. 4) Spatiotemporal generation. We leverage the derived cognition as condition to guide latent diffusion for 4D Gaussian generation. By deeply integrating 4D intrinsic cognition with generative priors, our model guarantees the structural rationality and topological consistency of 4D generation. Moreover, we propose ST-4D datasets by aggregating public 4D datasets and self-built subset. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our ST-Gen4D across 3D and 4D generation tasks.

DVD: Discrete Voxel Diffusion for 3D Generation and Editing

High 2605.07971
Zhengrui Xiang, Jiaqi Wu, Fupeng Sun, Heliang Zheng, Yingzhen Li
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出离散体素扩散模型 DVD，用于 3D 生成与编辑，避免连续 - 离散阈值化，支持不确定性估计和高效编辑。
🎯研究动机

现有 3D 生成方法多依赖连续扩散，但体素占用是离散变量，连续 - 离散转换引入误差且缺乏可解释性；离散扩散在图像生成中未占主导，但在稀疏体素场景中可能有效。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个离散扩散框架，用于稀疏体素的生成、质量评估和编辑，同时避免连续 - 离散阈值化并支持不确定性估计。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出离散体素扩散（DVD），将体素占用视为离散变量，使用离散扩散作为第一阶段的先验；利用预测熵作为不确定性度量；提出块结构扰动微调策略，实现单轮采样内的修复和编辑。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将离散扩散有效应用于稀疏体素生成，避免连续 - 离散阈值化。
  • 提出基于预测熵的不确定性度量，用于数据过滤和质量评估。
  • 提出块结构扰动微调策略，实现高效的单轮采样体素编辑。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于稀疏体素场景，对密集体素或连续表示效果未知。
  • 离散扩散的采样效率可能低于连续扩散。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce Discrete Voxel Diffusion (DVD), a discrete diffusion framework to generate, assess, and edit sparse voxels for SLat (Structured LATent) based 3D generative pipelines. Although discrete diffusion has not generally displaced continuous diffusion in image-like generation, we show that it can be an effective first-stage prior for sparse voxel scaffolds. By treating voxel occupancy as a native discrete variable, DVD avoids continuous-to-discrete thresholding and provides a simple framework for voxel generation, uncertainty estimation, and editing. Beyond quality gains, DVD provides more interpretable generation dynamics through explicit categorical modeling. Furthermore, we leverage the predictive entropy as a robust uncertainty metric to identify ambiguous voxel regions and complicated samples, facilitating tasks such as data filtering and quality assessment. Finally, we propose a lightweight fine-tuning strategy using block-structured perturbation patterns. This approach empowers the model to inpaint and edit voxels within a single sampling round, requiring negligible auxiliary computation and no additional model evaluations.

其他 2 篇

Unlocking High-Fidelity Molecular Generation from Mass Spectra via Dual-Stream Line Graph Diffusion

High 2605.07048
Xujun Che, Xiuxia Du, Depeng Xu
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出双流线图扩散模型 DualLGD，通过解耦原子与键推理实现质谱分子生成，准确率提升约 3 倍。
🎯研究动机

从串联质谱进行从头分子生成是逆问题，核心难点在于原子级与键级推理的循环依赖：确定键类型需知端点原子化学环境，而原子环境又由其入射键定义。现有图扩散方法在单流中处理原子和键，原子 - 键信息同步仅能跨层隐式进行，导致瓶颈。

❓解决问题

解决单流图扩散中原子与键信息同步不足的问题，实现从质谱数据生成高保真分子。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出单流范式（而非特定聚合核）是关键架构瓶颈，并观察到线图可自然构建键空间，其中键角、二面角、共轭链和环对应键间局部拓扑模式。

🛠️主要方法

提出 DualLGD，将分子图去噪重构为原子级推理和键级推理两个耦合子问题的交替求解，各自在专用表示空间操作；通过入射约束双向交叉注意力在每层同步两流，确保原子仅关注其入射键，反之亦然。

📊实验结果

在 NPLIB1 和 MassSpecGym 基准上评估，DualLGD 达到 top-1 准确率 34.37% 和 23.89%，约为先前最优的 3 倍。消融实验确认架构是主要改进来源：无预训练的 DualLGD 已超越先前最佳全预训练模型。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别单流图扩散是分子生成架构瓶颈，提出双流线图扩散范式。
  • 设计入射约束双向交叉注意力机制，严格遵循化学原理。
  • 在 NPLIB1 和 MassSpecGym 基准上实现 top-1 准确率 34.37% 和 23.89%，约为先前最优的 3 倍。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量质谱数据，对噪声数据鲁棒性未知。
  • 双流架构计算开销可能高于单流方法。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

De novo molecular generation from tandem mass spectra is a challenging inverse problem whose core difficulty lies in the circular dependency between atom-level and bond-level reasoning: determining a bond's type requires knowing its endpoint atoms' chemical environment, yet an atom's environment is in turn defined by its incident bonds. Existing graph diffusion methods process atoms and bonds within a single computation stream, where atom-bond information synchronization can only occur implicitly across layers. We argue that this single-stream paradigm, rather than the choice of any particular aggregation kernel, is a key architectural bottleneck. We propose DualLGD (Dual-stream Line Graph Diffusion), which reformulates molecular graph denoising as the alternating solution of two coupled subproblems: atom-level reasoning and bond-level reasoning, each operating in its own dedicated representation space. The line graph provides a natural mathematical construction for the bond space, in which bond angles, dihedrals, conjugation chains, and rings correspond to local topological motifs between bonds. Incidence-constrained bidirectional cross-attention synchronizes the two streams at every layer, ensuring that each atom attends only to its incident bonds and vice versa, respecting the fundamental chemical principle that an atom's environment is determined by its bonding context. On the NPLIB1 and MassSpecGym benchmarks, DualLGD achieves top-1 accuracy of 34.37\% and 23.89\%, approximately $3\times$ the previous state of the art. Ablation studies confirm the architecture as the primary source of improvement: DualLGD without any pre-training already surpasses the previous best fully pretrained model.

Exact Regular-Constrained Variable-Order Markov Generation via Sparse Context-State Belief Propagation

Medium 2605.07839
François Pachet
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出稀疏上下文 - 状态置信传播方法，实现变阶马尔可夫模型在正则约束下的精确生成。
🎯研究动机

变阶马尔可夫模型在序列生成中广泛使用，但现有精确方法仅支持一阶马尔可夫链的正则约束，无法处理变阶模型因历史区分导致的约束不匹配问题。

❓解决问题

如何对变阶马尔可夫模型施加正则约束（如固定位置、强制结尾、禁止重复片段等），并实现精确的约束条件概率生成。

🔎现象分析

一阶约束层在合并历史时丢失了变阶模型刻意保持的区分信息，导致未来质量计算不准确。

🛠️主要方法

将一阶马尔可夫状态替换为观测到的上下文状态，并与正则约束自动机做标准乘积，构建稀疏上下文 - 状态图，然后在该图上运行置信传播。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化了变阶马尔可夫生成器与一阶正则约束之间的不匹配问题。
  • 提出稀疏上下文 - 状态置信传播方法，在固定上下文图和自动机下推理复杂度与序列长度线性相关。
  • 支持可逆数据增强（逆计数查找），无需存储变换后的语料库。
  • 区分了精确 BP 推理与生成时的回退策略（如避免单例），明确了精确性声明所需的随机语义。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖于训练好的上下文图和自动机，可能不适用于动态或未知约束。
  • 多项式复杂度在边数上，对于极大自动机可能仍有限制。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Variable-order Markov models generate sequences over a finite alphabet by conditioning each symbol on the longest available suffix of the generated history. Regular constraints, by contrast, describe finite-horizon control requirements by an automaton: fixed positions, forced endings, metrical patterns, and forbidden copied fragments are all special cases. Existing exact methods already handle regular constraints with belief propagation for first-order Markov chains. The contribution here is the variable-order extension: identifying the state space on which the existing BP-regular machinery must be run when the generator is a variable-order/backoff model. A first-order constraint layer can enforce useful support conditions, but it computes future mass after merging histories that a variable-order generator deliberately keeps distinct. We formalize this mismatch and give the sparse construction obtained by replacing the first-order Markov state with the observed context state, then taking the standard product with the regular constraint automaton. For a fixed trained context graph and automaton, inference is linear in the sequence horizon; in general it is polynomial in the number of reachable product edges. This gives the correct variable-order distribution conditioned on regular constraints without expanding to all K-tuples. The same finite-source interface supports reversible data augmentation by inverse count lookup, matching materialized transposition augmentation without storing transformed corpora. We also separate exact BP inference from generation-time backoff policies, such as singleton avoidance, whose stochastic semantics must be made explicit if exactness is claimed.

文本到图像 (T2I) 1 篇

Flow-OPD: On-Policy Distillation for Flow Matching Models

High 2605.08063
Zhen Fang, Wenxuan Huang, Yu Zeng, Yiming Zhao, Shuang Chen, Kaituo Feng, Yunlong Lin, Lin Chen et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：Flow-OPD 将在线策略蒸馏引入流匹配模型，通过两阶段对齐策略解决多任务对齐中的奖励稀疏和梯度干扰问题，显著提升文本到图像生成性能。
🎯研究动机

现有流匹配文本到图像模型在多任务对齐时面临奖励稀疏和梯度干扰导致的‘跷跷板效应’和奖励黑客问题，亟需统一的后训练框架。

❓解决问题

如何解决流匹配模型在多任务对齐中因标量奖励稀疏和异构目标联合优化导致的性能竞争与奖励黑客问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出多任务对齐下存在奖励稀疏和梯度干扰，导致竞争指标的‘跷跷板效应’和奖励黑客现象。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Flow-OPD，包含两阶段对齐策略：第一阶段通过单奖励 GRPO 微调培养领域专家教师；第二阶段通过基于流的冷启动方案建立初始策略，并通过在线策略采样、任务路由标注和密集轨迹级监督三步整合异构专家知识；同时引入流形锚点正则化（MAR）利用任务无关教师提供全数据监督，防止美学退化。

📊实验结果

基于 Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium，GenEval 分数从 63 提升至 92，OCR 准确率从 59% 提升至 94%，整体比 vanilla GRPO 提升约 10 个点，同时保持图像保真度和人类偏好对齐。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个将在线策略蒸馏统一集成到流匹配模型的后训练框架 Flow-OPD
  • 提出两阶段对齐策略和流形锚点正则化（MAR），有效缓解多任务对齐中的跷跷板效应和奖励黑客问题
  • 在 Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium 上显著提升 GenEval 和 OCR 准确率，并展现‘超越教师’效应
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定基础模型（Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium），泛化性需验证
  • 两阶段训练和在线策略采样可能增加计算开销
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Existing Flow Matching (FM) text-to-image models suffer from two critical bottlenecks under multi-task alignment: the reward sparsity induced by scalar-valued rewards, and the gradient interference arising from jointly optimizing heterogeneous objectives, which together give rise to a 'seesaw effect' of competing metrics and pervasive reward hacking. Inspired by the success of On-Policy Distillation (OPD) in the large language model community, we propose Flow-OPD, the first unified post-training framework that integrates on-policy distillation into Flow Matching models. Flow-OPD adopts a two-stage alignment strategy: it first cultivates domain-specialized teacher models via single-reward GRPO fine-tuning, allowing each expert to reach its performance ceiling in isolation; it then establishes a robust initial policy through a Flow-based Cold-Start scheme and seamlessly consolidates heterogeneous expertise into a single student via a three-step orchestration of on-policy sampling, task-routing labeling, and dense trajectory-level supervision. We further introduce Manifold Anchor Regularization (MAR), which leverages a task-agnostic teacher to provide full-data supervision that anchors generation to a high-quality manifold, effectively mitigating the aesthetic degradation commonly observed in purely RL-driven alignment. Built upon Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium, Flow-OPD raises the GenEval score from 63 to 92 and the OCR accuracy from 59 to 94, yielding an overall improvement of roughly 10 points over vanilla GRPO, while preserving image fidelity and human-preference alignment and exhibiting an emergent 'teacher-surpassing' effect. These results establish Flow-OPD as a scalable alignment paradigm for building generalist text-to-image models.

应用: 机器人/自动化/规划 17 篇 · 7 个细分

其他 4 篇

CSR: Infinite-Horizon Real-Time Policies with Massive Cached State Representations

High 2605.07325
Robin Karlsson, Go Suzui
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出 CSR 框架和 ASR 算法，通过理论证明和 KV 缓存重用，将大模型作为机器人实时策略的延迟降低 26 倍，并实现无限时域的无尖峰推理。
🎯研究动机

将大规模 LLM 作为机器人连续认知引擎时，处理大量状态历史的 TTFT 延迟成为瓶颈，现有方法如 RAG 或滑动窗口会牺牲全局上下文或带来高昂重计算成本。

❓解决问题

如何在大规模 LLM 作为机器人实时策略时，实现无限时域的低延迟、无尖峰推理，同时保持全局上下文。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Cached State Representation (CSR)框架，通过理论证明前缀稳定性、增量可扩展性和异步状态协调是实时性能的必要条件，并基于这些性质实现最优 KV 缓存重用；进一步提出 Asynchronous State Reconciliation (ASR)算法，将状态内存驱逐卸载到并行计算资源以消除延迟尖峰。

📊实验结果

在物理机器人（无线连接本地 GPU 服务器）上，使用 235B 参数模型处理 120K token 上下文，CSR 实现 26 倍延迟降低（14.67s 到 0.56s）；在具身 AI 基准上，召回率 0.836 vs 基线 0.459，延迟与 RAG 相当；ASR 在 10 次驱逐周期中维持有界、无尖峰的 TTFT。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化定义了最小化延迟的最优任务结构，并理论证明了前缀稳定性、增量可扩展性和异步状态协调是实时性能的必要条件。
  • 提出 CSR 框架作为这些性质的实践实例化，确保最优 KV 缓存重用。
  • 提出 ASR 算法，在无限时域上维持这些性质，消除延迟尖峰。
  • 在物理机器人上实现 26 倍延迟降低（14.67s 到 0.56s），在具身 AI 基准上达到 SOTA 召回率（0.836 vs 0.459）并保持 RAG 级延迟。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅在单一机器人平台和特定模型上验证，泛化性未知。
  • ASR 算法依赖并行计算资源，可能增加硬件成本。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Deploying massive large language models (LLMs) as continuous cognitive engines for robotics is bottlenecked by the time-to-first-token (TTFT) latency required to process extensive state histories. Existing solutions like RAG or sliding windows compromise global context or incur prohibitive re-computation costs. We formalize the optimal task structure for minimizing latency and theoretically prove that prefix stability, incremental extensibility, and asynchronous state reconciliation are necessary conditions for real-time performance. Building on these proofs, we introduce the Cached State Representation (CSR) framework as the practical instantiation of these properties, ensuring optimal KV-cache reuse. To sustain these properties over infinite horizons, we further propose an Asynchronous State Reconciliation (ASR) algorithm that offloads state memory eviction to a parallel computational resource to eliminate latency spikes. On a physical robot wirelessly connected to an on-premise GPU server, CSR achieves a 26-fold latency reduction (14.67s to 0.56s) for 120K token contexts with a 235B parameter model compared to a standard baseline. On an embodied AI benchmark, we achieve SOTA recall (0.836 vs. 0.459) while maintaining RAG-level latency. ASR is validated to sustain bounded, spike-free TTFT over 10 eviction cycles in continuous real-world operation. Together, CSR and ASR enable massive LLMs to function as continuously operating, high-frequency (> 2 Hz) embodied policies.

Tracking Large-scale Shared Bikes with Inertial Motion Learning in GNSS Blocked Environments

Medium 2605.07412
Feng Liu (1), Kejia Li (1), Zhiwei Yang (2), Chunwei Yang (2), Qun Li (2), Guobin Wu (2), Qiang Ni (3), Ruipeng Gao (1) ((1) Beijing Jiaotong University et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出融合自行车机械约束与混合专家模型的惯性追踪框架，在 GNSS 失效环境下将定位精度提升至少 12%。
🎯研究动机

GNSS 在城市峡谷等复杂环境中失效，而低成本惯性传感器定位存在累积漂移和鲁棒性差的问题；视觉 /LiDAR 传感器不适合大规模部署，亟需一种可大规模部署的高精度惯性追踪方案。

❓解决问题

在 GNSS 阻塞环境下，仅使用低成本惯性传感器实现高精度、鲁棒的自行车追踪。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出惯性追踪框架，集成自行车机械约束与混合专家模型：利用多个专家模块捕获共享表示并通过门控机制加权，实现多任务学习和不确定性感知轨迹估计；基于踏板与后轮机械传动关系，将骑行者周期性踩踏行为与加速度变化转换为车轮速度进行动态校准。

📊实验结果

使用滴滴出行平台共享单车真实骑行数据进行实验，系统相比基线方法精度提升至少 12%，车轮速度误差在 95 百分位下低于 0.5 m/s。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出融合自行车机械约束与混合专家模型的惯性追踪框架，提升多任务学习性能并实现不确定性感知轨迹估计。
  • 利用踏板与后轮机械传动关系，将骑行踩踏模式转换为车轮速度进行动态校准，降低定位误差。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定自行车机械结构，泛化到其他车型需调整。
  • 实验仅在共享单车场景验证，未覆盖更多复杂环境。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Although Global Navigation Satellite Systems (GNSS) provide a general solution for bike tracking outdoors, there still exist complex riding environments where only inertial navigation systems work, such as urban canyons. Despite decades of research, localization using only low-cost inertial sensors still faces challenges such as cumulative drifts and poor robustness caused by filtering methods. Furthermore, sensors such as visual and LiDAR could provide reliable measurements, but they are not suitable for large-scale deployment. In this paper, we propose an inertial tracking framework that integrates bicycle mechanical constraints with a mixture-of-experts model. Specifically, we leverage multiple expert modules to capture shared representations and weight them through the gating mechanism, thus improving multi-task learning performance and enabling uncertainty-aware trajectory estimation. Furthermore, based on the mechanical transmission between the pedal and the rear wheel of a bike, we explore the intrinsic relationship between the rider's periodic pedalling behaviors and acceleration variations, and convert such patterns into bike's wheel speed for dynamic calibration. Experiments with real-world riding data from shared bikes of the DiDi ride-hailing platform demonstrate that our system improves the accuracy of baselines by at least 12%, with wheel speed errors below 0.5 m/s at 95-percentile.

Group of Skills: Group-Structured Skill Retrieval for Agent Skill Libraries

Medium 2605.06978
Kun Zeng, Yu Huo, Siyu Zhang, Zi Ye, Yuecheng Zhuo, Haoyue Liu, Yuquan Lu, Junhao Wen et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出 Group of Skills (GoSkills)，一种推理时群结构化技能检索方法，将扁平技能列表转换为带角色标签的执行上下文，提升智能体技能库的可用性。
🎯研究动机

现有技能增强型智能体依赖大型可复用技能库，但检索到的技能通常以原子技能或依赖感知包的形式返回，内部角色隐式，智能体需自行推断执行入口、支持技能、可见需求和故障规避指导，导致上下文可用性差。

❓解决问题

如何将检索到的技能从扁平列表转换为紧凑、带角色标签的执行上下文，使智能体能直接获得执行入口、支持技能、可见需求和故障规避指导。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

GoSkills 方法：从带类型的技能图构建以锚点为中心的技能组，通过组图扩展支持组，将选定的组计划瓶颈化为有界原子技能载荷集，并渲染包含 Start、Support、Check 和 Avoid 字段的固定执行合约。

📊实验结果

在 SkillsBench 和 ALFWorld 上评估，与扁平技能访问基线和结构检索参考方法对比，GoSkills 在可见需求覆盖、奖励和智能体运行时上表现更优。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 GoSkills，一种推理时群结构化技能检索方法，改变智能体面对的检索对象为角色标签化的执行上下文。
  • 在 SkillsBench 和 ALFWorld 上实验，显示 GoSkills 在小技能预算下保持可见需求覆盖，优于扁平技能访问基线，并在奖励和智能体运行时上优于结构检索参考方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖预定义的技能图结构，构建成本高。
  • 未讨论对动态技能库或在线学习的适应性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Skill-augmented agents increasingly rely on large reusable skill libraries, but retrieving relevant skills is not the same as presenting usable context. Existing methods typically return atomic skills or dependency-aware bundles whose internal roles remain implicit, leaving the agent to infer the execution entry point, support skills, visible requirements, and failure-avoidance guidance. We introduce Group of Skills (GoSkills), an inference-time group-structured retrieval method that changes the agent-facing retrieval object from a flat skill list to a compact, role-labeled execution context. GoSkills builds anchor-centered skill groups from a typed skill graph, expands support groups through a group graph, bottlenecks the selected group plan into a bounded set of atomic skill payloads, and renders a fixed execution contract with Start, Support, Check, and Avoid fields, without changing the downstream agent, skill payloads, or execution environment. Experiments on SkillsBench and ALFWorld show that GoSkills preserves visible-requirement coverage under a small skill budget, improves over flat skill-access baselines, and often improves reward and agent-only runtime relative to structural retrieval references.

Dr-BA: Separable Optimization for Direct Radar Bundle Adjustment & Localization

Medium 2605.07041
Daniil Lisus, Cedric Le Gentil, Timothy D. Barfoot
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出首个直接操作 2D 雷达强度图像的雷达束调整框架 Dr-BA，通过可分离优化实现高效建图与定位。
🎯研究动机

雷达在恶劣天气下具有鲁棒性，但现有方法依赖稀疏点云提取，未能充分利用完整雷达回波信息。

❓解决问题

如何利用完整雷达强度图像进行联合地图构建与位姿估计，并实现跨会话定位。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将束调整问题建模为可分离优化，解耦位姿估计与建图，并扩展至直接雷达定位。

📊实验结果

在超过 200 公里、5 条不同路线的道路数据上验证，达到 SOTA 性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个直接操作 2D 雷达强度图像的束调整框架
  • 可分离优化实现高效解耦，自然支持直接定位
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定雷达传感器配置
  • 未讨论动态场景适应性
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This paper introduces Dr-BA, a first-of-its-kind radar bundle adjustment (BA) framework that operates directly on 2D spinning radar intensity images. Unlike camera or lidar sensors, radar is largely unaffected by precipitation, making it a critical modality for autonomous systems that require all-weather robustness. Existing state estimation approaches using spinning radar typically extract sparse point clouds from range-azimuth-intensity measurements and apply point cloud alignment techniques to estimate vehicle motion, scene structure, or to localize within an existing map. In contrast, Dr-BA uses the full radar returns from multiple scans to jointly estimate dense maps and sensor poses. By formulating the problem as a separable optimization, we derive an efficient and general solution that decouples pose estimation from mapping. In addition to solving the BA problem, this formulation naturally extends to direct radar-only localization (DRL) within a previously built map. Dr-BA achieves state-of-the-art radar-based BA and cross-session localization performance, demonstrated on more than 200 km of on-road data across five distinct routes. Our implementation is publicly available at this https URL .

视觉-语言-动作 (VLA) 4 篇

Learning Visual Feature-Based World Models via Residual Latent Action

High 2605.07079
Xinyu Zhang, Zhengtong Xu, Yutian Tao, Yeping Wang, Yu She, Abdeslam Boularias
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出残差隐动作（RLA）和基于流匹配的世界模型 RLA-WM，在视觉特征空间中高效预测未来状态，显著优于现有方法。
🎯研究动机

现有世界模型主要基于图像生成，效率低且易产生幻觉；基于视觉特征的方法虽更高效，但直接回归导致预测模糊或崩溃，而高维特征空间中的生成建模仍具挑战。

❓解决问题

如何高效且准确地基于视觉特征预测未来世界状态，避免模糊预测和幻觉，并支持机器人学习。

🔎现象分析

发现从 DINO 残差中可学习到一种新的隐动作表示 RLA，具有预测性、泛化性和时间编码能力。

🛠️主要方法

提出 RLA-WM，使用流匹配（flow matching）预测 RLA 值，从而构建基于视觉特征的世界模型。

📊实验结果

在仿真和真实数据集上评估，RLA-WM 优于最先进的特征基和视频扩散世界模型，且速度显著更快。摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现并定义了残差隐动作（RLA），可从 DINO 残差中学习，具有预测性、泛化性和时间编码能力。
  • 提出 RLA-WM，基于流匹配预测 RLA，在仿真和真实数据集上超越现有特征基和视频扩散世界模型，且速度比视频扩散快数个数量级。
  • 开发两种基于 RLA-WM 的机器人学习技术：从无动作演示视频中学习的极简世界动作模型，以及首个完全在离线视频学习的视觉 RL 框架。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 DINO 特征的质量和泛化性。
  • 流匹配的采样效率可能仍有提升空间。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

World models predict future transitions from observations and actions. Existing works predominantly focus on image generation only. Visual feature-based world models, on the other hand, predict future visual features instead of raw video pixels, offering a promising alternative that is more efficient and less prone to hallucination. However, current feature-based approaches rely on direct regression, which leads to blurry or collapsed predictions in complex interactions, while generative modeling in high-dimensional feature spaces still remains challenging. In this work, we discover that a new type of latent action representation, which we refer to as *Residual Latent Action* (RLA), can be easily learned from DINO residuals. We also show that RLA is predictive, generalizable, and encodes temporal progression. Building on RLA, we propose *RLA World Model* (RLA-WM), which predicts RLA values via flow matching. RLA-WM outperforms both state-of-the-art feature-based and video-diffusion world models on simulation and real-world datasets, while being orders of magnitude faster than video diffusion. Furthermore, we develop two robot learning techniques that use RLA-WM to improve policy learning. The first one is a minimalist world action model with RLA that learns from actionless demonstration videos. The second one is the first visual RL framework trained entirely inside a world model learned from offline videos only, using a video-aligned reward and no online interactions or handcrafted rewards. Project page: this https URL

Sword: Style-Robust World Models as Simulators via Dynamic Latent Bootstrapping for VLA Policy Post-Training

High 2605.07288
Jiaxuan Gao, Yongjian Guo, Zhong Guan, Wen Huang, Wanlun Ma, Xi Xiao, Junwu Xiong, Sheng Wen
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 Sword 框架，通过结构引导风格增强和动态潜在引导提升世界模型作为 VLA 策略后训练模拟器的鲁棒性。
🎯研究动机

现有世界模型作为模拟器时泛化性差、长程误差累积严重，对初始状态扰动敏感，限制了其在 VLA 策略后训练中的可靠性。

❓解决问题

世界模型在闭环推演中对视觉变化（颜色、光照等）鲁棒性不足，且长程预测误差累积导致生成质量下降。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，现有世界模型在 LIBERO 基准中，初始状态微小扰动（如颜色、光照变化）会引发级联幻觉，导致严重模糊或过曝；长程误差累积进一步降低预测状态的质量和保真度。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Sword 框架，包含结构引导风格增强（解耦视觉纹理与任务相关动态）和动态潜在引导（保持训练与推理一致性，降低内存消耗）。

📊实验结果

在 LIBERO 基准上进行了实验，与基线 WoVR 比较，在泛化、生成质量、鲁棒性、保真度和 VLA 后训练成功率方面表现更优。摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出结构引导风格增强，提升世界模型对视觉变化的泛化能力
  • 提出动态潜在引导，维持训练与推理一致性并降低内存消耗
  • 在 LIBERO 基准上显著优于基线 WoVR，在泛化、生成质量、鲁棒性、保真度和 VLA 强化学习后训练成功率方面均有提升
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅在 LIBERO 基准上验证，泛化到其他环境需进一步测试
  • 动态潜在引导的长期一致性可能仍有局限
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The integration of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models with World Models has gained increasing attention. One representative approach treats learned World Models as generative simulators, enabling policy optimization entirely within "imagination." However, when deployed as simulators for specific environments such as the LIBERO benchmark, existing World Models often suffer from poor generalization and long-horizon error accumulation. During closed-loop rollouts, these models are highly sensitive to initial-state perturbations; minor changes in color, illumination, and other visual factors can trigger cascading hallucinations, leading to severe blurriness or overexposure. Moreover, long-horizon error accumulation further degrades the quality and fidelity of predicted future states. These issues limit the reliability of World Models as simulators. To mitigate these problems, we propose Sword, a robust World Model framework. Our method introduces Structure-Guided Style Augmentation to disentangle the visual textures of interactive environments from task-relevant dynamics, thereby improving generalization. We further propose Dynamic Latent Bootstrapping, which maintains consistency between training and inference while keeping memory consumption low. Extensive experiments on the LIBERO benchmark show that our method significantly outperforms the baseline WoVR in terms of generalization, generation quality, robustness, fidelity, and the success rate of reinforcement-learning post-training for VLA models.

ForgeVLA: Federated Vision-Language-Action Learning without Language Annotations

High 2605.07474
Yuhao Zhou, Yunpeng Zhu, Yang Zhou, Jindi Lyu, Jian Lan, Zhangyuan Wang, Dan Si, Thomas Seidl et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出联邦 VLA 训练框架 ForgeVLA，无需语言标注即可从分布式视觉 - 动作对中学习，并解决视觉 - 语言特征坍缩问题。
🎯研究动机

VLA 模型扩展受限于标注数据的高成本，而分布式机器人数据因隐私和异构性无法集中使用，且缺乏语言标注。

❓解决问题

如何在不集中原始数据且无需人工标注的条件下，从分布式异构视觉 - 动作对中学习 VLA 模型。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出视觉 - 语言特征坍缩是联邦 VLA 中未被充分关注的关键挑战。

🛠️主要方法

每个客户端使用具身指令分类器将视觉 - 动作对映射到预定义指令集，恢复语言模态；结合客户端对比规划损失和服务器端自适应聚合策略学习任务判别性表征。

📊实验结果

在多个基准上显著优于其他基线，消融实验验证了各组件贡献。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ForgeVLA，首个无需语言标注的联邦 VLA 训练框架
  • 识别并缓解了联邦 VLA 中的视觉 - 语言特征坍缩问题
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖预定义指令集，可能限制泛化性
  • 未讨论客户端异构性对分类器的影响
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models hold great promise for general-purpose robotic intelligence, yet scaling up such models is severely bottlenecked by the high cost of acquiring annotated training data. Fortunately, vision-equipped robots deployed across various domains already produce abundant vision-action pairs that can be leveraged to scale up VLA training more efficiently. However, these raw data cannot be centrally aggregated due to various constraints and also exhibit severe heterogeneity. To address these challenges, in this paper, we propose ForgeVLA, a federated VLA training framework that learns VLA models from distributed vision-action pairs without centralizing raw data or requiring manual annotations. Specifically, each client in ForgeVLA is equipped with an embodied instruction classifier that maps vision-action pairs to a predefined instruction set, recovering the missing language modality and forming complete vision-language-action triplets. Beyond triplet construction, we also identify vision-language feature collapse as a critical challenge that has been largely overlooked in prior federated VLA research. To mitigate this issue, ForgeVLA combines a client-side contrastive planning loss with a server-side adaptive aggregation strategy to learn task-discriminative representations efficiently. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks show that ForgeVLA significantly outperforms other baselines, and ablation studies further validate the contribution of each component.

One Token Per Frame: Reconsidering Visual Bandwidth in World Models for VLA Policy

High 2605.07931
Zuojin Tang, Shengchao Yuan, Xiaoxin Bai, Zhiyuan Jin, De Ma, Gang Pan, Bin Liu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：将每帧视觉压缩为单 token，在冻结 VLA 骨干上以流匹配目标联合学习世界模型与动作策略，显著提升长程任务成功率。
🎯研究动机

现有世界模型增强的 VLA 通常以高视觉带宽传递每帧视觉流，并将世界模型展开视为动作预测的副产品，在冻结骨干的有限适配预算下，每帧表示与潜在动作耦合未得到充分研究。

❓解决问题

如何在冻结的 VLA 骨干上，以极低视觉带宽参数化世界模型，同时保持长程规划性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要发现，在提出的设置下，每帧视觉带宽可压缩至单个 token 而不损害长程性能。

🛠️主要方法

提出 OneWM-VLA，通过自适应注意力池化将每帧压缩为单个语义 token，并在单一流匹配目标下联合生成潜在流和动作轨迹，无需单独的解码器。

📊实验结果

在 MetaWorld MT50 上平均成功率从 47.9% 提升至 61.3%，在 LIBERO-Long 上达到 95.6%（基线 85.2%），在真实 Piper 臂的变形任务 Fold Cloth 上达到 60.0%（基线 20.0%）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 OneWM-VLA，将每帧视觉压缩为单 token，显著降低视觉带宽。
  • 在冻结 VLA 骨干上以流匹配目标联合学习世界模型与动作策略，提升长程任务成功率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定 VLA 骨干（如π0）。
  • 单 token 压缩可能丢失细粒度视觉信息，在需要精细感知的任务上可能受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vision-language-action (VLA) models increasingly rely on auxiliary world modules to plan over long horizons, yet how such modules should be parameterized on top of a pretrained VLA remains an open design question. Existing world-model-augmented VLAs typically pass the per-frame visual stream into the world module at high visual bandwidth and treat its rollout as a side product of action prediction; under a constrained adaptation budget on a frozen backbone, this leaves both the per-frame representation and the latent action coupling under-examined. We introduce OneWM-VLA, which compresses each view into a single semantic token per frame through an Adaptive Attention Pooling, and produces the resulting latent stream and the action trajectory under a single flow-matching objective rather than connecting them through a separate decoder. Empirically, we find that per-frame visual bandwidth can be reduced to a single token without compromising long-horizon performance under our setup. Trained with 14.71M LoRA parameters on a $\pi_0$ (2B) backbone, OneWM-VLA improves the average success rate from 47.9% to 61.3% on MetaWorld~MT50, reaches 95.6% on LIBERO-Long (vs.85.2% for $\pi_0$), and reaches 60.0% on the long-horizon deformable task Fold Cloth on a real Piper arm (vs.20.0% for $\pi_0$).

操作 (Manipulation) 3 篇

BioProVLA-Agent: An Affordable, Protocol-Driven, Vision-Enhanced VLA-Enabled Embodied Multi-Agent System with Closed-Loop-Capable Reasoning for Biological Laboratory Manipulation

High 2605.07306
Zhaohui Du, Zhe Wang, Hongmei Fei, Xiwen Cao, Ting Xiao, Qi Wang, Huanbo Jin, Jiaming Gu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出一个基于 VLA 的、协议驱动的、视觉增强的多智能体系统，用于低成本生物实验室自动化操作。
🎯研究动机

生物实验室自动化可以减少重复人工并提高可重复性，但湿实验室环境中的可靠具身执行仍面临挑战，如协议非结构化、器皿透明 / 反光、多步骤任务需要状态感知执行，现有系统依赖昂贵硬件或固定工作流。

❓解决问题

如何构建一个低成本、协议驱动、视觉增强的具身多智能体系统，以在湿实验室环境中可靠地执行生物操作任务。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 BioProVLA-Agent 系统，包含三个智能体：Tailored LLM Protocol Agent 将协议转换为可验证子任务；VLM-RAG Verification Agent 通过观察、机器人状态、检索知识和成功 / 失败示例评估准备和完成情况；VLA Embodied Agent 通过轻量级策略执行已验证的子任务。同时提出 AugSmolVLA 在线增强策略，针对透明器皿、反射、光照变化和过曝进行鲁棒性提升。

📊实验结果

在分层基准上评估，包括正常和高曝光设置，AugSmolVLA 在精确放置、透明物体操作、复合工作流和视觉退化场景下优于 ACT、X-VLA 和原始 SmolVLA。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出了一个低成本、协议驱动的 VLA 多智能体系统 BioProVLA-Agent，用于生物实验室操作。
  • 设计了 AugSmolVLA 在线增强策略，提升湿实验室视觉扰动下的执行稳定性。
  • 构建了包含 15 个原子任务、6 个复合工作流和 3 个双手任务的分层基准，验证了系统有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定协议格式，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • 系统在更复杂或长序列任务上的扩展性未提及。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Biological laboratory automation can reduce repetitive manual work and improve reproducibility, but reliable embodied execution in wet-lab environments remains challenging. Protocols are often unstructured, labware is frequently transparent or reflective, and multi-step procedures require state-aware execution beyond one-shot instruction following. Existing robotic systems often rely on costly hardware, fixed workflows, dedicated instruments, or robotics-oriented interfaces. Here, we introduce BioProVLA-Agent, an affordable, protocol-driven, vision-enhanced embodied multi-agent system enabled by Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for biological manipulation. The system uses protocols as the task interface and integrates protocol parsing, visual state verification, and embodied execution in a closed-loop workflow. A Tailored LLM Protocol Agent converts protocols into verifiable subtasks; a VLM-RAG Verification Agent assesses readiness and completion using observations, robot states, retrieved knowledge, and success/failure examples; and a VLA Embodied Agent executes verified subtasks through a lightweight policy. To improve robustness under wet-lab visual perturbations, we develop AugSmolVLA, an online augmentation strategy targeting transparent labware, reflections, illumination shifts, and overexposure. We evaluate the system on a hierarchical benchmark covering 15 atomic tasks, 6 composite workflows, and 3 bimanual tasks, including tube loading, sorting, waste disposal, cap twisting, and liquid pouring. Across normal and high-exposure settings, AugSmolVLA improves execution stability over ACT, X-VLA, and the original SmolVLA, especially for precise placement, transparent-object manipulation, composite workflows, and visually degraded scenes. These results suggest a practical route toward accessible, protocol-centered, and verification-capable embodied AI for biological manipulation.

Escaping the Diversity Trap in Robotic Manipulation via Anchor-Centric Adaptation

High 2605.07381
Yanzhe Chen, Kevin Yuchen Ma, Qi Lv, Yiqi Lin, Zechen Bai, Chen Gao, Mike Zheng Shou
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出锚点中心适应方法，通过重复演示核心锚点再选择性扩展覆盖，解决机器人操作中数据有限时的多样性陷阱问题。
🎯研究动机

机器人演示成本高，部署 VLA 模型到特定硬件需在严格数据预算下进行域适应，但标准的最大覆盖启发式方法因估计噪声而效果不佳。

❓解决问题

在有限数据预算下，如何避免多样性陷阱（即收集多样但单次演示导致策略误差非减）并优化策略性能。

🔎现象分析

识别出多样性陷阱：标准启发式方法最大化覆盖收集多样单次演示，但因非零估计噪声而自败；形式化为覆盖 - 密度权衡，存在唯一条件分配的最优内点。

🛠️主要方法

两阶段框架：首先在核心锚点通过重复演示稳定策略骨架，然后通过教师强制错误挖掘和约束残差更新选择性扩展到高风险边界。

📊实验结果

真实机器人实验验证了权衡框架，并显示 ACA 在相同预算下优于标准多样采样策略。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别并形式化机器人操作中的多样性陷阱，提出覆盖 - 密度权衡理论。
  • 提出锚点中心适应（ACA）方法，在固定预算下显著提升任务可靠性和成功率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖锚点选择的质量，未讨论自动锚点发现。
  • 实验仅在特定硬件和任务上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

While Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer broad general capabilities, deploying them on specific hardware requires real-world adaptation to bridge the embodiment gap. Since robot demonstrations are costly, this adaptation must often occur under a strict data budget. In this work, we identify a critical diversity trap: the standard heuristic of "maximizing coverage" by collecting diverse, single-shot demonstrations can be self-defeating due to non-vanishing estimation noise. We formalize this phenomenon as a Coverage--Density Trade-off. By decomposing the policy error into estimation (density) and extrapolation (coverage) terms, we characterize an interior optimal allocation of unique conditions for a fixed budget. Guided by this analysis, we propose Anchor-Centric Adaptation (ACA), a two-stage framework that first stabilizes a policy skeleton through repeated demonstrations at core anchors, then selectively expands coverage to high-risk boundaries via teacher-forced error mining and constrained residual updates. Real-robot experiments validate our trade-off framework and demonstrate that ACA significantly improves task reliability and success rates over standard diverse sampling strategies under the same budget.

Drifting Field Policy: A One-Step Generative Policy via Wasserstein Gradient Flow

High 2605.07727
Juil Koo, Mingue Park, Jiwon Choi, Yunhong Min, Minhyuk Sung
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出一种基于 Wasserstein 梯度流的非 ODE 一步生成式策略 DFP，在机器人操作任务上达到 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

现有基于 ODE 的生成式策略推理速度慢，且策略更新缺乏理论指导，需要一种高效且理论完备的一步生成式策略。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种非 ODE 的一步生成式策略，使其在保持高效推理的同时，通过理论驱动的更新机制提升性能。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将策略更新建模为反向 KL Wasserstein-2 梯度流，分解为向高动作值区域上升和与锚策略的分数匹配，并推导出基于 Top-K 评论家选择动作的行为克隆代理损失。

📊实验结果

在 Robomimic 和 OGBench 的多个操作任务上评估，DFP 达到 SOTA 性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 DFP，一种非 ODE 的一步生成式策略，基于 Wasserstein 梯度流进行策略更新。
  • 推导出可处理的代理损失函数，将策略更新转化为类似行为克隆的形式。
  • 在 Robomimic 和 OGBench 的多个操作任务上实现 SOTA 性能，优于基于 ODE 的策略。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖评论家选择 Top-K 动作的质量。
  • 非 ODE 参数化在特定任务上可能不如 ODE 灵活。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We propose Drifting Field Policy (DFP), a non-ODE one-step generative policy built on the drifting model paradigm. We frame the policy update as a reverse-KL Wasserstein-2 gradient flow toward a soft target policy, so that each DFP update corresponds to a gradient step in probability space. By construction, this gradient is decomposed into an ascent toward higher action-value regions and a score matching with the anchor policy as a trust region. We further derive a simple, tractable surrogate of the otherwise intractable update loss, akin to behavior cloning on top-K critic-selected actions. We find empirically that this mechanism uniquely benefits the drifting backbone owing to its non-ODE parameterization. With one-step inference, DFP achieves state-of-the-art performance on several manipulation tasks across Robomimic and OGBench, outperforming ODE-based policies.

GUI/Web/Mobile Agent 2 篇

Region4Web: Rethinking Observation Space Granularity for Web Agents

High 2605.07134
Donguk Kwon, Dongha Lee
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出区域级观察空间，通过功能区域重组 AXTree，提升 Web Agent 任务成功率并压缩观测长度。
🎯研究动机

现有 Web Agent 将观察空间与动作空间都设为元素级粒度，忽略了页面的功能组织，迫使智能体每一步都从元素级信号推断页面结构，效率低下且信息冗余。

❓解决问题

Web Agent 的观察空间粒度设计未被充分研究，元素级观察无法显式表达页面的功能区域，导致智能体需要额外推理成本。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Region4Web 框架，通过层次化分解和语义抽象将 AXTree 重组织为功能区域，并设计 PageDigest 推理管线，为智能体提供跨步骤持久的区域级页面摘要。

📊实验结果

在 WebArena 基准上，使用多种骨干 LLM 和已有智能体方法进行测试，PageDigest 在降低观测长度的同时提升了整体任务成功率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次系统研究 Web Agent 观察空间粒度问题，提出区域级观察空间概念。
  • 提出 Region4Web 框架和 PageDigest 管线，在 WebArena 上显著降低观测长度并提升任务成功率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于基于 AXTree 的网页环境，对动态或非结构化页面效果未知。
  • 区域划分的语义抽象可能依赖特定规则或模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Web agents perceive web pages through an observation space, yet its granularity has remained an underexamined design choice. Existing work treats observation at the same element-level granularity as the action space, leaving the page's functional organization implicit and forcing the agent to infer it from element-level signals at every step. We argue observation should instead operate at the granularity of functional regions, parts of the page that each serve a distinct purpose. We propose Region4Web, a framework that reorganizes the AXTree into functional regions through hierarchical decomposition and semantic abstraction, exposing the page's functional organization as the basis for page state understanding. Moreover, we propose PageDigest, a web-specific inference pipeline that delivers this region-level observation to the actor agent as a compact per-page digest that persists across steps. On the WebArena benchmark, PageDigest substantially reduces observation length while improving overall task success rate across diverse backbone large language models (LLMs) and established agent methods, regardless of backbone capacity. These results show that operating at the granularity of functional regions delivers a more compact and informative basis for the actor agent than element-level processing alone.

Weblica: Scalable and Reproducible Training Environments for Visual Web Agents

High 2605.06761
Oğuzhan Fatih Kar, Roman Bachmann, Yuanzheng Gong, Anders Boesen Lindbo Larsen, Afshin Dehghan
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 Weblica 框架，通过 HTTP 缓存和 LLM 合成构建可复现、可扩展的 Web 环境，用于训练视觉 Web Agent。
🎯研究动机

Web 环境复杂、开放且不断变化，现有训练数据收集方法（离线轨迹或少量模拟环境）无法覆盖 Web 多样性，限制了视觉 Web Agent 的扩展。

❓解决问题

如何构建大规模、可复现且多样化的 Web 训练环境，以支持视觉 Web Agent 的强化学习训练。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

Weblica 框架：1) HTTP 级缓存捕获和重放稳定视觉状态，同时保持交互行为；2) 基于 LLM 的环境合成，以真实网站和核心导航技能为基础。

📊实验结果

在多个 Web 导航基准上评估，Weblica-8B 优于同规模开源基线，使用更少推理步骤，测试时计算扩展性好，与 API 模型竞争。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Weblica 框架，实现可复现、可扩展的 Web 环境构建。
  • 通过数千个多样化环境进行 RL 训练，得到 Weblica-8B 模型，在多个 Web 导航基准上优于同规模开源模型，且与 API 模型竞争。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 LLM 合成质量，存在与真实环境的分布偏移。
  • HTTP 缓存可能无法完全模拟动态 Web 内容。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The web is complex, open-ended, and constantly changing, making it challenging to scale training data for visual web agents. Existing data collection attempts remain limited to offline trajectories for supervised fine-tuning or a handful of simulated environments for RL training, thus failing to capture web diversity. We propose Weblica (Web Replica), a framework for constructing reproducible and scalable web environments. Our framework leverages 1) HTTP-level caching to capture and replay stable visual states while preserving interactive behavior and 2) LLM-based environment synthesis grounded in real-world websites and core web navigation skills. Using this framework, we scale RL training to thousands of diverse environments and tasks. Our best model, Weblica-8B, outperforms open-weight baselines of similar size across multiple web navigation benchmarks while using fewer inference steps, scales favorably with additional test-time compute, and is competitive with API models.

导航 2 篇

See Tomorrow, Act Today: Foresight-Driven Autonomous Driving

High 2605.07195
Bozhou Zhang, Nan Song, Yuang Wang, Jiankang Deng, Xiatian Zhu, Li Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一种以未来场景想象为核心的自动驾驶规划框架，将规划从反应式转变为预期式。
🎯研究动机

当前端到端自动驾驶规划器本质上是反应式的，仅依赖历史和当前观测预测未来动作，缺乏人类驾驶员那种先想象再决策的能力。

❓解决问题

如何让自动驾驶代理在决策前主动想象未来场景，实现预期式而非反应式的规划。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

两阶段框架：1) 使用预训练世界模型生成合理的未来视觉场景；2) 基于这些想象未来进行动作规划。

📊实验结果

在 NAVSIM 和 nuScenes 数据集上进行实验，结果显示显式未来想象显著优于先前最先进方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出以世界模型为中心的预期式规划框架 ForeSight，将未来场景想象作为动作预测的主要驱动力。
  • 在 NAVSIM 和 nuScenes 上验证了显式未来想象显著优于现有方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖预训练世界模型的质量和泛化能力。
  • 可能面临计算开销和实时性挑战。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Current end-to-end autonomous driving planners are fundamentally reactive: they condition on historical and present observations to predict future actions. We argue that autonomous agents should instead imagine future scenes before deciding, just as human drivers mentally simulate ``what will happen next" before acting. We introduce ForeSight, a foundation world model centric planning framework that reframes autonomous driving as anticipatory decision-making. Rather than treating world models as auxiliary components, ForeSight makes future scene imagination the primary driver of action prediction. Our approach operates in two stages: (1) generating plausible future visual worlds via a pretrained world model, and (2) planning actions conditioned on these imagined futures. This paradigm shift from ``what should I do now?" to ``what will happen, and how should I respond?" enables genuinely anticipatory rather than reactive planning. By grounding decisions in anticipated contexts rather than present observations alone, ForeSight navigates dynamic, interactive scenarios more effectively. Extensive experiments on NAVSIM and nuScenes demonstrate that explicit future imagination significantly outperforms previous state-of-the-art alternatives, validating our foresight-driven approach.

MORPH-U: Multi-Objective Resilient Motion Planning for V2X-Enabled Autonomous Driving in High-Uncertainty Environments via Simulation

Medium 2605.07370
Shih-Yu Lai
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：提出 MORPH-U，一种融合 V2X 与多目标优化的鲁棒运动规划框架，通过拜占庭容错门控和 Pareto 前沿分析应对高不确定性自动驾驶场景。
🎯研究动机

V2X 通信在自动驾驶中引入不确定性（消息延迟、丢失或伪造），同时地图知识可能动态变化，现有方法难以在实时预算下鲁棒地处理这些事件驱动的更新。

❓解决问题

如何使自动驾驶的运动规划和底层控制对 V2X 带来的不确定性和动态地图变化具有鲁棒性。

🔎现象分析

V2X 增强的局部动态地图（LDM）可提升下游安全性；Pareto 调优提供可控的精度 - 舒适度权衡；拜占庭容错门控在饱和虚假 DENM 注入下仍能阻止不安全重规划。

🛠️主要方法

基于 CARLA 的闭环堆栈，融合 LiDAR/ 雷达 / 相机与 V2X（CAM/DENM）构建 LDM，触发 Hybrid-A*重规划；通过多目标优化（跟踪误差、安全裕度、响应性、平滑性）和 Pareto 前沿分析选择工作点；添加轻量级拜占庭容错门控（仲裁规则 + 车载传感器否决）避免错误触发。

📊实验结果

在动态 CARLA 场景中进行实验，验证了 V2X 增强 LDM 提升安全性、Pareto 调优提供可控权衡、门控在 p_attack=1.0 时阻止重规划。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MORPH-U，一个在 CARLA 中实现的闭环运动规划框架，融合 V2X 与多传感器构建 LDM。
  • 通过多目标优化和 Pareto 前沿分析显式量化规划 / 控制权衡。
  • 设计轻量级拜占庭容错门控，抵御 V2X 攻击导致的不安全重规划。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅在仿真环境中进行，未在真实车辆上验证。
  • 拜占庭门控可能对非攻击性但高延迟的 V2X 消息过于保守。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

V2X can warn an autonomous vehicle about hazards beyond line-of-sight, but it also brings uncertainty: messages may be delayed, dropped, or even forged. Meanwhile, map knowledge may change during a trip, forcing the vehicle to replan under tight real-time budgets. This paper studies how to make motion planning and low-level control robust to such uncertain, event-driven updates. We present MORPH-U, a CARLA-based closed-loop stack that fuses LiDAR/radar/camera with V2X (CAM/DENM) into a Local Dynamic Map (LDM) and triggers Hybrid-A* replanning when validated hazards or map changes affect the planned route. We expose the planning/control trade-offs via a multi-objective formulation over tracking error, safety margin (minimum TTC), responsiveness, and smoothness, and select operating points using Pareto-frontier analysis. To avoid unsafe replanning from faulty V2X triggers, MORPH-U adds a lightweight Byzantine-inspired acceptance gate that combines a quorum rule with an on-board sensor veto. Experiments in dynamic CARLA scenarios show that V2X-augmented LDM improves downstream safety, Pareto tuning provides controllable accuracy-comfort trade-offs, and the gate prevents replanning under saturated false-DENM injection ($p_{\text{attack}}=1.0$).

任务规划 1 篇

Alternating Target-Path Planning for Scalable Multi-Agent Coordination

Medium 2605.07744
Yu Kumagai, Keisuke Okumura
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出解耦目标分配与路径规划的迭代框架，利用 MAPF 反馈循环实现大规模多智能体协调。
🎯研究动机

现有 TAPF 方法依赖 CBS 紧密耦合目标分配与路径规划，计算密集且难以扩展，无法满足实际大规模应用需求。

❓解决问题

如何高效解耦目标分配与路径规划，实现可扩展的多智能体目标分配与路径规划。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出迭代优化框架，在时间预算内重复使用快速次优 MAPF 求解器（如 LaCAM）求解当前目标分配下的路径，通过 MAPF 反馈识别瓶颈智能体并重新分配目标。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出解耦目标分配与路径规划的迭代框架，突破 CBS 的扩展性瓶颈。
  • 利用 MAPF 反馈驱动目标重分配，在保持解质量的同时显著提升可扩展性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 MAPF 求解器的性能，瓶颈识别策略有待进一步优化。
  • 未讨论理论最优性保证，仅保证次优解。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The concurrent target assignment and pathfinding (TAPF) problem extends multi-agent pathfinding (MAPF) by asking planners to allocate distinct targets and collision-free paths to agents. Prior work on TAPF has relied exclusively on Conflict-Based Search (CBS), which tightly couples target assignment and pathfinding, resulting in compute-intensive, non-scalable solutions. In contrast, we propose an iterative refinement framework that decouples target assignment from pathfinding. Our framework builds on modern, fast, suboptimal MAPF solvers, such as LaCAM. Specifically, within a given time budget, it repeatedly solves MAPF for the current target assignment, identifies bottleneck agents via MAPF feedback, and refines the assignment. Empirical results show that feedback-driven reassignment loop is effective, enabling our framework to scale well beyond the reach of the state-of-the-art CBS-based solver while maintaining decent solution quality. This represents a solid step toward practical, large scale TAPF suitable for real-world setups.

仿真到现实 1 篇

TAVIS: A Benchmark for Egocentric Active Vision and Anticipatory Gaze in Imitation Learning

High 2605.07943
Giacomo Spigler
arXiv PDF cs.RO
TL;DR：TAVIS 是首个用于模仿学习中主动视觉与预期注视的标准化基准，包含双任务套件和量化指标。
🎯研究动机

主动视觉在模仿学习中显示出潜力，但缺乏统一基准来比较不同方法、量化其贡献及适用条件。

❓解决问题

缺少一个共享基准来评估主动视觉在模仿学习中的效果，以及量化预期注视行为。

🔎现象分析

主动视觉通常有帮助，但收益因任务而异；多任务策略在分布偏移下性能急剧下降；仅靠模仿学习即可产生预期注视行为，其中位领先时间与人类操作员相当。

🛠️主要方法

构建基于 IsaacLab 的 TAVIS 基准，包含 TAVIS-Head（5 个任务，全局搜索）和 TAVIS-Hands（3 个任务，局部遮挡）两个任务套件，提供配对头戴相机与固定相机协议、GALT 指标以及程序化 ID/OOD 划分。

📊实验结果

使用 Diffusion Policy 和 π0 进行基线实验，在 TAVIS-Head 和 TAVIS-Hands 套件上评估，并提供了代码、评估脚本、演示数据（约 2200 个片段）和训练好的基线模型。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个用于主动视觉模仿学习的标准化基准 TAVIS，包含两个任务套件和两种人形机器人平台。
  • 引入 GALT 指标，用于量化学习策略中的预期注视行为。
  • 通过基线实验揭示了主动视觉的任务条件性收益、分布偏移下的脆弱性以及预期注视的涌现特性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 基准任务数量有限，可能无法覆盖所有主动视觉场景。
  • 仅基于两种人形机器人平台，泛化性有待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Active vision -- where a policy controls its own gaze during manipulation -- has emerged as a key capability for imitation learning, with multiple independent systems demonstrating its benefits in the past year. Yet there is no shared benchmark to compare approaches or quantify what active vision contributes, on which task types, and under what conditions. We introduce TAVIS, evaluation infrastructure for active-vision imitation learning, with two complementary task suites -- TAVIS-Head (5 tasks, global search via pan/tilt necks) and TAVIS-Hands (3 tasks, local occlusion via wrist cameras) -- on two humanoid torso embodiments (GR1T2, Reachy2), built on IsaacLab. TAVIS provides three evaluation primitives: a paired headcam-vs-fixedcam protocol on identical demonstrations; GALT (Gaze-Action Lead Time), a novel metric grounded in cognitive science and HRI that quantifies anticipatory gaze in learned policies; and procedural ID/OOD splits. Baseline experiments with Diffusion Policy and $\pi_0$ reveal that (i) active-vision generally helps, but benefits are task-conditional rather than uniform; (ii) multi-task policies degrade sharply under controlled distribution shifts on both suites; and (iii) imitation alone yields anticipatory gaze, with median lead times comparable to the human teleoperator reference. Code, evaluation scripts, demonstrations (LeRobot v3.0; ~2200 episodes) and trained baselines are released at this https URL and this https URL .

强化学习 16 篇 · 5 个细分

应用型 RL 10 篇

Gradient Extrapolation-Based Policy Optimization

High 2605.06755
Ismam Nur Swapnil, Aranya Saha, Tanvir Ahmed Khan, Mohammad Ariful Haque, Ser-Nam Lim
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：GXPO 通过三次反向传播近似多步前瞻，提升 GRPO 风格强化学习的推理性能。
🎯研究动机

标准 GRPO 仅使用当前步更新，而多步前瞻虽能提供更好更新方向但计算成本过高，需要大量反向传播。

❓解决问题

如何在保持低计算成本的同时，近似多步前瞻的更新方向以提升策略优化效果。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

GXPO 在活跃阶段仅用三次反向传播：先执行两步快速优化，测量梯度变化，预测虚拟 K 步前瞻点，将策略部分移向该点，然后在新位置用真实梯度进行校正更新；当前瞻信号不稳定时自动回退到标准单步 GRPO。

📊实验结果

在 Qwen2.5 和 Llama 模型上进行数学推理实验，评估 pass@1 和加速比。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 GXPO，一种即插即用的策略更新规则，仅用三次反向传播近似多步前瞻。
  • 提供梯度下降替代分析，解释外推何时精确及局部误差来源。
  • 在 Qwen2.5 和 Llama 数学推理实验中，GXPO 在 pass@1 上比 GRPO 提升 +1.65 到 +5.00 点，比最强 SFPO 提升 +0.14 到 +1.28 点，并实现最高 4.00 倍步数加速、2.33 倍墙钟加速和 1.33 倍反向传播加速。
⚠️方法局限
  • 前瞻信号不稳定时需回退到标准 GRPO，可能限制收益。
  • 方法在非数学推理任务上的泛化性未在摘要中验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reinforcement learning is widely used to improve the reasoning ability of large language models, especially when answers can be automatically checked. Standard GRPO-style training updates the model using only the current step, while full multi-step lookahead can give a better update direction but is too expensive because it needs many backward passes. We propose Gradient Extrapolation-Based Policy Optimization (GXPO), a plug-compatible policy-update rule for GRPO-style reasoning RL.
