GXPO approximates a longer local lookahead using only three backward passes during an active phase. It reuses the same batch of rollouts, rewards, advantages, and GRPO loss, so it does not require new rollouts or reward computation at the lookahead points. GXPO takes two fast optimizer steps, measures how the gradients change, predicts a virtual K-step lookahead point, moves the policy partway toward that point, and then applies a corrective update using the true gradient at the new position. When the lookahead signal becomes unstable, GXPO automatically switches back to standard single-pass GRPO. We also give a plain-gradient-descent surrogate analysis that explains when the extrapolation is exact and where its local errors come from. Across Qwen2.5 and Llama math-reasoning experiments, GXPO improves the average sampled pass@1 by +1.65 to +5.00 points over GRPO and by +0.14 to +1.28 points over the strongest SFPO setting, while keeping the active-phase cost fixed at three backward passes. It also achieves up to 4.00x step speedup, 2.33x wall-clock speedup, and 1.33x backward-pass speedup in reaching GRPO's peak accuracy.

Stabilized neural Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman solvers: Error analysis and applications in model-based reinforcement learning

Medium 2605.07116
Minseok Kim, Yeongjong Kim, Namkyeong Cho, Yeoneung Kim
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出一种稳定的神经 HJB 求解器，用于连续时间基于模型的强化学习，并给出误差分析与实验验证。
🎯研究动机

连续时间最优反馈综合由 HJB 方程控制，但传统网格方法在高维下不可行，而纯 PINN 方法缺乏稳定性保证。现有混合方法（神经网络表示值函数 + 有限差分策略评估）缺乏严格的误差理论，限制了其可靠应用。

❓解决问题

为混合神经 HJB 求解器（神经网络值函数 + 有限差分策略评估 + 随机配点）建立完整的误差分析理论，并验证其在基于模型的强化学习中的有效性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将有限差分视为作用于神经网络的移位算子，证明单步策略评估的总体 L2 稳定性估计，分离残差误差、初始 / 边界不匹配、策略不匹配和模型辨识误差，并给出有限样本配点证书和条件多步传播结果。

📊实验结果

在紧凑控制 LQR（最高 64 维）、Allen-Cahn 控制、pendulum、Hopper 和 3D quadrotor 基准上进行了实验，与基于模型和无模型的 RL 基线对比，展示了残差、策略不匹配和学习模型误差趋势。

⭐主要贡献
  • 建立了混合神经 HJB 求解器的误差理论，包括稳定性估计和误差分解。
  • 在多个控制基准（LQR、Allen-Cahn、pendulum、Hopper、3D quadrotor）上验证了方法，并与代表性 RL 基线对比。
⚠️方法局限
  • 误差理论依赖于特定假设（如学习动力学梯度放大因子），可能不适用于所有场景。
  • 实验规模有限，未在更复杂的高维控制任务上验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Physics-informed neural solvers offer a promising route to model-based reinforcement learning in continuous time, where optimal feedback synthesis is governed by Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman (HJB) equations. Practical implementations often occupy a regime that is neither a classical grid method nor a continuous-PDE PINN: the value function is represented by a neural network, finite-difference HJB policy-evaluation operators are evaluated by network queries at shifted points, and residuals are minimized by random continuous collocation. This regime preserves the stabilized finite-difference policy-evaluation structure while avoiding grid-based value unknowns. We develop an error theory for this hybrid regime. Interpreting finite differences as shift operators acting on neural networks, we prove a population $L^2$ stability estimate for one policy-evaluation step with learned dynamics. The bound separates residual error, initial and exterior-collar mismatch, policy mismatch, and model-identification error, with an explicit gradient amplification factor for learned dynamics, while the underlying linear evaluation stability remains free of hidden inverse-viscosity blow-up. We further give a finite-sample collocation certificate and a conditional multi-step propagation result through greedy policy improvement. Experiments on compact-control LQR upto 64 dimensions, Allen--Cahn control, pendulum, Hopper, and 3D quadrotor benchmarks compare against representative model-based and model-free RL baselines, demonstrating the predicted residual, policy-mismatch, and learned-model error trends.

Repeated Deceptive Path Planning against Learnable Observer

Medium 2605.07174
Shiyue Cao, Pei Xu, Likun Yang, Lei Cui, Shizhao Yu, Shiyu Zhang, Yongjian Ren, Xiaotang Chen et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 DeMP 元学习框架，解决可学习观察者下的重复欺骗路径规划问题。
🎯研究动机

现有欺骗路径规划（DPP）假设观察者静态且不学习，但实际场景中对手可通过历史轨迹自适应，导致传统方法失效。

❓解决问题

在可学习观察者重复观察的场景下，如何规划路径以持续隐藏真实目的地。

🔎现象分析

现有 DPP 方法无法适应观察者模型更新；增量更新会导致累积滞后，降低欺骗效果。

🛠️主要方法

提出 DeMP，一种双层优化框架：内层进行回合级适应以应对当前观察者，外层进行元级更新以利用跨回合反馈加速未来适应。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到在多种环境中 DeMP 显著优于现有方法且路径成本有竞争力。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次形式化可学习观察者下的重复欺骗路径规划（RDPP）问题
  • 提出 DeMP 元学习框架，有效缓解适应滞后，实现持续欺骗
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖环境可重复性，对单次任务适应性未知
  • 元学习计算开销可能较大
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We study the problem of deceptive path planning (DPP), where an agent aims to conceal its true destination from external observers. While existing work assumes static, non-learning observers, real-world adversaries-such as in critical goods transportation or military operations-can adapt by learning from historical trajectories. To address this gap, we introduce Repeated Deceptive Path Planning (RDPP), a new formulation that explicitly models learnable observers. We show that existing DPP methods fail under this setting, as they cannot adapt to evolving adversarial predictions. While incorporating observer previous predictions into updates enables some adaptation, such incremental updates cause accumulative lag that degrades deception. To this end, we propose Deceptive Meta Planning (DeMP), a two-level optimization framework that combines episode-level adaptation, which enables short-term policy adjustment to counter updated observer, and meta-level updates, which leverage cross-episode feedback to capture how observers update their models and accelerate adaptation in future episodes. In this way, DeMP mitigates the accumulation of adaptation lag, enabling sustained deception against a learning observer. Experiments across environments demonstrate that DeMP significantly outperforms existing approaches in RDPP while maintaining competitive path cost. Our results highlight the importance of modeling repeated interactions with learnable adversaries, providing new insights into deception and privacy in multi-agent systems.

Predictive but Not Plannable: RC-aux for Latent World Models

Medium 2605.07278
Wenyuan Li, Guang Li, Keisuke Maeda, Takahiro Ogawa, Miki Haseyama
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 RC-aux 辅助目标，修正潜世界模型中预测与规划之间的时空不匹配问题。
🎯研究动机

潜世界模型在短时预测上可能准确，但潜空间与规划目标对齐不良，导致长时程目标导向搜索效果差。

❓解决问题

潜世界模型的潜空间存在时空不匹配：局部预测训练与长时程规划所需的可达性结构不一致。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出潜世界模型在短时预测准确时，潜空间中的欧氏距离可能不反映有限动作预算下的可达性，导致规划失败。

🛠️主要方法

提出 RC-aux 辅助目标，沿时间轴进行多步开环预测，沿空间轴进行预算条件可达性监督，并引入时间硬负样本。

📊实验结果

在目标条件像素控制任务和 LIBERO-Goal 扩展上评估，RC-aux 改进了 LeWM 风格的规划。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 RC-aux 辅助目标，在不改变世界模型主干的情况下修正潜空间与规划的对齐问题。
  • 在 LeWorldModel 上验证，在延续训练和从头训练设置下均提升规划性能，且额外成本适中。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅适用于无重建的潜世界模型，可能不适用于其他类型的世界模型。
  • 摘要未提供与其他方法的详细对比或大规模实验。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

A latent world model may achieve accurate short-horizon prediction while still inducing a latent space that is poorly aligned with planning. A key issue is spatiotemporal mismatch: these models are often trained with local predictive supervision, but deployed for long-horizon goal-directed search in latent spaces where Euclidean distance may not reflect what is reachable within a finite action budget. We present the Reachability-Correction auxiliary objective (RC-aux), a lightweight correction for this mismatch in reconstruction-free latent world models. RC-aux keeps the world-model backbone unchanged and adds planning-aligned supervision along two axes. Along the time axis, multi-horizon open-loop prediction trains the model beyond one-step consistency. Along the space axis, budget-conditioned reachability supervision, together with temporal hard negatives, encourages the latent space to distinguish states that are eventually reachable from those reachable within the current planning horizon. At test time, the learned reachability signal can also be used by a reachability-aware planner to favor trajectories that are both goal-directed and attainable under the available budget. We instantiate RC-aux on LeWorldModel and evaluate it under both continuation-training and matched-from-scratch settings. Across goal-conditioned pixel-control tasks and a LIBERO-Goal extension, RC-aux improves LeWM-style planning with modest additional cost. These results suggest that planning with latent world models depends not only on predictive accuracy, but also on whether the learned representation encodes the temporal and geometric structure required by downstream search. The code is available at this https URL .

SparseRL-Sync: Lossless Weight Synchronization with ~100x Less Communication

Medium 2605.07330
Lucas Hu, Ranchi Zhao, Isaac Zhu, Zach Zhang, Hscos Zhang, Hugh Yin, Jason Zhao
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：利用参数更新的高度稀疏性，提出无损稀疏同步方法，将 RL 训练 - 推理通信量降低约 100 倍。
🎯研究动机

在大规模强化学习系统中，Trainer 与 Rollout 之间的权重同步在带宽受限或网络波动场景下成为吞吐和延迟瓶颈，现有全量传输方式通信开销随模型规模急剧增长。

❓解决问题

如何在大模型 RL 训练中，在保持权重同步 100% 保真度的前提下，大幅降低跨节点通信量。

🔎现象分析

主流大模型 RL 训练中，参数实际变化的位置在元素级高度稀疏（通常 99% 以上稀疏度），为稀疏同步提供了基础。

🛠️主要方法

提出 SparseRL-Sync，用稀疏更新载荷（索引 + 值）替代全权重传输，在推理侧精确重建，结合分桶减少控制面开销。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 观察到 RL 训练中参数更新的高度稀疏性（99%+），并基于此设计无损稀疏同步方案
  • 实现 SparseRL-Sync，在保持 100% 保真度下将通信量降低约 100 倍，提升带宽受限和高度异步 RL 场景的可扩展性与效率
⚠️方法局限
  • 稀疏同步依赖于参数更新的高稀疏性，若模型更新密集则收益有限
  • 未讨论稀疏索引本身的编码开销及极端网络条件下的实际性能
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In large-scale reinforcement learning (RL) systems with decoupled Trainer-Rollout execution, the Trainer must regularly synchronize policy weights to the Rollout side to limit policy staleness. When inter-node bandwidth is abundant, such synchronization is usually only a small fraction of end-to-end cost. As model size grows, however, the communication demand rises rapidly. In bandwidth-constrained or network-variable deployments -- for example, cross-datacenter or cross-cluster settings, heterogeneous resource pools, and online RL -- weight synchronization can become a dominant bottleneck for throughput and tail latency. We observe that, in mainstream large-model RL training, the locations where parameters actually change are highly sparse at the element level (often 99%+ sparsity). Building on this observation, we propose and implement SparseRL-Sync, which replaces full-weight transfers with a lossless sparse update payload (indices and values) that can be exactly reconstructed on the inference side, thereby preserving 100% fidelity. Under a simplified cost model, sparse synchronization reduces the per-update communication volume from S to approximately S/X; with 99% sparsity (X ~ 100), this yields about a 100x reduction in transmitted data. Combined with appropriate bucketing, SparseRL-Sync also reduces launch and control-plane overhead, significantly improving scalability and end-to-end efficiency in bandwidth-limited and highly asynchronous RL settings.

Multi-Environment POMDPs with Finite-Horizon Objectives

Medium 2605.07537
Léonard Brice, Filip Cano, Krishnendu Chatterjee, Thomas A. Henzinger, Stefanie Muroya
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出多环境 POMDP 模型并证明有限时域目标下最优值计算仍为 PSPACE 完全，给出实用算法。
🎯研究动机

POMDP 中初始状态未知且由对手选择时，现有方法效率低，缺乏实用算法。

❓解决问题

计算多环境 POMDP 在有限时域目标下的最优值和策略。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出一种实用算法，可能基于动态规划或近似方法。

📊实验结果

在经典基准上评估，显著优于先前唯一算法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 证明 MEPOMDP 中有限时域目标的最优值计算为 PSPACE 完全。
  • 提出一种实用算法，在经典基准上显著优于先前唯一算法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于有限时域目标。
  • 算法复杂度可能仍较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) are systems in which one agent interacts with a stochastic environment, and receives only partial information about the current state. In a multi-environment POMDP (MEPOMDP), the initial state is unknown, and assumed to be adversarially chosen. In this work we focus on computing the optimal value and policy in MEPOMDPs with finite-horizon objectives. That problem is known to be PSPACE-complete in POMDPs. Our main results are as follows: (1) we establish that it is also PSPACE-complete in the more general setting of MEPOMDPs; (2) we present a practical algorithm and evaluate it on classical benchmarks, significantly outperforming the only previously known algorithm.

Learning to Communicate Locally for Large-Scale Multi-Agent Pathfinding

Medium 2605.07637
Valeriy Vyaltsev, Alsu Sagirova, Anton Andreychuk, Yuri Kuratov, Konstantin Yakovlev, Aleksandr Panov, Alexey Skrynnik
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出一种局部通信模块增强多智能体路径规划中的协作，在未见场景中优于现有学习方法且保持可扩展性。
🎯研究动机

多智能体路径规划（MAPF）在物流、搜救等实际应用中至关重要，但最优求解是 NP 难的，现有基于学习的分散式方法缺乏有效的智能体间协作机制。

❓解决问题

如何设计可学习的通信模块，在不牺牲可扩展性的前提下提升多智能体路径规划中的协作效率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 LC-MAPF，一个可泛化的预训练模型，通过多轮局部通信在相邻智能体间交换特征以改进协调。

📊实验结果

在多种未见测试场景中，LC-MAPF 在多个指标上优于现有基于学习和强化学习的 MAPF 求解器。

⭐主要贡献
  • 引入可学习的局部通信模块，增强多智能体路径规划中的协作。
  • LC-MAPF 在多种未见测试场景中优于现有基于学习和强化学习的方法，且不牺牲可扩展性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于同构智能体场景。
  • 通信机制在极端密集环境中可能仍存在瓶颈。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Multi-agent pathfinding (MAPF) is a widely used abstraction for multi-robot trajectory planning problems, where multiple homogeneous agents move simultaneously within a shared environment. Although solving MAPF optimally is NP-hard, scalable and efficient solvers are critical for real-world applications such as logistics and search-and-rescue. To this end, the research community has proposed various decentralized suboptimal MAPF solvers that leverage machine learning. Such methods frame MAPF (from a single agent perspective) as a Dec-POMDP where at each time step an agent has to decide an action based on the local observation and typically solve the problem via reinforcement learning or imitation learning. We follow the same approach but additionally introduce a learnable communication module tailored to enhance cooperation between agents via efficient feature sharing. We present the Local Communication for Multi-agent Pathfinding (LC-MAPF), a generalizable pre-trained model that applies multi-round communication between neighboring agents to exchange information and improve their coordination. Our experiments show that the introduced method outperforms the existing learning-based MAPF solvers, including IL and RL-based approaches, across diverse metrics in a diverse range of (unseen) test scenarios. Remarkably, the introduced communication mechanism does not compromise LC-MAPF's scalability, a common bottleneck for communication-based MAPF solvers.

Revisiting Adam for Streaming Reinforcement Learning

Medium 2605.06764
Florin Gogianu, Adrian Catalin Lutu, Razvan Pascanu
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：重新审视 Adam 在流式强化学习中的作用，发现目标函数导数有界和权重更新方差调整是稳定在线学习的关键，并据此提出 Adaptive Q(λ)算法。
🎯研究动机

流式强化学习无需存储经验，有望实现更简单高效的算法，但长期以来深度强化学习依赖经验回放或并行采样来稳定训练，限制了在线学习的应用。

❓解决问题

如何在不使用经验回放或并行采样的流式在线设置下，实现稳定且高效的深度强化学习。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

分析 Adam 优化器与在线更新的交互，提出两个关键性质：目标函数导数有界和权重更新方差调整；基于此设计方差调整的资格迹算法 Adaptive Q(λ)。

📊实验结果

在 55 个 Atari 游戏子集上进行实验，C51 与 StreamQ 竞争，Adaptive Q(λ)在所有性能指标上超越现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示目标函数导数有界和权重更新方差调整是流式强化学习鲁棒性能的必要条件。
  • 提出 Adaptive Q(λ)算法，在 55 个 Atari 游戏子集上超越现有方法，接近双倍人类基线。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅在 Atari 游戏上验证，泛化到其他领域需进一步研究。
  • Adaptive Q(λ)的方差调整机制可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Learning from a sequence of interactions, as soon as observations are perceived and acted upon, without explicitly storing them, holds the promise of simpler, more efficient and adaptive algorithms. For over a decade, however, deep reinforcement learning walked the contrary path, augmenting agents with replay buffers or parallel sampling routines, in an effort to tame learning instability. Recently, this topic has been revisited by Elsayed et al. (2024), focusing on update computation through eligibility traces and modifications to the optimisation routine, resulting in the StreamQ algorithm. In this work we take a step back, investigating the efficacy of established updates, such as those implemented by DQN and C51 within this online setting. Not only do we find that they perform well, but through analysing how the optimisation algorithm generally, and Adam in particular, interacts with these updates, we contend that two properties are essential for robust performance: i) the derivative of the objective is to be bounded and ii) weight updates are variance-adjusted. Rigorous and exhaustive experimentation demonstrates that C51, which exhibits both characteristics, is competitive with StreamQ across a subset of 55 Atari games. Using these insights, we derive a variance-adjusted algorithm based on eligibility traces, termed Adaptive Q$(\lambda)$, which approaches double the human baseline on the same subset, surpassing existing methods by all performance metrics.

Randomness is sometimes necessary for coordination

Medium 2605.06825
Rohan Patil, Jai Malegaonkar, Henrik I. Christensen
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：在对称多智能体系统中，引入结构化随机性（Diamond Attention）实现角色分化与协调，显著优于确定性策略。
🎯研究动机

标准参数共享策略在对称观测下无法区分角色，导致协调失败，而现有方法缺乏有效的对称破缺机制。

❓解决问题

解决同质智能体在置换对称观测下因确定性策略输出相同动作分布而无法实现角色分化的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，共享确定性策略在对称环境下无法区分角色，而随机性（如随机数排序）可打破对称性，且结构化随机性（而非随机噪声）是关键。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Diamond Attention，一种交叉注意力架构，每个智能体每步采样一个随机数，产生临时排序，屏蔽低排名智能体的注意力，实现单轮广播协调协议。

📊实验结果

在 XOR 游戏上达到 1.0 成功率（确定性基线约 0.5）；控制任务上 N=4 训练零样本泛化至 N∈[2,8]；SMACLite 跨场景零样本迁移成功，标准基线因结构限制失败。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Diamond Attention，利用随机数排序实现对称破缺，使同质智能体在对称观测下完成角色分化。
  • 在 XOR 游戏、控制协调任务和 SMACLite 跨场景迁移中实现零样本泛化，且结构化随机性优于标准 dropout。
⚠️方法局限
  • 随机数排序可能引入额外计算开销。
  • 方法依赖单轮广播，可能不适用于需要多轮通信的复杂场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Full parameter sharing is standard in cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) for homogeneous agents. Under permutation-symmetric observations, however, a shared deterministic policy outputs identical action distributions for every agent, making role differentiation impossible. This failure can theoretically be resolved using symmetry breaking among anonymous identical processors, which requires randomness. We propose Diamond Attention, a cross-attention architecture in which each agent samples a scalar random number per timestep, inducing a transient rank ordering that masks lower-ranked peers from agent-to-agent attention while leaving task attention fully unmasked. This realizes a random-bit coordination protocol in a single broadcast round, and the set-based attention enables zero-shot deployment to teams of different sizes. We evaluate across three regimes that isolate when structured randomness matters. On the perfectly symmetric XOR game, our method achieves $1.0$ success while all deterministic baselines plateau near $0.5$. On control coordination tasks, a policy trained on $N=4$ generalizes zero-shot to $N \in [2,8]$. On SMACLite cross-scenario transfer, we achieve zero-shot transfer where standard baselines cannot transfer due to structural limitations. Furthermore, replacing the structured mask with standard dropout-based randomness results in a 0\% win rate, confirming that protocol-space structure, not stochastic noise, is the operative ingredient. this https URL

AGWM: Affordance-Grounded World Models for Environments with Compositional Prerequisites

Medium 2605.06841
Qinshi Zhang (1), Weipeng Deng (2), Zhihan Jiang (3), Jiaming Qu (4), Qianren Li (5), Weitao Xu (5), Ray LC (5) ((1) University of California, San Diego et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出基于可执行性图结构的世界模型，解决动作前提条件变化导致的预测误差累积问题。
🎯研究动机

标准世界模型假设状态转移是平稳的，但在交互环境中动作的可执行性会动态变化（如前提条件满足后才可执行），导致多步预测误差累积。

❓解决问题

传统世界模型无法准确判断动作在当前状态下的可执行性，尤其在多步预测中因忽略动作前提条件而失败。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，当动作与结果频繁共现时，模型会将其内化为因果规则而忽略前提条件；结构改变事件（SC events）使动作可执行性动态变化，导致预测误差随规划步长累积。

🛠️主要方法

学习一个抽象的可执行性结构，表示为前提依赖关系的有向无环图（DAG），显式追踪动作的动态可执行性。

📊实验结果

在基于游戏的模拟环境中进行实验，验证了方法在多步预测误差、泛化到新配置和可解释性方面的有效性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AGWM 框架，通过可执行性图结构显式建模动作前提条件。
  • 在游戏模拟环境中实现更低的多步预测误差、更好的泛化性和可解释性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖环境可执行性结构的可观测性。
  • DAG 学习可能在大规模动作空间下扩展性有限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In model-based learning, the agent learns behaviors by simulating trajectories based on world model predictions. Standard world models typically learn a stationary transition function that maps states and actions to next states, when an action and an outcome frequently co-occur in training data, the model tends to internalize this correlation as a general causal rule while ignoring action preconditions. In interactive environments, however, agent actions can reshape the future affordance space. At each timestep, an action may becomes executable only after its prerequisites are met, or non-executable when they are destroyed. We term such events structure-changing events (SC events). As a result, a conventional world model often fails to determine whether a given action is executable in the current state, especially in multi-step predictions. Each imagined step is conditioned on an incorrect affordance state, and therefore the prediction error compounds over the rollout horizon. In this paper, we propose AGWM (Affordance-Grounded World Model), which learns an abstract affordance structure represented as a DAG of prerequisite dependencies to explicitly track the dynamic executability of actions. Experiments on game-based simulated environments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method by achieving lower multi-step prediction error, better generalization to novel configurations, and improved interpretability.

RL 理论 2 篇

Finite-Time Analysis of MCTS in Continuous POMDP Planning

Medium 2605.07703
Da Kong, Vadim Indelman
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：为连续 POMDP 中的 MCTS 提供有限时间分析，提出 Voro-POMCPOW 算法并给出理论保证。
🎯研究动机

MCTS 在 POMDP 中应用广泛，但缺乏严格的有限时间保证，现有分析受限于非平稳性和启发式动作选择带来的依赖问题。

❓解决问题

为离散和连续观测空间的 POMDP 中的 MCTS 提供有限时间收敛保证。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

在离散空间中扩展多项式探索奖励到 UCB；在连续空间中引入抽象划分框架，提出 Voro-POMCPOW，使用 Voronoi 单元自适应划分连续观测空间，保持有限分支因子。

📊实验结果

摘要提到实证验证 Voro-POMCPOW 具有竞争性能，但未提供具体实验细节。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次为离散观测 POMDP 中的 MCTS 提供多项式浓度界。
  • 提出 Voro-POMCPOW 算法，为连续观测 POMDP 提供有限时间保证，并实证验证其竞争性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论分析可能依赖于特定假设（如温和条件）。
  • Voronoi 划分在高维空间可能面临计算复杂度问题。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This paper presents a finite-time analysis for Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) in Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs), with probabilistic concentration bounds in both discrete and continuous observation spaces. While MCTS-style solvers such as POMCP achieve empirical success in many applications, rigorous finite-time guarantees remain an open problem due to the nonstationarity and the interdependencies induced by heuristic action selection (e.g., UCB). In the discrete setting, we address these challenges by extending the polynomial exploration bonus to UCB in POMDP setting, yielding polynomial concentration bounds for the empirical value estimation at the root node. For continuous observation spaces, we introduce an abstract partitioning framework and propose a finite-time bound on partitioning loss. Under mild conditions, we prove highprobability bound on value estimates in POMDPs with continuous observation space. Specifically, we propose Voro-POMCPOW, a variant of POMCPOW with f inite-time guarantees that adaptively partitions the continuous observation space using Voronoi cells. This approach maintains a finite branching factor while preserving the original observation generator. Empirical validation demonstrates that the proposed Voro-POMCPOW shows competitive performance while providing theoretical guarantees. Although our analysis focuses on continuous POMDPs, the techniques developed herein are also applicable to continuous MDPs, closing another gap on the MDP side.

Towards Differentially Private Reinforcement Learning with General Function Approximation

Medium 2605.07049
Yi He, Xingyu Zhou
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：首次为差分隐私在线强化学习在通用函数逼近下提供理论保证，遗憾界匹配线性情形。
🎯研究动机

现有差分隐私强化学习工作局限于表格和线性设定，缺乏对通用函数逼近的理论理解，限制了隐私保护 RL 在复杂环境中的应用。

❓解决问题

在通用函数逼近下，如何设计差分隐私在线强化学习算法并给出理论遗憾界。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

结合批量策略更新与指数机制，并引入新颖的遗憾分析。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次为通用函数逼近下的差分隐私在线 RL 提供理论保证，遗憾界为$\widetilde{O}(K^{3/5})$，匹配线性情形。
  • 建立了在线 RL 批量更新的首个基于覆盖性（coverability）复杂度的遗憾界，并揭示了线性函数逼近下私有 RL 的现有结果中的根本性差距。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论结果可能依赖于特定的复杂度度量（如覆盖性），实际应用中的计算效率未讨论。
  • 遗憾界可能不是最优，且未考虑更紧的下界。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present the first theoretical guarantees for differentially private online reinforcement learning (RL) with general function approximation, extending beyond prior work restricted to tabular and linear settings. Our approach combines a batched policy update scheme with the exponential mechanism, together with a novel regret analysis. We show that, even under general function approximation, the regret in the model-free setting under differential privacy matches the state of the art for the linear case, scaling as $\widetilde{O}(K^{3/5})$, where $K$ denotes the number of episodes. As an important by-product, we also establish the first regret bound for online RL with batch update that depends on the standard complexity measure of coverability, complementing existing results based on a newly introduced Eluder-Condition class. In addition, we uncover fundamental gaps in recent results for private RL with linear function approximation, thereby clarifying its landscape.

基于偏好/反馈的 RL 2 篇

$f$-Divergence Regularized RLHF: Two Tales of Sampling and Unified Analyses

High 2605.06977
Di Wu, Chengshuai Shi, Jing Yang, Cong Shen
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出统一理论框架分析 f- 散度正则化 RLHF，基于两种采样原则设计算法并证明对数遗憾界。
🎯研究动机

现有 RLHF 主要依赖反向 KL 正则化，但近期实验开始探索其他散度（如正向 KL、卡方），缺乏统一理论理解。

❓解决问题

缺乏对一般 f- 散度正则化 RLHF 的在线学习理论分析，包括算法设计与性能保证。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出两种算法：一种基于乐观原则设计探索奖励，另一种利用最优策略对奖励扰动的敏感性。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 建立了在线 RLHF 中一般 f- 散度正则化的统一理论框架。
  • 提出两种基于不同采样原则的算法，并证明 O(log T)遗憾界和 O(1/T)次优性差距。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论分析可能依赖特定假设，实际部署需验证。
  • 未讨论计算效率或大规模实现细节。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) has become a cornerstone technique for post-training large language models. While most existing approaches rely on the reverse KL-regularization, recent empirical studies have begun exploring alternative divergences (e.g., forward KL, chi-squared) as regularizers in RLHF. However, a unified theoretical understanding of general $f$-divergence regularization remains under-explored. To fill this gap, this work develops a comprehensive theoretical framework for online RLHF with a general $f$-divergence regularized objective. Rather than treating each possible divergence function individually, we adopt a holistic perspective across the entire function class and propose two algorithms based on distinct sampling principles. The first extends the classical optimism principle with a carefully designed exploration bonus, while the second introduces a new method that exploits the sensitivity of the optimal policy to reward perturbations under $f$-divergence regularization. Theoretical analysis shows that $O(\log T)$ regret and $O(1/T)$ sub-optimality gap are achievable, establishing provable efficiency of both algorithms and, to the best of our knowledge, the first performance bounds for online RLHF under general $f$-divergence regularization.

Multi-Objective Constraint Inference using Inverse reinforcement learning

Medium 2605.06951
Syed Ihtesham Hussain Shah, Floris den Hengst, Aneta Lisowska, Annette ten Teije
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 MOCI 框架，从异构专家轨迹中联合推断共享约束和个体偏好。
🎯研究动机

现有约束推断方法通常假设同质演示，无法捕捉个体偏好且计算效率低，难以应用于多目标异构场景。

❓解决问题

如何从多个具有不同目标的专家轨迹中同时提取共享约束和个体偏好。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Multi-Objective Constraint Inference (MOCI)框架，利用逆强化学习从异构专家轨迹中联合学习共享约束和个体偏好。

📊实验结果

在标准网格世界基准上进行实验，MOCI 在预测性能和计算效率上优于现有基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MOCI 框架，能够处理异构专家轨迹并同时推断共享约束和个体偏好。
  • 在标准网格世界基准上显著优于现有基线，预测性能提升且保持计算效率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅在简单网格世界环境中验证，复杂现实场景效果未知。
  • 未讨论对专家轨迹数量或质量的敏感性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Constraint inference is widely considered essential to align reinforcement learning agents with safety boundaries and operational guidelines by observing expert demonstrations. However, existing approaches typically assume homogeneous demonstrations (i.e., generated by a single expert or multiple experts with identical objectives). They also have limited ability to capture individual preferences and often suffer from computational inefficiencies. In this paper, we introduce Multi-Objective Constraint Inference (MOCI), a novel framework designed to jointly extract shared constraints and individual preferences from heterogeneous expert trajectories, where multiple experts pursue different objectives. MOCI effectively models and learns from diverse, and potentially conflicting, behaviors. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that MOCI significantly outperforms existing baselines, achieving improved predictive performance, and maintaining competitive computational efficiency on a standard grid-world benchmark. These results establish MOCI as an accurate, flexible, and computationally practical approach for real-world constraint inference and preference learning tasks.

探索与奖励设计 1 篇

Model-Driven Policy Optimization in Differentiable Simulators via Stochastic Exploration

Medium 2605.07520
Yuval Aroosh, Ayal Taitler
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：MDPO 通过在可微模拟器中引入自适应随机探索，显著提升了非线性混合离散 - 连续域的策略优化质量。
🎯研究动机

可微规划利用系统动力学的可微模型进行梯度优化，但在高度非线性和混合离散 - 连续域中，优化景观往往病态，存在平坦区域和尖锐过渡，阻碍有效优化。

❓解决问题

解决可微规划在非线性混合离散 - 连续域中因优化景观病态而难以找到高质量解的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出模型驱动策略优化（MDPO），在可微规划中向动作空间注入噪声以引入随机探索，并利用模型梯度信息自适应调整噪声幅度，形成时间依赖的探索轮廓，从而改善目标景观的探索并帮助逃离局部最优。

📊实验结果

在基准域上实验，MDPO 一致优于确定性可微规划（包括无噪声变体和现有最优实现）以及无模型基线（如 PPO），在挑战性非线性和混合设置中显著提升解质量。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MDPO 框架，将随机探索引入可微规划，并基于梯度敏感性自适应调整噪声幅度。
  • 在基准域上实验证明 MDPO 优于确定性可微规划和无模型基线（如 PPO），显著提升解质量。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖精确的模型梯度，模型误差可能影响性能。
  • 自适应噪声机制可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Differentiable planning enables gradient-based optimization of decision-making problems by leveraging differentiable models of system dynamics. However, in highly nonlinear and hybrid discrete-continuous domains, the resulting optimization landscapes are often ill-conditioned, with flat regions and sharp transitions that hinder effective optimization. We propose Model-Driven Policy Optimization (MDPO), a framework that introduces stochastic exploration into differentiable planning by injecting noise into the action space during optimization. Leveraging access to the model, MDPO further adapts the noise magnitude based on gradient-derived sensitivity of the trajectory objective, yielding a time-dependent exploration profile. This enables improved exploration of the objective landscape and helps escape poor local optima via dynamic allocation of exploration across timesteps and iterations. Experiments on benchmark domains demonstrate that MDPO consistently outperforms deterministic differentiable planning, including both the noise-free variant of our method and available state-of-the-art implementations, as well as model-free baselines such as PPO, significantly improving solution quality across challenging nonlinear and hybrid settings. We further analyze the evolution of the adaptive noise magnitude across both time steps and optimization iterations, providing insight into how exploration is allocated during learning.

离线 RL 1 篇

Offline Policy Optimization with Posterior Sampling

Medium 2605.07393
Hongqiang Lin, Dongxu Zhang, Yiding Sun, Mingzhe Li, Ning Yang, Haijun Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出基于后验采样的离线策略优化方法，在模型泛化与鲁棒性之间取得更好平衡。
🎯研究动机

离线强化学习中，模型基方法面临泛化与鲁棒性的权衡：过度悲观正则化虽能避免模型利用，但牺牲了泛化能力。

❓解决问题

如何在离线强化学习中同时利用分布外样本的泛化潜力并防止模型利用错误。

🔎现象分析

分布外样本可能包含有效的物理动态，但也存在模型利用风险；现有方法通过过度悲观正则化牺牲泛化。

🛠️主要方法

将动力学建模视为贝叶斯推断过程，得到量化模型保真度的后验；结合后验采样与约束策略优化，利用动力学一致的分布外转换进行泛化，同时确保鲁棒性。

📊实验结果

在标准基准上，PSPO 优于最先进的基线方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 PSPO 框架，通过后验采样量化模型不确定性，平衡泛化与鲁棒性。
  • 理论证明 Q 值估计的收敛性，并证明策略优化子问题的单调改进。
⚠️方法局限
  • 后验采样可能增加计算开销。
  • 对先验假设的敏感性未充分讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

A fundamental challenge in model-based offline reinforcement learning (RL) lies in the trade-off between generalization and robustness against exploitation errors in out-of-distribution (OOD) regions. While OOD samples may capture valid underlying physical dynamics, they also introduce the risk of model exploitation. Existing methods typically address this risk through excessive pessimistic regularization, which ensures robustness but often sacrifices generalization. To overcome this limitation, we propose Posterior Sampling-based Policy Optimization (PSPO), which formulates dynamics modeling as a Bayesian inference process to derive a posterior that explicitly quantifies model fidelity. Through the integration of posterior sampling and constrained policy optimization, our method leverages dynamics-consistent OOD transitions for generalization while ensuring robustness against model exploitation. Theoretically, we formulate Q-value estimation under posterior sampling as a stochastic approximation problem and establish its convergence. We decompose policy optimization into a sequence of constrained subproblems, demonstrating that solving these subproblems guarantees monotonic improvement until convergence. Experiments on standard benchmarks validate that PSPO achieves superior performance compared to state-of-the-art baselines.

可解释 AI 9 篇 · 3 个细分

机制可解释性 7 篇

Position: Mechanistic Interpretability Must Disclose Identification Assumptions for Causal Claims

High 2605.08012
Zezheng Lin, Fengming Liu
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：机械可解释性论文需明确披露因果识别假设，否则验证指标不能替代因果识别。
🎯研究动机

机械可解释性领域越来越多地使用因果词汇（如电路、中介、因果抽象），但因果声明需要明确的识别假设，而当前论文普遍缺乏这一披露，导致因果结论可能不可靠。

❓解决问题

机械可解释性论文在做出因果声明时，未明确披露识别假设，且常将验证指标（如忠实度、完整性）误作因果支持。

🔎现象分析

对 10 篇论文的审计发现：没有专门的识别假设部分，验证指标被报告为因果支持而未说明使其具有识别性的假设；对 30 篇论文的双人编码验证了主要发现方向。

🛠️主要方法

提出披露规范：声明是否因果、命名识别策略、列举假设、强调至少一个假设、解释假设失败时结论如何变化。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 通过审计揭示机械可解释性论文中因果识别假设缺失的普遍问题
  • 提出因果声明披露规范以提升领域严谨性
⚠️方法局限
  • 审计样本有限（10 篇和 30 篇），可能不全面
  • 编码规则敏感性可能导致计数差异
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Mechanistic interpretability papers increasingly use causal vocabulary: circuits, mediators, causal abstraction, monosemanticity. Such claims require explicit identification assumptions. A purposive audit of 10 papers across four methodological strands finds no dedicated identification-assumptions section and a recurring pattern: validation metrics such as faithfulness, completeness, monosemanticity, alignment, or ablation effects are reported as causal support without stating the assumptions that make them identifying. A two-human-coder audit on $n=30$ reproduces the direction of the main finding: dedicated identification sections are absent, and validation-metric substitution is common, though exact Dim B/D counts are coding-rule sensitive. The paper proposes a disclosure norm: state whether the claim is causal, name the identification strategy, enumerate assumptions, stress at least one, and explain how conclusions shift if assumptions fail. Validation is not identification.

Beyond the Black Box: Interpretability of Agentic AI Tool Use

High 2605.06890
Hariom Tatsat, Ariye Shater
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出基于稀疏自编码器和线性探针的机制可解释性工具，用于诊断 AI 智能体工具调用失败。
🎯研究动机

AI 智能体在企业工作流中工具调用失败难以诊断和控制，现有外部观测方法（提示、评估、日志）无法提供内部可见性，尤其在长周期任务中早期错误会级联放大成本和安全风险。

❓解决问题

如何通过内部模型状态分析，在工具调用前预测是否需要工具以及调用后果的严重性，从而诊断智能体工具使用失败的根本原因。

🔎现象分析

智能体可能跳过必要工具调用、不必要地调用工具或执行后果不可见的操作；早期工具错误会改变后续轨迹、增加 token 消耗并带来安全风险。

🛠️主要方法

基于稀疏自编码器（SAE）和线性探针的机制可解释性工具：在每次动作前读取模型状态，推断是否需要工具及工具调用的后果严重性；通过特征消融测试特征的功能重要性。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种基于 SAE 和线性探针的框架，用于内部观测智能体工具调用决策。
  • 在 NVIDIA Nemotron 函数调用数据集上训练探针，并应用于 GPT-OSS 20B 和 Gemma 3 27B 模型，展示了跨模型的可迁移性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定函数调用数据集和有限模型规模。
  • 特征消融的因果性验证可能受限于模型架构差异。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

AI agents are promising for high-stakes enterprise workflows, but dependable deployment remains limited because tool-use failures are difficult to diagnose and control. Agents may skip required tool calls, invoke tools unnecessarily, or take actions whose consequence becomes visible only after execution. Existing observability methods are mostly external: prompts reveal correlations, evaluations score outputs, and logs arrive only after the model has already acted. In long-horizon settings, these failures are especially costly because an early tool mistake can alter the rest of the trajectory, increase token consumption, and create downstream safety and security risk. We introduce a mechanistic-interpretability toolkit built on Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) and linear probes. The framework reads model states before each action and infers both whether a tool is needed and how consequential the next tool action is likely to be. By decomposing activations into sparse features, it identifies the internal layers and features most associated with tool decisions and tests their functional importance through feature ablation. We train the probes on multi-step trajectories from the NVIDIA Nemotron function-calling dataset and apply the same workflow to GPT-OSS 20B and Gemma 3 27B models. The goal is not to replace external evaluation, but to add a missing layer: visibility into what the model signaled internally before action. This helps surface deeper causes of agent failure, especially in long-horizon runs where an early mistake can reshape the rest of the agentic interaction. More broadly, the paper shows how mechanistic interpretability can support practical internal observability for monitoring tool calls and risk in agent systems.

Understanding Performance Collapse in Layer-Pruned Large Language Models via Decision Representation Transitions

Medium 2605.07271
Boyu Shi, Chang Liu, ChuanBao Gao, Xu Yang, Xin Geng
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：层剪枝导致 LLM 性能崩溃的根源在于破坏了决策表征从静默阶段到决策阶段的转变。
🎯研究动机

层剪枝能高效降低 LLM 计算成本，但常引发突然的性能崩溃，现有基于表征的分析难以解释其机制，亟需新的理论视角。

❓解决问题

解释层剪枝导致 LLM 性能突然崩溃的根本原因。

🔎现象分析

发现网络存在一个尖锐的决策转变，将网络分为静默阶段（无法预测正确答案）和决策阶段（正确预测出现）；剪枝决策阶段影响小，而剪枝静默阶段立即引发性能崩溃。

🛠️主要方法

提出决策裕度和选项频率两个指标，以及迭代剪枝方法，分析逐层决策动态。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出决策表征视角分析层剪枝对 LLM 的影响，引入决策裕度和选项频率指标。
  • 发现静默阶段对结构变化极度敏感，剪枝该阶段会阻止关键决策转变，导致性能崩溃。
⚠️方法局限
  • 分析仅针对多项选择任务，可能不适用于生成式任务。
  • 未探讨不同剪枝策略下的泛化性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Layer pruning efficiently reduces Large Language Model (LLM) computational costs but often triggers sudden performance collapse. Existing representation-based analyses struggle to explain this mechanism. We propose studying pruning through decision representation. Focusing on multiple-choice tasks, we introduce two metrics, Decision Margin and Option Frequency, and an Iterative Pruning method to analyze layer-wise decision dynamics. Our findings reveal a sharp decision transition that partitions the network into two stages: a Silent Phase, where the model cannot yet predict the correct answer, and a Decisive Phase, where the correct prediction emerges. We also find that pruning the Decisive Phase has minimal impact, whereas pruning the Silent Phase triggers immediate performance collapse, highlighting its extreme sensitivity to structural changes. Therefore, we conclude that pruning-induced collapse stems from disrupting the Silent Phase, which prevents the critical decision transition from occurring.

Inference Time Causal Probing in LLMs

Medium 2605.07631
Sadegh Khorasani, Saber Salehkaleybar, Negar Kiyavash, Matthias Grossglauser
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出无探针的因果干预方法 HDMI，利用模型原生输出直接调控隐藏状态，在因果探测任务中取得更高可靠性。
🎯研究动机

现有因果探测方法依赖辅助探针分类器定义干预，这会导致方法绑定于特定任务或模型，且可能与模型的预测几何不一致，限制了通用性和准确性。

❓解决问题

如何在不使用探针分类器的情况下，对 LLM 内部表征进行因果干预，以可靠地测试和控制模型行为。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Hidden-state Driven Margin Intervention (HDMI)，一种无探针、基于梯度的技术，利用模型原生输出（margin 目标）直接调控隐藏状态，增加目标延续概率并降低源概率；还提出 lookahead 变体 LA-HDMI 用于文本编辑，通过 softmax 嵌入反向传播修改当前隐藏状态。

📊实验结果

在 LGD agreement corpus 和 CausalGym 基准上，使用 Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct 和 Pythia-70M 模型，HDMI 在可靠性上一致优于先前方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 HDMI，一种无探针的因果干预方法，避免与特定任务或模型绑定。
  • 引入 LA-HDMI 变体，支持文本编辑场景下的流畅性保持。
  • 定义 completeness 和 selectivity 指标及其调和均值作为干预可靠性度量。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对梯度计算敏感，需要额外计算开销。
  • lookahead 变体可能受限于 softmax 嵌入的维度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Causal probing methods aim to test and control how internal representations influence the behavior of generative models. In causal probing, an intervention modifies hidden states so that a property takes on a different value. Most existing approaches define such interventions by training an auxiliary probe classifier, which ties the method to a specific task or model and risks misalignment with the model's predictive geometry. We propose Hidden-state Driven Margin Intervention (HDMI), a probe-free, gradient-based technique that directly steers hidden states using the model's native output. HDMI applies a margin objective that increases the probability of a target continuation while decreasing that of the source, without relying on probe classifiers. We further introduce a lookahead variant (LA-HDMI) for text editing that backpropagates through the softmax embeddings, modifying the current hidden state so that the likelihood of user-specified tokens increases in next token generations while preserving fluency. To evaluate interventions, we measure completeness (whether the targeted property changes as intended) and selectivity (whether unrelated properties are preserved), and report their harmonic mean as an overall measure of reliability. HDMI consistently achieves higher reliability than prior methods on the LGD agreement corpus and the CausalGym benchmark, across Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct, and Pythia-70M.

Where's the Plan? Locating Latent Planning in Language Models with Lightweight Mechanistic Interventions

Medium 2605.07984
Nicole Ma, Nick Rui
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：通过轻量级机制干预，发现语言模型在生成押韵对句时存在潜在规划，但仅 Gemma-3-27B 因果依赖该编码。
🎯研究动机

理解语言模型是否在生成过程中形成面向未来的内部规划，以及这些规划是否因果驱动生成，对于揭示模型工作机制和提升可控性至关重要。

❓解决问题

语言模型在生成结构约束的未来 token 时，其内部表示是否形成以及是否因果驱动生成。

🔎现象分析

线性探针显示未来押韵信息在行边界可线性解码，且信号随模型规模增强；但激活修补表明仅 Gemma-3-27B 因果依赖该编码，其他模型在行边界因果效应接近零。

🛠️主要方法

结合线性探针和激活修补两种轻量级方法，在押韵对句完成任务上分析模型内部规划。

📊实验结果

在 Qwen3、Gemma-3 和 Llama-3 三个系列超过十个规模的模型上进行实验，使用押韵对句完成作为测试任务。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现未来押韵信息在语言模型行边界可线性解码，且信号随规模增强。
  • 揭示仅 Gemma-3-27B 因果依赖该编码，并定位到五个注意力头的交接机制。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对押韵对句这一特定任务，泛化性有待验证。
  • 方法仅适用于轻量级干预，可能无法捕捉更复杂的规划机制。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We study planning site formation in language models -- where internal representations of structurally-constrained future tokens form during the forward pass, and whether they causally drive generation. Using rhyming-couplet completion as a clean test of forward-looking constraint, we apply two lightweight methods (linear probing and activation patching) across Qwen3, Gemma-3, and Llama-3 at more than ten scales. Probing shows that future-rhyme information is linearly decodable at the line boundary, with signal that strengthens with scale in all three families. Activation patching reveals that only Gemma-3-27B causally relies on this encoding, exhibiting a handoff in which the causal driver migrates from the rhyme word to the line boundary around layer 30. Every other model we test conditions on the rhyme word throughout generation, with near-zero causal effect at the line boundary despite strong probe signal. We localize the Gemma-3-27B handoff to five attention heads through two-stage path patching that recover ~90% of the rhyme-routing capacity at the newline.

When Does a Language Model Commit? A Finite-Answer Theory of Pre-Verbalization Commitment

Medium 2605.06723
Long Zhang, Wei-neng Chen, Feng-feng Wei, Zi-bo Qin
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出有限答案偏好稳定化理论，通过投影续生概率到有限答案集来检测语言模型何时形成答案偏好。
🎯研究动机

语言模型在给出最终答案前常生成推理过程，但可见答案无法揭示模型何时稳定了答案偏好。理解这一时间点对模型行为分析和可解释性至关重要。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖贪婪解码或学习探针的情况下，精确检测语言模型在生成过程中何时对有限答案集形成稳定偏好。

🔎现象分析

在延迟裁决任务中，有限答案投影在答案可解析之前就已稳定，平均领先 17-31 个 token；该信号追踪模型最终输出而非事实，可从紧凑隐藏状态中线性恢复，部分独立于光标进度，并作为共享信息传递。

🛠️主要方法

定义有限答案偏好稳定化，通过将模型续生概率投影到有限答案集（如二元任务中的 log-odds 编码δ(ξ)）来定义解析器答案起始点、回顾性稳定时间和领先量。

📊实验结果

在受控延迟裁决任务中使用 Qwen3-4B-Instruct，报告了平均领先 17-31 token，以及正领先的解析器干净复制实验。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出有限答案偏好稳定化的形式化定义和计算方法，无需贪婪解码或学习探针。
  • 在 Qwen3-4B-Instruct 上实验验证了偏好稳定早于答案可解析，并分析了信号特性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对有限答案集（如二元任务），扩展性有限。
  • 精确答案控制（steering）显示局部敏感性但不可靠，实际应用受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Language models often generate reasoning before giving a final answer, but the visible answer does not reveal when the model's answer preference became stable. We study this question through a narrow computable object: \emph{finite-answer preference stabilization}. For a model state and specified answer verbalizers, we project the model's own continuation probabilities onto a finite answer set; in binary tasks this yields an exact log-odds code, $\delta(\xi)=S_\theta(\mathrm{yes}\mid\xi)-S_\theta(\mathrm{no}\mid\xi)$. This target defines parser-based answer onset, retrospective stabilization time, and lead without relying on greedy rollouts or learned probes. In controlled delayed-verdict tasks with Qwen3-4B-Instruct, the contextual finite-answer projection stabilizes before the answer is parseable, with 17--31 token mean lead in the main templates and positive, shorter lead in a parser-clean replication. The signal tracks the model's eventual output rather than truth, is linearly recoverable from compact hidden summaries, is partly separable from cursor progress, and transfers as shared information without a single invariant coordinate. Diagnostics separate the measurement from online stopping, verbalizer-free belief, and causal answer control; exact steering shows local sensitivity of $\delta$ but not reliable generation control.

PLOT: Progressive Localization via Optimal Transport in Neural Causal Abstraction

Medium 2605.06979
Jonathn Chang, Arya Datla, Ziv Goldfeld
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出基于最优传输的渐进定位框架 PLOT，高效定位神经因果抽象中的干预位点。
🎯研究动机

因果抽象为机制可解释性提供原则性框架，但现有方法如分布式对齐搜索（DAS）需要计算昂贵的候选位点搜索，限制了在大规模模型上的应用。

❓解决问题

如何高效定位神经网络中与高层因果模型对齐的干预位点，避免穷举搜索。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

PLOT 通过最优传输拟合抽象变量与候选神经位点之间的耦合，从输出效应几何中定位因果变量；在大型模型中渐进应用，从粗粒度位点（如 token、时间步、层）到细粒度支持（如坐标组、PCA 跨度），并可引导 DAS。

📊实验结果

在多个复杂度递增的实验上，仅使用传输的 PLOT 位点速度快且准确度有竞争力，PLOT 引导的 DAS 达到 DAS 级准确度但运行时间仅为完整 DAS 的一小部分。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于最优传输的渐进定位框架 PLOT，无需搜索即可获得全局软对应关系。
  • 在简单设置中单耦合即可定位单个神经元，在大型模型中渐进定位并引导 DAS，显著降低计算开销。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖于抽象变量与神经位点之间的输出效应几何假设。
  • 渐进定位策略在极端复杂模型中的扩展性有待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Causal abstraction offers a principled framework for mechanistic interpretability, aligning a high-level causal model with the low-level computation realized by a neural network through counterfactual intervention analysis. Existing methods such as distributed alignment search (DAS) learn expressive subspace interventions, but the relevant neural site is unknown a priori, so finding a handle requires a computationally burdensome search over candidate sites. We introduce PLOT (Progressive Localization via Optimal Transport), a transport-based framework that localizes causal variables from the output effect geometry of abstract and neural interventions. PLOT fits an optimal transport coupling between abstract variables and candidate neural sites, yielding a global soft correspondence that can be calibrated into intervention handles. In simple settings, a single coupling over individual neurons suffices. In larger models, PLOT is applied progressively, moving from coarse sites such as tokens, timesteps, or layers to finer supports such as coordinate groups or PCA spans, and optionally guiding DAS based on the localized signal. Across experiments of increasing complexity, transport-only PLOT handles are exceedingly fast and competitive on accuracy, while PLOT-guided DAS reaches DAS-level accuracy at a fraction of full DAS runtime, providing an efficient localization engine for causal abstraction research at scale.

其他 1 篇

A Generalized Singular Value Theory for Neural Networks

Medium 2605.06938
Brian Charles Brown, Robert Bridges, David Grimsman, Mauricio Munoz, Sean Warnick
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：证明现代神经网络存在广义 SVD 表示，使非线性部分可左逆且保范，并用于对抗扰动检测。
🎯研究动机

神经网络的可解释性和鲁棒性分析需要理解其内部表示，但现有方法缺乏统一的几何框架来刻画输入 - 特征空间的对应关系。

❓解决问题

如何为现代神经网络建立一种广义奇异值分解表示，使其在最终线性层之前左可逆且保范，从而校准输入空间与特征空间的距离。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于 Brown 等[2025]的抽象 GSVD 理论，证明大多数现代架构存在广义 SVD 表示，并提出数据驱动算法从训练模型中估计该表示，同时设计自然促进分解的模型架构。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 证明现代神经网络在最终线性层前存在左可逆且保范的广义 SVD 表示。
  • 提出数据驱动算法估计该表示，并设计便于分解的架构。
  • 概念验证该表示可用于识别对抗扰动，并奠定未来在模型偏差和可逆性等应用的理论基础。
⚠️方法局限
  • 算法可能依赖模型架构，泛化性需验证。
  • 仅提供对抗扰动的概念验证，其他应用（如偏差）尚未实验。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Building on the abstract Generalized Singular Value Decomposition (GSVD) theory of Brown et al. [2025], we prove that most modern neural architectures admit a generalized SVD representation in which they are left-invertible before a final linear layer, with no change in input-output behavior. Furthermore, the left-invertible nonlinear portion of the input-output behavior can be made to be \emph{norm preserving}, meaning that perturbations in the left-invertible ``embedding'' (the activations prior to the final linear layer in this representation) correspond proportionally to changes in the input, i.e., distance in feature space can be calibrated directly to distance in input space. We provide a data-driven algorithm for estimating this representation from trained models and propose a model architecture that naturally facilitates the decomposition. We then provide a proof-of-concept that the learned representation can be used to identify adversarial perturbations to model inputs, and develop the theory necessary for future applications to areas such as model bias and invertibility.

探针与表征分析 1 篇

Tool Calling is Linearly Readable and Steerable in Language Models

High 2605.07990
Zekun Wu (1, 2), Ze Wang (1, 2), Seonglae Cho (2), Yufei Yang (3), Adriano Koshiyama (1, 2) et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：工具调用身份在语言模型内部是线性可读且可操控的，通过激活干预可高精度切换工具选择。
🎯研究动机

工具调用代理选错工具时，错误直到执行才显现，导致严重后果，因此需要理解模型内部如何表示和选择工具。

❓解决问题

探究语言模型内部工具选择的表征是否线性可读和可操控，以及如何通过激活干预实现工具切换和错误检测。

🔎现象分析

工具身份在模型内部是线性编码的，通过平均激活差异可高精度切换工具选择；工具选择不确定性（top-1 与 top-2 差距小）与错误率正相关；因果效应集中在输出层特定方向；预训练阶段已形成工具表征，指令微调将其连接到输出。

🛠️主要方法

通过探针分析工具身份线性可读性，使用平均激活差异进行激活干预切换工具，利用激活修补定位关键注意力头，并在同领域工具上验证非主题轴效应。

📊实验结果

在 Gemma 3、Qwen 3、Qwen 2.5、Llama 3.1 等 12 个指令微调模型（270M-27B）上进行实验，使用名称单轮提示和 BFCL 基准，评估工具切换准确率（77-100%）和错误预测能力（14-21x 差异）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现工具身份在语言模型内部是线性可读且可操控的，通过平均激活差异可高精度切换工具选择。
  • 揭示工具选择不确定性可预测错误，且因果效应集中在输出层特定方向。
  • 证明预训练阶段已编码工具表征，指令微调将其连接到输出。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验限于单轮固定菜单设置，多轮智能体迁移更脆弱。
  • 未探索更复杂工具调用场景（如参数依赖）。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

When a tool-calling agent picks the wrong tool, the failure is invisible until execution: the email gets sent, the meeting gets missed. Probing 12 instruction-tuned models across Gemma 3, Qwen 3, Qwen 2.5, and Llama 3.1 (270M to 27B), we find the identity of the chosen tool is linearly readable and steerable inside the model. Adding the mean-difference between two tools' average internal activations switches which tool the model selects at 77-100% accuracy on name-only single-turn prompts (93-100% at 4B+), and the JSON arguments that follow autoregressively match the new tool's schema, so flipping the name is enough. The same per-tool means also flag likely errors before they happen: on Gemma 3 12B and 27B, queries where the gap between the top-1 and top-2 tool is smallest produce 14-21x more wrong calls than queries with the largest gap. The causal effect concentrates along one direction, the row of the output layer that produces the target tool's first token: a unit vector along it at matched magnitude already reaches 93-100%, while what is left over leaves the choice almost untouched. Activation patching localises this to a small set of mid- and late-layer attention heads, and a within-topic probe across 14 same-domain $\tau$-bench airline tools reaches top-1 61-89% across five 4B-14B models, ruling out the reading that we are just moving the model along a topic axis. Even base models encode the right tool before they can emit it: cosine readout from the internal state recovers 69-82% on BFCL while base generation reaches only 2-10%, suggesting pretraining forms the representation and instruction tuning later wires it to the output. We measure tool identity selection and JSON schema correctness in single-turn fixed-menu settings; multi-turn agentic transfer is more fragile and is discussed in Limitations.

应用: 物理科学 9 篇 · 4 个细分

物理/分子动力学 3 篇

Discovering Ordinary Differential Equations with LLM-Based Qualitative and Quantitative Evaluation

Medium 2605.07323
Sum Kyun Song, Bong Gyun Shin, Jae Yong Lee
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 DoLQ 方法，利用 LLM 多智能体架构进行定性与定量评估，从观测数据中发现常微分方程。
🎯研究动机

现有符号回归方法主要依赖定量指标，但真实微分方程建模需要融入领域知识以确保物理合理性，现有方法缺乏定性评估机制。

❓解决问题

如何从观测数据中发现既准确又物理合理的常微分方程。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

DoLQ 采用多智能体架构：Sampler Agent 提出动态系统候选，Parameter Optimizer 优化参数精度，Scientist Agent 利用 LLM 进行定性与定量评估并综合结果迭代引导搜索。

📊实验结果

在多维常微分方程基准上实验，DoLQ 相比现有方法取得更高成功率和更准确的地面真值符号项恢复。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出结合 LLM 定性与定量评估的微分方程发现方法 DoLQ
  • 在多维 ODE 基准上实现更高成功率和更准确的符号项恢复
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 LLM 的领域知识质量
  • 多智能体架构计算开销可能较大
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Discovering governing differential equations from observational data is a fundamental challenge in scientific machine learning. Existing symbolic regression approaches rely primarily on quantitative metrics; however, real-world differential equation modeling also requires incorporating domain knowledge to ensure physical plausibility. To address this gap, we propose DoLQ, a method for discovering ordinary differential equations with LLM-based qualitative and quantitative evaluation. DoLQ employs a multi-agent architecture: a Sampler Agent proposes dynamic system candidates, a Parameter Optimizer refines equations for accuracy, and a Scientist Agent leverages an LLM to conduct both qualitative and quantitative evaluations and synthesize their results to iteratively guide the search. Experiments on multi-dimensional ordinary differential equation benchmarks demonstrate that DoLQ achieves superior performance compared to existing methods, not only attaining higher success rates but also more accurately recovering the correct symbolic terms of ground truth equations. Our code is available at this https URL .

Accelerated and data-efficient flow prediction in stirred tanks via physics-informed learning

Medium 2605.07444
Mahdi Naderibeni, Liang Wu, David M.J. Tax
arXiv PDF cs.CE
TL;DR：物理信息约束显著提升搅拌槽流场预测的数据效率和精度，尤其在低数据场景下。
🎯研究动机

流体模拟计算成本高，机器学习代理模型虽能加速预测，但需要大量训练数据，导致数据生成成本与预测精度之间的权衡。

❓解决问题

如何在减少训练数据量的同时保持或提升搅拌槽稳态流场预测的精度。

🔎现象分析

预测误差随训练数据增加单调递减，但存在明显的边际收益递减；物理约束在低数据场景下显著提升精度并降低训练方差，但优势随数据量增加而减弱。

🛠️主要方法

使用隐式神经表示（INR）学习流场，对比纯数据驱动和物理信息约束（如 RANS 方程残差）两种变体。

📊实验结果

使用 RANS 模拟生成不同操作条件（叶轮转速、液位高度）下的稳态流场数据集，通过全局 MSE、空间定性比较和示踪剂传输模拟评估模型性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统研究了搅拌槽流场预测中训练集大小与精度的关系，揭示了边际收益递减规律。
  • 证明了物理信息约束在低数据场景下能显著提升精度、降低方差，并改善示踪剂传输模拟的稳定性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 物理约束增加了训练复杂度。
  • 物理约束的优势在大数据集下减弱。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The simulation of fluid flows is computationally expensive due to the complexity of its governing partial differential equations. Machine learning models offer a potential surrogate, enabling learning from simulations and significantly faster predictions of flow fields. However, these models require large training datasets, which introduces a trade-off between dataset generation cost and predictive accuracy. In this work, we investigate the relationship between the size of the training-set and accuracy of the prediction when learning steady flow fields in an industrial-scale stirred vessel. A data set of steady flows is generated using Reynolds Averaged Navier Stokes (RANS) simulations in a range of realistic operating conditions, including impeller speeds and liquid heights. We train implicit neural representations of flow fields and compare purely data-driven and constrained variants. Model performance is evaluated using global mean squared error (MSE), qualitative spatial comparisons of predicted and reference flow fields, and tracer transport simulations. We find that the prediction error decreases monotonically with increasing training data, but also that it exhibits clear diminishing returns beyond moderate dataset sizes. Physics-based constraints significantly improve accuracy and reduce variability across training runs in low-data regimes, and they lead to more stable tracer-transport behavior. Furthermore, reasonable interpolation can be achieved over different impeller speeds and liquid heights. However, these benefits come with an increase in the complexity of training, and their relative advantage diminishes as the training set grows.

LLM-Guided Open Hypothesis Learning from Autonomous Scanning Probe Microscopy Experiments

Medium 2605.06839
Boris Slautin, Utkarsh Pratiush, Yu Liu, Kamyar Barakati, Sergei Kalinin
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出将符号回归与 LLM 物理评估结合，实现自主扫描探针显微镜实验中的开放假设学习。
🎯研究动机

当前自主实验工作流局限于在固定目标或假设空间内选择测量，无法从实验数据中生成新的物理模型，限制了科学发现能力。

❓解决问题

如何让自主实验系统从稀疏测量数据中自动发现和演化可解释的物理规律，而非仅执行预设的优化任务。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

结合符号回归（从稀疏测量生成候选解析关系）和基于大语言模型的物理评估器（根据物理合理性、标度行为、与已知机制一致性排序候选），形成开放假设学习框架。

📊实验结果

在 PZT 薄膜的自主压电力显微镜测量上演示，从 5 个种子测量开始，工作流从物理不完整的候选表达式演化为可解释的电压 - 时间生长规律。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出开放假设学习框架，将自主显微镜从闭环优化扩展到开放假设发现。
  • 在 PZT 薄膜铁电畴开关的自主压电力显微镜测量中验证，从 5 个种子测量演化出符合动力学畴壁运动的可解释电压 - 时间生长规律。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 LLM 评估的物理知识库覆盖范围。
  • 符号回归的搜索空间可能随变量增加而爆炸。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Autonomous experimentation has transformed microscopy and materials discovery by enabling closed-loop optimization including imaging and spectroscopy tuning, strucutre property relationship discovery, and exploration of combinatorial libraries. However, most current workflows remain limited to selecting measurements within fixed objective or hypothesis spaces, rather than generating new physical models from experimental data. Here, we introduce an open hypothesis-learning framework that combines symbolic regression with large-language-model-based physical evaluation and implement it for autonomous scanning probe microscopy. Symbolic regression generates candidate analytical relationships directly from sparse measurements, while the language-model evaluator ranks these candidates according to physical plausibility, scaling behavior, and consistency with known mechanisms. We demonstrate the approach on autonomous piezoresponse force microscopy measurements of ferroelectric domain switching in a PZT thin film. Starting from five seed measurements, the workflow evolves from physically incomplete candidate expressions toward interpretable voltage-time growth laws consistent with kinetic domain-wall motion. This work extends autonomous microscopy from closed-loop optimization toward open hypothesis discovery, where candidate physical laws emerge from the experiment itself rather than being specified in advance. More broadly, the framework establishes a route for integrating symbolic regression, physical reasoning, and adaptive experimentation into hierarchical autonomous scientific workflows.

生物/蛋白质/药物 3 篇

PPI-Net connects molecular protein interactions to functional processes in disease

Medium 2605.07838
Kyle Higgins, Guadalupe Gonzalez, Dennis Veselkov, Ivan Laponogov, Kirill Veselkov
arXiv PDF q-bio.QM
TL;DR：PPI-Net 通过层次图神经网络整合蛋白质互作网络与通路层级，实现从分子到功能过程的疾病建模与可解释预测。
🎯研究动机

现有模型大多忽略结构化生物关系或缺乏跨尺度可解释性，难以理解分子改变如何传播并驱动疾病。

❓解决问题

如何将分子层面的蛋白质互作信息与通路层级结构结合，实现疾病状态的准确预测并提供机制性解释。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 PPI-Net，一种层次图神经网络，利用 STRING 的 PPI 网络嵌入患者分子谱，并通过图注意力机制在多层 Reactome 层级中传播，将基因级信号聚合为高阶生物程序。

📊实验结果

在 TCGA 十种癌症类型的 RNA-seq 数据上评估，平衡准确率超过 90%；在乳腺癌 RNA-seq 上，Reactome 层级整合提升 6.7%，多层级监督提升 12.3%；多组学分析恢复 TP53-AKT 等通路。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 PPI-Net，整合 PPI 网络与通路层级进行疾病建模。
  • 在多种癌症 RNA-seq 数据上实现超过 90% 的平衡准确率，并验证了层级整合和多层级监督的有效性。
  • 多组学分析揭示了已知致癌模块和信号通路，提供了机制性洞察。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 STRING 和 Reactome 等现有数据库，可能遗漏未知互作。
  • 仅验证了癌症类型，泛化到其他疾病需进一步实验。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Understanding how molecular alterations propagate across biological systems to drive disease remains a central challenge. Although high-throughput profiling enables comprehensive characterization of tumor states, most models neglect structured biological relationships or lack interpretability across scales. Here we present PPI-Net, a hierarchical graph neural network that integrates protein-protein interaction (PPI) networks with pathway-level representations to model disease from molecular interactions to functional processes. Patient-specific molecular profiles are embedded within a shared interaction network from STRING and propagated through a multi-layer Reactome hierarchy using graph attention, enabling aggregation of gene-level signals into higher-order biological programs. Across RNA-seq data from ten cancer types from The Cancer Genome Atlas, PPI-Net achieves robust predictive performance, with balanced accuracy exceeding 90% in multiple cohorts. Comparative analysis on RNA-Seq data from breast cancer demonstrated that PPI-Net's integration of the Reactome hierarchy improved balanced accuracy by 6.7% relative to a PPI-only model, while hierarchical multi-level supervision improved balanced accuracy by 12.3% relative to using only a single top-level prediction head. Applying a multi-omics approach using RNA-seq and methylation data improves model interpretation, recovering canonical oncogenic modules, including TP53-AKT signaling and stress response pathways, while revealing convergence onto coherent programs such as ion signaling and cellular responses to stimuli. These results demonstrate that integrating interaction networks with pathway hierarchies enables accurate prediction while providing mechanistic insight into cancer biology.

Conditional generation of antibody sequences with classifier-guided germline-absorbing discrete diffusion

Medium 2605.06720
Justin Sanders, Luca Giancardo, Lan Guo, Yue Zhao, Kemal Sonmez, Nina Cheng, Melih Yilmaz
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出种系吸收离散扩散，用于抗体序列的条件生成，显著提升非种系残基预测精度。
🎯研究动机

抗体治疗药物是现代医学中最成功的药物之一，但计算设计具有理想结合和可开发性的抗体仍然具有挑战性。现有蛋白质语言模型主要记忆种系序列而非建模有意义的体细胞变异，且对灵活的分类器引导条件生成支持有限。

❓解决问题

解决现有抗体序列设计方法中种系偏差严重和缺乏灵活条件生成能力的问题。

🔎现象分析

现有方法主要记忆种系序列，而非学习生物上有意义的体细胞变异；离散扩散微调可实现强语言建模性能并支持条件生成。

🛠️主要方法

提出种系吸收离散扩散，将种系序列作为吸收态，使模型学习从种系到观测序列的轨迹，排除遗传变异和 V(D)J 重组统计，缓解种系偏差。

📊实验结果

在抗体序列上评估非种系残基预测准确率（从 26% 到 46%），并在条件生成任务（改善疏水性和预测结合亲和力）上展示优于 EvoProtGrad 的类别遵循与样本质量权衡。

⭐主要贡献
  • 证明离散扩散微调在抗体序列上实现强语言建模性能，并支持任意现成分类器的条件生成。
  • 引入种系吸收扩散，将非种系残基预测准确率从 26% 提升至 46%，接近理论上限。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于抗体序列，泛化性未知。
  • 依赖现成分类器，分类器质量影响生成效果。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Antibody therapeutics are among the most successful modern medicines, yet computationally designing antibodies with desirable binding and developability properties remains challenging. While protein language models (pLMs) have emerged as powerful tools for antibody sequence design, existing approaches largely suffer from two key limitations: they predominantly memorize germline sequences rather than modeling biologically meaningful somatic variation, and they offer limited support for flexible classifier-guided conditional generation. We address these challenges through two primary contributions. First, we demonstrate that discrete diffusion fine-tuning achieves strong language modeling performance on antibody sequences while allowing for generation conditioned on any off-the-shelf classifier. Second, we introduce germline absorbing diffusion, a novel modification of the discrete diffusion noise process in which the germline sequence - rather than a masked sequence - serves as the absorbing state. This biologically motivated inductive bias restricts the model to learning the trajectory from germline to observed sequence, effectively excluding genetic variation and V(D)J recombination statistics from the learned distribution and dramatically mitigating germline bias. We show that germline diffusion improves non-germline residue prediction accuracy from 26 percent to 46 percent, approaching the theoretical upper bound set by true biological variability. We then demonstrate the utility of our germline diffusion model on the conditional generation tasks of sampling antibodies with improved hydrophobicity and predicted binding affinity. On both tasks our model shows an improved tradeoff between class adherence and sample quality, significantly outperforming EvoProtGrad, a popular strategy to sample from pLMs with gradient-based discrete Markov Chain Monte Carlo.

A Linear-Transformer Hybrid for SNP-Based Genotype-to-Phenotype Prediction in Grapevine

Medium 2605.06762
Yibin Wang, Murukarthick Jayakodi, Silvas Kirubakaran, Ambika Chandra, Azlan Zahid
arXiv PDF q-bio.GN
TL;DR：提出线性 -Transformer 混合模型 LiT-G2P，利用 SNP 数据预测葡萄基因型到表型，在跨年场景下提升预测鲁棒性。
🎯研究动机

基因型到表型（G2P）预测对加速育种决策和遗传增益至关重要，但复杂性状在多变田间环境和跨年条件下难以准确测量，现有方法在跨年鲁棒性上不足。

❓解决问题

如何利用全基因组 SNP 数据，结合加性遗传效应和非线性交互作用，实现跨年鲁棒的 G2P 预测。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 LiT-G2P 框架，融合线性模型捕获加性遗传方差效应与 Transformer 捕获非线性交互作用，基于全基因组 SNP 数据自动预测表型。

📊实验结果

在葡萄多样品系上，使用 SNP 标记和两年表型数据，评估单年和跨年预测场景，与基线模型比较。毛密度单年和跨年 RMSE 分别为 0.469 和 0.454，容忍准确率 79.2% 和 74.6%；毛状体密度也取得最佳性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出线性 -Transformer 混合架构 LiT-G2P，同时建模加性效应和非线性交互。
  • 在葡萄多样品系上跨年验证，在毛密度和毛状体密度预测上取得最低 RMSE 和较高容忍准确率。
  • 通过注意力权重提取模型优先 SNP 并进行基因型分层分析，提供可解释的候选标记。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对葡萄品种，可能需在其他物种上验证泛化性。
  • 未讨论模型在大规模 SNP 或高维表型上的计算效率。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Robust genotype-to-phenotype (G2P) prediction is essential for accelerating breeding decisions and genetic gain. However, it remains challenging to measure complex traits under variable field conditions and across years. In this study, we propose a linear-Transformer approach, LiT-G2P (Linear-Transformer Genotype-to-Phenotype), an automated predictive framework that integrates additive genetic variance effects with Transformer-based nonlinear interactions using genome-wide single-nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs) data. We evaluated LiT-G2P on a panel of diverse grape accessions, genotyped with SNP markers and measured for phenotypes across two consecutive years. Target phenotypic traits include leaf hair density and trichome density of grapevines. Across both single-year and cross-year testing scenarios, LiT-G2P consistently improves prediction performance compared with baseline models. For hair density, LiT-G2P achieves the lowest error in both single-year and cross-year evaluations, with RMSEs of 0.469 and 0.454, respectively, while maintaining strong tolerance accuracies of 79.2% and 74.6%, respectively. For trichome density, LiT-G2P also presents the best overall G2P performance. In addition, we extract model-prioritized SNPs from attention weights and apply genotype-stratified analysis to provide interpretable candidate marker for downstream validation. These results demonstrate that integrating stable additive effects with learned interaction patterns can enhance cross-year robustness and support practical SNP-based predictive modeling for genomic selection.

化学 2 篇

ARMOR: An Agentic Framework for Reaction Feasibility Prediction via Adaptive Utility-aware Multi-tool Reasoning

Medium 2605.07103
Ye Liu, Botao Yu, Xinyi Ling, Daniel Adu-Ampratwum, Xia Ning
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 ARMOR 框架，通过自适应效用感知的多工具推理提升化学反应可行性预测的准确性和鲁棒性。
🎯研究动机

化学反应可行性预测是计算化学的基础问题，现有 AI 工具（如 LLM）性能因反应而异，单一工具难以在所有情况下表现良好，亟需有效整合多工具优势的方法。

❓解决问题

如何自适应地利用多个工具（如 LLM）进行化学反应可行性预测，解决工具间性能差异和预测冲突问题。

🔎现象分析

不同工具在不同反应上表现差异大，单一工具无法一致地表现良好；工具预测存在冲突，简单聚合或启发式分配效果有限。

🛠️主要方法

提出 ARMOR 框架，显式建模工具特定效用，自适应优先级排序，通过层级组织工具、记忆增强推理解决冲突，输出最终预测。

📊实验结果

在公开数据集上进行了实验，ARMOR 一致优于强基线，包括单工具方法及多种工具聚合和选择方法；在工具预测冲突的反应上改进尤为显著。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ARMOR，一种基于智能体的多工具推理框架，用于化学反应可行性预测。
  • 引入工具特定效用建模和自适应优先级机制，有效处理工具间冲突。
  • 在公开数据集上显著优于单工具方法和现有聚合 / 选择方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖预定义的工具集，可能无法覆盖所有潜在有用工具。
  • 记忆增强推理的计算开销可能较大。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reaction feasibility prediction, as a fundamental problem in computational chemistry, has benefited from diverse tools enabled by recent advances in artificial intelligence, particularly large language models. However, the performance of individual tools varies substantially across reactions, making it difficult for any single tool to consistently perform well across all cases. This raises a critical challenge: how to effectively leverage multiple tools to obtain more accurate feasibility predictions. To address this, we propose ARMOR, an agentic framework that explicitly models tool-specific utilities, adaptively prioritizes tools, and further resolves the potential tool conflicts to produce the final prediction for each reaction. Unlike existing approaches that rely on simple aggregation or heuristic assignment over various tools, ARMOR organizes tools into a hierarchy that prioritizes top-performing tools and defers others when needed, characterizes their strengths through tool-specific patterns, and resolves conflicts via memoryaugmented reasoning. Extensive experiments on a public dataset demonstrate that ARMOR consistently outperforms strong baselines, including single-tool methods as well as various tool aggregation and tool selection approaches. Further analysis shows that the improvements are particularly significant on reactions with conflicting tool predictions, highlighting the effectiveness of ARMOR in leveraging the complementary strengths of multiple tools. The code is available via this https URL .

From Feasible to Practical: Pareto-Optimal Synthesis Planning

Medium 2605.07521
Friedrich Hastedt, Dongda Zhang, Antonio del Rio Chanona
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 MORetro*算法，将合成规划建模为多目标搜索问题，生成帕累托前沿以平衡成本、可持续性等多重目标。
🎯研究动机

现有计算机辅助合成规划方法仅关注单一可行路线或最短路径，与化学家需平衡成本、可持续性、毒性、产率等多重竞争目标的实际需求脱节。

❓解决问题

如何将合成规划建模为多目标优化问题，并高效生成帕累托最优路线集以显式捕捉用户定义准则间的权衡。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MORetro*算法，基于加权标量化和贝叶斯优化引导采样，结合多目标 A*搜索，在固定单步模型下保证恢复真实帕累托前沿。

📊实验结果

在多个逆合成基准上，MORetro*生成多样、高质量的帕累托前沿，发现了单目标方法忽略的解决方案。

⭐主要贡献
  • 将合成规划重新定义为多目标搜索问题，与工业决策更对齐。
  • 提出 MORetro*算法，具有最优性保证，能高效生成多样、高质量的帕累托前沿。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖固定单步模型，可能限制搜索空间。
  • 加权标量化可能无法覆盖所有帕累托最优解。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Current computer-aided synthesis planning (CASP) methods often treat retrosynthesis as solved once a single feasible route is identified, focusing primarily on convergence or shortest-path metrics. This view is misaligned with real-world practice, where chemists must balance competing objectives such as cost, sustainability, toxicity, and overall yield. To address this, we formulate synthesis planning as a multi-objective search problem and introduce MORetro*, an algorithm that generates a Pareto front of synthesis routes to explicitly capture trade-offs among user-defined criteria. MORetro* uses weighted scalarization and BO-informed sampling to efficiently navigate the combinatorial search space and prioritize promising trade-offs. Building on multi-objective A*-search, we provide optimality guarantees showing that, for a fixed single-step model, MORetro* recovers the true Pareto front. Across multiple retrosynthesis benchmarks, MORetro* produces diverse, high-quality Pareto fronts, uncovering solutions overlooked by single-objective approaches and better aligning CASP outputs with industrial decision-making.

气候/地球科学 1 篇

Cloud-top infrared observations reveal the four-dimensional precipitation structure

Medium 2605.07499
Tianchi Xu, Ziqiang Ma, Andrea Marinoni, Yuanpeng He, Xiaoqing Li, Chuanfeng Zhao, Kang He, Jintao Xu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：云顶红外观测可解码降水四维结构，4DPrecipNet 实现全球连续监测。
🎯研究动机

全球尺度上缺乏高分辨率四维降水观测，传统理论认为云顶红外数据对云下降水不敏感，但实际应用中需要更精确的降水结构信息。

❓解决问题

如何从静止卫星云顶红外观测中恢复降水的四维（空间 + 时间）结构。

🔎现象分析

云顶红外测量编码了足够信息以恢复云下降水过程，揭示了此前未开发的子云过程可观测性。

🛠️主要方法

提出物理约束的深度学习框架 4DPrecipNet，引入水分优先约束迫使潜在表示恢复可降水汽，整合多通道红外辐射、约束条件和雷达降水廓线，从静止轨道重建降水系统的垂直和时间演化。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现云顶红外观测可编码子云降水信息，建立新的全球降水监测途径。
  • 提出 4DPrecipNet 框架，通过物理约束实现四维降水结构重建。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖雷达降水廓线作为训练目标，可能受雷达覆盖范围限制。
  • 物理约束的普适性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Accurate four-dimensional (4D) precipitation information is essential for understanding the Earth's energy and water cycles, yet remains observationally unresolved at global scales. Conventional theory holds that geostationary infrared observations primarily sense cloud-top properties, with limited sensitivity to sub-cloud precipitation. Here we show that cloud-top infrared measurements nevertheless encode sufficient information to recover the four-dimensional structure of precipitation, revealing a previously unexploited observability of sub-cloud processes. We introduce a physically constrained deep learning framework, 4DPrecipNet, in which a moisture-first constraint requires the latent representation to recover precipitable water vapour, anchoring the model in thermodynamic consistency. By integrating multi-channel infrared radiances with these constraints and radar-derived precipitation profiles, we reconstruct the vertical and temporal evolution of precipitation systems from geostationary orbit. The framework captures deep convective structures and their evolution, with robust performance across large samples and independent radar comparisons. These results demonstrate that sub-cloud precipitation is physically encoded in cloud-top infrared observations, establishing a new pathway for continuous global monitoring of precipitation structure.

优化 8 篇 · 2 个细分

优化器设计 4 篇

Ensemble Distributionally Robust Bayesian Optimisation

Medium 2605.07565
Tigran Ramazyan, Denis Derkach
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出一种集成分布鲁棒贝叶斯优化算法，在连续上下文中实现可计算且具有理论次线性遗憾界。
🎯研究动机

贝叶斯优化在处理复杂噪声数据时鲁棒性不足，现有集成方法虽能缓解单一模型弱点，但缺乏对上下文分布不确定性的处理且计算成本高。

❓解决问题

如何在连续上下文分布不确定性下，设计计算可行且具有理论保证的集成分布鲁棒贝叶斯优化算法。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出集成分布鲁棒贝叶斯优化算法，通过集成代理模型和分布鲁棒优化框架处理连续上下文不确定性，并保持计算可处理性。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个在连续上下文中可计算的集成分布鲁棒贝叶斯优化算法
  • 推导出次线性遗憾界，改进了当前最优理论结果
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定类型的上下文分布不确定性
  • 理论界可能在实际中不够紧致
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We study zeroth-order optimisation under context distributional uncertainty, a setting commonly tackled using Bayesian optimisation (BO). A prevailing strategy to make BO more robust to the complex and noisy nature of data is to employ an ensemble as the surrogate model, thereby mitigating the weaknesses of any single model. In this study, we propose a novel algorithm for Ensemble Distributionally Robust Bayesian Optimisation that remains computationally tractable while managing continuous context. We obtain theoretical sublinear regret bounds, improving current state-of-the-art results. We show that our method's empirical behaviour aligns with its theoretical guarantees.

Open-Ended Task Discovery via Bayesian Optimization

Medium 2605.07572
Masaki Adachi, Yuta Suzuki, Juliusz Ziomek
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 GSR 框架，将贝叶斯优化扩展到开放式任务发现，在多个科学工作流中优于现有方法。
🎯研究动机

贝叶斯优化在科学工作流中常忽略任务本身的不确定性，即优化目标和评估方式会随证据积累而演变，现有方法缺乏对任务发现的系统支持。

❓解决问题

如何让贝叶斯优化自动发现并优化新任务，而不仅限于固定任务。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Generate-Select-Refine (GSR)框架，交替进行任务生成（粗到细）和任务优化，通过任务采集函数调度优化，渐近地集中评估于最佳任务。

📊实验结果

在四个科学工作流（新产品开发、化学合成缩放、算法分析、专利再利用）中评估，GSR 优于现有基于 LLM 的优化器。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出开放式贝叶斯优化框架 GSR，支持任务自动发现与优化。
  • 理论证明 GSR 相对于单任务 BO 仅产生对数级遗憾开销。
  • 在多个领域（新产品开发、化学合成、算法分析、专利再利用）验证有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖种子任务质量。
  • 理论分析限于渐近行为，实际收敛速度可能受任务空间复杂度影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

When applying Bayesian optimization (BO) to scientific workflow, a major yet often overlooked source of uncertainty is the task itself -- namely, what to optimize and how to evaluate it -- which can evolve as evidence accumulates. We introduce Generate-Select-Refine (GSR), a open-ended BO framework that alternates between task generation and task optimization. Starting from a user-provided seed task, GSR generates new tasks in a coarse-to-fine manner while a task-acquisition function schedules optimization. Asymptotically, it concentrates evaluations on the best task, incurring only logarithmic regret overhead relative to single-task BO. We apply GSR to new product development, chemical synthesis scaling, algorithm analysis, and patent repurposing, where it outperforms existing LLM-based optimizers.

Exploring the non-convexity in machine learning using quantum-inspired optimization

Medium 2605.07947
Kandula Eswara Sai Kumar, Parth Dhananjay Danve, Abhishek Chopra, Rut Lineswala
arXiv PDF cs.CE
TL;DR：提出量子启发进化优化框架，在非凸机器学习任务中实现全局搜索，优于传统方法。
🎯研究动机

现代机器学习面临高维和异常值污染下的非凸优化难题，传统凸松弛或局部搜索易陷入次优局部极小，无法恢复真实离散结构。

❓解决问题

解决非凸优化问题中全局搜索困难，避免局部最优陷阱。

🔎现象分析

传统方法（如凸松弛、梯度下降、贪婪算法）在非凸高维场景下易陷入局部最优，导致结构保真度低和误差大。

🛠️主要方法

提出量子启发进化优化（QIEO）框架，利用量子叠加启发的概率表示维护搜索空间的全局视图，实现穿越局部最优的隧道效应。

📊实验结果

在稀疏信号恢复（基因表达分析、压缩感知）和鲁棒线性回归上进行了全面基准测试，与 ADAM、差分进化、遗传算法、迭代硬阈值等对比。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出统一的量子启发进化优化框架，适用于多种非凸机器学习问题。
  • 在稀疏信号恢复和鲁棒线性回归任务中，QIEO 在结构保真度、均方误差和鲁棒性上优于 ADAM、差分进化、遗传算法等基线。
⚠️方法局限
  • 摘要未提及计算效率或可扩展性分析。
  • 可能对超参数敏感，需进一步研究自适应机制。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The escalating complexity of modern machine learning necessitates solving challenging non-convex optimization problems, particularly in high-dimensional regimes and scenarios contaminated by gross outliers. Traditional approaches, relying on convex relaxations or specialized local search heuristics, frequently succumb to suboptimal local minima and fail to recover the true underlying discrete structures. In this paper, we propose treating these non-convex challenges as a global search problem and introduce a unified framework based on Quantum-Inspired Evolutionary Optimization (QIEO). By leveraging a probabilistic representation inspired by quantum superposition, QIEO maintains a global view of the search space, enabling it to tunnel through local optima that trap conventional gradient-based and greedy solvers. We comprehensively evaluate QIEO across diverse non-convex applications, including sparse signal recovery (gene expression analysis and compressed sensing) and robust linear regression. Extensive benchmarking against state-of-the-art continuous solvers (ADAM, Differential Evolution), classical metaheuristics (Genetic Algorithms), and specialized non-convex algorithms (Iterative Hard Thresholding) demonstrates that QIEO consistently achieves superior structural fidelity, lower mean squared error, and enhanced robustness without support inflation. Our findings suggest that embracing a quantum-inspired global search provides a resilient, unified paradigm for overcoming the inherent intractability of discrete nonconvex machine learning landscapes.

Fast and Effective Redistricting Optimization via Composite-Move Tabu Search

Medium 2605.06682
Hai Jin, Diansheng Guo
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出复合移动禁忌搜索（CM-Tabu）以解决空间重划中的连通性约束问题，显著提升解质量和效率。
🎯研究动机

空间重划是实际组合优化问题，需要高质量解、快速周转和灵活性，但连通性约束严重缩小可行邻域，导致搜索陷入局部最优。

❓解决问题

如何在保持连通性的前提下扩大禁忌搜索的可行邻域空间，避免搜索陷入局部最优。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，强制连通性约束会严重缩小可行邻域，削弱探索能力，使搜索陷入较差的局部最优。

🛠️主要方法

提出复合移动禁忌搜索（CM-Tabu），通过识别可一起移动的最小单元集或可交换的单元对，生成保持连通性的复合移动，并利用关节点和双连通分量在线性时间内生成候选移动。

📊实验结果

在多个案例（如费城）上进行实验，表明该方法在解质量、运行间鲁棒性和计算效率上显著优于传统禁忌搜索和其他基线，在费城案例中能一致达到人口平等的理论全局最优。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种系统性的复合移动机制，在保持连通性的同时扩大禁忌搜索的可行邻域空间。
  • 通过分析连通图的关节点和双连通分量，实现线性时间生成候选单单元和复合移动。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对大规模问题计算开销较高，尽管线性时间生成移动。
  • 复合移动的识别依赖于图结构，对于复杂约束可能需扩展。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Spatial redistricting is a practical combinatorial optimization problem that demands high-quality solutions, rapid turnaround, and flexibility to accommodate multi-criteria objectives and interactive refinement. A central challenge is the contiguity constraint: enforcing contiguity in integer-programming or heuristic search can severely shrink the feasible neighborhood, weaken exploration, and trap the search in poor local optima. We introduce a composite-move Tabu search (CM-Tabu) that systematically expands the feasible neighborhood space in Tabu search while preserving contiguity. When a boundary unit cannot be reassigned individually without disconnecting its district, our method identifies a minimal set of units that can move together, or a pair of units (or sets of units) that can be switched, as a contiguity-preserving composite move. Candidate single-unit and composite moves are generated in linear time by analyzing each district's contiguity graph using articulation points and biconnected components. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach substantially improves solution quality, run-to-run robustness, and computational efficiency relative to traditional Tabu search and other baselines. For example, in the Philadelphia case, the approach can consistently attain the theoretical global optimum in population-equality and support multi-criteria trade-offs. CM-Tabu delivers optimization performance suitable for real-world practices and decision-support workflows.

训练动态 4 篇

When Losses Align: Gradient-Based Composite Loss Weighting for Efficient Pretraining

Medium 2605.07756
Ivan Karpukhin, Andrey Savchenko
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出一种基于梯度的双层优化方法，在线学习预训练损失权重，使复合梯度与下游目标对齐，大幅降低调参成本。
🎯研究动机

现代深度模型常在大规模缺失标签数据上使用复合目标进行预训练，其中多个损失项的相对权重作为超参数，传统调参方法（随机搜索、贝叶斯优化）需要多次独立训练，计算成本极高。

❓解决问题

如何高效地学习复合预训练损失中多个损失项的权重，避免昂贵的多次训练开销。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出一种基于梯度的双层优化方法，通过将复合预训练梯度与下游目标对齐，在线学习损失权重；利用损失结构避免全模型截断反向传播所需的多次反向传播，将调参开销降低至单次训练的约 30%。

📊实验结果

在事件序列建模和自监督计算机视觉任务上评估，匹配或超越精心调优的基线，调参开销约为单次训练的 30%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种高效的梯度基双层方法，在线学习预训练损失权重。
  • 在事件序列建模和自监督计算机视觉任务上，匹配或超越精心调优的基线，同时大幅降低调参成本。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法可能依赖于损失结构的可微性，对非可微损失不适用。
  • 实验仅在特定任务上验证，泛化性需进一步探索。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Modern deep models are often pretrained on large-scale data with missing labels using composite objectives, where the relative weights of multiple loss terms act as hyperparameters.
