Tuning these weights with random search or Bayesian optimization is computationally expensive, as it requires many independent training runs. To address this, we propose a gradient-based bilevel method that learns pretraining loss weights online by aligning the composite pretraining gradient with a downstream objective. By exploiting the structure of the loss, the method avoids the multiple backward passes typically required by truncated backpropagation through the full model, reducing the overhead of hyperparameter tuning to approximately 30% above a single training run. We evaluate the approach on event-sequence modeling and self-supervised computer vision, where it matches or improves upon carefully tuned baselines while substantially reducing the cost of hyperparameter tuning compared to random or Bayesian search.

Spectral Dynamics in Deep Networks: Feature Learning, Outlier Escape, and Learning Rate Transfer

Medium 2605.07870
Clarissa Lauditi, Cengiz Pehlevan, Blake Bordelon
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：通过两层次动力平均场理论揭示深度网络中谱动力学、异常值逃逸与学习率迁移机制。
🎯研究动机

深度网络的谱动力学对理解特征学习、训练稳定性及超参数迁移至关重要，但现有理论难以同时追踪整体谱与异常值谱的联合演化。

❓解决问题

建立统一理论框架，刻画宽神经网络中隐藏权重谱的演化，特别是异常值（outlier）与整体谱（bulk）的相互作用，并解释不同参数化（μP vs NTK）下的宽度依赖性与学习率迁移现象。

🔎现象分析

μP 参数化下异常值动力学与宽度一致，支持超参数迁移；NTK 参数化下异常值动力学强烈依赖宽度，尽管大宽度极限收敛。大规模输出任务（如 ImageNet、GPT）中谱整体重构，但谱边缘在足够宽网络中仍收敛。

🛠️主要方法

发展两层次动力平均场理论（DMFT），联合追踪尖峰系综（spiked ensembles）的整体谱与异常值谱动力学，应用于无限宽非线性网络（平均场 /μP 缩放）和深度线性网络（比例高维极限）。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出两层次 DMFT 框架，首次联合分析宽神经网络中整体谱与异常值谱的演化。
  • 揭示μP 参数化下异常值动力学宽度一致性与学习率迁移机制，对比 NTK 参数化的宽度依赖性。
  • 通过玩具模型复现大规模输出任务中谱整体重构现象，并证明谱边缘在宽网络中收敛。
⚠️方法局限
  • 理论主要针对宽网络极限，有限宽度下的预测精度未验证。
  • 玩具模型对真实大规模任务的简化可能忽略关键因素。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We study the evolution of hidden-weight spectra in wide neural networks trained by (stochastic) gradient descent. We develop a two-level dynamical mean-field theory (DMFT) that jointly tracks bulk and outlier spectral dynamics for spiked ensembles whose spike directions remain statistically dependent on the random bulk. We apply this framework to two settings: (1) infinite-width nonlinear networks in mean-field/$\mu$P scaling and (2) deep linear networks in the proportional high-dimensional limit, where width, input dimension, and sample size diverge with fixed ratios. Our theory predicts how outliers evolve with training time, width, output scale, and initialization variance. In deep linear networks, $\mu$P yields width-consistent outlier dynamics and hyperparameter transfer, including width-stable growth of the leading NTK mode toward the edge of stability (EoS). In contrast, NTK parameterization exhibits strongly width-dependent outlier dynamics, despite converging to a stable large-width limit. We show that this bulk+outlier picture is descriptive of simple tasks with small output channels, but that tasks involving large numbers of outputs (ImageNet classification or GPT language modeling) are better described by a restructuring of the spectral bulk. We develop a toy model with extensive output channels that recapitulates this phenomenon and show that edge of the spectrum still converges for sufficiently wide networks.

A Rod Flow Model for Adam at the Edge of Stability

Medium 2605.06821
Eric Regis, Sinho Chewi
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：将 rod flow 模型扩展到 Adam 等自适应优化器，在边缘稳定性区域比稳定流更精确地跟踪离散迭代。
🎯研究动机

自适应梯度方法（如 Adam）在边缘稳定性区域运行，但现有连续时间模型主要针对梯度下降，缺乏对动量方法的扩展。

❓解决问题

如何为 Adam 等动量优化器建立精确的连续时间模型，以在边缘稳定性区域跟踪离散迭代。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

在参数和第一动量的联合相空间 (w, m) 中扩展 rod flow，将第二动量 ν 视为光滑辅助变量，并为八种优化器开发 rod flow。

📊实验结果

在代表性机器学习架构上对八种优化器进行实证评估，显示 rod flow 在边缘稳定性区域比稳定流更精确。

⭐主要贡献
  • 将 rod flow 模型扩展到 Adam、RMSProp、NAdam 等自适应优化器及动量方法。
  • 在代表性架构上实证验证 rod flow 比稳定流更精确地跟踪边缘稳定性区域的离散迭代。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于边缘稳定性区域，其他区域效果未知。
  • 计算复杂度可能高于简单流模型。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Cohen et al. ( arXiv:2207.14484 ) observed that adaptive gradient methods such as Adam operate at the edge of stability. While there has been significant work on continuous-time modeling of gradient descent at the edge of stability, extending these models to momentum methods remains underdeveloped. In the gradient descent setting, Regis et al. ( arXiv:2602.01480 ) introduced rod flow, which models consecutive iterates as an extended one-dimensional object -- a "rod." Here we extend rod flow to Adam by working in the joint phase space of parameters and first moment $(w, m)$ and treating the second moment $\nu$ as a smooth auxiliary variable. We also develop rod flows for heavy ball momentum, Nesterov momentum, and scalar and per-component versions of RMSProp, Adam, and NAdam. For all eight optimizers, we empirically evaluate rod flow on representative machine learning architectures, where it tracks the discrete iterates through the edge-of-stability regime significantly more accurately than the corresponding stable flow.

Decentralized Time-Varying Optimization for Streaming Data via Temporal Weighting

Medium 2605.06971
Muhammad Faraz Ul Abrar, Nicolò Michelusi, Erik G. Larsson
arXiv PDF eess.SP
TL;DR：针对流式数据的分布式时变优化问题，提出基于时间加权的分析框架，揭示去中心化梯度下降的跟踪误差分解。
🎯研究动机

经典优化理论多假设目标函数固定，但现代学习系统常面临动态环境，数据流式到达且需持续更新决策，现有方法缺乏对时变目标中流式数据来源的结构化建模。

❓解决问题

在分布式网络中，每个智能体持续接收新样本，网络需跟踪基于所有历史样本的时间加权目标的最小值，且受限于有限的通信 / 计算预算。

🔎现象分析

跟踪误差可分解为固定点跟踪项和由数据异质性引起的偏差项；均匀加权下固定点跟踪速率为 O(1/t)，指数折扣加权下存在由折扣因子控制的非零固定点跟踪下限；去中心化在常数步长下引入额外的非零偏差下限。

🛠️主要方法

采用结构化权重公式显式建模流式数据来源，通过不动点理论分析去中心化梯度下降的跟踪误差，并专门分析均匀加权和指数折扣加权两种策略。

📊实验结果

通过数值模拟验证理论发现。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出针对流式数据的时变优化问题的权重化框架，将目标函数与数据流显式关联
  • 通过不动点理论推导出跟踪误差的分解形式，揭示数据异质性导致的偏差项
  • 给出均匀加权和指数折扣加权下跟踪误差的收敛速率和下限
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅考虑强凸且光滑的损失函数，未扩展到非凸场景
  • 分析限于常数步长，未讨论自适应步长或更复杂的通信策略
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Classical optimization theory largely focuses on fixed objective functions, whereas many modern learning systems operate in dynamic environments where data arrive sequentially and decisions must be updated continuously. In this work, we study optimization with streaming data over a distributed network of agents. We adopt a structured, weight-based formulation that explicitly captures the streaming-data origin of the time-varying objective: at each time step, every agent receives a new sample, and the network seeks to track the minimizer of a temporally weighted objective formed from all samples observed across the network so far. We focus on decentralized gradient descent (DGD) with a limited communication/computation budget, where at each time step, only a limited number of DGD iterations can be performed before the objective changes again. For strongly convex and smooth losses, we analyze the tracking error with respect to the time-varying minimizer through a fixed-point theory lens. Our analysis reveals that the tracking error decomposes into a fixed-point tracking term and a bias term induced by data heterogeneity across agents. We specialize the analysis to two natural weighting strategies: uniform weights, which treat all samples equally, and exponentially discounted weights, which geometrically decay the influence of older data. Under uniform weighting, DGD tracks the fixed-point at a rate $\mathcal{O}(1/t)$, whereas discounted weighting yields a non-vanishing fixed-point tracking floor controlled by the discount factor. In both cases, decentralization induces an additional non-zero bias floor under a constant step size. We validate our theoretical findings through numerical simulations.

神经符号/混合 AI 7 篇 · 2 个细分

符号推理 + 神经网络 4 篇

Neurosymbolic Framework for Concept-Driven Logical Reasoning in Skeleton-Based Human Action Recognition

Medium 2605.07140
Talha Ilyas, Deval Mehta, Zongyuan Ge
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出神经符号框架，将骨架动作识别转化为基于概念的一阶逻辑推理，实现可解释的动作理解。
🎯研究动机

现有骨架动作识别模型性能强但缺乏可解释性，难以理解其决策逻辑，限制了在安全关键领域的应用。

❓解决问题

如何将骨架动作识别从黑箱模型转变为可解释的、基于逻辑推理的框架。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

使用时空骨架编码器提取潜在运动表示，通过时空概念解码器映射为可解释的概念谓词（姿态中心与动态中心），再经可微一阶逻辑层组合成逻辑规则，并利用 LLM 描述对齐概念语义。

📊实验结果

在 NTU RGB+D 60/120 和 NW-UCLA 数据集上进行了实验，识别性能具有竞争力，并提供可解释性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个将骨架动作识别重构为概念驱动一阶逻辑推理的神经符号框架。
  • 设计时空概念解码器显式分离姿态与动态抽象，并通过 LLM 对齐建立共享概念空间。
  • 在多个基准上取得竞争性性能，同时提供基于逻辑结构的可解释解释。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 LLM 描述的质量和覆盖范围。
  • 逻辑规则的可读性可能随动作复杂度下降。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Skeleton-based human activity recognition has achieved strong empirical performance, yet most existing models remain black boxes and difficult to interpret. In this work, we introduce a neurosymbolic formulation of skeleton-based HAR that reframes action recognition as concept-driven first-order logical reasoning over motion primitives. Our framework bridges representation learning and symbolic inference by grounding first-order logic predicates in learnable spatial and temporal motion concepts. Specifically, we employ a standard spatio-temporal skeleton encoder to extract latent motion representations, which are then mapped to interpretable concept predicates via a spatio-temporal concept decoder that explicitly separates pose-centric and dynamics-centric abstractions. These concept predicates are composed through differentiable first-order logic layers, enabling the model to learn human-readable logical rules that govern action semantics. To impose semantic structure on the learned concepts, we align skeleton representations with LLM-derived descriptions of atomic motion primitives, establishing a shared conceptual space for perception and reasoning. Extensive experiments on NTU RGB+D 60/120 and NW-UCLA demonstrate that our approach achieves competitive recognition performance while providing explicit, interpretable explanations grounded in logical structure. Our results highlight neurosymbolic reasoning as an effective paradigm for interpretable spatio-temporal action understanding. Code: this https URL

Bounded Fitting for Expressive Description Logics

Medium 2605.07452
Maurice Funk, Jean Christoph Jung, Tom Voellmer
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：将边界拟合扩展到更具表达力的描述逻辑，实现概念学习并保持 PAC 保证。
🎯研究动机

边界拟合是一种有吸引力的从标注数据学习逻辑公式的范式，提供 PAC 风格泛化保证，并可通过 SAT 求解器实现，但此前仅应用于 ALC 逻辑。

❓解决问题

研究边界拟合在更具表达力的描述逻辑（扩展了逆角色、限定数量约束和特征比较）中学习概念的理论条件和实践可行性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

研究边界拟合在扩展描述逻辑中保持理论性质的条件，并使用 SAT 求解器实现该学习器。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到与最先进的概念学习器比较，结果令人鼓舞。

⭐主要贡献
  • 确定了边界拟合在表达力更强的描述逻辑中保持 PAC 保证的条件。
  • 实现了基于 SAT 求解器的概念学习工具，并与现有方法比较，展示了实用性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定类型的描述逻辑扩展。
  • 实际性能可能受限于 SAT 求解器的可扩展性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Bounded fitting is an attractive paradigm for learning logical formulas from labeled data examples that offers PAC-style generalization guarantees and can often be implemented leveraging SAT solvers. It has been successfully applied to learning concepts of the description logic ALC. We study bounded fitting for learning concepts in expressive description logics that extend ALC with inverse roles, qualified number restrictions, and feature comparisons. We investigate under which conditions bounded fitting keeps its favorable theoretical properties in this setting, and implement it using a SAT solver. We compare our tool with state-of-the-art concept learners with encouraging results, demonstrating that it is a practical approach to expressive concept learning.

Tacit Knowledge Extraction via Logic Augmented Generation and Active Inference

Medium 2605.07639
Lorenzo Lamazzi, Aldo Gangemi, Alessio Giberti, Andrea Giovanni Nuzzolese, Vittorio Andrea Rocca, Mattia Torta, Francesco Poggi
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出神经符号框架结合逻辑增强生成与主动推理，从视频中提取隐性知识构建知识图谱。
🎯研究动机

隐性知识难以形式化，现有知识工程管道无法将过程性隐性知识转化为可查询、验证和推理的机器可解释表示。

❓解决问题

如何从程序性领域（如制造装配维修）的视频中提取隐性知识并构建形式化的知识图谱。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

结合逻辑增强生成（Logic-Augmented Generation）和基于主动推理（Active Inference）的本体引导知识图谱构建方法。

📊实验结果

在制造领域的装配维修视频数据集上进行知识迁移案例研究，结果显示方法提升了完整性和语义质量。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种神经符号框架，融合逻辑增强生成与主动推理用于隐性知识提取。
  • 在制造领域的维修视频案例中验证了方法，提升了知识图谱的完整性和语义质量。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量的本体设计。
  • 视频领域可能限制泛化到其他模态。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Tacit knowledge plays a central role in human expertise, yet it remains difficult to capture, formalize, and reuse in machine-interpretable form. This challenge is especially relevant in procedural domains, where successful execution depends not only on explicit instructions, but also on implicit assumptions, contextual constraints, embodied skills, and experience-based judgments rarely documented. As a result, current knowledge engineering pipelines struggle to transform tacit and process-centric knowledge into formally specified, machine-interpretable representations that can be queried, validated, reasoned over, and reused. In this paper, we introduce a neuro-symbolic framework that combines Logic-Augmented Generation and an Active-Inference-inspired approach for ontology-grounded Knowledge Graph construction. We evaluate the approach in a knowledge transfer case study in manufacturing, using assembly-like repair procedures from instructional videos as a reproducible proxy domain. Results show that the proposed solution improves completeness and semantic quality, advancing neuro-symbolic knowledge engineering for industrial domains.

Abductive Reasoning with Probabilistic Commonsense

Medium 2605.08011
Joseph Cotnareanu, Chiara Roverato, Han Zhou, Didier Chetelat, Yingxue Zhang, Mark Coates
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出概率溯因常识推理框架 PACS，通过 LLM 采样个体常识信念并聚合结论，提升溯因推理性能。
🎯研究动机

现有神经符号方法假设常识事实普遍一致，但现实中个体常识信念存在差异，导致推理不准确。

❓解决问题

如何建模个体间常识信念的变异性，实现鲁棒的溯因常识推理。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 PACS 算法，利用 LLM 和形式化求解器采样反映个体不同常识信念的证明，并聚合这些样本的结论。

📊实验结果

在多个基准上，PACS 优于链式思维推理、先前神经符号方法和基于搜索的方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出概率溯因常识推理框架，显式建模个体常识信念的变异性。
  • 设计 PACS 算法，结合 LLM 和形式化求解器进行采样与聚合。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 LLM 生成多样信念的质量。
  • 采样效率可能受限于证明空间大小。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent efforts to improve the reasoning abilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) have focused on integrating formal logic solvers within neurosymbolic frameworks. A key challenge is that formal solvers lack commonsense world knowledge, preventing them from making reasoning steps that humans find obvious. Prior methods address this by using LLMs to supply missing commonsense assumptions, but these approaches implicitly assume universal agreement on such commonsense facts. In reality, commonsense beliefs vary across individuals. We propose a probabilistic framework for abductive commonsense reasoning that explicitly models this variation, aiming to determine whether most people would judge a statement as true or false. We introduce Probabilistic Abductive CommonSense (PACS), a novel algorithm that uses an LLM and a formal solver to sample proofs as observations of individuals' distinct commonsense beliefs, and aggregates conclusions across these samples. Empirically, PACS outperforms chain-of-thought reasoning, prior neurosymbolic methods, and search-based approaches across multiple benchmarks.

物理引导 3 篇

2.5-D Decomposition for LLM-Based Spatial Construction

High 2605.07066
Paul Whitten, Li-Jen Chen, Sharath Baddam
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出 2.5-D 分解神经符号管线，将 LLM 的 3D 空间构建任务简化为 2D 平面规划 + 确定性垂直计算，显著提升结构准确率。
🎯研究动机

自主系统需从自然语言指令构建结构，但 LLM 在生成 3D 块放置时存在系统性坐标错误，现有方法难以可靠处理空间推理。

❓解决问题

LLM 在三维空间构建任务中产生系统性坐标错误，导致结构准确率低。

🔎现象分析

LLM 在 3D 坐标生成中存在系统性错误，而垂直维度受重力约束可确定性计算，将垂直维度从 LLM 输出空间移除可消除整类错误。

🛠️主要方法

神经符号管线：LLM 仅规划二维水平面布局，确定性执行器根据列占用计算所有垂直放置。

📊实验结果

在 Build What I Mean 基准（160 轮）上，GPT-4o-mini+ 本管线 12 次独立运行平均结构准确率 94.6%，接近上限 97.6%；消融实验确认 2.5-D 分解贡献 50.7 个百分点；边缘硬件 Nemotron-3 120B 在 Jetson Thor AGX 上达到 94.5%；在 500 个 IGLU 协作构建任务上验证泛化性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 2.5-D 分解方法，将 LLM 的 3D 构建任务分解为 2D 规划 + 确定性垂直计算，消除垂直维度错误。
  • 在 Build What I Mean 基准上达到 94.6% 结构准确率，优于 GPT-4o（90.3%）和最佳竞品（76.3%），并可直接迁移至边缘硬件。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖确定性垂直计算，仅适用于重力等物理约束固定自由度的任务。
  • 未处理水平面内 LLM 可能产生的错误。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Autonomous systems that build structures from natural-language instructions need reliable spatial reasoning, yet large language models (LLMs) make systematic coordinate errors when generating three-dimensional block placements. We present a neuro-symbolic pipeline based on \emph{2.5-D decomposition}: the LLM plans in the two-dimensional horizontal plane while a deterministic executor computes all vertical placement from column occupancy, eliminating an entire class of errors. On the Build What I Mean benchmark (160 rounds), GPT-4o-mini with this pipeline achieves 94.6\% mean structural accuracy across 12 independent runs, within 3.0 percentage points of the 97.6\% ceiling imposed by architect-agent errors that no builder-side improvement can address. This outperforms both GPT-4o at 90.3\% and the best competing system at 76.3\%. A controlled ablation confirms that 2.5-D decomposition is the dominant contributor, accounting for 50.7 percentage points of accuracy. The pipeline transfers directly to edge hardware: Nemotron-3 120B running locally on an NVIDIA Jetson Thor AGX matches the cloud result at 94.5\% with no prompt modifications. The underlying principle, removing deterministic dimensions from the LLM's output space, applies to any autonomous construction or assembly task where gravity or other physical constraints fix one or more degrees of freedom. A transfer experiment on 500 IGLU collaborative building tasks confirm the effect generalizes beyond the primary benchmark.

Excluding the Target Domain Improves Extrapolation: Deconfounded Hierarchical Physics Constraints

Medium 2605.07485
Tsuyoshi Okita
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出去混杂层次门控机制，通过排除目标域数据预训练提升物理约束生成模型的外推性能。
🎯研究动机

物理约束深度生成模型在分布外条件下外推困难，现有方法将物理约束作为单一静态正则项，忽视物理定律的层次结构和混杂变量问题。

❓解决问题

解决物理约束生成模型在温度混杂下的外推性能退化问题，特别是层次化物理约束中的混杂偏差。

🔎现象分析

摘要发现反直觉现象：预训练时排除目标域数据比包含目标域数据的外推性能提升 39%，因为 FNO 学习到域无关的物理模式，在目标域被排除时迁移更有效。

🛠️主要方法

提出去混杂层次门控（DHG），结合 do 算子的反事实估计和后门调整去除温度混杂，然后逐步应用由粗到细的物理约束。

📊实验结果

在锂离子电池温度外推基准上（训练于 24°C，评估于 4.0-43.0°C），方法达到 RMSE=0.215，比无约束基线（Pure CFM: 0.397）提升 46%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 DHG 机制，诊断并控制温度混杂对层次约束的影响，使门控反映内在物理不一致而非虚假温度效应。
  • 发现并验证预训练排除目标域数据可显著提升外推性能，揭示域无关物理模式迁移的有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖温度作为主要混杂变量，可能不适用于其他类型混杂。
  • 反事实估计和后门调整需要因果图假设，实际应用中可能难以准确指定。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Extrapolation to out-of-distribution conditions is a fundamental challenge for physics-constrained deep generative models. Existing methods apply physical constraints as a single static regularization term uniformly across the generation process, and address neither the hierarchical structure of physical laws and the confounding variable problem. We propose the Deconfounded Hierarchical Gate (DHG), which serves as a diagnostic and control mechanism: it identifies when and how strongly temperature confounding contaminates each constraint level, so that hierarchical gates reflect intrinsic physical inconsistency rather than spurious temperature effects. DHG combines counterfactual estimation via the do-operator with backdoor adjustment to remove confounding, then applies Coarse-to-Fine physical constraints progressively. We report a counter-intuitive finding in pretraining: excluding the target-domain data from pretraining outperforms including it by 39% in extrapolation performance (RMSE 0.224 vs. 0.324). This occurs because FNO learns domain-agnostic physical patterns that transfer more effectively when the target domain is withheld. On a lithium-ion battery temperature extrapolation benchmark (trained at 24 degrees Celsius, evaluated at 4.0--43.0 degrees Celsius), our method achieves RMSE = 0.215, a 46% improvement over the unconstrained baseline (Pure CFM: 0.397).

Geometric Kolmogorov--Arnold Network (GeoKAN)

Medium 2605.06740
Abhijit Sen, Bikram Keshari Parida, Giridas Maiti, Mahima Arya, Denys I. Bondar
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：GeoKAN 通过学习黎曼度量实现几何自适应坐标变换，提升 KAN 在科学机器学习中的逼近效率。
🎯研究动机

标准 KAN 在固定欧几里得坐标下进行逼近，难以有效处理具有尖锐、刚性、局部化或强非均匀特征的科学计算问题，需要几何自适应能力。

❓解决问题

如何让 KAN 模型在输入空间中进行几何自适应坐标变换，以在任务相关区域动态分配表示分辨率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出通过拉伸快速变化区域、压缩平滑区域可重新分配表示容量。

🛠️主要方法

学习一个对角黎曼度量来扭曲输入空间，在基展开和特征混合前进行几何自适应坐标变换；提出三种变体：GeoKAN-NNMetric、GeoKAN-γ 和 LM-KAN（含 RBF、Wav、Fourier 三种基）。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 GeoKAN 框架，将几何自适应坐标变换引入 KAN 模型。
  • 开发三种变体，支持不同基函数和度量学习方式。
  • 在物理信息学习场景中，通过度量影响微分结构，提供几何归纳偏置。
⚠️方法局限
  • 对角度量假设可能限制几何变形的表达能力。
  • 度量学习可能增加计算开销，尤其在高维输入时。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce Geometric Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks (GeoKANs), a family of geometry-aware KAN-type models in which approximation is carried out in learned, geometry-adapted coordinates rather than in fixed Euclidean input coordinates. GeoKAN achieves this by learning a diagonal Riemannian metric that warps the input before basis expansion and feature mixing. The learned metric provides a geometric inductive bias through local length scaling and volume distortion, and in physics-informed settings it also affects the differential structure seen by the model. Within this framework, we develop three main variants, namely GeoKAN-NNMetric, GeoKAN-$\gamma$, and LM-KAN. For LM-KAN, we further consider three basis-specific versions, LM-KAN-RBF, LM-KAN-Wav, and LM-KAN-Fourier. These variants allow us to study geometry-aware KAN models both as general function approximators and as surrogates in physics-informed learning. By stretching regions with rapid variation and compressing smoother regions, GeoKAN reallocates representational resolution in a task-dependent manner, allowing the model to place capacity where it is most needed. As a result, GeoKAN is well suited to sharp, stiff, localized, and strongly non-uniform regimes arising in scientific machine learning and differential-equation problems.

因果推理 6 篇 · 4 个细分

因果发现/结构学习 2 篇

Physical Simulators as Do-Operators: Causal Discovery under Latent Confounders for AI-for-Science

High 2605.07467
Tsuyoshi Okita
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 CFM-SD 方法，利用物理模拟器作为 do 算子，在存在潜在混杂因素的情况下进行因果发现，显著优于现有方法。
🎯研究动机

在 AI for Science 场景（如分子设计、材料科学）中，潜在混杂因素普遍存在，而现有干预因果发现方法假设因果充分性且依赖合成模拟器中的虚拟干预，无法处理真实数据中的混杂问题。

❓解决问题

在存在潜在混杂因素且真实干预成本高昂（物理模拟每次需数小时至数天）的条件下，如何高效地进行因果结构发现。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 CFM-SD（Causal Flow Matching with Simulation Data），将第一性原理物理模拟器作为 Pearl 干预演算中的 do 算子，同时处理潜在混杂因素和真实干预数据。

📊实验结果

在合成数据（γ=0.2-0.8）上，CFM-SD 平均 F1=0.800，基线 F1=0.127-0.562；在真实科学数据上，分子毒性预测和电池电解质优化中偏差减少 57-58%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 理论上证明在物理可实现性约束下，d 变量因果结构可通过 O(d)次单变量干预识别，达到最小干预次数。
  • 在合成数据和真实科学数据上验证方法有效性，显著优于现有基线。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖物理模拟器的可用性和准确性。
  • 理论结果可能对干预类型有特定假设。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Existing interventional causal discovery methods -- IGSP, DCDI, ENCO -- assume causal sufficiency (no latent confounders) and rely on virtual interventions in synthetic simulators. In AI-for-Science settings such as molecular design and materials science, latent confounders are ubiquitous and real interventions (e.g., physics-based simulations) require hours to days per data point. We propose CFM-SD (Causal Flow Matching with Simulation Data), which uses first-principles physical simulators as do-operators in Pearl's interventional calculus to simultaneously handle latent confounders and real interventional data. Theoretically, $d$-variable causal structure is identifiable with $O(d)$ single-variable interventions -- the minimum under physical realizability constraints. In Intrinsic Evaluation on synthetic data ($\gamma=0.2$--$0.8$), CFM-SD achieves average F1$=0.800$ vs. F1$=0.127$--$0.562$ for all baselines. In Extrinsic Evaluation on real scientific data, CFM-SD achieves 57--58\% bias reduction in molecular toxicity prediction and battery electrolyte optimization, demonstrating practical value beyond synthetic benchmarks.

Mask2Cause: Causal Discovery via Adjacency Constrained Causal Attention

Medium 2605.07280
Omar Muhammad, Pasupuleti Dhruv Shivkant, Deepak N. Subramani
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出端到端因果发现框架 Mask2Cause，通过邻接约束掩码注意力在预测前向传播中直接恢复因果图。
🎯研究动机

现有神经方法依赖组件式架构无法捕获共享系统动态，或采用解耦的后验图提取易过拟合虚假相关，导致时间序列因果发现效果不佳。

❓解决问题

如何在时间序列预测过程中端到端地学习因果结构，避免后验提取的过拟合问题并降低参数复杂度。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Mask2Cause 框架，包含倒置变量嵌入和邻接约束掩码注意力机制，通过同方差或异方差目标训练，在预测前向传播中直接恢复因果图。

📊实验结果

在从合成混沌动力学到真实生物模拟的多种基准上，实现了最先进的因果发现，参数复杂度显著低于标准基线；推断的因果结构可使预测模型参数平均减少 70% 以上，同时保持预测精度。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出端到端因果发现框架，在预测前向传播中直接恢复因果图，避免后验提取的过拟合。
  • 引入邻接约束掩码注意力机制，有效捕获均值和方差中的因果影响，显著降低参数复杂度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对高维时间序列的扩展性有限。
  • 异方差目标的训练稳定性可能需要进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Leveraging deep learning for causal discovery in time series remains challenging because existing neural methods predominantly rely on component-wise architectures that fail to capture shared system dynamics or employ decoupled post-hoc graph extraction that risks overfitting to spurious correlations. We propose $\textbf{Mask2Cause}$, an end-to-end framework that recovers the underlying causal graph directly during the forecasting forward pass. Our approach introduces an Inverted Variable Embedding and an Adjacency-Constrained Masked Attention mechanism, trained with homoscedastic or heteroscedastic objectives to capture causal influences in both mean and variance. Empirical results on diverse benchmarks, from synthetic chaotic dynamics to realistic biological simulations, demonstrate state-of-the-art causal discovery with significantly reduced parameter complexity compared to standard baselines. We further show that inferred causal structures can be used to reduce parameter count of forecasting models by more than 70% on average while maintaining predictive accuracy.

因果推断/处理效应 2 篇

Optimal Experiments for Partial Causal Effect Identification

Medium 2605.06993
Tobias Maringgele, Jalal Etesami
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出在成本约束下选择最优实验子集以收紧部分可识别因果查询边界的方法，证明问题 NP-hard，并引入图剪枝准则高效求解。
🎯研究动机

因果查询常仅部分可识别，实验成本高昂，需在有限预算下选择能最大程度收紧边界的实验子集。

❓解决问题

在观察实验前，选择成本约束下的实验子集，最大化目标查询边界宽度的最坏情况缩减。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

形式化为最大效力问题，证明 NP-hard；基于多项式规划框架评估离散设置下的认知效力；引入路径拦截规则和 ID 算法剪枝准则，缩减候选实验空间。

📊实验结果

在 Erdos-Renyi 随机图和 11 个 bnlearn 基准网络上验证剪枝效果，并在 NHANES 观测数据上展示端到端实验选择。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化成本约束下最优实验选择问题并证明 NP-hard
  • 提出两种图剪枝准则，平均剪枝 50-88% 候选实验
  • 证明 ID 剪枝实验组合惰性，实现超指数级子集缩减
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法限于离散设置
  • 剪枝准则依赖因果图结构，可能不适用于复杂图
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Causal queries are often only partially identifiable from observational data, and experiments that could tighten the resulting bounds are typically costly. We study the problem of selecting, prior to observing experimental outcomes, a cost-constrained subset of experiments that maximally tightens bounds on a target query. We formalize this as the max-potency problem, where epistemic potency measures the worst-case reduction in bound width guaranteed by an experiment, and show that this problem is NP-hard via a reduction from 0-1 knapsack. Building on the polynomial-programming framework of Duarte et al. (2023), we give a general procedure for evaluating epistemic potency in discrete settings. To control the super-exponential search space, we introduce two graphical pruning criteria that depend only on the causal graph and the query: a novel path-interception rule that exploits district structure to certify zero potency in linear time, and an identifiability check based on the ID algorithm. On Erdos-Renyi random graphs and 11 bnlearn benchmark networks, the two criteria together prune 50-88% of candidate experiments on average without solving a single polynomial program. For the general subset search, we show that ID-pruned experiments are combinatorially inert, yielding a super-exponential reduction in the number of subsets evaluated. We close with an end-to-end demonstration on observational NHANES data, selecting optimal experiments for estimating the effect of physical activity on diabetes.

BGM-IV: an AI-powered Bayesian generative modeling approach for instrumental variable analysis

Medium 2605.07029
Guyue Luo, Qiao Liu
arXiv PDF stat.ML
TL;DR：提出一种贝叶斯生成式方法 BGM-IV，通过结构化潜变量建模解决高维协变量下的非线性工具变量回归问题。
🎯研究动机

传统工具变量回归在处理非线性结构和高维协变量时面临挑战，现有方法在因果信息嵌入高维表示时效果不佳。

❓解决问题

高维协变量下非线性工具变量回归的因果效应估计问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

将非线性 IV 回归重构为因果结构化潜空间中的后验推断，通过 IV 集成伪似然替代混淆结果似然，分离共享混杂、结果特异、处理特异和协变量噪声等潜成分。

📊实验结果

在多个基准数据集上，BGM-IV 在经典低维场景中保持竞争力，在高维协变量场景中表现最佳。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 BGM-IV，一种基于潜贝叶斯生成模型的非线性 IV 回归方法。
  • 通过结构化潜变量分解和 IV 集成伪似然有效处理高维协变量下的内生性问题。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对潜变量模型的结构假设敏感。
  • 计算复杂度可能较高，尤其在高维场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Instrumental-variable (IV) regression enables causal estimation under endogeneity, but modern IV problems often involve nonlinear structural effects and high-dimensional covariates. Existing nonlinear IV methods directly learn the causal relation in observed feature space or rely on learned representations within two-stage or moment-based procedures, which can struggle when the causal information is embedded in a high-dimensional representation. We propose BGM-IV, a latent Bayesian generative modeling approach that reframes nonlinear IV regression as posterior inference in a causally structured latent space. BGM-IV infers latent components that separately capture shared confounding structure, outcome-specific variation, treatment-specific variation, and covariate-only nuisance information. To account for endogeneity, BGM-IV replaces the confounded outcome likelihood with an IV-integrated pseudo-likelihood that averages over instrument-induced treatment values within the latent model. Across various benchmark datasets, BGM-IV remains competitive in the classical low-dimensional regime and performs best in high-dimensional covariate regimes. Together, these results show that structured latent generative modeling provides a principled and effective strategy to nonlinear IV estimation with rich covariates. The code of BGM-IV is available at this https URL .

反事实推理 1 篇

Three-in-One World Model: Energy-Based Consistency, Prediction, and Counterfactual Inference for Marketing Intervention

Medium 2605.07199
Junichiro Niimi
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出三合一世界模型，用 DBM 学习统一信念表征，同时支持能量一致性、预测和反事实推理，在营销干预中优于元学习器。
🎯研究动机

当前预测和语言模型无法统一捕捉营销决策中消费者异质性、时变状态和干预的交互结构。

❓解决问题

如何在一个统一框架中同时实现营销干预的能量一致性评估、结果预测和反事实推理。

🔎现象分析

DBM 信念表征能够解耦潜在特质，并在反事实查询中保持有效性；自由能钳制惩罚缺乏促销暴露的反事实轨迹，且惩罚强度与潜在基础偏好方向一致。

🛠️主要方法

使用 Deep Boltzmann Machine 从人口统计、时间和滞后动作 / 结果中学习冻结的信念表征，在其上附加轻量级任务特定适配器，通过同一信念支持三个任务。

📊实验结果

在受控模拟中，适配器在访问和购买 AUC 上匹配强 MLP 基线，在恢复异质性处理效应上显著优于 S、T、X、DR-learner 和因果森林，尤其在混杂价格 - 促销干预上差距最大。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出三合一世界模型架构，统一能量一致性、预测和反事实推理。
  • 在模拟中证明 DBM 信念能恢复异质性处理效应，优于多种元学习器和因果森林。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅在模拟数据上验证，未在真实营销数据上测试。
  • DBM 训练可能对超参数敏感，且冻结信念可能限制对新任务的适应性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Marketing decisions reflect the interaction of latent consumer heterogeneity, time-varying internal states, and explicit interventions, a structure that current prediction- and language-oriented models do not capture in a unified manner. We propose a Three-in-One world-model architecture in which a Deep Boltzmann Machine (DBM) learns a frozen belief representation from demographics, time, and lagged actions and outcomes, with lightweight task-specific adapters attached on top. The same belief supports three tasks within a single framework: (i) energy-based consistency evaluation through the DBM's free energy, (ii) outcome prediction through adapters, and (iii) counterfactual inference by holding the belief fixed and varying only the action input given to the adapter. Using a controlled simulation in which the latent price sensitivity, promotion responsiveness, and base preference of each consumer are known, we show that the adapters match a strong MLP baseline on visit- and purchase-AUC while recovering heterogeneous treatment effects substantially better than S-, T-, X-, and DR-learner meta-learners and a Causal Forest baseline built on the same raw features, with the largest gap on a confounded price-promotion intervention. Complementing this, free-energy clamps systematically penalize counterfactual purchase trajectories that lack prior promotional exposure, and the penalty itself depends on the latent base preference in the expected direction. These results indicate that DBM beliefs disentangle latent traits in a form that survives counterfactual queries, providing an integrated world-model substrate for marketing intervention.

异质性处理效应 1 篇

Causal EpiNets: Precision-corrected Bounds on Individual Treatment Effects using Epistemic Neural Networks

Medium 2605.07065
Gandharv Patil, Keyi Tang, Raquel Aoki, Leo Guelman
arXiv PDF stat.ML
TL;DR：提出因果 EpiNets，用认知神经网络实现有限样本下个体治疗效应的精确校正边界估计。
🎯研究动机

个体治疗效应无法从数据中点识别，PNS 通过交叉边界提供个体级因果表征，但标准插件估计器在有限样本中违反结构概率约束并受极值偏差影响，导致区间过窄。

❓解决问题

解决有限样本下 PNS 估计中结构约束违反和极值偏差导致的区间覆盖不足问题。

🔎现象分析

标准插件估计器在有限样本中系统性失败：违反结构概率约束，且因 max-min 算子引入极值偏差，产生虚假窄区间。

🛠️主要方法

提出锚定神经网络架构保证结构约束满足，并利用认知神经网络进行高维不确定性量化，实现精度校正的交叉边界推断。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出锚定神经网络架构，确保结构概率约束的精确满足。
  • 将认知神经网络用于高维不确定性量化，校正极值偏差，实现有限样本下精确的 PNS 边界估计。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖实验和观测数据的联合可用性。
  • 认知神经网络的训练和推断计算成本可能较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Individual treatment effects are not point-identified from data. The Probability of Necessity and Sufficiency (PNS) circumvents this limitation by characterizing individual-level causality through intersection bounds derived from combined experimental and observational data. In finite samples, however, standard plug-in estimators systematically fail: they violate structural probability constraints and suffer from extremum bias induced by max-min operators, yielding spuriously narrow intervals. We propose a neural framework for finite-sample PNS estimation that resolves both pathologies. We introduce an anchored neural architecture that guarantees structural constraint satisfaction by construction. To correct extremum bias, we employ precision-corrected intersection-bound inference, leveraging Epistemic Neural Networks for scalable, high-dimensional uncertainty quantification. Empirical evaluations confirm that this approach maintains nominal coverage and exact constraint validity in high-dimensional regimes where standard estimators systematically undercover.

基础设施/软硬件 6 篇 · 3 个细分

推理加速系统 4 篇

MISA: Mixture of Indexer Sparse Attention for Long-Context LLM Inference

High 2605.07363
Ruijie Zhou, Fanxu Meng, Yufei Xu, Tongxuan Liu, Guangming Lu, Muhan Zhang, Wenjie Pei
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：MISA 通过混合专家路由机制大幅降低长上下文 LLM 推理中稀疏注意力索引器的计算开销。
🎯研究动机

长上下文 LLM 推理中，稀疏注意力虽能降低主注意力计算量，但其索引器因使用多头设计（如 DeepSeek-V3.2 的 64 头）成为主要计算瓶颈，尤其在长序列上开销巨大。

❓解决问题

如何在不牺牲索引器表达能力和选择质量的前提下，显著减少索引器每查询的计算成本。

🔎现象分析

DSA 索引器使用多头共享同一选中 token 集，导致每查询需对所有前缀 token 进行所有头的评分，计算量随上下文长度线性增长。

🛠️主要方法

将 DSA 索引器头视为专家池，通过轻量路由器基于块级统计选择少量活跃头，仅这些头执行细粒度 token 评分；进一步提出分层变体，用路由结果扩大候选集后经原 DSA 索引器重排序以近似精确选择。

📊实验结果

在 LongBench 上使用 DeepSeek-V3.2 和 GLM-5 评估，MISA 以 8 个活跃头匹配 DSA 索引器性能（分别减少 8 倍和 4 倍头数），并优于 HISA；在 128K 上下文上保持完整绿色 Needle-in-a-Haystack 热力图，每层恢复超过 92% 的 DSA 索引器选中 token。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MISA，一种即插即用的稀疏注意力索引器替代方案，通过混合专家路由将每查询评分头数从 64 降至 8。
  • 引入分层 MISA 变体，在保持高选择恢复率（>92%）的同时进一步降低开销。
  • 在 LongBench 上匹配 DSA 索引器性能，并在 H200 GPU 上实现约 3.82 倍加速。
⚠️方法局限
  • 路由器的块级统计可能在某些极端长上下文或特殊查询模式下引入偏差。
  • 分层变体需要额外的重排序步骤，可能增加少量延迟。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) sets the state of the art for fine-grained inference-time sparse attention by introducing a learned token-wise indexer that scores every prefix token and selects the most relevant ones for the main attention. To remain expressive, the indexer uses many query heads (for example, 64 on DeepSeek-V3.2) that share the same selected token set; this multi-head design is precisely what makes the indexer the dominant cost on long contexts. We propose MISA (Mixture of Indexer Sparse Attention), a drop-in replacement for the DSA indexer that treats its indexer heads as a pool of mixture-of-experts. A lightweight router uses cheap block-level statistics to pick a query-dependent subset of only a few active heads, and only those heads run the heavy token-level scoring. This preserves the diversity of the original indexer pool while reducing the per-query cost from scoring every prefix token with every head to scoring it with only a handful of routed heads, plus a negligible router term computed on a small set of pooled keys. We further introduce a hierarchical variant of MISA that uses the routed pass to keep an enlarged candidate set and then re-ranks it with the original DSA indexer to recover the final selected tokens almost exactly. With only eight active heads and no additional training, MISA matches the dense DSA indexer on LongBench across DeepSeek-V3.2 and GLM-5 while running with eight and four times fewer indexer heads respectively, and outperforms HISA on average. It also preserves fully green Needle-in-a-Haystack heatmaps up to a 128K-token context and recovers more than 92% of the tokens selected by the DSA indexer per layer. Our TileLang kernel delivers roughly a 3.82 times speedup over DSA's original indexer kernel on a single NVIDIA H200 GPU.

An Efficient Hybrid Sparse Attention with CPU-GPU Parallelism for Long-Context Inference

High 2605.07719
Feiyu Yao, Zhixiong Niu, Xiaqing Li, Yongqiang Xiong, Juan Fang, Qian Wang
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：Fluxion 通过 CPU-GPU 协同稀疏注意力机制，在长上下文推理中实现 1.5-3.7 倍加速且质量损失极小。
🎯研究动机

长上下文推理中 KV 缓存常驻 CPU 内存，GPU 显存不足或分离式架构导致数据在主机内存中，现有稀疏注意力方法受限于 PCIe 带宽、元数据开销及 CPU-GPU 协同效率低。

❓解决问题

如何设计高效的 CPU-GPU 混合稀疏注意力机制，在保持推理质量的同时最大化系统效率。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

Fluxion 结合输出感知 KV 预算、头特定粒度感知稀疏配置和跨设备协调执行，包含轻量级头属性预测器、粒度预算选择器和优先级调度器。

📊实验结果

在 2 个模型、3 个基准、40 个任务上，Fluxion 相对于全注意力平均退化仅 -0.26，相比最强固定稀疏混合基线（KV 预算仅 0.05）实现 1.5-3.7 倍加速。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出输出感知 KV 预算、头特定稀疏配置和跨设备协调执行三个关键洞察。
  • 设计 Fluxion 系统，实现混合稀疏注意力在长上下文推理中的准确性和系统效率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定硬件配置（CPU-GPU 协同），通用性待验证。
  • 稀疏配置的粒度选择可能增加调参复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Long-context inference increasingly operates over CPU-resident KV caches, either because decoding-time KV states exceed GPU memory capacity or because disaggregated prefill-decode systems place KV data in host memory. Although block-sparse attention reduces attention cost in this setting, sparsity alone is insufficient for end-to-end efficiency. GPU-only designs remain constrained by PCIe bandwidth and metadata memory overhead, while CPU-GPU hybrid designs still suffer from substantial GPU idle time and bottlenecks in CPU-side top-k selection and sparse attention computation. Fluxion is built on three key insights: output-aware KV budgeting, head-specific and granularity-aware sparse configuration, and cross-device coordinated execution for sparse attention over CPU-resident KV caches. Guided by these insights, Fluxion combines a lightweight head-property predictor, a granularity-budget selector, and a priority-based scheduler to jointly optimize budget allocation, sparse configuration, and CPU-GPU execution overlap. This co-design enables hybrid sparse attention to achieve both accuracy and system efficiency in long-context inference. Across 2 models, 3 benchmarks, and 40 tasks, Fluxion preserves quality well -- the worst average degradation is only -0.26 relative to FULL, while delivering 1.5$\times$-3.7$\times$ speedup over the strongest fixed sparse hybrid baseline, whose KV budget is only 0.05.

Dooly: Configuration-Agnostic, Redundancy-Aware Profiling for LLM Inference Simulation

High 2605.07985
Joon Ha Kim, Geon-Woo Kim, Anoop Rachakonda, Daehyeok Kim
arXiv PDF cs.DC
TL;DR：Dooly 通过配置无关和冗余感知的分析方法，大幅降低 LLM 推理模拟的配置探索成本。
🎯研究动机

选择最优 LLM 推理配置需要评估多种硬件、引擎、注意力后端和模型架构，但现有基于 profile 的模拟器硬编码操作集，每次重新 profile 所有操作，导致探索成本过高。

❓解决问题

如何高效地对 LLM 推理配置进行 profile，避免重复计算冗余操作，从而加速模拟器配置探索。

🔎现象分析

每个操作的输入维度要么由模型配置固定，要么由请求决定；许多模型配置值（如 head size、层数）在不同模型中重复出现，因此同一操作会在多种配置下运行，只需一次扫描请求相关维度即可覆盖所有配置。

🛠️主要方法

Dooly 执行单次推理，通过污点传播标记每个输入维度的来源，仅 profile 数据库中缺失的操作；对有状态操作（如 attention）复用服务引擎的初始化代码，避免手动插桩；基于数据库构建延迟回归模型，作为现有模拟器的即插即用后端。

📊实验结果

在两种 GPU 平台、三种注意力后端和多种模型架构上评估，模拟精度 TTFT MAPE<5%，TPOT MAPE<8%，profile GPU 小时减少 56.4%（12 个模型）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出配置无关、冗余感知的 profile 方法，通过污点传播和选择性 profile 减少重复计算
  • 在多种 GPU、注意力后端和模型架构上实现高精度模拟（TTFT MAPE<5%，TPOT MAPE<8%），同时减少 56.4% 的 profile GPU 小时
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定服务引擎的初始化代码，迁移到新引擎需适配
  • 未讨论对非标准模型架构（如 MoE）的适用性
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Selecting the optimal LLM inference configuration requires evaluation across hardware, serving engines, attention backends, and model architectures, since no single choice performs best across all workloads. Profile-based simulators are the standard tool, yet they hardcode their operation set to a specific configuration and re-profile every operation from scratch, making exploration prohibitively expensive. This cost stems from a missing structural understanding: every input dimension of each operation is fixed by the model configuration or determined by the incoming request. Many model-configuration values (e.g., head size, layer count) recur across models, so the same operation runs in many configurations; a single sweep over the request-dependent dimensions can serve them all. We present Dooly, which exploits this structure to achieve configuration-agnostic, redundancy-aware profiling. Dooly performs a single inference pass, labels each input dimension with its origin via taint propagation, and selectively profiles only operations absent from its latency database; stateful operations such as attention are isolated by reusing the serving engine's own initialization code, eliminating manual instrumentation. It builds latency regression models based on the database, which becomes a drop-in backend for existing simulators. Across two GPU platforms, three attention backends, and diverse model architectures, Dooly achieves simulation accuracy within 5% MAPE for TTFT and 8% for TPOT while reducing profiling GPU-hours by 56.4% across 12 models compared to the existing profiling approach.

Regulating Branch Parallelism in LLM Serving

High 2605.06914
Swapnil Gandhi, Siva Hari, William J. Dally, Christos Kozyrakis
arXiv PDF cs.DC
TL;DR：TAPER 通过每步准入控制调节分支并行度，在 LLM 服务中提升吞吐并维持 SLO。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 服务系统在暴露请求内分支并行时，要么激进准入导致共享解码阶段延迟膨胀，损害同批请求；要么保守固定上限牺牲吞吐，缺乏动态调节能力。

❓解决问题

如何动态控制 LLM 服务中分支并行度，在避免分支外部性（额外步延迟）的同时最大化吞吐。

🔎现象分析

摘要观察到：激进准入会膨胀共享解码步延迟，损害同批串行阶段请求；固定上限则浪费吞吐。分支外部性取决于批次组成、上下文长度和累积松弛量，且随工作负载动态变化。

🛠️主要方法

提出 TAPER，一种每步准入控制器，将额外分支视为机会性工作，仅在预测的分支外部性适合当前批次松弛预算时准入。利用分支级调度解耦计算与内存（共享前缀 KV），实现无内存回收的宽度调整。

📊实验结果

在 Qwen3-32B 模型上评估，TAPER 相比 IRP-Off 和 IRP-Eager 分别提升好吞吐 1.77 倍和 1.48 倍，并维持超过 95% 的 SLO 达成率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别并形式化 LLM 服务中分支并行带来的分支外部性问题。
  • 提出 TAPER，一种基于松弛预算的每步准入控制方法，动态调节分支并行度。
  • 在 Qwen3-32B 上实现 1.77 倍和 1.48 倍的好吞吐提升，同时保持 95% 以上 SLO 达成率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖分支外部性的预测准确性，预测误差可能影响性能。
  • 当前仅针对单请求内分支并行，未考虑跨请求分支交互。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent methods expose intra-request parallelism in LLM outputs, allowing independent branches to decode concurrently. Existing serving systems execute these branches eagerly or under fixed caps. We show that both are brittle: eager admission inflates the shared decode step, degrading co-batched requests in serial stages, while conservative fixed caps forgo the throughput that motivated exposing branches in the first place. We call the excess step latency caused by admitted branches the branch externality and show that the safe width depends on batch composition, context lengths, and accumulated slack, all of which change continuously over a workload trace. We introduce TAPER, a per-step admission controller that treats extra branches as opportunistic work, admitted only when the predicted branch externality fits within the batch's current slack budget. Per-step regulation is practical because branch-level scheduling decouples compute from memory: branches share the request's prefix KV, so expanding or contracting width requires no memory reclamation. On Qwen3-32B, TAPER improves goodput by $1.77\times$ over IRP-Off and by $1.48\times$ over IRP-Eager, while maintaining over $95\%$ SLO attainment.

硬件/量化加速 1 篇

EULER-ADAS: Energy-Efficient & SIMD-Unified Logarithmic-Posit Engine for Precision-Reconfigurable Approximate ADAS Acceleration

Medium 2605.06875
Mukul Lokhande, Ratko Pilipovic, Omkar Kokane, Adam Teman, Santosh Kumar Vishvakarma
arXiv PDF cs.AR
TL;DR：EULER-ADAS 提出一种 SIMD 统一的对数 -posit 引擎，通过有界 regime 和位截断实现高能效、精度可重构的 ADAS 加速。
🎯研究动机

ADAS 需要低延迟推理，但受严格功耗和面积约束；Posit 算术在低精度下提供高数值保真度，但其变长 regime 编码增加编解码开销并引入大 regime 场故障效应，现有方案能效不足。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种能效高、可靠性好且支持多种 Posit 精度（8/16/32）的 SIMD 神经计算引擎，以加速 ADAS 推理。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

结合有界 regime Posit 表示、阶段自适应对数尾数乘法与位截断、SIMD 共享 quire 累加路径，支持 4×Posit-8、2×Posit-16 或 1×Posit-32 操作，无需复制精度专用硬件。

📊实验结果

FPGA 实现显示 LUT 减少 41.4%，延迟降低 76.1%，功耗降低 71.9%，能效比基于 Booth 的 Posit 乘法器低 10 倍；28nm CMOS 下面积 0.013-0.016 mm²，功耗 19.8-22.1 mW，频率 1.84 GHz；在图像分类、ADAS 和边缘推理任务中，Posit-16/32 精度与 FP32 相差约 1.5 个百分点；TinyYOLOv3 在 Pynq-Z2 上实现 78 ms 延迟、0.29 W 功耗和 22.6 mJ/ 帧。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出有界 regime Posit 表示和阶段自适应对数尾数乘法，降低硬件开销和故障影响。
  • 设计 SIMD 统一架构，支持多种 Posit 精度可重构执行，提升硬件利用率。
  • FPGA 和 ASIC 实现显示显著的面积、延迟、功耗和能效优势，且精度损失小。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅评估了特定 Posit 格式（8,0/16,1/32,2），其他格式未测试。
  • 精度损失在极端低精度下可能更大，摘要未覆盖所有场景。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Advanced driver-assistance systems (ADAS) require neural compute engines that deliver low-latency inference under strict power and area constraints. Posit arithmetic is attractive for such accelerators because it provides high numerical fidelity at low precision, but its variable-length regime encoding increases encode/decode cost and exposes the datapath to large regime-field fault effects. This paper presents EULER-ADAS, a SIMD-enabled logarithmic bounded-Posit neural compute engine for energyefficient and reliability-aware ADAS acceleration. The proposed datapath combines bounded-regime Posit representation, stageadaptive logarithmic mantissa multiplication with bit truncation, and a SIMD-shared quire accumulation path supporting Posit- (8,0), Posit-(16,1), and Posit-(32,2) execution. The unified architecture enables 4xPosit-8, 2xPosit-16, or 1xPosit-32 operation without duplicating precision-specific hardware. FPGA implementation shows that the proposed configurations reduce LUT count by up to 41.4%, delay by up to 76.1%, and power by up to 71.9% relative to exact Posit neural compute engines, while achieving up to 10x lower energy-delay product than radix-4 Booth-based Posit multipliers. In 28-nm CMOS, the bounded variants occupy 0.013-0.016 mm2 , consume 19.8-22.1 mW, and operate at up to 1.84 GHz. Application-level evaluation across image-classification, ADAS, and edge-inference workloads shows that the evaluated Posit-16 and Posit-32 configurations remain within about 1.5 percentage points of FP32 accuracy. A TinyYOLOv3 prototype on Pynq-Z2 achieves 78 ms latency at 0.29 W and 22.6 mJ/frame, demonstrating the suitability of EULERADAS for low-power real-time ADAS inference.

训练系统 1 篇

CommFuse: Hiding Tail Latency via Communication Decomposition and Fusion for Distributed LLM Training

High 2604.24013
Rezaul Karim, Austin Wen, Wang Zongzuo, Weiwei Zhang, Yang Liu, Walid Ahmed
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：CommFuse 通过分解与融合通信操作消除分布式 LLM 训练中的尾部延迟，提升计算效率。
🎯研究动机

分布式 LLM 训练中，数据并行和模型并行策略引入大量通信开销，现有通信 - 计算重叠方法因尾部延迟而效率受限。

❓解决问题

消除分布式 LLM 训练中现有通信 - 计算重叠方法的尾部延迟，缓解通信瓶颈。

🔎现象分析

现有基于数据切片的通信 - 计算重叠方法存在尾部延迟，导致整体效率下降。

🛠️主要方法

CommFuse：将传统的 reduce-scatter 和 all-gather 集体通信分解为点对点通信，并调度分块计算以实现细粒度重叠，提供精确算法消除尾部延迟。

📊实验结果

实验表明 CommFuse 在延迟、模型 FLOPs 利用率（MFU）和吞吐量上均优于现有方法。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CommFuse 方法，通过通信分解与融合消除尾部延迟，实现高效通信 - 计算重叠。
  • 提供与数据并行及多种张量并行策略（如 TPSP、UP）兼容的通用解决方案。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅针对特定并行策略（如张量并行和数据并行）优化，未覆盖其他并行模式。
  • 未讨论在异构硬件或动态网络环境下的适应性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The rapid growth in the size of large language models has necessitated the partitioning of computational workloads across accelerators such as GPUs, TPUs, and NPUs. However, these parallelization strategies incur substantial data communication overhead significantly hindering computational efficiency. While communication-computation overlap presents a promising direction, existing data slicing based solutions suffer from tail latency. To overcome this limitation, this research introduces a novel communication-computation overlap technique to eliminate this tail latency in state of the art overlap methods for distributed LLM training. The aim of this technique is to effectively mitigate communication bottleneck of tensor parallelism and data parallelism for distributed training and inference. In particular, we propose a novel method termed CommFuse that replaces conventional collective operations of reduce-scatter and all-gather with decomposed peer-to-peer (P2P) communication and schedules partitioned computations to enable fine-grained overlap. Our method provides an exact algorithm for reducing communication overhead that eliminates tail latency. Moreover, it presents a versatile solution compatible with data-parallel training and various tensor-level parallelism strategies, including TPSP and UP. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that our technique consistently achieves lower latency, superior Model FLOPS Utilization (MFU), and high throughput.

应用: 神经/认知科学 5 篇 · 3 个细分

脑信号/脑解码 3 篇

Same Brain, Different Prediction: How Preprocessing Choices Undermine EEG Decoding Reliability

Medium 2605.07212
Dengzhe Hou, Zihao Wu, Lingyu Jiang, Zirui Li, Fangzhou Lin, Kazunori D. Yamada
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：EEG 预处理选择导致高达 42% 的预测翻转，本文通过形式化干预空间、Walsh-Hadamard 分解、预处理不确定性指标和正则化方法使这种不稳定性可测量、可分解、可降低。
🎯研究动机

EEG 深度学习模型通常仅在单一未报告的预处理流程下训练和评估，导致预测结果对预处理选择高度敏感，但现有不确定性方法无法量化这种因预处理变化引起的变异性，影响脑机接口和临床神经科学的可靠性。

❓解决问题

解决 EEG 解码中因预处理选择不同导致的预测不稳定问题，使其可测量、可分解和可降低。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

形式化预处理选择为反事实干预空间；使用 Walsh-Hadamard 分解分析 2^7 管道空间的敏感性，发现近可加性；提出预处理不确定性（PU）作为每试次诊断指标；研究归一化自适应 PGI（NA-PGI）作为图结构正则化缓解策略。

📊实验结果

在跨越四个范式的六个数据集上验证，显示预处理变化导致高达 42% 的试次级预测翻转。

⭐主要贡献
  • 形式化预处理选择为反事实干预空间，揭示 EEG 预测的意外不稳定性（高达 42% 的预测翻转）。
  • 提出 Walsh-Hadamard 分解、预处理不确定性（PU）和 NA-PGI 正则化三种工具，使不稳定性可测量、可分解和可降低。
⚠️方法局限
  • NA-PGI 正则化的适用范围和条件可能有限。
  • 二进制干预设计可能无法完全覆盖所有预处理选择。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Electroencephalography (EEG) is a cornerstone of brain-computer interfaces and clinical neuroscience, yet deep learning models are typically trained and evaluated under a single, unreported preprocessing pipeline. We formalize preprocessing choices as a counterfactual intervention space and show that EEG predictions are surprisingly unstable under this space: across six datasets spanning four paradigms, up to 42% of trial-level predictions flip when only the preprocessing changes, a variability that standard uncertainty methods do not explicitly quantify because they condition on a fixed preprocessing pipeline. We provide three tools to make this instability measurable, decomposable, and reducible. First, a Walsh-Hadamard decomposition of the 2^7 pipeline space reveals that sensitivity is near-additive in practice under the binary intervention design, enabling efficient step-by-step optimization. Second, we introduce Preprocessing Uncertainty (PU), a per-trial diagnostic that captures a dimension of instability complementary to model-based confidence. Third, we study Normalized Adaptive PGI (NA-PGI), a graph-structured regularizer that exploits the compositional structure of preprocessing interventions as one mitigation strategy with clear scope conditions.

Enabling Unsupervised Training of Deep EEG Denoisers With Intelligent Partitioning

Medium 2605.06724
Qiyu Rao, Haozhe Tian, Homayoun Hamedmoghadam, Danilo Mandic
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出智能分区自监督去噪方法，无需干净脑电即可训练深度去噪器，在极低信噪比下达到 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

可穿戴脑电信号微弱且与噪声频谱重叠，传统信号处理方法依赖固定规则无法处理时变伪迹，深度学习方法需要无法获取的无伪迹脑电作为训练标签。

❓解决问题

如何在没有干净参考信号的情况下训练深度脑电去噪模型。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出智能分区自监督去噪（iPSD），将输入脑电片段智能划分为具有相同底层信号的独立噪声实现，从而自监督训练深度去噪器，支持零样本设置。

📊实验结果

在可穿戴脑电（包括耳内传感器）上进行了广泛验证，结果显示 iPSD 在极低信噪比和挑战性伪迹下达到 SOTA。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 iPSD 方法，无需干净脑电即可训练深度去噪器。
  • 在极低信噪比（-10 dB）和挑战性伪迹（如 EMG）下实现 SOTA 性能，频谱保真度比基线高数个数量级。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对特定类型伪迹或脑电设备泛化性有限。
  • 分区策略的智能性可能依赖超参数或先验假设。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Denoising wearable electroencephalogram (EEG) is inherently challenging since neural activity is not only subtle but also inseparable from spectrally overlapping noise artifacts. Classical signal processing methods, relying on fixed or heuristic rules, cannot handle the time-varying pervasive artifacts in wearable EEGs. Deep learning methods, on the other hand, show promise in decomposition-free EEG denoising using highly expressive neural networks, but the training requires artifact-free EEG, which is inherently unobtainable. To address this, we propose Intelligent Partitioning for Self-supervised Denoising (iPSD). Our method eliminates the need for clean references by learning to partition an input EEG segment into independent noisy realizations with the same underlying signal. This enables self-supervision of deep learning denoisers, even in zero-shot settings where only a single EEG segment to be denoised is available. We validate iPSD through extensive experiments, including validations on wearable EEG from in-ear sensors. The results show that iPSD achieves state-of-the-art performance, most notably under extremely low signal-to-noise ratios (down to -10 dB) and challenging artifacts (e.g., EMG), with spectral fidelity orders of magnitude higher than competitive baselines.

Learning Cross-Atlas Consistent Brain Disorder Representations via Disentangled Multi-Atlas Functional Connectivity Learning

Medium 2605.07026
Minheng Chen, Chao Cao, Jing Zhang, Tianming Liu, Dajiang Zhu
arXiv PDF q-bio.NC
TL;DR：提出多图谱解耦功能连接学习框架 MADCLE，通过分布对齐实现跨图谱一致的脑疾病表征。
🎯研究动机

功能连接（FC）依赖于脑图谱的选择，不同图谱会强调不同的组织特征，导致异质且不一致的表征，影响脑疾病识别的可靠性。现有方法要么浅层融合多图谱特征，要么单图谱解耦未解决跨图谱异质性。

❓解决问题

如何从多个脑图谱的功能连接中学习跨图谱一致的疾病相关表征，同时分离协变量和图谱依赖的噪声。

🔎现象分析

不同脑图谱产生的 FC 表征存在异质性，直接融合或单图谱方法无法保证跨图谱一致性。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MADCLE，一个多分支表征学习框架，对每个图谱学习疾病相关表征，通过分布对齐（如 MMD）鼓励跨图谱一致性；同时用协变量监督、图谱特定重构和解耦约束分离协变量相关和图谱依赖的残差因素。

📊实验结果

在 ADNI 和 ADHD-200 数据集上评估，与单图谱基线、多图谱 GNN/Transformer 模型及近期多图谱一致性框架比较，MADCLE 取得有竞争力或更好的性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出多图谱解耦框架 MADCLE，通过分布对齐实现跨图谱一致的疾病表征学习。
  • 设计结构化解耦机制，分离疾病相关、协变量相关和图谱依赖的表征，减少信息泄漏。
  • 在 ADNI 和 ADHD-200 数据集上验证了 MADCLE 相比单图谱和多图谱基线的优越性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 未在更多疾病或更大规模数据集上验证泛化性。
  • 分布对齐方法可能对超参数敏感。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Functional connectivity (FC) derived from resting-state fMRI is widely used to characterize large-scale brain network alterations in neurological and psychiatric disorders. However, FC construction critically depends on the choice of brain atlas, and different parcellations may emphasize distinct organizational features, leading to heterogeneous and sometimes inconsistent representations. Existing multi-atlas approaches partially alleviate this issue but often fuse atlas-derived features or predictions at a relatively shallow level, while single-atlas disentanglement methods do not explicitly address cross-atlas heterogeneity. We propose Multi-Atlas Disentangled Connectivity LEarning (MADCLE), a multi-branch representation learning framework that jointly encodes FC matrices derived from different brain atlases. Rather than introducing a single explicitly shared latent variable across parcellations, MADCLE learns atlas-wise disease-related representations and encourages them to be cross-atlas consistent through distributional alignment. Meanwhile, covariate-related and atlas-dependent residual factors are modeled separately using covariate similarity supervision, atlas-specific reconstruction, and decorrelation constraints, thereby reducing the leakage of non-disease and parcellation-dependent information into the disease-related embeddings. Experiments on the ADNI and ADHD-200 datasets suggest that MADCLE achieves competitive or improved performance compared with single-atlas baselines, multi-atlas GNN/Transformer models, and recent multi-atlas consistency frameworks. These results support the potential value of structured disentanglement for FC-based disorder identification under heterogeneous parcellation schemes.

神经网络与大脑对齐 1 篇

Reason to Play: Behavioral and Brain Alignment Between Frontier LRMs and Human Game Learners

Medium 2605.08019
Botos Csaba, Sreejan Kumar, Austin Tudor David Andrews, Laurence Hunt, Chris Summerfield, Joshua B. Tenenbaum, Rui Ponte Costa, Marcelo G. Mattar et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：前沿大型推理模型在复杂游戏学习中的行为和大脑对齐优于强化学习代理。
🎯研究动机

人类能快速学习抽象知识并灵活运用，而现代 AI 系统是否具备类似能力尚不清楚，需要从行为、认知和神经层面进行联合评估。

❓解决问题

评估前沿大型推理模型（LRMs）在复杂游戏学习任务中是否能够匹配人类的学习行为、规划能力以及大脑活动模式。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

使用人类游戏数据集（含 fMRI 记录），比较 LRMs、无模型 / 基于模型的深度强化学习代理和贝叶斯理论代理在游戏表现、行为匹配和脑活动预测上的差异。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现 LRMs 在行为模式匹配上最接近人类，且在脑活动预测上比强化学习代理高一个数量级。
  • 通过操控实验表明，大脑对齐反映的是模型对游戏状态的上下文表征，而非下游规划或推理。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于特定游戏环境，泛化性待验证。
  • 大脑对齐的因果机制仍需进一步探索。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Humans rapidly learn abstract knowledge when encountering novel environments and flexibly deploy this knowledge to guide efficient and intelligent action. Can modern AI systems learn and plan in a similar way? We study this question using a dataset of complex human gameplay with concurrent fMRI recordings, in which participants learn novel video games that require rule discovery, hypothesis revision, and multi-step planning. We jointly evaluate models by their ability to play the games, match human learning behavior, and predict brain activity during the same task, comparing a suite of frontier Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) against model-free and model-based deep reinforcement learning agents and a Bayesian theory-based agent. We find that frontier LRMs most closely match human behavioral patterns during game discovery and predict brain activity an order of magnitude better than both reinforcement learning alternatives across cortical and subcortical regions, with effects robust to permutation controls. Through targeted manipulations, we further show that brain alignment reflects the model's in-context representation of the game state rather than its downstream planning or reasoning. Our results establish LRMs as compelling computational accounts of human learning and decision making in complex, naturalistic environments. Project page with interactive replays: this https URL

认知建模 1 篇

Uneven Evolution of Cognition Across Generations of Generative AI Models

High 2605.06815
Isaac Galatzer-Levy, Daniel McDuff, Xin Liu, Jed McGiffin
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：生成式 AI 模型的认知能力发展极不均衡，语言能力远超视觉推理，且视觉感知能力停滞不前。
🎯研究动机

现有评估方法多关注窄任务性能，缺乏对生成式 AI 模型认知能力的系统性、类人评估，难以追踪其向通用人工智能发展的真实轨迹。

❓解决问题

如何量化生成式 AI 模型的认知能力，并揭示其跨代际、跨模态的发展模式与架构性局限。

🔎现象分析

摘要观察到：多模态模型在言语理解和工作记忆上接近人类顶尖水平（>98 百分位），但在知觉推理上接近地板（<1 百分位）；抽象定量推理在语言模态下比视觉模态成熟更快；视觉感知组织能力基本停滞。

🛠️主要方法

提出心理测量框架，基于韦氏成人智力量表改编任务评估模型，并开发 AIQ 基准测试，应用于两个模型家族的六代模型。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及对领先多模态模型的初始评估及对两个模型家族六代模型的 AIQ 基准测试。

⭐主要贡献
  • 引入心理测量框架评估生成式 AI 的认知轮廓，并与人类常模比较。
  • 开发 AIQ 基准测试，追踪跨代际的认知发展轨迹。
  • 揭示模态间认知能力的不对称发展，指出架构性语言偏向。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅覆盖特定模型家族和任务类型，泛化性有限。
  • AIQ 基准测试的效度和信度需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The pursuit of artificial general intelligence necessitates robust methods for evaluating the cognitive capabilities of models beyond narrow task performance. Here, we introduce a psychometric framework to assess the cognitive profiles of generative AI, comparing them to human norms and tracking their evolution across generations. Initial evaluation of leading multimodal models using tasks adapted from the Wechsler Adult Intelligence Scale revealed a profoundly uneven cognitive architecture: near-ceiling performance in verbal comprehension and working memory (>$98^{\text{th}}$ percentile) contrasted with near-floor performance in perceptual reasoning (<$1^{\text{st}}$ percentile). To track developmental trajectories beyond human-normed limits, we developed the Artificial Intelligence Quotient (AIQ) Benchmark and applied it to six generations and two model families, revealing significant but asymmetric performance gains. Notably, we uncovered a sharp dissociation between modalities; abstract quantitative reasoning matured far more rapidly when presented linguistically compared to a visually analogous format, indicating an architectural bias towards language-based symbolic manipulation. While abstract visual reasoning improved, visual-perceptual organization remained largely stagnant. Collectively, these findings demonstrate that the cognitive abilities of generative models are evolving unevenly, suggesting that scaling and optimization approaches to AGI development alone may be insufficient to overcome fundamental architectural limitations in achieving balanced, human-like general intelligence.

图与几何拓扑学习 2 篇 · 2 个细分

其他 1 篇

AdaTKG: Adaptive Memory for Temporal Knowledge Graph Reasoning

Medium 2605.07121
Seunghan Lee, Jun Seo, Jaehoon Lee, Sungdong Yoo, Minjae Kim, Tae Yoon Lim, Dongwan Kang, Hwanil Choi et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：AdaTKG 通过为每个实体维护自适应记忆，在时间知识图谱推理中实现动态表示更新，显著提升性能。
🎯研究动机

现有时间知识图谱推理方法生成静态实体表示，无法捕捉实体参与交互的动态演化过程，限制了推理能力。

❓解决问题

如何为时间知识图谱中的每个实体建模动态表示，使其随交互历史自适应更新，并支持未见实体。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 AdaTKG，为每个实体维护一个记忆，每次观察到交互时通过可学习的指数移动平均更新记忆，使用单一共享标量控制更新率，避免为每个实体学习独立参数，从而支持训练时未见实体。

📊实验结果

在多个时间知识图谱基准上进行了实验，与基线方法相比取得一致性能提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出自适应记忆机制，将实体建模为动态过程，表示随交互历史更新。
  • 设计可学习的指数移动平均更新策略，仅使用单一共享标量，实现高效且泛化到未见实体。
  • 在多个 TKG 基准上取得一致性能提升，并开源代码。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对长序列交互的记忆容量有限。
  • 单一共享标量可能无法捕捉不同实体更新速率的差异。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs) represent time-stamped relational facts and support a wide range of reasoning tasks over evolving events. However, existing methods produce entity representations that are static at the entity level, in that each representation is a function of learned parameters only and retains no trace of the interactions in which the entity has participated. In this paper, we depart from this static view and propose that each entity be modeled as an adaptive process whose representation is refined every time the entity participates in a fact. To this end, we propose AdaTKG, which maintains a per-entity memory that is updated with every observed interaction, with the memory accumulating online and predictions improving as more interactions arrive. Specifically, we instantiate the memory update as a learnable exponential moving average governed by a single shared scalar instead of using learnable parameters for each entity, enabling AdaTKG to handle entities unseen during training. Extensive experiments confirm consistent gains over TKG baselines, demonstrating the effectiveness of adaptive memory. Code is publicly available at: this https URL .

图神经网络 (GNN) 1 篇

Why Self-Inconsistency Arises in GNN Explanations and How to Exploit It

Medium 2605.07527
Wenxin Tai, Yaqian Liu, Ting Zhong, Fan Zhou
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：发现自解释图神经网络（SI-GNN）解释的自不一致性源于重解释导致的上下文扰动，并提出一种轻量级后处理策略 SD 来校准解释。
🎯研究动机

自解释图神经网络（SI-GNN）的解释存在自不一致问题，即模型对其自身解释子图重新应用时可能产生不同解释，这损害了解释的可靠性，但原因尚不明确。

❓解决问题

解释自不一致性的根本原因是什么，以及如何在不增加训练成本的情况下缓解该问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出重解释导致的上下文扰动是分数变化的直接原因，并提出潜在信号分配假说解释为何只有部分边对该扰动敏感，同时分析了简洁性正则化对信号分配的影响。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Self-Denoising (SD)，一种模型无关、无需训练的后处理策略，仅需额外一次前向传播即可校准解释。

📊实验结果

在多种 SI-GNN 框架、骨干网络和基准数据集上验证了假说，并显示 SD 一致提升解释质量。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次识别重解释导致的上下文扰动是 SI-GNN 解释自不一致性的直接原因，并提出潜在信号分配假说。
  • 提出 SD 方法，轻量级后处理策略有效提升解释质量，仅增加约 4-6% 计算开销。
⚠️方法局限
  • SD 方法可能对特定类型的图结构或任务效果有限。
  • 假说和方法的理论分析深度可能不足。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent work has observed that explanations produced by Self-Interpretable Graph Neural Networks (SI-GNNs) can be self-inconsistent: when the model is reapplied to its own explanatory graph subset, it may produce a different explanation. However, why self-inconsistency arises remains poorly understood. In this work, we first identify re-explanation-induced context perturbation as the direct cause of score variation. We then introduce a latent signal assignment hypothesis to explain why only some edges are sensitive to this perturbation, and analyze how conciseness regularization affects latent signal assignment. Given that self-inconsistent edges do not provide stable evidence for the model's prediction, we propose Self-Denoising (SD), a model-agnostic and training-free post-processing strategy that calibrates explanations with only one additional forward pass. Experiments across representative SI-GNN frameworks, backbone architectures, and benchmark datasets support our hypothesis and show that SD consistently improves explanation quality while adding only about 4--6\% computational overhead in practice.

学习理论 2 篇 · 2 个细分

优化理论 1 篇

Flatness and Gradient Alignment Are Both Necessary: Spectral-Aware Gradient-Aligned Exploration for Multi-Distribution Learning

Medium 2605.07914
Aristotelis Ballas, Christos Diou
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 SAGE 方法，同时优化损失曲面的平坦性和梯度对齐，在多分布学习中实现 SOTA。
🎯研究动机

现有锐度感知和梯度对齐方法各自只关注损失曲面的单一几何性质，忽略了另一性质，导致在多分布学习场景中泛化性能受限。

❓解决问题

如何同时优化损失曲面的平坦性和梯度对齐，以降低多分布学习中的超额风险。

🔎现象分析

推导出超额风险分解包含两个主导项：对齐项（由 Hessian 逆与梯度协方差的迹控制）和曲率项（由平均 Hessian 控制），且两者互不蕴含，单独优化任一项无法保证低风险。

🛠️主要方法

提出 SAGE 方法：曲率组件用每层梯度矩阵的极因子替代 SAM 的梯度缩放扰动，通过 Newton-Schulz 迭代计算，使上升步均匀探索所有方向；对齐组件在下降步注入各向同性噪声，噪声幅度与跨分布梯度不一致性成比例。

📊实验结果

在 DomainBed 的 5 个域泛化基准和 2 个多任务学习基准上实验，SAGE 在域泛化上达到新 SOTA，在多任务学习中作为通用改进与 SOTA 方法竞争或超越。

⭐主要贡献
  • 推导出多分布学习下超额风险的分解，揭示平坦性和梯度对齐均需考虑。
  • 提出 SAGE 算法，同时优化曲率和对齐项，在域泛化和多任务学习基准上达到 SOTA。
⚠️方法局限
  • Newton-Schulz 迭代可能增加计算开销。
  • 方法对超参数（如噪声幅度）敏感，需进一步调优。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Sharpness-aware and gradient-alignment methods have been shown to improve generalization, however each family of methods targets a single geometric property of the loss landscape, while ignoring the other. In this paper, we show that this omission is structurally unavoidable and that both flatness and gradient alignment should be considered in multi-distribution learning settings. Specifically, we derive an excess-risk decomposition that yields two additive leading-order terms: (i) an alignment term, controlled by the trace of $\bar{H}^{-1}\Sigma_g$ and (ii) a curvature term, controlled by $\bar{H}$, where $\bar{H}$ is the average Hessian and $\Sigma_g$ is the covariance of the gradient across distributions. Notably, $\bar{H}$ appears inverted in one and non-inverted in the other. We further show, via a counterexample, that neither quantity bounds the other in general, so no algorithm targeting only one term can guarantee low excess risk. Motivated by this decomposition, we propose SAGE (Spectral-Aware Gradient-Aligned Exploration) that targets both terms. The curvature component replaces SAM's gradient-scaled perturbation with the polar factor of each layer's gradient matrix, computed via Newton-Schulz iteration, so that the ascent step probes all directions with similar magnitude. On the other hand, the alignment component injects isotropic noise at the descent step, the magnitude of which scales with cross-distribution gradient disagreement. Experiments on five domain-generalization and two multi-task learning benchmarks show that the proposed method establishes a new state-of-the-art on DomainBed and acts as a general-purpose improvement to base MTL solvers, remaining competitive with, or even surpassing, state-of-the-art methods.

表达能力 1 篇

Cross-Attention and Encoder-Decoder Transformers: A Logical Characterization

Medium 2605.07705
Veeti Ahvonen, Damian Heiman, Antti Kuusisto, Miguel Moreno, Matias Selin
arXiv PDF cs.LO
TL;DR：用时序逻辑刻画了编码器 - 解码器 Transformer 的表达能力。
🎯研究动机

编码器 - 解码器 Transformer 是 LLM 的基础架构，但对其表达能力的理论理解不足，缺乏形式化刻画。

❓解决问题

如何从逻辑角度精确刻画编码器 - 解码器 Transformer（含交叉注意力）的表达能力。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出一种新的时序逻辑，扩展命题逻辑，加入对编码器输入的计数全局模态和对解码器输入的过去模态，并给出分布式自动机等价刻画。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次给出编码器 - 解码器 Transformer 的逻辑刻画。
  • 证明该刻画对架构变体（如掩码）具有鲁棒性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对浮点数和软注意力设置，未考虑其他数值精度或注意力变体。
  • 逻辑刻画可能无法完全覆盖所有实际架构细节。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We give a novel logical characterization of encoder-decoder transformers, the foundational architecture for LLMs that also sees use in various settings that benefit from cross-attention. We study such transformers over text in the practical setting of floating-point numbers and soft-attention, characterizing them with a new temporal logic. This logic extends propositional logic with a counting global modality over the encoder input and a past modality over the decoder input. We also give an additional characterization of such transformers via a type of distributed automata, and show that our results are not limited to the specific choices in the architecture and can account for changes in, e.g., masking. Finally, we discuss encoder-decoder transformers in the autoregressive setting.

迁移/元/终身学习 2 篇 · 1 个细分

持续/终身学习 2 篇

Hierarchical Dual-Subspace Decoupling for Continual Learning in Vision-Language Models

High 2605.07512
Mengxin Qin, Xiang Zhang, Kun Wei, Xu Yang, Cheng Deng
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出层次化双子空间解耦框架 HDSD，通过分解参数空间为通用与任务特定子空间来缓解视觉 - 语言模型类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘。
🎯研究动机

现有类增量学习方法主要限制参数更新，但忽略了高维空间中参数的结构特性，导致跨任务子空间干扰和严重遗忘。

❓解决问题

解决视觉 - 语言模型在类增量学习中因跨任务子空间干扰导致的灾难性遗忘问题。

🔎现象分析

不同任务引起的参数更新倾向于位于多个重叠的低秩子空间中，导致跨任务子空间干扰和严重遗忘。

🛠️主要方法

提出 HDSD 框架，包含特征调制模块（FMM）将参数空间分解为通用和任务特定子空间，通用融合模块（GFM）通过自适应阈值捕获稳定可迁移知识，层次学习模块（HLM）通过 SVD 进行结构化参数分解并利用缩放机制约束更新。

📊实验结果

在传统基准上进行了大量实验，HDSD 达到了最先进的结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出层次化双子空间解耦框架，显式分解参数空间为通用和任务特定子空间以减少干扰。
  • 设计通用融合模块和层次学习模块，分别实现稳定知识捕获和结构化参数更新约束。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定视觉 - 语言模型架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
  • SVD 分解和自适应阈值可能引入额外计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Class-incremental learning aims to continuously acquire new knowledge while preserving previously learned information, thereby mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Existing methods primarily restrict parameter updates but often overlook their structural properties in high-dimensional spaces. From a subspace perspective, updates induced by different tasks tend to lie in multiple overlapping low-rank subspaces, leading to cross-task subspace interference and severe forgetting. To address this issue, we propose HDSD, a Hierarchical Dual-Subspace Decoupling framework for continual learning in vision-language models. Specifically, we introduce a lightweight Feature Modulation Module (FMM) that explicitly decomposes the parameter space into general and task-specific subspaces. Building on this design, we develop two complementary components. First, a General Fusion Module (GFM) evaluates relative parameter changes across tasks and uses an adaptive threshold to capture stable and transferable knowledge. Second, a Hierarchical Learning Module (HLM) performs structured parameter decomposition via Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) and uses a scaling mechanism to constrain updates within distinct subspace scales. Together, these designs reduce subspace interference and parameter drift. Extensive experiments on conventional benchmarks show that HDSD achieves state-of-the-art results.

SR$^2$-LoRA: Self-Rectifying Inter-layer Relations in Low-Rank Adaptation for Class-Incremental Learning

Medium 2605.07420
Fengqiang Wan, Yipeng Lin, Kan Lv, Yang Yang
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：通过约束层间关系漂移来缓解类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘
🎯研究动机

预训练模型结合参数高效微调在类增量学习中表现良好，但灾难性遗忘问题依然存在，尤其是在适应新任务时。

❓解决问题

类增量学习中，新任务学习导致层间关系漂移，进而破坏旧任务的分类边界，造成灾难性遗忘。

🔎现象分析

层间关系漂移会逐渐破坏旧任务的分类边界，且漂移越大，性能下降越严重。

🛠️主要方法

提出 SR$^2$-LoRA，通过构造新旧模型在当前任务样本上的关系矩阵，并对其奇异值进行对齐，从而约束层间关系漂移。

📊实验结果

在标准 CIL 基准上进行了大量实验，表明 SR$^2$-LoRA 有效缓解灾难性遗忘，且优势随任务数增加而更明显。

⭐主要贡献
  • 从层间关系漂移角度分析灾难性遗忘，并理论证明其与分类边界的关系
  • 提出 SR$^2$-LoRA 方法，通过奇异值对齐约束层间关系漂移，且理论证明该方法比直接逐元素对齐更鲁棒
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于基于 LoRA 的 PEFT 方法
  • 未在更大规模或更复杂的增量学习场景中验证
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Pre-trained models with parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) have demonstrated promising potential for class-incremental learning (CIL), yet catastrophic forgetting still persists when adapting models to new tasks. In this paper, we present a novel perspective on catastrophic forgetting through the analysis of inter-layer relation drift, i.e., the progressive disruption of relationships among layer-wise representations during the learning of new tasks. We theoretically show that the increase of such drift reduces the classification margins of previously learned tasks, thereby degrading overall model performance. To address this issue, we propose \underline{S}elf-\underline{R}ectifying inter-layer \underline{R}elation Low-Rank Adaptation~(SR$^2$-LoRA), a simple yet effective method that mitigates catastrophic forgetting by constraining inter-layer relation drift. Specifically, SR$^2$-LoRA constructs the relation matrices induced by the previous and current models on current-task samples, and aligns the corresponding singular values. We further theoretically show that this alignment exhibits greater robustness to estimation perturbations than direct entry-wise alignment. Extensive experiments on standard CIL benchmarks demonstrate that SR$^2$-LoRA effectively mitigates catastrophic forgetting, with its advantages becoming more pronounced as the number of tasks increases. Code is available in the \href{ this https URL }{repository}.

概率方法 1 篇 · 1 个细分

变分推断 1 篇

It Just Takes Two: Scaling Amortized Inference to Large Sets

Medium 2605.07972
Antoine Wehenkel, Michael Kagan, Lukas Heinrich, Chris Pollard
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出一种解耦表示学习与后验建模的策略，仅用大小为 2 的集合训练即可泛化到任意大规模集合的变分推断。
🎯研究动机

神经后验估计在科学和应用领域广泛使用，但处理大规模观测集合时，训练时需使用部署时的集合大小，导致内存和计算成本过高。

❓解决问题

如何在不增加训练计算成本的前提下，使神经后验估计器能够处理任意大小的观测集合。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

使用均值池化的 Deep Set，在集合大小最多为 2 的数据上训练编码器，使其泛化到任意集合大小；然后在预聚合的嵌入上微调推断头，使训练成本与部署集合大小 N 基本无关。

📊实验结果

在标量、图像、多视图 3D、分子和高维条件生成基准上，集合大小 N 达数千，方法匹配或超越标准基线且计算成本大幅降低。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种简单且理论支持的策略，将表示学习与后验建模解耦，仅用大小为 2 的集合训练即可处理任意大规模集合。
  • 在标量、图像、多视图 3D、分子和高维条件生成基准上，以极低计算成本达到或超越标准基线。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对集合内元素高度异质的情况泛化能力有限。
  • 均值池化可能丢失某些结构信息，对于需要精细对齐的任务可能不够。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Neural posterior estimation has emerged as a powerful tool for amortized inference, with growing adoption across scientific and applied domains. In many of these applications, the conditioning variable is a set of observations whose elements depend not only on the target but also on unknown factors shared across the set. Optimal inference therefore requires treating the set jointly, which in turn requires training the estimator at the deployment set size -- a regime where memory and compute quickly become prohibitive. We introduce a simple, theoretically grounded strategy that decouples representation learning from posterior modeling. Our method trains a mean-pool Deep Set on sets of size at most two, producing an encoder that generalizes to arbitrary set sizes. The inference head is then finetuned on pre-aggregated embeddings, making training cost essentially independent of the deployment set size N. Across scalar, image, multi-view 3D, molecular, and high-dimensional conditional generation benchmarks with N in the thousands, our approach matches or outperforms standard baselines at a fraction of the compute.

表征学习 1 篇 · 1 个细分

跨模态表征 1 篇

Anisotropic Modality Align

High 2605.07825
Xiaomin Yu, Yijiang Li, Yuhui Zhang, Hanzhen Zhao, Yue Yang, Hao Tang, Yue Song, Xiaobin Hu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.MM
TL;DR：发现多模态表征间的模态间隙本质是各向异性残差结构，并提出各向异性几何校正框架 AnisoAlign 实现非配对模态对齐。
🎯研究动机

高质量配对多模态数据稀缺限制了多模态大模型训练，现有方法利用预训练对比模型的共享表征空间作为桥梁，但模态间表征能否可靠互换的关键前提尚不明确。

❓解决问题

共享表征空间中模态间隙阻碍了不同模态表征的可靠互换，需要理解其几何本质并设计有效的对齐方法。

🔎现象分析

模态表征已共享兼容的主语义几何，真正阻碍互换的是沿少数主导方向集中的各向异性残差结构，而非简单的全局偏移。

🛠️主要方法

提出各向异性模态间隙对齐原则：对齐应匹配目标模态分布同时保留源模态语义结构；基于此设计 AnisoAlign 框架，利用目标模态内部几何先验对源模态表征进行有界校正，构造目标模态中的替代表征。

📊实验结果

摘要提到实验在几何诊断和纯文本 MLLM 训练中验证了效果，但未提供具体数值或基准。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了模态间隙的各向异性残差结构本质，将模态间隙从经验观察重新定义为可校正的结构化几何现象。
  • 提出了各向异性模态间隙对齐原则及 AnisoAlign 框架，实现了非配对模态对齐，并在几何诊断和纯文本 MLLM 训练中验证了有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖目标模态的几何先验，可能对先验质量敏感。
  • 仅验证了文本到视觉模态的对齐，其他模态对（如音频 - 视觉）的泛化性未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Training multimodal large language models has long been limited by the scarcity of high-quality paired multimodal data. Recent studies show that the shared representation space of pretrained multimodal contrastive models can serve as a bridge, enabling models to perform multimodal training with unimodal data. However, the key premise of this paradigm remains insufficiently understood: can representations from different modalities be reliably interchanged? The core obstacle lies in the persistent Modality Gap in the shared space. In this work, we revisit the geometric nature of the modality gap. We find that modality representations already share compatible dominant semantic geometry. What truly hinders modality interchangeability is not a simple global shift, but an anisotropic residual structure concentrated along a small number of dominant directions. Based on this finding, we further propose the principle of anisotropic modality gap alignment: effective modality alignment should align with the target-modality distribution while preserving the semantic structure of the source modality. Guided by this principle, we propose an anisotropic geometric correction framework, AnisoAlign, for unpaired modality alignment. This framework leverages the internal geometric prior of the target modality and performs bounded correction on source-modality representations, thereby constructing substitute representations in the target modality. Experiments confirm its benefits in both geometric diagnostics and text-only MLLM training. Overall, this work recasts the modality gap from an empirical observation into a correctable, structured geometric phenomenon and provides a new representation alignment perspective for training multimodal models with unimodal data.

没有匹配当前筛选条件的论文。
